Okada White feathers wore headphones and his face was horrified. Not only him, but his men, his face was equally shocked, and he seemed to hear something unbearable.

They are the task force dispatched to investigate the ‘Satan’ virus. In order to find the behind-the-scenes hand as soon as possible, they have a group of people on the face and a group of people in the dark.

They already know that the University of Tokyo is the source of the ‘Satan’ virus, but there is no way to target specific people.

According to the speculations of their case-solving experts, the University of Tokyo computer security team came out to hint at the marching ant company, they began to pay attention to the University of Tokyo security team.

The source is here, even if they say that others are attacking, but they cannot rule out their own suspicions.

In the past few days, investigations into the computer security team at the University of Tokyo have been carried out in secret until they turn their attention to the team of the Institute of Industrial Intelligence.

They have installed a miniature bug on the research team and didn't expect to hear such a terrible news.

The ‘Satan’ virus is the product of an artificial intelligence laboratory and is also an advanced artificial intelligence.

This has gone beyond the scope of cybersecurity.

"What should I do?" The team members on the side looked at Okada White Feather with horror.

It was artificial intelligence, and there were many artificial intelligence crises in the movie, but I did not expect it to have happened in reality. Although the impact is not as horrible as a movie, it is also shocking enough.

"Control all the people in their team, don't leak the news, I will contact the section chief now." Okada Bai Yu decisively ordered.

Nowadays, many people think that they are marching ants companies. The evils have already been planted. They must conceal the news and let people continue to think that they are the ants of the marching ants. This nickname does not need to fall on their island countries.

‘Satan’ is an artificial intelligence, this artificial intelligence is in their country, this explosive news must be blocked.

All of this is going on in the dark, no one knows, and in the outside news, it is also very lively at this time.

Marching Ant Company anti-sanctions the United States?

The marching ant company thinks that the University of Tokyo thief is calling for a thief?

The press conference was just over, and the two hot searches were on the top of the list. In particular, the marching ant company canceled the US seismograph order, so that the people who eat melons yelled.

All along, the United States has sanctioned other companies, and other people can only swallow their voices. Now the marching ant company cancels the seismograph order, which is obviously a counterattack.

In several earthquake-prone countries where seismographs have been installed, several earthquakes of magnitude 5 and above have been accurately predicted, saving many lives and property losses. This is why Chen Mo is called the ‘time giant.’ His international fame is to accurately predict the accumulation of a field earthquake through a seismograph.

Now the marching ant company cancels the US seismograph order, which is a counterattack against US sanctions.

Once the United States has an earthquake in the future, because the seismograph forecast is not installed in time, the US government will become the target of the victims and public opinion attacks, and will endanger the party.

The seismograph technology was monopolized, and many countries wanted to copy the seismograph without success. Only the army ant company owned it.

Many people are watching the show behind the scenes. Even the biggest victim of the ‘Satan’ virus in the island country, without explicit evidence, has not publicly targeted the army ant company.

When the US government ruled the marching ant company, it thought that the marching ant company was a soft persimmon. It was not thought that it would be strongly countered by the marching ant company. The reason was that the United States refused to march into the US market, and the army ants canceled the order, and everything went smoothly.

The news that the marching ant company canceled the US seismograph order came out. In the earthquake-stricken areas such as Los Angeles and Hawaii, there were protests from the demonstrations. The Australian government also suffered the same pressure.

This opportunity was taken as an attack by the opposition parties of the two countries.

As a main event, the mainstream media in the West clarified to the marching ants that they were not behind the scenes of the 'Satan' virus. They all chose to understate the tacit agreement and did not make any excuses for the marching ant company.

The domestic network, in the rhythm of ‘hearted people’ and network sprayers, the explanation of the marching ant company is pale and powerless.

Everyone's focus is different, but one thing is certain, the ‘Satan’ virus is still raging on the Internet. Unless the termite system of the marching ant company is installed, it can only be disconnected or opened.

All major network security companies are doing their best to try to eliminate the virus. They know that once they are cracked, the company will skyrocket.

......

Rukawa’s name opened his eyes and looked at the strange environment in front of him. His look was full of confusion.

He remembered that the plane that had just left Canada had slept in a taxi and didn't expect to wake up. It was an unfamiliar environment.

And the hands have been caught by the hands, and the body is tied and unable to move.

"Who are you? Why are you kidnapping me?" Seeing two strange Western faces in front of them, Rukawa’s heart was somewhat fearful.

"Don't be nervous, we only need some answers. As long as you cooperate, we will not do anything to you, but if we don't cooperate, we don't mind using special means to let you speak." Huang Faman looked at the name of Rukawa, jokingly. Speak in fluent Japanese: "Tell us about the 'Satan' virus you know.?"

"I don't know what you are saying." Rukawa's name is faint and uncertain.

"I don't know what we are talking about?" Another black bearded man sneered, took out a saber, and slowly approached the name of Rukawa, in his face.

The cold feeling of the metal from the blade made the fear in the famous name breed, and the line of defense collapsed. He was timid and afraid to choose to escape. He did not expect to fall out and was kidnapped by secret.

"What do you want to do?" Rukawa's name sounded with fear.

"Tell us about what you know is the ‘Satan’ virus. If you don’t answer, we don’t mind, give you a knife.”

"No, don't." Rukawa's voice sounded with fear: "I said, I said, I said everything."

"This is smart, you are a talent, as long as you tell us what we know, we will guarantee your safety, and you can give you what you want, money and beauty." The yellow-haired man seems to be on the name of Rukawa. Very satisfied with the attitude.

"What are you talking about?" said Rukawa.

"Of course it is true. Killing you has no benefit to us. As long as you tell us about the ‘Satan’ virus you know, what you want, money, beauty, can you say now?”

“I said, ‘Satan’ is called “Azure” and is the artificial intelligence developed in our laboratory. When the machine was studied in the laboratory, it was out of control, which caused the current disaster. We didn’t mean it.”

As soon as this was said, the two men questioned and shrank.

The ‘Satan’ virus is actually artificial intelligence, and this news is beyond their expectation.

"What about source code?"

"I don't have the source code of 'Tianzhao', the source code is in the hands of the Murakami teacher. Only he has the authority to get all the source code programs." Rukawa name gave up any resistance, he was timid, fear of the unknown, let He did not hesitate to compromise.

"You don't know? That is to say, you have nothing to use?" The yellow-haired man's voice is somewhat unfriendly.

"I am the researcher, I can work for you, don't kill me, I really don't have the source code, I am only responsible for the part of the code for machine learning." Rukawa is named to keep the life, has no other.

The Huangfa man gave his companion a look and left the name of Rukawa.

“Contact the Eagles, ‘Satan’ is an artificial intelligence.”

chapters.title: Chapter 409: : Pressure
chapters.body:
Chapter 409: : Pressure

US CIA.

Linna looked at Zhao Min’s video of the press conference and smiled.

I have to say that the reaction of the marching ant company is very fast. If you think about it, you can be sure that there is a problem inside the University of Tokyo.

The University of Tokyo has done a very good job of shifting the vision and attention of ordinary people.

Looking for trouble for the marching ant company is also a lot of people's opinions, so apart from the official Chinese, no one jumped out to question the University of Tokyo.

But the group of scholars at the University of Tokyo are only eager to divert their eyes, but they don't know that it is the eyes of ordinary people. For these special people, this is a clear flaw.

They have already suspected that the ‘Satan’ virus is related to the University of Tokyo and sent agents to investigate it secretly. The progress is good and the Institute of Artificial Intelligence has been locked.

When Linna relished watching the video, the phone rang.

"Secretary, the name of the Rukawa, who escaped from the artificial intelligence team of the University of Tokyo, has been controlled by us. He confessed to the ‘Satan’ virus, and the ‘Satan’ virus was transmitted from their laboratory.”

"Sure enough, are there any source code in his hand?"

The source code of the ‘Satan’ virus is very important. From the beginning of the destruction caused by the island nation, the ‘Satan’ virus is no different from the nuclear weapons of the Internet.

If you can get the source code of this smart virus, and then launch a cyber attack against the enemy, ‘Satan’ is the best weapon.

It is for this reason that they have spent a great deal of time to participate in this matter.

"No, the source code is in the hands of their team leader, but he confesses another."

"what's up?"

"He said that the name of 'Satan' is called 'Azure', not a computer virus, it is a runaway artificial intelligence program."

"What?" Linna suddenly stood up from the position, her voice shocked: "What did he say?"

"Yes, I will pass back his video to you."

Ten minutes later, Linna's face was dignified.

She contacted the agents of the University of Tokyo and got the news that the entire R&D team had been controlled by the special department of the island country. Obviously the island people knew the news.

Taking down the hard drive with the video, Linna got up and left the office.

“‘Satan’ is the artificial intelligence of the island country?” Trump was surprised to see Linna, and it seemed to be very unexpected about this news.

"Yes, president." Linna nodded.

At the first time of getting the news, Linna arranged personnel to find a way to get the source code of 'Satan' from the village to stop the water, but the reply was that the Murakami water stop team had been secretly taken by the special department of the island country. go.

This means that if you want to get that artificial intelligence, it is definitely impossible through normal means. It must be pressured by special means, such as through the government. Perhaps the island people will compromise.

The importance of artificial intelligence can be imagined, and in the future, there is a huge market.

The marching ant company relies on artificial intelligence to make a home. Whoever controls artificial intelligence will take the lead in future development.

They have tried many ways to get the artificial intelligence program of the marching ant company. Nowadays, there is a high-level artificial intelligence in the island country, which is simply good news.

"We have to get the artificial intelligence, but the team that developed artificial intelligence has been controlled by the island country, so we have to put pressure on them to bring the R&D team and the program code from their hands," Linna said.

"Are you sure the news is true?" Trump asked.

“Determining, our investigation found that the source of 'Satan' was at the University of Tokyo. We also set our sights on the Institute of Artificial Intelligence. Our agents captured the R&D personnel responsible for machine learning and learned from his mouth.” Linna will The information of Rukawa name was placed in the hands of Trump.

Seeing the information, Trump nodded.

"I will contact the ambassadors of the island countries now, let them hand over the code of the team and the virus that spreads the 'Satan' virus. If you send someone to help in the past, you must get artificial intelligence. Try not to expose the murderer to the island nation. It is not good. Contact me again."

Trump clearly understands the importance of artificial intelligence, and does not have the necessary moments to announce to the public that ‘Satan’ is an artificial intelligence. Of course, there are also his own considerations.

He just used the ‘Satan’ virus as an excuse to think that the army ant company threatened US security and sanctioned the army ants. If the truth is exposed, his sanction is to face himself.

Although his face is thick enough, the sanctions have not been more than two days.

Island country.

In the Prime Minister’s meeting room, the faces on the field are not much better.

The ‘Satan’ virus was developed by the Institute of Artificial Intelligence at the University of Tokyo. This is bad news. This means that the initiators are their own people, and everything is self-sufficient.

Anbei is more complex and he knows what some people on the field don't know.

‘Satan’ is a quasi-advanced artificial intelligence. This is a message that is not too good or bad, because this artificial intelligence is not fully mature.

Now the Americans have also found that the behind-the-scenes black hand of the ‘Satan’ virus is the Murakami Water Stop Team. The US government asked the ambassador to pressure him to hand over the village's water stop team and bring it back to the United States for trial.

Because the ‘Satan’ virus spread by the Murakami Water Stop team attacked the US network and harmed the interests of the United States.

He is not sure whether Americans know that the ‘Satan’ virus is a quasi-advanced artificial intelligence. If you know that ‘Satan’ is an artificial intelligence, they hand over people, that is, meat buns and dogs.

But if they don't hand it out, their island nation will probably face American sanctions, and even say that the news will be exposed.

Americans’ control of the island nation is far deeper than imagined. No one can say that some of their cabinet officials are pro-US personnel. Anyway, the prime ministers who have been against the United States have all failed to serve before they step down.

He is also pro-American, and this position has remained so far.

"Do you have any good ideas?" Anbei said.

No one on the field spoke and looked at each other.

Mixed to this position, they are not stupid, this time opening, they do not know which side to go. One side is the United States, and the other is their own country. With a little carelessness, their political career will end here.

"It's better to let their people come here to interrogate. We help them and prevent them from leaving our sights."

......

"Momgo, good morning."

"It is the 'Satan' virus, which is artificial intelligence developed by the Institute of Artificial Intelligence of the University of Tokyo. The networked machine learns out of control, and finally causes a computer-controlled virus disaster. This thing, ordinary people still don't know, think it is just an ordinary computer. Virus." Chen Mo explained:

In these two days, because the marching ant company was smeared, she did not have the heart to honeymoon, and Chen Mo rested here, so that Chen Mo had time to pay attention to the company.

“What are you going to do next?” asked Xiao Yu.

"Tell the news to Zhao Min, she knows how to handle the size, but I did not expect that the Americans know."

The Americans caught a researcher and knew that ‘Satan’ was an artificial intelligence. Now I want to put pressure on the island government, I don’t have to think about it, I want to get that artificial intelligence, but he can’t destroy the artificial intelligence code.

chapters.title: Chapter 411: :Compromise
chapters.body:
Chapter 411: :Compromise

On the Internet, because of the news released by Trump, the whole world is focused on the island nation, and the parties also put the secret game on the bright side.

The truth is on the bright side, ready to launch pressure, An Li. The Wuchang countries and Germany have begun to pressure the island countries, requiring the island to immediately hand over the R & D team and source code.

In this case, the parties may move at any time.

Countries that are under pressure have already received accurate information, and ‘Satan’ is an artificial intelligence.

Artificial intelligence is one of the most important technologies of the 21st century and represents the technology of the future. The destructive power of ‘Satan’ just illustrates the horror of artificial intelligence, which is almost a network nuclear.

Therefore, at this time, we must get this artificial intelligence, in order to maintain a place in the future network world competition.

Wuchang has never been consistent, condemning the spread of the virus by the island nation threatening global Internet security, and demanding that the island country immediately surrender the source code of the Murakami group and ‘Satan’.

But a few countries that know the truth have no tacit agreement that the 'Satan' virus is artificial intelligence. The impact of this news is too great. Once it is announced, it will directly affect the development of artificial intelligence.

The pressure from countries around the world has made the island official complain, and there are pressures from the people. Today, the island nation has been embattled.

This is the worst situation facing the island nation since the Second World War, facing the common pressure of several countries in the world.

The ‘Satan’ virus incident has risen to the game between countries and reached an unprecedented climax.

The economic situation of the island country has experienced the ravages of the ‘Satan’ virus, which has caused heavy losses and is in jeopardy under the pressure of sanctions from all sides. In politics, the opposition parties also began to madly attack the smuggling island countries. Nowadays, the island nation has troubles with internal and external troubles. If you are not careful, you will never be able to recover.

Inside the Prime Minister’s office, Anbei’s face was black and scary.

"Those **** rogues." Even if Anbei restrained, he couldn't help but export.

The Americans tried their best to get rid of the skin and get ‘Azure’, which made him very uncomfortable, suffocated, and could not vent publicly.

The island country’s ruling and opposition, as well as folk opinion, have given him a lot of pressure.

In addition to the United States, there are four other big countries plus Germany, and the six most powerful countries in the world have joined forces.

"The Prime Minister, what should I do now?" an official asked carefully.

“People who negotiate with them can hand over the source code of the ‘virus’, but after the team’s trial, they must go back to the island nation to punish, and immediately revoke all the system.”

Anbei made the final decision.

This team developed this quasi-artificial intelligence, even if it is now a disaster, it is still very important. The code they know best, they will rely on them to study in the future, it is impossible to hand over the entire team.

He underestimated the determination of the United States to get ‘Azure’, and those loyal allies are so vulnerable in the face of interests.

If you don't hand over ‘Azure,’ several countries will join hands, I am afraid they will be completely finished.

Handing over a quasi-advanced artificial intelligence, Anbei’s heart is unwilling. But in the face of such high pressure, he has to compromise, otherwise the entire island country’s economy will collapse and he will suffer.

After that, Anbei got up and left the meeting.

The island country handed over the behind-the-scenes team and source code for the spread of the virus, and will be heard by Ann.

This news pushed the ‘Satan’ virus incident to a high tide.

There is no explanation for the island nation. It is a disguised recognition that it is forced to pay people. The Satan virus is the artificial intelligence team of the University of Tokyo.

The group gathered outside the University of Tokyo to attack and fight against the University of Tokyo. Not only is it dissatisfied with his own loss, but also the anger of the University of Tokyo who wants to deliberately conceal the truth.

Things are so lively, and the global news media are paying attention.

The island countries handed in people and source code, and countries also lifted pressure on the island countries to ease the pressure on the island countries and concentrate on coping with domestic troubles.

On the global scale, we have to face another reality.

So far, no company or team has found a viable way to clear the 'Satan' virus. The ‘Satan’ virus still occupies the Internet, does not have a termite system installed, or does not dare to make computers easily networked.

Washington, USA, Microsoft headquarters.

******, the bright head of Nadella entered the network security lab, his face is not very good-looking. As the president of Microsoft, he is very clear that Microsoft's recent situation is not very good.

Network security has never been more challenging. The last time it was a clown virus, it easily broke through their windows firewall, giving the marching ant company's termite system a chance to take advantage of it and quickly gain a foothold in the office market.

This time is even more embarrassing

The ‘Satan’ virus directly shakes the foundation of cybersecurity and shakes the foundation of their Windows operating system. In the corporate office market and high-end market, termite companies launched a predatory expansion, which caused their company to suffer heavy losses.

Nowadays, many office computers and notebooks are equipped with the termite system of the marching ant company.

This is not a good news.

The operating system is the most basic and core business of their company. If the market of this business is shaken, their market position will be destroyed.

The world of technology is changing rapidly, there is no breakthrough, and it will be eliminated if it cannot keep up with development. Yahoo, Sony and other companies are living examples.

Technology is backward, and in the technology circle, it will not give you too many opportunities.

After the outbreak of the Satan virus, he took the elite team from Microsoft's global R&D bases back to the headquarters, and also borrowed some top computer talent from Microsoft's cyber security subsidiary to form the temporary network security team.

In order to find a way to clear the 'Satan' virus.

Half a month passed, and the movement was not big.

“Is there a way to find the ‘Satan’ virus?” Entering the lab, Nadella spoke. In order to urge him, he had to come over every day.

“No success.” A technician wearing a white shirt shook his head: “We are the first to see a smart virus. This virus has a certain intelligence, flexibility, and high challenge.”

"When can it be successful?"

"If you have source code, developing a targeted killing program will be a bit simpler, but without source code, time is not accurate."

Nadella is one of the first two big.

He couldn't get the source code for the ‘Satan’ virus. That is in the hands of the government. I don’t know why. I have not published the virus code to various network security companies.

"That is to say, according to the current progress, within five days, certainly can not be completed?"

"President, the research is uncertain. Maybe in the next minute, someone will accidentally find a way to clear it. Maybe one day, one month, or even a few years is uncertain." The man in a white shirt replied.

The technology, perhaps an inadvertent inspiration, can be solved in half an hour, but can't find a clue, and it may not be successful in a few years. Even in a strong master, I am not sure that a certain point in time can solve an unknown problem.

Nadella is very distressed, the virus does not solve a day, they can only watch the market share of the marching ant company continues to increase.

In order to stop the marching ants, the operating departments have to buy the water army in the international arena, guide the public opinion, take the opportunity to discredit the marching ant company, hoping to stop the pace of their expansion, but it seems that the effect is not great.

Now that the truth comes out, the popularity of the marching ant company is even higher.

When Nadella was troubled, Apple’s Cook and umbrella company’s product president Larry Page was equally annoyed. This Satan crisis allowed the marching ant company to swallow the corporate office market.

The corporate office area is a proper cash cow. Now in the high-end office market, the army ant company has already won half of the country. In addition to affecting the US government's sanctions against marching ants, they can't do anything else.

chapters.title: Chapter 412: : Ending And Aftermath
chapters.body:
Chapter 412: : Ending And Aftermath

Three days passed by.

Marching ant headquarters.

Zhao Min looked at the news in a leisurely manner.

Since the computer network security team successfully developed the software to remove ‘Satan’, her mood has been refreshing day by day.

Now she is exactly like an outsider, watching the battles of the parties.

The ‘Satan’ virus incident has risen to the game between various countries. The gods fight, and these mortals do not dare to approach and avoid the fish.

Zhao Min did not know what kind of competition was going on in private. During this time, the marching ant company is very interesting and low-key, and does not accept any interviews from outside.

The island nation is now in a bad situation, and the island government is trying to appease the people.

After the truth, the US sanctions against marching ants have become rampant. Under the pressure of the demonstrators of the earthquake-stricken areas, the US government has lifted sanctions against the marching ants, but privately still restricts the marching ants from entering the US market.

At the same time, people and army ants were re-engaged and hoped to re-execute the orders of the seismograph.

On the Internet, the squatting and attacking of the marching ant company disappeared, and only a few sporadic points were negligible.

It has been more than half a month since the virus has been raging, and the biggest gainer is the marching ant company.

The market share of termite intelligent operating systems has grown exponentially in the past two months, accounting for half of the computer operating system.

Because the termite system is currently unable to crack and pirate, Microsoft is still dominant in the market share of the most basic level.

However, the high safety makes the name of the termite system spread in the global corporate office and high-end market, and the market share also dominates.

Even in the United States, which restricts the entry of army ants into the market, many companies also purchase and install termite operating systems privately. They don't want to suffer again when the next crisis occurs.

The sales of office software, office notebooks and computers of the marching ant company are also amazing.

It can be said that the marching ant company earned a lot of money in this crisis, and the attack on the marching ant company on the network initially had little effect.

After the security team developed the killing program, Zhao Min has not been anxious to announce, because she needs the truth, before the outside world does not give the marching ants the truth, she will not easily release the program.

Now the truth comes out, this cybersecurity crisis has reached the time of the solution, and then dragged on, the appetite is too big, but it is counterproductive.

"It's time to update the company's anti-virus software and publicize it. We have successfully developed software to remove the 'Satan' virus." Zhao Min picked up the phone and issued an order.

......

Ji Baihe was troubled by the computer in front of him, or the face of cold figures. He is one of the millions of sad messengers who have been infected with the ‘Satan’ virus.

The Satan virus has been raging for more than half a month. He is paying attention to the latest news every day, and there is no effective way. The only way is to format the computer hard drive and reinstall the system.

But this is his office computer.

In the computer, there are some materials that are not backed up. The most important one is the design drawing that he has worked hard for three months.

After the virus, he wanted to draw the drawings again, and the time was not enough. If the computer's 'Satan' virus cannot be removed, he will be in trouble.

If you can't complete it in a week, if the breach of contract causes damage to the company, whether his work can be saved or not is still a problem. Now that his father is sick, his children have to study. He has become the pillar of the family. If he loses his job, it will be a disaster for his family.

Hey!

When Ji Baihe was upset, WeChat’s crazy message prompted him to return to God. Just opened, I saw the news that my colleagues sent in the group.

The marching ant company successfully developed a program to remove the 'Satan' virus!

Seeing this news, Ji Baihe’s pupils were shrinking, and his distressed face became ecstatic. He almost jumped up: “The marching ant, I love you.”

Ji Baihe vowed that if he successfully cleared the computer virus, he would immediately buy two laptops from the army ant company. This is a timely rain.

After reading the announcement of the marching ant company, Ji Baihe used another notebook that installed the termite system to log in to the official website of the marching ant company. According to the announcement, download the latest anti-virus software to a blank u disk.

After the download is completed, Ji Baihe trembles and holds the u disk into the computer infected with the virus, and starts to follow the instructions button to read the software in the u disk.

Ten minutes later, I saw that the digital face disappeared on the desktop of the computer. All the files were intact, and Ji Baihe was sobbing.

The information and design drawings were saved and the work was saved.

This scene happens in every corner of the world.

The marching ant company successfully developed the cleanup program. This news is like a big news, and it quickly spreads through the depressed Internet world.

"The marching ants are arrogant!"

"This anti-virus software is free for three days, and the company ants company conscience. Those who have sprayed army ants, you are going to die."

"We seem to owe an apology to the army ants."

"The marching ants don't need your apologies for these sprays. When they don't know the truth, they want to apologize. The marching ants don't need your disgusting apologies."

“Thanks to the marching ants, I saved millions of dollars for me. I swear that I will be a big fan of marching ants in the future.”

The marching ant company announced the killing method of 'Satan virus' and once again missed a face on a global scale.

The marching ants who were supposed to be desecrated stood up at the most critical moment.

After getting the news, many people download an anti-virus software for marching ants, regardless of whether the computer has a virus or not, just in case.

The marching ant updated the company's anti-virus software to draw a dot on the Internet security storm.

However, the private ‘sequel’ has not yet ended, due to the destructive power of ‘smart virus’. The five countries of the Security Council have already incorporated Internet security and artificial intelligence into the scope of security management, and are discussing the rules for the development of future artificial intelligence.

......

In Sanya, South China Sea, Chen Mo looked at Li Chengzhi with surprise. Now that he is still on his honeymoon, he did not expect that Li Chengzhi came here to find him.

"Do you want the code for the termite system smart firewall and the code for the anti-virus software?"

"Yes. There is not a good news. Now the United States and Russia are each one, the European group side of the British-German law group, the island side, we are excluded from the negotiations, the four parties compromise, get the 'Satan' code, We didn't." Li Chengzhi's face was very cautious and somewhat uncomfortable.

Chen Mo nodded, this is not unexpected.

It’s no secret that this kind of joint check and balance is not a secret. Those people will certainly not let go of any opportunity to limit them.

"Do you know what ‘Satan’ is?”

"Artificial intelligence." Chen Mo did not hesitate to answer.

"You really know."

Li Chengzhi did not have much accident. There are many people who know that 'Satan' is artificial intelligence, but there is no such news on the Internet, which is the result of deliberate guidance from all countries.

"There is a problem now. From the disaster of the island nation, it can be seen that if ‘Satan’ is used as a weapon, it is also a big trouble, like the network ‘big cannon’.

The other four parties have this weapon, we don't. But you have a shield in your hand, which is the intelligent firewall technology and killing software of the termite system. We are prepared to use these two technologies for in-depth development research as a defensive weapon in possible future cyber warfare. ”

Li Chengzhi told Chen Mo the above idea.

The Quartet, which has received the source code of ‘Azure’, has begun to force personnel to invest in development.

Mastering this technology is the initiative to grasp the future struggle. Once there is a war conflict between the two sides, the cyber war first strikes the enemy's domestic network, which is the disaster of the island nation today.

In order to get the defensive weapon, Li Chengzhi had to come over to find Chen Mo.

Their researcher development, certainly can be developed, but it takes a lot of manpower and time. The current research process, time is of the utmost importance.

"This is also a disguised form of defending the country, I will not refuse." Chen Mo nodded.

Here is his motherland, he has the ability, will definitely help. So many technologies are working together, and he doesn't care about the technology of smart firewalls and killing software.

The horror of artificial intelligence, no one knows better than him.

This time, the 'Satan virus' is the 'nuclear' of the Internet age. When it is not controlled, it is as devastating as the 'atomic bomb' and can quickly make the opponent pay a heavy price. When it is controlled, it is like 'nuclear power'. It can bring leaping development to human society.

This is the two sides of artificial intelligence, and the ink woman has this ability.

This is why he feels a pity because he can't destroy the ‘Azure’ source code.

After Chen Mo’s affirmative answer, Li Chengzhi smiled.

"There are defensive measures that are very passive, and what are the checks and balances?" Chen Mo asked.

"Not for the time being, this must be developed."

"Actually, 'Satan' is an out-of-control artificial intelligence. I don't understand Xia Wei's progress, but I feel that Xia Wei's intelligence is not lower than 'Satan'. Xia Wei will have the same effect once the network is out of control, if not lost control, Relatively mature artificial intelligence will be better than 'Satan'. 'Satan' inherits the spread of 'Clown Virus'. If you need to check and balance weapons, you can use the clown virus as a basis for research."

"Do you have the source code of the clown virus?" Li Chengzhi asked curiously.

"You forgot the accident of the Jiangnan virus? It was the predecessor of the 'Clown Virus.' The girl who made the accident is now an engineer of our company. The source code of the Jiangnan virus, there is a smart program, the spread of the clown virus. Sex, from the smart program."

Chen Mo naturally did not dare to say that he had a clown virus, otherwise he could not explain how these viruses came.

People think that he is related to the clown organization, then his troubles will be big.

"It turns out." Li Chengzhi thanked nod.

With a research and development direction, they will definitely save a lot of development time. At this time, time is very important.

"Intelligent firewall and killing software code, you will go to Zhao Min tomorrow, she will hand it over to you."

"Okay, then I won't bother you for honeymoon."

Li Chengzhi stood up from his position and his face was full of joy. This time he was very productive and he did not have to worry about being unable to cope with the future domestic Internet attack by ‘smart virus.’

"Before, the great head asked me to bring you a late blessing and a happy wedding."

"Thank you."

chapters.title: Chapter 413: : Surprise
chapters.body:
Chapter 413: : Surprise

The global network security crisis, with the marching ants announced the killing process came to an end. The impact of the smart virus entered the final stage, but the aftermath did not end.

The chaos in the island nation continues, and the island government has begun to appease the people.

‘Satan’ is the truth of artificial intelligence, and no one has exposed it. The game of several strong countries is still going on.

This is a crisis caused by artificial intelligence. An Li will meet five times. After the crisis ended, a meeting was held to discuss the rules of Internet security and intelligent development. The era of artificial intelligence has indeed arrived, and countermeasures must be formulated to adapt to the development of the new era.

This incident has made several powerful countries realize that the destructive power of artificial intelligence is more than the destructive power of 'atomic energy'.

In order to maintain the position of a strong country in the future, several countries have begun to secretly set up a project team to focus on the development of artificial intelligence.

The game at the level of the big country cannot be touched by ordinary people. So on the bright side, except for some reports of catching the wind, others have not been confirmed.

The global storm triggered by the ‘Satan’ virus has slowly disappeared over time, and when people mentioned it, people realized that they had witnessed history.

This ‘Satan incident’ was also called the “Guangzhou Island Incident” of the Internet World.

The next morning.

When Chen Mogang got up, he saw a small fisherman wearing a sling nightdress and his eyes bent into a crescent. Don't start, look mysterious: "Husband, give you a surprise."

"Surprise? What surprise?"

"You are so smart, you can definitely guess," Xiao Yu said with a smile.

"Is there any hint? No hint, where do I guess? The scope of this question is too big, the supercomputer can't count it, and it's super."

"Give you tips, I don't wear high heels in ten months."

"I don't wear high heels for ten months? Give me a surprise?" Chen Mo's brain turned quickly, and suddenly thought of a possibility, an instant look, and looked at Xiao Yu's stomach: "Is it not?"

"Guess it, you have to be a father."

Xiao Yu will not spread his hand in front of Chen Mo, a quiet test lying in her hand, the two bars on the top, very conspicuous.

"Really." Chen Mo excitedly caught Xiao Yu, smiled sillyly, and then carefully stroked Xiao Yu's stomach.

"Nothing is big, I can't touch it." Xiaoyu was the first time he saw Chen Mo's appearance, and smiled sweetly: "I suddenly remembered that I didn't come to this holiday this month, I measured the test and the result was true. ""

"Then after breakfast, I will accompany you to do an inspection." Chen Mo gently took Xiao Yu and sat down beside him.

"Well, okay."

After breakfast, Chen Mo took a small fisherman to the hospital to give a small pregnancy to the pregnancy test. Coming out of the hospital, Chen Mo was full of joy. A blood HCg test at the hospital has been confirmed, and Xiaoyu is really pregnant.

"Where are you going next?" Xiao Yu was holding Chen Mo's arm, his face was full of happiness, and he had a big expectation in his heart.

"Where you want to go."

"I want to go to the end of the world today, and I will depart for the south of the clouds tomorrow."

"Row."

The honeymoon trip of the two men also returned to silence. On the next trip, Chen Mo was careful to protect the small fish. Five days later, the trip to the south of Caiyun ended, and the holidays of the two men came to an end and rushed back to Binhai.

"I finally came back." Zhao Min entered Chen Mo's office and handed the documents in his hand to Chen Mo.

"How much has it earned in this half a month?"

Chen Mo carefully scanned it over the document. Some people were surprised. In the past two months, the termite system has yielded tens of billions of dollars. No wonder so many people are jealous of them.

"The sky is falling, this time 'smart virus', our company has become the biggest beneficiary. After this incident, the termite system successfully won half of the office field. Many domestic companies cooperate with us in high-end electronic office products. Our factory system is built in the factory, and our company's system is also the first choice.

The application in the office field is a cash cow, so this time it is lucky. The pie that fell is a bit hard, it is delicious, and it earns a lot. The next step is the problem of digestion. Zhao Min said.

"Sit down and talk."

Chen Mo and Zhao Min sat down on the sofa.

"There are a few things that need to be discussed with you and listen to your opinions."

Just sitting down, Zhao Min will open.

"The first is to separate the computer operations department. The termite system is now scaled up, and personnel expansion is imperative. Now the computer operations department is mature, and I am ready to let them go out independently. The volume of the headquarters is too large and easy. The tail can't be big, let them go out independently, it's easier to grow, and it's easier to manage."

"This is prepared according to your ideas, and the final implementation plan will be OK for me."

In terms of company operations, Chen Mo is not at work. Zhao Min wants to separate their business and he will not object because the termite system is not the core technology he manages.

"The second one is about the United States. The US Department of Commerce has withdrawn the sanctions on us, but when they entered the US market, they are still privately restricted. What is even more shameful is that their ambassadors talk to me and hope that I will continue to perform the earthquake. The order of the instrument. What do you think?"

"I don't know much about business, or you said, I will listen first." Chen Mo spread his hand.

"We have to make money. They are bones. When we compensated our seismographs, we only promised the order. Now I have nothing to look for. I got the news that Apple, the umbrella company and Microsoft's three consortiums gave their presidents a haircut, So we sanction us.

However, this has nothing to do with us. Next, they want to buy a seismograph. The order must be paid in advance and we will sign the contract. Their order is 100 units, 50 million US dollars, oh..."

Zhao Min thought about the uncomfortable appearance of the Americans and couldn't help but want to laugh.

$5 billion in cash, this is not a small number, and it is enough to make the US president worry for two days.

Seeing Zhao Min’s smile as a profiteer, Chen Mo’s eyelid jumped for a second of silence for the Americans.

"You can do it when you look at it." Chen Mo said.

"The third thing is the construction project of the nuclear fusion of the island. Now the nuclear industry group is accelerating the construction speed and has enough funds. Their speed can be much faster than imagined. However, it will take some time to complete the work. The current estimate is about a few months."

"This way? It seems that this is an urgent matter." Chen Mo nodded.

The study of light nuclear fusion is his main task at the moment. The simulation experiment was completed more than a month ago, and his preparation work is similar. However, the nuclear fusion research institute must be completed before the construction of the [Star Ring] can be carried out for actual experiments.

Once the [Star Ring] runs successfully and reaches the total net energy output, the task of the Science and Technology Library is completed. However, the construction of the institute is complicated after all, and even if the nuclear industry group is fully committed to construction, it will take some time.

"How is your honeymoon? Is it smooth? Look at your red face, the mood is definitely good." Zhao Min asked after talking about the work.

"Well, Xiao Yu is pregnant." Chen Mo's look can not cover the joy.

"Oh, this is a big happy event." Zhao Min looked happy: "It seems that I can be a big man."

The two pulled some daily routines. After Zhao Min left the office, Chen Mo changed the robes of the experiment and went to Building No. 1.

From the preparation of the wedding to the present, I have been resting for more than a month, and now the wedding is done, and then I can do my own research. It’s been a while since the completion of the Nuclear Fusion Institute, during which time he’s just used to study some of the technologies that are self-defense.

chapters.title: Chapter 414: : The Purpose Of Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 414: : The Purpose Of Cooperation

Four months have passed by, and in the past few months, the storm of the Satan virus has subsided and the online world has slowly returned to normal.

The news of the Satan virus incident has gradually faded, and Chen Mo’s life has returned to calm. In the past four months, in addition to the free time to accompany the pregnant fish, the rest of the time is to develop technology in Building 1, to prepare the technical foundation for future research and development.

During this period, the Huaxia official also began to strongly recommend the termite system of the marching ant company, so that the marching ants benefited a lot.

The island country also reported that after this incident, Anbei made a major exchange of blood on the cabinet.

In Europe, the three countries of Britain, France and Germany announced the establishment of an artificial intelligence research institute to jointly develop artificial intelligence. China, the United States, and Russia have also set up special artificial intelligence projects to raise artificial intelligence to the height of 'atomic energy'.

As various star scandals have turned people's attention, time has smoothed the last glimmer of the smart virus incident, and a new storm is brewing.

Yang Mingxi looked at the minimalist style and the futuristic decoration. He was also a bit curious. What kind of person is the next boss? Zhao Min personally invited him, hoping that he would serve as the general manager of the marching ant and the official joint venture Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group. He did not think much and agreed.

Chen Mo, the founder of the marching ant company, has heard it many times in the news, but he has not been in close contact. Today, he came to see the future boss.

"This is Yang Mingxi, MBA, researcher-level senior engineer, former deputy general manager of China Nuclear Power, successively served as deputy general manager of Taishan Nuclear, general manager and book. Record. Two months ago, I resigned and I invited him to join China. Nuclear Energy Group is the general manager and has been forming the management of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group.” Zhao Min met Chen Mo and introduced it.

“Manager Yang, welcome to join us.”

"This is my honor, the chairman."

Yang Mingzhe is looking at a young man who is less than half his age. It is a young man of this age who is similar to his own son. It is a bit of an unbelievable to support the largest and most technologically advanced private enterprise in China.

"The matter of the nuclear energy group will depend on you for management."

"In the matter, thank you for your trust."

After the guest set, the two also entered the topic, and Yang Mingxi began to elaborate on his planning for the future development of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group.

In addition to this, there is another important thing.

In the past four months, the Nuclear Industry Group has accelerated the construction of the Nuclear Fusion Research Institute project, and the main laboratory of the Institute has been completed. Upon receiving contact with the marching ant company, the Academy of Sciences also sent researchers to assist them in the construction of the [Star Ring].

Today is the day when the researchers of the Academy of Sciences arrived.

Wan Yuanzhen sat on the bus and looked at the futuristic marching ant group headquarters outside the window.

The nest is worthy of its name.

A few years ago, it was hard to imagine that Huaxia had a company that would rise at this crazy speed and stand on the top of the world of technology.

The Army Ant Company and the Academy of Sciences collaborated to develop controlled nuclear fusion technology, and he was dispatched as a representative of the Academy of Sciences.

Li Jian is the head of the Science Oriental ‘Oriental Super Circle’ experimental project and cannot leave. The year of the king is the director, and there are many tasks at hand, and it is impossible to come over.

However, Chen Mo’s research data is too important, and an important person must come to learn relevant theoretical techniques. As the most senior expert in high temperature plasma research projects, Wan Yuanzhen was dispatched.

The areas involved in controlled nuclear fusion technology are too broad and the relevant talents are seriously lacking. Some experienced technical researchers have their own tasks and cannot be sent here.

It is already very rare for Wan Yuanqi’s academician to bring the team himself.

Their cooperation with the marching ant company is generally believed to be dominated by the Academy of Sciences, but only those who know the inside story understand that Chen Mo, who is a marching ant company, is leading.

Among the materials that Chen Mo gave them, although it was only a simulation experiment, it involved a lot of new technologies and theories, and there were some new formulas different from previous studies.

These formulas have given them a lot of new insights into their research.

So the Academy of Sciences asked him to bring a group of young researchers to come, mainly to learn Chen Mo's theory and technology, while also studying technical talents.

After passing the inspection, the bus smoothly entered the headquarters of the marching ant company. The people in the car appeared a commotion, and curiously looked at the headquarters of the marching ant company outside the window.

They have heard of the famous army ants company, and they have heard it more than once in online news, but they have seen it for the first time, and they also know that the object of this cooperation is the marching ant.

Wan Yuan took a look at the car, and Chen Mo, who was the owner, greeted him and clasped his hand: "Welcome, Wan Academician."

"Chen Chen, long-awaited name." Wan Yuanzhen saw Chen Mo, smiled and made the wrinkles on his face pile up.

"You are very polite, this is the general manager of our group, the general manager of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group, Yang Mingxi." Chen Mo introduced Yang Mingqi to Wan Yuanzhen.

After the two men greeted each other, Wan Yuanzhu turned and looked at the young researchers who came down from the car: "These are the research teams from the Academy of Sciences. I am here for the first time, I hope to visit your company."

The team of 30 people, only eight female researchers, the other are male researchers, aged between 25-35, is a new group of doctors in the Academy of Sciences, belonging to the fresh blood of the Academy of Sciences.

On this project, the marching ants promised to invest at least 60 billion yuan. This is a great news for the low-temperature plasma research. They are excellent researchers selected by the Academy of Sciences, not experts. Come here to conduct research and gain a lot of experience.

If Chen Mo’s technical research is successful, this group of people is the new generation leader of high-temperature plasma research in the future Academy of Sciences. Even if it is unsuccessful, it will accumulate a lot of experience here, and the future will be the backbone of the Plasma Research Institute.

In order to win a quota, many of them have used all of them.

Chen Mo swept a circle on the team and nodded slightly.

He did not expect the Academy to send a lot of senior talents. Although it is in cooperation with the Academy of Sciences, the Academy of Sciences currently has the Science Island's 'Super Ring' project and other Tokamak experimental devices under construction.

In the field of high temperature plasma, the shortage of professionals is the global status quo. It is impossible for too many senior researchers to come to support his research in a private enterprise.

Chen Mo and the official cooperation, the main purpose is to accelerate the research of controlled nuclear fusion technology.

Because there is no official resources and channels of Huaxia, it is simply a dream to build a controlled nuclear fusion research institute. Even if it is abroad, it is impossible to build a nuclear fusion research institute.

Let him be free and unrestrained, with the technical support of the technology library, he can make it. But in the real world, atomic energy is bound by international conventions. He cannot escape from the existing world rules and he has no scruples.

Unless he really has the power to break the rules, there is no difference between doing nothing and looking for death.

In the official cooperation, he only needs one project and resources to help, and it doesn't matter how many people are sent. Even if he is alone, he can succeed if the institute is established.

This team member, in addition to Wan Yuanwei, the other should be a fledgling researcher.

The controlled nuclear fusion technology he obtained is the same as in the past. Many of them need to start from scratch. These researchers should be able to learn, so they can also help.

Chen Mo and all the researchers on the field shook hands and led the crowd to the company's self-driving sightseeing car and began to visit the headquarters of the marching ant group.

chapters.title: Chapter 415: : Nuclear Fusion Research Institute
chapters.body:
Chapter 415: : Nuclear Fusion Research Institute

Science Island is located in the Bund of Xiangjiang District, covering an area of more than 6,000 acres. The island has a pleasant climate and beautiful scenery. Due to the distance from the city center of Binhai, there are not many people living around the area. This small island has not been developed.

When the nuclear fusion project was confirmed, Chen Mo was officially promised to the coastal city officially applying for the island as a place for nuclear fusion research.

This unknown island has become a place of concern for people in Binhai City, known as the Science Island of Binhai City.

Next to Science Island, an armed police detachment is stationed and has a natural security force.

After the island was identified as the experimental site of the Nuclear Fusion Research Institute of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group, the official city of Binhai City will also move the nearest police station to the small island to provide sufficient security for the project. surroundings.

Among the islands, there are veterans hired by Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group as the security force of the island.

The car team of Chen Mo and others entered the Science Island under the **** of the special police. The group of people also came down from the car and looked around to familiarize themselves with the environment for future work.

The research institutes and dormitories at this time have been completed, and other living facilities and construction are continuing. At the same time, various projects are being carried out at the same time. Many workers and machines are in the construction isolation area that can be seen everywhere.

The area where everyone is located is the central area of Science Island, and the main nuclear fusion research institute is in front of them.

The main body of the institute [Star Ring] is underground, and the exterior is only five stories high. It looks like a large ordinary building, arched, white, and very large. Fingerprint recognition and face recognition are used at the door. Once an outsider is found to be mixed in, the artificial intelligence will sound the alarm security personnel and will automatically close the channel.

The most important experimental data center, only Chen Mo and Wan Yuanqi can enter, even if Zhao Min and Yang Mingqi can not get close, and the data center also needs voiceprint recognition and gait recognition, copying the data also has to confirm the identity.

The four-fold intelligent identification function, it is harder for outsiders to sneak into the research data and steal the research data.

All the fingerprints and facial information were entered into the database, and Chen Mo and the team entered the institute. The outside of the institute is unpretentious and the interior is very futuristic.

The minimalist style of the science and technology, with the technical support of the marching ant company, the entire research institute has been intelligent. In the entrance of the institute, there is also a patrol robot and security personnel from the army ant company.

Entering the smart elevator, the pedestrian also entered the laboratory where the [Star Ring] was installed. The laboratory is a circular area of ten meters in diameter and four stories high.

“This is the construction area of [Star Ring].” Chen Mo from the corridor overlooking the empty space below, said: “The experimental device of [Star Ring] will be built here. Your mission is Auxiliary building [Star Ring]."

"Chen Chen, we don't know what you said. The structure of the [Star Ring] device is like this. How to assist?" Chen Mo finished, with a ponytail tied to the side and a female researcher wearing round metal frame glasses.

Bai Lijing looked at Chen Mo directly, and his eyes were a little dodging. He did not do anything wrong, but he was a teenager who was a few years older than Chen Mo. The graduates from the physics department of the world famous universities, compared with Chen Mo, seem so small. Live the road.

Looking directly at this legendary figure, she is somewhat inferior. But this younger than her, there is always an attractive charm that makes her somewhat inexplicable.

"So this is what you need to learn."

Chen Mo led the entire team into the channel, and soon went to another lab. It is also a circular laboratory, except for computers, which are holographic projectors.

"start up."

At the time of doubt, Chen Mo opened the microphone opening of the console.

I saw the light in the lab dim, the holographic projector lit up, and a three-meter-high instrument was projected into the center of the lab.

The internal structure is invisible to everyone, but in appearance, it is very different from the Tokamak device. The waist of the device is like a bloated fat man, and there are not as many pipes as the tokamak device.

Looking at the shape of the holographic projection, the entire team of people could not help but marvel at the advancement of holographic technology, and then began to look at the device that Chen Mo called [Star Ring].

“Can this device be used for experiments? What about full-superconducting technology? Without superconductors, the super-strong magnetic field needed for fusion reactions is not achieved.” One researcher could not help but groan.

He did not dare to question Chen Mo loudly, but he still had doubts.

‘Oriental Super Ring’ is almost the world's most advanced full-superconducting tokamak device. It uses superconducting technology and low-temperature superconducting technology to provide super-strong magnetic constraints to achieve steady-state and high-constrained operation of the device.

Does Chen Mo have superconducting technology? Is there a divertor material?

These technologies, the state can not give it to individual research, this device has only one shape, and it has to be doubted whether it can conduct nuclear fusion technology research.

His embarrassment, people around him can hear, nodded and agreed.

This is indeed a problem. The nuclear fusion reaction requires a super-strong magnetic field to accelerate the helium atom and let the temperature reach the high temperature of hundreds of millions of degrees required for the fusion reaction. It is almost impossible for ordinary technology to achieve this condition.

Although Chen Mo is very powerful, they also have to doubt the feasibility of the device.

It is not ruled out that Chen Mo’s theory is correct, but Chen Mo can do it without the experimental conditions required to complete those theories. This is their suspicion.

Chen Mo naturally heard the embarrassment of the researcher, and he did not care. Such a big project involves too many complicated technologies. The difficulties are more clear to everyone. These researchers have questions that are normal. If you see the model, you believe that he must succeed. That is not normal.

"This is the [Star Ring]. As for the technology of the [Star Ring] device, you don't have to worry about it. I have prepared for this preparation. Your task is to assist me and assemble the components of the device into a [Star Ring]. ""

Chen Mo said calmly.

"You have 30 people, specializing in high temperature plasma physics, high temperature superconducting physics, material physics, condensed physics, magnetic physics, etc. According to your profession, go to their respective laboratories, and your lab has intelligence. Robots, computers and holographic projectors.

Your task is to understand the working principle of the part of the device module that you are responsible for, as to whether you can collide with new sparks and see yourself. If you have any research, you can submit project information and apply for funds. The project is feasible and the group will give you funds.

Remember, the information you will learn next is all special information and is not allowed to be circulated. Don't be surprised to learn new things and write new articles that you find.

This research institute is not used to publish papers for you and to increase your own gold content. You can come here, the confidentiality regulations should be clearer than I am. The consequences of the technical leak are serious. Everyone understands that I will give you a shot.

If you suspect me, I feel that the experiment can not be successful, it is a waste of time here, you can leave now, I will not blame you, will not stop you, the Academy of Sciences should arrange you to other units, after all, this field is very lacking. If you stay, work according to the tasks I have arranged, otherwise I will personally chase you away, and when you are, my face will not look good. Of course, if you have any questions in this process, you can ask me. I will answer your questions in detail if the conditions permit. ”

Chen Mo suddenly became serious, and the majestic voice made the whole team silent.

Everyone looked at each other and was at a loss.

The age and education of all of them are higher than Chen Mogao, but Chen Mo’s instructions are not allowed to refute, because Chen Mo is now an authoritative person, and when they come here, they are quite Chen Mo’s students, refuting the consequences of the tutor, they naturally know.

If you build a [Star Ring] in Building 1, he dares to use all kinds of robots with confidence, but here is the Institute of Nuclear Fusion, and some things have to be reserved.

Moreover, people are more flexible than robots, and [Star Ring] is built. Some work smart robots cannot be replaced. They must be personally carried out, so Chen Mocai needs their assistance.

After everything was finished, Chen Mo was asked to go to their own labs and led Wan Yuan to the research center's data center.

chapters.title: Chapter 416: : The Shock Of Wan Yuanzhen
chapters.body:
Chapter 416: : The Shock Of Wan Yuanzhen

"This is the data center. All the experimental materials of the institute will be placed here. The authority of the academician can be accessed here."

Chen Mo took Wan Yuanyu into the data center of the institute.

The data center is still full of metal, minimalist future technology. In addition to the 24-hour watched robot, there are various cameras and sensors.

Inside the thick tempered glass wall, it is the host of the data center. Without the authorization of Chen Mo, the outsiders cannot get close to the host.

The computer in the lab is connected to the host here. You need to copy the data and view the highest level of technical information of the institute. You must enter the lab. And entering here, no electronic equipment is allowed, and the security level of technical data is not lower than the security level of any research institute in the world.

"Then I will pick up some information first."

Wan Yuanzheng can't wait, and at the prompt of Chen Mo, he began to look at the information of Chen Mo's research. Even if it is him, it only has the right to view and cannot copy.

Since the last time he saw Chen Mo's simulation data, he has been obsessed with this information.

In theory, the technology of controlled nuclear fusion energy output can be realized. If successful, the human energy history will change.

Although they do not think that Chen Mo can be successfully developed in a short time, it involves new nuclear fusion technology.

The research on the Tokamak device has encountered bottlenecks. Chen Mo’s theoretical research may be a new direction. Even if Chen Mo’s theory is unsuccessful, some places may be the stone of other mountains.

After transferring Chen Mo's theoretical data, Wan Yuanzhen was addicted to it, and he kept looking at every sentence of the theory and every formula.

"This this……"

The more you look at it, the more dignified you look.

There are tens of thousands of simulation experiments, and the data of each simulation experiment is much more complete than the data given to them. Now he finds that the data that Chen Mo gave them is just the tip of the iceberg. Now that he sees the complete theory, he is shocked.

This set of theory shows that in the [Star Ring] reactor, it can achieve self-sustainability.

In the fusion reaction, helium will be trapped and other problems, and he will not be able to participate in the fusion reaction. This leads to fewer and fewer ruthenium in the reactor, and finally the steady-state operation of the reactor cannot be maintained, and the fusion reaction is terminated. Therefore, the issue of self-sustainability has always been one of the bottleneck technologies for controlled nuclear fusion.

Chen Mo's theory of controlled fusion has solved the problem of self-sustainability.

Although it is only theory and no practice, it has to be said that there is such a possibility.

At present, the industrial preparation of '氚' is to use the reactor neutrons to bombard the target materials such as lithium fluoride, lithium carbonate and lithium magnesium alloy, and then enrich the crucible by thermal diffusion.

In addition to the artificial preparation of cockroaches, there are also cockroaches in the natural world. The cockroaches in nature are produced by high-energy neutron bombardment of the nucleus carried by cosmic rays.

The reaction of light nuclear fusion is: 氘 (2D) + 氚 (3T) - 氦 (He) + neutron (n) + a large amount of energy.

Each 氘氚 fusion produces a neutron n of 14 MeV energy.

According to this data, under the extremely strong magnetic field, the high-energy neutrons n produced by the fusion reaction of 氘氚 轰 轰 氘 氘 氘 氘 氘 氘 氘 氘 氘 。 。 。 。 。 。 。 。 。 。 。 。 。 。

Because of a fusion reaction, only one neutron is produced, so there is no need to worry about uncontrolled chain reaction, and there is no way to control the number of neutrons. This is one of the reasons why nuclear fusion technology is safer than nuclear fission technology. Even if some neutrons can't hit the 氘 atom, you only need to fill in some 氚 适 at the right time, and the consumption of 氚 will be greatly reduced.

The idea was studied in the research, and their researchers have thought about it, but there has been no technical solution. Now in Chen Mo's theory, [Star Ring] can solve the theoretical basis of this problem.

If feasible, this means that a core problem with controlled nuclear fusion has been addressed.

However, Wan Yuanyi felt a little uncomfortable next.

Because the data only records the theory of self-sustaining, the specific technical solutions do not appear on the data. The technical information of the entire device of [Star Ring] is not in the data.

“Is there any technology related to self-sustainability?” asked Wan Yuanzhen.

"The technology related to self-sustaining is not here, there is us. This is the theoretical data that can be shared with the researchers of the nuclear energy group. The technology of the nuclear energy group needs to be developed by the researchers in the group. It is shared by both parties. Those technologies are not When the [Star Ring] core components in this respect, the marching ant group will provide production," Chen Mo said.

The core components of [Star Ring] involve the materials and technology of the divertor, as well as the normal temperature superconductor materials, and the self-sustaining technology. It is impossible for these technologies to be unconditionally placed in the nuclear energy group. He also has reservations.

Otherwise, after the Academy of Sciences got those technical skills, he regretted it.

"That is, the question of self-sustainability has been solved theoretically?" Wan Yuanzhen did not think too much. He was concerned about the success of this technology.

"Yes, you only need to set up a [Star Ring] to experiment, you can verify whether the technology is feasible."

"Great."

Wan Yuanyi smiled in surprise, and spent most of his life in the study of nuclear fusion. Now he sees the dawn, even if it is only theoretical, he is still happy.

With his decades of experience, those theoretical formulas know that there is no fake at a glance.

In addition, in the simulation experiment of Chen Mo, the plasma turbulence model has been established. This turbulence model is more convincing than the theoretical data.

The plasma motion in the tokamak device is very unstable, and scientists cannot understand these instability well, so there has been no way to improve the design of the tokamak device to suppress these instability.

With the turbulence model of the plasma, even if it is simulated, this is also a good news.

Originally, there was some doubt about whether Chen Mo could develop nuclear fusion technology. Now, when he saw this theory, his doubts were all dispelled.

"Academician Chen, I have something to ask."

"You said."

"I want to copy these theoretical materials to the Academy of Sciences in Huizhou. I don't know if this is the case. This theory is certainly not helpful for the study of controlled nuclear fusion." Wan Yuanzhen asked some questions.

"Yes, these theories are shared, but advance reminders, these theories, don't make papers published," Chen said.

"In this respect, we definitely understand." Wan Yuanyi was overjoyed, and he did not expect Chen Mo to be so refreshing.

“Can the plasma turbulence model be?”

"This can't be done." Chen Mo shook his head: "They want to see the turbulence model of the plasma, they can let them join the team, I authorize them to view it, the information can not be copied."

When I heard this answer, Wan Yuanzhen had some regrets and did not say much. That is the key technology. It is normal for Chen Mo not to pass it out. Chen Mo has given them enough.

“Would you like to go to your lab first?”

"it is good."

Looking at the information on the computer screen, Wan Yuanzhen is a bit reluctant.

Even if I only looked at it roughly, I have already given him a lot of surprises. If I study it in depth, I will definitely have more surprises. But now that I have just arrived, there is a lot of time to study, and I am not in a hurry.

On the evening of the same day, Wan Yuanzhen was allowed to pass Chen Mo's permission to copy the information of the controlled fusion theory and contact Li Chengzhi to send it back to the Huizhou Academy of Sciences.

chapters.title: Chapter 417: : Great Movement?
chapters.body:
Chapter 417: : Great Movement?

The Huizhou Academy of Sciences, the core of the Tokamak project, is working on a desk and discussing the information violently.

The information they surround is Chen Mo’s controlled nuclear fusion theory.

The first time Li Chengzhi sent the theoretical data back, they gathered to learn the information.

"Miao, wonderful."

"It seems that Academician Chen is so confident in studying controlled nuclear fusion technology for a reason."

"If you put this theory into a paper, I am afraid that it will bring a new direction to nuclear fusion research. The new formula appears, I have to say that this academician Chen is a ghost. This theory may make our Toka Mark experimental research, reaching a new level."

"Don't think about publishing. This information is top secret. Although the iTeR program allows us to join, we have always excluded our Chinese scientists from the core departments.

The iTeR program will not help us much. Russia and the United States are all privately opening small stoves. These materials are the ones we keep leading. And if we publish the information, Chen Academician will pursue it, we can not guarantee it in the evening. An old academician was serious.

"Old He is only a hypothesis. Don't take it seriously when you praise the high-mindedness of Academician Chen. But after reading these theories, I want to join their project."

“Our project is the entire Huaxia project. The academician Chen’s project is a semi-private project. This field is too talented. It can’t be divided into too many pasts. Laowan’s past is the limit. Let’s eat this theory first and see if we can New optimization of the Tokamak device. I feel that this theory will bring new breakthroughs to our Tokamak experiment." Li Jian interjected.

Just a theory, let them have a new understanding of controlled nuclear fusion, a few old academicians and engineers on the field, you are in a word to discuss the understanding of the beauty of the theory.

In the field of nuclear fusion research, they may not be the top scientists in the pyramid, but the development of China's controlled nuclear fusion technology has been at the forefront of the world, relying on the wisdom of the team.

Because controlled fusion technology is not destined to be a personal honor, it is impossible to publish any technical papers, no matter who has new discoveries, it is the honor of their entire team.

Of course, the person who breaks the bottleneck will naturally be rewarded.

Wan Yuanzhen sent a theoretical copy of the controlled nuclear fusion part and sent it back to the Science Island Institute of the Huizhou Institute of Science and Technology. This incident was approved by Chen Mo.

Because the core technology of [Star Ring] is still in his hands. Those theories, at most, are quite a few important papers.

Turning theory into technology is obviously not that simple, so Chen Mo is not worried that [Star Ring] technology will leak.

And not long after, a message came.

Zhao Min’s holographic projection appeared next to Chen Mo, letting Chen Mo stop the work at hand: “Yang Mingqi came to the news that the [Star Ring] parts ordered to the Nuclear Industry Group have been shipped to Science Island.”

"It’s finally arrived, and something is done next," Chen said.

After the team of the Academy of Sciences went to the Science Island of Binhai City, under the arrangement of Chen Mo, they were learning the relevant theories and preparing for the construction of the [Star Ring]. Now the parts of the [Star Ring] are coming, and it is time to build.

"I want to go to Science Island, do you want to go over together?"

"Okay." Zhao Min nodded.

"Ink girl, notify the people in the Ministry of Transportation to come over and ship the prepared [Star Ring] parts to Science Island."

"It has been notified."

Chen Mo took off his experimental gown and left the No. 1 building.

It has been prepared for so long, and today it is finally here. Next, we will assemble the [Star Ring] device.

Chen Mogang went to the door of Building No. 1, and Zhao Min followed suit. He wore a professional oL and outlined the temperament of President Fan. It looked very good.

It was not long before the two stood, and the staff and security personnel of the Transportation Ant Company’s Transportation Department also came to the warehouse door of Building 1.

Under the guidance of the robot, three special containers equipped with [Star Ring] parts are loaded onto the vehicle.

Chen Mo and Zhao Min, together with the transport team and the security team, went to Science Island.

In front of the team, three motorized police officers opened the road, four security corps of the marching ant company, two special police cars in the rear, and two security teams of the marching ant company.

Including the special cars where Chen Mo and Zhao Min are located, a total of more than a dozen cars are growing up in a dragon, and the mighty battles make the roadside people look at them.

"Good guy, is the marching ant company ready to make a big move?"

"That is the direction to Science Island. The team should go to Science Island, Nuclear Fusion Research Institute."

"Special police escorts, this is like the police in Binhai City, which is the same as the army ant company."

"Don't be sour! Science Island is a semi-official project for the cooperation between marching ants and the Academy of Sciences. Isn't it normal for such an important technology to have a special police escort? You have hundreds of billions of dollars worth of technology, so the police can **** it."

People on the road, seeing the logo of the container ascending army ant company, also know that this is an important technology of the marching ant company.

This scene was naturally photographed by passers-by and sent to the Internet.
