It’s just what is inside the special container. No one knows that such a big battle still makes a lot of speculation on the network.

These things have nothing to do with Chen Mo.

Twenty minutes later, the long team entered the Science Island through the gate to the Science Island Road Bridge.

On the shore of the coast, Dong Quan took a telescope and watched the island entering the island.

He has been here for more than half a year, and he also knows the changes on the island.

The construction of the institute is much faster than imagined. From the current situation, the main research institutes of Science Island have been completed, and the team of the Academy of Sciences has also settled in Science Island. Today, there are two shuttle teams entering Science Island. It is clear that there are big moves in the Science Island.

It is only a step in the project research that he has no way of knowing.

After a long time, Dong Quan only put down the telescope and focused his attention on the fishing rod. This matter is impossible in a short time and can only be laid out slowly.

Not only Dong Quan, with the emergence of the Great Action of Science Island, some people who have the idea of nuclear fusion technology have turned their attention to the Science Island.

On the Science Island, Wan Yuanzhen and members of a group of teams have already waited at the Institute.

They all know that the parts of the [Star Ring] have arrived, and then they will assemble the [Star Ring], they have been learning here for so long, and finally come in handy.

When the team just arrived outside the institute, Wan Yuanzhen stared at the truck with the logo of the marching ant company on the truck, and some could not wait. After coming here, he really saw Chen Mo's various techniques and many techniques, he was very eye-catching.

Controlled nuclear fusion technology, the biggest problem now is the field system, the self-sustaining and divertor material of the first wall.

Self-sustaining has been solved in Chen Mo's theory, and the material of the divertor is also a top priority, which is a key component for maintaining the long-term steady state of the fusion reaction.

As the first wall of the reactor, the divertor requires thermal fatigue properties with a long-term temperature above 800 °C. It also needs to withstand the high temperature of 2000-3000 °C at the moment of plasma bursting, and it also has to resist neutrons. Low activation of radiation capability and plasma radiation capability.

Their research in the Academy of Sciences, the material of the divertor has made a breakthrough, but Chen Mo's divertor material is used by himself. He was very curious about what new materials were developed by marching ants.

In addition, there is a field system. In the current experiment, the superconductor material can provide a sufficiently strong confined magnetic field. It is not a superconductor material. The confined magnetic field is not strong enough and the technicality is difficult to achieve.

Chen Mo's [Star Ring] design, there is no ultra-low temperature system, obviously there is no low temperature superconductor. He also wants to know what materials the field system will use.

“Is there a divertor and field system?”

"Yes, all the core components of the [Star Ring] are inside." Chen Mo nodded.

“Can I know what materials are used for divertors and field systems?”

"The bottom of the furnace is a gallium-copper-graphite-tungsten alloy, which is added with rare earth and some other heat-resistant metal elements. It synthesizes a new type of liquid metal with partial properties of gallium and thermal fatigue of tungsten. The furnace wall is fine-grained. Tungsten-copper alloy," Chen Mo said.

The liquid metal of the divertor is a technology carried in the light nuclear fusion technology given by the Science and Technology Library. The technology of this liquid metal is quite a lot in the technology library, and Chen Mo can synthesize at any time.

"Liquid metal? Have you actually developed liquid metal for divertor?"

Wan Yuan's voice has been broken, with a strong shock. If this news is announced, it may cause vibration in the field of nuclear fusion research.

"What about the material of that system?"

"Temporarily confidential." Chen Mochao Wan Yuanzhen reveals a mysterious smile.

The problem of normal temperature superconducting materials, etc., after the completion of [Star Ring], and then want to publicly announce the problem, it is not the time, he has to concentrate on the issue of [Star Ring].

After talking to Wan Yuanzhen, I went to the other members of the team. The other people on the team saw Chen Mo coming over and immediately got up and looked at him.

"In the past few days, you should master the work you are responsible for. Next, there will be robots with you, start to build [Star Ring], do not understand things, you can ask me, I will also be on the scene. Remember , to ensure that there is no leakage in the process."

chapters.title: Chapter 418: :Star Column
chapters.body:
Chapter 418: :Star Column

In the morning, Chen Mo came out of the room and saw that Xiao Yu was pregnant and was setting tableware at the table.

Now Xiaoyu has been pregnant for five months, and the stomach has already had a very obvious bulge. At this time, the small fisherman has more maternal temperament on his face and is in a very good mood.

"Okay, let me come, let's sit." Chen Mo walked behind the small fisherman, held her down, and reached out and gently touched her belly: "I am pregnant, don't be too tired, there are robots." Babysitter."

"This is just an occasional exercise, not a heavy work, pregnant women have to move it? Otherwise, nothing will be done, it really becomes a waste." Xiao Yu's hands on his stomach, with a gentle smile on his face.

"Well, you are reasonable. Eat breakfast first, remember not to be too tired at home, or you will be killed by your mother." Chen Mo gave Xiao Yu a bowl of porridge.

After breakfast, Xiao Yu gave Chen Mo a shirt: "Don't work too hard, pay attention to your body, come back tonight."

"Well, take a good rest at home. If you have anything to do, let the babysitter or pearl do it. If you want something, just call me."

"I know, I want to give my baby a prenatal education, and I will give you a smart son."

"I like girls, my son is too smart, my mother will be stupid."

"really?"

"I don't see it, it's getting stupid now. So I still have a girl, or I will be a fool for three years." Chen Mo touched the blue hair of Xiaoyu.

Xiao Yu wrinkled his nose and said: "I like my son, stupid is stupid."

"Hey at home, I will come back tonight with you tonight." Chen Mo kissed Xiao Yu's forehead and turned to leave the villa and go to Science Island.

......

"Xiao Jing, you said that Academician Chen is so powerful, why haven't you won an international award? Haven't you won other famous awards?" A woman with a little freckle on her face asked an ordinary female doctor to ask her.

"Chen Chen is a technology developer. He has not published technical papers to the outside world. His research is not for awards, so this should be normal?" said Bai Lijing, who tied the ponytail.

"Really, listening to you saying this, it is true that Academician Chen has not published any papers." Another female researcher around nodded.

"You said, [Star Ring] can you succeed?"

"Although I admire the academician Chen, the controlled nuclear fusion is not an ordinary technology. The iTeR, which is the strength of the world's top physicists, has not succeeded. [Star Ring] is designed by Chen Academician. What is the difficulty factor?

The ultra-circle projects were designed with the wisdom of the Academy of Sciences to be successful. Not to mention anything else, divertor materials and superconducting technology are problems. Without these techniques, it is a problem that [Star Ring] can provide a sufficiently strong magnetic field to maintain steady state operation. ”

"But the academician Chen has invested tens of billions in this project. Do you think that Academician Chen will spend money on these infeasible theories?"

"The problem that the world's top physicists can't solve. Do you think this can be solved by money? If you can, this is not a problem. In a short time, technology should not have much breakthrough, step by step. After more than ten years, perhaps with the wisdom of Academician Chen, there is a breakthrough. But we all know that Academician Chen is not a professional of high temperature plasma, and it is like a mountain."

On the way to the [Star Ring] lab, members of the team began to talk about it in a word.

There are technical problems, and there are gossip questions, including why Chen Mo got married so early, all within their talking topics.

The people in the team think that the current research is only an exploration and accumulation of technical experience. These basic experiments are the experiences they lack, but they have no hope for success.

Baili Jing did not participate in the discussion, but was thinking about the topic he was responsible for. Her major is magnetic field material, and Chen Mo's topic is to build a magnetic field system.

This topic is very important, although it is only theory.

The core technology they can't touch, because the qualification is not enough, they can only be responsible for assisting the assembly of [Star Ring]. The field system of [Star Ring] is different from the Tokamak magnetic field they have learned. It is not a strict polar field and vertical field.

Different magnetic fields mean that the design of the device will vary greatly.

She is a bit curious, what is the design of [Star Ring] that Chen Mo said. But they can't see the design of the [Star Ring], they can only do the work within the division.

She did not agree with the discussion of other members of the team.

Because she has intuition, Chen Mo must have a solution to the problems they have said, otherwise they will not dare to invest in nuclear fusion technology.

During this time of construction, they were all auxiliary staff and built a star ring. Some core components, they are inaccessible, and the specific materials and functions are not known.

Therefore, she feels that Chen Mo seems to have inexplicable confidence in [Star Ring].

Entering the [Star Ring] laboratory, everyone is quiet, go to their respective jobs, and prepare to start the construction of [Star Ring].

Not long after, Chen Mo also arrived.

The construction of [Star Ring] has begun. Chen Mo is the chief engineer and chief designer of [Star Ring] and needs to personally participate in the construction work. Nowadays, [Star Ring] slowly emerges, and there is no problem for the time being. It is only a matter of time before the construction is successful.

"Everyone is ready, today's task is to install the 'star column' structure." The staff arrived, and Chen Mo also began to arrange today's mission.

The 'star column' is one of the core structures of the [Star Ring]. It is located at the very center of the whole device. It functions as the central coil of the Tokamak device and is responsible for current transmission and provides a cooling medium.

[Star Ring] Otherwise normal operation, 'Star Column' is a key structure, quite a human spine, the role is self-evident.

As Chen Mo's instructions fell, the parts of the 'Star Column' structure were transported. A cylinder of more than one meter in diameter is wrapped in special materials.

All researchers are curious about this ‘star pillar’, including Wan Yuanzhen.

Inside, there are channels for cables, cooling tubes and diagnostic cables, carrying the core technology of the [Star Ring].

In the superconducting tokamak device, the central solenoid cable is made of a low temperature superconducting material, in addition to an ultra-low temperature cooling medium.

The combination of ultra-high temperature and ultra-low temperature makes the design of the superconducting tokamak device very complicated and the technical realization is very troublesome. This is one of the reasons why the 'Oriental Super Ring' leads the world in the field of nuclear fusion.

However, there is no ultra-low temperature cooling technology in [Star Ring], so he judged that there is no low temperature superconducting material inside. He is curious, what kind of conductor material Chen Mo uses to supply enough current to the device to provide a strong magnetic field to maintain the reaction.

Ordinary conductor materials are impossible, and it is certainly a material that makes Chen Mo keep mysterious.

The materials at the bottom of the reactor have been developed with liquid metal. As one of the core structures, there are certainly a lot of new technologies. It is just that Chen Mo has made a whole column in advance, which makes them tickle.

Chen Mo did not think as much as other people thought. The 'Star Pillars' was slowly sent to the designated location. Under his command, many staff and robots began to coordinate work.

The construction work of [Star Ring] is in full swing, and an unexpected news has also been heard.

chapters.title: Chapter 419: : Normal Heart
chapters.body:
Chapter 419: : Normal Heart

"The Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences announced on the 2nd that this year the Nobel Prize in Physics was awarded to Chinese scientist Chen Mo in recognition of his extraordinary contribution in the field of geomagnetic and spatial microphysics detection."

He won the Nobel Prize in Physics and made the whole world boil.

Among the Nobel Prizes, the Physics Award is the most important award, and it is also the most important award in the physics awards.

Since the seismograph came out, Chen Mo’s call for the Nobel Prize was very high, but there has been no news. Today, there is news, as expected.

In history, many Chinese have won the Nobel Prize in Physics, but the winners are not pure Huaxia scientists, not even Chinese nationality.

Chen Mo is the first scientist born and raised in China.

The physical mechanism combined with geomagnetic anomaly fluctuation detection and space physics monitoring of seismographs has created seismographs that can warn earthquakes, which is a technology for the benefit of mankind.

Chen Mo won the Nobel Prize and is also expected to return.

The Nobel Prize in Physics has made countless Chinese people excited.

This award is a hurdle in the hearts of many Chinese people. Now Chen Mo has finally broken this hurdle and pushed this door open.

The marching ant company was established by Chen Mo. Although Chen Mo did not receive any international awards, Chen Mo is an authority in academic fields such as computers, materials and optics.

Nowadays, with the blessing of the Nobel Prize, in the hearts of ordinary people, he is already a living legend.

"Congratulations, you won the Nobel Prize." Chen Mo is in the lab, Zhao Min's holographic projection video falls in front of him, and Liu Mei has a happy color, obviously the mood is very good at the moment.

"Thank you." Chen Mo nodded gently.

"How do you still look like this is not hot or cold?"

Zhao Min’s reaction to Chen Mo was somewhat hurt. Chen Mo has always been a calm and confident appearance. It is rare to see that his emotions are too fluctuating. He is obviously younger than her, but he is still calmer than him.

“This is the highest award in the field of research. Shouldn’t it be very exciting and exciting?”

"It's okay! When, when the 'Chen Mo Award' becomes the highest award in the global technology field, that should be happy." Chen Moyou said.

Okay? ?

Upon hearing this answer, Zhao Min caressed his forehead and the guy installed it in front of him.

Chen Mo was the first winner to dare to say the Nobel Prize in Physics, and he wanted to replace the Nobel Prize and set up the 'Chen Mo Award'. I have to say that I have a lot of ideas.

"Knowledge limits the tone of my speech. If you release this words, you have to be beaten. Do you know?"

"Just kidding, don't be nervous. Life is so much fun, don't be so serious. It's just a matter of winning the award. This award doesn't have much impact on me. I don't need any awards to enrich me. Honor." Chen Mo said nothing.

"Okay, normal heart." Zhao Min sighed.

How many scientists, the highest goal in life is the podium, the result is that Chen Mo said normal, how many people can be normal?

“It seems that I have never heard of any international awards you have won?”

"Because I have not published research papers, I have not participated in international academic forums and conferences, and researched things are used in companies to make money.

When studying the seismograph, he made a whim and published the feasibility paper for the earthquake detection. The result was ridiculed by people all over the world, and the small fisherman was mad at the time. I didn't expect that because of that whim article, I won the Nobel Prize and thought it was ironic. ”

Chen Mo laughed at himself.

What he studied, in addition to the technology developed by the ink girl, those technical theories are taken from the technology library.

The technology in the science and technology library is too avant-garde, and many technologies are regarded as top-notch technologies, so Chen Mo will no longer publish any papers to the outside world to avoid technology leaks.

Also, because he does not need those papers to help him increase his honor and research and development funding, he rarely publishes papers.

"If I want to get the prize, I will build the [Star Ring] now, and the technology inside can cover the Nobel Prize in the next five years." Chen Mo said.

"You dare to say." Zhao Min smiled silently, but Chen Mo said it is also a fact.

If someone else dares to say this, Zhao Min must have thought that he was taking the wrong medicine, but from Chen Mo’s mouth, she could not refute.

Zhao Min knows that the technology in [Star Ring] requires constant temperature superconducting materials and liquid metal of divertor filters. These are Nobel Prize-level technologies. There are still a lot of breakthrough technologies. She doesn't know. Chen Mo said that it is really possible to win the Nobel Prize in the next five years.

It seems that the Nobel Prize is not a difficult thing for Chen Mo.

"There is one more thing. The University of Binhai has sent an invitation and hopes to invite you back to the school lecture to give your teacher and sister a role model."

"Does this?" After thinking silently, nodded and promised: "Yes, go back and see. This Saturday afternoon, I am looking for a half-day time."

"Okay, then you are busy."

Chen Mo ended the holographic video call with Zhao Min and went to the Star Lab. Now he dreams that [Star Ring] will be built successfully, so that he can do research on controlled light nuclear fusion as soon as possible.

When I first arrived at the Star Lab, the people in the team and Wan Yuanyi all congratulated each other. Everyone looked admired and envious.

Chen Mo won a Nobel Prize for the highest technology, and he is still the most important physics field. Chen Mo is younger than their age, but has taken off achievements that they will not necessarily reach in their lifetime.

They were all post-doctoral. They were all genius figures in front of other peers. Now they find that for Chen Mo, they are ordinary people.

There is no harm without comparison. This is the luck of the same era as the legend, and the sorrow of the same era as the legend.

"Thank you all, the prizes are put in advance. During this time, everyone will work hard and strive to build the "Star Ring" as soon as possible. This is the top priority." Chen Mo looked at the semi-finished products in front of the [Star Ring] device. .

"it is good."

When I heard Chen Mo’s words, everyone was more energetic.

In front of this [Star Ring] is the top priority, the Nobel Prize is only the name of the person who announced the prize, and Chen Mu stood on the podium, there are two months.

These two months are enough to do a lot of things.

"The next step is the installation of the divertor. Follow the steps in the holographic demonstration. This is very important. When you install it, pay special attention."

Researchers are once again immersed in the work of building a [Star Ring].

"Academian Chen, the conductor material in the 'Star column', can't really give it a look?" Wan Yuan squatted his old face and gathered it around Chen Mo.

"Not for the time being." Chen Mo shook his head.

"Talk about it, what special nature and function does it have?" Wan Yuan slammed his hand and looked forward to a eager appearance.

He is one of the leaders of the construction project. Chen Molian is still mysterious and he is not curious. In order to see the specialness of those materials, he will open his old face.

Anyway, many of China's powerful technology and technology are created by the ancestors' teachers. He naturally learns cheeky skills.

"Now, when you don't announce the answer, don't worry, you will know soon." Chen Mo did not care about Wan Yuan's curiosity: "How is the theory digested?"

"It's okay, high-temperature plasma research has decades of experience. This theory has the same effect as the original one. The harvest is not small, looking for opportunities to sum up practice." Wan Yuanzhen said.

"That's good," Chen Mo said.

The nuclear fusion professional talents are not available for the time being, because the technology is very important, and the less contact with outsiders, the better, so in the future, there are people who rely on Wan Yuanqi and others to assist.

chapters.title: Chapter 420: : Science Fiction World
chapters.body:
Chapter 420: : Science Fiction World

At Binhai University, Chen Mo looked at the familiar and unfamiliar school gate, and his heart was a little emotional.

He is in this university, getting the most important things in life and changing his own destiny.

The construction of the [Star Ring] is assisted by robots, and the assembly steps of the ink-girls' precise calculations are progressing rapidly. After waiting for so long, he did not care about this for a long time.

When the school sent an invitation, he was busy sneaking and going back to his alma mater.

"Brother." Chen Mo's vehicle just arrived in front of the library, Zhang Xinxin ran up and pulled Chen Mo's arm: "You are finally willing to come out to meet people."

"What made me finally come out to see people? Take me as a technical house?" Chen Mo pet touched Zhang Xinxin's head: "How about postgraduate research? Is pressure?"

Zhang Xinxin has been studying at Binhai University for more than three years, and his number of visits is also very few. First, his identity was sensitive. Secondly, he also protected Zhang Xinxin and gave her a quiet environment to study.

"It's okay, it's about the same as the college entrance examination." Zhang Xinxin said.

"When you are admitted to the graduate school of the Capital University, you will be able to help you when you come to the company." Chen Mo said. In order to succeed in the entrance examination, he also specially invited the tutor to give her a tutor. If Shin Shin can't get it, try to send her up.

"I want to start my own business."

"Your consciousness is not small and high, but Xiao Man is trying to make the best use of the convenience that I bring to develop. How can you be so stupid? There are big trees in the house, and you have to go out and plant one to enjoy the cold."

Chen Mo tapped on Zhang Xinxin's head and turned to open the trunk of the car.

"Brother bought you a snack. If you are tired after school, you can eat it. There are cosmetics and clothes that you like. They are all bought by Xiao Yu. Xiao Yu is pregnant now, it is not convenient. I am busy researching. You usually have time to accompany you to chat with Xiao Yu."

"Know, thank you." Zhang Xinxin looked at the two big boxes and was full of joy.

"The postgraduate entrance examination, what I want, brother will give you, work hard."

"Good." Zhang Xinxin nodded. "Brother, then I will go back to the dormitory to change clothes. Wait a minute to listen to your lecture. The class draws lots and takes dozens of places to grab ten places. Fortunately, I am drawing. Otherwise, you have to go back."

"Go, go."

In a hidden corner, Dong Quan looked at the intimate two people, bending a corner of his mouth and quickly pressing the shutter in his hand.

Although Chen Mo wears a mask, the bodyguards around him are definitely not wrong. The person wearing the mask is Chen Mo. Come to Binhai University today, it seems that the harvest is not small.

When I got the photo, Dong Quan quietly stepped back.

Chen Mo did not know that some people were secretly paying attention to them in the dark.

Sending Zhang Xinxin back to the dormitory, Chen Mo also went to the library of the school to wander around. It was almost time before I rushed to the auditorium of the school.

Qiu Guofeng stood at the entrance of the auditorium and smiled.

Next to him, there is a middle-aged man with a Mediterranean hairstyle, a secretary of the university, and Chen Mo’s former counselors, teachers and many security guards. The students who graduated from their school won the Nobel Prize. This is a happy event.

Because Binhai University has such a character as Chen Mo, the school leaders of Binhai University have followed the light, and next year he will be transferred to promote, Chen Mo, the legendary student, is the most brilliant one in his resume.

They have repeatedly wanted to invite Chen Mo to come back to the lecture, but they don't know what reason to look for. Just this time Chen Mo won the award, he issued an invitation, did not expect Chen Mo really agreed.

The news made them happy.

The news that Chen Mo came to the lecture caused quite a stir at Binhai University.

Outside the auditorium, the scene was a bit hot, and there were still many students who watched at the door and were blocked by security guards and could not enter.

The number of lectures is limited. Each class has only a specified number of participants. If you are lucky, you can draw lots. If you are not lucky, you can only watch it outside.

Seeing Chen Mo’s team came over, Qiu Guofeng made a three-step turn to meet: “Mr. Chen Mo, welcome back to school.”

"Principal, secretary, teacher." Chen Mo and the people on the field shook hands and greeted them. All of them were former teachers. He didn't dare to put any shelf.

"Mr. Chen Mo, the lecture is almost beginning, now you can go in."

"Good." Chen Mo nodded and followed Qiu Guofeng.

"In addition to granting you a doctoral degree today, we are also preparing to hire you as an honorary professor of the school. There is also the award of scholarships. The ant scholarship you founded in the school is now the target of competition for students at all levels. Many students, for ant scholarships, They are all desperately learning.

There are also bursaries, and every year poor students receive bursaries. In the past two years, some poor students who have benefited from leaving the school, earning money, and more or less donating some ant scholarship programs, this gratitude and feedback are very good. Many alumni will also donate spontaneously to the ant scholarship program. Some are not many, but they are in the heart of gratitude. ”

On the way, Chen Mo listened to Qiu Guofeng’s remarks.

When he graduated, Chen Mo established an ant scholarship program at Binhai University. Every year, the marching ant company donates some funds to the ant scholarship program to reward outstanding students and also support some poor students.

Now it seems that the effect and response are not bad.

Oh...

A group of people entered the auditorium, thunderous applause and cheers, and alarmed the entire auditorium. Chen Mo also walked into the auditorium's podium in the cheers and the voice of the host.

"Let the students outside the auditorium come in, there are still some open spaces, you can squeeze it." Chen Mo went to the stage of the auditorium and spoke.

"This……"

The director of the security department looked at the principal and the secretary and saw that the two nodded, so that the security guards who kept the order opened the door and let the students at the entrance enter the auditorium.

"There is no place, the students can stand in the back row, and sit on the ladder of the walkway. Some people can sit on the open space in front of the stage."

The director of the security department picked up the microphone and began to maintain order.

The bodyguards who followed Chen Mo, as well as the student volunteers, sat in a row under the stage, surrounded some of the open space, and sat down for the incoming classmates.

Everything is in order.

Security exits are all open, and security and student volunteers who maintain order are also waiting. There are too many people here, for fear of accidents.

Ten minutes later, the auditorium was quiet.

The walkway between the seats is full of students, and even there are many seats, sitting directly two people, the rear is also densely packed with many students, the students under the stage also consciously hold the knees in a row.

The applause sounded again and the atmosphere in the auditorium was hot.

"Chen Mo is really warm."

"Chen Mo's brother is a lot more handsome than the photo."

"It's really handsome, I want to marry him."

"Chen Chen, I love you."

"Brother, I want to give you a monkey."

A female student sitting under the stage shouted at the stage when everyone cheered. Then, the bold shouts of various female students rang from all directions.

"Sisters, I love you too." Chen Mo smiled.

Wow……

At the moment when Chen Mo opened his mouth, the entire auditorium echoed laughter and applause.

"All right."

Chen Mo stretched his hand and the auditorium was quiet.

"I am very honored to be back to my alma mater today. This is the place to change my life. My teacher told me to let me come back and set an example for you. In layman's terms, let me come back to install B for you and stimulate you to study hard. ”

As soon as this was said, the entire auditorium was filled with laughter and applause again.

"The school asked me to come back to give you a lecture. I don't know what to say specifically. It's not too short or too long for an hour or two. It's complicated, many of you don't understand, simple is not deep enough, very If you are in trouble, let me talk about technology development."

Chen Mo began to enter the topic, the scene was also very quiet, no one spoke.

"Many people think that the future is far away from us, but it is not far away. As I said a year ago, the future has come. Our present world is the future world that people used to fantasize. The holographic projectors of marching ants, Intelligent robots, as well as the popularity of artificial intelligence, are not available a few years ago.

Now on the street, you can see some holographic advertising signs at the door of the store. The holographic projections of those beautiful models are very beautiful. This novel holographic advertisement is very attractive. I believe this is a big trend in the future.

When I was shopping with my wife and saw the holographic advertisement, my inventor was a little curious. I touched the models of the holographic projections and tried to feel the feeling. The soft flesh of my waist was bruised for three days. That feeling is painful. ”

When this was said, it immediately attracted a big laugh.

With laughter and applause falling, Chen Mocai continued to speak: "Holographic technology is very big for the present. It makes the virtual world closer to our life. Imagine going to the mall in the future, every store door, The picture of the holographic advertisement is projected. The distance between people is no longer a cold screen, but people are around us, no matter what the world is.

I can tell you an insiderary message, holographic movies are already in the filming, and our company has investment participation. I believe that soon, holographic movies will replace 3D movies, so that you really feel what is called a full range of real effects scenes.

The maturity of holographic technology can create a future world. My wedding, many of you have seen the video? That is the epitome of a future world.

When studying holographic technology, I have thought about the application field of holographic technology. Holographic technology is the threshold for entering the future world. Whoever wants to master holographic technology will step into the future world, and now belongs to the embryonic stage of the future world.

Imagine that in the streets and squares of the future cities, neon lights and billboards are all replaced by holographic projections, projecting a dreamy holographic scene. Perhaps the store's beauty waiter is a robot, holographic virtual projection characters say hello to you, watching movies are holographic movies, playing games are also holographic games, and even there may be a floating car in the city, which is the look of the future city. ”

At the time of Chen Mo’s description, everyone’s eyes were full of embarrassment, and a different world emerged in front of them. The holographic projections around you can replace the cold billboards, and the dream scenes fall from the sky, just like being in the fairy tale world.

That is the imaginary future world.

"Many people may think that I am talking about the fantasy world. Actually, it is not very close to us. If you invest at any cost, I can now build a holographic city I just described. But I said the anti-gravity suspension. Technology is still in the bragging stage for the time being."

chapters.title: Chapter 421: : Creating A Holographic World?
chapters.body:
Chapter 421: : Creating A Holographic World?

"This is this, it is this."

In the secretary's office, Yao Yi is watching Chen Mo's lecture screen live, making a case and surprise.

He has been thinking about the development of the coastal city recently.

The former coastal city did not have much characteristics. It was not the political center of the province, nor the economic center of the province. Therefore, even if it is an open city, it does not rank among the first-tier cities.

In the past few years, the marching ant company has risen and piloted the city's brain in Binhai City, preparing to turn the coastal city into a smart city. But apart from this, the coastal city still does not have much features.

The cultural landscape is sparse, the scenic spots are scarce, and the landmark buildings, in addition to the Binhai Theatre, the other can not take the shot, so the service industry is not enough.

They need a unique business card to support the image of Binhai City in order to increase the income of the coastal city service industry and accelerate economic development.

During this time, he has been thinking about how to build a city card for the city of Binhai. I really can't think of it today. I heard that Chen Mo gave a lecture at Binhai City and watched the live broadcast.

Now I heard the holographic city depicted in Chen Mokou, and Yao Yi, who was struggling to find a city card, was instantly open.

If you put a place in the coastal city, it will become a unique holographic world in the world. This holographic world will become the brightest business card in Binhai. In this holographic world, attracting tourists from all over the world is a great thing for Binhai.

For him, this is definitely the most exciting one in his performance.

The holographic world, together with the smart city, the urban brain, and the automatic driving of public transportation, together with these results, can make Binhai a unique city of technology and a model city for future urban development.

"Secretary Wu, go to Binhai University now." Nothing to think about, Yao Yi walked out of the office. He needs to ask Chen Mo to create a problem in the holographic world.

"it is good."

Secretary Wu did not understand why Yao Yi was so excited, but Yao Yi was in a good mood. He was naturally happy too, and left with Yao Yi’s briefcase.

......

From holographic technology to intelligent robots to technologies such as autonomous driving and artificial intelligence.

Chen Modu describes the possibilities and scope of future technologies on a one-by-one basis. These technologies are owned by the Science and Technology Library.

Now quite a process of popular science, Chen Mo also learned to use the concise and interesting examples in popular science novels to arouse the interest of everyone and help them to understand these technologies more deeply.

The applause and cheers in the auditorium kept coming, and everyone listened to Chen Mo’s words with relish, and the eyes were more awkward and admired.

Chen Mo’s last sentence fell and ended the lecture for nearly an hour.

Hey! ! !

When Chen Mo finished, the wave of applause in the auditorium continued for a long time.

The lecture contains a lot of information, including the application of holographic technology, as well as the application of artificial intelligence. In particular, the blueprint of the holographic city he portrayed is a blueprint for the future city, which has left many people with it.

If this kind of awkwardness was only an illusion, then it is not. The emergence of a large holographic projector from the marching ant company made this possible.

Chen Mo is synthesizing the video to play out, although it is only two minutes, but it is shocking enough.

Through Chen Mo's words and videos, they spy on the prototype of the future world.

Next is the communication link, a platform for Qiaoyuan University students and Chen Mo. When the host just finished, the students in the field raised their hands, and everyone had a desire in their eyes.

The scene of enthusiasm in front of us is in the expectation of everyone. This opportunity to meet face-to-face with Chen Mo is hard to get once, so everyone is very active.

"Chen Chen brother, I am a student of the School of Physics, your pro-teacher." A clean boy got the first question: "A few days ago, around the world, a smart virus incident occurred. Let the world's Internet The loss is heavy, I would like to ask, is there any possibility in the future like the terminator, artificial intelligence rebellion, to destroy humanity?"

"The current artificial intelligence is controllable, and in the current industrial situation, it is impossible for you to say what happens. If necessary, it will definitely be artificially intervened, and the terminator may be minimal.

Artificial intelligence is a double-edged sword. Just like atomic energy, it can be used for the benefit. It can generate electricity from nuclear power and use it in bad places. It is a weapon. Remember, these depend on human will, not artificial intelligence. ”

"Senior brother, everyone knows that your wedding is beautiful, how much is your wedding? What material is used for the wedding dress? Is there anything special?" The second question is a girl who asked after taking the microphone. .

"The material of the wedding dress is a new type of fiber material. What is special is that it can change color under certain illumination conditions, called dream fiber. As for how much the wedding spends is not important, my bride feels happy is the most important. As long as the two have feelings, the simple wedding is also the most beautiful."

Simple wedding?

When I heard Chen Mo’s words, many people were speechless. This words are spoken from Chen Mo’s mouth. How do you feel the taste?

He was also loaded with a B.

"Sister Chen Mo, we all know that there is a science island project in Binhai City, which is a project of cooperation between army ants and the Academy of Sciences. I would like to ask if nuclear fusion technology can really be realized? If so, how will the world change?"

"can be realised."

Chen Mo nodded without hesitation.

"Nuclear fusion technology is successful, human beings will bid farewell to the energy crisis, a new energy revolution will take place, and the world will undergo new changes. Oil is no longer a resource that humans are madly robbed. Humans can even enter the interstellar travel stage. At that time, at the space station or When building a lunar base, using nuclear fusion energy, you can continue to power and maintain human interstellar travel."

"Chen Chen, you have mastered holographic technology, your lab, is it so cool with Iron Man Tony?"

......

"Sister Chen Mo, what do you think about the seismograph and the Nobel Prize?"

......

"Chen Chen brother..."

One question after another ran over, and Chen Mo was somewhat overwhelmed. He did not expect that these teachers and sisters would ask questions, and many of them had the potential to be gossip reporters.

Every question is related to some of his research, and Chen Mo also answered seriously.

Finally, because of the time relationship, the host also had to forcibly interrupt this link and enter the awarding process of the ant scholarship.

After all the links, Qiu Guofeng also gave Chen Mo a certificate of doctoral degree from Binhai University and a certificate of appointment from an honorary professor.

The process is completed and the lecture is officially closed. It is expected that the two-hour lecture will be dragged to three hours because the students are too enthusiastic.

"Yao Shuji is outside and wants to meet the chairman." The lecture in the auditorium was just scattered, and Lanxi walked quickly to Chen Mo.

Xiao Yu was pregnant at home and resigned as the secretary of the president. Now Lanxi replaces that position, and is occasionally arranged by Zhao Min as an assistant to Chen Mo.

“How long has it been?” Chen Mo was a little surprised.

"For more than an hour, see the chairman of the board at the lecture, did not interrupt, and is still waiting outside," Lanxi said.

Next to Qiu Guofeng and others, naturally received news from Yao Shuji, the first time after the meeting, and Chen Mo, left the auditorium.

"Yao Shuji, why don't you say it in advance? I will pick you up." Qiu Guofeng and the secretary of Binhai University saw Yao Yi and smiled and greeted him.

"This is a sudden decision. It is to come to Chen Mo." Yao Yi did not care to say: "Now Mr. Chen's lecture is completed?"

"Completed." Qiu Guofeng and others nodded.

"That's good, I have something to say to Mr. Chen." Yao Yi looked at Qiu Guofeng and others and smiled: "Let people use it."

"We are fine now, you talk to Mr. Chen." Qiu Guofeng and others nodded.

Yao Yi and Chen Mo also strolled on the campus of Binhai University.

“Is there something important?” Chen Mo asked with some doubts.

"It's very important. Usually you don't have time, so today I am free, I am coming, I am here to ask you something."

"Teach me?"

"Yes, the holographic city you just said, is it true?" Yao Yi opened the door.

"Oh? Yao Shuji has an idea?"

"Have."

Yao Yi will tell his own thoughts.

“Binhai City is now in the world because of the army ant company, but the name is not enough. The scenery without characteristics attracts more tourists from home and abroad. Just hearing the idea of your holographic city makes me very excited. I want to plan a place where the 'holographic world' can be used as a city card for the city of Binhai to create a unique holographic city in the world."

The holographic city depicted by Chen Mo made him find the feeling. If successful, the number of tourists in Binhai City will skyrocket every year, and employment and the economy will definitely benefit.

“Where do you want to transform into a holographic world?” Chen Mo asked.

"Beachfront Square." Yao Yi said.

Located on the seafront of Binhai City, Binhai Plaza is close to the Dawan District and covers an area of nearly 500,000 square meters. It faces the sea and has a pleasant climate. It has a unique location.

The financial center building, coastal library, museum, children's palace and gymnasium in Binhai are all near the central square of Binhai. On the island across the sea from the square, it is the Binhai Theatre. Below the square, there is also 120,000 square meters of commercial space.

Focusing on high-end retail, dining, entertainment, art and culture, it is the real economic center and cultural center of Binhai.

But the vast Marina Square can't find the iconic architecture and features, quite a featureless body. If you build it into a holographic world, it will undoubtedly add a soul to the square, the grade will be greatly improved, and it may become a world-famous square.

"There is really something there, but it takes a lot of investment." Chen Mo said.

“Can you give a rough budget number?” Yao Yi asked.

"It depends on your planning, no planning, I can't calculate the specific budget. But according to my thoughts, I am going to renovate the central square, I am afraid it will be at least 10 billion." Chen Mo said.

"Does this? OK, I will go back and let people plan. I am afraid that you will need your army ants to assist in the transformation." Yao Yi said.

To build a world-famous and famous square, nearly 10 billion is absolutely no loss.

The surrounding areas, real estate appreciation, Binhai City has become a world-famous city, tourism service industry development, economic development, etc. These economic pulls are relatively worthwhile.

Anyway, the money will definitely be invested by state-owned enterprises. They don't have to spend a lot of money. They just need to give such a project.

And Yao Yi talked about some things about the holographic world 'reconstruction'. It was already 6 o'clock in the afternoon. After bidding farewell to Yao Yi, Chen Mocai rushed back to Xianglutan Villa.

This incident is just an episode for Chen Mo. His main energy is still on the construction of the "Star Ring", and the successful construction of the Star Ring is his current top priority.

The next day, Chen Mo returned to the Science Island Institute and continued to build the Star Ring.

chapters.title: Chapter 422: :[Star Ring] Completed
chapters.body:
Chapter 422: :[Star Ring] Completed

Chen Mo’s lecture at Binhai City attracted a lot of sensation.

Because Chen Mo from beginning to end, is to explain the application of future technology, and the prototype of the future city. That kind of prototype is extremely embarrassing, and that is all achievable.

The reports of various media make the holographic city one of the symbolic symbols of the future world. On various social networking sites, as well as forums, topics are being launched to discuss the landscape and possibilities of the future city.

All of this has nothing to do with Chen Mo who provoked the topic. After the lecture was held in Binhai City, Chen Mo disappeared again in the public eye. The [Star Ring] construction of the Science Island Institute is also underway.

Everything is in order, and half a month has passed by.

Zhan Tianming holds a box-sized instrument in his hand, next to him, a laptop, beating all kinds of data, and two intelligent robots and a smart robotic arm.

He is a mechanical engineering researcher and is currently working on the final commissioning and inspection of the thermal conductivity system.

When they came here, they discovered the horrible efficiency of the marching ant company.

With the help of intelligent robots and intelligent robotic arms, they act as assistants, detect data and provide on-the-spot strain assistance. The efficiency of building a [Star Ring] is several times faster.

Dozens of researchers, there are dozens of intelligent robots and robotic arms, so that the original three or four months of work, almost one month is nearing the end.

"finished."

The last transmission pipeline was checked and the data was normal. Zhan Tianming showed a happy smile and packed up the tools.

At Star Labs, all the staff involved in the construction of the [Star Ring] were carrying out the final data detection and debugging around the ‘big fat man’ with a diameter of 6 meters and a height of about 8.5 meters.

Looking at the big star ring in the lab, the people on the field are full of sense of accomplishment at the moment. This is the charm of scientific research. There are countless sweats flowing down to enjoy the moment of success.

But now it is only a stage of joy. There is still a way to go before it is truly successful. The next experimental breakthrough is the most important.

After the completion of the commissioning of many researchers, Wan Yuanzhen led them to leave the Star Lab and enter the Star Loop Experimental Command Center.

The Star Loop Experimental Command Center and the Star Ring Lab are about the same size, except for various computer instruments that are surrounded by four. In the center of the command center, there is also a holographic projection of the [Star Ring], a holographic projection of the same proportion.

Seeing Chen Mo from the command center, Wan Yuanxiao smiled and greeted him: "Now the debugging of [Star Ring] has been completed, what should I do next?"

Chen Mo didn't want to say: "Start [Star Ring] and see if it works."

Under the command of Chen Mo, the researchers pressed the power on and turned on [Star Ring]. All the researchers who are eligible to enter the Star Loop Experimental Command Center are watching the data changes on the computer.

"The star column is working fine..."

"The vacuum chamber is normal..."

“The divertor works fine.”

"The field system is normal."

"The thermal conductivity system is normal."

The sound of artificial intelligence in the experimental command center made everyone laugh and blossom, as if they had a great victory and applauded. Checking [Star Ring] does not cause a malfunction, which means that [Star Ring] can perform experiments normally.

Chen Mo also showed a smile, turned to look at Wan Yuanwei: "What is the raw material of the 氘 and 氚? Is the Academy over there?"

"You need to contact them." Wan Yuanzhen said.

"You contact them, and send them as soon as possible. The sooner the better, if it is better tomorrow."

When working with the Academy of Sciences, the two sides also discussed the situation. The Academy of Sciences can sell the raw materials to their research institutes for use in experiments.

氚 Raw materials are strategic resources for nuclear fusion, and manufacturing and storage are very troublesome.

Chen Moru can also use the technology of the technology library to create defects, but he did not. Because of the manufacturing and preservation of enamel, there are ready-made technologies. Nuclear fusion is enough to shock the world. If he takes out the technology of making and preserving cockroaches, he will definitely be considered an alien.

There are ready-made technologies, he will not do it again. If others are unwilling to provide him with raw materials, he will use these technologies.

The Academy of Sciences promised that the first phase of the experiment would provide 500 grams to them.

500 grams of flowers spent 120 million to buy, a little more expensive than the market price. It’s just that in the market, this kind of thing has no price, not to mention a lot of it. Excessive experimental materials are also one of the reasons why nuclear fusion technology is called money-burning technology, and not everyone can afford it.

“If other researchers are willing to come over and watch the fusion experiment, I welcome it,” Chen said.

"Okay, I will tell them." Wan Yuan nodded.

The nuclear fusion experiment is a rare experiment. Because the experimental resources are scarce, the capital consumption is large, and the talents are scarce. It takes one or two years to conduct a major laboratory. Every fusion experiment is a rare opportunity. Many researchers will participate in or watch the experiment, hoping to learn from the experience to optimize the fusion technology.

"Our next step is to prepare a controlled nuclear fusion experiment. Some arrangements and tasks will be handed over to you before the experiment. You will arrange it." Chen Mo said.

Wan Yuanzhen did not hesitate and nodded and promised.

The more project materials you contact, the more you gain, and he naturally won't miss such a good opportunity.

Arrange everything, Chen Mocai left the Institute of Science Island. [Star Ring] The construction is initially completed, followed by the experiment. It is necessary to wait for the experimental materials to come over. He does not need to wait in the Science Island.

March ant company, Chen Mogang came back, Zhao Min also followed.

During this time, Chen Mo has been staying in Science Island. It is difficult to get the current army ant headquarters. Just after Zhao Min also attended the meeting, he went directly to his office.

"I just met Yao Shuji. He asked me to say that he is going to make Binhai City a city of technology. He also said to me, smart transportation, urban brain, automatic driving public transportation system, and holographic world. Said that Yao’s ambition is not small.”

Zhao Min told Chen Mo.

If this idea is realized, Binhai will become a famous city in China and even in the world. With the geographical advantage of Dawan District, it is likely to become one of the largest international metropolises in China.

"The idea of the city of science and technology is really good. The prototype of the future city can start from Binhai City. When the planning is completed, I need to contact me when I need to participate."

Chen Mo agrees with this idea.

Yao Yi has this power, he has no reason not to accompany him. The more such ideas, the greater the influence of their marching ant group, and the greater the benefits, because holographic technology is currently the only one.

"Yes." Zhao Min nodded: "How about the project in Science Island?"

"[Star Ring] was built successfully, followed by controlled fusion experiments. When the Academy of Sciences sent it over, you will be able to enter the experimental stage. There is nothing big, I will rush out and sneak out." Chen Mo said.

Upon hearing the completion of the [Star Ring] construction, Zhao Min was also somewhat surprised: "It is really fast. If you are known by the outside world, I am afraid that it will set off a storm."

"Soon things, but it will be later when they are exposed later." Chen Mo said: "This stuff can change the world."

"So confident enough to succeed?"

"Crap, otherwise I spend tens of billions to play with my family."

chapters.title: Chapter 423: : Is It Ok?
chapters.body:
Chapter 423: : Is It Ok?

In the conference room of the Institute of Plasma of the Academy of Sciences, I heard the news from Wanyuan, and the people on the field were shocked and even unbelievable. It has only been more than a month since the [Star Ring] has been successfully built, and the progress of the [Star Ring] project is faster than he imagined.

"[Star Ring] is completed so quickly?"

"Dr. Wang, this is not a joke?" Li Jian asked uncertainly.

"This is the news that Lao Wan passed back. Isn't it necessary for Lao Wan to make such a joke? There is the help of the intelligent robot of the army ant company, and the construction steps that have already been planned, the construction efficiency is very fast. This is the picture of the star ring. ""

A picture of the computer opened in the Year of the King, the appearance of [Star Ring] appeared in front of everyone. Seeing the appearance of the star ring, the academicians and senior experts on the field were all amazed and some could not believe it.

“Is this experimental device for controlled fusion to work?” Ke Jianye frowned.

He is a senior research expert in plasma. Although he is not at the level of academician, he is only a step away from academicians.

"I don't know this. Lao Wan said that this was independently designed by Academician Chen. The internal structure is somewhat similar to Tokamak, but some structures are very unique. How specific, Lao Wan can't disclose it. In the call, Lao Wan However, I admire the academician Chen, and today, there are still a few people who can let Wan Academician in the field of plasma research?" Wang Nian said.

This sentence already has enough weight.

As the king said, all the experts present, curiosity was hoisted.

"Unfortunately, the design of the device needs to be added to the project to view. Wan Academician can not show the design to us."

The Year of the King has some regrets, but nothing can be done. After all, they are now two projects, and their respective research items must not be disclosed. This is a confidentiality clause.

"The academician of Wan said that the academician Chen hopes that '氚' will be sent to the past to conduct experiments, the sooner the better. If we want to watch the fusion experiment, we can send people to come over, the controlled fusion experiment is preparing, and when they arrive, they will Can start."

"This is not a child's play. If you squat on the experiment, the device is not sure. Isn't that a waste of resources?" said the old qualification expert Ke Jianye.

"Old Ke, the device can't work, this is not what we worry about. Since Academician Chen has said that he can experiment, there is a reason for him. After all, Academician Chen is not a normal young man. His achievements have gone far beyond us. The sum of everyone adds up.

Academician Chen is doing things, and paying attention to efficiency. Efficient intelligent robots, as well as commands such as the arm. He doesn't have as many auditing procedures and rules as we have here. It's normal to be efficient. It's not a scribble. ”

The Year of the King knew that Ke Jianye was straight and did not know how to speak, so explain it to him. He has contacted Chen Mo, and he knows that Chen Mo is an efficient person, otherwise it is impossible to create so many exciting technologies in just a few years.

Efficiency issues are also problems that they sometimes struggle with.

When they set up a project and applied for research and development funding, they also had a variety of research materials, which should be reviewed. The review was slow, their research funding was not in place, and the project had to wait a while to get started.

Just like studying the controlled nuclear fusion technology, Chen Mo can make tens of billions of funds in place, but the Academy of Sciences can't do it.

The marching ant is a private enterprise. Chen Mo’s words are the highest order, and you don’t have to worry about it, and the efficiency is high. However, the Academy of Sciences is different, there are many projects, and their research and development expenses are limited. In order for R&D funds to be used at the cutting edge and to avoid abuse, it is necessary to conduct a layer-by-layer review.

Therefore, he feels that Chen Mo is efficient, but he can never decide everything in a word like Chen Mo.

"The fusion experiment of the academician Chen can be visited. Who of you want to go?" asked the year of the king's return to the topic.

"Exactly during this time, the project of the super-loop experiment did not start. I applied to see it in the past. The academic theory of Chen’s fusion theory is unique. It really helps the plasma research. I want to see it, according to the theory. Technology, what effect will it have." Li Jian took the lead.

He is the head of the Oriental Ultra-Circle Experimental Project. It is a rare experiment. He naturally will not miss such a good opportunity.

"I have also passed, I want to see, the device built in such a short time, it will not work." Ke Jianye thought and said.

Others have also spoken, controlled nuclear fusion experiments, not once in a year or two, even if the final result may be a failure, they have to pass. Even getting only a little experience is a rare harvest. The major experimental results are summarized in this failure.

Seven academicians and senior qualified experts in the conference room all choose to travel.

The [Star Ring] device of the controlled nuclear fusion project has been completed, and the news that it is ready to enter the experimental stage has not been disclosed. Therefore, the outside world does not know that the nuclear fusion project is still under study.

If the outside world knows that Chen Mo’s controlled nuclear fusion project has been in existence for less than a year, he will enter the experimental stage and fear that he will be shocked.

Like the iTeR project, several countries have been arguing for more than 20 years, costing countless, and the experiment has been delayed. Now that the progress of Chen Mo's controlled fusion project is exposed, I am afraid that people all over the world will organize the iTeR project.

But outsiders don't know that Chen Mo is because of the complete theoretical technology of the technology library, his own super brain, and an artificial intelligence that transcends the times. It has such a fast speed regardless of the cost.

Three days later.

A large transport vehicle entered the Science Island under the **** of the special police. The transport vehicle is the “氚” raw material sent by the Nuclear Industry Group. The 500-gram “氚” is loaded with a special container and there is layer protection.

Not long after the transporter entered Science Island, a bus was also escorted by special police and special personnel, close to Science Island.

Inside the bus are academicians and experts at the Plasma Institute.

This is a very precious national treasure team, and every academician and senior expert is a scarce research talent. So confidentiality and protection are in place.

Outside the Science Island Institute, Chen Mo was headed, Wan Yuanzhen, Yang Mingqi, several people saw Li Jian and others came down from the bus and greeted them.

“Here is the Science Island in Binhai City? It’s not bad.”

Li Jian and others simply looked around the environment and nodded slightly. Now all the infrastructure of Science Island has been completed. Except for the trees that are not grown up, other places are very good. It is better than the Science Island of Huizhou Province. It is only along the coast and the climate is pleasant.

Chen Mo and the team's people simply greeted them, all of them doing research, and they didn't have too much flowers and intestines. After the greeting, Chen Mocai led the people into the institute.

"[Star Ring] device? Can you show us?"

Ke Jianye took the lead in opening up. He was always skeptical about the controlled fusion device that Chen Mo built so quickly. After all, the construction time was too short, or Chen Mo was designed by himself.

Such a complicated and complicated thing, designed by one person, and then built in such a short time, is not too credible.

"This is Professor Ke Jianye, the character is relatively straightforward." Wang did not come over, Li Jian looked at Chen Mo introduced, secretly gave him a look.

Chen Mo did not care about Ke Jianye's tone. Many research experts or professors are not very good at character, but there is no bad eye, just questioning it.

This kind of skeptical attitude is not all bad. Scientific research often needs to be questioned. It only needs to eliminate their doubts and convince them that they will change their attitudes.

"Inside, come with me."

Chen Mo was slightly sideways and led everyone into the institute.

chapters.title: Chapter 424: : Awkward Technical Strength
chapters.body:
Chapter 424: : Awkward Technical Strength

“This lab is smart.”

“The lab is very well designed.”

Entering the institute, the team of experts began to look around and was quickly attracted by the minimalist and futuristic design style of the institute. There are also patrolling robots and rigorous security systems.

"Academician Chen, who is the design of this institute?" Li Jian could not help but ask.

"Artificial intelligence," Chen Mo said.

When you heard the artificial intelligence design, the team of experts on the field showed all the surprise. It is hard to imagine that such a complex research institute is from the hands of artificial intelligence.

“Is this the artificial intelligence design of the marching ant company?”

“Yes. The Academy also has artificial intelligence Xia Wei. It should also be able to design architectural drawings. As for how complicated it is, how intelligent it is, and the level of assisting designers. You can ask the artificial intelligence team, artificial intelligence is now available. Do a lot of things." Chen Mo did not care.

"After life is awesome, it seems that the new era is really coming." A senior expert lamented.

Under the leadership of Chen Mo, the entire team went smoothly into the underground star ring experiment command center. Through the huge LCD screen of the command center, they can clearly see the huge [Star Ring] standing quietly in the Star Ring Lab.

There is no small difference between the full superconducting tokamak device of the Science Island Research Institute of Huizhou Province. This is like a big fat man who has seen it in the photo and recognizes it at a glance.

"This is the star ring." Chen Mo pointed to the [Star Ring] of the LCD screen.

"Can we go up and see?"

"It doesn't have to be so troublesome, you can see it here."

Chen Mo pressed a button on the console. Under the eyes of everyone, the holographic projection of the same scale appeared in the central open space of the command center.

This scene did not make the people on the field too surprised, because I always knew that Chen Mo has holographic technology. But the first time I saw holograms in the lab, I was a little surprised. After the emergence of the holographic projection, the experts in the team turned around the [Star Ring], with amazement in the eyes, carefully observed the new nuclear fusion device.

Even Ke Jianye, who has doubts about [Star Ring], did not talk much at this time, and he observed it carefully. Li Jian reached out and passed through the holographic projection, but he could not touch anything.

"Can you look at the structure inside?"

"Yes." Chen Mo started the wrist control bracelet.

This is the holographic projection of intelligent control. The artificial intelligence of the Institute of Stars and Rings is not as high as the intelligence of the ink girl, so the holographic projection should be controlled by the hand ring.

The holographic model slowly diminished under the gesture of Chen Mo, suspended in front of the people on the field.

This kind of scene only appears in sci-fi movies such as Iron Man, and the strange movie scene becomes real. But these experts and professors rarely watch movies, and naturally they don't know Iron Man.

Then under the control of Chen Mo, the outer shell of the [Star Ring] was peeled off, and the structure inside the device was clearly presented.

Look at the design inside, all the experts are sucking the mouth cool. Tokamak is already very complicated, and they now find that [Star Ring] is more than impossible.

"Is this designed by you alone?" Li Jian's voice is obviously with unbelief. If the [Star Ring] device experiment is successful, Chen Mo can seal the gods.

"Not that I designed it alone, there are my artificial intelligence assistants to help optimize." Chen Mo does not allow to slow down.

Such a nuclear fusion device involving various subject areas was independently designed by Chen Mo.

This news is not shocking.

“Is it artificial intelligence?” A senior expert wearing an old tunic suit was surprised: “Is artificial intelligence so horrible now?”

“Yes, after the promotion of our company’s 'Artificial Intelligence+' program, artificial intelligence has been everywhere. Some professional intelligent assistants help to work more efficiently, which is not a rare thing. [Star Ring] Institute also has one Artificial intelligence assistant Xiaoxing."

After Chen Mo explained, he began to introduce the structure of [Star Ring].

“The vacuum chamber is an irregular shape. It is designed according to the plasma turbulence model of multiple simulation experiments, which can increase the collision of plasma under strong magnetic field.”

Chen Mo presents the annular vacuum chamber independently through holographic projection. In the vacuum chamber, there is a purple-red simulated plasma flowing. It is a twisted donut and looks very beautiful.

"Is there a turbulent formula for plasma?" Li Jian asked.

"The turbulence formula and model are important materials of the institute. Academician Li wants to see it. It is OK to apply to join our research institute." Chen Mo said.

Seeing Li Jian and others face each other and did not speak, Chen Mo did not care, continue to introduce.

"Because we don't have the super-intensive pressure inside the star, the fusion cannot react spontaneously. But as long as the plasma is fast enough, the reaction temperature is sufficient and the reaction is spontaneous. The constrained field of the [Star Ring] can reach up to 60 tes. Pull above."

Li Jian pours his breath: "Chen Chen, is there such a powerful magnet?"

"It's inside." Chen Mo called out the "Star Ring" field system: "This is the field system. As for each magnet module, and the magnetic field data, it is not disclosed here."

"What about the cooling system?"

"Here." Chen Mo then transferred the structure of the cooling system.

"Your cooling system is the heat generated by the cooling device circuit. In the case of a superconductor, the heat it generates is enough to blow the line instantaneously?" Ke Jianye interjected.

Full superconducting technology is the building of the industrial strength of the entire country before they are built successfully. There are not a few superconducting tokamaks in the world, and he does not think that Chen Mo will have this technology. But he couldn't think of it. The material used by Chen Mo is a normal temperature superconductor material.

"There is technology to solve this problem." Chen Mo did not care.

"What technology?" Ke Jianye was shocked. If this technology is also solved, the technology contained in this star ring is definitely not enough.

Chen Mo reported with a mysterious smile, not much to say. His confidential attitude has caused the curiosity of many experts on the field, but Chen Mo still refuses to disclose.

"With regard to these issues, you don't have to worry about it. I have already considered it when designing, and the technology is not public for the time being."

Chen Mo interrupted their curiosity.

There are room temperature superconductor materials, and the current cooling system is enough to cool the heat generated during the operation of the line. However, Chen Mo does not intend to publish the normal temperature superconductor materials.

Otherwise, these academicians, do not want to open their own brains to take a look at it, when the dead skin is wrapped around his face to the constant temperature superconductor material, then it is troublesome.

They can't see themselves, and for the sake of technology, these researchers can be desperate.

"What about the divertor? Can we look at it?" Ke Jianye now has a lot less doubts.

This [star ring] is much more complicated than he imagined. He saw that the structure inside, he has been convinced, and it is impossible for ordinary people to design such a device.

"it's here."

Chen Mo transferred the divertor structure of the furnace, and all the experts were shocked.

“This is a gallium-tellurium-graphite-tungsten alloy, which is added with rare elements and some high-temperature resistant metals. It is synthesized in a specific ratio, retains some of the metal properties of gallium, has a low melting point, a high boiling point, and has heat resistance and low activation of tungsten. Resist the impact of high-energy neutrons."

"This is this..."

When I heard Chen Mo’s introduction, the experts who produced it were already crazy, especially Guo Xianming, a material expert who came over, and both eyes were golden. This material was published, but a Nobel Prize-winning material is worthless.

"Academician Chen, I am an expert in materials science. It is better to give me a test to see if the material is as you said?" Guo Xianming said.

The shock of everyone was in the expectation of Chen Mo. These are the technologies that have not appeared before, and they are seen by them all at once. It is simply to see the baby.

"Professor Guo, I will not bother you with the test, and I have done many tests." Chen Mo laughed.

Guo Xianming saw his own thoughts being seen through, still not looking red.

Then, Chen Mo said: "In the past two days, Wan Academician has accompanied them to familiarize themselves with the environment of the Institute. If you want to join our project team, I am very welcome. Now '氚' has been sent, two days later, nuclear fusion The experiment can be officially started."

After Chen Mo left, Guo Xianming still couldn't believe it. He asked Wan Yuanwei: "Old Wan, is this liquid metal really like Chen Mo?"

The nature of the liquid metal is absolutely unique.

Solid-state alloys act as divertors. In the fusion reactor, they are hit by high-energy neutrons for a long time, and the metal surface will definitely decay and fall off, or even aging.

However, liquid metal is different, liquid metal has plasticity, and fluidity. As a material at the bottom of the reactor, it can discharge ash and other strange impurities in the reactor.

This ideal material, I did not expect to be synthesized by Chen Mo.

Now he has something to believe.

"There is liquid metal." Wan Yuan nodded.

When he heard the liquid metal material at the bottom of the furnace, he was shocked. But during this time, he was already numb after seeing Chen Mo’s endless variety of techniques.

"Old Wan, is there any way to get back a bit?" Guo Xianming said.

"No, that is the material technology of the marching ants. Even if I am the deputy chief engineer, there is no way to get it." Wan Yuanyi spread his hands and said that he could do nothing.

Although he is a deputy chief engineer, his authority is limited. Come here, from the beginning to the end, just assemble the [Star Ring] to assist the robot to install and debug the instrument.

At other times, he had no way to intervene.

The entire [Star Ring] was designed by Chen Mo. He even thought that their team was deceived by Chen Mo, and even if they were not, Chen Mo could build a star ring. In fact, they simply can't keep up with Chen Mo's rhythm and can only serve as a support staff.

The most important material technology, etc., he is not in contact with this deputy chief engineer.

"Oh, it's a pity." Guo Xianming sighed and said with regret: "If the liquid metal material really has the nature he said, adding such a liquid metal coating to the divertor at the bottom of the super-ring will greatly reduce the life of the divertor. improve."

"These things are not going to come." Li Jian said.

The group was quiet and began to think about what they had just seen. The technical strength of the marching ant company is terrible. Even Ke Jianye, who had doubts about [Star Ring] at the beginning, has not spoken. Just coming here for less than a few hours, each of them has a new understanding of the advanced technology of this institute.

[Star Ring] Construction is completed, the raw materials have arrived, and other preparatory work is also in full swing, waiting for the experiment to begin.

chapters.title: Chapter 425: : Nuclear Fusion Experiment Begins
chapters.body:
Chapter 425: : Nuclear Fusion Experiment Begins

Make sure there is no problem with [Star Ring], Chen Mo will lick the temple, put down the touch pen in his hand, and leave the library of the villa.

The raw materials are ready and other work is ready. Tomorrow is the day when the [Star Ring] began to test. Now that I have finished the final verification, I will let go of my heart. The next step is to look at tomorrow's experimental questions.

The specific data of [Star Ring] still needs to be determined after the experiment.

Walking back to the room, Chen Mo saw a small fishingman who was leaning on the bed to read a book. The belly under the nightdress has been raised, and the side looks like the color of the motherhood.

"Husband." Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo, some small surprises.

"Why don't you sleep?"

Chen Moli had some scattered hair in front of the small fishing amount.

"If you are not sleepy, just read the book." Xiao Yu put down the books in his hand.

"These two days are preparing for the [Star Ring] thing, did not take care of you. After the experiment is completed, then I will compensate you." Chen Mo sat down beside Xiao Yu, gently stroked on her stomach.

Xiao Yu enjoys Chen Mo's touch, and his eyes are sweet: "I don't need your care. Mom is at home, are you afraid that I will not take care of you? They are all long."

Since she knew that she was pregnant, the old man at home was very happy. Chen Moma and Xiao Yuma took turns taking care of her. Her protests were also ineffective. The meat on her body grew a lot and made her very embarrassed.

"When did your experiment begin?"

"Tomorrow, I just went to the final test and started the experiment tomorrow morning." Chen Mo said.

"Well, I wish you all the best tomorrow. I am waiting for you to come back to celebrate at home. I am watching with my children. His father is doing a very great thing. When he grows up, he will be as smart as his father." The fish touched the stomach and some proudly said.

"It’s a daughter, beautiful like a mother."

"Poor mouth, go to the bath, rest early tonight." Xiao Yu pushed Chen Mo.

"Good, wait for me."

Chen Mo kissed Xiao Yu’s forehead and walked into the bathroom.

Nothing in the night.

The next day, Chen Mo got up early and rushed to Science Island after breakfast.

Today is the day when the [Star Ring] experiment started, and Chen Mo is looking forward to it. He has been preparing for the arrival of controlled nuclear fusion from the Science and Technology Library.

It takes countless thoughts and it is finally time to start.

"Mer brother, Li Chengzhi came to the phone." On the way, the voice of the ink girl sounded.

When the phone was connected, Li Chengzhi’s heartfelt voice was heard: “I heard that the dishes are cooked, I used to join in the fun, can I?”

"Come here." Chen Mo naturally understands the meaning of Li Chengzhi.

"Well, ok, I am already at the door of Science Island. Where are you?"

"..."

Chen Mo is speechless.

"You are not afraid that I will not let you go to the table?"

"You and I are so familiar, don't let me eat, shouldn't you let me see?" Li Chengzhi said with a smile: "Zhao has come over, I will follow her, we will wait for you to attend."

Looking at the phone hanging up, Chen Mo smiled helplessly.

When he arrived at Science Island, Li Chengzhi was already waiting. It was rare to see him wearing a military uniform. Next to Zhao Min, the two were chatting and seeing Chen Mo arrived. Both of them looked over.

"I didn't expect your movements to be so fast, no sound, just come out with such a big guy." Li Chengzhi looked around the Science Island.

"Small meaning, I am embarrassed to say, this is only a medium meaning, not so cow. Forced, to wait for success, it is a bit bully. Forced." Chen Mo smiled.

When Li Chengzhi heard Chen Mo’s words, he couldn’t help but shake his head. This guy is sometimes very embarrassed.

Zhao Min naturally heard the conversation between the two people, and smiled and interrupted the two: "Go ahead, everyone else is waiting for us."
