Today is a rare day. She rarely came to Science Island and also ran over. She wants to see, this is a lot of painstaking efforts, and it costs a lot of [Star Ring], what is the result of the experiment.

"Now the company has nothing big to do?" Chen Mo asked. In the past few days, he has never been to the headquarters, and he has never asked anything about the company. He is stuck on the [Star Ring].

"The company's big event, 90% of it is from you. After you stop, the company naturally has no major events." Zhao Min smiled: "These days are in contact with zf, about planning the holographic city, other aspects are calm, Still make money to eat."

Li Jian and others have already waited in the command center, and at this moment, they can't wait to hear. In the past two days, they have had a deep understanding of Science Island. The more they understand, the more shocking they are.

Although the science island has been established for a short time, many of the places used in the technology and experimental environment here have surpassed the science island of Huizhou.

The researchers who were sent here introduced some of the information they could disclose to them, which benefited them a lot. This is just the tip of the iceberg, the real core of the technology [Star Ring], except for Chen Mo, no one else can touch.

Can only see and can not touch, let them tickle.

Seeing Chen Mo enter the command center, Li Jian and others immediately surrounded them, directly ignoring Li Chengzhi and Zhao Min. The two people who were neglected also looked at each other, but they smiled and let the position go away.

"Academician Chen, when did the experiment begin?" Ke Jianye said.

From the very beginning, he questioned [Star Ring], and now he can't wait, he only spent less than two days. The fact is that less than a day, he was shocked by the technology here at Science Island.

Thirty researchers have their own group laboratories, each with state-of-the-art instruments, state-of-the-art holographic projection and artificial intelligence assistants, a relaxed and free research environment, and an ardent academic atmosphere.

Two of his students also entered the delegation. It was not long before he came here. He has made great progress and gave some suggestions for new projects he is studying. Those ideas suggested that even he had a word to awaken the feelings of the dream people.

He is now completely impressed, but unfortunately they cannot all join the Science Island.

"Don't worry." Chen Mo is also very helpless.

These experts are only interested in academics.

Technology is the object of their worship, especially nuclear fusion technology. Now they are like seeing the most admired idols, and they are just the kind of fanatics who can't wait.

"You are surrounded me like this again, and I can't announce the beginning of the experiment."

Chen Mo said a word, so that some anxious Li Jian and others immediately turned off the fire, no longer surrounded by Chen Mo.

A little finishing the clothes, Chen Mo came to the front console.

In the command center, there are 30 researchers brought by Wan Yuanzhen, as well as intelligent robots. The experimental steps and procedures have all been set. The necessary process is done with artificial intelligence, and the researchers only need to provide assistance in addition to the accident.

Everyone's face is very solemn, they have a hunch, today may be a day to create history, and they are a small group of people who witnessed history.

For Chen Mo, they seem to have a blind trust.

Chen Mo stood on the top console and scanned the control center for a circle. He said: "Now, the first fusion test of [Star Ring] officially started."

chapters.title: Chapter 426: :[Star Ring] Ignition
chapters.body:
Chapter 426: :[Star Ring] Ignition

"Start the power."

With Chen Mo's command, the researcher responsible for the power switch pressed the button in his hand.

"The power supply was successfully started."

"[Star Ring] field system works normally."

“The background vacuum pressure is 4×10-6Pa, the water cooling system starts up and works normally. The divertor works normally...”

"I am increasing the current of the B-coil, 10,000 amps...100,000 amps...200,000 amps...1.3 megaamps..."

[Star Ring] After the successful start, the artificial intelligence of the Star Lab, together with the researchers, began to report changes in the data.

In the command center, everyone's eyes are on the screen of the LCD screen. The above is the picture of the [Star Ring]. At this time, the Star Ring is preparing for the work before the start. Everyone has a cold sweat in their hearts.

Artificial intelligence reports data once and for all, as long as there is no problem with the star ring, it is a great news.

To take advantage of the energy of controlled nuclear fusion, two conditions must be met. The first is to instantly heat the helium fuel to 100 million degrees Celsius; the second is to let the fusion reaction last for more than 1000 seconds.

To reach the first condition, firstly, a large current is added to the B-coil to generate a large enough induced current in the vacuum chamber of the star ring at the beginning of the experiment to accelerate the impact ionization of the free electrons. High plasma.

"The fuel is being charged, the fuel is injected... the ohm (e-coil) heating coil current has been added to the maximum..."

“The divertor works normally, the water cooling system is normal, and the longitudinal field is normal...”

Soon, the current and the magnetic field all reached the predetermined value, and the fuel was fully charged, and everyone began to get nervous. The expert academicians on the field, even breathing, have become heavy.

The next ignition is the key.

The circuit of the B-coil is instantaneously changed to a minimum value, so that a current is induced in the vacuum chamber to cause the helium fuel to form a plasma.

Chen Mo is relatively calm. This is his experimental data in the laboratory, using superconducting computer and holographic technology, and with the most advanced artificial intelligence of Moo, simulating hundreds of times. Even if it fails, it will not be too bad.

After all the preparations were completed and the data was stable, Chen Mo was deeply absorbed.

"ignition."

Chen Mo's simple two-word instruction makes everyone's heart unconsciously shrink and the eyelids jump. I saw the data on the screen and there was a huge change in an instant.

"Ignition is successful."

"The plasma beam temperature is 80.14 million degrees Celsius, the vertical field strength is 10.2 Tesla, the plasma current is 1.4 megaamperes, the operating frequency..."

"It is rushing into the fuel, the plasma density is rising, the pressure is rising, and the plasma is heating..."

......

The ignition was successful.

Hearing the report of artificial intelligence, just four words, knocking on everyone in the command center, followed by applause and cheers, many researchers blinked and cried.

They did not expect that the first test was successfully ignited, and the plasma temperature had exceeded the 50 million degrees Celsius of the 'ultra-ring'.

After the joy, everyone calmed down again.

Now that the plasma beam has formed, the next question is the duration of the discharge. If you can surpass their previous experiments, then this is an unprecedented breakthrough.

It also means that, in addition to the Tokamak and the imitation star, a third possible nuclear fusion device is available.

Time passed by, and the data of the artificial intelligence reported, the researchers' breathing became heavy.

It has been 60 seconds, if the plasma continues to discharge for another minute, it means that this experiment will surpass the 100-second record of 'Super Ring' at 50 million degrees Celsius, and they are closer to nuclear fusion energy.

99...100...101...102...

When the plasma beam was continuously discharged for 100 seconds, a burst of crazy cheers broke out in the lab. This means that their first [Star Ring] test has created a new world record.

Li Jian clenched his fists and his eyes were red. They have worked hard for a lifetime, just to one day, controlled nuclear fusion technology can become a new clean energy on the earth.

Now that he has seen hope, Chen Mo, a young man, seems to be synonymous with miracles.

Originally, there was not much expectation for this test. He thought in his heart that the continuous discharge of plasma can last for more than 10 seconds, which is already a huge success.

But the result is far beyond his imagination, he does not know how to express the excitement of the moment.

Next to him, Wan Yuan's body is shaking, and the age is near and ancient. He has never been a moment, as excited as today. In the study of high temperature plasma, he is one of the oldest qualified people in the plasma, and almost witnessed the process of controlling the nuclear fusion project in China from scratch to the world.

His only wish is to see the nuclear fusion power station become a reality in his lifetime.

Originally came to Chen Mo here, the Institute is holding the attitude of his new theory of learning, and did not think about how much Chen Mo can make a lot of movement in a short time.

But today, he saw hope.

The first controlled nuclear fusion experiment has surpassed the decades of their plasma research.

The mood at this time is sad and happy. The sadness is due to the efforts of their plasma for decades, and they have lost to this young man for only one year. He is happy that he saw the possibility of controlled nuclear fusion being successfully utilized.

In addition to Li Jian and Wan Yuanqi, Ke Jianye and Guo Changming, all eyes are red.

Outsiders can't understand their mood at the moment, even if the [Star Ring] technology is not made by them, but they also see the hope of China's application of nuclear fusion energy.

They struggled for the rest of their lives and can see him benefiting the motherland in his lifetime.

Several senior academicians of the old generation, all the tears at the moment. The plasma has been continuously discharged for 150 seconds. If it can reach more than 1000 seconds, it means that the [star ring] can already use nuclear fusion energy.

Compared with many experts, Chen Mo calms a lot.

Looking at the [Star Ring] operation, his mind is constantly flashing through the data, and he is also thinking about possible optimization problems.

“The cooling system works normally, the divertor works normally, the longitudinal field is stable, and the angular field is stable...”

The plasma beam discharge has lasted for 280 seconds, and Chen Mo also seriously thought about it.

Because at the beginning, the instantaneous temperature did not reach hundreds of millions of degrees Celsius, and the data in the simulation test deviated, he was not sure how long the beam could last.

For a plasma that wants to sustain discharge to operate stably, it is necessary to raise the plasma temperature to above 100 million degrees Celsius for more than 1000 seconds to form a continuous reaction condition. Because on Earth, there is no huge pressure inside the sun, and the plasma cannot react spontaneously.

At that time, once the conditions for continuous reaction are reached, the utilization efficiency of the fuel is increased again, and it is possible to maintain self-sustainability, and it is possible to continuously provide continuous energy, and the discharge process of net energy output becomes possible.

At this time, dozens of researchers in the command center were not willing to blink their eyes. They are waiting for the arrival of historical moments.

After 495 seconds, the high-constrained operation of the plasma's continuous discharge finally stopped.

The command center everyone cheered wildly.

In 495 seconds, this is far beyond everyone's expectations. The plasma temperature is nearly 90 million degrees Celsius and maintains a continuous discharge of 495 seconds.

This data has exceeded a limit, which is a major breakthrough, and the goal of successfully applying nuclear fusion energy is close at hand. If the results of this experiment are released, it will shock the world.

Chen Mo sighed and was not very satisfied.

What he wants is not a few minutes of operation, but a few years or even decades of operation. Although this result is already a huge breakthrough, he is still not satisfied. The net energy output without nuclear fusion is an experimental failure for him.

"Now I am preparing for the second experiment." When everyone was immersed in ecstasy, Chen Mo poured a cold water.

chapters.title: Chapter 427: : Does He Want To Go To Heaven?
chapters.body:
Chapter 427: : Does He Want To Go To Heaven?

The silent voice of Chen Mo made all the people in the excitement wrong, and the heart of ecstasy cooled down instantly.

Listening to Chen Mo’s voice, I seem to be very dissatisfied with this result. Already at nearly 90 million degrees Celsius, there is a continuous discharge of nearly 500 seconds, still not satisfied?

They studied what they didn't get in their lifetime.

"Academician Chen, do the second experiment so quickly?" Wan Yuanzhen could not believe it.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"Isn't there a problem with the experiment? Is there a device optimization problem?" Wan Yuanzhen asked.

Now that the first experiment has just been completed, is it necessary to prepare for the second experiment?

The experiment is to get the data, optimize and adjust the reactor equipment, and then continue to the next experiment, and then optimize the adjustment, step by step, until completely successful.

With such a rapid experiment, the results will not be too much.

"I will solve the problems in the experiment and the device. You don't have to worry about it. You have to prepare for it. After I have processed the data of the experiment, I will do the next test for the first time." Chen Mo said.

He dared to confirm that the current [Star Ring] device is sufficient to complete the controlled nuclear fusion experiment because the parameters of each system have not reached the limit. It is only necessary to adjust the parameters of the experimental standard, and the next experiment may be successful in one fell swoop.

Uh?

Li Jian and others looked at each other but did not speak against it.

The previous [Star Ring] experiment has completely conquered them. Chen Mo’s voice in controlled nuclear fusion is now far beyond all of them.

Chen Mo was able to design the [Star Ring] device in such a short period of time and then build it. The first fusion experiment surpassed the efforts of all previous people for decades. This shows that Chen Mo’s strength is not on the same level as they are.

"Wan academician, you and the academy say, send more than 500 grams of sputum fuel over, may have to experiment many times, sent over to meet the needs of the time." Chen Mo looked to Wan Yuanzhen.

"Okay." Wan Yuan nodded.

Now he is convinced of Chen Mo, unprecedented.

"Well, now everyone is preparing for the next experimental work. After the success of the [Star Ring] experiment, I will celebrate with everyone." After Chen Mo and everyone bid farewell, they left the Star Circle Experimental Command Center with Zhao Min and Li Chengzhi.

"The experiment has achieved such great success. Academician Chen seems not very satisfied?"

After Chen Mo and Zhao Min and others left, Li Jian looked at Wan Yuan, and other people looked at him, obviously with the same doubts.

"It may be that the angle of the individual's problem is different. For Academician Chen, the experiment failed before the stable and sustainable plasma was completely formed."

Wan Yuan sighed.

From their perspective, this experiment was an unprecedented success.

But Chen Mo is different. From the beginning, he pursued that the plasma can continue to burn. For them, this is a super-level college entrance examination finale, which cannot be understood or made. For Chen Mo, this is just a simple calculation. Now the answer to this calculation question is not completely correct, and naturally it will not be too happy.

"Now, according to Academician Chen, prepare for the next experiment." Wan Yuanzhen told the researchers on the field. They came here as assistants, and now they have achieved such great success, everyone is very energetic.

No one can say that, next time, they may be able to create history in one fell swoop.

......

"What? The star ring device plasma is running at 495.43 seconds at nearly 90 million degrees Celsius?" Hearing the news, Wang Nian suddenly took the phone and stood up from his seat, his face full of shock.

"Are you sure this result is ok?"

"Yes, seeing it, Li Academician and Lao Guo are present. If you don't believe, you can ask them. Now Lao Guo wants to join the [Star Ring] project." Wan Yuanzhen has a joy in his voice. Imagine that at the end of the phone, his mood is not generally good.

"This is definitely a joke." Wang Nian said.

Guo Changming is a material expert and a material research project for divertors, but he took the lead. Li Jian is also the head of the ‘Super Ring’ experimental project. In the past, their ‘super loop’ experiment did not need to be studied.

“Can you copy the experimental data back?” asked Wang Nian.

"No, I don't have permission to copy data. I need to pass the approval of Academician Chen, but Academician Chen will definitely not agree." Wan Yuanzhen said.

When the two sides talked about cooperation, they have already agreed. Those who have not joined the [Star Ring] project should not view the data of any project, nor can the Academy of Sciences do it.

Therefore, if you want to see the information, you must join the research institute and obtain the corresponding permissions to view. And you can only view the information related to your own research topic.

This is also the condition for Chen Mo to stay in attracting talents. Otherwise, the data will leak out and cause a lot of trouble. When the two sides talked about the joint venture agreement, these conditions were ignored because they were not optimistic. In a short time, Chen Mo could develop too many technologies.

"Okay." The Year of the King is a bit regrettable. No wonder Lao Guo wants to join. This technology can not be touched. It is particularly appetizing. "What are you doing when you call back? What support is needed there?"

“The experiment has just been completed, and Academician Chen seems to be not satisfied.”

"This achievement, he is not satisfied? He wants to go to heaven?" The year of the king heard this sentence, almost did not jump to the table to marry her mother.

Their physics research institute, which is the top physicist in the country, and employs some foreign physicists, has won the world's advanced standards after decades of hard work.

Now Chen Mo's first experiment, it is easy to open them far away, this is enough to hit people, and now Wan Yuanzhen told him that Chen Mo is not satisfied with the experimental results?

"Don't say that, Academician Chen may have the ability to go to heaven. Soon he will be able to take off the 'Sun' and control the 'Sun' between applause." Wan Yuanqi joked.

Year of the King: "..."

"Yuan Academician is preparing for the second experiment. Academician Li and Lao Guo have not returned for the time being. They are temporarily left to help prepare for the experiment. Would you like to come over?"

"Yes, what should I do?" Wang Nian was afraid to speak slowly. Even if Wan Yuan does not say it, he has to go through it.

There is no work now, more important than witnessing the success of controlled nuclear fusion.

"Also, [Star Ring] may have to conduct many experiments, Academician Chen said, may need 500 grams of cesium fuel reserve." Wan Yuanzhen said.

"Well, I applied to the Academy of Sciences and let the nuclear industry group send it as soon as possible." Wang Nian did not hesitate to agree.

Hang up the phone, the king simply tidy up the briefcase, put the information into the safe, and leave the office. He would not think that the news returned by Wan Yuanqi and others was false, because Wan Yuanzhen had no need to lie to him, and Li Jian and others.

Now, no more important than nuclear fusion experiments.

If the nuclear fusion experiment is successful, their academy will also make huge gains, because the Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group, which is approved by the State Council, has established a joint venture with the Army Ant Company.

[Star Ring] Now it is only the first experiment, it has achieved nearly 9000,000 degrees Celsius, plasma steady state operation of 495 seconds, this achievement has already created a new world record.

Then the second, third, fourth time? Wouldn't it be far beyond this number?

It can be said that so far, this is the closest time humans have controlled nuclear fusion energy, and success is close at hand. It is conceivable that Wan Yuanqi and others who witnessed this major breakthrough witnessed how excited they were at the time.

chapters.title: Chapter 428: :Parameter Adjustment
chapters.body:
Chapter 428: :Parameter Adjustment

On the other hand, Chen Mo got the experimental data and left the data center to leave the Institute of Science Island.

On the way, Li Chengzhi could not help but ask.

"Look at the appearance of the academicians of Wan, the experiment should be very successful? So many experts are tearful and sullen, I saw you for the first time."

"It's also successful, not successful, see what you think."

"How do you say this?"

"The first nuclear fusion test, it is indeed a great success to achieve this kind of achievement. It can be said that it is a new chapter in the creation of nuclear fusion technology," Chen said.

"Then you seem to be not satisfied?"

"Although there is such a result, it is not successful for me. The plasma has a continuous discharge time of 495 seconds. It seems to be quite a lot, but this figure is not very effective for years or even decades. I want to buy watermelon, and the sesame I bought is the kind of mood." Chen Mo explained.

For the star ring he studied, this was not a success.

He got very complete technical theory and materials in the technology library, as well as his super brain and artificial intelligence, spending countless financial resources.

It can be said that he has the most perfect conditions, but now only achieve such results, it is not a success.

The holographic simulation is an experiment under ideal conditions, and there are some errors in the actual experiment.

This is the difference between ideal and reality. He now needs to analyze the experimental data obtained, so that the ink girl can re-adjust the experimental data of [Star Ring] according to the experimental data, and perhaps the next time can achieve better results.

Although not completely successful, but this harvest is not small, at least prove that [Star Ring] is right, but the data, and the ideal data is a little different.

After listening to Chen Mo’s explanation, Li Chengzhi immediately became aware.

Chen Mo originally set the experimental target too high, so with this result, he will be dissatisfied. But he did not say much. After all, Chen Mo is the dominant player and he has the most say.

Looking at the appearance of the expert academicians who are in a state of sorrow and crying, the experiment must have achieved unsuccessful results, but this achievement is lower than Chen Mo’s expectation.

"This time, just to see my experiment?" Chen Mo asked.

"I said yes, do you believe?" Li Chengzhi laughed.

Chen Mo shook his head: "It's really a bit unaccustomed. There are definitely tasks in the body. You don't like people who are idle and have fun. You shouldn't have to come to see me experiment?"

"Hey..." Li Chengzhi smiled heartily, it goes without saying.

After all, the nuclear fusion experiment is a special experiment. If it is an ordinary enterprise, even experimental materials and equipment are impossible. This time, [Star Ring] experiment, he was the special personnel, and Chen Mo is the most familiar, so he was sent over to look at the situation and directly responsible for the above.

"Go eat first."

"Well, then I am not welcome. Just eat in the dining hall of this Science Island. Outside of the five-star restaurants that you enter and exit, I can't just go in with this clothes." Li Chengzhi smiled and pointed at his body. military uniform.

"Good." Chen Mo nodded slightly.

The three people ate a meal, Li Chengzhi left, and Chen Mo said, he will come over and watch again next time, Chen Mo also has no objection.

After sending away Li Cheng, Chen Mo and Zhao Min rushed to the army ant headquarters.

"Then I want the cat to be a technical house in the lab?" Zhao Min asked on the way back.

"Now the [Star Ring] experiment has just been completed, I will stay in the lab for a while, concentrate on the experimental data, the company you look at, not particularly important things, do not bother me for the time being." Chen Mo said.

“Is the holographic city project being planned by Binhai City, is it an important matter?” said Zhao Min.

"This is not anxious, it should not be so fast. If you need to find me, wait for me to finish the experiment of [Star Ring] and talk about it."

"Well, then you can study with peace of mind. Now the management team of the company is almost shaped. Even if you retire as a teacher now, the company can work normally." Zhao Min said.

"..." Chen Mo directly turned his eyes, really when he was Ma teacher.

Returning to Building 1, Chen Mo changed his experimental robes and plunged into the physical laboratory to insert the experimental data from Science Island into the computer.

"Ink girl, now processing the experimental data of [Star Ring]." Data transmission is completed, Chen Mo opens.

"Okay, My Brother is dealing with it." The holographic projection of the ink girl fell by Chen Mo, and in front of the two, a holographic projection of the "Star Ring" device appeared.

"You use this experimental data parameter to replace the data parameters in the original simulation. If there is an error, change it according to the error. Reset the experimental data for simulation, I will see the result." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, I am experimenting with the experiment."

At the beginning of the simulation experiment, Chen Mo also looked at the changes in the analog data window, and the original simulation data, there is no small change.

After a long time, the ink girl opened again.

"The simulation results came out. The structure of the [Star Ring] device does not need to be improved. The performance of each structural system can fully meet the needs of the experiment. It is only necessary to slightly adjust the parameters of the experimental system."

Upon hearing this result, Chen Mo sighed.

[Star Ring] The device does not need to be improved, this is good news. Otherwise, remove the [Star Ring] and replace it with the parts. It will take a long time.

"Show me the parameters." Chen Mo said.

"it's here."

Ink's little hand pointed, a piece of data appeared in the transparent LCD screen in front.

“Because the experimental environment is extremely extreme, according to the data from the [Star Ring] experiment feedback, the actual performance of 铍Gallium graphite tungsten is a little different from the laboratory ideal test, and the performance error is small, within the acceptable range... ..."

Chen Mo nodded, did not interject, quietly looked at the data on the screen, listening to the problem of the ink girl summed up [Star Ring].

"The induced electric field is strong enough, the change of the loop field current is not too large, the current intensity is maintained, and the maximum peak value of the current is slightly increased. However, according to the data feedback, the existing heating system is not enough for a predetermined time. Let the plasma reach the target temperature.

Therefore, the maximum flux change capability Φ of the ohmic heating field needs to be adjusted to (16-20) V-S, and the total power P of the eCRF (sustained ion cyclotron heating system) is adjusted to 5 MW to 7.5 MW. In the simulation run, this parameter allows the plasma temperature electron temperature and plasma temperature to reach the target temperature within a predetermined time.

The operating frequency of the steady-state plasma current system (LHCD) is adjusted to 3.7 gHz..."

The ink girl reported a lot of experimental parameters that needed to be re-adjusted, and Chen Mo also looked at it carefully.

These data, if manually calculated and then re-adjusted, take a long time or even a test. With the help of the ink girl, this saves too much time.

Chen Mo thought for a moment and said: "Try it again and compare the second set of data."

"Ok."

In the following time, Chen Mo, in addition to the necessary rest time, all the cats in the laboratory at other times, preparing for the second star ring experiment.

chapters.title: Chapter 429: : Constant Breakthrough
chapters.body:
Chapter 429: : Constant Breakthrough

When the king went down the bus, he couldn’t wait to see the beautiful surroundings and quickly walked over to the entrance of the institute. Waiting for him at the entrance of the institute is Wan Yuanzhen.

Today, it was the day when the second experiment began. After receiving the news of Wan Yuanzhen, he arranged all the work for the first time and quickly rushed to Binhai.

Fortunately, the experiment did not begin now, and he rushed over in time.

“First enter the fingerprint information of the visitor.” Wanyuan used the identity of the Institute to help the king enter the basic information of the visitor.

Every non-investigator who enters the institute must be brought in, and must enter the necessary identity information before entering.

Recording fingerprint information and facial information, as well as voice information, Wan Yuanzhen took the Year of the King into the Institute.

“Is the second experiment ready enough?” asked the year of the king.

"There is plenty of preparation. Yesterday, Academician Chen arranged to modify the parameters of the experiment. It was completed today. The experiment will begin soon. If you come slower, I am afraid I will miss it."

“Is the experiment done so quickly?”

"He can build such a large research institute within one year, and there is a [Star Ring] device. You can say that it is fast or not. You can't use our thinking to define Chen Academician." Wan Yuan said while walking.

After passing through the layers of security, the two talents entered the Star Ring Command Center.

Chen Mo and others have already been in the command center. After seeing the year of the king, the two simply greeted each other. A few words of chilling, the king did not disturb Chen Mo, but went to the position next to Li Jian and others, quietly waiting for the experiment to begin.

Now, in each position, the final inspection of [Star Ring] is being carried out. As long as the inspection is completed, there is no problem, and the second experiment can be officially started.

"Chen Chen, the final inspection has been completed, no abnormal problems have been found." Bai Lijing handed the report to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo took a look at the data in the report, went to the console computer, and finally confirmed the data parameters. In the past few days, I have used the simulation of the ink girl to design the experimental parameters in the laboratory, and set up three sets of experimental parameters.

Yesterday, when the parameters were completed, he asked the researchers to start preparing the parameters of the experiment. Everyone has a clear division of labor, plus the help of intelligent robots, so the action is very fast.

After five minutes, it was confirmed that there was no problem with the data. Chen Mocai put the report in his hand aside and said seriously: "Now it is ready to start the second [Star Ring] experiment."

When Chen Mo said this, everyone in the command center was ready to fight and played a 12-point spirit.

“The second controlled nuclear fusion experiment started and the power was turned on.”

"Startup is successful."

"[Star Ring] field system works normally. The vacuum chamber is normal, the background vacuum pressure is 4×10-6Pa... The cooling system works normally.”

"I am increasing the current of the B-coil, 10,000 amps...100,000 amps...200,000 amps...1.3 megaamps..."

The familiar sound of artificial intelligence made all the researchers on the field slowly nervous.

The achievements of the first experiment allowed them to see the possibility of successful nuclear fusion. Now every experiment is likely to be an experiment to successfully achieve controlled nuclear fusion.

"The fuel is being charged, the fuel is filled; the ohm (e-coil) heating coil current has increased to a maximum..."

“The divertor works fine and the water cooling system is working...”

......

Soon, as in the first experiment, both the current and the magnetic field reached a predetermined value. Some of the parameters are different from the first one, and all others are the same. The fuel is also filled, the preparation is completed, and the next is the ignition, and everyone unconsciously clenches his fist.

"Prepare the ignition countdown, 10...9...8...2...1...Ignition."

With the end of the artificial intelligence countdown, and seeing the instantaneous changes in the number on the computer, everyone is twitching.

[Star Ring] The real-time data collection system used. During the fusion experiment, any data changes in each system will be collected in real time, and it is easy to see the changes inside the device.

"The ignition is successful, the plasma temperature is 84.45 million degrees Celsius, it is rushing into the fuel, it is being pressurized, and it starts to heat the plasma..."

Yes! ! !

Many people clench their fists. This time, the data is much higher than the first experiment. This shows that Chen Mo's improved experimental parameters are effective.

The ignition is successful, and the next step is to see how long the plasma can run stably.

89 million degrees Celsius; 90.84 million degrees Celsius...

When the plasma temperature exceeded 90 million degrees Celsius, everyone shouted in his heart. The temperature of the plasma has been higher than the first experiment, which is another small breakthrough.

Excited, everyone continues to pay attention to the changes in the data.

The Year of the King has been excited and screaming with his fists, his face is red, and the appearance of the first laboratory, Wan Yuanqi and others is no different.

Li Jian and others are much calmer than the first one. I have seen a train puncture, and even this excitement will not be so exaggerated.

The continuous running time has exceeded 500 seconds, and now every second is a new record. In the mood of excitement and ecstasy of all researchers, the time passed in seconds, and the process of continuous plasma discharge ended.

9500 degrees Celsius, 762 seconds, successfully broke through the 12-minute barrier.

This data made all the researchers crazy.

In the second experiment, although a stable long-running plasma was not obtained in the end. However, the achievements have once again refreshed the record set by the first experiment.

If you continue to optimize, success is close at hand. If the news spreads, I am afraid that the whole world will be shaken. Everyone clearly feels that the era of energy change is on the way.

This time, Chen Mo did not need to speak. After the experiment was over, everyone in the command center immediately began preparations for the next experiment.

All the researchers did not find out, unconsciously, they have been affected by Chen Mo, and everyone has only one goal, which is to stabilize the plasma that can sustain long-term discharge and achieve controlled nuclear fusion.

Three days later, the third experiment came as scheduled.

With the first two experiments, everyone's work is well organized. In order for the experiment to proceed smoothly, everyone repeatedly tested the work they were responsible for, for fear that a slight error would lead to the failure of the experiment. The new experiment has also created a new record that makes everyone cry. At 99 million degrees Celsius, the plasma continues to discharge for 964 seconds.

The fourth experiment has not yet begun. Wang Nian, Li Jian, etc. all personally ended and temporarily participated in the preparatory work. The third experiment was 990,000 degrees Celsius, 964 seconds, and the data broke through nine. All of them saw the dawn of victory. The [Stars] that were not optimistic about them have become the instruments most likely to achieve their research.

Under the efforts of everyone, the fourth experiment started according to the original plan, and finally recorded an incredible record of 102 million degrees Celsius and a continuous discharge of plasma for 1042 seconds.

In the fourth experiment, the data has reached the data they expected, but the plasma is not going to last forever. Both of the data break through the theoretical values in the calculations. There are some differences between theory and practice. The people are not discouraged and try their best to prepare for the fifth experiment.

Several experiments have been carried out to continuously adjust and optimize the set experimental parameters. The experimental parameters have gradually approached the final answer in the optimization of Chen Mo and Mo Fu.

Within the Science Island Institute, it also entered an unprecedented tense time. During this time, all personnel on the Science Island are not allowed to leave half a step. Even Chen Mo, in addition to going to the laboratory of the 1st floor of the marching ant headquarters, the rest of the time, all in the Science Island, did not go home.

The news that controlled nuclear fusion continues to make breakthroughs is tightly sealed, and the outside world is unaware that an era of energy change is about to begin on this small island.

chapters.title: Chapter 430: : Controlled Nuclear Fusion Succeeded
chapters.body:
Chapter 430: : Controlled Nuclear Fusion Succeeded

Within the command center, Zhao Min, Li Chengzhi, Wang Nian, Li Jian, etc., all arrived. Chen Mo is standing on the stage of the command center, and the researchers who participated in the experiment are below.

In the first four experiments, the data parameters have been gradually optimized. In the fourth experiment, the values are both theoretical and theoretical.

Now they need an opportunity, an opportunity to break through the bottleneck. As long as you break away from a specific value, the plasma can continue to run without being limited by time.

Now is the fifth experiment, but also an opportunity.

[Star Ring] The experimental parameters are close to the highest value. If this experiment is not successful, it is necessary to modify the [Star Ring] to improve some of its performance parameters before proceeding to the next experiment.

As Chen Mo presses the start button, the star ring starts, the fuel injection is completed, and all the work is ready.

"Prepare for the ignition countdown. 10...9..."

The artificial intelligence sound makes some people's palms unconsciously clenched, and their hearts are constantly praying.

"3...2...1...Ignition."

At the beginning of the moment, the toroidal field current instantly becomes zero. In the vacuum chamber, under the super-inductive current generated, the helium gas instantaneously fuses and becomes a plasma.

"Ignition success, plasma temperature 98.37 million degrees Celsius ... is injecting 氘氚 fuel... increasing plasma pressure... heating plasma..."

The ignition was successful, let everyone sigh and keep on staring at the computer screen.

Next, it is the key to the experiment. The first four times were successful ignitions, and the record was constantly refreshed, but the plasma eventually went out, and their hopes were pinned on this fifth experiment.

The command room is silent. Everyone's eyes are on the computer screen, and they keep their eyes on it.

Time passes by, and the time when the plasma is running stably is constantly refreshing, and they can see their hearts leaping.

The temperature of the plasma has reached 120 million degrees Celsius, and the duration of continuous discharge has exceeded 1000 seconds, reaching 1032 seconds. Now every second of the increase may be a limit.

Because no one knows, at which point in time, the plasma can reach the critical value of the bottleneck and jump out.

“The data is normal and the plasma is stable.”

"The plasma is stable."

"The plasma is stable."

......

Every ten seconds, the sound of artificial intelligence will ring once in the command center. The duration of continuous discharge has already exceeded 1042 seconds of the fourth experiment.

The operation of sustainable discharge is still going on. Everyone in the command center is waiting quietly. Although they are only staring at the computer screen, no one is impatient, and even wants to continue this way.

"The longitudinal magnetic field is stable... the angular magnetic field is stable..."

“The ion cyclotron heating system is working properly and the ohmic heating system is working properly.”

“The pellet feeding system works fine...”

“The plasma temperature is 135 million degrees Celsius and the plasma is stable.”

“The first wall temperature is 2208 degrees Celsius, the divertor works stably, and the cooling system is stable.”

"[Star Ring] is stable."

......

Listening to the sound of artificial intelligence, everyone feels as sweet as a scorpio, and everyone does not consciously smile, including Chen Mo.

The time to discharge continuously has passed 1800 seconds, more than half an hour. The plasma in the [Star Ring] has been running stably, and the fusion reaction can also proceed spontaneously. The consumption of cesium fuel is also reduced by 30% in the same period of time as in the previous experiments. This shows that the internal combustion of the plasma has been formed and the fuel utilization rate has increased.

The plasma has broken through a specific peak, and the nuclear fusion energy reacts spontaneously. As long as the fuel is charged, the plasma burning time can continue to run stably and will not go out.

Soon, an hour passed, the continuous discharge of the plasma continued, and the data remained stable and did not mean to extinguish.

The eyes of many researchers did not consciously concentrate on Chen Mo, waiting for Chen Mogai to make a conclusion. Some researchers, the body is shaking, trying to hold back the excitement of the heart, just waiting for the last moment of the explosion.

They have worked so hard for so long, and today they finally got the results they wanted.

After carefully reading the data of the "Star Ring" stable operation, Chen Mo finally revealed a smile that was somewhat unsatisfactory. It is now clear that the plasma is not extinguished, indicating that the experiment has been successful.

His efforts have already had results today. Looking at the hopes of many hopes, Chen Mo walked onto the console and slowly approached the microphone and said: "Now I announced that the fifth experiment of [Star Ring] was a complete success. Cheers."

boom……

When Chen Mo announced his success on the console, the researchers of the entire Star Loop Experimental Command Center broke out instantly.

All the researchers shouted, applause and cheers, and they rang through the control room of the command center.

More than forty people broke out with cheers that no one hundred people had. In the past, the researchers were very gentle, and this time they were finally released.

"Success, success. Hahahahaha..."

"We are successful..."

"Controlled nuclear fusion is successful."

......

Sitting in the position of Wang Nian and Li Jian and other academician experts, at this moment, regardless of the image of crazy yelling, just cuddling together, old tears, crying and laughing.

Among them, they are pioneers in domestic plasma research, witnessing controlled nuclear fusion technology from scratch, to leading the world, and now to obtain a plasma that can continue to burn.

There are no words to describe their mood at the moment. Just as the ancestors succeeded in detonating the first ‘Atomic Bomb’, the only cheers and shouts could express their excitement.

Chen Mo was also infected by the fierce atmosphere, laughing and laughing and applauding.

For today, he has spent too much energy. Among many technologies, the development of the [Star Ring] device is undoubtedly the most difficult one.

From the decision to cooperate with the official, the two sides negotiated the project, and then to the construction of the Institute and the Star Ring, to the present [Star Ring] experiment announced the success, cost him too much thought. This technology involves too many fields. He has successfully put a lot of material technology and production technology in the technology library.

Li Chengzhi saw the academicians who were crying like children. Some of them were so sad that they just applauded quietly.

"Congratulations." Zhao Min, who was on the sidelines, was also infected by this atmosphere. He walked over and hugged Chen Mo: "Congratulations on your success. At this moment, you are a big man standing in the middle of history."

Zhao Min also expressed her heartfelt happiness. This is the time when she saw Chen Mo’s disappointment.

In the past, Chen Mo was a calm and relaxed appearance, and he was like a daddy who saw the red dust. No matter what happened, he was always calm. I did not expect Chen Mo to open up today, but think about the experimental results Chen Mo got, she also knows that Chen Mo is happy.

A revolution in human history has already appeared in his hands. This is a man who created history.

"Thank you." Chen Moshun took a shot of Zhao Min's back and said with a smile.

Zhao Min gave up Chen Mo with some reluctance, and Yan Yan smiled: "What do you want to do now?"

“What do you want to do most?” Chen Mo slammed his head and thought: “I want to go home to take a hot bath now, and then let me think about it, don’t think about anything, just ‘naked. Sleep’ once.”

Oh...

Zhao Min was teased and gave him a blank eye.

The atmosphere of the joy of the command center is still there. Many researchers shouted dumb, and they applauded, ignoring the palms that had already risen.

The outside world does not know that a technology for human energy change has already appeared in this insignificant island.

chapters.title: Chapter 431: : Delayed Announcement
chapters.body:
Chapter 431: : Delayed Announcement

"Chen Mo, brother, come over."

After many scholars finished the celebration party and were preparing to leave Science Island, Chen Mo was also called out by Li Chengzhi and went to an office where no one was.

"I reported the success of the controlled nuclear fusion experiment, and the above message."

"Well? You have a task again?" Chen Mo asked.

"There is really a news." Li Chengzhi’s face is a bit serious: "Do you think that if the news of successful nuclear fusion is announced now, how big is the impact on the present world?"

"Energy change, affecting the balance of the whole world, there may be a new order." Chen Mo said. He studied this and he had already done his homework before he started.

"Well, yes, it is true." Li Chengzhi endorsed Chen Mo's words and then asked: "What else?"

"The other influences are quite a lot. I can't say it all at once. It is estimated that writing a few papers is not complete." Chen Mo said.

"It seems that you also understand that controlled nuclear fusion is a good thing. As you said, it will revolutionize and even create a new order. But if it appears too suddenly, it will be a surprise. If it is not ready, this may not be a good thing. It may also be the root of chaos. There are two sides to everything. Do you understand this?"

"Well, I know this." Chen Mo said: "You will talk about your mission."

"If something is good or bad, it is necessary to minimize the disadvantages and maximize the benefits. If you suddenly announce the news, say big, as you said, it may trigger global change, disorderly order. Change to new order. Crisis and opportunities coexist. If you are not ready, it is not necessarily a good thing.

Internally, the main domestic electrical energy is still thermal power generation. If it is announced suddenly, it will hit the coal and oil industry. It may cause unnecessary social problems after the panic, as well as employment problems. ”

"Lie Li? When did you analyze this big event?"

Chen Mo came to interest at once.

"I reported the news of the successful nuclear fusion success. I came over the phone and said this." Li Chengzhi said truthfully.

"You want me to not announce the news of controlled nuclear fusion so soon?"

Chen Mo instantly understood the intention of Li Chengzhi.

"Yes, it really means this. You will successfully develop nuclear fusion technology so quickly, and the news has already alarmed the top of the list. For your message, the above is urgently developing some new development strategies to find a new strategic direction.

Therefore, we hope that you will announce the news of nuclear fusion in two months. We will prepare in advance to minimize the bad influence of your possible announcement and to mention the benefits to the highest. ”

"I still have a big event, a two-month delay, no big deal."

Chen Mo did not hesitate to agree.

Two months earlier and two months later, he had no influence on him. His research on controlled nuclear fusion has been achieved. It makes money for one thing, and it doesn't matter for a month or two.

However, if it is announced suddenly, the impact on society will certainly be small.

International oil prices may plummet, causing global social and economic chaos, leading to changes in the new order in advance, and the impact here will be very scary. Domestically, the oil price plummeted, coupled with the panic in the coal industry, and the number of unemployed people skyrocketed, which caused social problems.

The top thinks more than he thinks.

With a little more time to prepare, after the announcement of the news, the official has prepared for the international and domestic aspects, and can maximize the benefits, at least to minimize the domestic impact.

"That's good." See Chen Mo promised, Li Chengzhi sighed.

"The big head told me to tell you, or that sentence, if there is any special technology to be studied in the future, you can explain it to me. Your research, within the scope of permission, will give you the greatest convenience, let you let go. I hope that you can become a 'giant' on the road to rejuvenation in China."

"Okay." Chen Mo nodded.

Having this commitment is better for him than any other benefit.

"Then my mission is also completed." Li Chengzhi sighed with relief: "What are you going to do next?"

"Go home to accompany your wife."

......

Wang Lan and the babysitter Lin Biao just got out of the car and prepared to return to the villa with fresh ingredients they just bought. The other car stopped behind them.

Seeing Chen Mo from the car, Wang Lan immediately showed a happy color.

"Xiao Mo, come back."

"Come back." Chen Mo met Wang Lan and smiled and nodded: "What did you buy?"

“Xiaoyu is pregnant with children. Sometimes I want to eat oranges and apples. I will buy some for her. And these are the freshest dishes, ready for dinner. I have to buy it every day, pregnant women eat fresh things. It would be better.” Wang Lan said: “What happened to your work? Are you still busy?”

"The work has come to an end, and then it is not so busy." Chen Mo said.

"That's good, that's good." Wang Lan nodded frequently, his face was lingering: "Then I will go back this time. You will spend more time accompanying Xiaoyu, you accompany her, than I am taking care of her."

“Do you live for a while?” Chen Mo asked.

"Space is reserved for you young people. I am here, but also for you, you are not used to it. Occasionally come over to see the small fish." Wang Lan smiled, waiting for Chen Mo to open again, he went back to the villa with him. .

When Chen Mo entered the villa, he saw a small fisherman who was reading a book on the sofa and listening to music. Chen Mo gently walked over and reached out from behind to block the eyes of Xiao Yu.

"Husband." Feeling the familiar palm, Xiao Yu immediately turned his head and turned his head.

"I am back." Chen Mo sat down beside Xiaoyu, and touched and raised a lot of belly: "Is there any embarrassment at home during this time?"

"Looking at it, just thinking of you a little." Xiao Yu put down the book in his hand and leaned gently on Chen Mo's body.

"My experiment is completed, and I am not so busy. I will give myself a holiday these few days, and I will accompany you and take you out for a walk." Chen Mo looked at the book that Xiaoyu looked at, all of which were books for parenting. Obviously, I am preparing for my mother.

"Well, okay." Xiao Yu is full of joy. During this time, she was taken care of by her mother. She could only be active in the villa. She rarely went out and ruined her.

"I have to take a bath first, and I just smelled it when I came back." Chen Mo said.

"Go." Little fish nodded.

Going back to the bedroom and taking a hot bath, Chen Mo was replaced by a loose casual wear and sat down next to Xiao Yu.

During this time, in order to [Star Ring] experiment labor, today finally succeeded.

[Star Ring] The success of technology means that in the science and technology library, the most difficult technology has been completed, and finally you can rest for a while.

Now at home, there is a small fish to accompany, no need to think about anything, Chen Moxin also naturally relax, unconsciously, leaning on the sofa and slept.

Seeing Chen Mo’s scornful breath, and a slightly tired face, Xiao Yu is somewhat distressed.

After Chen Mo went to the experiment last time, Chen Mo did not go home for most of the month. She also knows that Chen Mo is busy and he is pregnant, so he waits at home and waits for Chen Mo to come back.

Did not wake Chen Mo, Xiao Yu gently picked up the book, and was quietly accompanied.

chapters.title: Chapter 432: : Zhao Min'S Ambition
chapters.body:
Chapter 432: : Zhao Min'S Ambition

For the next five days, Chen Mo was at home to rest, gave himself a small vacation, and occasionally asked the Science Island plasma by phone.

Five days later, Chen Mocai returned to Science Island again.

At this time, the Science Island is busy.

When Chen Mo entered the experimental command center, Wan Yuanqi and others all greeted them, and everyone’s face was red.

The year of the king and others did not leave, guarding the plasma of successful fusion.

[Star Ring] The remaining fuel after the experiment can only be burned for three days by [Star Ring]. Therefore, Wang et al. applied for emergency fuel from above, and the fuel was sent the next day.

Five days later, the fuel sent over has been burning the plasma, and the plasma is still stable and does not mean to extinguish.

This is a great news, which means that the nuclear fusion of [Star Ring] has really been successful. As long as fuel is maintained, the plasma can continue to fuel for a long time.

"How is the operation of [Star Ring]?" Chen Mo entered the Star Circle Experimental Command Center and asked about it.

"The steady-state operation of the plasma, the power generation of the research institute can reach 760,000 kWh, which is equivalent to the power generation of the i-type i-type power station." Wan Yuan can't wait to say.

This is just an experimental reactor, and the power generation is quite large and medium-sized hydropower stations. If a nuclear fusion power station is actually built, after installing a turbine generator, the power generation can easily exceed 20 million kWh. Two nuclear fusion power plants and even a very large nuclear fusion power station are enough to support a province's power supply.

At that time, the thermal power will be completely eliminated, and there is no need to worry about the shortage of electricity nationwide.

The most important thing is that the product of nuclear fusion is helium, and there is no need to worry about the generation of radioactive nuclear waste like nuclear fission power stations. It is safe and pollution-free and belongs to real clean energy.

"Chen Chen, now let us evaluate and build a nuclear fusion power station with a power of 20 million per day. What is the cost?"

"I don't know the overall project cost of the power station. I am not a professional evaluator and cannot evaluate it. However, the construction cost of [Star Ring] can be determined, about 10 billion one reactor, and other valuations should be evaluated by yourself. I can't help."

Chen Mo gives a rough figure.

The Year of the King and others nodded. The cost of [Star Ring] was within the acceptable range, and the construction cost of [Star Ring] was obtained. Other construction costs were evaluated by professionals.

"Now the plasma has been completely stable, basically it is certain that the experiment is successful. Next, all you have to do is prepare for the construction of a nuclear fusion power station." Chen Mo said.

"This knows." Wan Yuan nodded.

The cost of a nuclear fusion power station is within an acceptable range, and then it may be the time when the country builds a nuclear fusion power station on a large scale.

By the time they are experts, they must be busy again.

After checking the circle at the Star Ring Experimental Command Center, Chen Mocai took the data of the Star Rings in the past few days and went to the headquarters of the Army Ant Company.

Now that the nuclear fusion project cannot be announced, he can be quiet for a while.

"came back."

Chen Mo came back, Zhao Min and Lan Xi also entered his office.

During this time, she mainly contacted the official city of Binhai City to discuss the project of ‘holographic city. Now the nuclear fusion experiment has been successful, and Chen Mo’s research has come to an end, so she will also explain the work.

"Is there time now?"

"With it."

Zhao Min took a u disk from Lanxi and handed it to Chen Mo: "The inside is the scope of this holographic city plan. I have already made people make maps with holographic maps."

She got these things as early as ten days ago, but at that time it was the most crucial moment in the nuclear fusion experiment. He could not disturb Chen Mo, but only now.

Chen Mo nodded and took the u disk from Zhao Min's hand and plugged it into the computer.

"Ink girl, release the holographic map."

"Roger that."

The voice of the ink girl just fell. On the holographic office desk in front of the three people, the map of the holographic sand table was suspended. The buildings attached to the Binhai Center are all scaled down and fully displayed on the office desk.

“The Holographic City Project has been finalized. The planned location includes the entire Marina Square, the Binhai Library, the Museum, the Art Center, the Children’s Palace, etc. There is also a Grand Theatre facing the center of the sea, which is also planned within the project, including this In the waters, the official is preparing to build a large water stage here."

Zhao Min drew a circle on the waters between the Grand Theatre and the Marina Center.

“In addition, when the holographic city project begins, the official will persuade the Financial Center Building, CITIC Building, and Dega Land, as well as the surrounding office buildings, hotels, respond to the official holographic city plan, install holographic projectors to replace traditional LCDs. Screen, holographic ads."

Zhao Min pointed to the holographic map and introduced Chen Mo to the official plan.

This ‘holographic city’ is the core part of the official ‘Technology City Plan’ of Binhai City. In the future, as the external image of the coastal city, it is also the place that Yao Yi attaches the most.

“The underground mall, as well as the shopping mall building next to it, all billboards will be replaced by holographic projections and planned to be the world’s top shopping mall. This planned holographic city will focus on shopping and entertainment, humanities and art, finance. Business and leisure in one, as the business card of the city of 'Technology City'."

Chen Mo agreed to nod.

Yao Yi will take advantage of the marching ant company.

Near the water tower.

Binhai City has made Marina Square the only holographic city in the world, which is almost the largest holographic playground to attract the attention of the whole world.

There is also a huge advantage in the economic circle of the Dawan District.

As long as the ‘holographic city’ project is completed, it is almost certain that in the next few years, Binhai will become one of the most well-known cities in the world, a hotspot city for global tourism, and a state-of-the-art technology city.

"there's one more thing."

"You said." Chen Mo nodded.

"I got the land of this island."

Zhao Min clicked on a small island not far from the sea in the center of the sea. It is not too far from the Grand Theatre and smaller than the island where the Grand Theatre is located.

"What plans do you have?" Chen Mo was a little surprised.

"I am going to set up a red fire ant company." Zhao Min said.

"Red Fire Ant Company, what?"

“Red Fire Ant Company is responsible for the market of our marching ant group in culture and entertainment. It includes investment in movies, playgrounds, games, animation and other cultural fields.”

Zhao Min said his thoughts.

"This island, I will make it the world's first holographic playground - including the Jurassic world, the underwater world, the ice kingdom, the fairy tale world, the Halloween theme, etc. It can also be a holographic world of various popular big iP themes. .

With a large holographic projector, we can shape a variety of different themes at any time and place on this island. It is just across the water from the Marina Centre and is in perfect harmony with the future holographic city. As long as you get the reclamation approval and expand the area of the island, you can meet the construction needs of our playground. ”

Chen Mo is responsible for developing technical products, she is responsible for making money. Her task is to convert all the products developed by Chen Mo into cash of white flowers, and completely release the ability of the marching ant group to make money.

The size of the marching ant group is now very large.

In the high-tech fields such as robots, materials, and artificial intelligence, marching ants are high in the cold, leaving the whole world behind. The Internet, the field of electronic products is also very strong, and the pharmaceutical field is quite satisfactory, but other areas are slightly insufficient.

The marching ant group has huge cash reserves and technology. She needs to transform the huge potential of the marching ant group into influence in various fields, thereby expanding the voice and resources of the marching ant group and building a huge commercial empire.

This is Zhao Min’s ambition.

chapters.title: Chapter 433: : Nobel Prize
chapters.body:
Chapter 433: : Nobel Prize

I have to say that Zhao Min is very strong in making money and knows how to use the existing resources of the marching ants to create more wealth for the company.

Chen Modu admits that if there is not Zhao Min, I am afraid that the marching ant company will not be able to have the size of today. Zhao Min’s sharp eyes and means only allowed the marching ants to expand so rapidly.

"A very good idea, according to what you said, how much is the budget?" Chen Mo said.

“The budget is 15 billion. On the island, in addition to the holographic theme playground, there are other rides. Building a bridge to the island. 15 billion, enough to do well.”

Zhao Min took the plan from Lanxi and handed it to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo looked through the plan, the playground project planning and inspection, and made a detailed assessment. As long as the application for reclamation approval was submitted, the project could be started immediately.

There is an official relationship between Chen Mo and Binhai City. It is not difficult to reclamate the sea.

This is obviously ready, and Zhao Min found Chen Mo, which is already in the final stage. After carefully reading it, Chen Mo picked up the pen and signed his name on the document.

"Follow your thoughts, let go and do it."

"Blue Creek, you must first arrange the next job." Zhao Min handed the documents in his hand to Lanxi.

After Lanxi left, Zhao Min spoke again.

"The news of successful nuclear fusion, when will it be announced?"

"Look at the situation, at least two months. The official asked me to prepare for two months. The technology is a little scary, has jumped, and has been rushed to announce it, causing economic turmoil will not be too good." Chen Mo said.

"It is true that it is like a normal temperature superconducting material. No one would have thought that you would resolute the problems that plagued the global physicists within a year. If they were known, they would be vomiting blood." Said.

Nuclear fusion technology is not the technology that should be present now. At least not within ten years, it is now appearing in advance, like holographic technology.

"This is not what we should worry about, we are responsible for making money." Chen Mo smiled.

“The controlled nuclear fusion project has been successful, what technology are you going to develop next?”

Zhao Min understands Chen Mo, a technical success means the beginning of the next technology, which has always been the case. She is curious as to what structure Chen Mo’s brain is.

"First take a break, otherwise I will be caught and sliced."

Zhao Min did not care.

"You should be sliced now."

Chen Mo shrugged and controlled nuclear fusion. He did not enter the technology library to receive technology. One is to spend some time with the small fishing, after all, the small fishing is pregnant.

[Technology apprentice] stage, there are four areas, medicine, ecology, machinery and military. During the study of controlled nuclear fusion technology, he has laid the foundations of the four laboratories, all the instruments are ready in advance, and it is not too difficult to study any of them.

Next, he wants to go abroad and the Nobel Prize is awarded soon.

"If you don't study it, what are you going to do?"

"Nobel Prize."

When Chen Mo’s words came out, Zhao Min immediately became clear. Now, not far from the date of the Nobel Prize, Chen Mo is also ready to leave.

"Be careful when you go out." Zhao Minwei.

Chen Mo is no better than her, she can run around the world, but Chen Mo does not work. She has known that Chen Mo’s attack has been more than three times. The last time was the most dangerous. Every time it came from outside China.

In the country, they are all stared and go abroad, but other people’s sites are not careful. It is not a joke. It is not new news that scientists have been kidnapped for assassination.

"No way, as the first Chinese scientist in the physics discipline, I am also a representative figure, this is to make up for a shortcoming." Chen Mo said quietly.

When he was an angry youth, he also did not have the Nobel Prize in Physics for Huaxia. There are many things to understand now. I also know that the Nobel Prize is only a tool under the influence of politics. In addition to getting a technology library, the pursuit is not so strong.

But now that there is, go out to collect, but my own young wish, but also the wish of the domestic physics community.

Zhao Min left, Chen Mo also set his sights on the holographic map of the holographic office desk. Holographic map of Marina Square, Yao Yi's meaning, please help him to give planning advice.

The holographic projectors of the ‘Holly City’ project are all supplied by the marching ant company, and it is conceivable how much money to earn. Since the Binhai City official wanted to hear his opinion, he did not refuse.

"Ink, what do you think of the planning of Marina Square?" Chen Mo said.

“How high is the holographic projection?”

The ink girl fell by his side, his eyes wide open and very cute. After a long period of machine learning, Chen Mo’s teaching, now her intelligence is no different from normal people, but only the human-specific feelings are lost.

"70 meters above the square." Chen Mo said a little.

This height has 20 floors and is enough for the Marina Square.

“This requires three large holographic projection linkage projections to create a large enough image. The best way is to build two rows of large columns on both sides of the square and mount the projector on the column to achieve this effect.”

After the ink girl finished, she floated a pillar on the holographic map of the Marina Square, standing on both sides of the central square of the Marina, and connected in a row, such as standing soldiers, and then holographic projectors arranged on the pillars.

The holographic projection of the pillars is completed, and the holographic map of the Marina Square is over, showing the scene of the fairy dancing, colorful. The ink female projection also appears in the holographic map, which is nearly 70 meters according to the proportion of the square.

"This effect is okay." Chen Mo nodded and pointed to the buildings and office buildings on both sides of the square: "On the top of the building on both sides, there are also two holographic projectors. On the side of the flower beds in the Marina Square, some medium-sized holographic projectors are installed. ”

According to Chen Mo's description, the ink girl began to place a holographic projector in the best position in Marina Square.

"In the coastal area of Binhai Square, build a building similar to the Yangcheng Tower. It does not need more than 400 meters, 300 meters. The holographic projector is placed on the building wall, and the image of 'Beach Fishing Girl' is projected to cover the whole building. ""

Chen Mo points to the position on the beach.

A small version of the building stands in the sea, followed by the coastal fisherwoman of the coastal city, covering the entire building. It feels like a woman from a high-rise building, instantly turned into a daughter of the sea, gentle and moving, the dress is flying with the sea breeze, overlooking the entire coastal city.

Together with the fairyland flying over the Marina Square, there are also clusters of holographic projections on the ground.

Now it's just in the simulation. If it happens, the projection of a few hundred meters will definitely be very shocking. At that time, the sky over the Marina Square will definitely cause a huge sensation.

There is only one family in the world, and there is no semicolon.

There will be countless tourists coming to visit, and Binhai will become the most famous tourist city in the world. The landscape here can be made according to the model of holographic projection, which can be different every day.

chapters.title: Chapter 434: : News And Departures
chapters.body:
Chapter 434: : News And Departures

The latest news from Xinhua.com: To accelerate the implementation of carbon emission plans, address climate change and build an environment-friendly society. The State has issued a document notice to increase the intensity of the 'coal reduction plan'. In the next ten years, we will gradually reduce the output of coal and vigorously promote clean energy...

According to the Global Times, the capital has launched a ‘coal reduction plan’ and will gradually replace nuclear power with nuclear power. To achieve its commitment to reduce carbon emissions in the climate conference...

......

The sudden news of the Huaxia official attracted a lot of attention.

Not only is the one-size-fits-all coal reduction plan, but also the nuclear power construction is strongly advocated when the coal reduction plan is announced. It is obvious that nuclear power plants are gradually replacing traditional thermal power generation and traditional energy sources.

This resolute ‘thickening coal’ attitude has been around for a while, but there has never been such a resolute, large-scale plan. This situation has left many people unclear. As a result, the price of coal has fluctuated in the global trade.

Everyone is wondering why the Chinese official suddenly made such a bold plan?

At present, China's thermal power generation is still the main source of electrical energy. It is planned to reduce thermal power generation across the board in just ten years, saying that in order to achieve the promise of reducing carbon emissions. Slow down the pace of development for this kind of thing, and there are not many people who believe it.

This is the case, the more strange the outside world.

All walks of life have to doubt whether China has the ability to solve the problem of reducing the power supply after coal production. In China's plan, it is impossible to really affect its own development for a carbon emission.

And another problem faced, vigorously promote nuclear power plants to replace thermal power generation, and the nuclear waste of nuclear fission power stations is absolutely enough to cause headaches in China, and the construction of nuclear power plants in large quantities must also consider safety factors.

At this stage, can nuclear power completely replace thermal power generation?

The topic has become a topic of discussion in various circles of the society.

The various think tanks around the world also evaluated Huaxia’s decision. The final conclusions are all confused. It can only be guessed that Huaxia has made mistakes in decision-making and misjudged the development speed of clean energy.

The official has acted.

Seeing the news, Chen Mo immediately understood that in response to the news that he announced the successful nuclear fusion two months later, the official has begun to prepare.

Take precautions.

After preventing him from announcing the success of controlled nuclear fusion, it caused a huge market crisis.

Now, a big signal is released to the outside world. Huaxia will slowly put aside the thermal power generation. The coal market is no longer a darling, so that people engaged in the coal industry are prepared.

Then in the past two months, gradually arrange the employment of the relevant personnel, so as to avoid the sudden emergence of a large number of unemployed people.

It is better to have two 12-level typhoons coming one after another than to be attacked by a 17-level typhoon. At least the damage and loss are not so terrible, and there is buffer space in the middle.

After paying a little attention to the news, Chen Mo looked at the table.

Xiao Yu is by his side, and his mother is there.

Have breakfast.

"When you go there, pay attention to your body. The weather is already cold. I packed my clothes and I am in the trunk." Xiao Yu sat next to Chen Mo and put the peeled eggs on his plate.

"Good." Chen Mo nodded and picked up the eggs to eat: "You raise your baby at home, come back and bring you a present."

"Reassured, there is a mother, you can do your thing." Chen mother also opened.

Now that her daughter-in-law is pregnant, Chen Mo is busy with work. She and her mother and son, taking turns to change once in a month or two, come over to take care of the small fishing, and do not have to fish back to their homes with a small fish.

For this daughter-in-law, Chen Mu is very fond of it.

After breakfast, Chen Mo went to the airport.

After two days, it is the day of the Nobel Prize, and he is leaving now.

Just arrived at the VIP lounge of the airport, Li Chengzhi took four people into the waiting room to see the temperament, which is definitely a person who is capable and capable.

Li Chengzhi looked at the four players standing in a row and handed the basic information in his hand to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo simply browsed through the information, and the identity of the four people was unacceptable. The retired members of the Central and South China Sea Security Guards, in ancient times, were all former guards.

Two men and two women.

The man cut his head and looked very capable. The two women are also dressed in professional dresses, one with short hair and a light makeup, one with a high ponytail and black-rimmed glasses. The two have no difference with the urban senior white-collar workers. They usually look at the past and will definitely be personnel. A pretty secretary.

"The people who sent you are coming. They are the players who are preparing to retire. This trip is their last mission, serving as your bodyguard. Your treatment is almost the same as that of the important heads." Li Chengzhi finished, turned his head and looked Four people: "Come here, introduce yourself."

"Yes!" The four men said in unison.

"Zhu He, code-named Furong, you can call me Furong in the future." Standing on the far side, with a high ponytail, ******, wearing a formal dress of fire hibiscus took the lead.

When she entered the reception room, she was looking at Chen Mo, not only her, but also believed that the other three were secretly looking at Chen Mo.

Before coming, Li Chengzhi showed Chen Mo's information to them. He knew that the person in front of him was the founder of the marching ant company, and Chen Mo, who is famous all over the world. Age is smaller than them, but it affects the speed of world scientific and technological progress, and it is incredible.

What makes her feel incredible is that the black eagle and Wang Hai around Chen Mo have made her invisible.

"Mr. Chen, my name is Yuan Pingshan, codename Taishan." A body of nearly two meters standing out, muscles, and Anan have a fight. The shape and the code name of Taishan are indeed somewhat consistent.

"My name is Luo Yu." said the woman with short hair and light makeup.

"Zhong Lei." The thinnest man opened his mouth.

"Swedish trip, they are four of your bodyguards. Furong and Luo Yu serve as your private secretary and assistant, Alei and Taishan as peripheral security personnel." Li Chengzhi said.

Now Chen Mo can not tolerate any mistakes.

Nuclear fusion technology has just succeeded. Chen Mo is an artificial intelligence expert, robot expert, material expert, and physicist. Proficient in various fields of technology. If Chen Mo is an official R&D officer, he will definitely be restricted from leaving the country and be protected as a national treasure, but he is not, and his actions are not subject to official restrictions.

The Nobel Prize, Chen Mo, as the first Chinese physicist to attend the award, is related to the honor of China, so he sent people to protect, and the four are about to retire.

“After retiring, are you interested in coming to work for my company?” Chen Mo looked at four people: “The annual salary is three million, and various benefits are needed.”

Chen Mo directly recruited, in the expectation of Li Chengzhi, sent them over, is to send talent to Chen Mo.

"Yes." The four nodded.

Let them protect Chen Mo, before, have asked similar questions. When Chen Mo said it, they did not hesitate to agree. This condition is much stronger than they are looking for other jobs.
