The four were arranged, and Chen Mo took out the holographic mobile phone and played the game leisurely until the plane noticed the takeoff before leaving the waiting room.

chapters.title: Chapter 435: : Like A Penguin?
chapters.body:
Chapter 435: : Like A Penguin?

Sweden, a senior hotel room, five people, three men and two women. The atmosphere is very dull, everyone is doing their own thing.

Two women sitting opposite each other, a white turtleneck sweater, holding a magazine, quiet like a white lotus in the snow, giving a feeling of coldness; another woman wearing a deep V black dress, a large piece of snow white exposed to the air, red lips 抿With red wine, it’s sexy, with the charm of the night. Invisible, the two have a sense of tit-for-tat.

The other three are doing their own thing. A group of Hu Hanzi, holding a "home on the ruins" in his hand, concentrated on watching, no expression. The other two stood in the window to see the scenery, a strong and thin, contrasting.

No one is talking, it seems to be waiting for something.

"When do you say that our hometown will have such peace?" The lean man standing in the window watching the scenery opened his mouth and broke the dull atmosphere.

As soon as the sound fell, there was a movement in the quiet room. The four turned their heads and glanced at the lean man, and continued to do his own thing without any problems.

Hu Hanzi put down the book, thinking about it, a little serious.

"When death comes."

The answer made the atmosphere in the room boring again.

"It's better to talk about things that don't make sense. Who is our goal this time?" The window's brawny took a cigar opening.

"It should be the Chinese person," said the lean man.

"Intuition tells me that it is not the Chinese." The woman in the high-necked white sweater put down the magazine, faintly said.

As soon as she spoke, everyone else stopped because Baidi’s intuition was always accurate. But this action is not the Chinese, but who else, let the organization risk being discovered, send them here.

"I bet you, that Chinese." said the **** girl in the black dress.

"What are you gambling?" Bai Di said seriously.

"Whoever loses, whoever comes first." said the **** girl.

"How many times have you lost? The pinks have turned purple." Bai Di said quietly.

Good.

On the field, the three men's face muscles twitched, the eyelids jumped straight, did not dare to have expressions, pretended not to hear, the smoking of smoking, the reading of books.

The invisible confrontation of the two people reappeared. It didn't take long for the door to sound. For a moment, all five people looked at the door, the body was stretched, and the atmosphere in the room was so cold that it was suffocating.

Hey!

The door opened and a man in a blue striped suit entered, and the suffocating atmosphere in the room disappeared.

Liric seemed to look around for a week without a problem, confirming that everyone was there, and Leroy took five copies of the information from the briefcase and threw it on the table.

"This is the goal of this action." Lirik's hoarse voice, like a foam rubbing against a rough wall, makes people hear goose bumps.

Five people have long been used to Lirik's hoarse and low voice, picking up the information, and his eyes flashed a little surprised. It’s not the identity of the target, but the surprise goal is different from what they think.

"Is this old man? Why isn't that Chinese?" Aisha licked her red lips and sat down in her body. The deep V-necked black dress, with her body twisting, the white spring looming, some unwilling.

The three men's faces were pumped and carefully read the information. Next to Bai Di, the cold face is also rare to reveal a meaningful smile.

"Would you like to take the Huaxia people back? He is very good, the organization definitely likes it." The lean man put down the information in his hand.

"Oh..." Lirik laughed strangely. If he didn't look at his expression, he didn't know that he was laughing.

Lirik’s laughter made the five people sigh and didn’t dare to talk. Past experience tells them that every time the hair makes this laugh, it will be terrible. If you anger his brow, the end will be very miserable.

"The Chinese person, we can't catch it if we want to catch it. Don't be smart, make extra-budgets, delay the organization of the plan, hehe... the consequences you know."

The five immediately shut up and stopped talking about it.

Seeing a few people interested, Liric did not say more, entered the theme: "Now start to arrange the task, who will you first?" Lirik asked between Aisha and Baidi.

Bai Di’s mouth showed a smile: “It’s still her.”

......

Chen Mo stood in the hotel window with a glass of water, overlooking the city of Stockholm.

As early as yesterday, they have arrived.

European cities don't have too many high-rise buildings to maintain a retro look. This is the first time Chen Mo went abroad. He didn't feel too good, and he didn't have a bad impression.

However, compared with the domestic cities, there is less modern urbanization, and the pace of life is much slower. There are no people who are in a hurry.

Next to him, is Zhang Xinxin, and the only one who came to accept the prize with Chen Mo. Parents don't understand English, don't join in the fun, they don't come over. Xiao Yu is pregnant and inconvenient, so Zhang Xinxin is the most suitable person to accompany Chen Mo.

At this time, Zhang Xinxin, wearing a blue dress, looks very lively, with a little bit of everyone's breath.

Not long after, Lanxi took a dress and entered the room.

Zhu He and Luo Yu in the room gave her a look, gently nodded and continued to stand on the side.

These two people are strange faces to Lanxi and have not seen them before. But Chen Mo said that Zhu He and Luo Yu are his temporary secretary and life assistant, assisting her and responsible for some of the work around Chen Mo.

Being as clever as she is, and immediately understanding the identity of the two, there is no more words.

In the memory of Lanxi, this is the first time Chen Mo went abroad. Usually, Chen Mo’s vacation is also in the country. I have never heard of the country where he went abroad. Even the most important weddings are held in China.

"Boss, your dress."

"it is good."

Chen Mo turned back and put down the water cup and took the dress from Lanxi into the bedroom.

As early as yesterday, they have arrived and have a simple rehearsal.

Every Nobel Prize winner can invite some friends and family to come and watch the ceremony. Parents do not understand English, did not come over, Xiao Yu is pregnant, so Chen Mo will not let her run, peace of mind to raise a baby at home, come alone.

Five minutes later, Chen Mocai came out of the bedroom and had already replaced the dress that Lanxi had brought in.

At the awards ceremony, the tradition of the Nordic tradition was maintained. The dress was a black tuxedo and a white bow tie, like an old aristocratic gentleman.

“Like a penguin?” Chen Mo looked at his dress and asked.

Hey!

Zhang Xinxin made up his mind and couldn't help but smile. He said: "You walk two steps with your hands, like a penguin."

Even the serious Lanxi Wang Hai and others, glanced at Chen Mo, could not help but reveal a smile.

Chen Mo often exercises fitness, and the body develops through potential. The body is very well-proportioned and the lines are very natural. Wearing a tuxedo suit does have a gentleman's temperament.

But now Chen Moyi said that the appearance of a penguin in the minds of several people, and then compare, it looks like. If it is a slightly fat person wearing this dress, then the picture...

A few people can't imagine it.

“The ceremony began at 4:30 pm. At the ceremony, there were 1320 people from aristocrats, celebrities and politicians from all walks of life. The ceremony lasted about one and a half hours, and the dinner was about four and a half hours. During the dinner, you have to address, so the boss Remember to bring the lectures."

Seeing that Chen Mo is ready, Lanxi will tell Chen Mo a schedule to avoid any omissions. After all, this is a big occasion. The image of Chen Mo at the ceremony is the image of China and the image of the army ant company.

When a few people joked in the room, the person responsible for picking up Chen Mo came to inform: "Mr. Chen Mo, the ceremony is about to begin, we are going to the ceremony now."

chapters.title: Chapter 436: : Chen Mo Niubi
chapters.body:
Chapter 436: : Chen Mo Niubi

“Hey, everyone, welcome to the Xiao Man live room.”

Small and good makeup, enter the live room, and began to greet the audience. After she graduated, Chen Mo gave her entrepreneurial funds. She also formed a team through some network of contacts.

Then, she quietly created a webcast company called the wild fish platform, using the name of her and her sister Xiaoyu.

The platform has just been created, and the "Hero" holographic super league is also preparing for preparation. It has not really started to publicize and is waiting for a suitable opportunity.

With the name of the investment company of the army ant company, the barbarian platform has gained a lot of popularity at the beginning. The company signed several famous game anchors and net red, as well as two newly retired "Hero" game pros, the effect is good.

The platform's traffic, through advertising, there are several main and network red traffic, as well as inviting some star guest live broadcast, and now the platform has tens of millions of users.

Not too much, but for a startup, this is a good start.

And Xiao Man is idle, and he is also a female anchor, playing live games with holographic projectors. The game anchors of the entire platform use holographic projectors to play games.

Now Xiao Man can only count as a net red, but occasionally invites famous professional game players and her live play games, and now there are hundreds of thousands of fans. The outside world, I do not know that Xiao Man is the boss of the wild fish platform.

Xiao Man's makeup masks the original face, and the fans can't see that she and Xiao Yu's face are too similar. Occasionally fans say that she and Xiao Yu are also half-joking.

"Tonight, we don't play games, watch the Nobel Prize awards ceremony live." Xiao Man turned on the computer and imported the live broadcast of the news into the live room.

Originally, I wanted to attend the ceremony with Chen Mo, but my sister was pregnant and inconvenient. Her sister, who is too similar to Xiao Yu, is inconvenient in the past, otherwise it will be awkward to be misunderstood by the media and others.

Only Zhang Xinxin accompanied Chen Mo in the past.

Otherwise, with her character, with the past to participate in the ceremony, the dinner dishes will be sent to the network to blow the bulls. Forced, make some news, and bring exposure and fans to their platform, she will definitely do this, after all, Good advertising resources, no waste.

Unfortunately, my sister is not gone, she can only be at home.

"It's quite pretty, you are so concerned about Chen Mo? Is it related to him?"

"Many, do you think that you and Chen Mo's wife look a bit like, so I want to marry Chen Mo?"

"The real hammer, quite a crush on Chen Mo?"

"It's quite pretty, you admit that you have a crush on Chen Mo, I will reward you with ten rockets."

"..."

The live broadcast of the ceremony was released, and the live broadcast room appeared. All kinds of barrage appeared. I couldn’t see it. “You have to think about it. Chen Mo is the first local scientist in China to win the Nobel Prize. He is the most admired person, the biggest. The idol. Such an important moment must not be missed."

********

The award ceremony has already begun, and the annual Nobel Prize award ceremony has attracted the attention of the world.

This year's Nobel Prize ceremony, as always, attracts global attention, and the pictures of the on-site ceremony are broadcasted throughout the world through the live broadcast of various news platforms.

Especially China, this is the first local scientist to win the Nobel Prize, which is of great significance. Many people are paying attention to this news. On the hot search list, there was a hot search news about Chen Mo’s participation in the ceremony.

Chen Mo came down from the pick-up car and saw other vehicles appear. These cars are all the winners of this award.

There are nine people, the physics award is Chen Mo, three chemistry awards, two medical awards, two economics awards, and one literary award. Nine people greeted each other and headed to Chen Mo, led by the concierge, and entered the Stockholm City Hall.

This ceremony, from the beginning, is accurate to the minute.

When the group arrived at the concert hall, all the guests on the scene stood up and their eyes were on them. The most conspicuous one is Chen Mo.

Other winners are old scholars in their 70s and 80s, old scientists, with white hair. Only Chen Mo is a 20-year-old, too young, and he received the most important physics award.

"very young."

"Too young, a little handsome, very gentlemanly."

"This is the Chen Mo of China? It's so handsome."

There are no girls in the scene, and their eyes are on the front of Chen Mo, and their eyes are shining. No matter how ignorant, Chen Mo’s name has been heard. But it’s the first time to see a real person at such a close distance.

Young, handsome, capable, and has a money status. This kind of man is a woman who likes it. If it is not a ceremony, it is estimated that many women will go straight to talk.

Some young female guests have already waited for the dinner after the dinner.

Out.

Finally came out.

In front of the TV, the computers in the dormitory of each university are already at 12 o'clock in the middle of the night, but there are still countless people watching the computer. Seeing that Chen Mo entered the ceremony, everyone was very excited.

This is the first Chinese scientist to win the Nobel Prize in Physics, the most important and most significant award. To make up for the shortcomings of too many people, a sense of pride arises spontaneously.

For decades, China has suffered too many difficulties and obstacles, and the wind and the rain have swayed. Although it is only an award, on behalf of China in the scientific and technological world, the achievements in the field of physics, can not be underestimated.

When the chairman of the Nobel Foundation introduced the origins and significance of the Nobel Prize, Epps, chairman of the Royal Academy of Physics, who was responsible for the physics award, also came on stage.

"Respected Queen, Your Majesty, Royal Family, Nobel Prize Winners, Ladies and Gentlemen, I am honored to stand here and introduce this year as the winner of the Physics Award and his achievements.

In ancient times, humans defeated the cold of nature through animal skins and flames, sharp stone tools, and ironware to create a living environment for human beings in the cruel nature. Water conservancy projects, let us overcome the horrible floods, meteorological satellites, let us predict the arrival of the hurricane...

From Newton's three laws, to Einstein's theory of relativity, to quantum mechanics. Throughout the history of the development of human civilization, it is the history of the development of human and physical civilization, and the history of human resistance against the use of physical theory and nature. It is human beings who constantly master the laws of physics and let us constantly overcome the layers of disaster in nature. ”

Epps spoke and introduced the significance of Chen Mo's research results.

"But there are still many challenges ahead of us. The earthquake and tsunami made human beings aware of the horror of nature. This year's Nobel Prize winner used his geomagnetic anomaly detection theory to invent the seismograph. Seismograph Successfully predict the occurrence of earthquakes before the earthquake. This is another great progress for us to understand nature and understand the earth.

The emergence of geomagnetic anomaly detection theory has brought a new theoretical foundation for geomagnetics and seismology, and also brought a new theoretical foundation for geophysics. The emergence of seismographs has saved the lives and property of countless people in the past two years. This is a very great invention in the development of the natural sciences. It is more practical than any other invention in the past, and it is another milestone in physical overcoming the difficulties of nature. ”

Everyone on the field listened and his eyes were on Chen Mo.

Chen Mo still kept calm and listened carefully, but the old scientist next to him was not very good. He had already slept in listening to long speeches and music.

The introduction about Chen Mo soon ended.

"Professor Chen Mo." Eps turned and turned to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo stood up.

“Because of your extraordinary contribution in the field of geomagnetic anomalies and space microphysical field detection, we have awarded you this year's Nobel Prize in Physics. Today, on behalf of the Royal Academy of Sciences, I am very honored to present you with an award. I hope that you will step forward, by the King. You will issue your medal."

Through the live broadcast, when Chen Mo received the medal from the King of Sweden, the whole China was boiled.

"Chen Mowei."

"At this moment, Chen Mo finally broke the history."

"No regrets, who dares to say that China is backward? Chen Mo is our pride."

"Chen Mo Niu. Forced."

"Chen Mo NB."

"Chen Mo NB."

......

"Chen Mo Niu. Forced..."

Numerous college dorms, even in the middle of the night, are still echoing in the dormitory building, exciting.

"Baby, that is your father, you will be as good as Dad in the future." In the villa, Xiao Yu sat in front of the TV, stroking the raised belly, with great joy and pride in his voice.

Next to Chen’s father Chen, and Zhen Zhen and others, they all showed a happy smile on their faces.

"At this moment, Huaxia is proud of you." Zhao Min was sitting on the sofa in a nightdress, carrying red wine, watching Chen Mo enter the ceremony, with a hint of pride in his smile.

The employees of the marching ant company, Binhai City, Chen Mo's hometown of Huacheng, and even the whole of China, are proud of one person, this moment, the world's attention.

chapters.title: Chapter 437: : Dinner
chapters.body:
Chapter 437: : Dinner

"It's nice to meet you, Mr. Chen Mo."

"Me too, Princess Siveli."

“Congratulations to Mr. Chen Mo for his award.”

"Thank you."

Xi Weili used a less standard Chinese, Chen Mo used a less standard English, a short exchange, the two tacit, and smiled.

At this time, the Siveli head with a gemstone crown, wearing a purple dress, with the noble temperament of the royal family, blond, red and white skin, is a typical Nordic beauty, dressed up, always makes people Can't help but take a look.

More than an hour of awards ceremony has ended, and now everyone has arrived at the City Hall. At this time, the Golden Hall, the King and special guests are here to meet and interact with their partners.

"Mr. Chen Mo, I have always been very curious about you in China, but unfortunately have no chance to pass." Xi Weili said.

"There will be opportunities. We have a lot of beautiful places in China. We welcome you to play in the past." Chen Mo said in a less fluent spoken English.

"I have the opportunity to visit the headquarters of your company. I heard that it is the most technologically advanced place in the world. There are many fun technologies. Your company's holographic mobile phone is my favorite mobile phone. It is incredible.

I have seen your wedding video, too beautiful, like a fairy tale. I hope that there will be such a wedding in the future, and I am very happy. Unfortunately, I didn't know you at the beginning and I couldn't participate. ”

After the initial understanding of the beginning, Xi Weili, like a little girl who saw idols, began to communicate with Chen Mo: "Can your wife's wedding dress be customized? When I get married, I want to wear such a beautiful wedding dress."

After the video of Chen Mo’s wedding came out, the wedding became a wedding that countless women dreamed of, but only Chen Mo was the only one who could hold that kind of wedding. Now the protagonist is here, she doesn't want to let go of such a good opportunity.

"For the time being, I can't customize it. It was made by the materials and techniques I studied. It may be in the future, but it depends on the situation." Chen Mo showed a polite smile.

Hearing Chen Mo’s answer, Xi Weili had a small disappointment in his eyes, but he quickly slowed down.

At seven o'clock in the evening, the melodious organ sounded, two student volunteers took the national flag downstairs, and the Swedish king and queen also carried one of the opposite **** slowly downstairs.

Xi Weili reached out and gently held Chen Mo's arm, followed by the stairs.

At the dinner party, some reporters saw Chen Mo and Princess Xi Weili appear together and began to take photos.

Sylvie is the youngest princess and the king's favorite princess.

Did she attend a ceremony and she became a heterosexual partner of Chen Mo. The young Nobel laureate, the youngest princess, and two people with their own traffic stood together and instantly attracted the attention of many people on the field.

The lens of many photographers is facing Chen Mo. Because the scene is the most dazzling is Chen Mo and the Princess of Sylvie.

The blue hall is not blue, not too big, the dinner scene of more than a thousand people, the dense long table.

In the hall, the long tables are mixed, and the long main table runs through the hall. Every arrangement here is subject to the most rigorous screening, and each set of cutlery is worth a lot of money, known as the 'most crowded luxury dinner'.

Everyone enters their own seats, and they all sit in their own positions, communicate with the people around them, or sit quietly. The banquet scene was too crowded and there was no room for free movement.

All kinds of women's dresses are arguing and glamorous, and the blue hall is filled with the smell of candlelight, flowers and perfume.

Intimate, extravagant, luxurious.

This is also the most attractive social dinner. Those who come to the scene are not rich and expensive, they are celebrities, they can make more friends, and for the upper class, there is more people and roads.

Dinner, three exquisite dishes, starters, main dishes and desserts, not much, ate for three hours, during which I saw a lot of performances.

“Mr. Chen Mo, how is the dish?” asked Princess Xivili. After a few hours of communication, the two were familiar with each other and did not start to be so unfamiliar.

"Do you want to hear the truth?" Chen Mo asked with a smile.

"Of course you have to listen to the truth."

"Not enough."

......

Hearing Chen Mo’s answer, Xi Weili gave a slight glimpse and smiled.

She did not expect that Chen Mo will give such an answer, but it is really very image. High-class dining is very paying attention to the image. The most high-end banquet is not about eating much, but about making friends. The dining is mainly exquisite and high-end.

Chen Mo’s speech is very polite, and occasionally it’s not very particular about the form. It’s very interesting and it makes her feel very strange.

"The next time you come to the stage to give a speech." Xi Weili said.

"Then it will be lost first."

The dinner was coming to an end. When he heard the host's words, Chen Mo nodded slightly and stood up from the position and slowly walked onto the stage. More than 1,300 pairs of eyes were on him, and all the media on the scene were also focused on him.

Everyone's eyes are different in mood, mixed with curiosity, envy, jealousy, surprise and even other emotions.

There is a lot of news today, which is the object of attention of others, but the most eye-catching is Chen Mo, which is almost the protagonist. Young is too much, and it is also a rare Chinese on this podium.

Young, steady, and generous, almost everyone knows that the man in front of you is extraordinary.

Chen Mo has seen a lot of people’s attention, and now he looks as usual.

"Respected kings, queens and royal members, ladies and gentlemen, I am very honored that I can stand on this stage."

Chen Mo spoke, and there was a commotion in the scene. Chen Mo used Chinese, and most people on the field could not understand Chinese, which made them somewhat confused. After all, the conventional tradition, most people use English, the number of times Chinese appears on this stage, there are only a handful.

However, after a brief commotion, everyone was quiet, because there were simultaneous translations, and everyone was settled a lot.

"When I knew that I was the winner of this year's winner, I was doing experiments in the lab. I was a little surprised to hear this news. Because I didn't think that publishing the paper would have the present results and influence.

I published that paper, which I have thought through. But at the beginning of the publication, I suffered from the rejection of many scientific journals, and I also encountered embarrassment and ridicule. The resistance it appears is much larger than I thought.

Even after the storm, the flower of truth can be bloomed under the rainbow. But it is also possible that the flower of truth will be concealed under the mudslide after the storm, never seeing the sky, I am relatively lucky.

Now is the 21st century, the world is given tolerance for the unknown basic science, so weak, this is not progress.

At the beginning of quantum mechanics, Schrödinger questioned the theory of quantum mechanics and even did not hesitate to do a thought experiment, hoping to overthrow the foundation of quantum mechanics. However, the erroneous erroneous, ‘cat experiment’ has become the most classic thought experiment of quantum mechanics.

In the physical universe, human beings are still in the exploratory stage, and there are too many unknowns waiting for us to discover. I hope that the society will give basic science in the unknown field more tolerance and understanding.

The unknown basic science field can be questioned, but it is not a mockery and a veto that has not been proved by experiments. There is no experiment to veto a theory, and it does not help scientific research. It is a persecution..."

chapters.title: Chapter 438: :Doliwitz
chapters.body:
Chapter 438: :Doliwitz

After the dinner, Chen Mo’s speech at the Nobel dinner was spread throughout the world through various news, which provoked intense discussions among netizens around the world.

When Chen Mo published a paper on the feasibility of earthquake warning, many experts at home and abroad taunted Chen Mo. Today, the video of expert taunts is once again turned out and appears in various forums.

For a time, countless people began to argue.

Many people know that Chen Mo published the paper, and the paper on the theory of earthquake predictability is Chen Mo's first published paper, the only paper, and the most ridiculous paper.

After the seismograph came out, everyone taunted it.

Now, the theory that has been ridiculed by countless people has made Chen Mo on the stage of Nobel. He has to say that what happened is too dramatic and too ridiculous.

The people who had ridiculed Chen Mo at the beginning were all beaten, and they were the most embarrassed face.

There used to be a video, and the experts who jumped out to ridicule Chen Mo, whether domestic or foreign, were collectively banned at this time and dared not make any further statements. And those who are hiding in the dark corners will automatically forget what they have done, and then remain silent.

Those who continue to support Chen Mo as always, are full of joy, now is the time to raise their eyes. When Chen Mo was on the podium, that moment was the glory of China.

Many researchers feel a pity, because since the paper, Chen Mo has done a lot of research, but no longer publishes any academic papers. One has to wonder if this is because of the impact of the taunting incident.

It is a pity that the research papers of Chen Mo can no longer be seen.

......

"The money is going to buy my research? It is impossible."

"You are robbing this."

"Cooperation? What conditions?"

"roll."

Dollyz slammed his mobile phone on the sofa and his face was red, apparently mad.

After thinking about it for a long time, I checked some rooms a little. Dolviz took off the necklace that I carried with me, and took out a memory card with a fingernail size from the dark compartment of the pendant and inserted it into the card reader.

When he saw the complete information on the notebook screen, Dorivitz took a sigh of relief and blackened his face to collect the memory card.

This is the hard work of his life. The research is close to success. Those capital hooligans want to exchange his lowest price for his achievements. This is intolerable.

After collecting the computer and the necklace, Dorivitz calmed his anger and went to the mirror to arrange his clothes and leave the room.

......

"Remember to follow the plan, don't act rashly before there is an order." In the car, Lirik's strange voice made people shudder.

"Understand." Several people nodded.

"After succeeding, use the fastest speed to send people to designated places, then leave, try not to expose their identities, and complete the task with the fastest speed. Finally, once, in addition to the target, don't provoke other troubles, otherwise the mission will fail. You all know the consequences."

Several people understood the meaning of Liric, and he did not hesitate to agree. They looked very serious because they knew the importance of the task.

"For jihad, to win."

The six made a pious gesture, with enthusiasm in their eyes, solemn and firm voice.

Arrange everything, and Liric got off and walked into the Swedish Academy. Ten minutes later, the **** Aisa came down from another car and entered the Swedish Academy.

Today, there is a small forum that invited the Nobel laureate to come to the lecture, so there are many experts and scholars present, there are many social names, many people, and many media reporters.

In some sense, similar forums are a good communication platform.

After the security check, Aisha entered the forum meeting, took the forum materials handed over by the etiquette students, looked around and walked to a position in the front row.

......

Swedish Academy.

Under the guidance of Li Ke, Chen Mo entered a reception hall, where he was the director of the Organization Department of the Swedish Academy.

Today, Chen Mo was invited to come to the college for a speech. He did not refuse, and he readily came.

In the reception room, the head of the Swedish Academy, S. Li Yang, was among them. He was communicating with other guests present. Seeing Chen Mojin coming in, he hurriedly greeted him with a smile: "Professor Chen Mo, I am very honored that you can take time."

Chen Mo understood the meaning of Si Li Yang and smiled and nodded.

His arrival immediately became the most eye-catching figure in the hall. Although Chen Mo is not the youngest physics winner, but also the second youngest winner, the first Chinese scientist to win the Nobel Prize in Physics, the most advanced technology company, a variety of inventions, are epoch-making Advanced technology.

It can be said that the name of the next giant is not Chen Mo.

"You, Professor Chen Mo, I don't need to introduce you to you. Our rising star in the scientific world, the most powerful person of the next generation of giants, is also one of the keynote speakers of our forum today." S. Li Yang led Chen Mo and introduced it to everyone. .

In fact, he did not need to introduce him. People in the reception hall knew Chen Mo, but Chen Mo did not know them.

Seeing Chen Mo coming in, everyone on the field came to say hello.

Sitting on the sofa, frowning and thinking of Dorivitz, seeing Chen Mo come in, he also got up and looked at him.

Dolly Weitz, a Canadian who borrows an Austrian, is in his 60s. At this time, he wears a suit and is full of energy. His face looks younger than his actual age, but his hair is half white.

Dolly Weitz is the recipient of this medical award. The result of the award is the discovery of the immune mechanism of some influenza viruses and infectious viruses. This theory can be applied to the research of infectious virus vaccines that are currently incurable.

Dorivitz was also there, and Chen Mo had no surprises.

"Hello, Professor Doliwitz, I was too hasty yesterday, congratulations on winning the prize." Chen Mo said in a less fluent spoken English, but the oral English is much better than yesterday.

With his strong memory, his English vocabulary is no worse than anyone. The professional literature can be easily read, but because he rarely communicates in English, his oral English is not good. Yesterday, I had a long time of communication with Princess Xivili. With his ability to learn, I now have a good oral English.

"Thank you, congratulations." Doliviz nodded.

"Dr. Doliwitz, are you interested in doing research in our company? Our company can provide you with the most advanced medical laboratories and equipment, as well as sufficient research and development funds." Chen Mo said.

In this case, there are too many experts and professors, and it can be said that the talents are the most densely populated areas. He will not let go of such a good opportunity to recruit talents.

When Zhao Min participated in those international forums, he was able to make talents through such occasions and recruited into the company. Chen Mo also had the same kind of learning.

Doliviz is an authority on immunization and infectious diseases. He entered the Starfish Company and is absolutely beneficial to the development of drugs.

"Sorry, I am afraid it will not work for the time being." Dollyz said with some regrets.

"That's a pity, this is my business card. If the professor is willing to go to China for development in the future, our company will always welcome you." Chen Mo took out a business card from his wallet and handed it to Dorivitz.

"Ok."

Dolly Weitzy took the business card in the hands of Chen Mo, which made many people envious. Not everyone can get Chen Mo’s business card.

After the guest set, Chen Mo looked at other people on the field.

chapters.title: Chapter 439: : The Life Of The Future City
chapters.body:
Chapter 439: : The Life Of The Future City

In the forum of the Swedish Academy, there are more than 2,000 people in the forum, in addition to celebrities, business elites and experts, as well as outstanding students from the Swedish Academy.

Everyone is looking forward to it, because there will be two Nobel Prize winners to speak at the forum.

For ordinary people, their speeches are just speeches, but for the elite, their speeches may have a lot of high-end information about their respective fields.

In particular, Chen Mo’s speech, for the top public, Chen Mo’s speech is a direction of technological development.

The last time Chen Mo’s lecture at his alma mater directly planned the blueprint for the future city. Soon, Binhai City announced plans for the holographic city project to bring a lot of benefits to Binhai.

Many cities are envious of Binhai, but the headquarters of the marching ants are there, and others can only envy them. After all, they are close to the water.

Now Chen Mo once again delivered a speech. If the elite can get a chance to get a star and a half, let their company prepare in advance, the income is definitely bigger than they think.

And this kind of forum is a good communication occasion.

The forum has already begun, and the head of the Swedish Academy, S. Lee Young, on the stage to start the keynote speech, everyone is quiet.

......

Wang Hai stood in the corner on the side of the venue, his eyes glanced at the people in the audience, especially those around Chen Mo. In this position, he can see the entire venue, and it is not eye-catching. It is surrounded by staff and is not eye-catching. It is the best observation position.

When he was in the army, he was a special scout, with the most acute observation and intuitiveness. As the captain of the bodyguard team around Chen Mo, he must always be vigilant, especially in a strange environment.

The last time he left Chen Mo in danger in Binhai was his most shameful thing, so he secretly vowed that he would not let Chen Mo fall into a second similar danger.

Like this kind of forum, there are mixed resources and high requirements for security.

Fortunately, the elites gathered in the land, there are strict security and security measures, it is almost impossible to bring guns into the market, so that they are less responsible for security, but still need to pay attention.

Chen Mo is on the guest seat in the left corner of the first row.

Taishan and Zhong Lei, one person in the middle of the third row of the walkway, one person in the third row behind Chen Mo, separated by one person.

That position allows the two to react in the shortest time. Once there is a situation, they can rush out the first time to protect Chen Mo from leaving.

The Hawkeye is responsible for the emergency of the vehicle, and Zhu He is next to Chen Mo, Luo Yu is in the background.

All of them are first-class players. Not to mention the Zhuhe four, the bodyguards who have retired from the Guards Group have also used the potential pharmacy to strengthen the body. They are definitely the top bodyguard team.

With such strict security, they have absolute confidence to protect Chen Mo's safety. And as long as it is not with the determination to die, no one chooses this kind of environment.

Wang Hai’s eyes continued to patrol the crowd.

Today's keynote speakers are mainly two, namely the medical award winner Doliviz, and Chen Mo. Now that the forum has begun, S. Li Yang’s opening is a speech by Doliwitz. Chen Mo was arranged at the end and appeared as the finale.

Suddenly, Wang Hai brows and wrinkles. During the inspection, he seems to be familiar with a trace.

A glimpse of my heart.

Wang Hai’s eyes burst into the light and patrolled back and forth in the venue, hoping to lock in a familiar source: “Taishan, Alei, pay attention to it.” Wang Hai said with his own headphones.

As soon as this was said, Taishan and Alei’s body were shocked, their eyes were soaring, and they were sitting subconsciously. Chen Mo, who was standing next to Chen Mo, and the Black Hawk and Luo Yu outside the forum, all of them spirited.

"What is the situation?" Zhong Lei whispered.

"For the time being, the intuition is a bit wrong. It seems that there is a trace of familiarity in the crowd." Wang Hai said softly: "I am looking for sure now."

As soon as this was said, everyone was secretly distressed, and his eyes deliberately and unconsciously explored the seats and crowds around Chen Mo.

Wang Hai is a reconnaissance soldier who has carried out special tasks. The soldiers who survived the bullets in the rain, especially the scouts, will be very accurate and observant. They are absolutely beyond ordinary people, and they all use the potential agents to strengthen the body.

Wang Hai started from the people around Chen Mo, looking for the familiarity one by one.

That kind of familiarity, not around Chen Mo, began to determine in rows among the people with vision.

Doliwitz’s speech, plus the problems under the stage, took more than an hour to go through all the processes before they came down from the stage. In the introduction of the host, and the applause of the venue, Chen Mo also stepped onto the stage.

"Ladies, gentlemen, and fellow students, everyone."

Chen Mo stood in the center of the stage, and began a speech with a slight ritual. He used Chinese. He also had a simultaneous translation. He translated his words into the ears of everyone through the instant translation of the headphones.

"Too professional knowledge is not suitable for the current scene. The shallow chicken soup is also pale under the gorgeous language, and it has little effect. How to let the public listen to my words today, it is a bit of a harvest, it is my trouble, so I was very scared about the stage. After thinking for a long time, I decided to stir up the cold meal and talk about the future development of science and technology."

When Chen Moyi opened his mouth, he applauded and thundered. Everyone looked radiant and played a 12-point spirit.

"A few months ago, I was at my alma mater, depicting the blueprint for the future city. Of course, I can only say that it is just the future city of my personal fantasy, not the public.

As a result, Binhai City immediately began planning for the city of the future, and their approach, the marching ant company is very supportive. The official efficiency is very high and it is going well, but our theme today is not this.

You may ask, what is the city of the future? What kind of life is living in a city of the future? I will talk about the future city in my heart.

Future technology cannot be separated from a word: intelligence.

The city of the future is without a doubt an intelligent city. Artificial intelligence, for the long time in the future, is the most important R&D technology.

Don't worry that artificial intelligence will destroy human beings. I have been forced out many times on various occasions. The probability of destroying human beings is several trillion times smaller than the probability of nuclear weapons destroying human beings. Of course, this is not the issue we are discussing.

The question we are discussing is how can a city be smart?

The house, the road and the people gather together, which is the city. This is the most basic structure of the city. People, by themselves, have wisdom, so build an intelligent city, starting with houses and roads.

Auto-driving has become one of the scientific and technological battlefields of all parties. Together with the urban brain and the emergence of intelligent transportation, this is an important component of road intelligence.

And then, the intelligentization of the house will also be a big trend.

The concepts now owned, such as smart homes, smart appliances, and voice assistants, have essentially formed the prototype of a smart house. It's just that the language assistant's intelligence is different. This brain can't be unified, let it grow.

But it will soon be able to get rid of this situation.

Let us imagine the life of the future city.

From the company's work, artificial intelligence automatically scans the face and helps you punch cards, and from the moment you step out of the company's door, artificial intelligence controls the idle elevator and automatically arrives at your floor waiting. This can greatly reduce the time you wait for the elevator.

Vehicles are unmanned, intelligent traffic, and the probability of traffic jams is minimized. Maybe you are on the way home, don't drive, quietly lie in the chair and rest for half an hour.

And when you enter the gate of the community, the artificial intelligence of the building will automatically open the door of the building and control the idle elevator to land. When you get home, artificial intelligence face recognition automatically unlocks the door, turns on the lights, turns on the air conditioner, or computer TV. Even when you enter the house, the robot has already prepared you for boiling water.

Eliminate the waste of wasted time, you can save an hour or more in a day. What can I do this hour? Everyone does not need me to explain. Exercise once, or have a quiet cup of coffee, read a book, watch ten news..."

chapters.title: Chapter 440: : Chen Mo Said
chapters.body:
Chapter 440: : Chen Mo Said

"Mr. Chen Mo, do you think it is too early to talk about the future city?" It is a Western elite who stands up and asks questions. It is the management of a company.

After Chen Mo’s speech was over, the people in the audience below did not calm down. For many people, the smart city described by Chen Mo has a long way to go.

"Not early, give you a time concept. In the next five years, if there is no accident, Binhai will be the prototype of a smart city."

Chen Mo denied shaking his head and said.

"The artificial intelligence unified platform has emerged. Our company's 'artificial intelligence +' platform is to build a smart core. Urban brain, artificial intelligence + traffic, artificial intelligence + building, artificial intelligence + electrical appliances, artificial intelligence + office, artificial intelligence + Life, etc. These are no longer movies.

Our company headquarters, as well as staff quarters, have realized the concept of 'artificial intelligence +', which is being promoted to the coastal city or even the entire city of China.

According to our statistics, after the launch of the smart transportation project in Binhai City, the average waiting time of the public on the sidewalk traffic lights has dropped by 15 seconds. In a city of several million people, this is a terrible number.

The traffic congestion rate in Binhai City has dropped by more than 70% compared with the same period of the previous year. Even during the peak period of commuting, there will be no large-scale traffic jams. Urban road infrastructure is best utilized under the analysis of big data and artificial intelligence. Then, as long as the unmanned traffic is popular, the foundation of the smart city will be formed. This day, it will not be too far. ”

Chen Mo’s words caused a commotion below.

Looking at the hands raised by the crowd, Chen Mo ordered another person to stand up.

"Mr. Chen Mo, we all know that Gates, Musk and other big men have many experts who are worried that artificial intelligence will bring crisis to mankind. Why do you know that artificial intelligence will not bring crisis to mankind? Smart city, don't worry that artificial intelligence will control humans and destroy humans?"

"Why am I more sure than them? Because I am more professional than them. Say a little bit, the current AI company is the most advanced artificial intelligence, I am the person who knows the most about artificial intelligence."

Chen Mo gave an answer. This question is not the first time he heard it.

"Artificial intelligence brings crisis to mankind? It is possible, but the probability is pitiful. There are countless things that destroy human beings, a special variant of the infectious virus, a big meteorite hitting the earth, nuclear war, the earth's own climate change, from the universe. The radiation, or the sudden emergence of three extracorporeal stars.

The probability that artificial intelligence will destroy human beings exists, but according to statistical calculations, this probability is about the end of the world. You have to be clear that human beings cannot hand over nuclear warheads to artificial intelligence control, and science fiction movies are deceptive.

Whether it will bring crisis to mankind is determined by human beings. In a strict sense, artificial intelligence is just a tool created by humans, a tool that makes humans powerful.

In the wilder era, the ancestors created tools to overcome the nature and survive and evolve, creating swords and guns and killing wars. Is it a knife and a gun to destroy human beings? No, these tools just make humans stronger. What destroys mankind is human desire and madness, and has nothing to do with tools, even if it is a high-level tool.

When a gun is fired and the car is out of control, it will be dead. The first time for human beings is to find the cause and repair the damaged tool. It is impossible to let it freely run out of control. Will humans abolish all cars because they accidentally run out of control? impossible.

The artificial intelligence in the movie is completely out of control, making robots kill humans, and the probability is almost the same as all nuclear bombs.

Future space development, interstellar exploration, and artificial intelligence are the best tools. Human beings want to be stronger, relying on weak bodies and limited power to detect infinite stars. Artificial intelligence is an inevitable megatrend. You are worried that artificial intelligence will destroy human beings. It is better to worry about tomorrow, whether artificial intelligence will replace your job. This idea is more practical. ”

There was a round of applause. Chen Mo’s metaphor is just right, people can’t refute and persuade is very big.

Soon, another figure stood up and took the microphone and stood up.

"Mr. Chen Mo, as far as I know, you Huaxia, you are the first to win the Nobel Prize in Physics. Why is your country so few natural science awards? Does this mean that your country's education is very backward? Is technology backward? "The open person has a ridicule in his voice.

Suddenly jumped to this question, Chen Mo slightly glimpsed, did not put the other party's taunting tone in mind.

"Actually, this is also the question I want to ask. I dare to ask everyone here, why are there so few Nobel Prizes in our country? Are we behind in education? Is our country underdeveloped?"

Chen Mo went straight and shook his head.

"If Huaxia education is backward, why is China's technological achievements and economic achievements in the forefront of the open for more than 40 years? Even some areas of science and technology have become the leader? This is the result of education backwardness? Those If Huaxia Education is backward, it does not understand China, but it is just a frog at the bottom of the well."

Chen Mo’s words were spread throughout the venue through simultaneous translation. Hearing the irony in the answer, the person who stood up and asked the question, his face turned red, and he felt the gaze around him, and he seemed to be watching the clown.

Regardless of his reaction, Chen Mo continued to speak.

"As for why the Chinese won the Nobel Prize is less? Have you thought about the reasons?"

Chen Mo paused, everyone on the field was quiet, thinking about Chen Mo's words, but also thinking about the reasons.

"First of all, the science and technology tree of the natural sciences is mainly based on the education economy. The achievements are branches and branches, as well as leaves and flowers. The Nobel Prize is just a better inadvertent loan from the technology tree. Sweeter fruit. Will you deny all the fruits of this tree because of only a few good fruits?"

Chen Mo’s voice fell, and many people nodded on the field, and the applause thundered.

The Nobel Prize is only a prominent point in many scientific achievements, and it does not mean all. They recognize the Nobel Prize, but they all know that the Nobel Prize does not represent the overall level of a country.

Sweden, Switzerland and other countries, in the Nobel Prize in natural sciences, more than Russia, let alone Huaxia. But does this mean that the technological level of these countries is more advanced than these two countries? Totally impossible.

And some of the things in the Nobel Prize, Chen Mo is not bad.

In the 40 years after the October Revolution in Russia, and in the more than a decade of the US-Soviet hegemony, the Soviet Union’s Natural Science Nobel Prize was all blank. Especially during the Cold War, the Soviet Union’s scientific and technological strength once surpassed the United States. A steady stream of new technologies was discovered, but none of the Nobel Prizes were won. The United States won many awards during the same period.

These are very obvious evidence.

After the disintegration of the Soviet Union, Russia’s relations with the parties improved, and the performance was even more apparent.

It is said that science and technology have no borders, but scientists have nationality and it is impossible to achieve technology without borders.

There are no Chinese scientists in the Nobel Prize committee. Why are there fewer Chinese natural science awards? Does the technology not say that even a person who recommends and speaks for it does not have a prize? Western prejudice against China is not a day or two.

In the eyes of many people, the Nobel Prize is not fair, but a politically influenced award.

Chen Mo will not speak publicly on such a stage, and he will do it in his heart.

"The second reason is that the development of modern top technology is no longer the era of personal heroes. The winner of the Nobel Prize can only be shared by a limited two or three people. As far as I know, China's top technology research and development, Mainly based on the team. A top team is limited to five or six people, and more than one hundred people.

The results of the team's research and development, the credit is attributed to two or three people, which is not realistic.

Taking insulin as an example, when the Chinese synthetic insulin was used, Huaxia did not apply for the Nobel Prize in the same year because the number of R&D team exceeded the number of the Nobel Prize. It is unacceptable to attribute the collective results to a few people.

Nowadays, one or two people have developed advanced technologies that lead the world in science and technology, and there are very few, especially in the context of our China team emphasis on teamwork. I am an exception. I can't measure the background of our mainstream China in my own situation. I can't deny the Chinese education system because of the lack of promises. This idea is very ignorant. ”

There is another reason, Chen Mo did not say.

The most advanced technology in the country, unless some irrelevant basic theory, other core technologies are not allowed to be published as a paper, because of fear of technology leaks.

The paper leaks technology is not new.

Most of the top teams in the country are R&D teams in the official system. They will not publish a top technical paper for a Nobel Prize.

This time, everyone is silent, and many scholars nod their approval in their hearts.

Because they all know that the Nobel Prize is not the highest level of technology in the world, but only a more advanced and more practical technology.

The world's top technology areas, such as nuclear fusion, quantum technology, artificial intelligence, satellite, laser, etc., are all team-based research and development. And the most advanced technological achievements in the world are rarely seen on the stage of the Nobel Prize.

Even the epoch-making theory of relativity did not win the Nobel Prize in the past. Hawking was called a generation of giants, but until he left, there was no Nobel Prize.

chapters.title: Chapter 441: :Confusion
chapters.body:
Chapter 441: :Confusion

where is it? where is it?

Wang Hai’s eyes were concentrated on the audience at the scene, and he instinctively told him that there were people he was familiar with in the audience.

In foreign countries, their friends, then there is only one explanation. The familiar person is the person he has ever seen, and it is likely to be an enemy.

Because during his absence from the military, his opponent did not have a few fuel-efficient lights.

Not only Wang Hai, Taishan, Zhong Lei, Black Hawk, Zhu He and Luo Yu, but also all spirits, ready to adapt.

Intuition can't be wrong.

Wang Hai, who scanned the crowd, kept telling himself.

"over there!"

Suddenly, Wang Hai’s hole narrowed and his eyes locked in the middle of the fifth row.

A man in a blue striped suit, brown skin, looks like a mixed blood. At this time, the suit man was looking at Chen Mo’s question and answer on the stage and seemed to be listening carefully.

Only Wang Hai clearly saw that the man’s eyes swayed from time to time to the first row of guest seats, in the direction of Nobel Prize winner Doliwitz. The seat next to Dorivitz is Chen Mo’s seat.

There are indeed problems!

Wang Hai has been certain that this man has problems.

That familiar feeling?

Locking the man's side face, Wang Hai began to search for memories, hoping to find the corresponding person.

"Zhong Lei, fire hibiscus, the seventh row in the fifth row, the man wearing a blue striped suit, pay attention to him, Taishan pay attention to the boss, ready to protect at any time." Wang Hai whispered.

After hearing the instructions, the three eyes skyrocketed. In order not to let the other side notice, Zhong Lei and Zhu He did not react much, but only the fifth shot of the eyes of the audience intentionally or unintentionally.

"Does he have a problem?"

Zhong Lei’s attention is on the other side.

"My sense of familiarity is what he came from. He is not my friend. I am thinking about seeing him there." Wang Hai looked cautious.

The two people know, Wang Hai once told them that foreign faces, not friends or enemies, are mostly enemies.

"Would you like to help?"

Black eagle and rainy sounds came from the headphones.

"No, you are in your position, pay attention to whether there are any abnormalities around, and now you are not sure whether the other person is true or not, waiting in the same place. I will think about it, where I have seen him." Wang Hai said.

A few people are tight, as long as there is movement, they can rush to Chen Mo in two seconds.

Where have you seen it?

where?

Wang Hai thought carefully and tried to find the memory of this man.

Lerike relished the speech of Chen Mo, and his eyes gaze at the direction of Dalivez from time to time to determine the situation of the other party, and then continue to watch Chen Mo on the stage if nothing happened.

Aisha was in the third row behind Dorivitz. At this time, she was talking to the man around me. She was talking and laughing, and everything was normal.

Lerike pretended to look at the phone, pulled out a Bluetooth headset and pretended to listen to the phone if nothing happened: "How are you going?"

"All are ready."

The answer from the earphones made Lirik's mind a certain one.

"Listen to the order at any time."

When Lerik finished, his mouth curled up with a smile, his eyes darting to Dorivitz, and he turned to Chen Mo.

If it is not because of too many people who are worried about participating in the action, it is easy to expose, he does not mind to take Chen Mo back. Unfortunately, Chen Mo has a lot of bodyguards around him, and their main task is Dorivitz. It is the most important task.

When he came in, he had observed the environment. Chen Mo’s bodyguards did not have a fuel-efficient lamp. Lirik slammed into Wang Hai in the corner.

Wang Hai is always searching for information about men, but in many cases, attention is on the other side. As long as the other party has any unusual actions, they will respond as soon as possible.

It was only at the moment when Wang Hai looked up at the man and the pupils shrank.

Coincidentally, when Wang Hai observed the other party, the other party also just looked at him. The two of them looked at each other and they were all glimpsed.

......

Wang Hai’s mind showed a picture.

In the same year, their team accepted the task, infiltrated the western border, and cleared a terrorist base on the national border. As a scout, he went to investigate. In the grass, he saw a man with his own eyes, coming out of the stronghold and boarding a car to leave.

The spot was cleared and the leader was killed, but the man who left, he also remembered his mind, just not sure about the true identity of the other.

The moment of the two eyes on the eyes, Wang Hai left to think of the scene at the time, exactly the same, absolutely no mistake.

The other party is likely to be a member of a terrorist organization.

......

Damn, he knows me?

This is the first thought of Lirik and Wang Hai.

The two people have different identities, but there is absolutely nothing wrong with that feeling. From the other's eyes, you can see a lot of things.

The people who survived the rain in the bullets were very sensitive to the same kind of gaze. This kind of casual eye collision, I realized that the other's attention is already on my own.

The mind began to weigh in a moment, did not hesitate to make a decision, whispered: "Things have changed, the second set of plans, immediately action! Action! Action!"

"Taishan, Lei, protect the boss."

When Lirik began to speak, Wang Hai’s orders were issued at the same time, and the voices of both of them were anxious.

Both Zhong Lei and Tai Shan heard the order, and now that Chen Mo is still speaking, the tight body burst out and rushed toward the stage. Their task is to ensure the safety of Chen Mo, the others are not important, and they are not sure if there are other men in the field.

Chen Mo is seriously answering the questions of the following guests. The voices of Lirik and Wang Hai are relatively small, and the people at the venue did not hear it.

Suddenly I saw Zhong Lei and Tai Shan rushed out of the stage. Chen Mo’s hole shrank and immediately realized that it was not good. After scanning a circle, the body retreated and prepared for action.

Chen Mo suddenly paused, let everyone see, unclear, so look at his past.

Hey!

In the next second, the light of the entire forum suddenly went out and the scene fell into a darkness.

"There is a bomb, run fast."

A weird and screaming screaming through the venue, let everyone glimpse, can't believe their ears

boom! ! !

The sound was gone, everyone couldn’t think about it, and an explosion came from outside the venue.

The change was too sudden, from the light to the extinction, to the buzzing sound, and then to the explosion, less than five seconds before and after.

The explosion outside the scene awakened the crowd, the sound of the explosion, plus the shouts of the moment, the scene was instantly immersed in unprecedented confusion, screams, crying, all kinds of falling, painful exclamation, chaos The regiment, everyone desperately rushed out of the venue, desperate.

Taishan and Zhong Lei, the command of Wang Hai just fell less than two seconds, has already rushed to the stage. Taishan's strong body blocked Chen Mo's body, protected his head, and quickly left the stage.

Wang Hai and Zhu He held the bullet-proof briefcase on both sides of Chen Mo and quickly fled the scene from the pre-set route.

On the road, a few people lived around Chen Mo, so that the chaotic people could not flow close to Chen Mo.

In the chaos, a woman dressed in sexy, staring at the stream of people running away from the stream of Doliviz, a corner of the corner, and stepped forward.

chapters.title: Chapter 442: :Missing
chapters.body:
Chapter 442: :Missing

"Chen Mo, are you okay, what happened there?"

Chen Mogang left the Swedish Academy under the crowd of Wang Hai and others, and Xiao Yu called and voiced with anxious and crying.

She was watching the live broadcast of Chen Mo’s speech, the scene lights suddenly went out, and the explosion and screams, the scene was chaotic, and then the live broadcast was interrupted, she was frightened, and the phone was called in the first time.

"I am fine, there is an explosion there, the reason is unknown, I am now rushing back to the hotel." Hearing the concern and worry in the voice of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo's heart is warm, calm, and open the video.

Seeing Chen Mo in the video is safe and sound, the heart of the small fish hanging is completely sent loose, and the worry on the pretty face dissipates a lot: "You must pay attention to safety, come back soon."

"Well, I am going back tonight tonight, and I will be home tomorrow night. You don't have to worry too much, take a rest." Chen Mo softly comforted.

"Yeah." Small fishing heavy focus.

"You can raise your baby with peace of mind. The family should be late, sleep."

After calming down and fishing, Chen Mo was relieved.

Now the small fisherman is pregnant, sometimes the mood will be unstable. If the sudden emotional fluctuations hurt the body, then it will be troublesome, but it will be fine.

Just hang up the phone, Zhao Min’s phone also hit.

"Blue Creek said that there was an attack there. Are you okay?" Zhao Min’s voice also had a bit of worry.

"There is no danger, now on the way back to the hotel." Chen Mo said.

"Is it for you?" asked Zhao Min. There have been a lot of attacks on Chen Mo, and now this happened suddenly, still abroad, she has to worry.

"This question, I guess I was caught by them, or they fired two shots at me to get the answer, I don't know. But I have nothing to do here."

"Attention, you are now more precious than the national treasure." Zhao Min said.

"Yes, thank you."

After a brief explanation of the situation, Chen Mocai hangs up the phone.

......

In Stockholm, a star-rated hotel, a man sipping a cigar and looking out the window. If Wang Hai is here, he will definitely recognize it, that is, the man he met at the meeting.

At this point, Lerik was thinking, why the bodyguards around Chen Mo would recognize him. But there has been no clue because he is sure that he has seen each other for the first time.

Intuition tells him that that kind of eyes will not be fake.

Bai Di also sat on the sofa next to him, quietly looking at the magazine, as always, cold, eyes from time to time to the phone on the table.

Oh...

The vibration of the mobile phone on the table broke the silence of the two people and stopped at the same time.

"The goods have successfully exited Hong Kong."

"Okay." Lirik hangs up and sighs, exhaling the smoke from his lungs, opening with a weird voice: "When the goods arrive at their destination, notify me at the first time. After the completion, take a break for a while, wait Next mission."

"understand."

Hanging up the phone, Liric was completely relieved and threw the phone aside.

After Aisha succeeded, they sent people to the ships leaving Europe for the first time. Now that the ships are safely out of the country, there is no problem.

At present, everyone has no idea, and there is no blockade plan. The sooner they leave, the safer they leave.

The second set of plans is very risky. After all, it is carried out in a tight security meeting, and they have the possibility of being exposed. But now that the mission is completed, the target is sent out, and they are safely left, there are no other problems.

“Why did you suddenly choose the second set of plans?” Bai Di asked.

Lerike glanced at Bai Di and shook his head gently. "No reason, I feel successful." The weird voice makes people shudder.

Finished, pick up the cigar, slowly put it in your mouth, the action is easier than just.

"The next thing you don't have to worry about, you continue to lurk, waiting for the next mission to begin. This mission is almost complete." Lirik leaned over and picked up a briefcase and threw it to Baidi: "Organize to you The cost of vacation, relax for a while."

Bai Di glanced at the stack of dollars in the inside and gently nodded: "Good."

......

"At 3:20 pm local time, an explosion occurred outside the Swedish Academy Conference Center. According to the reporter, the Nobel Prize winner's speech forum was being held. At least one death and four injuries have been caused, and the cause of the accident is under investigation."

"The latest news, the reason for the explosion of the Swedish Academy is determined. There are gangsters in the trash can outside the conference center, pre-installed bombs detonated, the Swedish official judged to be a terrorist attack, is currently investigating suspects. No organization and individuals, announced this The attack was responsible."

A variety of news, the world is in vain.

There are a lot of media on the forum, and the pictures from various perspectives are also exposed. The most concerned incidents of the outside world, no amount of light are paying attention to it, and this has caused such a change, which has aroused the news storm.

"Boss, just got the news, Nobel Prize winner Professor Doliwitz, disappeared after the bombing attack, the police have not yet confirmed the whereabouts of Dorivitz, does not rule out the possibility of being kidnapped." Wang Hai walked into the hotel room, Said openly.

"Dollyz is missing?" The news surprised Chen Mo.

"Yes, it disappeared on the way to the Swedish Academy." Wang Hai nodded.

Chen Mo brows, this is not good news.

What is the reason for the kidnapping of Professor Doliwitz? Is the technology in his hand or other purpose?

At the beginning of the attack, he was guarded by several people and left the scene at the fastest speed. I don’t know much about the things at the scene.

"It is basically certain that the purpose of the other party should not be an attack. It is not excluded, this is a kidnapping incident against the Nobel Prize winners, or an abduction incident against Doliwitz. The explosion outside may be just to create confusion and facilitate hands-on." Wang Hai said.

As a bodyguard, the attention of all of them at that time was on Chen Mo. They did not notice the movement of Doliwitz. The light was dim and they could not be sure that the man ran there.

Looking back at the scene at the time, the only possibility is to create chaos, and then in the chaotic crowd, take the opportunity to start with Doliwitz.

The chaotic crowd, no one pays too much attention around.

"Do you know that person?" Chen Mo asked.

He also came back to know that Wang Hai found the other party, and then the other party started.

"I don't know, I just met one side. When the troops carried out special missions, they saw them in a terrorist hiding place. He should have been in contact with a terrorist leader and drove away. I just saw him in the grass." Just recognized at the venue, I recognized it."

Chen Mo nodded. In any case, this incident was a surprise.

"Boss, the ticket has been booked, the plane two hours later." Lanxi knocked on the door and came in, and there was some embarrassment after the panic. She did not expect that the second day of the world's prestigious Nobel Prize, such a bad thing happened.

"Go to the airport now."

It has no meaning to continue to stay here, and there may be attacks against him. Before they seized the mastermind, they could not determine the purpose of the other party. There is no absolute security here. The safest way is to leave.

As for catching those people and finding out what their purpose is, Chen Mo is not interested. He is not a policeman. This is not what he should do.

Several people packed their bags and rushed to the airport.

......

chapters.title: Chapter 443: :
chapters.body:
Chapter 443: :

Seeing the home in front of me, Chen Mo’s heart is big, and the day and night of the plane’s journey is not too tired.

It was already 11 o'clock in the evening. When I entered the house, I saw a small fish sitting on the sofa in a daze. The worry and sorrow of the eyebrows were lingering. In the side of Xiaoyu, Chen Mu and Zhen Zhen were both waiting anxiously. .

"Mom, big sister, little fisherman, I am back." Zhang Xinxin saw Jane and others and immediately ran over.

"came back."

Zhen Zhen saw Zhang Xinxin, and the fear dissipated.

"Husband." Xiao Yu turned to see Chen Mo, even the shoes are not worn, such as Yan homing to the front of Chen Mo, scared Chen Mo a cold sweat.

"Mom and Jane are watching them." Chen Mo gently stroked Xiao Yu's back.

"Oh? Oh..." Xiao Yu suddenly remembered that the parents in the hall were also a little shy, but still holding Chen Mo's arm and smelling the familiar taste of Chen Mo, his heart settled a lot.

"Just come back, just come back."

When Chen Mu and Zhen Zhen came back to see Chen Mo, they were obviously relieved.

Early this morning, they heard the news that the Nobel Prize winner was missing, and they were shocked. They finally learned that the winner of the medical prize was missing, and they were relieved.

“What happened in the end?” Zhen Zhen asked.

"I don't know too well. The speculation should be a premeditated kidnapping. The explosion is just to create confusion and distract the guards." Chen Mo said. This is the only explanation he can think of.

"During this time, don't run around. Seeing these news can scare people." Chen said some embers.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"Now it's midnight, you have a day's flight, take a small fishing to rest early. She will wait for you to come back, and will not sleep. I didn't have a good rest last night. I have no appetite for dinner today, my body is important, my stomach is still There is one." Chen mother urged.

"You still said that you are obedient, why not take care of yourself?" Chen Mo saw the appearance of the small fishing rod, blaming.

Hearing Chen Mo’s blame, Xiao Yu looked up and looked at him with a small face.

"Let you bring a small fishing back to rest, what do you blame for her? There is still one in her stomach. What should I do if I get angry?" Chen heard Chen Mo blaming Xiao Yu, and she was not happy at all: "She is also worried about you, Who is not worried about that situation? Mom and I have not slept well, are you wings hard?"

"..."

Chen Mo realized that he had made a mistake and didn’t dare to speak again, pulling a small fisherman back to the room.

"I was a little anxious just now. I will take a rest and eat on time. Your body is the most important." Chen Mo softly comforted and kissed him on Xiaoyu's face.

"Well, people don't deliberately disobey, that is, they had a nightmare to sleep last night, and then they saw the news in the morning, worried about you, and had no appetite." Xiaoyu said, and the grievance broke out.

When Chen Mo’s scalp was blown up, he suddenly felt a little panic. The mood of pregnant women was not stable. As a result, he said something wrong...

"Well, don't cry, my husband is wrong."

Like a child, Chen Mo whispered softly. After a while, there was no movement in my arms, only to find that Xiaoyu had already slept in his arms.

......

The Swedish Academy was attacked by unknown sources! Nobel Prize winner Doliwitz is missing! Two things caused an uproar in the world.

On the second day of the Nobel Prize, this kind of thing happened. It is undoubtedly playing the face of the Swedish government. The international community has once again questioned the security situation in Sweden.

This is something that has never happened. The police have turned the whole city over and have not found any traces. Professor Dorivitz is like a human being, and no one can see the dead.

As for the reason why Dorivitz was kidnapped, no one knows, and there is no clue to the latter. The people who tied the Dorivitz did not contact their families for a ransom.

After reading the latest news, Chen Mo sat on the sofa in the villa library and knocked on the table. He did not go out, and in the interview of the news, he also let Lanxi refuse.

There is no clue about the kidnapping of the Nobel laureate.

Even if Chen Mo asked the ink woman to look for it, she could not find the slightest clue. It was just this incident that always gave him a bad feeling, but he could not help.

Can't figure it out, Chen Mo stood up from his seat and lay down on the sofa next to him and entered the technology library.

[Star Ring] After the installation, he has not taken a technology, and now the time is similar, it is the time to carry out the next technical task.

After Shu Lao’s concealment, Chen Mo will only enter the technology library when he acquires technology.

In the science and technology library, as always, quiet.

A hundred meters high bookshelf, can not see the end of the book, forever, he stood in front of the bookshelf, small as an ant. Every time he comes in, he will sigh the inexhaustible wisdom and knowledge, as well as the human beings.

There are eight books in the center of the library, and there are only eight books in the light column. Only four are still on, military, mechanical, medical and ecological.

These four books are only a drop in the field of their own, and it is a test given to him by the Science and Technology Library.

To complete one of them, all the theories and techniques in this field of technology apprenticeship will be open to him. After completing eight kinds of techniques, the entire technology apprenticeship stage will be open to him, and he will also acquire the next authority of the technology library.

And about the next permission, everything is unknown.

It is only the technology of the apprenticeship, and technology has surpassed the technology of the current earth. What is the technology of the next privilege? Can you tell me what secrets the technology library is? This makes Chen Mo very curious.

After a while between the four books, Chen Mo began to seriously consider the direction of his next technology. Any book here can change the status quo of a field.

After careful consideration, Chen Mo’s eyes fell on books in the ecological field. Without much hesitation, he stretched his hand and printed it on a bright book.

The light is slowly dimming, the huge information is transmitted to the mind, and the tingling from the brain makes Chen Mo pour the mouth and keep his teeth.

Your uncle.

The brain instantly receives huge information, and the nerve's tingling sensation makes him very uncomfortable. Fortunately, this time he did not receive the horror of receiving controlled light nuclear fusion technology, otherwise he would suffer another crime.

Five minutes later, the tingling sensation of the brain slowly eased, and Chen Mo completely relieved his breath and knocked on the painful head.

"Aerobic grass? A weird name."

Pain relief, Chen Mo recalled the technology, some surprised, the technology that was obtained was a plant.

When I saw the introduction of the earthy grass, Chen Mo’s surprise turned into a surprise.

"Oxygen Grass": field: ecology, biology; privilege level: technology apprentice; product introduction: improve the planet soil and atmosphere, can grow in a barren or toxic environment, absorb soil and atmospheric toxic gases, purify the air, and change at the same time Soil nutrient status.

It can improve the soil and atmosphere of the planet. This is the origin of the name of the grass, and the most important thing is to survive in a harsh environment and absorb the toxic gases in the air for purification and decomposition.

This is a genetic engineering technology that has such a powerful role. It is no wonder that this technology can be counted in the ecological field and can completely change the biological chain of an ecosystem.

Chen Mo began to digest the technology.

Cell hybrid technology plus gene editing technology, which is creating a whole new kind of plant.

Sure enough, none of the technologies in the technology library are common technologies.

Knocking on his head, Chen Mo also selected several basic technologies of genetic engineering that he needed to use in the technology of the apprenticeship stage. After completing the project, he only withdrew from the technology library.

chapters.title: Chapter 444: : Nuclear Power Plant Project
chapters.body:
Chapter 444: : Nuclear Power Plant Project

Yang Mingqi got off the bus and entered the headquarters of the marching ant group with great enthusiasm.

Since the success of nuclear fusion technology, his whole person seems to be a young teenager. Fortunately, after Zhao Min’s invitation, he was the vice president of the marching ant group and the general manager of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group. He was solely responsible for the management of the nuclear energy group.
