At the beginning, it was only a company in the initial stage. The technology was in research and development. There was no manager. It was completely empty. It relied on him to dig people and recruit people to form the prototype of the company.

When the fusion technology succeeded, everything became different.

If the news spreads, this newly established nuclear energy group will become a giant in China.

Zhao Min gave him a lot of autonomy. According to the company's joint venture agreement with the official, he was not subject to the officially appointed chairman of the board of directors and had full management of the nuclear energy group. As long as Chen Mo and Zhao Min did not speak, no one could influence him. The decision of the nuclear energy group.

In the past, those old friends, when they talked about cooperation, saw him admire to death.

Entering the headquarters of the marching ant group, under the leadership of the robot, Yang Mingxi entered Chen Mo's office.

"You're welcome, just sit." Chen Mo smiled.

Yang Minghao nodded and sat down on the sofa: "This time, the official asked me about the construction of the controlled nuclear fusion power station. The construction of the controlled nuclear fusion power station is already in the file, and it is almost ready. ""

Chen Mo and Zhao Min did not speak, listening to Yang Mingxi's report.

“We have given two cooperation programs. The first one is to start the BooT model negotiated with the official agreement. Our nuclear energy group invested in the construction of a controlled fusion nuclear power plant, and is responsible for operation and management. The operating income is all owned by our nuclear energy group. After the 37-year operation period, the nuclear power plants are sent to the official and managed by them.

The second option is that we are responsible for the construction of the nuclear power plant, and after the completion, the whole package is sold to the official. We are not involved in the investment and operation management of nuclear power plants. In the later stage, equipment maintenance, parts and equipment supply, and technical support will continue to be charged according to the agreement between the two parties. ”

“Which scheme did you choose above?” asked Zhao Min.

"The first one." Yang Mingxi said.

"It seems that the official has concerns about the stability of the [Star Ring], but just in this way, we have more profits."

The first is long-term returns. They operate power stations, and the loss of profits is not related to the official. After a few years, the construction cost is recovered, followed by profits, and the revenue will be very scary. The second is short-term returns. The power station is sold to the official. All funds are collected in a short period of time. The official is responsible for the use and operation of the power station. The latter maintenance costs are all officially responsible, and the profit or loss is irrelevant.

If the mature product, the official must choose the second, but now the nuclear fusion power has just come out, the official uncertainty of the stability of the equipment, in the end can operate for a few years, so let them build.

"The official has already determined the construction plan for the two nuclear power plants." Yang Minghao took two documents from the briefcase and handed them to two people: "One is in our coastal city here, and the other is in the province. The plan is that if the power station is stable, Building more power stations and gradually replacing thermal power generation in the northern region."

"Is the two contracts signed?"

"You can sign at any time, the official has given a lot of convenience, and it is beyond imagination. I am afraid that there are any routines in it." Yang Mingxi said.

When he used to work in a state-owned enterprise, the project did not have such great convenience, and now their company's projects are unimpeded.

It seems that a special team has been set up to review their project plans.

"Do not worry about this."

Only Chen Mo and Zhao Min knew that this was the convenience given by the top head.

“I have sent people to inspect the construction site because the nuclear fusion power station has no radiation, no pollution, so the conditions for the site are not as high as nuclear fission.”

"I will reply you after reading the contract. You are now ready to start building nuclear power plants." Zhao Min said.

Now that the technology has been completed, the official choice of the BooT model means that they have autonomy in building the power station. How to build it next, how efficient the construction is, and see their efficiency.

"When is the nuclear power plant project, when is it open?"

Yang Minghao asked, continue to explain.

"This may be as fast as possible. The ordinary people do not know that nuclear fusion has been successful. They will think that we are building nuclear fission transformers, worry about nuclear radiation and safety issues, and oppose our construction. Open up early and let the local people get the nuclear out early." Knowledge about fusion, to prevent being used by people with care."

"No one is more authoritative than the science island." Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo.

"Five days later, I will let Science Island announce the news of the success of the nuclear fusion experiment. Then after you sign the contract, you can announce the nuclear power plant construction plan." Chen Mo said.

It has been a long time since the kidnapping of Nobel Prize winner Doliwitz. The disappearance of Doliwitz became a mystery. No one knows his whereabouts. Interpol is also pursuing it, but there is no clue. It can only be dragged all the time, and then it is gone.

On the other side of Chen Mo, he promised the official two months and it will expire soon. Officials and their talk about power plant construction contracts have already stated that they are prepared to be similar, and he can also publicize the news of the success of the nuclear fusion project.

After reporting some matters of the Nuclear Energy Group, Yang Mingxi got up and left.

"How is your flower and grass planted?"

"Yes, it's going well."

"Why do you choose to study flowers and plants? Wouldn't you want to inherit the clothes of Mr. Yuan Lao?" Zhao Min said.

Chen Mo rolled his eyes and looked speechless.

This girl speaks, sometimes it is not reliable, and often slaps the boss, but he can't say that it is the technology that is taken out from the technology library and must be completed.

After returning to the company last time, I accepted two interviews with the official media and started his research.

Oxygen is a plant that requires cell hybridization and gene editing techniques. It requires cells and DNA fragments of various plants. Now in the biological laboratory, it is a petri dish of various plant tissues.

The last technology is the most advanced nuclear fusion technology in the field of physics. Now I suddenly study flowers and plants. At first, Zhao Min thought that he was a whim, and he was studying bloating drugs, beauty medicines, etc., and began to tease. The result was ridiculed by Zhao Min. It is.

......

"Yan Yi, when did you find the boyfriend, why didn't you listen to you?" In a Samsung Michelin restaurant, Zhang Xinxin and others looked at the roommate next to him, full of doubts.

"The fate is hard to say."

The girl named Yan Yi couldn't help but take out the mirror to make up the makeup, for fear of where to spend it.

"I met him when I was shopping. He helped me catch the thief who grabbed my phone. I asked him to have a cup of coffee, and then he got my WeChat."

As he said, Liu Yanyi also had a sweet smile. The look of greasy, completely sour smell of love, let the three people accompanying Zhang Xinxin could not help but roll their eyes.

"The day before yesterday he confessed to me, and then my sister asked you to have a big meal." Liu Yanyi put down a small mirror, and some show off: "My boyfriend said, you are free tonight, he pays, is not enough?"

Another girl with a few small acne on her face said: "Which college is your boyfriend? What major?"

"He is not our school. He graduated from graduate school and is five years older than me." Liu Yanyi proudly said: "He is a master of finance at the University of London, and he is a starter. Now the company is established less than half a year, and the monthly income is 300,000. It’s a small achievement.”

Liu Yanyi proudly showed off and let Zhang Xinxin face each other.

"Then you got the treasure." Zhang Xinxin said.

"So, the fate of this thing, really hard to say." Liu Yanyi looked at the eyes of the three, very satisfied: "My boyfriend is coming, I will pick him up, you sit for a while."

"Haigui Master, people are handsome and talented, so good to find Yan Yi? How do I feel a little unreliable?" The acne girl whispered: "If Yan Yi is confused, it is not cheated, it is not Is it ruined?"

"I also feel that the pie is falling in the sky." Another glasses girl also spoke, and also handed the ice cream teaspoon into the mouth.

Zhang Xinxin also nodded: "I am also a bit worried. This time, she will help her to check it out, so as not to be deceived."

The three whispered, seeing Liu Yanyi walking in with a man's arm, he stopped and began to look at Liu Yanyi's boyfriend.

"This is Dong Quan that I told you." Liu Yanyi proudly introduced, holding his arm tightly, and others don't know the love of the two: "This is Ke Mei, Li Lihua and Zhang Xinxin."

"How are you."

Dong Quan said with a smile and three people to say hello, words and deeds are very decent, giving a lot of impressions: "I will treat you tonight, not enough to continue. Don't be polite with me, you are Yan Yi's girlfriend."

"We won't be polite to you." The acne girl named Ke Mei opened her eyes and always looked at Dong Quan: "Yes, Dong Quan, where is your hometown? Where is it?"

"My hometown is in Donghai."

"Isn't the East China Sea not very good? International metropolis."

"There is too much competition and it is not suitable for entrepreneurship. I also want to come out and look at the scenery of other cities. Binhai has developed very well over the years and has great potential." Dong Quan said without hesitation.

"Listen to Yan Yi, you are studying in London, what is the scenery there? Is it fun?" The glasses girls also spoke.

"It's okay, there is no such strong modern urban atmosphere here, there are more buildings in the sense of the times, the climate is mild after all, and it is more comfortable to live." Dong Quan said without hesitation.

"Then why are you not developing in the UK?" The glasses girls asked directly in English and were fluent in spoken English.

Dong Quan was a little surprised and smiled and answered in standard English.

"In fact, those Westerners are not looking down on our Chinese people. The culture is different. Even if I learn something there, it is still very difficult to integrate. Our country has risen in the past few years and there are more opportunities, so I am back. ""

A few people chatted with Dong Quan, and he was able to cover his words from time to time, but unfortunately there was not much gain.

"You can add me to WeChat. If you can't contact Yanyi normally, you can also ask for your help. If you are looking for a job after graduation, I can help you introduce it." Dong Quan smiled and looked at Zhang Xinxin and others.

Zhang Xinxin looked at each other and did not refuse.

chapters.title: Chapter 445: : God Gave Chen Mo To China
chapters.body:
Chapter 445: : God Gave Chen Mo To China

"Mergo, the president came to the news, the manager Yang Minghao has signed a contract with the official to invest in the construction of nuclear power plants. She said that we can announce the success of nuclear fusion at any time."

In the biological laboratory of Building 1, Chen Mo is waiting to extract the gene sequence of the cactus, and the ink girl will open the reminder.

The heat-resistance, cold-resistance, and cold-resistance genes of the earthy grasses come from a variety of different plants. These genes are combined, and then transgenic technology is used to synthesize anti-virus enzyme genes that are not currently available, as well as super-degrading enzyme genes that decompose toxic substances.

Combine all the target genes in a specific haploid hybrid cell to create a new plant. If it grows successfully, it will hope to get the grass.

During this time, Chen Mo is in the laboratory, ready to cultivate this kind of grass. As long as the plant is successfully cultured, the seeds of the grass are successfully formed, and the task is completed.

Research has a lot of uncertainty and the difficulty is not low.

It is during this time that every day, facing these flowers and plants, will be ridiculed by Zhao Min. After hearing the report of the ink girl, Chen Mo stopped and stunned his head.

"You emailed Wan Yuanjun, and asked him to release the news of the success of the experiment."

"Okay." The ink girl said: "The mail has been sent successfully."

"What is the hybrid cell?" Chen Mo continued.

"The two haploid cells fuse well, and the new cytokinins have worked. It won't take long for these cells to split into pluripotent tissues."

"That's not bad."

......

Li Tiejun sat in the office, strolled on Weibo, and had hot searches, hoping to find news points. During this time, the news is constantly changing, and the daily news hotspots are constantly refreshing.

However, he still likes to occasionally come up to see the dynamics of the official wei company's official Weibo, maybe there will be the latest news of the marching ant company.

Suddenly, people who are paying special attention have released new news and let Li Tiejun give a slight glimpse.

He set a special concern, it seems that only the official Weibo of the marching ant company. After returning to God, Li Tiejun quickly opened a special attention message.

It is a forwarded message, an announcement of the official website of the Star Ring Institute. The official microblog of the marching ant company rarely forwards the message.

The Institute of Stars and Rings seems to be a research institute jointly established by the Army Ant Group and the Academy of Sciences, and is affiliated to the Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group. What news, let the army ant company officially forward?

Looking at the contents of the forwarded message, Li Tiejun gave a slight glimpse, and then his mouth became ‘o’, his eyes almost came out and his mind was blank.

Has the controlled nuclear fusion experiment been successful?

"Yu Ji, fast, let go of the work in your hands, send the draft to the live room."

Ji Ji is focusing on the preparation of the news articles that have just been interviewed. Suddenly he saw the excited editor who was full of blushing eyes, but he still stopped working.

"Boss, what big news makes you so excited?" asked a colleague next to him.

“Super big news.” The editor-in-chief excitedly summoned all the people in the office, all gathered in front of the Juji office.

What news makes the editor so excited?

All of them have more or less confusion on their faces, including the Yuki period. In their impression, the editor is a very calm person. Why is this so rude?

Ji Ji opened the hard drive brought by the editor, a draft, and some photos. Others stretched their necks and spy on the computer screens of the Jurassic.

The Star Ring Institute announced that the star-ring controlled nuclear fusion experiment was successful, and nuclear fusion power generation can be commercialized!

Oh my God!

A short sentence at the beginning, let everyone take a breath, the shocking color is written on the face.

Has the controlled nuclear fusion experiment been successful?

......

The 'Star Ring' nuclear fusion experiment was successful, achieving conditions of super-strong voltage, super-high current, super-strong magnetic field and ultra-high temperature. The ultra-long pulse plasma beam can be operated stably for a long time, and nuclear fusion power generation can be commercialized.

The first thing that exposed this news is the official website of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group, as well as the official Weibo. It is followed by CCTV and other authoritative media in China.

When the news came out, it was shocking to the world.

Almost all mainstream media in China reported on the news, and the whole network was crazy.

Less than half an hour after the news was released, the traffic reached hundreds of millions. The hot topic quickly occupied the headlines and hot searches of all platforms, and it was still rising wildly. The Weibo server collapsed.

Tianya Forum, Jagged Community, Longkong, etc., all well-known forum platforms on the Internet, are discussing this matter insanely. The comment area of various platforms is unprecedentedly exciting and shocking.

The news came without warning, but no one suspected that the news was fake.

Although the news of the authoritative media is sometimes old-fashioned, it is definitely true news.

And various news reports also explain that Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group is a group company established by the Army Ant Group and the official joint venture, and Chen Mo is the chief designer and chief engineer of the 'Star Ring'.

The major news related to Chen Mo was announced by the authoritative media. The official announcement confirmed that no one had doubts.

Chen Mo is a genius that transcends human understanding, or a versatile genius.

Holographic technology is mature, controlled nuclear fusion technology is successful, artificial intelligence is developing wildly, and countless people have a feeling that now is the future world.

In China, the country is full of joy. This time, they have surpassed the world.

"Chen Mo Niu!"

"At this moment, only three words describe my mood: my God!"

"Great, my country."

"I have witnessed history."

"The people in the shocked department came out. This time you said that you shocked the world, scared the small island nation, and stunned the great emperor. I will never report you."

"I have witnessed the rise of China, and I have witnessed the greatness of China again."

Countless shouts, stirring in various platforms.

......

BBC: "Huaxia controlled nuclear fusion is successful? This must be a fake message. 》

Wall Street Journal: "The mature nuclear fusion technology is likely to affect global coal prices, and the cold winter is coming. 》

The New York Times: "Huaxia's controlled nuclear fusion technology should be shared with the world for the benefit of all mankind. 》

Numerous media have reported on the front page of this matter. The foreign media's words are incredible and have a strong sour taste.

Except for envy, they can't do anything.

"What happened to China?"

"My God, this is impossible, there is no news of any omen."

"God gave Newton to England, Britain was great; Einstein and Tesla were given to the United States, and the United States was great; now God gave Chen Mo to China..."

"Chen Mo said: Garbage, all rubbish, I am sorry, I am not targeting one of you, but everyone here is rubbish. (Taking from China)"

All kinds of news have been circulated wildly, and unprecedented waves have been set in the world. Arguments can be seen everywhere, and shocking words abound.

Soon, commentators, politicians and journalists from various countries jumped out and asked Huaxia to share controlled nuclear fusion technology for the benefit of all mankind.

The director of the iTeR organization also told the media that it hopes to use the 'star ring' for controlled nuclear fusion experiments.

For these remarks, Huaxia official and marching ant companies all chose to ignore it.

The nuclear fusion technology is mature, and the global coal price has fluctuated greatly in the early days. The coal industry may enter the cold winter at any time, which makes many enterprises miserable. In particular, small countries that depend on the coal industry are still developing this kind of thing, which is undoubtedly a huge blow.

On the occasion of the shock of many countries, Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group once again announced a heavy news.

Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group announced that the Group has signed strategic cooperation agreements with South China and Handan Province. In the next two years, it will invest in the construction of two nuclear fusion power stations with a total power of 20 million kilowatts. Future nuclear fusion power stations will become the main source of China's electric energy.

This is the construction of the world's first nuclear fusion power station, which is not a experimental device, but a real nuclear fusion power station.

As soon as the news came out, the success of the controlled nuclear fusion experiment was pushed to another climax.

chapters.title: Chapter 446: : Killing Chicken And Monkey
chapters.body:
Chapter 446: : Killing Chicken And Monkey

Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group wants to build a controlled nuclear fusion power station, which is faster than anyone thinks. This has shown that nuclear fusion technology is not only as simple as experimental success, but technology is indeed commercially viable.

This is undoubtedly another blockbuster, which makes people who have not returned to God more shocked. In just two days, there has never been such a clear feeling that the whole world is changing.

The coal market and the oil market, due to this news, experienced dramatic fluctuations.

The coal market that bears the brunt.

After the Huaxia Nuclear Power Group nuclear power plant project was finalized, it has already touched the interests of some people. Under the guidance of the ‘hearted person’, the coal miners who were unemployed at home were indignant and thought that they were taken away from work and began to gather protests.

Various protests, exposed through various social media platforms, hope to create a storm of public opinion, give pressure to the nuclear energy group, and also give official pressure to achieve the purpose of delaying the elimination of coal, and even some ulterior motives.

Finally, under the guidance of the 'hearted people', more and more unemployed workers began to target the army ants company, thinking that the army ants company is the chief culprit of their unemployment.

"Unscrupulous marching ants, I still work."

"We don't want nuclear power plants, don't use high technology, just work."

"I have old and small, and the whole family is counting on me to support my family. Let me be laid off is not to push us to a dead end?"

"Without work, we will starve to death. My daughter is still studying. If I am unemployed, my family's financial resources will be gone."

"..."

The unemployed gathered outside the store of the army ant company, shouted banners and protested, and was exposed by many media platforms. When the farce came out, it immediately attracted great repercussions and debates from the society.

"Stupid people, natural choices, survival of the fittest. Nature is the survival of the fittest. If the society does not improve, it is better to return to the primitive society, and to drink blood."

"The marching ants make technology update too fast, and social development can't keep up with their speed. When he introduces technology, does he consider the issue of people's livelihood and social background? Is the development of science and technology and the spread of artificial intelligence leading to an increase in unemployment, is it not creating social contradictions? ”

"I first heard that the technology company is developing too fast protests. Should it be stagnant and settled in the status quo? The employment rate is an official issue to consider, not a problem considered by the marching ant company. The marching ant is a taxpayer. , not a tax collector."

“Does the development of the company ignore social contradictions?”

“Would you like to destroy the entire marching ant company?”

"..."

The debate is continuing and the rhetoric of all parties is getting more and more intense.

The final incident was also escalated in the war of words. Some unemployed people, led by artificial intelligence and mechanization, also began to gather under the leadership of the army ants company under the guidance of some people to protest collectively.

Under the blockade of the police, there was no conflict between the two sides. It was just a silent banner protest. It still exists. Under many circumstances, the police can only maintain order and wait for the policy to come down.

......

Zhao Min stood by the window of the office and overlooked the crowd protesting outside the general department. His face was frosty.

These people are all induced by the brainless people, but she can not get angry with these people. The man behind the scenes of manipulating this ignorant citizen, she does not know who those people can only be checked by the police.

The cost of doing this kind of thing is too small, and the impact on them is too great. The opponents tried this way and made her angry.

If she knows who is doing it, she will not hesitate to kill each other.

The rumors on the Internet can be neglected, but now they have come to the door to add her blockage. The last virus crisis was once, and now again, three times and four times, has touched her bottom line.

"Min sister, Li Huai came to the phone."

When he heard the prompt from the mobile assistant, Zhao Min immediately took out the mobile phone.

From the beginning of the incident, she knew that someone was behind the scenes. Because the official has been properly arranged, if no one deliberately guides, it is impossible to make such a ridiculous thing.

So when things started, she let the people in the Ministry of Justice follow up and hoped to find behind the scenes through various methods.

"President, there is news."

"Say."

"There are some foreigners who are manipulating behind the scenes. The police have arrested two foreign spies who are inciting trouble."

"Only foreign black hands?" Zhao Min frowned, foreign forces involved, within her expectations, but if only foreign forces do, she is beyond the reach.

"There is also the shadow of a domestic mining company, not sure, but it is not far from the top ten."

"Which?" Zhao Min glanced with a dangerous light.

“Black soil mining. The police caught several promoters and said that Cao Jiangmin hired them to incite workers. Cao Jiangmin was the most trusted man of the black soil mining owner Tang Baiming. Some time ago, Tang Baiming gave him a sum of money and then fired him. Let him leave the company."

"How does Cao Jiangmin say?"

"Cao Jiangmin denied that he did what he did. He said that he was also angry because he was laid off. He participated in the protest, but did not organize protests, not even behind the scenes. There is no evidence that Cao Jiangmin is doing this. We are suing him and cannot be convicted. The name of Tang Bai behind him."

"Black soil mining? Some things can be solved without the law. It is time for other people to know that it is not a cat or a dog, can come to us to make trouble. The company is usually and amiable, really thought we were not tempered?"

Zhao Min’s eyes braved the fire and he was completely angry.

This may be the beginning, and many people are watching. If you don't kill the chicken, there will be monkeys jumping out to find them uncomfortable.

......

At the headquarters of Black Soil Mining Company, Tang Baiming sat in the office and looked at the computer screen. All of the above were news reports about the protests of the marching ant company headquarters.

The sorrow on his face did not dissipate.

Coal mine production cuts, industry competition increased, and his business is getting harder and harder. Originally, I was still a local tyrant with mines. Now I can't make ends meet, and there are still many bank loans. If the coal mine continues to cut production, he will go bankrupt sooner or later.

He also knows that the elimination of coal is the general trend, but only for a long time. Originally thought that in the next five to ten years, even if the policy is tightened, it will not be too horrible. At the current rate, the coal industry has a large market for at least 15 years.

However, in the first two months, the policy suddenly increased its strength, which made him somewhat unprepared, but he could still cope with it. Now that the nuclear fusion power station project came out, he immediately understood the root of everything.

He has troubles in cash flow, he must increase coal production, get enough cash, and get out of the game, otherwise he will face a crisis of bankruptcy.

As a last resort, he can only make a decision to hire unemployed workers to take the lead in protest, hoping to give the authorities some pressure on the army ants, thus slowing down the speed of coal elimination and giving him more buffer time.

The person who helped him to do this was Cao Jiangmin, his most trusted man. In order to hide his eyes and ears, he dismissed Cao Jiangmin and gave him a sum of money to manipulate him behind his back.

Even if Cao Jiangmin was caught by the police, the army ant company could not help him. He could also say that he had nothing to do with him, so he got out.

But now the effect seems to be much smaller than imagined. The effect of this degree has no real harm to the marching ants and the official.

The sensational effect has already been made. He makes people buy hot search to expand the news, but the public opinion on the Internet and in society does not seem to be on their side. So now the marching ant company has no loss at all, just a little trouble.

If it is not successful, he is stealing chicken without eclipsing the rice.

Oh...

The phone rushed to shake and interrupted his thoughts. At this moment, he suddenly had a very unpredictable feeling.

"Old super, anecdote? Go drinking again? Haha..." Tang Boming connected, hit a haha.

"Old Tang, the last time I talked to you about cooperation, I want to consider it again."

The voice came from the mobile phone, as if it was a sunny day. Tang Baiming was in a hurry. If he canceled a big cooperation, it would be even worse.

"Old super, is there any other unsatisfactory condition? Isn't it good to sign tomorrow? Why is it suddenly cancelled?"

"There is really a problem, Lao Tang, you are a little impulsive."

"What do you mean?"

"What did you do for the army ant company?"

"This……"

Tang Baiming’s words were slogan, and there was an ominous premonition.

"Old Tang, everyone understands people. Since you use this method to create trouble for the marching ant company, you should know that they will retaliate, and it is still a revenge."

"Speak clearly, what do you mean? I didn't touch the army ant company."

"Now this situation, understand that people understand that some people are behind the ghosts. Zhao Min privately released words, she will be behind the scenes, now the spearhead is pointing at you, she also hinted that what you did, has been privately notified in advance You have people who work together.

If you cut a little meat, you can still retire. Business matters, the means of fairness, the two sides in the market, you have no complaints. But your means are not bright, and they will not follow the common sense. Shopping malls like battlefields, and people with absolute strength, will only make you die faster. You have to be a monkey's chicken. If you ask for more happiness, I can't help you. In this way, it is estimated that the above people will not care about you. ”

Snapped!

The blind voice of the phone made Tang Baiming chilly.

Oh...

Just hang up, the phone vibrates again.

"Old Tang, the cooperation between our two sides will be cancelled. Changhe Mining just looked for me, their prices seem to be more favorable."

"Hey, hey... damn..."

"Boss, this is my resignation letter. The person from Dongxing Company just asked me that the marketing department of the branch office lacks management. I want to go one step further." A man entered the office and left a letter of resignation to leave.

"Dong Tang, the last time you borrowed something, I encountered some problems. I am afraid that the bank can't lend you to you in the near future..."

"Dong Tang, Wang Dong held an emergency shareholders meeting..."

......

Tang Baiming’s brain screamed and sat down in his seat.

He knew that he was finished.

chapters.title: Chapter 447: :Situation
chapters.body:
Chapter 447: :Situation

Black soil mining boss jumped to death!

Zhao Min was just a few phone calls, and a few ‘goodwill’ persuasion made Tang Boming completely collapsed and went to a dead end. It is conceivable that the influence of the marching ant company is large.

The marching ant, who has been amiable, is irritated and reveals its aggressive character as its name.

Tang Baiming’s collapse is a warning from the marching ant company to the opponent.

The means of being fair and straight can be, if you can see the small movements of the people, the marching ants company will also accompany them, and will be confronted with retaliation. Today's marching ant companies, no one can provoke.

This incident also makes people who are preparing for small actions in private, do not dare to move.

The news of Tang Baiming’s jumping off the building, in the background of the success of nuclear fusion technology, like a small spray of violent storms, did not cause a trace of waves.

Only people in the industry know the horror.

On the third day of the death of Tang Baiming, Cao Jiangmin, who organized the protest, pleaded guilty and admitted to buying the workers and inciting the protests. In the official and various reports, let the public opinion be in vain.

Outside the line of the army ants company, the people who are going to the headquarters of the army ants company also understand that they have been used by the police. Under the persuasion of the police, they sneaked off the slopes and left.

Liu Qingguo sat on the sofa in the hall, holding a cigarette in his hand, a smoggy face, with sorrow and entanglement.

He is a coal practitioner and a miner.

Since the big policy of energy conservation and emission reduction came out, the coal reduction plan has always been there, but it is quietly carried out. It is difficult for the outside world to find out, but their workers know. In the past two years, his income has shrunk by a third, and prices have become higher and higher.

But this is a national policy. The times are improving and there is no way to resist it.

Two months ago, the mining area received a notice to reduce production, and the mining area had already laid off the youngest workers in batches.

Because knowing that there is not much production in the future, policy considerations will allow young and strong workers to be laid off and find another way to make a living. The old miners have been working for too long, leaving the job, they have difficulty in raising a family, so the old miners can still do their own work.

Unfortunately, he is a laid-off member.

Although there is compensation in the mining area, but after all, it is necessary to support the family. I asked the workers in other mining areas to have the same situation.

Workers have discussed that after the invention of the nuclear power plant, coal power generation will be eliminated in the future, and the consumption of coal will also be reduced. National policies should be implemented.

Some time ago, some people moved to protest. This kind of thing, he didn't feel very good, so he didn't participate.

But the work is always looking for, otherwise the child will go to school, and the family economy will have to maintain him. However, there are not many books, and now I am not familiar with going to the city. It is very troublesome.

When he was in a daze, the ringing of the mobile phone awakened him and looked at the number. Liu Qingguo’s eyebrows picked it up and hurriedly connected: “Hey manager, hello.”

"Liu Ge, have you got a job?" There was a thick voice on the phone.

"Not yet, I am looking for it." Liu Qingguo said quickly.

“The above policy says that it is necessary to restore some vegetation in abandoned mining areas. Planting grass and trees, the contracting company contacted me that they lacked some workers, would you like to go?”

"Well, go, thank you, manager." Liu Qingguo ecstasy, hurriedly promised, work has fallen, at least now do not have to worry about the problem of laid-off.

In the same situation as Liu Qingguo, some other workers are workers who have been forced to lay off after the coal production is reduced.

Workers who were worried about not having a job also recovered their mentality.

The protests slowly disappeared and everything went back to normal, as if nothing had happened. A farce was also ended.

......

Cadarache, France.

In the conference hall of the iTeR office, a 'fierce' meeting is taking place at this time.

"This unreasonable request should not appear in such a serious meeting. In order to solve the human energy crisis, we are actively participating in the iTeR project, and the 'Oriental Super Ring' also provides a venue for the iTeR project experiment. We do our best, Provide maximum assistance for the iTeR project.

The Star Ring Institute is not within the framework of the iTeR project. It is a high-energy plasma research institute jointly established by the marching ant company and the Academy of Sciences. The R&D technology is owned by Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group, and the world has never given any technical assistance.

Nowadays, the technology is successful, but it is ethical and requires us to share technology. This kind of requirement has never been seen before. As a scientific researcher, don’t you feel shameful? ”

At the conference table, Li Jian pointed to the people on the field and made a loud noise.

“Huaxia is also a participating country of the iTeR project. You should provide the most advanced technical theory for the project. Only if you share the technology without reservation, the project will be successful soon. We are willing to bring out the most advanced high-temperature plasma technology in our country. Why can't you take it out? Is it too selfish?" asked an American physicist headed.

"selfish?" Li Jian looked directly into the other's eyes: "If it wasn't for the Star Ring Institute's experimental success, would you take all the technology out? Why didn't you take it before? You want to use a bicycle to change the plane? Don't you think this idea is ridiculous? ?"

"If we share the technology, we are willing to compensate for some of the research and development expenses in China. If you refuse the agreement within the organization, we have the right to ban the sale of the technology to build the Tokamak device to you, without our parts and materials, Huaxia It is impossible to build a tokamak device."

The representatives of several other countries are aggressive and hide with a hunger. It seems that Li Jian is not willing to share technology, that is, the enemy who does not share the sky.

"Hey..." Li Jian heard the threat and angered and laughed: "I still know how to make radish and sticks? They have been technically blocked for decades. Are you afraid that you will be blocked? China is standing up from the threat." ”

After so many years of research, I have never seen such a brazen person, and I am still a group of scientists.

The controlled nuclear fusion was successful, and he was able to raise his eyebrows. He could straighten his waist and pointed at the noses of these people, and the other party could not help him. Without the participation of Huaxia, iTeR project research will be stagnant. They have been successful and don't have to look at the faces of several other countries.

After Li Jian’s death, he snorted and left, leaving a table of people facing each other and falling into awkwardness.

......

At the regular meeting of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

“Many physicists and iTeR directors have called for China to share the controlled nuclear fusion technology with the world to solve the human energy crisis. What comment does China have on this?”

"I have noticed that there have been many reports in these two days. What I want to say is that Huaxia has been actively supporting the iTeR project, which is to help the human energy crisis.

The Star Ring Institute is not under the iTeR framework. The institute is a joint venture between the Army Ant Group and the Academy of Sciences. Technical research has cost countless funds, talents and resources, and has not been helped by the outside world. The success of controlled nuclear fusion is the result of the efforts of our own researchers. ”

......

As the news of controlled nuclear fusion becomes more widespread.

After the news was thoroughly confirmed, the world civil society, academia and the national level began to carry out various moral abductions to China, and they all asked China to share nuclear fusion technology with the world.

Some small countries that depend on the coal economy are suffering because of the volatility of the coal market. Under the control of some big powers, a small country proposed at the UN meeting that China should suspend the construction of nuclear power plants and share nuclear fusion technology. The final result is naturally rejected.

The game of the great powers is going on, and the world is forming a confrontational situation in the invisible, and the momentum of China is not weaker than the parties, and it is still calm.

Unrelated countries are all things that don’t matter. Under such confrontation, small countries cannot stand in the team. Although they are shameless and deeply contemptuous of some European and American countries, it is not the big country that they should participate.

The globally solidified economy and political governance situation, because of the success of controlled nuclear fusion technology, there is a fissure, the beginning of the stream.

chapters.title: Chapter 449: : Do Not Use
chapters.body:
Chapter 449: : Do Not Use

"Xin Xin, what are you doing?"

"I am at home, what is it?"

"Tonight my boyfriend's birthday is going to sing K. I want to invite you, Kemei and Lihua will come, only a few of us, no one else."

"So? Well, okay."

"The Emperor's Square 888 box, waiting for you."

Hang up the phone, Zhang Xinxin looked at Xiaoyu: "Small fishing rod, my roommate's boyfriend's birthday, invited us to sing K, I went out for a trip, you and your brother said."

Xiao Yu put down his books: "Where?"

"Emperor Square."

“The consumption of Emperor Square is quite high, and students also go there to hold a birthday party?” asked Xiao Yu.

"Her boyfriend is not a student, a master of returnees, come back to start a business, a little income." Zhang Xinxin said.

"Do you like this?" Although the suspected Haigui Master likes a female university student who has not graduated, Xiaoyu did not ask: "My card is for you, in case of need."

"Xunzi, my pocket money for me, I can't finish it, I still have a lot of money in my card."

"Then come back early, don't drink too much alcohol, or your brother will definitely stop your pocket money."

"Good." Zhang Xinxin promised to go back to the room to change clothes and go straight.

Looking at Zhang Xinxin's back, Xiaoyu put down the book and thought about it, picking up the phone: "Black Hawk."

"Miss Xiao Yu, what's the matter?"

The mobile phone pops up the holographic projection of the Black Hawk.

"Xin Xin went to the emperor's square to sing, you let the two bodyguards protect her with the past and pick her up at night." Xiao Yu said.

"Okay." The Black Hawk nodded.

......

"How? Are they coming?" Dong Quan looked at Liu Yanyi and opened his mouth.

"Well, they all agreed, it should be on the way." Liu Yanyi collected the phone, sweet opening: "Dear, your friend? Why not ask them?"

"I just returned to China soon, the friends I made were business partners. They have been on a business trip recently and have not returned." Dong Quan smiled.

"It doesn't matter, dear, this is my birthday present." Liu Yanyi took out a gift box and handed it to Dong Quan.

"Well, thank you." Dong Quan took it easy.

......

In the laboratory, Chen Mo took a mask and wore an experimental white robe. In front of him is a transparent LCD screen with information on various gene sequences.

The technology of genetic engineering has long been mature, and all kinds of basic equipment are ready-made, which provides great convenience for his research. There is no need to prepare many basic technologies and materials that are not currently available, as in the study of the stars.

In the study of soil oxygen grass, he only needs to synthesize two kinds of hormones, then put the target gene into the nuclear genetics, and cultivate the plant germ with synthetic hormones.

If the growing plant has the target characteristics and functions, it is successful.

"Merg brother, the drought-resistant gene transfer was successful, and the medium was detected to have related proteins."

“Put the embryos and plant them in the cultivation room.”

Chen Mo glanced at the information and turned to look at the sand room inside the glass window.

It is a cultivation room built to simulate the desert environment. There are already several green plants, cactus and Haloxylon. Next to the cultivation room, there are sunflowers and monstera, and the water environment culture room grows more than a dozen water hyacinths.

Some of the gene fragments required for the soil grass are found in these plants.

During this period of time, because of the nuclear fusion technology, the outside world is inextricably linked, and the hot weapon is facing the front. His protagonist rarely appeared, except for the interview with the official media at the beginning, and the rest of the time was immersed in research.

The exposure of nuclear fusion technology has risen to the game at the national level. The big country game, it is irrelevant for their company to participate in the participation, just show your face, just to find trouble for yourself.

All company affairs, handled by Zhao Min, he only needs to be clean and research.

Putting the medium in the hand into the incubator, Chen Mocai withdrew from the laboratory and took off the experimental robe.

......

"you're back."

Listening to the small fishing of the book, see Chen Mo coming back, showing a gentle smile. Now that her baby has been pregnant for more than eight months, she is hiding at home to listen to the music of the prenatal education, look at the parenting books, and be ready to be a mother.

"Yeah." Chen Mo changed the slippers, put the jacket in the hands of the intelligent robot, and sat down next to the small fisherman: "Xin Xin? How can the girl not see people?"

Now Xinxin graduated from the exam, and at this time, I am at home.

"It didn't take long before she went out. She said that her boyfriend's boyfriend's birthday, please ask them to go to the emperor's square to sing."

“Ordinary students go to Dorsett Square? Are students so rich now?”

Chen Mo was a little surprised.

The minimum consumption of Emperor's Square is 5,000, which is not the place where ordinary college students go. Dihaofang is not far from Binhai University. When you were in college, the students at Binhai University knew that it was a high-consumption place, and their ordinary students would not enter that place.

“She said that her boyfriend’s boyfriend is not a student, a master of returnees, and earning money from starting a business.”

"A successful master's degree in entrepreneurship, looking for a female university student who has not graduated as a girlfriend? This is very interesting. This condition should not be this combination, the girl looks very beautiful?" Chen Mo asked casually.

"Why do you think that girl is very beautiful?"

"Unless the long-term love, the so-called love at first sight is to see the color, the man thinks about it? The conditions of the two sides are not equal, especially the master of the returnees, with a halo, and successful entrepreneurship, the vision should be high. The girl is not beautiful, or not Other advantages that are too prominent, the probability of the two together is small.

The circles of both sides are different, the intersection is not big, and the world view and topic are different. In summary, either the male looks at her appearance, or just plays. Now the rich people like the female college students..." Chen Mozhen said.

"Our conditions are not equal. Did you see me at the beginning? Or play?"

Chen Mo feels wrong. When he turns his head, he sees Xiao Yu’s face like a smile and a smile.

"That was love at first sight. When I was in the library, I suddenly found a beautiful, energetic girl who was attracted by her temperament at first sight. For four years, it was the first time I saw such a beautiful girl.

Then when the bookshelf fell, I knew that the opportunity was rare, and I rushed. Who knows, that is the goddess of luck given to me by God, I will not hesitate to take home. Sure enough, since then, I have been born with the wind, the bull is not able to do it, that is, the goddess of luck has changed my destiny. The conditions are indeed not equal, she is a goddess, I am a mortal, so I have to work hard. ”

"The mouth is very sweet, count you through."

Xiao Yu smiled and chanted Chen Mo, leaning gently on him.

"I have seen the friends of Xinxin. Her roommates are ordinary people, and they are ordinary girls. So I just thought about it a bit, and I worry about people with ulterior motives, plus the place of the bar. Let the Blackhawk arrange two bodyguards to protect Xinxin privately."

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded, his brow slightly wrinkled, feeling that something was wrong, but did not think much.

chapters.title: Chapter 450: : Don'T You Feel Too Greedy?
chapters.body:
Chapter 450: : Don'T You Feel Too Greedy?

Dong Quan was sitting in the box and his face was flickering.

Zhang Xinxin is coming, without any doubt. The four girls all sang in the box and were very happy. Obviously, the four did not have any doubts about him.

Then the next step is to play.

Dong Quan glanced at the door of the box. He knew that Zhang Xinxin’s bodyguards came over and kept on the corridor to pay attention to the situation of the box.

Time is almost the same, Dong Quan took out his mobile phone and sent a message.

Hands-on.

......

Chen Mo feels that something is wrong. It seems that there is something wrong with him today, which makes him uneasy.

Tonight's conversation with Xiaoyu, he seems to ignore which key place is the key that makes him uneasy. Just after returning home, Xiaoyu is also around. He didn't think much about it. Now he is going to take a bath and rest, and he can settle down and remember carefully.

Where is it wrong?

Emperor Square? Birthday party? Female college student? Master of Returnees?

Returnees?

Chen Mo’s dizzy, seems to find the key point, is it the problem of the master of the returnees?

Master of success in entrepreneurship, choose a girl who has not graduated and looks ordinary as a girlfriend? This is unreasonable.

He may think too much, but he has to think more. Recently, the official seized five spies in Binhai, and the two were rebellious returnees.

The news outside is not reported, but Chen Mo is very clear.

At the beginning of his establishment of a controlled nuclear fusion project, he asked the Mexican women to pay close attention to foreigners and returnees who suddenly entered the coastal city.

"Merg brother, violent incident in Emperor Square, Wu Qiang and Cheng Chuanqi were suddenly attacked."

"What?" Chen Mo hurried up and his face changed. Wu Qiang and Cheng Chuanqi, who said that the ink girl said, is the bodyguard that followed Xinxin’s past: "I will contact Wu Qiang and Cheng Chuanqi immediately."

Chen Mo grabbed the phone and tablet and left the study.

He thought of a possibility, this time, if this possibility comes true, then Xinxin is in trouble.

"Boss, we were suddenly attacked, the other five people, one person has a gun." Just contacted, the phone came to Wu Qiang anxious voice, accompanied by gunshots from time to time.

“What about Xinxin?” Chen Mo asked.

"The confession cover Miss Shin Shin and his friend just ran out of the box and fled to the safe exit." Wu Qiang said cautiously.

Chen Mo's face suddenly changed.

"Go to chase, among their friends, the man may be a accomplices, and Xinxin and Chuanqi are in danger."

Just out of the study, Zhu He and Pearl have entered the villa, the face is obviously anxious: "Boss, just the Black Hawk said, Chuanyi lost contact."

"Reading a car, Xinxin is dangerous, may be calculated. Pearl, you and Anan, Luo Yu and Taishan four people left to protect the small fishing. Except you, no one can enter the villa, can not be close to the small fishing, In case of emergency, take a small fishing to the safe house immediately, and all the robots will start emergency alert."

Chen Mozhen finished, took Zhu He to leave the villa.

"Ink girl, check the identity of Xinxin Sheyou boyfriend."

The only explanation he can think of now is that the person has a problem, otherwise there will be no attack against them. Chuanqi lost contact, obviously planned in advance, early to determine that they will go to Emgrand Square, have no intentions, and should be inside.

Dong Quan, 27, holds a master's degree in chemistry from the University of London. During the period of studying abroad, I participated in the special forces summer camp, the owner of Dongquan International Trading Company...

"Damn." Looking at the information of Dong Quan, Chen Mo's face was very dark.

The other party also voted for the resume of the army ant company, or a few months ago, just returned home.

I don't have to think about it, but it is also a special person, and it is still a very clever special person. I haven't been monitored by the ink girl. I also choose to start with his loved ones. The security is the weakest.

"A strong, how is your situation there?" Chen Mo contacted Wu Qiang again.

"The rumor was attacked from behind, two shots in the body, life and death is not clear. I killed two gangsters, the man stunned Miss Xin Xin to escape, I did not dare to shoot, followed behind them." Wu Qiang voice is thick The anger.

"Which way?"

"Just on Fenghuang Avenue, heading for the northern suburbs, the police car behind is also coming."

"Don't lose, don't be impulsive, report your position at any time, we are chasing it now." Chen Mo and his team, there is a car robot, four cars left the villa. The roar of the engine vented the anger at the moment.

In the car, Chen Mo took a big box from the trunk.

Since the last attack, Chen Mo has developed self-defense techniques. These techniques have not been used for a long time. He also hopes that he will never have to come in handy. The result is still needed.

Full of self-defense equipment, full of boxes. The odd shape is different from traditional equipment, like the technology of the movie agents.

The most common is the pistol, in addition to the ring, the capsule robot, and some even the military fans can not name the equipment.

"Give it to you, put it on." Chen Mo took out a thick bag from the box and took two gray T-shirts from the inside and threw them to the driver's seat and the co-pilots Wang Hai and Zhu He.

Zhu He did not feel the emotion, immediately took off his jacket and put a T-shirt on his body. The T-shirt is only a little thicker than the ordinary T-shirt, but it has a strong bulletproof function, but she has seen it.

As a security guard, she knows how much equipment is on the car and how the equipment is functioning.

When she first learned about the equipment in Chen Mo’s self-defense equipment box, she was really shocked. Even with the senior leaders, there are not so many advanced self-defense equipment.

Put on the T-shirt, Chen Mo took a ring and put it on, grabbed three table tennis-sized eggs and put them in their pockets.

"Merg brother, stranger calls." The voice of the ink girl suddenly sounded, interrupting his movements.

Chen Mo's face can't help but condense: "Connect."

"Mr. Chen Mo, your sister is in my hand." The voice of Dong Quan came from the mobile phone. I don't know the voice of anger. "I know that your person has already chased it. The police have also chased it, but I still want to get it." I want to get something."

"Give you a billion, let my sister." Chen Mo sounds cold.

"I have to say that I am very excited about this condition, but that money is not what I want, and I have no life to spend."

"what would you like?"

"Controlled nuclear fusion technology, artificial intelligence technology, holographic technology." The voice of the mobile phone came from a haze.

"Don't you feel too greedy?" Chen Mo blackened his face and hid the endless anger under his eyes.

"I only wanted controlled nuclear fusion technology, but unfortunately there was something wrong. I was greedy by the way. If you think that your sister is not worthy of the cold technology, you can not give it."

"I can't give you three techniques. If you want one of them, I can give it to you, as long as you put your sister."

"Two kinds, controlled nuclear fusion technology and artificial intelligence technology, you only have two hours. An abandoned old factory in the northern suburbs, waiting for it to be very lively, I prepared a big gift there, I could not use it. If something goes wrong, it will be used. You remember to send it in person, don't take fake technology, or you will regret it for a lifetime."

Dong Quan hangs up the phone, looks at the car stuck in the rear, and stunned the steering wheel.

There was something wrong with the action. Wu Qiang chased it, earlier than he thought. Sudden appearance of the other party, also killed two people, completely disrupted his plan, had to make an alternate plan, and now a bit passive.

The lights flashed, the bells tore the silent night sky, and the air was filled with charred molecules. Looking at the abandoned old factory building in the distance, Dong Quan’s steering wheel turned and quickly rushed over.

chapters.title: Chapter 451: : I Am Not So Weak
chapters.body:
Chapter 451: : I Am Not So Weak

When Chen Mo arrived at the abandoned old factory building, the warning line had been pulled up here. Five police cars and two special police vehicles are waiting for everyone.

It belongs to the suburbs, and is not surrounded by residential areas. There are no crowds onlookers.

The road has been blocked and the vehicles are not allowed to approach.

"Mr. Chen Mo, I am the captain of the special police detachment, Zhuang Yan, the commander of the on-site action." Wearing a special police uniform, the black-skinned man and Chen Mo made a greeting.

He has already received news that the hostage in the hands of the culprits is Chen Mo’s sister and asks him to ensure the safety of the hostages at any cost. The situation inside is a bit troublesome, and he does not dare to move.

Chen Mo nodded and looked blank: "How is my sister? Wu Qiang?"

"The bodyguard had a shot in his arm and was on his way to the hospital. Your sister and the gangster were inside." Zhuang Yan brought Chen Mo to the technical vehicle and opened the map of the factory, pointing to one of the small suites: "The gangster's The room is on the first floor, together with the hostages, there are only two people in the whole building. But..."

Zhuang Yan was solemn and solemn, and Chen Mo’s heart was tight, and there was an ominous premonition.

“It used to be the employee dormitory of the factory. The front is the bedroom, and there is a small bathroom at the back. All the doors and windows are covered. The wall around the small room, the wall, the gangsters installed the homemade soil bombs, obviously arranged in advance. The place where the gangsters are at this corner, we can't kill. From the other side's approach, it is a professionally trained person."

Chen Mo looked at the portrait of infrared thermal imaging, his face was gloomy and scary: "Do they have conditions for you?"

"No, we sent a negotiating expert. The other party did not open the door. I only asked to see you. We are trying to communicate with the other party. The other party has no response. The shelter around him is solid, there are soil bombs, guns, hostages are in the hands of the other side, we I dare not rush to break the door." Zhuang Yan said.

At the beginning, he was close to the factory and was detonated by the other two bombs. They ate a small loss, and the two brothers were injured. Now they dare not move.

Chen Mo looked at the factory map and his brain was spinning at a rapid speed.

This is a place that has been prepared for a long time, and the purpose is for today. The other party counts all kinds of possibilities and does not give any chance of rescue.

"Merg brother, stranger calls." The voice of the ink girl in the phone instantly caught everyone's attention.

The surrounding technicians immediately turned on the equipment and waited. After receiving the headset handed over by the technician, Zhuang Yan indicated that Chen Mo could be connected.

"Mr. Chen, are you here?" The phone sent a cold voice from Dong Quan.

"what do you want?"

Chen Mo took a deep breath and tried to calm himself down.

"It's very simple. You personally send things in. If you don't want to see your sister's fragrance disappear, it's best not to play tricks. If other people come in, I don't mind disposing of your sister's legs first, don't think I am joking."

Dudu...

The blind voice of the phone makes everyone sink into the heart, and the criminals simply do not give them any chance to speak, and can speak unconditionally.

Zhuang Yan changed slightly and looked at Chen Mo.

The gangsters have asked Chen Mo to bring something, probably a sensitive technology. Recently, the controlled nuclear fusion technology has been in full swing, and the gangsters chose to do it at this time, perhaps for this technology.

Moreover, Chen Mu’s identity and his influence, Zhuang Yan is clear, if Chen Mo is in trouble here, all of them will be held accountable.

"Mr. Chen, what do you want from the gangsters?"

"Artificial intelligence technology." Chen Mo said coldly.

"Mr. Chen, this..."

"I need to go in." Chen Mo interrupted Zhuang Yan's words.

"No."

Wang Hai, Zhu He, and Zhuang Yan are all in unison.

A few people are a little worried, and Chen Mo’s safety is more important than the safety of anyone present.

"Boss, let me go." Wang Hai said.

"The other party asked me to go in, otherwise it would hurt Xinxin. Do you have other ways to keep her from hurting?" Chen Mo asked a few people.

"but……"

"Nothing." Chen Mo interrupted everyone, and the voice was unquestionable: "Give me a bulletproof vest."

"Mr. Chen, you can't go in." Zhuang Yan said with a bite.

Chen Mo took a look at Zhuang Yan: "Do you have a way to make Xinxin unharmed?"

"I went to talk to the gangsters, I sent things in." Zhuang Yan told the technician to contact Dong Quan, and after a minute, he put down the phone with a black face.

Chen Mo looked at Zhuang Yan's expression and already knew the answer. He walked over to the old factory.

"You can't go in."

Zhuang Yan indicated that two special policemen had stopped Chen Mo. There was already a person in it. If Chen Mo went in, the situation would be even worse. No one can guarantee that what will happen in the end.

Ignore the blocking of the two special police officers, Chen Mochao walked over the old factory.

"Mr. Chen, I hope that you will cooperate. If you rush in, it will only be more dangerous." Zhuang Yan stopped Chen Mo.

"Do you have a better way?"

Chen Mo’s calm voice made Zhuang Yan’s heart sink. In the current situation, if he wants to ensure the safety of the hostages, he does not have a good way to do so.

"Step aside."

"Sorry, Mr. Chen." Zhuang Yan said seriously, still blocking Chen Mo's way.

Chen Mo and Zhuang Yan looked at each other for a while, and took out a mobile phone and dialed a number: "Yao Shuji, you should pay attention to it and let them let me in."

"You want to see a gangster?" Yao Yi's dignified voice came from the phone. At the first time of the incident, he received a phone call. After all, it is related to Chen Mo, and he can not rush to the past, can only be anxious, through other people's reports to understand the situation.

"Do you have a better way?"

"Don't be impulsive, your safety..."

"It's your family, are you going to save?" Chen Mo interrupted.

The phone was quiet, Chen Mo was quiet, and the atmosphere on the court was a little stalemate. After a minute, the voice came from the other end of the line: "Do you have to go in?"

"Yes."

"Your safety..."

"My safety, I am responsible for it, don't let me in, I am hard, and everyone is not happy."

The phone was quiet again on both sides. After a long time, Yao Yi’s sigh came: “I think of a way, you wait. No matter what happens, your safety is the most important.”

Hanging up the phone, Chen Mo looked pale, looked at Zhuang Yan and continued to pay attention to the situation of the old factory.

Four people are surrounded by special police officers, no one dares to act rashly. The hostages inside are special, and if they have problems, they will have trouble.

Chen Mo did not speak, others were quiet and the atmosphere was dignified.

Zhuang Yan also thought about the countermeasures with a black face, but all the plans were rejected.

Hard to break the door, the other side is in a dead end, can not be killed in the first time, once the bomb inside is detonated, the situation will be more dangerous. Killing is also a dead end. The other party is professionally trained and the position is just right. To ensure the safety of the hostages, they are helpless.

"Captain, the city bureau calls."

The silence was broken. Zhuang Yan took the call and put it down after a while. He looked at Chen Mo deeply and gave him the bulletproof vest and bulletproof helmet: "After entering, make sure that you are safe. If you find it is wrong, we will act now. ""

Chen Mo took the headset that the technician handed over and said, "Don't worry, I am not that weak."

chapters.title: Chapter 452: : I Am Your Hostage
chapters.body:
Chapter 452: : I Am Your Hostage

In the old factory building, Dong Quan’s face is very unattractive. He did not expect that a small change caused the situation to go out of control and become what it is now.

It is now a dilemma.

If the plan is successful, he has left safely before the arrival of Binhai Police and Chen Mo. After hiding Zhang Xinxin, he can have a lot of maneuvering space, can get the technology he wants, and retreat.

But everything went against, and I had to come to this abandoned old factory.

The three caves of Rex Rabbit are the habits of his character.

This habit has made him get out of the dangers again and again. On the first day of coming to Binhai, he began to choose these places, just in case.

Inside, there are soil bombs, which are the earth bombs he bought for fireworks and firecrackers. Power is much smaller than TNT, but the number is enough, with some steel balls, it is very threatening.

When the other party is concerned about the safety of the hostages, it is certainly not daring to act rashly. This is his only card.

Fortunately, Chen Mo still cares about his sister.

Hey! !

The phone's rapid vibration interrupted his thoughts.

Seeing the caller ID, Dong Quan smiled coldly, narrow eyes, like a fox that smelled meat, licking his lips, scarlet like blood.

"I am coming, outside the door."

"You are very powerful, it seems that you love your sister very much." Dong Quan Yin Yang said strangely.

"Thank you for your compliment, don't let me in?"

"Come in, hold your hands up, you can't have a second person, there is a second person. I will let your sister eat a bullet first. If there is a third person, I will take two weapons. I will directly detonate the bomb. Now I am remotely in my hand. You should know, don't think I don't dare."

When the door is opened, Chen Mo slowly pushes the door open, and the action is not too big.

With his hands raised into the room, he saw Dong Quan hiding behind Xin Xin. I have to say that this person is more cautious than the old fox.

Chen Mo did not dare to have big moves, for fear of stimulating each other. Now that the other party has become a trapped beast, I can't guarantee that the other party will suddenly become crazy and make excessive things.

"close the door."

Chen Mo did not say anything, slowly reached out and closed the door, the action was like a leeches, his afterglow was observing the environmental conditions inside the house, and at the same time guarding the other party suddenly to him.

There are fourteen self-made earth bombs. If they are detonated, the people in the house will not be killed or seriously injured.

"What do I want?"

"On me, how do you want to give it to you?" Chen Mo asked.

"Take off the bulletproof vest." Dong Quan looked at Chen Mo, and if he determined that the other party was threatening, he would start the first time.

"Mr. Chen, don't listen to him..."

The sound of Zhuang Yan did not fall. Chen Mo had already taken off the earphones and slowly reached out to solve the bulletproof clothes. Zhang Xinxin, who was tied to his hands and feet and sealed his mouth, had burst into tears and kept shaking his head.

"All the pockets are taken out and placed on the table." Dong Quan stared at Chen Mo's trouser pocket.

"wallet."

Chen Moe took out his wallet and threw it on the table, and then took out an egg-sized thing and put it on the table.

"What is this?" Dong Quan instantly narrowed his eyes.

"Smart machine egg, I bring the toy decompression around." Chen Mo's finger slowly approached the machine egg, gently clicked on it.

Oh...

The robot egg was on the table, along the edge of the table, rolling back and forth like an egg, but did not fall down, without any threat, Dong Quan secretly sighed.

"anything else?"

"The hard drive that loads the data." Chen Moe took out a two-finger hard drive and placed it on the table: "There is the information you need, encrypted."

At the moment of seeing the hard disk, Dong Quan’s eyes skyrocketed and his face still hesitated: “There is a computer on the desk, the data is decrypted and sent to the address above.”

"Now the network has been blocked outside, do you think the information can be sent out?" Chen Mo said coldly.

"Other you don't care, as I said, there is a blank hard drive next to it, decrypt the copy and go in." Dong Quan took a look at Chen Mo's hard drive.

"First put my sister." Chen Mo said.

"If you want to save your sister, just do what I said." Dong Quan's face sank.

"How do I know, if you get the information, will you tear up the ticket? I am a hostage in the room, my sister is irrelevant. Put my sister, I am your hostage, give you information." Chen Mo said with a strong tone.

"Do you want to play tricks?"

"I am just a researcher with no strength in my hands. I have no weapons in my hands. I don't have bulletproof clothes on my body. You have a gun in your hand, and a bomb. What kind of tricks can I play? Put my sister, I am your hostage, Give you technical information. My sincerity has brought, at least I want to ensure the safety of my sister. My life is in your hands, what are you afraid of?" Chen Mo calmly, looking directly at Dong Quan, a pair of people , do not give the attitude of the information.

At this time, Dong Quan, his heart was in doubt, and he kept scanning back and forth on Chen Mo.

Chen Mo’s body is not strong and does not seem threatening. If Chen Mo is in his hands, the outside people are even less dare to act rashly. Zhang Xinxin does not seem to matter.

But he is suspicious, but he is still not at ease.

Chen Mo did not bother to disturb the other party, nor did he speak. The words have already been made clear, and then urged the other party, the other party may feel guilty.

The room was quiet, only Zhang Xinxin’s crying, and the sound of the smart machine egg rolling on the table.

“How is the situation inside?” Zhuang Yan was so serious that he leaned over and watched the video, which was taken by a pinhole camera that reached into the room. The room is deadlocked, and his heart is heavier.

"Sniper, can you find a chance to kill?"

"No. 1 is not available."

"No chance on the 2nd, the gangster is in a dead end."

The answer from the earphones made Zhuang Yan look black. Now I can only pray that Chen Mo in the room is fine, otherwise the responsibility of this accident can not afford anyone.

"Yes, I can put your sister first, but if you play tricks, I can't get anything, and I will immediately detonate the bomb and kill you first." Dong Quan's gun pointed at Chen Mo, and the gun head smashed: " Stand in the corner and hold your head under your arms."

Chen Mo went to the corner and looked at Zhang Xinxin, who was in tears. "After he unlocks you, don't do anything else, leave the room first."

"I heard no, after you unlocked you, don't do much. Otherwise I will kill you first, then kill your brother." Dong Quan coldly warned.

"Yeah." Zhang Xinxin nodded with tears.

Dong Quan pulled out a knife and cut off the rope under Zhang Xinxin's feet. His muzzle always reached Zhang Xinxin's body. Do everything well, Dong Quan took the remote control back to his hand, it seems that only this remote control can give him a sense of security.

"Go out." Dong Quan looked at Chen Mo coldly, and the remote control in his hand was always ready.

Zhang Xinxin’s hands were still tied, and Chen Mo was in tears, and he walked very slowly.

"Go out, I will be fine, he is not asking for my life."

When he heard Chen Mo’s unquestionable voice, Zhang Xinxin accelerated his pace and opened the door awkwardly.

Dong Quan’s muzzle is facing Chen Mo, his eyes are guarded with great care, and he is cautious to the extreme: “Now your sister has left, as I said, I get things, you leave safely, and it is good for everyone.”

"it is good."

Chen Mo slowly stood up and walked to the computer in front of the desk.

chapters.title: Chapter 453: : Spoiler
chapters.body:
Chapter 453: : Spoiler

Dong Quan’s pistol was against Chen Mo’s back and was always on guard. A cautious personality is the key to his success and success.

He knew that if something went wrong, he would be dead.

When seeing Chen Mo open the password, Dong Quan’s eyes flashed: “Open the information to me.”

"I don't want to lie to you with fake technology. My life is worth more than these two technologies. The information cannot be sent. The official knows that your goal is technical information. Since I came in, the surrounding network signals have been cut off and blocked. It is impossible to send a file."

Chen Mo opened the information and felt the gun at the back. His attention was on the remote control of Dong Quan's left hand.

"Copy the data to your hard drive."

"Do you seem to have the confidence to escape from here?" Chen Mo inserted the empty hard drive next to the computer and began to copy.

"Less nonsense."

Chen Mo deliberately spoke to Dong Quan, his eyes inadvertently licking the machine eggs rolling back and forth on the table: "If you don't guess wrong, there should be a tunnel in the room to the outside world. This is your only way out. The golden eagle shelled. I can think of it, the outside people want it too, the police dogs are on standby in all directions."

Dong Quan's face changed slightly, and he quickly recovered his calmness. He saw the copy succeeded and rushed Chen Mo to the side. Put the remote control on the table, slide the mouse to check the data, the muzzle is always on the chest of Chen Mo, cautious to the extreme.

Seeing Dong Quan put the remote control in his hand, Chen Mo slowly took a step back and raised his hand and clicked on the watch.

Oh...

The egg on the table slowly rolled to the front of Dong Quan and fell to him. Then, the machine egg red light flashed, let him slightly stunned, and then his face changed greatly, subconsciously shake off the robot egg, shot in the direction of Chen Mo.

It’s just that Chen Mo has been holding his head and rushing toward the door, the speed is fast, never seen before.

He is sure that Chen Mo's speed and explosiveness are definitely more terrifying than trained professionals. Two shots fell, and the reaction was too late. The red light of the robot egg at the foot is rapidly magnified in his pupil.

The threat of death was so full that Dong Quan couldn’t think of other things and quickly flew to the side. What made him desperate was that the robot egg quickly rolled to his side with his flying flutter, and the flashing red light seemed to be a mockery of him.

It’s over.

This is his last thought, the desperate look with relief, the fire mixed with the shock wave drowning him until the consciousness falls into the dark.

boom!

The sound of the explosion shook the country.

**********

“Zhao Min, Director of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group and Director and President of the Army Ant Group, announced that the world’s first controlled nuclear power plant was started in South China.”

“Hua Ming Nuclear Power Group General Manager Yang Mingwei announced in Gansu Province that the No. 2 controlled nuclear fusion nuclear power plant project will start. Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group will build two controlled nuclear fusion power stations at the same time.”

Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group suddenly announced that two controlled nuclear fusion power stations were started at the same time, and the news quickly spread around the world, causing a sensation. Affected by the news, global coal prices fell sharply, refreshing historical lows, causing stock market turmoil.

The marching ants announced the news in an unprecedented high-profile, as if they were malicious and disgusting people in the marching ant group, which made everyone unexpected, and suddenly announced plans to disrupt many countries.

Only after the Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group announced the signing of the agreement with the government, it is now running, and the speed is beyond imagination. On a global scale, the awareness of the efficient decision-making and execution of the marching ant group has once again been refreshed.

The decisive command, efficient and fast execution efficiency, the marching ant group is like a nest of active marching ants, full of infinite enthusiasm and aggressiveness.

The company is as its name suggests.

The sudden news of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group has made the atmosphere of the global game more dignified. This means that their speed of response is still not in the decision of the army ant group.

Controlled nuclear fusion technology emerged and the impact on the economy slowly emerged. The leaders of the world’s first echelon of the world are extremely heavy.

A marching ant group has stirred up the world economic situation, unexpectedly, and many people have caught off guard. The marching ant group once again attracted global attention, and the company's name also appeared on the desk of the leaders of various countries.
