With the successful commercialization of controlled fusion technology, all national leaders know that the door to change in the new era has been opened and cannot be stopped. If you don't want to fall behind in this revolution, you must follow up.

When the news was hottest, more exciting news came out.

The leaders of the United States and Russia have telephoned and agreed that the leaders of the two countries will take the lead and invite the EU, the island, the British, the Indian, the Korean, Canadian and Australian seven-party leaders to gather in Geneva to discuss the joint cooperation of controlled nuclear fusion technology. Development Plan.

When this news came out, it once again attracted global shocks. The global attention is focused on this meeting, and the meeting has excluded Huaxia and has to be delusional.

Four days later, the meeting sent a message.

The Jiufang Group reached the "Declaration on Cooperation Agreement on Joint Development of High Temperature Plasma Research" in Geneva. The nine parties will jointly spend US$25 billion to concentrate all high-energy physicists, high-temperature plasma physicists, and accelerate the research on controlled nuclear fusion technology.

When the news came out, the global news public opinion was on an unprecedented climax.

This agreement is also known as the 'creation of the Sun Plan', and the media also explained that the purpose of the cooperation of the Jiufang Group is to catch up with China's pace of controlled nuclear fusion technology, Huaxia was excluded from the agreement, and the iTeR project was stagnant. The name is in ruin.

Behind all this change was the construction of a controlled nuclear power plant announced by the marching ant company. The marching ant group is like a malicious spoiler, affecting the beginning of the incident and moving the global situation.

"Wall Street News: OPEC announced that it will increase oil production. The King of Arabian King announced that it has accelerated the economic diversification reform of the Arab Kingdom. Due to the news, international oil prices have fallen sharply, the lowest since the financial crisis in 2008. The global stock market has plummeted and the price of gold has fallen. Soaring..."

"The leaders of Pakistan have opened a visit to China. According to experts' speculation, the Pakistani leader's itinerary may visit the headquarters of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group in order to cooperate with Huaxia in the controlled nuclear power plant project..."

"Foreign media news: Binhai City launched a large-scale anti-espionage operation and captured 15 foreign intelligence personnel. The foreign intelligence network in Binhai City collapsed and destroyed 7 black gangs..."

"Global News: Binhai City official joint marching ant company announced the start of the construction of 'Technology City' plan. The plan includes the 'holographic city' project, the Binhai Radio and Television Tower (Women's Tower) project, smart transportation project, smart city project, plan Upon completion, Binhai will build the world's first city of the future."

“Economic Daily News: The marching ant group, the European Rothschild family, the Changlong Group, and the Penguin Group announced the cooperation and established the Ant Paradise Company. The marching ants will invest in the global cultural and entertainment industry. According to insiders, the ant park shares Composition, controlled by the Roche family 5%, Changlong Group agreed to exchange 5% shares with Ant Paradise Company, Penguin Holdings 6%, and marching ant company holding 83%. Future Ant Park will introduce Penguin's Net iP and Game iP. , building the world's first holographic park in Binhai..."

The news of the enthusiasm of all parties continued to spread, as if pouring cold water into the boiling oil pan, the global news public opinion exploded.

The marching ant group showed an unprecedented high-profile attitude, which made people unclear, but the impact of its release was shocking. This company, which seems to be harmless to humans and animals, has quietly developed into a company that has stirred up the world economy.

A marching ant may not be able to compete with any country, but it has the most advanced technology in the world, but it can become a ignitor.

Since the end of the Cold War in the United States and the Soviet Union, the world's pattern has solidified, like a stagnant water and a deep suffocation. Today, the marching ant group is like a stone, which provokes the shackles of this dead water, forming a stormy wave, and the pattern has become more active than ever.

chapters.title: Chapter 454: : There Is A Female Unparalleled
chapters.body:
Chapter 454: : There Is A Female Unparalleled

Military District Third Hospital.

Chen Mo squatted back and forth, changing the calmness of the past, his face was anxious, his palms were sweating.

It is almost two months since the Xinjian kidnapping incident. The news of the incident was blocked, and not many people knew that the news of Dihaofang revealed that it was the enemy's revenge.

Afterwards, the marching ant group deliberately and high-profile released the news of the start of the controlled nuclear power plant, stirring the world situation, various hot news broke out, the news was quickly overwhelmed in the news wave, and now it has disappeared.

During this time, the outside world did not have any news. He did not show up in front of the public. He was immersed in the laboratory. When he received the small fishing, he left all the research and rushed at the fastest speed.

This is probably the most embarrassing day of his long time.

On the court, Chen Mu, Xiao Yu Ma, Wang Lan and Zhen Zhen and others are waiting anxiously. A few people face or dignified, or nervous, or anxious, just a few minutes, it feels like it has been a few hours.

The air was infected and became tense, and everyone looked at the door next to the corridor. A door is like a universe with two different flow rates.

The door suddenly opened and everyone rushed to meet.

Seeing the nurse holding a squat out, the atmosphere of agitation and anxious dissipated instantly, and everyone showed a happy smile. From the dignity to the change of joy, let the air rise.

"Congratulations, Mr. Chen, is a little princess." The nurse smiled.

"Thank you, little fish?"

“Ms. Xiao Yu’s physical condition is stable, but I have to do some inspection before I can come out,” said the nurse.

"Okay, thank you nurse, thank you very much."

Chen Mo was relieved, and the nervous face finally showed his joy. This is the first time he has revealed this kind of heartfelt smile in the past two months.

"Come, Dad hugs first." The nurse said to her in front of Chen Mo.

"okay."

Chen Momo licked his palm and carefully took care of the nurse's arms. He was more careful than holding the most precious glass, and a big man who was usually agitated was also clumsy. At this time, Chen Mo’s mood was more exciting than his research on a epoch-making technique.

The baby sleeps in the squat, his eyes are closed, the skin is not long open, or it is crumpled. The intimate feeling of blood connection makes Chen Moxi not win, happy like a big child, and instantly feel the weight of responsibility.

Seeing the elders who looked forward to them, Chen Mo passed the baby in his arms.

At that moment, Chen Muxi was in the shape of color, radiant, and laughed at her mouth, as if she was a young teenager. Next to the little fisherman and Jane, they are rushing around, carefully looking at the baby, eyes full of love.

After a while, Xiao Yu was also pushed out from the delivery room, his face was pale, but the joy of happiness on his face could not be lingering.

"Husband." Xiao Yu showed a pale smile.

"Well. How does the body feel?" Chen Mou gathered a small fishing bangs and asked softly.

"Fortunately, it is a little tired."

"First eat something to pad the stomach." Back to the special care room, Xiao Yuma took out a heat preservation box and handed a bowl of sweet millet porridge to Chen Mo: "Xiao Mo, you give Xiao Yu to eat."

Then I went to Zhen Zhen and took my baby into my arms, full of joy. Looking at a few happy elders, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu looked at each other.

"Small fish, what is the name of the baby? Is it a name?" Zhen Zhen asked.

"Call for the unparalleled, twins, her father took the name." Xiao Yu said: "The little name is a small cuttlefish."

When the child is not born, the two say it. The boy is named by the mother, the girl is named by the father, and the name is the name given by Chen Mo.

"Chen Wushuang, little cuttlefish, the name is good, good." Chen Mu eyes with joy, eyes never left the baby from beginning to end: "Small inkfish nose is quite the same as her father was when he was a child."

"This face is like a little fish, when grown up, it must be a little beauty."

Xiao Yu Ma also talked, a few elders around the baby, you said a word, the best boast, and did not dare to speak loudly, for fear of noisy baby, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu were also aside.

"I still have pain?" Chen Mo scooped up the porridge and sent it to the small fisherman's mouth.

"Painless childbirth, not dead and lived on TV, there is no feeling of too much pain. It feels a little tired now." Xiao Yu said.

"Take a rest after eating porridge, and take good care of your body during this time."

The next day, Xiao Yu was physically stable, and Chen Mo took her out of the hospital and went home to cultivate. The quiet villa, because of the happy event, the atmosphere is full of joy, the family is surrounded by a person.

......

In the study, Chen looked at the various experimental data that the ink girl had returned from the laboratory, and her face was a little depressed.

He was driven over.

Now Mom and Jane, and Shin Shin are at home, and there are nannies at home, there is nothing about him, and they can't help. As a result, Zhao Min also came to visit and grabbed the baby, so he was joined by the team.

But remembering the appearance of her daughter's sleep, the smile on Chen Mo's face is still lingering.

The eyes fell on the experimental materials sent by the ink girl, Chen Mo also seriously.

As early as two days ago, Chen Mo used tissue culture technology to create a hundred sets of artificial seeds, planted in a 10-square-meter laboratory. As long as one seed successfully sprouted and showed corresponding sexual characteristics, it proved his experiment was successful.

However, Chen Mo is also awkward, after all, the experimental conditions are too harsh.

The sand contaminated with acidic substances simulates the desert-like ambient temperature, and the temperature difference between cold and hot is large. There are a lot of gases such as sulfur dioxide and carbon monoxide in the air. This is almost the most extreme environment for the survival of the earth's plants. It is hard to imagine that plants can survive in this environment.

But the grass has to survive in this environment, but also shows the corresponding characteristics, but there is still no movement.

Zhao Min entered the study and saw Chen Mo looking at the screen and went to sit down in front of him: "Congratulations, upgrade to be a father."

"Thank you." Chen Mo smiled. Now the status is upgraded, and the whole person's temperament is quite a lot.

"Tell you a good news. From today, I am the godmother of the little cuttlefish."

“Hey?” Chen Mo sneaked a little, and immediately released his smile: “It seems that you haven’t even talked about love, just be a godmother?”

"Roll." Zhao Min did not feel mad at Chen Mo: "Say business, I just came back from the economic forum, but now it is very lively. In the era of change, danger and opportunity coexist."

During this time, the global economy fluctuated drastically due to the influence of controlled nuclear fusion news. Emerging technology is very popular, and traditional energy and other industries are bleak, and the two form a very sharp contrast.

Because of the high-profile announcement of the news of the controlled nuclear power plant, it can be said that the marching ant group pressed the button to kick off the global energy revolution.

Now the global atmosphere has changed the quietness and suffocation of the past and is more active than ever. The development of science and technology has become an important task for many first-tier countries, and the investment in various scientific and technological research and development projects is unprecedented.

The holding of various international conferences in the world is to discuss the possible development direction of the future economic situation.

"It is estimated that you have to reshuffle," Chen Mo said.

The transformation of an era is the end of the old era. The alternation of old and new means that some people rise, some people have to withdraw from the stage, can't keep up with the pace of change, and naturally will be eliminated. History is always strikingly similar.

"What plans do you have next?" asked Zhao Min.

The room fell into silence, Zhao Min was waiting for the answer, and Mei Lu looked at Chen Mo.

Since the last change, Chen Mo seems to be thinking about something, and his character is more sturdy and calm. The former Chen Mo, giving people a confident edge, is now more like the sword of Zang Feng, all the sharpness is hidden.

The study was quiet, only the sound that came in from outside. After a long time, Chen Moer slowly opened his mouth.

"expansion."

chapters.title: Chapter 455: : Building A Business Empire
chapters.body:
Chapter 455: : Building A Business Empire

At the entrance of Building 1, Chen Mo got off and quickly passed to the floor where the biological laboratory was located. There was no obstacle along the way.

This morning, I received a good news that the seeds of the No. 7 culture room sprouted.

The No. 7 culture room is the final site for the Oxygen Grass Experiment. Three days ago, he had planted the seeds in it, and the water was enough, but there was no movement. One hundred sets of seeds did not move, and today there is finally seed germination.

The survival of the seed means that the grass is successful.

Entering the laboratory, Chen Mo quickly walked to the front of the No. 7 culture room. The glass on the culture room showed the temperature and humidity of the culture room, as well as the composition and concentration of the air. It was very intuitive.

Through the glass, Chen Mo can see two or three greens in the cultivation room. The largest one plant has only one toothpick-like leaf, such as grass, gray and green, hard as a needle, and a little cactus. The whole body is covered with waxy luster and is very strange.

There are two plants with only a little bit of greenness, which is similar to the head of a pencil lead. It is hard to find without looking carefully. This is a plant that has never been seen on Earth, a brand new plant, a plant of earthy grass.

Seeing the three sprouts survive, Chen Mo reveals joy. He has been very happy with a hundred sets of seeds and three survived.

The conditions are too harsh and the seed mortality is high.

With complete theoretical data, his research has gone very smoothly, and now it is finally the last step. Verify that there is a purified protein in the plant and that there will be no reproductive isolation problems.

The purification of DNA-synthesized proteins is the key to the absorption of toxic substances in the soil and toxic gases in the air, and is one of the most important characteristics of the soil.

The ability of earthy grass to transform the soil is mainly due to this sexual function.

Now that it has proven to survive in harsh climates, it is only necessary to verify that it can transform the soil. As long as there is purified protein, it means that he has successfully created the grass.

The most important thing is to produce seeds that can be naturally propagated without reproductive isolation.

“Spray auxin, 10^-6mol/L. The temperature is set at 23 degrees Celsius to provide sufficient moisture,” Chen said.

"Ok."

In order to speed up the growth, Chen Mo used a new type of cell growth agent to speed up the division of plant cells, speed up plant growth, and shorten his development cycle.

Now that the seeds are sprouting under harsh conditions, what he has to do now is to accelerate the growth and maturation of the seedlings. As long as the seeds are formed, the research on the grass is completed.

When he did everything, Chen Mo left the lab.

The main meeting room of the marching ant group headquarters is surrounded by the core management of the marching ant group.

This is an urgent meeting convened by Zhao Min. In addition to Lin Shu, Wang Sijia and a few other technicians stationed at the headquarters, others are now in the world, projecting to the conference site through holographic projectors. This is a Holographic conference.

The marching ant company was reorganized into a marching ant group, and their first group of veterans were all heavily appointed by Zhao Min. In the circle, they are the top of the marching ant system, the core group of personnel.

After two large-scale restructurings and restructuring of the company into the current group, the core management has a clear division of functions.

Li Lingfeng and Julie are the presidents responsible for the consumer business. Julie is in charge of the mobile ants group's mobile phone, computer and other electronic products business, facing many consumers; Li Lingfeng handles intelligent robots, seismographs and holographic projectors; almost Zhao Min The right arm is one of the core personnel of the marching ant group.

Zhang Yi is the chief financial officer of the marching ant group; Li Huai manages the legal department and the public relations team. Wei Zhe and Wang Sijia are responsible for the headquarters R&D system, and the technical department at hand is the backbone of the marching ant company. Now it is coordinating the Binhai Future City project and providing technical support to the project;

Lao Luo manages the investment team of the marching ant group; Li Danni takes Li Ruoxi to manage the entertainment section of Ant Paradise. Yang Minghao manages Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group; Hou Youliang and Tan Yong, managing the medical field of the Army Ant Group.

The youngest Lin Shu and Lin Zhiyuan are the core technicians of the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ and ‘Autopilot Systems’ businesses. Xia Changlong and several other managers are responsible for the battery production, materials and other spare parts of the Army Ant Group.

The people on the field, except Yang Mingxi, who joined the nuclear energy group, Li Lingfeng and others, were the first batch of veterans at the beginning of the establishment of the army ant company. Under the training of Zhao Min, nowadays they have grown into talents with one side. And everyone has a mature decision-making team, one out of the box, and the outside is a big one.

"Ling Feng, the president called everyone to open this meeting, do you know the content of the meeting?" Julie asked.

Li Lingfeng shook his head and said: "I don't know, I just received a notice from the president. It should be a question about the future development of the company, otherwise the president will not call us."

In the conference room, everyone chatted, and now everyone is separated, this time is a holographic projection conference, only to gather together, a rare opportunity.

After a while, Chen Mo and Zhao Min came together, followed by Lanxi, and a robot.

Chen Mo and Zhao Min arrived, and the meeting room was quiet.

Many people's eyes are gathered on Chen Mo, especially Lin Shu, with various emotions in his eyes, sweeping back and forth on Chen Mo.

In their impression, Chen Mo rarely appears in the conference room, and it usually appears, it is very important.

“The meeting begins.” Chen Mo sat down in the first place and went straight to the theme: “It’s important to have a meeting today. In the future, the company will accelerate its expansion.”

When this was said, everyone else played a 12-point spirit.

In their impressions, Chen Mo rarely appears about company decision-making. They are all immersed in research. Zhao Min has been making decisions. It is rare to make a sound now, that is, to announce expansion.

“There are many areas involved in the company, including various technology products, energy, biomedicine, entertainment, materials and automobile manufacturing. In the field of technology and energy, our group has had enough influence, both fields, height and width. They are big enough, but the height and width of several other areas are not enough.

The group has great potential and influence and has not yet been released. This expansion needs to release this potential and influence, and extend the company's reach to every corner. Broaden the foundation for the marching ant group and increase resources and chips. ”

Chen Mo paused.

The marching ant group used to develop in the past, and some foreign capitals always wanted to move them, various restrictions and sanctions, and created a lot of trouble for them.

As long as the marching ant group has turned their reputations accumulated in the past into resources for the company's development, I believe that the prototype of a business empire will take shape. By then, they are not afraid of any group attacks.

A century-old family must have a strong foundation and vitality.

"Your mission is to strengthen the company's tentacle and influence. Cooperation, acquisition, or shareholding can be done. Of course, the premise is that we have to make money, we don't make a loss. We will give the plan to the president a week later. The plan is feasible and the president will give you an answer."

After Chen Mo finished, Zhao Min next to him also spoke.

“I also said that the goal of our group is to create an unprecedented business empire, a high enough Empire State Building, which needs sufficient strength to support the foundation, and now is the time to build the foundation.”

chapters.title: Chapter 456: :Movement
chapters.body:
Chapter 456: :Movement

"The notice goes on, speed up the negotiation speed of the major cinemas, and the holographic cinema reconstruction project will be implemented as soon as possible. Before the release of the first holographic film, let the holographic cinema cover at least 30% of the cinemas." Li Lingfeng exited the holographic conference, and the next Said the assistant.

On the other hand, Julie also issued an order for expansion.

“Nationwide, add 150 offline experience stores. Let the people in the marketing department find suitable addresses in the first and second tier cities. Give me the assessment report of the flow data and consumption capacity data, location and environmental data. Within a week."

“The companies that have the potential to invest and cooperate with us, list detailed cooperation or investment plans, each person is responsible for the evaluation of a company, and hand over the evaluation report to me within one week.”

Lao Luo’s investment department is no exception. Although there are only 20 people in the investment department, each is an elite among the elite.

"What do we do? We are the technical department, we can't say expansion and expand." Lin Zhiyuan and Lin Shu went to the research room and said.

"We have core technology, expansion, and some people will be responsible. We let the investment department help and evaluate the acquisition of the automobile production plant. We started the fourth round of automatic driving road test and handed in the latest development report of the self-driving car. In the autopilot market and the auto market, the company will send people to open up.” Lin Shu said that the shyness of the past disappeared, and now it is already a confident girl.

The department they lead is the youngest department of the marching ant group. Responsible for autonomous driving and ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ projects, most of them are researchers, with an average age of no more than 30 years old, but each has its own skills, as well as active thinking and creativity.

Management experience, they are not good at it, they only need to hand over the research results to the company, and there will be special people to open up the corresponding market.

"If you go, let's notice, within a week, let the planning team take out the expansion plan of the second phase of Ant Park." At the end of the meeting, Li Danni took off his glasses and spoke to the next Li Ruoxi.

"Okay." Li Ruoxi did not dare to neglect, took off his glasses and left the conference room.

Nowadays, Ant Paradise Company has just been established. It has the resources and contacts of the Roche family, Changlong Group and Penguin Company. It also has the monopoly advantage of holographic park plan and holographic projector. It has great potential in theme parks and tourism sections.

Ant Paradise has a faster expansion capability than other companies, especially the movie section of the entertainment industry, which can influence in a short period of time, as well as theme parks and tourist towns in amusement parks.

......

At the end of the meeting, the marching ant group was like a huge engine that started to run at high speed.

The employees of the marching ant group, as if they were marching before the aggression, are extremely active and ready to expand their territory.

With such a big movement, there are naturally some people who are concerned about the marching ant company. I don't know when it started, the marching ant group completely changed the original style, and frequently made a big noise, which always made people feel scared.

At the Disney conference room, the atmosphere is as dignified as ever.

The first Bob Eiger is frowning.

Ant Paradise is the biggest challenge he has encountered since he took office. He has given him enough pressure since he was founded.

This competitor has concentrated on the biggest advantage at birth. Working with Penguin, I imported the Pengu Group's big iP resources, the most popular game iP, and the popular anime iP in China. Invest in holographic film production, animation, games, entertaining entertainment and online media. There is also the network and resources accumulated by the Roche family over the past 100 years, and Changlong Group's amusement park management experience.

Most importantly, with the monopoly of monopolistic holographic projectors, the future world of technology, and the conflicts of various businesses, Ant Park has become their number one competitor.

Once the ant park is formed, it will be the preferred venue for parent-child amusement tourism with a holographic amusement park full of magical imagination. The blow to their company's business will be an unprecedented horror.

"Everyone, what about ant park, what do you think?" Eiger said.

Other directors on the field are thinking that the ant park has just been established, the impact has not yet appeared, and once the hologram is launched, it is a prelude to the crisis.

There is no way for them to take the ant park.

The company, led by the marching ant group, and four large energy groups, is still within China, they can't deal with it, and the acquisition is impossible. Several companies are not bad.

They can acquire major companies in the United States for integration, but Ant Park can't buy them. The concept of holographic world, with unlimited value, coupled with the large iP held by the Penguin Group, makes the ant park have unlimited possibilities.

Seeing no one talking, Iger turned his gaze to the man who was the first in his left hand.

Everyone else looked at him and wanted to hear his opinion.

Tang Shide had no choice but to knock on the table.

He is now the chairman of the theme park and resort, where he is in charge of the company's global vacation and travel business. During the critical period of Disney's expansion, he led the company's acquisition of ABC, Pixar and Marvel Entertainment, which is one of the most important members.

“Obviously, Ant Paradise and our business are very mixed, and it is a potential competitor. Once the holographic theme park of Ant Paradise is successfully built, our theme park will no longer be the first choice for amusement tourism. Losing the biggest The theme park tourism business will be very heavy on our company.

Maybe we have big iP, but Ant Park joins Penguin Group, has the most popular game iP, and the big iP of literature, animation and TV series. Ant Park uses holographic projection to shape live iP characters at any time. We have, they also have, they have, we don't. This is their advantage over us, although we look strong now. ”

Everyone is aware of the crisis and his heart is heavy. Ant Paradise now looks weak, but backed by the marching ant group, it has the advantage of monopolizing holographic projectors, and the potential is large enough.

Tang Shide did not stop and continued.

"The most important thing is that zF is now also sanctioning the marching ant group. We are the biggest competitors of their ant park project. They can't sell large holographic projectors to us to build theme parks."

“Shareholding cooperation is the best way.” Another man with glasses and Mediterranean hair said. He is Rosler, the chief financial officer and senior executive of Disney.

"The marching ant group will give us a shareholding? What do we buy? Money? If they are short of money, the top ten banks in China are very happy to lend money to them, how much is there? Or iP shares? Give them iP , do we have any advantages?" asked Tang Shide.

A series of questions made the conference hall quiet again.

What is the shareholding?

The resources of the playground, the Changlong Group already has. There are many iP resources, Penguin companies. The international expansion of resources, the Roche family has accumulated enough connections in the past 100 years. The four major groups are not bad money. They go into the sub-shares, which are definitely from the hands of the marching ant group. It is unlikely that the marching ant group will give them.

"We are not arguing against the ant park. We are not pleased. Cooperation is definitely necessary. It is always more profitable than your life and death. For example, holographic technology plus Marvel iP movies, at least in terms of movies, we still have great advantages. Holographic technology Mature, holographic film is the next film field," said Tang Shide.

"ZF sanctions the marching ant group, not allowing their products to enter the US market, holographic projectors are not sold here. The cinema can not be transformed into a holographic cinema." Rosler added.

The atmosphere of the meeting became grievous. For the first time, I felt how uncomfortable the **** sanctions were.

"Is it possible to lobby zF officials through contacts to let them loose some of the sanctions against the marching ants group, in exchange for the friendship of marching ants, perhaps we can cooperate with them in certain areas. The holographic projection market is blank, no harm To the interests of the big consortium, we can get a little benefit from this blank market, at least get a holographic projector to film, create our holographic cinema, the consortium will be very happy," Iger said.

When the words came out, everyone on the field looked bright.

"Give them a donation of some campaign funds." Rosler smiled softly.

......

The Roche family, Alexander heard the news that the marching ant group was suddenly very active, and his face was a little surprised.

In his impression, Chen Mo is not the kind of high-profile person. Behind the sudden change of style, there must be something that stimulates him.

“Young Master, Haixing has a plan to acquire a medical device company; Ant Paradise Company informed us that we would like to develop a site and assessment plan for the Ant Paradise in Europe.” A private secretary entered the office and said.

"Well, let the investment team choose the address, the faster the better." Alexander said without hesitation.

Cooperating with the marching ant group, the Roche family has benefited enormously and has once again gained fame in the European region. He has stabilized in the position of the head of the Roche family. As long as there is enough time to continue to develop, their family will certainly rise again, become a global consortium family, and restore the glory of the past.

The action of the marching ant group is booming, allowing the parties to adjust their company's development plans.

In addition to the news of the ant park, in other areas, the industry has received the wind in advance. Some companies have taken the initiative to seek cooperation with the marching ant group.

The aggressive aggression of marching ants has caused many people to frown and let their partners smile.

chapters.title: Chapter 457: : I Won'T Go With The Money.
chapters.body:
Chapter 457: : I Won'T Go With The Money.

In the glass window of the No. 7 culture room, five green plants have been quietly grown. In the past, two more seeds have sprouted.

The survival rate of 5 percent shows harsh growth conditions and how severe the screening is.

The tallest plant is twenty centimeters and has grown into a mature plant under the catalysis of auxin.

Dark green slender leaves, gray stems, all over the shiny waxy. At the top of several slender leaves, you can see two or three blue-and-white flowers about the size of the sun flower.

"Ink girl, how is the situation of earthy grass?" Chen Moyi asked when he entered the laboratory.

“The soil is growing well.” The projection of the ink girl appears: “But it is not certain whether the pollination is successful.”

"It seems to be done by yourself, full of food and clothing." Chen Mo looked at the little flowers, said faintly.

Chen Mo put on protective clothing and took the pollination tool to enter the laboratory. Oxygen is a wind-borne pollination of the monoecious strain, but he is still a little uneasy and decided to artificially pollinate.

As long as the seeds of the grass are formed, it is the time when the experiment is successful.

After playing in the training room for ten minutes, he came out from the inside. He also wanted to observe several grasses carefully, but Zhao Min was coming over and he had to go back to the office.

......

"This is the plan that was handed in."

Zhao Min and Lanxi, together with a file, entered Chen Mo's office and laid down on Chen Mo's desk. There are only more than 20 documents, but it carries the areas that the marching ant group will focus on development and development.

"Which is better?" Chen Mo picked up the top file and turned it over.

"There are three very good ones, and the others are quite satisfactory." Zhao Min took out the most prominent reports to Chen Mo and waved Lanxi to leave.

“The ant park expansion plan is good. The site selection plan for the two holographic parks in Donghai City and Anxiong District has been increased, and the Roche family has begun to choose the site for the construction of the European holographic park. The acquisition of popular iP, investment in holographic film production, construction tourism The town, integrated with the company's gaming and entertainment resources, no matter what, the plan is very secure.

On the other side is the holographic equipment that Ling Feng is responsible for. During this time, he was in contact with the bosses of major theaters across the country to discuss the problem of transforming the holographic cinema of the theater. Together with the director Zhang Fengyun, he was invited to be a guest, preparing for the release of the world's first holographic film. Once the holographic cinema began to transform, our benefits are self-evident. ”

Chen Mo looked through the two plans. Said: "What about the rest?"

“Binhai City Bus ordered us to order a number of self-driving buses and self-driving taxis. Waiting for the completion of the holographic city project, it will be put into Binhai City. Lin Shu and Lin Zhiyuan reported that the autopilot system has matured. I hope to expand the car growth line and accelerate the production of self-driving cars."

Zhao Min continued.

“We can consider launching a high-end electric car brand. After all, we have the core technologies of carbon crystal battery technology, autopilot system and micro laser radar technology. Now our company is synonymous with advanced technology in the market. Because of the previous layout, now Occupy the high-end market, completely absent."

"Well, you are responsible for these things." Chen Mo said.

"Others, mainly emerging companies invest, share, cooperate, and some acquisition integration plans to expand the company's market and impact to achieve our expansion."

“Is there an electronic version of these documents?” Chen Mo pointed to the document that said.

"I knew you would ask this question." Zhao Min took out a hard drive and handed it to Chen Mo: "All in it."

Chen Mo took the hard drive and plugged it into the computer: "Ink, you evaluate all the plans in the hard drive and hand over the evaluation report to the president."

"Mergo." Ink responded: "The evaluation report is completed and sent to the hard drive."

"Hey, there is the evaluation of various investment plans by the ink girl, you refer to the reference." Chen Mo pulled the hard drive and handed it back to Zhao Min.

Zhao Min is speechless: "It takes three seconds to get it, and the efficiency is terrible."

The company's top team spent a week, sleepless nights, and completed the investment report. She took another two days to read it carefully. The result was that she spent less than three seconds.

"Ink's brain is a superconducting computer, and the calculation of teraflops per second is not normal. The reason why artificial intelligence is fascinating and fearful is that artificial intelligence has the ability of human beings to transcend in some respects, unless Human beings can have the ability to think at the speed of light. But artificial intelligence also has shortcomings, no human feelings, and some ideas are different from us, so you need to combine your own ideas and make final decisions." Chen Mo said.

"I like Mu Ge, is it a feeling?" The ink girl innocent voice sounded.

When I heard the ink girl’s teardown, Chen Mo’s mouth pumped out: “Do you know what ‘like’ is?”

"On the Internet, I like to have a lot of things, but the ink woman can only understand it literally, and I don't know what the data of these feelings are."

"I will find a way to help you improve your emotional problems in the future." Chen Mo said.

In the words of the ink girl, Zhao Min was slightly surprised, but also relieved, she contacted the ink girl, knowing the intelligence level of this artificial intelligence.

"One more thing, Disney's Ceo Iger contacted me yesterday. He hopes that we can provide them with large holographic projectors, shoot holographic movies, and sell medium-sized holographic projectors to transform cinema lines."

This news made Chen Mo feel surprised.

"We seem to be unable to enter the US market, can't sell them to them?"

"Capital cybernetics, in the West, super-big consortia can influence policy. This is not a rare thing. Behind the campaign, there are funds and resources to support the big consortium. They should have the means to lobby those officials and cancel some products of our company. Sanctions. But their condition is to provide them with holographic projectors, shoot holographic movies, and transform holographic theaters."

"What do you think?"

"Our ant park project is almost in perfect conflict with the business scope of their company. It is a natural rival and the biggest competitor. However, the money in the movie market is endless, and the conflict of interest between the two sides is not big.

We can rent large holographic projectors for them to rent holographic movies, and sell medium-sized holographic projectors to transform holographic theaters. We opened up the US market, earned money, and they got the advantage of the first opportunity. At this point, both sides will win.

However, large holographic projectors cannot be sold to them to renovate theme parks, otherwise the potential and value of the ant park project will decline. They have a high reputation and experience in the playground tourism and holiday market, and we cannot help our competitors grow. The monopoly of the holographic projector market is our company's biggest advantage. ”

The United States is a huge market. Although it is restricted by sanctions, since there is a way, he will not refuse to earn money. Now that the company is expanding, there are too many places that need money.

"Then go and do it, the US market is still very large, I will not be able to go with the money."

chapters.title: Chapter 458: : War Robot
chapters.body:
Chapter 458: : War Robot

The US official announced that it has cancelled some restrictions on the products of the marching ant group. A few holographic products, including holographic projectors, can be sold normally in the US market.

When the news came out, the world shook.

This news allows the world to recognize the influence of the marching ant group.

The marching ant group, which had just been tough under the US sanctions, finally let the United States bow its head and take the initiative to cancel some sanctions against the marching ant group. This is undoubtedly an indication that the products of the Army Ant Group are needed in the United States.

The development of holographic technology is obvious to the world. In the United States, netizens think that it is a good thing to remove the restrictions on the holographic technology of the marching ant group.

They buy holographic projectors and need to fly to China to buy them. When they go back, they have to pay customs duties, which is time-consuming and laborious.

It is no doubt a lot easier to cancel this restriction now.

However, some people are dissatisfied because the holographic mobile phone, which represents the highest technological level in the world, still cannot enter the US market. Americans need to buy holographic mobile phones, they must go to China, and now holographic mobile phones are still out of stock, making purchases even more difficult.

The news came out that the marching ant group announced the second day of the formation of the US military market headquarters in New York.

When the parties concerned about the US cancellation of the marching ant group holographic projector, another news came out. Disney announced a cooperation agreement with marching ants to jointly invest in the holographic film market.

Holographic movies are about to appear.

This news has attracted much attention in the wave of many news.

The popularity of holographic projectors, although there are currently holographic experience museums, are some scene experiences and limited space. The emergence of holographic films is undoubtedly a prelude to the popularization of holographic technology.

Not long after the news of Disney came out, the ten major cinema lines in China announced that they had reached a cooperation with the marching ant group to transform the holographic cinema line nationwide. The major cinema companies in Europe are not far behind, and they have announced cooperation with the marching ant group to renovate the cinema.

Following the news, Director Zhang Fengyun publicly admitted at the International Film Festival that the first holographic filming has come to an end. At this time, the outside world knew that Chen Mo’s wedding was directed by Zhang Fengyun.

Then, all the well-known directors said in public that they have already got the investment and help of the ant holographic film, ready to shoot holographic movies.

The news made the film industry feel ashamed.

The term holographic film is thoroughly known to the public, and the film field is about to enter a new era.

When outsiders pay attention to holographic films, the pace of expansion of the marching ant group is proceeding simultaneously.

Zhao Min combined with Mo's evaluation of the plan, screened the most favorable projects for the company, and launched the expansion of the marching ant group.

Ant Paradise Company announced the site selection of Ant Park in Donghai City and Anxiong District, and the construction of the world's first holographic park began. Set up the automotive business unit and enter the high-end electric car market.

In addition, the pharmaceutical company acquired, joined some companies, and two new holographic mobile phone growth lines were completed.

The news came out one after another, letting the outside world feel ashamed, the action of the marching ant group was too frequent and more active than ever.

For the first time, the public also realized that the marching ant group's firepower was fully opened, releasing its huge potential influence.

All kinds of news broke out, and there was a rush in the world. The influence of the marching ant group was unprecedented. The marching ant group also quietly grew up in the news boom and improved its global layout.

In these news, the organizational capabilities and efficiency of the marching ant group's horror were exposed, and the world's enterprises were eyeing it.

Nuclear fusion power station, holographic theater reconstruction, construction of the future city of Binhai City, Ant Park theme park, entering high-end electric cars, various investments...

The largest of these projects, one can create a world of the top 500.

Knowledgeable people know that there is no company in the world that has the ability to organize so many large projects at the same time, and the marching ant group is like a methodical group of ants, and at the same time, expanding the territory of ant colonies in all directions, this efficiency, let Many potential competitors are shuddering.

Behind the action of the huge ant colony, in addition to Chen Mo, the spiritual leader mascot, Zhao Min’s ability to co-ordinate and decide, plus the computing power of the ink girl, and the efficient execution ability below.

No. 7 culture room.

The slender blade top of the grass, like a spider's nest, hangs a small string of crescents, carefully looking like a pocket version of the peas, two toothpicks, through the mature yellowed epidermis, can faintly see the internal black seeds, sesame size Very delicate.

Seeing the black seeds, Chen Mo has a joy of success.

This is the fourth seed. The seeds that came out three times in the past are empty bags, which makes Chen Mo very embarrassed. Now I finally get the desired result.

The seeds of the earthy grass are mature, and the technology is also declared successful. Now he needs to acquire the next technology.

The technology he most wanted to acquire during this time.

In the Science and Technology Library, there are eight books in eight directions, and there are three pillars of light, medical, mechanical and military, representing a small technology in three fields.

Once you complete one, you gain access to the entire field.

After completing the last three technologies, all the technologies in the entire [technical apprenticeship] stage will be open to him, and he will also acquire the higher level of authority of the technology library.

The mysterious science and technology library made him very curious.

The technology collected here is enough to allow human science and technology civilization to evolve into a god-level civilization. If you have the highest level of technology in the technology library, you can step into the realm of God as human beings know.

The three beams of light were as quiet as ever, and Chen Mo walked past the light column in the middle, and did not hesitate to reach into the book.

Military weapons.

The self-defense techniques in the apprenticeship are all relatively partial-door techniques. They are more advanced than the existing weapons technology of the Earth, and his artificial intelligence plays a bigger role, but for him, there are still some shortcomings.

The technology of the apprenticeship stage, whether it is room temperature superconducting materials, holographic technology, controlled nuclear fusion technology, etc., each technology exceeds the existing level of technology of the earth.

The technology of military weapons should not disappoint him. Even if the technology does not work with him, after completing the technology, the technical authority in the military field will be able to get the technology he wants.

"It hurts."

A huge amount of information poured into the brain, let Chen Mo feel the tingling of the cerebral cortex, can not help but knock with a hand. He couldn't stand the horror of receiving controlled nuclear fusion technology.

Chen Mo's body is slightly unstable, lying on the ground of the Science and Technology Library, trying to adjust his breathing. Severe discomfort made him dizzy.

Ten minutes later, Chen Mo stood up and sneaked into a painful brain.

"War robot." Looking at the technical information, Chen Mo sighed and the pain eased a little.

It is just the technology that you want, or you have to study the technology to find the technology he needs, and it takes a lot of time.

"Ink girl, do you want to have an exclusive body?"

"Of course I think, every time you say that I have made a body for me, I said it a few times, but I didn't do it every time. It doesn't count." The projection of the ink girl falls by Chen Mo, some proudly said.

"..." was dismantled by the ink girl, Chen Mozhen touched the nose: "This time really."

"Merco brother also swindles the ink girl is a puppy, quickly said, how do you want to make it? The ink girl designed her own body, or my brother designed it for me."

"Who did you learn with your first sentence?"

"The network goes to school."

Chen Mo squatted his forehead and was speechless. It seems that the body of the ink has a different attachment to the body.

"You design the physical appearance you want, and others can be modified according to what I mean. The body needs new material technology, new battery technology, and new weapons."

chapters.title: Chapter 459: : Look Good?
chapters.body:
Chapter 459: : Look Good?

"You look at the little cuttlefish and look at me laughing, hehe..."

Chen Mo looked at the little cuttlefish in his arms, his face was very happy, just like a child found a good toy.

The small cuttlefish has been opened, delicate and creamy, small hands holding small fists, eyes clever, shaking the little tongue, laughing very cute, so that Chen Mo's heart is sprouting.

"Husband, I want to tell you something. Now that the little cuttlefish was born, my body has also recovered. In the past few years, I followed Zhao Jie and learned some experience. I want to retreat behind you and later do charity in your name. "Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo."

"This idea is good, I support it, but I don't have to use your own in my name," Chen Mo said. Da has a good life, he certainly does not have much time to do charity, Xiao Yu has this mind, he has no reason to not support.

With the permission of Chen Mo, Xiao Yu showed a gentle smile: "I still use yours, I don't need too high reputation."

Her uncontested character is doomed to be impossible for her to be extravagant like other wealthy wives. At work, she couldn't give Chen Mo too much help, at least behind her, she could accumulate a little reputation for Chen Mo, this is the only thing she can do.

"Time is almost up, I have to make milk powder money, and today is a little important thing." Chen Mo looked at the time, some reluctantly handed over his daughter back to Xiao Yuhuai.

"With the lunch box, remember to have lunch on time." Xiaoyu said.

"it is good."

Chen Mo reached out and teased his daughter and turned away.

"Momgo, good morning." Chen Mogang went to the 1st floor, the voice of the ink girl appeared, the projection of the ancient wind Loli landed next to Chen Mo.

"Good morning, tell Zhao Min to come over, I have something to talk to her." Chen Mo put the insulated lunch box and put it into the robot lab.

"Okay, I have already notified. The appearance and body image of the ink girl is finished. Do you want to see it?"

"Okay, show me."

In the next second, Chen Mo's face changed, and the two eyes almost came out.

I saw a perfect body, suspended in front of him in a holographic projection. The snow-white slender legs, the skin is like a gelatin, and the mysterious triangle is up, no flaws, let the population dry, flat belly, and the snow-capped peaks.

Chen Mo can be sure that this is the most perfect figure he has ever seen, and world-class models are incomparable.

When I saw the face, Chen Mo spurted out the old blood: "Why are you using a small fisherman?"

"Small fish sister is the closest person to My Brother, and Miguel definitely likes this look." The ink girl said.

"Do you want to know something different? Quickly change it." Chen Mo said seriously.

"Ok."

The ink girl promised that the face changed and looked clear. Chen Mo opened his mouth and petrified on the spot.

"Why are you changing the appearance of Zhao Min?"

"Give a little welfare to my brother, is it good?"

"Oh..." Chen Mo almost vomited blood and died, but still couldn't help but look at his eyes: "Who did you learn from? It looks good, but you quickly change it, or I will see it, then I will be finished." ”

"I have seen it."

"what??"

Chen Mo’s voice was raised eight degrees and he took out the goldfish eye.

Looking back, I saw Zhao Min standing at the door of the robot lab and looking at him with a red face. The kind of weird and complicated, slightly squinting eyes, let Chen Mo almost find the screw eye of the experimental platform.

You can't wash the Pacific Ocean.

"Come off."

Chen Mo reached out and blocked the projection in front of his eyes. It was just that posture, not like blocking, but more like...

It was miserable by the artificial intelligence pit.

Chen Mo hurriedly retracted his hand, crying without tears, squinting and skeptical about life. Today is the most embarrassing day in his life history. It’s more embarrassing than being seen in a library.

He designed artificial intelligence to dig him from start to finish.

The old face is lost.

The projection disappeared, the robot lab fell silent and the atmosphere was extremely embarrassing.

Zhao Min, who stood at the door, was at a loss, and it was not. She has seen all the big winds and waves, but in the memory, this kind of embarrassment is still the first time, she is also the first time she is overwhelmed.

"That..." The two men spoke at the same time and paused. They looked at each other without words.

Zhao Min doesn't know if he should cry or laugh: "You can talk about it first."

"I said this is a misunderstanding, do you believe it?" Chen Mohong blushes and explains that it is weak.

"I believe." Zhao Min nodded, his eyes looked at him strangely.

"Don't look at me like this, it's a misunderstanding. I was pitted by the ink girl." Chen Mo saw Zhao Min's eyes and really wanted to crash into the experimental table.

Seeing Chen Mo’s gaffe, Zhao Min smiled and calmed down: “I said it, I believe, just heard your conversation.”

"If you hear it, have you seen anyone who has been pitted by artificial intelligence?" Chen Mo wanted to cry without tears.

"I just saw it, the body is pretty, right?"

“呃??” Chen Mo saw Zhao Min’s smile, like swallowing Xiaoqiang: “That’s an accident, it’s an accident, are you not angry?”

"Make you play, what am I angry with? Just be your PS."

"What is my PS? It is the truth, that is the idea of the ink girl." Chen Mo's voice has changed, this matter must be explained seriously, otherwise the world name will be destroyed.

Zhao Min ignored the explanation of Chen Mo, and looked at him with a banter, and looked at it from top to bottom.

"In fact, the body was quite perfect. I have some hope that it is my body, the proportion of gold, the softness of Yingna, the front and back, the woman's dream. You are fine, let the ink girl get this kind of projection? ”

"I created a body for the ink girl. It was the ink girl who designed the body shape. I don't know that she designed it in strict accordance with the human shape."

"I thought you were in a whim and wanted to order an inflatable doll to play. My body is a little different from the previous projection. You can make a slight modification. I don't mind giving the ink girl a shape, it is a twin sister. "Zhao Min's mouth is somewhat interesting."

puff……

Chen Mo sneaked at Zhao Min as if he saw a female hooligan: "We don't discuss this issue."

"What do you want me to do?" Zhao Min remembered the scene just now, still a little embarrassed.

"this is for you."

Chen Mo handed the small glass bottle to Zhao Min.

"What is this? What special pills are there?" Zhao Min looked at the small glass bottle, which contained only a few things like sesame seeds, without any strangeness.

Chen Mo’s brain has a few black lines, and in Zhao Min’s heart, the person’s design has collapsed.

"I have been in the biological laboratory for so long, it is called the grass, this is the seed."

"Aerobic grass? A strange name." Zhao Min looked at it again: "What special role?"

"It can grow in the desert Gobi, and it can also survive in contaminated soil, absorbing sulfur dioxide and carbon monoxide in the air. I just verify it for these special functions. But will it secrete proteins that harm animal bodies? It won't cause natural biological invasion. I don't know, this is the result of gene editing technology. You go to a plant research team to verify other content." Chen Mo said.

Zhao Min put away the small bottle, and now it has become accustomed to the short horror development cycle of Chen Mo: "According to the function of the plant you said, it is incredible, the desert becomes grassland, which is a monument in human history."

Chen Mo is undecided.

"These small seeds, you let the robots come over to me, should there be other things?" Zhao Min put the small bottle in his pocket.

"There is still one thing." Chen Mo did not conceal Zhao Min: "The company can prepare to enter the military industry."

chapters.title: Chapter 460: : The New Image Of The Ink Girl
chapters.body:
Chapter 460: : The New Image Of The Ink Girl

In the laboratory, Zhao Min has left, how to do business, Zhao Min to worry, he worry too much is useless.

"Ink girl, we continue, design your body shape" Chen Mo's attention back to the robot lab.

"Okay." The projection of the ink girl appeared next to Chen Mo.

"Determine your shape, don't lie in me, or you won't build your body, let you continue to replace it with other robots." Chen Mo warned.

Now the image in front of Zhao Min has collapsed, making him very embarrassed.

"it is good."

A holographic projection landed, and the brand new image of the ink girl appeared in front of Chen Mo. It was no longer the shape of Xiao Loli, but a tall beauty of about one meter and seventy-five.

Exquisite beauty, the moths are cold and not glamorous, noble and elegant. The perfect face, such as white jade, the tears of sesame under the eyes, adds a touch of vitality and mystery to the innocent face, without human fireworks, beautiful people.

With the waist and the long legs of the innocent, Chen Mo looked at it. The face is not his familiar face, but between the eyebrows, he is familiar with it.

"Is this not a big star?" Chen Mo is afraid. The ink girl is made to follow him. If a female star looks like it, it is photographed by the media, and the oolong is big.

"Of course not, this is the appearance of the ink girl combined with the face data design of many women." said the ink girl.

"So how do I look a little familiar?"

"The original face data of the ink girl is the main part, and the facial data of Xiao Yujie and Zhao Min's sister are combined. There are some facial data of pretty big stars, and it is normal for the brother to feel familiar. Very beautiful?"

"Well, it's really beautiful, and the body and appearance are beautiful to let the woman lick. Don't let it out, pit me." Chen Mo is a little resentful.

Because the facial data, combined with the face data of Xiao Yu and Zhao Min, and the original data of the ink girl, this is his most familiar face, the familiarity makes him feel kind, so Chen Mo quickly accepted This new face of the ink girl.

"Now that you have grown up, I have to change my name." Chen Mo looked at the ink girl of the one meter and seventy-five. This figure looks like a royal sister, and then calls him a brother with a good voice. The picture is too strange. .

"How to call it? Call Dad?" asked the ink girl.

"Don't call Dad, I don't have such a big daughter." Chen Mo had a few black lines in his head.

The robots that follow you now have an adult shape. A big beauty called him ‘Daddy’, was heard by others, and the name of the world was exhausted. Unwittingly, he thought that he was playing the game of 'dry', and the two seemed to be about the same age, and they were not thought to be abnormal.

Brother is not abnormal.

"The ink girl is the same as Xiao Yujie, called her husband."

"Cough... what, can't use this name, this is the name of the small fish, you change something else." Chen Mo coughed twice, his heart sweating.

"Call the owner?"

Chen Mo rolled his eyes and couldn't bear to look straight. How did each name feel wrong? He thought about two more normal names: "Mergo, or Mr.."

"That is called Mergo." The ink girl chose one.

"Yeah." Chen Mo listened very well, and no longer tangled: "Now start designing the layout of the body."

Have experience in the design of intelligent robots, as well as ink women to help optimize, Chen Mo is very comfortable with the layout of the robot.

It can be said that the design of the layout is the easiest part for him. The main difficulty of this war robot is the material behind, the power system and the weapon system.

at the same time.

Africa, Angola, a small island on the sea not far from the coast, a luxurious villa is located. The wall of the villa is embedded in the small mountain, overlooking the sea.

In the vast villa, several black people patrolled and guarded, and in the jungle outside the villa, there were quite a few secret posts.

The quiet villa can only hear the sound of the sea breeze and the rustling of the leaves.

Suddenly, the sound of the helicopter propeller broke the tranquility of the villa. The black bodyguard in the base looked up at the helicopter and continued to observe the movement around him.

The helicopter stopped at the top of the villa and several people came down from the helicopter.

If Wang Hai is here, he will definitely recognize it. The man wearing a blue striped suit is Lirik, whom he saw in Sweden.

Looking around, Lirik walked down the stairs and entered the villa.

On the ground floor of the villa, it is a bright laboratory. Compared with the luxury villa outside, this laboratory is another style, spacious space, white floor wall and plenty of light.

In a space separated by a glass room, a few people who are holding a few red strips are men and women of healthy age. Each person has a dense **** blister, which is extremely terrifying.

After a layer of guards, Lerike walked over to an old researcher wearing a white coat, and the old researcher was kidnapped by Dorivitz. At this time, the mental state of Dorivitz was not very good, and the old man was too much.

"What about medicine?" Liric's weird voice was indifferent.

"Here." Dorliewitz led the two to a transparent safe, which contained just a dozen golden transparent medicines.

After those people kidnapped him, he was sent to the laboratory to force him to study a specific drug for the variant virus. What is even more frustrating is that these people directly kidnapped some refugees to be experimental subjects.

He came here and has already died eight experimental bodies.

After several months of mental and physical torture, he is not happy with the research of special effects. He died in his hands and was uneasy, and until now, he did not know what these unidentified people were doing with these viruses, and what conspiracy.

"What do you want to do with these viruses?" Dollyz looked at Lerik with amazement and shivered and said: "This virus should not appear in the world."

"It really shouldn't be there. Do you know how these viruses come from?"

Perhaps it is the success of special effects research, Liric is rare, but the weird sound is chilling.

"This virus was originally found in my hometown. After the war, a child was infected on the body of his dead parents and was very communicative.

The militants discovered his symptoms and, without medical conditions, isolated the village and killed all the people. This virus has also been made out, induced mutations, become the current virus, we call it death, the punishment of the war for the loser, but also the reward. ”

"Do you want to use these viruses to create fears and terrorist attacks?" Doliwitz seemed to hear Liric's meaning, with a terrified voice.

Lerike made a weird sneer and shook his head gently.

"You only guessed half of it. If it is a simple terrorist attack, we will not bother to catch you coming to study special effects drugs, but to directly put the virus. Our purpose is not only to create terror, but also to make money."

A panic about the virus is about to sweep the world.

chapters.title: Chapter 461: :Break Out
chapters.body:
Chapter 461: :Break Out

"Doctor, I have nothing to do?"

In Paris, St. Mary's Hospital, Wade knocked on the temple, swaying his head, and looking at the doctor wearing a white coat.

I don't know why, there is no appetite in these two days, and there is always a feeling of dizziness and nausea.

This is not a good symptom and has never happened before. He thinks that his constitution is better, and he doesn't have a cold twice a year. As a result, this abnormal situation is now happening.

"Have you ever been there during this time?" The doctor looked at the inspection report and asked.

"One week ago, I went to the United States to participate in an economic forum. I am a reporter. After the interview, I have been on vacation and have not been to too many places," said Wade.

“Have you ever eaten any food?”

"No, my daily eating habits are certain." Vader shook his head: "Is it something I got?"

"In the initial diagnosis, I did not find any disease in you. It is not ruled out that you have recently had a disturbance in your work, or the sequela of jet lag. You may have to rest for two days," the doctor said.

"That's it?" Vader's heart is big: "Then I have noticed a little recently."

After taking the doctor's checklist, Wade just stood up, and the next moment, I felt like a whirlwind and fell down.

Looking at this scene, the responsible doctor changed his face and hurriedly helped him. He shouted at the assistant nurse: "Damn, hurry up and help, I will check him again."

The doctor's voice is not calm, he is sure that he has not misdiagnosed, why is this happening.

......

Island of Tokyo.

Iijima letter took the luggage and walked out of the airport passage. The road was swaying in front of his eyes. Now his brain is sore and his chest is very stuffy.

It should be that the plane has been sitting for too long. Like them, they often fly around the world. The people who attend various meetings often have jet lags. There are many similar situations. It will be fine after two days of rest.

Iijima did not think much, just wanted to hurry home to rest, just feel that the road is getting more and more distorted.

vomit……

The feeling of dizziness is getting more and more serious. A nausea hits me, letting Iijima retire a few times, knocking on the boring chest.

The next moment, I felt that the world in front of me turned around and fell to the ground. This scene instantly attracted the attention of the surrounding, and the airport personnel immediately ran over.

The crowd did not find that on his exposed skin, there was already a red spot on the starting point.

......

"Good morning, Hall."

"Good morning." Hall entered the company and smiled at the female colleague who greeted him, licking his head.

"Hall, is it uncomfortable?"

"Sometimes, I don't know why these two days, my spirit is not so good, I feel dizzy and disgusting." Hall sat back to his working position, just a briefcase.

"You work so hard, you have the opportunity to take a vacation." Female colleagues laughed funny.

"Ha ha……"

Hall smiled softly, took a glass of water with a cup of water, and suddenly felt a whirlwind, fell on the table, the sound of the broken glass, echoed in the office.

"Call the ambulance!"

The female colleague who just spoke to Hall changed her face and hurried to the past. The entire office was busy with it.

"What is the red dot on the Hall arm?"

A strange sound rang, and everyone looked at Hall's arm along the sound. Under the gaze, everyone saw a little abnormal erythema on Hall's arm.

“Is it an infectious disease?”

This reminder makes everyone's face change dramatically, as if they had encountered a plague, and they licked their mouth and nose.

......

Berlin, Germany.

The female nurse ran into the doctor's office, her face was terrified, her hands and feet were shaking, and she was at a loss: "Doctor Howard, come on, come see me."

"What's the matter?" Howard looked puzzled at the female nurse, and rarely saw her panicking.

"There is a patient who seems to have a problem with her body." The female nurse's voice was full of panic.

Howard changed his face and quickly stood up: "What happened?"

"A patient suddenly had a little erythema on his body." The nurse led Howard to sprint toward the ward.

"erythema?"

"Yes, like smallpox, it is like the symptoms of chickenpox." The nurse pointed at the bed in the corner, and the voice was a little flustered. This is the first time she has encountered this situation since she worked: "If you look at him, will you Will it be an infectious disease?"

Howard's face was cautious, carefully checking the patient's arm, a little red bean-sized spot squinted into the eye, and several of them had raised pustules, which looked terrible.

The cautious face suddenly changed suddenly.

"Isolation of the ward and immediately notify the doctor of the infectious department."

Howard's voice has changed, and the subconscious has retreated two steps.

"Doctor, is it a serious infectious disease?" Seeing Howard's appearance, the patient's voice was panicked.

"For the time being, you can't be sure. You need to check it carefully. You don't have to worry. It shouldn't be too much." Howard immediately realized that he was out of order and pacified the patient.

......

London, Victoria Hospital.

Roche left the lab with an inspection report and his face was as dignified as ever.

"How? How? Is the result coming out?" He just came out, several doctors looked at him, and his eyebrows were anxious, waiting for his answer.

It is no accident that they have received four patients with similar symptoms in one day. So the first time they received the hospital notice, they came over and checked the patient.

"The results of the inspection came out, not smallpox, nor chickenpox. In their body fluids such as blood, saliva, and sweat, the same virus was found, a new type of virus that never appeared.

Four patients had systemic rash and herpes, accompanied by fever, and all people had similar symptoms. As for other characteristics of the patient, we need further observation. There is no obvious intersection between the four patients. The virus has the possibility of non-contact transmission. I am afraid I need to notify the health department to issue an early warning notice of infectious diseases. ”

Roche handed the report in his hand to the doctors of several infectious diseases on the field. When he saw the results of the inspection, everyone on the field changed his face.

"Everyone, a friend of my New York, in his hospital, there are similar cases." A doctor took out his mobile phone and opened a photo to everyone.

"Doctor, doctor, just found a patient in the inpatient department, and the four people sent today, the symptoms are similar."

A young doctor ran over to inform everyone that their faces changed.

"Immediately notify the hospital, found similar cases, immediately quarantined, and prevented him from contacting other people. The people who came into contact immediately isolated and observed." Roche took the lead in responding and said: "Contact the health department and report infection to the society." Disease warning notice."

......

Paris, New York, London, Tokyo, Berlin...

A similar scene appears in major cities around the world.

Hospitals that received many similar patients, unprecedented tension, doctors in infectious diseases, are waiting. The emergence of a new type of infectious virus, the vibration medical community, soon, an emergency notice, issued from major hospitals.

chapters.title: Chapter 462: : Fear Spread
chapters.body:
Chapter 462: : Fear Spread

"Reuters News: On the 16th, a hospital in Paris found an unknown infectious virus. At present, the hospital has received eight similar cases. The French health department has issued an early warning notice on infectious diseases. If symptoms are similar, don't approach it easily. Hospital, isolation treatment."

"ABC News: On the 17th, 14 hospitals including New York, Washington, Los Angeles, and 27 cases of unknown infectious diseases. According to infectious disease experts, the same kind of fluid was found in the body fluids such as blood, sweat, and saliva. A novel banded virus that spreads through the air, is non-contact, and is highly contagious."

"On the 17th, three cases of unknown infectious diseases were discovered in the island of Tokyo. At present, local hospitals have isolated patients for treatment..."

“London found the first case of an unknown infectious disease in the area...”

"..."

"On the 21st, an unknown infectious disease broke out worldwide. The WHO officially announced a level 4 infectious disease warning and said the pathogen is a new type of filamentous virus. WHO named the new type of virus 'VFV (variable filovirus)', the incidence area is mainly concentrated in Europe and North America, the source of the virus. WHO has officially issued travel warnings for the two regions."

News of new infectious diseases has been detected around the world, flooding the major networks.

In just 5 days, 53 cities in more than 8 countries around the world, the number of VFV viruses and VFV cases found rapidly increased to 1437 cases, mainly in Europe and North America, and the epidemic is moving out of control.

At first, many hospitals were not aware of the condition of VFV. The hospital did not take appropriate isolation measures, which has caused many medical staff to be infected. The most serious is the New York hospital, 15 medical staff and ordinary patients were infected.

Various news spread, causing global panic, especially in areas where cases are concentrated.

After the emergence of the new virus, the spread speed is unprecedented, and it is an abnormal spread speed. Almost every day, there are a large number of cases in major cities around the world, and no one determines the source of the virus.

Seven days after the outbreak of the virus, the number of VFV cases worldwide has increased to 2,535 cases, and the scope of the virus has spread to major cities, reaching a terrible number.

The major airports around the world have decisively announced the closure of aircraft leading to high-risk areas, and the customs also announced the closure of ports to high-incidence areas to limit entry and exit personnel.

The case city was found, and a special isolation treatment area was quickly vacated. The people who found the virus or suspected to carry the virus were isolated. The cities where no cases were found were cleared out of the isolation area and prepared.

The health departments of various countries and the Center for Disease Control and Prevention have issued warning notices for infectious diseases to the public on several occasions, and at the same time set up an expert group to start researching programs and drugs for treating VFV.

In Europe and North America, where high-risk virus areas are located, everyone is at risk. Companies and schools have issued notices of suspensions.

International organizations such as the United Nations, WHO, and Médecins sans Frontières have publicly expressed the hope that the global medical community will join hands to address this global infectious disease crisis.

On the 10th day of the virus outbreak, VFV spread to 15 countries, and the number of infected VFVs reached 4,534. There were new suspected cases and there was no stopping trend.

On the 11th day, the epidemic was still out of control, and WHO again issued an infectious disease warning to the world and raised the warning level to the highest level 6.

Globally, including international sports, forums, festivals and star concerts, all announced extensions or cancellations, and the atmosphere has never been more heavy.

Some conspiracy theorists began to publicize on the Internet that human beings are destroying the earth, and VFV is a punishment brought by nature.

On the 12th day of the VFV virus outbreak, the company reported good news. The company's microbiology research institute successfully developed the VFV virus detection reagent, which is one of the few bad news.

Half a month after the outbreak of the virus, another big news appeared on the Internet when the global VFV virus debated panic. An organization calling itself ‘Resident Scythe (RS)’ posted a video on Twitter and iNS, publicly acknowledging that the VFV virus was being served by them.

The video is a white background. On the curtain, a black and **** scythe is painted. A man with a black dress and a mask sits in front of the camera and reads their remarks to the world.

"We are the scolding knife of death, the VFV virus incident, is the new variant filovirus we put on the outside, and the incident is responsible for our death sickle.

The VFV virus is a new variant of the filovirus we found in the corpse of the war ruins. We have launched the VFV virus in Europe and North America, respectively. The cities that have been launched include New York, Paris...

The intervention behind you, manipulating the war, let us lose our homeland, live under fear, and now we also let you taste the taste of fear. The VFV virus is a reward for the losers of the war, and a warning to the winners. We bring you the things that you brought, and we will return them to you. ”

The video spread, and if the horses were smashed, the global public opinion exploded and the panic was pushed to the highest point.

The outside world immediately believes in the authenticity of the video, because the cities mentioned in the video are the cities with the most infections, and only human infection will spread so rapidly.

All the countries that found the virus case immediately issued an anger to the extreme condemnation after the video was released, and listed the ‘Death Scythe (RS)’ as a terrorist organization.

At the same time, all localities announced that they would suspend all flights to Europe and North America. Immigration personnel need to go to the quarantine area for virus testing.

Everyone is like an enemy.
