Various schools have announced holidays to disinfect the school.

This is by far the most horrific virus. Under the control of RS, its dangerous level has surpassed eBoR and AIDS. If you don't develop special medicines and vaccines as soon as possible, the consequences are unimaginable.

The US Centers for Disease Control subsequently classified VFV as the highest level of biological terrorism and terrorist attacks. The US official announced the launch of the 'BioShield Plan', approved emergency funds, encouraged pharmaceutical companies to develop countermeasures against bioterrorism activities, and accelerated the detoxification drugs. Approval process.

Countries in high-income areas have also launched similar plans.

At the same time, the CIA issued a global wanted order to reward the ‘RS’ leads and the heads. Other countries that have been infected with viruses are also following the issuance of wanted orders.

The world atmosphere, angry colleagues, with a deep panic.

The highly contagious virus is controlled by the terrorists, and the invisible pressure on all human beings, especially in Europe and North America, where everyone is at risk.

On the Internet, the angry feelings of ordinary people broke out in panic.

The elites of the West, the capitalists, manipulated the war to earn profits, and the ordinary people to bear the bitter consequences of the war. The attacks in various places are like this, and the current virus incidents are still like this.

Various angry statements have emerged, and the whole world is condemning RS, but at the same time tired of war.

Protest voices are everywhere on the Internet, and demonstrations are also taking place in cities with high virus incidence. There are not thousands of demonstrators, only a hundred people, from head to toe, full-face protection armed, holding a sign to demonstrate.

On the other hand, after determining that the RS was intentionally placed, WHO issued an urgent call.

Under the organization of WHO, global infectious disease experts, virologists, immunologists and top medical researchers select the best, form a 72-person research team, and jointly develop special drugs and vaccines for VFV virus. . This medical research group is also known as the 'angel team' against the 'death'.

At the same time, the world's major pharmaceutical giants also announced that the research and development team is investing in the research of VFV special effects drugs and vaccines.

A tough battle against 'Death' has started around the world.

chapters.title: Chapter 463: :Serious Problem
chapters.body:
Chapter 463: :Serious Problem

On the bed, Roddy looked at the only photos in his hand, three people on the photo, his lover, and his daughter, and the smile was very happy.

The photo has been in the wallet for three years. He was so fascinated for the first time, so reluctant, unconsciously tears blurred eyes.

Infected with VFV for more than 20 days, after being isolated, he was able to cure the disease again and again, but he could only watch it deteriorate day by day. The abscess became bigger every day and spread all over the body.

All treatments are useless, and he can feel the heavier feelings on the face of medical staff.

The quarantine area is forbidden to visit, and he does not even see the last side of his family. And the face is so horrible, he doesn't want his family to see what he is.

It was late at night, but he was sober as never before, and slowly, a feeling of weakness came, making him feel tired. The light on the ceiling was very bright, and everything in front of him was getting darker and darker, and finally the consciousness was completely immersed in the darkness.

Drops...

The sound of the isolation room instrument wakes up the hospital in the middle of the night.

......

At Victoria Hospital, Roche looked at the increased case report every day, and the eyebrows were twisted into a ball, and his heart was extremely heavy. Now Victoria Hospital has been officially designated as a VFV fixed-point isolation treatment area, hospital closure, and become an isolation treatment area.

As one of the attending physicians, he was a lot of people during this time, and his fears were heavier day by day.

It has only been more than three hours since this morning, and 15 new cases have been confirmed.

The number of patients in their hospital has increased to more than 500. This is just a hospital for them. In another larger isolation area, there are still many cases.

It can be said that they are one of the most serious areas here.

What worries him the most is that, so far, there is any effective treatment plan, all the treatments they tried, all failed, and no effective drugs were found.

In this way, the epidemic will become more and more serious. Although there have been no deaths, he is very upset.

This VFV virus, under the deliberate spread of RS, coupled with its special habits, has surpassed people's imagination, and the speed of proliferation is also very scary.

boom……

When Roche looked at the case and thought about the treatment plan, a medical staff wearing a mask opened the door and showed anxious and sad eyes.

"Dr. Roche, the quarantine area to inform, the death of patient No. 25 in Area C."

Roche's pupils shrank, and Horan stood up and walked away.

......

"New York Times News: The world's first VFV infected person died in New York..."

"British media news: Victoria Hospital has the first case of VFV infection in Europe..."

"..."

The news of the death of a person infected with VFV was exposed, leaving a huge shadow on the outside world. The sentiment of social panic is still spreading rapidly.

In order to prevent further spread of social panic, officials of various countries will soon issue notices to major isolation points, and the number of deaths will not be announced. But the news of the continuous diagnosis of VFV cases is still horrifying.

The number of countries and people infected with VFV is still growing. In just one month, it has spread to 25 countries and regions. According to incomplete statistics, the number of infected people has exceeded 10,000. There are no signs of stopping. Less confirmed new cases.

European countries, as well as countries in North America, have announced that they will extend the holiday time and begin disinfecting public places such as schools and hospitals.

The spread of the global epidemic has made countries dare to have any scorn.

After the virus broke out, there was only a growing number of infected people, but there was no news of cure, so that the hearts of the world’s people seemed to hang the sword of Damocles.

There are no good treatments in the medical world, and cases of infected medical staff are often seen. The 72-member team of WHO has not come up with a good method. The high-pressure atmosphere condenses between the first-line doctors and infected people, and even the case of infected people committing suicide.

Since the release of the video from the RS organization, people have evaporated and no one can find traces.

When a lot of bad news flooded, the World Health Organization released a survey message that shocked the media.

"The following is an emergency message about the VFV epidemic. At 7:37 am Capital Time, the World Health Organization urgently announced the results of a survey. The investigation confirmed that RS organizations spread two of the VFV viruses.

One is the scene of the International Economic Forum held in New York on September 9-10. Statistics show that the number of people infected in the economic forum has reached 47, which is also the source of many cases of cross-border communication. One place was on the 11th of last month. The famous French singer Sarotti’s concert in Paris, the number of confirmed cases reached 113, resulting in 327 cases of indirect infection.

WHO has asked the organizers of the Economic Forum to send the list of people participating in the forum to the health departments of various countries, appealing to all those who have arrived at the Economic Forum site, and also appealing to the people watching the Sarotti concert to go to the relevant hospitals as soon as possible. And set up control points to check the body. ”

Chen Mo was eating breakfast, and looked up at the news from time to time, his heart was filled with gloom.

A case of VFV has appeared in Binhai City. Now the entire coastal city is on the verge of enemies. Many people wear masks when they go out. They dare not go to places with lots of people. Some large-scale events and concerts are cancelled. Their company also took a holiday once and completely disinfected the company once.

The spread and latency of terror has made many people fear the VFV virus. Even rumors spread on the Internet, garlic, ginger, vinegar can reduce the risk of infection, and now both products, prices are skyrocketing, and many people snapped up.

"Small fishing, don't take the unparalleled out during this period of time, try to minimize contact with people." Chen Mozhen said.

Xiao Yu stayed at the news and seemed to be thinking about something. The moth was close, and when he heard Chen Mo’s voice, he subconsciously responded.

"What's wrong? Have something to worry about?" Chen Mo noticed the strangeness of Xiao Yu.

"It seems that Zhao sister attended the 9-10 International Economic Forum. I also had a video call with Zhao Jie. You called Zhao Jie to ask her." Xiao Yu caressed the little unparalleled in his arms, some Not sure.

Chen Mo's face changed slightly.

After Xiao Yu’s reminder, he did remember that after explaining the incident of entering the military industry, Zhao Min told him that he had to go to the United States for a business trip. Just two days before the VFV virus appeared, Zhao Min had returned to China. During this time, he was innocent and he did not think much.

"Don't worry, I will contact her first. This is almost a month away. In theory, we should have passed the incubation period. She is not the same. It should be fine." Chen Mo picked up his mobile phone and dialed Zhao Min's phone.

“Seeing the news?” In the holographic video, Zhao Min’s projection appeared.

"Just saw, your body is no different?" Chen Mo asked.

"No, but I have to check it again. I am preparing to send a notice. The campus of the company headquarters is on holiday for three days." Zhao Min’s voice was accompanied by faint concerns.

"You check first, your body is the most important, ignore the company's business. If anything, tell me the first time. Forget it, I have also passed." Chen Mo suddenly realized a more serious problem, look at Xiao Yu, and the little unparalleled in her arms, my heart is heavy.

chapters.title: Chapter 464: : Admission
chapters.body:
Chapter 464: : Admission

Zhao Min and Lan Xi suspected of being infected with the VFV virus and should be isolated.

The result of this inspection made Chen Mo's heart extremely heavy. Fortunately, Chen Mo, Xiao Yu, Lan Xi, Wang Sijia, etc., who had contact with Zhao Min, were not infected with the virus.

Because the little fish and the little unparalleled, the biggest stone in his heart was put down. I am afraid that Zhao Min is infected, and then he, Xiao Yu and the child are infected together, it is very troublesome.

Although this result is lucky, he is not happy.

The result of the doctor's examination is that although Zhao Min did not have the symptoms of VFV, he found in the laboratory that there were pathogen-related antibodies in Zhao Min's blood. Among the VFV virus detection reagents of GlaxoSmithKline, it is also shown that her blood contains VFV virus, and it is not excluded that it may be in the latent stage.

After discovering the suspect, the hospital isolated Zhao Min and also disinfected Zhao Min’s residence and office.

Chen Mo also ordered that the company headquarters should be re-sterilized once a week.

This news, Binhai City official and marching ant group have not chosen to announce to the public, there is no confirmed diagnosis, afraid of causing unnecessary panic in the coastal city.

"How is your body now?" Chen Mo looked at the holographic projection, wearing a sick suit, Zhao Min, looking serious.

"Eat what you eat. It's rare to take a break. I will take a vacation. You don't have to frown. It's just suspected. I haven't confirmed it yet." Zhao Min said with a little ease: "If you really infected VFV, you said I would die." Lost?"

"Don't say it." Chen Mo said with dissatisfaction.

"What if?"

"Nothing, even if there is, I will find a way to save you, I want you to make money for me."

Zhao Min directly turned his eyes: "Death without conscience, use me as a tool to make money. My sister is not willing to die, Bai Fumei, who I have never talked about in love, it is a pity to die. When I go out, you will give me this alternate little three. Hug."

What is the standby small three?

Chen Mo’s head came out with a few black lines. At this time, Zhao Min had to think about jokes with him. However, at this time, Zhao Min is optimistic and good.

"Hug, wait until you come out and say."

"You said, owe me a hug." Zhao Min is in a good mood.

The video of the holographic projection was turned off, and Chen Mo called again to ask about the situation of Lanxi, and the brow was squeezed into a broom. It seems that he also needs to study the special effects of the VFV virus. If Zhao Min and Lan Xi are really infected, he will not only be able to watch.

Xiaoyu walked into the study and saw Chen Mo, who was frowning, and walked over: "Husband, how is Zhao Jie?"

"The current situation is fine."

After a little hesitation, Xiaoyu once again said: "Husband, I am going to let the pearls send the little unparalleled back to my parents."

"What about you?"

"Now Zhao is in isolation. I know that you will study drugs against the virus. The company has some big things. Julie and Ling Feng can't fix it. They need someone who has the final idea. You don't have time, the best candidate at the moment. It’s only me. I want to go to the company to replace it for a while, and wait for Zhao’s sister to come back and come back, the company can’t be without a leader.” Xiaoyu said.

"How do you know that I want to study drugs?"

"I am your wife. What do you think about this time? I don't know yet?"

Xiao Yu went on to say.

"Do not worry, the company has Zhu Lijie and Ling Feng, the whole team team to assist, as well as the ink girl, if necessary, you can call to ask Zhao Jie. Even if I am half a bucket of water, this commercial dynasty has been formed, not so It's easy to collapse. And there are Julie sisters, my job, just sign a name on the document, you can do your thing with peace of mind."

"Don't be too tired." Chen Mo said.

"This sentence should be what I said to you. If you can't help you, at least it won't cause you trouble. You work." Xiao Yu gently hugged Chen Mo and turned away.

In the study, only Chen Mo himself. Thinking a little, Chen Mo lay in the chair and entered the technology library.

The field of biomedicine.

"No. 27 Drugs", "Emerie Influenza Medicine", "Laughing Disease Special Effects Medicine"... "Red Spot Virus Vaccine", "Echeitch Virus Vaccine", "Thermal Virus Vaccine"...

Chen Mo called out the technical catalogue in the medical field, which are some drugs that I don't know.

There are countless special medicines and there are many vaccines.

However, these drugs are only for one type of virus or a certain symptom. He does not know which medicine is effective against the VFV virus. It is impossible to allocate all these medicines one by one. I don't know if I want to try the monkey year.

......

"Long High Medicine" "Myopia Special Medicine"...

"Anti-radiation drugs", "special effects of heat death", "anti-cold drugs", "anticancer drugs No. 91", "X virus vaccine", "DNA virus vaccine", "RNA virus vaccine No. 002"......

"Super Cancer Vaccine" "No. 53 Universal RNA Virus Vaccine"...

[Technology Apprentice] At the stage, there are also many drug technologies. In the apprenticeship stage, the tasks in the biomedical field have not been completed. The universal vaccines and special effects drugs for the VFV virus have not been granted, and they can only be looked at and cannot be obtained.

After a brief lap, Chen Mo returned to the technical catalogue at the apprenticeship stage.

"Attenuation of DNA virus active agents" "Attenuation of RNA virus active agents"...

Seeing the catalogue on this page, Chen Mo’s eyes are bright. This page is all about weakening the activity of the virus. Although it can not be completely cured, it is not bad to delay the activity and strive for more treatment time for patients.

Chen Mo did not hesitate to choose three of them.

Once selected, it will turn to other pages.

"RNA virus vaccine development" "RNA virology" "viral poison protein target"...

Chen Mo got ten books related to the virus in one breath. These books are not some kind of medicine, but the subject theory of infectious disease subdivision.

With so many drugs, he is not sure which one is effective for VFV. There is a universal vaccine in the apprenticeship stage, but he can't get the technology and can only study it himself.

Until the head fainted, Chen Mocai stopped the hand of choosing a book. The books he selected were thoroughly digested, enough to become an expert in infectious diseases and virology.

......

"Infected with VFV virus, the first stage of the disease is characterized by dizziness, brain swelling, chest tightness, retching and even coma. The second stage is characterized by systemic erythema, pustules, and systemic fever. Cases of death, The subcutaneous tissue was rotted, but the patient's internal organs and intestinal tract did not show bleeding symptoms."

Wu Bing listened carefully to the video of Academician Zhong Shan, and looked at the information in his hands from time to time. This is the virus information sent back from the epidemic. In special circumstances, the information on VFV is currently shared by the global medical research team.

A world-renowned infectious disease expert like Academician Zhongshan has joined the 72-member team under the emergency call of WHO.

At the same time, the country also organized a team of experts to carry out research on prevention programs and treatment programs. Now attending the conference is the top pharmaceutical development experts in China. Everyone has a drug research and development team.

As the youngest medical school of the Academy of Engineering, Wu Bing also joined the war.

The RS organization did not target the country, but they also had to wait and see, because the country is already considered a fish, and it is not too small. Twenty-one cases of infection and 39 suspected cases were all isolated. Fortunately, they had experience in epidemic prevention and the response was very fast. The epidemic is now under control.

However, Europe and North America are not so fortunate. Protective clothing, masks and other protective medical supplies in high-incidence areas have been announced urgently, and medical personnel are all in a hurry. Even some health school students are involved.

WHO has also requested material assistance from countries and regions where the epidemic is not serious.

There are currently 37 deaths worldwide, with a cure rate of 0%. This means that there is no medical means for treating people infected with the virus.

In collaboration with the Ministry of Health and the WHO medical team, more than 2,800 drugs have been tested, including Tamiflu, eBoR vaccine, and special effects. No drugs have been found to be effective against VFV, and a new type of drug may need to be found. , a special medicine for VFV, or a vaccine.

The video of the academician of Zhongshan was over, and the atmosphere on the field was solidified.

At the meeting, Shi Hongtu, sitting in the first place, circled the court and looked serious. Just wanted to talk, a doctor hurried into the conference room and bowed his head and said a few words in his ear.

After the doctor finished, Shi Hongtu looked to everyone: "I just came to notice that a new member joined our research and development team, Academician Chen Mo. In the following time, Academician Chen will join us to participate in the special medicine for VFV. In the study, everyone is welcome."

After Shi Hongtu finished, Chen Mo walked in from the outside of the meeting room and was slightly stunned by the experts on the field. He said with humility: "I hope I can do a little bit of power."

chapters.title: Chapter 465: :Zhao Min Diagnosed
chapters.body:
Chapter 465: :Zhao Min Diagnosed

The World Health Organization's announcement of the Economic Forum in New York and the Paris concert are the two major sources of the virus, triggering an uproar in the world. As the news emerged, more and more news was dug up by sensitive journalists.

Especially in the economic forum, the big names, the world's leading investment tycoons and founders of the economic forum, have been diagnosed with the VFV virus within half a month after the outbreak of the virus, and are now being treated for isolation because they are worried about the company. The impact was not announced.

The horrible emotions spread to all corners.

In the once bustling streets and scenic spots, there were not many people who saw them. The people they saw were wearing thick masks, and the prices of various masks soared.

In Europe and North America, the number of people infected has reached a terrible number.

Cases of medical personnel infected with viruses often occur, and even news of doctors dying of death has caused a lot of panic among medical personnel. In the most serious countries, even the anti-chemical forces were dispatched to isolate the designated hospitals and strictly control the entry and exit of personnel.

The virus crisis has made the world a mess, and the situation has become more and more serious.

Some countries have introduced the most restrictive immigration restrictions, with the exception of trade, temporarily interrupting inbound flights in Europe and North America.

......

Binhai City People's Hospital isolation area.

Li Yufang took the inspection report and opened Zhao Min’s isolation room. At this time, she wore a thick mask, wearing protective clothing and glasses, and there was no skin exposed to the air.

Handing the test report sealed in a plastic bag to Zhao Min, Li Yufang said: "The result is out, a good news, a bad news. The bad news is that we have isolated the VFV virus in your blood and have metabolic activity. Prove that you are indeed infected with the VFV virus."

Li Yufang’s voice is dignified.

At the beginning, the routine blood test in the laboratory only found related antibodies in the blood of Zhao Min. Even if the detection reagent of Glaxo has responded, Zhao Min has no symptoms and can only be judged as a suspected case. The incubation period needs to be observed.

However, Zhao Min’s identity was different. They gave Zhao Min’s blood a blood component separation. As a result, the VFV virus was found in the separated blood.

This shows that Zhao Min is indeed infected with VFV and is in an incubation period.

Li Yufang’s answer made Zhao Min’s face change slightly and quickly calmed down: “What good news?”

"The good news is that the antibodies in Zhao Min are higher than the average person. The metabolic activity and quantity of VFV virus is much lower than that of ordinary people. This is the main reason for her poor viral infection and long latency. But not The representative is not contagious, and she is in close contact with her, and there is still the possibility of infection.

The virus has also been found in the blood of Lanxi. The number has increased significantly, much faster than Zhao Min. I believe that soon after, there will be symptoms. It should be the recent contact between the two, Ms. Zhao transmitted to Ms. Lanxi, so it was caused that the two had not developed symptoms for a month. Ms. Zhao Min’s onset time is temporarily unclear. She is an example of the first time that a virus has been so late. ”

"Okay, thank you doctor."

Chen Mo put down the phone and frowned. The news from Binhai was not good news. Now that he is diagnosed, what he is worried about has happened.

Although the VFV virus in Zhao Min has not erupted, it has metabolic activity, indicating that the number will be more and more. Once the immunity of Zhao Min is exceeded, the virus will erupt. If there is no treatment plan, it will be very troublesome.

"This is why you suddenly joined the research team?" Wu Bing next to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo suddenly joined, she was a bit strange. The outbreak broke out for a month. Chen Mo had to participate. He should have come in early, but he chose to join only last week. There must be something to change his mind and he had to participate. At that time, she did not ask much, she was buried in her heart, and now she finally knows the answer.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded and told the truth: "Zhao Min attended the economic forum in New York. Last time in Binhai City, he found a suspected virus and isolated observation."

"If Zhao Min is not infected, will you not participate in it?" Wu Bing stunned.

"This is the responsibility of your doctor. Thousands of medical personnel around the world are participating in this epidemic. You will find a drug to solve the problem sooner or later. Time is a problem. I am not a professional medical staff, no need to take risks, and I am There are quite a few research projects."

Chen Mo did not deny Wu Bing's words.

"Just Zhao Min suspected of being infected, I have to get involved, just in case, I can help."

"No wonder she is willing to have no regrets under your hand, to help you lay such a big foundation." Wu Bing looks a bit complicated, did not tangled on this issue, quickly transferred the topic to the focus: "That should find a medical plan quickly If the VFV virus breaks out, no one can say what the consequences are."

After thinking about it for a long time, Chen Mocai said: "I want to apply for Zhao Min to send here to isolate the treatment. Her case is special, and she does not break out for a long time. Maybe she can find a breakthrough in her."

In addition to the above reasons, this kind of proposal has his own little selfishness.

At present, the isolation zone of the capital is the most complete and advanced isolation zone in the country. The medical team and medical staff are top in the country. Many of them participated in the epidemic rescue of the year, and Zhao Min was sent here to isolate, and the safety factor was It must be high everywhere.

I chose to join the officially formed research team instead of doing it alone. In addition to a top-notch medical team, there are also the most favorable experimental conditions here, so that you can keep abreast of the progress of the epidemic and have the fastest logistical help. This will speed up the speed of his drug development. If necessary, give Zhao Min the most Good treatment conditions.

"You go to apply with the stone team leader, the stone team leader should not refuse your application." Wu Bing took a deep look at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo is a versatile person who can be said to be proficient. The potential agent that can enhance the body's physique at the beginning is from the hands of Chen Mo. She is one of the few people who know the insider. Chen Mo is experienced in the development of pharmaceuticals.

What is even more enchanting is his ability to learn and understand. The principle is said once again. The instrument is mastered once and quickly. The members of their expert group are shocked. If you don’t understand Chen Mo’s identity, you must think that he is a professional medical doctor. personnel.

Each of their experts has a team and research direction.

A few days after Chen Mocai joined the research team, he thoroughly studied the research materials of the entire team, and proposed some methods that were more partial, so that they had a feeling of squatting.

Now, all the researchers in the team treat Chen Mo as a professional. Shi Hongtu puts a lot of hope on Chen Mo, hoping that he can make a miracle.

"Then I will leave for a while now and go to the stone team leader." Chen Mo finished, turned and left.

chapters.title: Chapter 466: : Other People Have Nothing To Do With Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 466: : Other People Have Nothing To Do With Me

Zhao Min left the quarantine warehouse and was taken to an isolation room by the medical staff. He looked at the surrounding environment and looked confused.

Yesterday, I was informed that the hospital had to transfer her to the capital for treatment. It was Chen Mo’s meaning, and she did not hesitate to agree.

As a result, she was sent to the quarantine warehouse this morning, accompanied by medical staff, took a special plane and was sent there.

The environment of this hospital is much better than that of Binhai People's Hospital. It can be known from some arrangements and details in the room. Through the glass window, you can also see the flowers and plants outside the window, and you can feel a lot more open.

Oh...

The door of the ward suddenly opened, and two medical personnel wearing protective clothing and mask glasses came in.

"How does the body feel?"

"Is it you?" Zhao Min was shocked to hear the familiar voice.

Now Chen Mo is wearing protective clothing, wearing a mask and glasses, she can't recognize it, but as soon as she speaks, she immediately knows Chen Mo's identity. This voice is her most familiar voice.

"What are you doing here? This is a quarantine, not afraid of being infected?"

"Come in to you, afraid of infection, I will not come in." Chen Mo said.

He applied to send Zhao Min, and Shi Hongtu agreed without hesitation, and arranged medical personnel to help isolate the transfer. Yesterday's application, people will be transferred today.

"Well, since you are not afraid, give me a hug first." Zhao Min came over and hugged Chen Mo, although he was still inexplicably separated by protective clothing.

"Hold enough? Are there nurses? Don't break my reputation, I am a family."

"You see, the nurse and sister can be more sensible than you, don't overdo it." Zhao Min is in a good mood, and the fear of contracting the VFV virus disappears: "Small fishermen won't mind me. Big deal, I will go back and explain. When a woman is sick, It will be particularly vulnerable, and you should give some comfort."

"You are the oldest girl, the oldest woman."

The female nurse next to me heard Chen Mo’s words and smiled and shivered.

Zhao Min was so angry that he turned his eyes. This guy sometimes deliberately straightens the man, always giving her the urge to hit someone: "Look at it, my sister has nothing to look at, and hurry."

"I am not going to leave. Starting today, I am one of your attending physicians until you recover."

Zhao Min looked at him curiously: "Do you still have medical skills? Are you sure you are not a quack?"

Chen Mo is completely speechless, and the daily life of the two people is always the same.

"School Chen joined the VFV virus special effects team last week and is now a member of the expert team. This time you are transferred over, it is the academician Chen." The small nurse next to explain to Chen Mo.

Zhao Min’s heart was warm and there was no joke, and he was moved. Chen Mo did not care about the epidemic this month. Now she joins the team because she can naturally guess.

"Thank you."

"Well, thank you, I need to check your situation now."

“Do you want a full physical examination?” Zhao Min’s face was ruddy, and some tweaked asked.

Seeing that Zhao Min was tweaking, Chen Mo almost fled and fled, feeling that it was a mistake to transfer her over.

Chen Mo has not answered yet, and the nurse next to him is not happy. It’s rare to hear the dialogue between the two big men. I didn’t expect the conversation between the two people. It’s still very interesting. It’s not so far away from the news.

"Your condition has not broken out, what can the whole body check check? I am not a professional doctor, I am only responsible for the development of special effects drugs. Now it is a blood test, I need your blood to see the virus in your body."

Chen Mo turned to look at the nurse.

"Give her a blood test."

Zhao Min sat on the bed and saw the nurse take the needle out. Some of them were in a hurry, and the body was stiff and subconsciously leaning back, and their hands were shaking.

"Ms. Zhao, don't move." The nurse held Zhao Min's arm.

"She is afraid of an injection." Chen Mo suddenly remembered Zhao Min's fear of the needle, and reminded: "It may be nervous."

Afraid of injections?

The nurse looked at Zhao Min with amazement. The president of the Tang Dynasty Army Ant Group, one person under the 10,000 people, was a high-cold and strong personality, but did not expect to be afraid of injections. But at least for now, it seems that there is no such thing as a stranger in the past.

"You look at other things, think about things you like, divert your attention, don't look at the needles," the nurse reminded.

Zhao Min’s eyes fell on Chen Mo’s body, and he looked at him with a straight look.

Perceived Zhao Min’s gaze, Chen Mo’s face was helpless. Seeing her nervous appearance, she still said: “After the last forum, did you take any medicine this month?”

"What are you asking?"

"According to the information from Binhai City, your condition is somewhat special. The incubation period of the virus is too long. The metabolic activity of the pathogen is much lower than that of ordinary people. Therefore, I need to confirm that you have not taken any drugs to cause this. The situation may have a breakthrough in research."

Zhao Min thought for a moment and definitely shook his head: "No, this time, the law of eating, did not take any drugs."

"After you joined the New York forum, what was the body uncomfortable this month? Or something unusual?"

“Do you not count the big aunt?” Zhao Min asked.

"Is there an abnormality?"

"No, it's quite regular, it's normal."

Chen Mo’s brain has a few black lines: “That’s not counted.”

"That's gone." Zhao Min thought for a moment, as if he thought of something: "However, the last time you used the potion for me, I have never had a sick child, and I have no cold."

"Yes!!"

Chen Mo patted his head and suddenly realized that Zhao Min’s words awakened him to this authority.

Potential agents, in addition to enhancing strength and speed, can also increase the body's immunity. Zhao Min is one of the users, or he personally helped Zhao Min to inject.

Zhao Min's immunity is much better than that of ordinary people. He used the potential agent.

This is a good reminder, at least know that the body and immunity of the potency agent can strengthen the metabolism of the virus.

It may also help to develop special effects drugs.

When the nurse pulled out the needle, Zhao Min took a breath and then loosened it. His face turned white and he was scared by the needle.

"You will remain optimistic and give me other things."

Zhao Min Zhan smiled, his pale face regained his anger, his eyes were filled with tears, and his heart's worries disappeared. It seems that the first time someone said this sentence to her so seriously, I feel very good.

......

The potential agent enhances Zhao Min's immunity, so that Zhao Min has the ability to resist the virus! Upon hearing this answer, Wu Bing was amazed.

The potential agent, she participates in clinical trials throughout, naturally knows the function of that agent. Improve human cell metabolic activity, enhance human strength, speed, endurance and immunity. Can make ordinary people have trained soldiers.

This strategic pharmacy is still top secret and is used only by a small number of special forces and guards. Zhao Min knows this project, Chen Mo is used by her to improve her physical fitness, but it is normal.

"Now I am not sure if this is the case, but this is the best explanation. I have to try and see the effect." Chen Mo said.

Wu Bing pondered for a while and asked: "Do you want to experiment with potency drugs?"

"Yes."

"The above is impossible to promise to use the pharmacy for large-scale use by ordinary people, especially Westerners. This kind of pharmacy is exposed, it is to expose a hole card, maybe the formulation of the pharmaceutical ingredients will leak out." Wu Bing said.

"I didn't plan to use it on a large scale. I just wanted to clear the illness of Zhao Min, and the disease of Lanxi. Others have nothing to do with me."

chapters.title: Chapter 467: : Not Too Good News
chapters.body:
Chapter 467: : Not Too Good News

Hughes Medical Research Institute, one of the most famous non-profit medical research institutes in the United States, the global bioterrorism outbreak, under the coordination of WHO, Hughes Medical Research Institute, became the 'angel team' to tackle VFV virus specific drugs Institute.

Qiu wants to lead a few people from the team and walk towards the conference room.

Qiu thinks that there is a report in the hands of the VFV antibody research report, but there is not much happiness on the faces of everyone.

The patient's serum or body fluids are used to treat viral infections, which are the most common moves. During this period of time, their team found that the antibodies in the patient's serum were too weak to clear the VFV virus.

And they can't find a recovery patient. The VFV virus is too toxic, and the antibodies produced by the human body's immune system simply cannot 'kill' the virus.

This led to the study of their specific drugs, nothing to do.

After discussion, the team decided to try the animal immune serum, and found 8 animals to experiment, let the animal infected with the virus, but soon found that even the immunized bovine serum had no obvious effect on the treatment of VFV.

During this time, I experimented every day and tried hundreds of possible ways.

Try all the possible conjectures they discussed, and finally find that the most successful ones are monoclonal antibodies.

In order to speed up the research, the 72-person team was divided into eight groups, four groups were responsible for finding other therapeutic drugs, and the other four groups were responsible for testing the 16 monoclonal antibodies, and the group led by Yau was one of them.

At the time of testing, the four groups of people used 1000 times of LD50 (half the lethal dose) to poison the experimental mice.

Within 24 hours after exposure, mice were injected with monoclonal antibodies, four groups of 16 monoclonal antibodies, and 11 remaining; 48 hours, 5 antibodies were still effective; 72 hours, only two antibodies were effective.

It was an antibody that he led the first group to study, and an antibody that was studied by a third group led by British medical scientist Judson.

Two of these antibodies were found, and they started experimenting with rabbits. Both antibodies were effective for 24 hours. After 48 hours, the ability of monoclonal antibodies began to show significant differences, many lost their activity, and the time was long, the role of antibodies Getting weaker.

The incubation period of the VFV virus far exceeds this time, and such antibodies are simply not available for treatment, and the study is once again stalled.

Finally, after discussion among the people, it was decided to use the 'cocktail' method of eBoR special drug research, using the best four monoclonal antibodies mixed, using a virus that can produce human interferon as an adjuvant for "cocktail" antibodies. Let 'Cocktail' also work after 72 hours of exposure.

The ‘Cocktail’ pharmacy was named Ag72.

Now, the results of the Ag72 test are in the hands of Qiu.

Looking at the report in his hand, he was not happy because the results were different from what they imagined.

When Qiu and Judson entered the conference room, they felt that dozens of eyes fell on them. Many researchers on the field didn't look very good. Since the formation of the 72-person team, some progress has been made in their research, but the progress is not great. Now I hope that they will all be in the report of Qiu and Jia Desen.

"Come on." Yau wanted to hand the report to Judson.

"You come." Judson shook his head and did not reach out.

Qiu nodded helplessly. When everyone sat down, let the assistant send the report in his hand to every researcher on the field and walk to the position of the podium.

"The results of the monoclonal antibody test came out, and we were different from the results we predicted. We tested the effect of Ag72 with two rhesus monkeys. On the fourth day of infection, the monkeys developed symptoms and were given Ag72 as planned. But unfortunately, the virus in the monkey did not disappear, VFV did not cure." Qiu thought heavy.

There was a sigh in the conference room, and many experts shook their heads and frowned.

Monoclonal antibodies are the most promising direction in a short period of time. If a monoclonal antibody fails, the specific drug will take longer.

The number of people infected with the VFV virus has reached more than 26,000 worldwide, and the number of people is refreshing every day. The number of deaths has soared to 2,378. There is no cure for the time being. If the treatment does not come out, it means that the number of deaths will increase.

"But there is a good news that is not too good."

Everyone instantly lifted his spirits and raised his ears to wait for the answer of Qiu.

"Injecting Ag72 monkeys within a week, the condition did not deteriorate further. Ag72 can not cure the condition of VFV, but can inhibit the metabolism of VFV and control the disease to further deteriorate. This result can give more treatment time for the disease. ""

Many people on the field were applauding and cried. At this time, any little good news is exciting news.

The 'Angel Team' made a breakthrough in VFV virus specific drugs and successfully developed monoclonal antibody agents that inhibit the deterioration of VFV.

The news was released, as if it was mad, it spread throughout the world, attracting all the people.

Now is the most serious period of the VFV virus. At the time of global panic, the biological virus almost reached the critical point of complete out of control. At this time, the 72-person team sent good news, which is undoubtedly the most exciting time.

This victory in the fight against biological warfare has already dawned.

When the outside world cheered for the results of the 72-person group, the other corner had the same happy event.

River Microbiology Medical Research Institute.

Xu Minsheng had a rare smile on his face.

Jianghe Company and Lanhong Pharmaceutical were merged into the army ant group and reorganized into Jianghe Pharmaceutical. He became one of the team leaders of Jianghe Pharmaceutical Pharmaceutical Development and was responsible for the development of tumor vaccine.

The current Jianghe Pharmaceutical Headquarters is the main microbiology medical research institute of Haixing Company. The main medicines of Haixing Company are all developed from here.

Some time ago, Chen Mo contacted them, told them a research direction, and gave them some information, so that their research team can make data related drugs, drugs may reduce the activity of VFV virus, and help VFV treatment.

Now is the most terrible time for the VFV virus to be raging. With the order of Chen Mo, the entire research team immediately convened personnel to start developing drugs.

The team concentrated on the strength of the elites of the entire institute, and thoroughly read the information that Chen Mo gave, and the shifts were studied and finally progressed.

During the period, he contacted Chen Mo several times and asked questions about the research direction. After several major breakthroughs, he finally completed the required medicine according to Chen Mo’s meaning.

They gave the developed drug, named HX3.

Nowadays, the VFV virus in the culture dish has a markedly reduced metabolic activity at 24 hours after the addition of the HX3 agent, and the drug has reached the requirement of Chen Mo.

"Successful." Xu Minsheng showed a rare smile.

"Successful." Several researchers around him also nodded and vomited a deep breath.

"You will sort out the report and hand it over to the boss. I will ask the boss what to do next to HX3." After that, Xu Minsheng turned and left the lab.

chapters.title: Chapter 468: : I Believe It.
chapters.body:
Chapter 468: : I Believe It.

"what is this?"

After Chen Mo took out the medicine box with the logo of Haixing Company, all the medical experts in the institute looked at Chen Mo.

"The agent that Haixing Company sent." Chen Mo said.

Starfish company?

The experts on the field face each other and seem to have little impression of the company.

“Starfish is a pharmaceutical company indirectly controlled by the marching ant group.” Wu Bing reminded a little bit that the talents were in vain.

When I opened the medicine box, I saw a dozen blue medicines lying quietly in the box. When everyone was puzzled, Chen Mo said: "This is the special medicine I developed by the River Microbiology Institute to reduce the activity of the virus. The name is starfish. No. 3 (HX3)

“A special medicine to reduce the activity of the virus?” Shi Hongtu was surprised and hesitated to look at the HX3 pot in the box: “You mean, this potion is effective against the VFV virus?”

"The report from the institute showed that it can reduce the activity of VFV virus and can not kill VFV virus." Chen Mo said.

“Really?” Shi Hongtu excitedly held Chen Mo’s palm and was eager to know the answer.

VFV research has not progressed so far, and many methods and drugs have been tried, all of which have failed. Now Chen Mo told him that HX3 has an effect on VFV. He can't do it without his excitement. Even if he can't eradicate it, he will at least see hope.

"This is the report of the institute, the experimental data, and how it depends on the clinical effect." Chen Mo passed the report from Xu Minsheng to Shi Hongtu and others.

"Great, great."

Shi Hongtu and others looked at the report and were very excited. Although the Ag72 developed by the WHO can inhibit the metabolism of the virus, it has just come out. Although it is freely shared to the official countries, it has a limited effect. The effect of Ag72 can only last for about a week. After one week, it must be re-injected to continue to suppress the deterioration of VFV.

"Now test the effects of these agents right now."

Shi Hongtu issued instructions to let the team members leave to start testing the HX3 potion. That road doesn't work, they have to find another way.

"You let the Starfish company send these medicines over, is it to treat Zhao Min? Is there a treatment plan?" On the way back to his lab, Wu Bing looked at Chen Mo.

"Yes, there is a specific plan, but it needs to be verified." Chen Mo said.

"Can you talk to me?"

When the two men were talking about the treatment plan, a quick voice interrupted the two. A female nurse came running and her face was anxious.

"what's wrong?"

“Ms. Zhao’s condition has changed,” said the female nurse.

"What?" Chen Mo's body was stiff, and he quickly walked toward the isolation room. He followed him, Wu Bing and the female nurse.

"Talk to me about her situation." Chen Mo at this time, his eyes are anxious.

"Ms. Zhao got up very well this morning. Just now, she said that her chest was stuffy, and she had a little erythema on her body. I will tell you soon." The nurse almost trotting, and barely stepped on Chen Mo’s pace.

Not long after, the three men put on protective clothing into Zhao Min's isolation room.

Only Zhao Min was still watching the movie on the bed, his face was calm, and it seemed that he was not affected by the virus.

"let me see."

Chen Mo walked to the bedside, waiting for her answer, grabbed Zhao Min's arm and opened the sleeves, and saw the red bean-like spots on the arm, sparsely sparsely a dozen, on the white skin, abnormally glaring. Then, Chen Mo turned over the collar of Zhao Min’s sick suit, between the collarbone, and on the neck.

No other patients explode, horrible abscesses and erythema, but over time, the condition will worsen, pustules and blood spots will appear.

Zhao Min’s VFV virus broke out, and Chen Mo felt a stone hanging over his heart.

"How do you feel now?" Chen Mo asked while checking.

"It's very good, except for a little chest tightness, there is no difference between the others." Zhao Min let Chen Mo check his body and calmly answer.

“Does these places not itch? Does the body have a fever or other discomfort?”

Chen Mo pointed to the red dot on his arm.

"No itching, no fever." Feeling Chen Mo's concern, Zhao Min showed a relaxed smile: "Can't die?"

"Reassured, the treatment plan has been a clue, is preparing for clinical trials, if successful, you will be able to cure you." Chen Mo patted Zhao Min's back, indicating her peace of mind.

"That's okay, you still owe me a hug, can't run. I don't have any uncomfortable places now, you are going to be busy with you, now is not a waste of time." Zhao Min said.

"You keep an optimistic attitude, give me other things, I believe I will cure you."

Zhao Min and Chen Mo looked at each other and smiled.

"I believe."

Zhao Min was tested for body temperature. After the inspection, Chen Mo and Wu Bing went to the isolation room of Lanxi to check the situation again before leaving the isolation area and rushing to the institute.

Now that Zhao Min’s condition has deteriorated, Chen Mo’s heart has a sense of crisis.

Although slow, Zhao Min’s condition is indeed deteriorating. Within a month, he must make a treatment plan, otherwise, one month later, no one knows, the condition continues to deteriorate, and it will bring unpredictable consequences.

Fortunately, HX3 has been successfully developed and sent, and his next plan can be tested.

......

Starfish has successfully developed a specific drug that reduces the metabolic activity of the virus. It is effective against most RNA viruses and can delay the onset of VFV. It is currently preparing for clinical trials.

This news, like the wings, once again caused a sensation.

This is the second company to announce the successful development of drugs for VFV virus following the WHO 72-person team.

Starfish is best known for its breast enhancement and ‘Viagra’ without side effects. Two medicines are women’s favorite and man’s artifact. Except for the beginning, everyone pays attention to the Starfish company, and gradually fades away, only knowing the company's products.

Nowadays, it has once again appeared in the public eye. Many people are concerned about the background of Haixing Company: Jianghe Pharmaceutical Holdings, a subsidiary of the Army Ant Group, and a pharmaceutical company established jointly with the Roche family.

There is a background of marching ants.

This fact makes more people ecstasy.

Since its inception, the marching ant group has been synonymous with the most advanced technology. The name Chen Mo is the mountain of countless scientific research workers.

The news of VFV special effects drugs issued by the company of the Army Ant Group has inspired many people, especially in China. The infected people are ecstatic when they hear the news.

On the second day of the announcement, the Ministry of Health issued an announcement allowing Haixing to use HX3 agents for human clinical trials.

Immediately after the news came from the WHO, the dispatched personnel came to seek cooperation with Haixing Company, and also obtained a batch of untested HX3 through official channels in case of emergency.

In a short time, two good news, let the patient see a glimmer of light.

Once they could only watch the VFV's condition worse, and then die in despair. Now there is at least a little treatment and hope.

But unfortunately, whether it is the monoclonal antibody Ag72 of the WHO team of 72 people, or the HX3 of Starfish, both drugs only prevent the disease from continuing to deteriorate, and can not really eradicate the VFV virus.

The clinical performance of the two drugs achieves the desired effect, which is a good result. With the production of both drugs, the two drugs allowed the VFV epidemic to brake on the edge of out of control.

When the world was initially happy to control the epidemic, a bigger news came out.

chapters.title: Chapter 469: : Congratulations, Success.
chapters.body:
Chapter 469: : Congratulations, Success.

"Kelly, you don't have to worry, the WHO has now developed a drug to relieve the disease, and soon, the special cure for the VFV virus will appear." Hardik looked at the girl wearing a health mask in the video, and was twisting her heart. pain. The girl who once was confident, now has no courage to face him with real face.

"Hadick, I am sorry." The blonde girl resisted tears and her voice trembled: "Let's break up."

"No, don't break up." Hadick heard the last few words and almost picked up: "I have all the rings ready, don't break up, you are sick, we will get married."

After that, Hadick pulled out a ring box from his pocket and placed it in front of the camera.

"I am waiting for you to come out."

At the other end of the video, the blonde girl couldn’t help but tears, but she didn’t agree.

"Hadick, Hadick. You see, there is news that Amber Pharmaceuticals has developed a special drug that can treat VFV. It also cures a VFV patient." When they talked, a similar appearance to Hadick. The youth ran in and put the phone in front of Hardik.

“Really?” Hadick seemed to suffocate the drowning man to see the straw and grab the phone.

Hadick burst into tears when he saw the news.

"Kelly, you see, the news of the special medicine came out, the special medicine research was successful. It is true, I didn't lie to you." Hadick put the phone in front of the video, excited and cried and laughed: "Wait for your illness Ok, we will get married and promise me, please promise me."

"Yeah." The blonde girl finally did not hold back, focusing on the head.

Seeing the blond girl nod, Hadick finally couldn't help it, burst into laughter and burst into tears, and cheered and hugged the young man next to him.

A small pharmaceutical company called Amber Pharmaceuticals in South Africa announced that it has developed a specific drug, gBoY, that can treat VFV, and cures a patient infected with VFV in the clinic.

The sudden news has attracted global attention.

The news spread and everyone began to question the authenticity of the news.

The top 72 team did not find a special drug for VFV in such a short period of time. It was successfully developed by a company that was not known.

In the crowd, everyone thought it was a fake news. The patient who was cured was interviewed by the reporter. The local hospital was confirmed and the news was true.

The world's first VFV rehabilitation case occurred.

As if the surprise of Tianda, there is no warning.

Soon, WHO sent people to confirm the authenticity of the news and finally decided to find the specific drug.

When the news came out, the Internet appeared to be a bioterror created by Ambal. The purpose was to make money with special effects drugs. The news was spread and the response was clarified several times. This voice has not disappeared.

On the fifth day of the news, Glaxo announced that it had acquired a 100% stake in Amber Pharmaceuticals and all its technology patents for $1.5 billion in cash.

The news of the acquisition was exposed, and the outside world was shocked. Soon, pharmaceutical oligarchy like Pfizer and AstraZeneca regretted it and was the first step by Glaxo.

Shortly after the news of the special drug gBoY came out, the WHO 72 team again sent good news.

The 72-person team successfully added Starfish's HX3 to Ag72 to create a new 'cocktail' drug Ag72ii, which can significantly delay the deterioration of VFV.

Because the VFV virus has lost its vitality, it has slowly changed its lifeless appearance. The haze has faded a lot, and the good news that has emerged in succession has brought the epidemic back from the out of control to the controlled area.

......

"Doctor, what is the situation?"

Fu Chaonan looked forward to Wu Bing and Chen Mo in front of him, with endless hopes. He hopes that the next words of the two are the answers he wants.

He is one of the patients infected with the VFV virus in China. After confirming the infection, he was isolated for the first time. I was isolated with him, along with his family and close friends.

Fortunately, his family and friends were not infected and have left the quarantine.

And he was in the isolation room, watching the condition worsening day by day, the pustules on his body slowly swelled, he was desperate, with a lucky heart, he has been waiting for special effects to appear.

Five days ago, the hospital came to contact him and said that there was a new drug clinical trial, the effect was unknown, there may be unknown risks, and he was willing to treat it.

If you don't treat it, you will have to wait for death. The treatment will have a hope of living a little. He and his family signed an agreement to voluntarily receive treatment without hesitation.

When he knew that Chen Mo was involved in his treatment, he was ecstatic.

Chen Mo is not a famous medical expert, but the man who created all kinds of magical technology will always have a feeling of conviction.

With unlimited hope, Fu Chaonan accepted a new treatment plan.

These days, the new plan did not disappoint him.

On the second day of treatment, the doctor told him that his condition had improved. Now it is the fifth day. When he changed the weakness of the past, the pustules on his body had disappeared, leaving a scar just scarred.

"According to the results of the blood test, the VFV virus on your body has disappeared and completely recovered." Wu Bing said.

"Great."

Fu Chaonan picked up, laughed wildly, smiled and cried, and bowed deeply toward Chen Mo and Wu Bing. During this time, I tasted the warmth of the world, and I walked around in the ghost gate. Chen Mo and Wu Bing gave him a freshman.

......

"Congratulations, success." Wu Fu said in the isolation room of Fu Chaonan, she did not expect that Chen Mo's method is really effective.

"You are also a participant. Without you, research is not so fast, and credit is everyone's."

Chen Mo finally breathed a sigh of relief.

He has verified that the potential agent enhances the antibodies produced by immune cells and, after purification, does have the function of clearing the VFV virus.

According to his ideas, the human immune cells were strengthened with potential agents, and the VFV virus was placed therein to stimulate the intensified immune cells to produce antibodies and purified to obtain serum. Then, the HX3 agent is used to reduce the activity of the VFV virus in the patient, and the purified antibody serum is injected.

This has the effect of eliminating viruses in the body.

This program has been unanimously recognized by the expert group. They tested the treatment on monkeys. On the third day of the experiment, the virus disappeared in the monkeys and the program was successful. After many experiments, all of them were successful, and the cure rate of the experimental monkeys was 100%. This result made the participants excited.

Chen Mo will not use the program on Zhao Min before determining that this treatment plan is harmless to the body, so only other clinical volunteers should be treated first to see the situation.

The potential potency agent is only effective for human cells and is ineffective for animals, so it is necessary to use human plasma to make antibody serum. Only a small amount of antibody serum is produced, and only five patients can be clinically tested at present.

Fu Chaonan was the last patient, and his body's virus disappeared without any side effects.

All five people have recovered.

It has been determined that this scheme does work.

Other members of the expert team are looking for ways to make monoclonal antibodies, allowing this special antibody to be mass-produced, so that it can mass produce specific drugs that can treat VFV.

“Is it necessary to treat Zhao Min now?”

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

“A South African company has gBoY, do you want to try it with their medicines first?”

"gBoY is a clinical trial drug. We are also a clinical trial program. There are examples of cures. We are seeing it with our own eyes, and our own things, knowing the roots, do you believe them, or believe in yourself?" Chen Mo asked.

chapters.title: Chapter 470: : Rehabilitation
chapters.body:
Chapter 470: : Rehabilitation

Shi Hongtu, Wu Bing, Chen Mo and other medical experts led the development of new drug clinical trials, successfully cured 5 cases of VFV infection, the cure rate was 100%, the patient's physical condition is good. The team of experts has found a solution to treat the VFV virus and is currently looking for a solution to produce a specific drug.

The news was exploded from the most authoritative CCTV, and an interview video of the rehabilitation patients was released.

The news was instantly topped by the major platforms, and the comments below were quickly overwhelmed by the cheers of netizens. Although the main areas of the VFV virus outbreak are Europe and North America, as a country open to the outside world, the country is inevitably affected.

Even if measures are taken in time to isolate them, there are more or less confirmed cases in various open cities. There are more than 100 cases in the country.

Not as terrible as foreign countries, but the horrors of North America and Europe have caused many people in China to be frightened.

The recent emergence of good news is undoubtedly a booster for the people. In particular, the officially announced medical team, as well as the name of Chen Mo, shows that Chen Mo really entered the front line of the fight against the epidemic.

“Medical team V587, call all frontline medical staff!!”

"Where is there Chen Mo this? Is it not letting people live?"

"Chen Mo said: Computer experts who don't want to be doctors are not good physicists."

“Material experts, computer experts, artificial intelligence experts, robot experts, physicists, and now can learn medicine, Chen Mo is a true cross-border god. I admire most people, no one.”

"Everyone here, I want to ask, is there anything Chen Mo will not?"

"Reply: No children will be born."

"Reply: I won't marry the old lady; the old lady is a woman that Chen Mo can never get. (Well, Chen Mo's wife, saved the universe in the last life? Why not me? Chen Mo, a good man, can't hang a tree Shang, give us some soup, I will be willing to be a junior.)"

"Reply: I can't hang on two trees. I am a small four."

"Reply: When the small five."

"Reply: Destroy the formation, Lao Tzu is a man Chen Mo will never get."

The network cheered, and the domestic VFV virus was overwhelmed.

The people who disappeared in the past and the disappearance of the streets reappeared; the aunts dancing in the square also gathered again and took off their masks; in various cities, they began to organize a collective fluorescent night running, and all parties congratulated.

Immediately thereafter, the Army Ant Group announced that it would donate 20 million medical supplies to WHO as a material to fight the VFV virus.

WHO also sent a team of experts to the capital to learn about the experience and programs of treating VFV virus.

......

Xiao Yu put the last document in his hand, and he had a slightly tired eyebrow and a light breath.

During this time, she temporarily took over the position of the president of the marching ant and handled the company's affairs. Sitting in this position, she realized how complicated and complicated the problems Zhao Min faced every day.

Usually, Zhao Min decided to make a big deal, just saying a word and signing a document.

It seems very simple, but the process of really summing up this sentence, making decisions, and things to consider, involves too many aspects.

This position, in one sentence, grasps the direction of the company. Once the direction is wrong, it means that the company's development is wrong, wasting the company's funds, manpower, resources and so on. In the event of irreparable wrong decisions, the company will also get into trouble.

For a large group like the marching ant group, there are more to be considered at the helm.

Zhao Min is sick, Chen Mo goes to study drugs and treatment programs, and neither of them can take charge of the company's final decision. As Chen Mo's wife and a member of the company's name, she is the most suitable temporary decision-making candidate, so she volunteered to temporarily take over the position.

She used to be with Zhao Min. She learned a lot of experience. This time she rushed the ducks to the shelves. With the help of Julie and other inkwomen, she managed to cope with the company's affairs, but could not do it as easily as Zhao Min.

Relaxed, Xiaoyu began to look at the latest news, and the eyebrows did not consciously stretch.

During this time, I was afraid to disturb Chen Mo’s drug research, and she did not dare to contact Chen Mo. Up to now, she has received a lot of news about Chen Mo, and all the news can only be learned through news reports on the Internet.

The number of deaths of VFV cases that are occasionally exposed on the Internet will always make her unconsciously worried. Fortunately, the news of the patient's cure was reported in the capital. The medical expert group also had Chen Mo's participation, and the heart she was carrying was put down.

It’s rare to finish the work a little idle, and the small fishing point switches to the news of the medical team. The following comments, in addition to boasting the medical team, the rest are boasting, let her mouth unconsciously reveal a proud smile.

My own man is really very good, so good sometimes makes her feel troubled.

"Little fisher sister, Mu Ge came to the video call." The projection of the ink girl fell on the side of the small fisherman. Now the new image of the ink girl is a woman in a white tight-fitting dress, with the look and body that makes women look good. When Xiaoyu saw the new image of the ink girl, she was shocked once.

"Connected, fast connected." Xiaoyu's exhaustion was swept away, and he did not win.

"Small fish."

"Husband."

Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo’s projection appear in the office, and walked to the side with joy, returning to the weak appearance of the past. To take over the position of the company's acting president, she must show a strong side to the outside world, and then the majesty of the decision-makers. Every day, I feel so tired. Now facing Chen Mo, all her disguise is removed, or Chen Mo is a weak little woman.

"I haven't seen this time, and I have become the overbearing president." Chen Mo saw Xiaoyu's office clothes and laughed. This attire is really interesting.

"You are not allowed to make fun of me." Xiao Yu was not happy at all.

"Think of me?"

"Think, think every day." Xiao Yu nodded without hesitation: "What about Zhao Min? How is she doing now?"

"How do you care about Zhao Min, don't care about your husband?" Chen Mo said with a taste.

"Even Zhao Min’s vinegar is eaten, really nothing." Seeing Chen Mo’s expression, Xiao Yu Le: “I have seen you well, of course, I know that you are fine. Quickly, how is Zhao Min’s sister?”

"Fortunately, not to be insulted, she almost recovered, and she can be discharged after two days."

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu talked about the process of treating Zhao Min during this time. He heard that Zhao Min’s condition was almost cured, and the last worry of Xiao Yu disappeared completely, and his spirit improved a lot.

"I am going to the capital tomorrow, and I will be discharged from Zhao Min."

"She was frowning in the past two days, and her face was not shown to me. You brought the ointment that I gave you to use it for her, or she would die." Chen Mo said.

"it is good."

"How is your child?"

“Parents are taking good care of them, they let me not worry, and handle the work with peace of mind.” Xiao Yu said.

"That's it."

I haven’t been in contact for a long time, and the two have been tired on the phone for a long time.

After fifteen minutes, Xiaoyu hangs up and his face returns to a soft smile. The phone informed Julie and others to help deal with the company's affairs, and told everyone that Zhao Min recovered.

Upon hearing the news that Zhao Min is about to recover, the top of the marching ant group, the collective sigh of relief, the repressed atmosphere of the entire marching ant group disappeared instantly.

chapters.title: Chapter 471: : I Want To Abuse You First.
chapters.body:
Chapter 471: : I Want To Abuse You First.

The capital, Tangshan Hospital, is the place where the capital is concentrated and treated.

Zhao Min with a mask, the black hair of the shawl covers the neck, only the forehead and eyes are exposed in the air. The little marks on the forehead are already scarred, and on the delicate skin, it looks distressing.

From the ward, Zhao Min saw the doctors and nurses waiting outside. Everyone was filled with a smile on their faces. They were proud to participate in the anti-war of the VFV virus. Lanxi also stood next to him wearing a mask.

“Thank you all the doctors.” Zhao Min took a deep bow to many doctors and then handed out an envelope to Shi Hongtu: “This is 5 million that I personally donated to the hospital. As a fund for treating VFV virus, I hope to help the infection. The patients with the VFV virus are extra, and they are used to donate to the poor patients in the hospital."

"This is our duty." Shi Hongtu took over the envelope and said: "Ms. Zhao is a good person. I am the patient and the family of the patient. Thank you, this money will definitely be used in the hands of those in need. ”

"What about him?" Zhao Min looked around and didn't find Chen Mo's trace: "Why didn't Chen Mo come?"

"He said that his mission was completed, and the rest of the matter was closed by us. He was waiting for you outside." Wu Bing said complicatedly. The strange man, always with a mysterious aura, can not help but curiosity, deep into it.

"Thank you." Zhao Min Chao Wu Bing nodded slightly, looked at her deeply, turned and left.

......

"Look, you can say on the Internet that you can't hang on a tree. They want to drink soup and volunteer to be a junior. What about the women? The wolves are staring at my husband. I have a very unsafe feeling." Outside Tangshan Hospital, Xiao Yu smiled and looked at Chen Mo, with a dangerous light in his eyes.

"Three thousand weak waters, I only take a scoop, I am a man they will never get." Chen Mo's desire for life is unprecedentedly powerful.

"Don't want to take the second scoop, the third scoop? Maybe the taste is different?"

"This scoop, I can taste several different flavors in one night, three thousand flavors, taste it sooner or later, but also tonight..." Chen Mo smiled badly, and he felt a pain in his waist. I had to breathe and breathe, and I immediately shut up.

"Big bad guys, don't talk nonsense." Xiao Yu's face twitched Chen Mo's waist flesh, and even in the broad daylight, said this, but no one is next to it, or she has to be ashamed to die.

Xiao Yu was holding Chen Mo’s arm and chatting, his eyes always at the door of the hospital. Waiting for the two, and the family of Lanxi not far away.

Not long after, I saw Zhao Min and Lan Xi’s figure coming out of the hospital.

"Zhao Min sister, I want to die you." Xiao Yu greeted Zhao Qian.

"Are you sure you are not thinking of you man?" Zhao Min teased, but the voice was with joy, holding Chen Mo tightly.

"I want to." Xiao Yu did not deny, followed by a mysterious saying: "Zhao Min, I brought you some good things."

"what?"

"This." Xiao Yu took out two white bottles from the bag. The bottle is made of ceramic material. It is very delicate: "I was shot with scars. He specially prepared ointments for me to remove scars and marks. ”

Xiao Yu turned over the shoulder that he had shot in the first time. The bullet wound on it had disappeared. There was only a white skin and no scars.

"This ointment can not only remove scars, but also whiten."

“Really?” Zhao Min’s voice was a little excited.

She is wearing a mask now, because the pustules on her face are cured after the cure, and the spots are red, like acne marks, very ugly. This ointment given by Xiao Yu is undoubtedly what she wants most now.

Women love beauty, and she is strong as a woman. Moreover, her character does not allow those who influence him.

"Of course it is true, I will help you paint it back to the hotel. For up to three days, the scar will disappear." Xiao Yu said.

"This guy, what good things are only for you, not for me, this is life."

Not far from Chen Mo, I saw two women talking and laughing, and happy. He is most afraid that after Zhao Min is discharged from the hospital, he will be affected because he was sick. Now it seems redundant.

"Boss." A joyful voice interrupted Chen Mo’s thoughts and turned to see Lanxi with his parents. He has already come to him: "This is my parents."

Lan Xi’s mother, Cao Yuling, is well maintained. The woman who is nearly 50 years old seems to be only in her early forties. The man with gold glasses next to him, the temperament of the man, is Lanxi’s father, Lan Qingyang.

"Uncle and aunt are good." Chen Mo nodded politely.

"Dr. Chen, thank you for healing my family Xixi this time." The mother of Lanxi was talking. While talking, she looked at Chen Mo, but saw the little fishermen not far away, and then looked at her daughter, in the eyes. It’s a pity that it’s a shame.

"You're welcome, Auntie. Lanxi is a business trip for the company, it will be infected with the virus, she is fine now, I am also assured." Chen Mo said: "Right, this is for you."

Chen Mo asked Wang Hai to take out two bottles of ointment and hand it to Lanxi.

"This ointment can remove the scars on your body, wait for the body to recover completely, and then go to work at the company."

The Lanxi family left, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min also came over. It’s just that Zhao Min’s gaze is a bit complicated, and Chen Mo can clearly feel it.

When I think of Zhao Min, I want to give her a hug. Chen Mo is numb on the scalp. Xiao Yu is here, if it is raised at this time, he will go to sleep on the floor at night.

"Welcome back."

"Thanks to you, or I will die." Zhao Min saw Chen Mo's embarrassment, and did not mention the hug.

"Husband, I and Zhao Min are going to travel in the capital for a few days. When her scars are good, go back. Are you going back to stay with us?" Xiao Yu asked.

"Of course, staying inside, smelling the smell of disinfectant water for a long time, I have to relax and relax."

"You stay, the one who suffers is me. I am just sick, I have to be abused by dogs every day, be such a big light bulb." Zhao Min was speechless to the two, and did not know what expression under the mask.

"I can't deal with all your consumption in the past few days, I have included it." Chen Mozhen said.

"This is what you said. It is enough to prepare your wallet in the past few days. We must also give us the hard work. I must abuse you first." Zhao Min took Xiao Yu and walked in the car, leaving Chen Mo with a proud look. It seems to be saying that this is no interest in embracing.

On the way, Chen Mo was very uncomfortable watching the two people talking and laughing, they seemed to be an outsider, but they did not know what the two women were talking about, so mysterious. However, when he saw that Zhao Min was recovering from a relaxed mood, he was also relieved.

Eating, shopping, shopping, Chen Mo once again realized the horror power of women shopping, especially when two women. Clothes, shoes, jewelry, cosmetics, etc., all the things you buy are on him, and he has to pay. Zhao Min is not as rehabilitated as a disease, even if he has developed his body through potential, he can't afford it.
