chapters.title: Chapter 472: : Ending
chapters.body:
Chapter 472: : Ending

It was night, Zhao Min was on the bed, in her back in the air, on her fair skin, a little bit of scars, this is the scar left after the VFV virus healed, it makes people feel distressed.

Sitting next to the small fish, holding the ointment, smeared on the scar meticulously.

"Zhao Minjie, your body is good."

"You are no worse than me, but you are cheaper than Chen Mo's big pig hoof." Zhao Min teased and laughed.

"Where is it." Xiao Yu also laughed.

"I guess that guy, now blaming me on the bed, I robbed his wife tonight." Zhao Min filled the face of Chen Mo's resentment, and laughed happily.

"He knows that I am giving you medicine, I won't complain. I let him sleep first and accompany you tonight." Xiao Yu took some white ointment and gently applied it to the scar on Zhao Min's back.

"Oh, loyalty, then I can't try his wife's feel tonight." Zhao Min grabbed Xiao Yu.

"Ah, don't mess, Zhao Min sister, take medicine."

Not long after, the room was in a mess.

The next morning, Zhao Min came out of the room and saw Chen Mo, who was watching the news, and walked slowly to sit next to him.

"I still want to watch the news. Your wife stayed with me last night. What do you think?"

"No idea." Chen Mo said, drinking milk, said with no expression. It’s rare to reunite. As a result, Xiaoyu didn’t come back last night, let him ‘single vacant’. It’s not good to think about it.

"I gave you green last night."

"Oh... cough..." was stunned by Zhao Min, and Chen Mo squirted hot milk, his face flushed and almost turned his back: "You have more and more potential as a female hooligan."

"No way, life is forced." Zhao Min smiled.

"Where are you going today?"

"Playing, it's a rare vacation."

After breakfast, the three men dressed up before going out.

The therapeutic agent was completed, Zhao Min’s illness was cured, Chen Mo’s task was completed, but the outside world was not calm.

......

According to WHO statistics, the number of confirmed cases of VFV infection in the world exceeded 35,000, the number of isolated people exceeded 480,000, and the number of deaths reached 5,256. Medical personnel and medical supplies in the hardest hit areas were in a hurry, and the number of infected people was still rising.

The news released by WHO has shaken the whole world.

The 72-member group and the Starfish Company have already mass-produced drugs that alleviate the onset of VFV virus. Although the prolonged deterioration time has not been cured, the members of the Death Sickle (RS) organization have not yet been captured, and the root causes of the virus have not been completely eliminated. Still have not continued to poison.

Countries and health organizations have urged GlaxoSmithKline to complete the technical handover of the acquisition as soon as possible and mass-produce gBoY.

Under a number of convenient channels, Glaxo completed the acquisition of Ambor and announced the official production of gBoY.

gBoY special effects drugs announced mass production, like a dose of cardiotonic agent, so that medical personnel in various countries are pleasantly surprised. In addition to harvesting the research and development technology of special effects drugs, Glaxo also earned a lot from the middle, and gained global fame, which made many pharmaceutical companies envy.

Glaxo announced that gBoY was in mass production soon. After the Huaxia medical expert team did not fall behind, it announced that it would break through the bottleneck of mass production technology of monoclonal antibody for VFV treatment, and mass-produce monoclonal antibodies for VFV virus in rabbits. ConocoPhillips. ConocoPhillips needs to cooperate with Starfish HX3 Pharmacy and recover within a week.

Mass production of two drugs that can treat VFV virus is good news for patients in the disaster area.

As mass-produced drugs are sent to the hardest hit areas around the world. As the supply of medicines increases, the global pressure to fight the VFV virus begins to ease.

Half a month, the last case of VFV virus infection in China was discharged, and it was announced that the domestic VFV virus was completely eliminated, and the ban on VFV virus was announced.

Immediately thereafter, in addition to the most severely infected countries in Europe and North America, the countries and regions of the VFV virus-afflicted areas announced the removal of the VFV virus shortly after obtaining medical treatment, and the isolation and warning against the VFV virus.

A month later, the WHO announced that the world's VFV-infected people experienced negative growth for the first time, and the VFV virus's fight against it achieved a staged victory.

When the countries cheered for the victory against the VFV virus, another news was exposed.

The team of Nobel Prize winner Dolly Viz has discovered that the VFV special drug gBoY contains ingredients from various research results of Dorivitz. The case of the kidnapping of the disappearance of Doliwitz may be related to the company.

The news caused the whole world to shake.

The Counter-Terrorism Organization and Interpol quickly organized personnel to conduct an investigation led by Dollywicz. Glaxo is also under investigation, gBoY stopped production and began testing for toxicity.

Not long after the investigation, it was revealed that the original Anboer boss and his family were missing, and the medical doctor who announced the development of the drug was missing. Ambor was backing up the RS organization to make terrorist funds and earn terrorist funds.

The $1.5 billion in cash that Amber has received from Glaxo has been washed away through various money-laundering channels, and I don’t know where to go. RS members quietly do this when they focus on the VFV virus.

Washing out $1.5 billion in such a short period of time, there are obviously specific operational plans.

Shortly afterwards, the RS organization posted a video on Twitter, claiming that the purpose of retaliation for the aggressor was reached and the continued release of the VFV virus.

The news of all kinds of sensation has made the world feel lost.

At the international conference, countries have jointly issued a statement to include RS in the anti-human terrorism group. At the same time, in the international arena, the high rewards are passed to RS members. It’s just that no one has ever seen any member of the RS organization. It seems that there is no such organization in the world.

Many international organizations began to investigate the clues of Dorivitz.

However, no one found any clues about Dorivitz that the Dorivitz and RS organizations seemed to evaporate.

The time is maintained for three months.

These three months are the three months that the world is crucial to combat bioterrorism, especially in the hardest hit areas such as Europe and North America.

As Glaxo was found to be unrelated to Ambal, gBoY special effects did not have serious physical harm, and Glaxo was allowed to continue mass production of gBoY because of the need to fight the virus.

Coupled with China's ConocoPhillips mass production, the number of people infected with VFV virus continues to grow negatively, and more and more countries and regions have announced the lifting of the ban on VFV.

Three months ago, people were afraid of the VFV virus as a devil. When they heard the VFV virus, they changed color. Today, three months later, most of the people’s lives have returned to normal.

The epidemic situation in Europe and North America was controlled, countries began to lift travel warnings for the hardest hit areas, and the ban on entry in Europe and North America was also revoked.

When the last case of the infected person came out of the hospital, there were no more new cases and suspected cases in the world, and the VFV virus epidemic basically ended.

There was an episode during the period. The WHO wanted to award a medal of honor to Chen Mo, who found the treatment plan. However, Chen Mo was unwilling to receive it, saying that the credit was for the entire medical team. Finally, WHO announced that it would award the Medal of Honor to the medical expert team in China. Shi Hongtu representatives attended.

This bio-terrorism, from the beginning to the end, lasted for nearly six months, bringing the death toll of more than 8,000 people worldwide, leaving scars and shadows on tens of thousands of people.

The VFV virus has also been included in the highest level of bioterrorism weapons by disease control centers in various countries.

The biological terror that made the world feel fearful came to an end, and there are still no clues from the RS organization and Dorivitz.

In the company, only two people can represent Chen Mo, the boss wife Xiao Yu and Zhao Min, and now there is one more, showing how high the status of this woman in the boss's mind.

Chen Mo sat down on the sofa, Zhao Min and Mo Nuyi left and right, sitting down next to Chen Mo, Wang Hai did not hesitate, sitting on the sofa.

"This time, please come over, there is one thing."

Chen Mo spoke, and no one spoke. Although he wondered what was going to bring them all together, but did not ask, listen quietly.

“The company has two new companies, which are military enterprises and require management personnel.”

Chen Mo opened the door.

Hearing two military industrial enterprises, Wang Hai Black Hawk and others were surprised. Zhu He and Zhong Lei were a lot calmer because they used to be a bodyguard next to Zhao Min and knew that Zhao Min was busy registering a military enterprise. .

“One company is in China and the other is in Tanzania. You are a special retired person and the company has the most contacts with this. I plan to select people from among you to manage these two companies”

Originally, I thought that there was only one company that managed from a few people, but now there are two, which is unexpected by Chen Mo, but fortunately, there are enough people.

Several people are silent and face each other.

The two military industrial enterprises, the domestic market is good, the environment is stable, and only need to be managed well. The key is the Tanzanian company, which belongs to the third world countries. The environmental conditions are self-evident and certainly very bitter.

"You can give you two days to consider, give me a reply within two days, and voluntarily be the principle." Chen Mo said.

"Boss, let me go to Tanzanyi." Chen Mo’s words just fell, Wang Hai opened, and finally his eyes fixed. Some opportunities need to be grasped, otherwise there will be no chance in the future.

"I will accompany the sea brother." Zhong Lei opened his mouth and his face was calm. Zhong Lei is one of the few people who are the most lean. Since entering the security team, there are not many words, but the work is neat and clean, and the mind is very flexible.

"I am going too," said the Black Hawk.

"I will go too." Zhu He opened.

"Not to enjoy, not so many people, I and the president, but also need bodyguards, as well as the company's security department. Wang Hai and Zhong Lei in the past, you pick some people who are willing to go with your past, the funds, The president will give you all the details, and all the details will be provided to you, and then you need to rely on yourself."

Chen Mo made a final conclusion. The best candidate in his heart is also Wang Hai. Wang Hai followed him for the longest time and his work was the most stable.

Wang Hai and Zhong Lei both nodded and promised.

“The domestic company, Zhu He went to the management, who needs it, and the president said. Blackhawk, Taishan and Anan stayed, managed the company’s security system, trained security personnel, and was responsible for the security issues of me and the president.”

Chen Mo divided the work of several people clearly.

There is now a robot of ink, and there is not much security around him. Each of these is a special person retired. After various trainings, mastering various skills, such a good talent is not used, it is a waste.

"This is the company's information." Zhao Min saw Chen Mo arranged, handed over the information in his hand to Wang Hai and Zhu He: "Army ants equipment and worker ants defense. Contradictions, see how you play."

"Ink girl, you will give information about Tanzanyi to Wang Hai." Chen Mo said.

"Good." The ink woman got up and took a u disk into the computer. After a while, she pulled it out and handed it to Wang Hai: "Tangsani's information, customs, cultural folklore, as well as the official address of the registered place, relatives information They are all here."

chapters.title: Chapter 476: : Nanoscale 3D Laser Printer Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 476: : Nanoscale 3D Laser Printer Technology

"Mergo, we searched hot on our photos."

After Wang Hai and others left, the ink girl opened, and the light curtain of the holographic projection fell in the office. The news above is the hot search list of all major platforms.

It didn't take an hour to go to the hot search.

Chen Mo looked a little speechless.

"Who is the mysterious woman around Chen Mo? Chen Mo's new woman? Is the mysterious woman around Chen Mo a fairy? There is a play, you said that you are going to go to the keyboard tonight? Or is it durian?" Seeing the topic of hot search, Zhao Minle stand up.

"Small fishermen have not seen ink girls. These gossip news spread so fast." Chen Mo glanced at the comments, crying and laughing.

All kinds of men are big pig hooves, and they are as if they are really like.

"There are too many melons to eat, the network is best at catching the wind and catching the shadows. Moreover, there is a big beauty of the ink girl. Look at this posture, the ink girl wants to become a network red man." Zhao Min said.

"The net is not even known by the name."

"Mergo, do you want to delete the topic?"

"Don't pay attention to these things, and don't have to respond. Otherwise, some people will say that they are guilty conscience, and the explanation is to cover up." Chen Mo said. He has seen many examples of such things.

"Good." The ink girl nodded.

"I went back to work, and I need to clarify the matter of the ink girl, just tell me." Zhao Min and Chen Mo made a greeting and got up and left.

"Ink girl, I take a break, wake up me when something important."

Chen Mo went back to the lounge and went to the technology library. The completion of the ink girl means that the war robot is completed, and now only two technologies are left, and the technical task of the [technical apprentice] stage can be completed, and the next authority can be entered.

This is something he never forgets, and he has the highest curiosity about the technology library.

In eight directions, only two light curtains remain lit.

Biomedical, mechanical.

Which one to choose?

This is a problem that Chen Mo is entangled.

After hesitating for a long time, Chen Mo put his palm on the books in the mechanical field.

Severe tingling, I have to bear this feeling for a while, this time the pain is similar to the war robot, only dizziness and nausea, no feeling of vomiting. The pain disappeared, and Chen Mo felt more knowledge memory in his mind.

"Nano-scale 3D laser printer technology", field: mechanical engineering, industrial design; permission level: technology apprentice; product introduction: ultra-short wave laser pulse curing material, forming nano-scale products, the minimum scanning range of this 3D printer can reach 100 Nano, prints most materials.

After seeing this technology, Chen Mo was easy.

Once this technology is successful, it means that he can produce ultra-precision parts of any structure, which is fast and cost-reduced. This is the technology of industrial transformation.

nanoscale.

This precision technology is sufficient for most precision equipment needs.

He has previously modified a probationary laser 3D printer, but the precision is not enough. It can be used to produce ordinary spare parts. The production speed is not slow. Most of the robot's spare parts are 3D printed.

However, high precision machine tools are required for parts with high precision requirements. With this nano-scale 3D printer completed, Chen Mo no longer has to worry about the problem of processing ultra-precision parts.

After slowing down, Chen Mo picked up several technologies in the technology library that helped to study 3D printers before they quit from the technology library.

Within the science and technology library, there are only books in the field of biomedical science.

Chen Mo did not wake up, but continued to sleep with his eyes closed. I have just completed the study of war robots today, and it is okay to rest for a long time.

Until he got off work, Chen Mokai woke up and played a game in the office. He and the ink girl rushed home, and bought a bunch of roses on the road.

He is not sure about Xiao Yu’s acceptance of the ink girl. If there is no way, he will be jealous.

"Come back." Chen Mo and the ink woman entered the door, Xiao Yu will meet, but Xiao Yu's gaze is swept back and forth on the ink woman, with a full of curiosity: "Ink girl, hello."

Xiao Yu naturally recognizes the appearance of the ink girl. Today, on the hot news, she saw the photo of the ink girl, which is similar to the image in the virtual projection. However, the image in the virtual projection, there is no blue stone in the eyebrows, and now the ‘real person’ looks like a temperament.

"Little fisher sister is good." The ink girl gave Xiao Yu a smile.

"I just brought it back today, and I brought it back." Chen Mo hurriedly sent the flowers behind him to Xiao Yu: "Give it to you."

"Wow, thank you husband."

Xiao Yu surprised to hold flowers, face sweet, Chen Mo sent her flowers a few times, this nerd did not send in love, wake up at the wedding, now occasionally a little surprise, sometimes angry, will be given a bunch of flowers Live, she feels that she has no interest.

No interest, no interest.

After watching the flowers, Xiao Yu seems to think of something, looking at Chen Mo with a playful look: "The news can be said, the genius Chen Mo, there is a mysterious woman, suspected new girlfriend."

"That, that is the entertainment media guess. You won't be really angry?"

"No, I know the identity of the ink girl, I will not eat the vinegar of the ink girl, just think of what Zhao Min and I said."

"What?"

"She said that the ink girl is realistic, and now it seems that it is really realistic."

"..."

Chen Mo almost squirted out a blood, remembering the tone and scene of Zhao Min’s words at the time. He couldn’t bear to look at these two words now.

That female hooligan.

"Can I touch the ink girl?" asked Xiao Yu.

"You ask her." Chen Mo said.

He now tries to treat the ink girl as an adult, and may be helpful to the future of the intelligent emotional upgrade of the ink girl.

"Little fisherman can touch." Ink nodded.

Get permission, Xiaoyu gently rubs on the ink girl, the skin is the same as the human, but there is no muscle, under the skin, it is alloy, hard state. However, there are two different places, that is, the chest and there, and the part of the chest is soft. It is also soft like it is said by Zhao Minjie.

The ink girl stood, curiously watching Xiaoyu groping on her, and there was no shyness.

Seeing the movement of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo’s heart was broken and almost ran down and fled.

His pure little fishing is definitely Zhao Min’s teaching.

"It's really true." Xiaoyu said with deep meaning.

Chen Mo felt like a stolen cat who was caught, and hurriedly explained: "Do you want me to explain why? This is what Ms. Chen asked for."

Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo’s nervous appearance and couldn’t help but smile. He ignored him and continued to explore on the ink girl: “What is this material? How is it the same as the skin?”

“A special artificial skin, new material.” Chen Mozhen explained.

“The material is not clean?”

After seeing the eyes of Xiaoyu’s serious inquiry, Chen Mo said: “Medical level, non-toxic and tasteless.”

"I can rest assured that."

"Reassured? What is assured?" Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu with some incomprehension.

"When I go back to my mother's house, you want to find an ink girl." Xiaoyu said.

"I..." Chen Mo was almost killed by Xiao Yu, and he wanted to cry without tears. "When designing, I really didn't have this kind of idea. The ink girl wants to retain the characteristics of a woman, I will keep it, you have to believe me. ""

"I always believe in you, just telling you that my wife allowed it." Xiao Yu grabbed the ink girl's hand and was still curious.

If she doesn't know the identity of the ink girl, she will never think that this is a robot, the appearance is exactly the same as the real person, or a temperament beauty.

"Wife, is it good to eat first? Very hungry." Chen Moyou said.

"Well, eat, the ink girl also went to the table to eat together." Today, I received the flowers from Chen Mo, Xiao Yu's mood is obviously good, said.

"Okay, Xiao Yujie." The ink girl nodded.

"Ink girls won't eat."

"You can sit on the table without eating, and later the ink girl is a member of the family."

Xiao Yu did not care about those things. The intelligence of the ink girl is very clear. She is already comparable to ordinary people. Apart from the human emotions and emotions, many other fields are far more than human beings.

The most important thing is that Momo is Chen Mo's most powerful research assistant and can help Chen Mo.

chapters.title: Chapter 477: : Ambition: Ridman
chapters.body:
Chapter 477: : Ambition: Ridman

Tansany, Mult City.

Zouwich stood around at the port and waited for someone to appear. He is a Tanzanian Chinese who grew up here because of his family background. He studied Chinese from an early age and also learned English and local Portuguese.

When you grow up, be a guide here.

Because of the advantages of mastering the language, his life here is not bad.

Especially in recent years, there are many tourists who come here to travel. He is proficient in three languages, is proficient in communication, and is very familiar with the humanistic environment here. His income is very impressive.

Someone contacted him the day before yesterday, and he was a guide. The pay was not low, so I came to the port to wait here early this morning.

Suddenly, the two Chinese men in suits and suits came out from the port. The spirit of Zouvich shocked and immediately greeted the smile: "Two Mr. Wang and Mr. Zhong?"

"Yes." Wang Hai nodded and looked at Zou Weiqi.

They have read the information of Zouwich and know that they are the guides they have made.

"Self-introduction, my name is Zou Wei, it should be the guide of your appointment." Zou Weizhi reached out and shook hands with Wang Haizhong Lei, piled up with a smile on his face.

As a guide, he is countless and has come from all over the world. These two men, they feel very special to them, certainly a big man.

"Hello, Zou Wizard." Wang Hai said.

"I don't know if there are any plans for the two to play?" Zouovic asked.

"We are here to open the factory, and you are bothered to take us to this place to talk about the surrounding environment." Wang Hai handed him an address.

The address is the land that Zhao Min purchased from Tanzanyi for the construction of the arsenal base. After two days of official approval from Tanzania, they started building the factory. There will be domestic construction companies to build, but they must also come to understand the environment.

The arsenal is a very sensitive enterprise. He and Zhong Lei discussed and set up an armed security team before the construction of the factory to ensure the smooth progress of the factory. After all, the security environment here is not so comfortable.

"Good, the two bosses please come with me."

Zou Qiu was busy nodding. It turned out to be the big boss of the investment factory. No wonder, Zou Weiqi became more active.

Wang Hai and Zhong Lei looked at each other and put the suitcase on board and boarded the vehicle of Zouwich.

"This location, not far from the port, is it convenient to say what business is doing? I have some understanding of the environment here, maybe I can help one or two suggestions."

"The production of some small machinery, mainly for export." Zhong Lei said.

"Oh, understand." Zou Wei said in a straightforward manner. "There is a lot of labor in Tanzan, and it is very cheap. Foreign-invested minerals and cashew processing factories all like to hire local people. Officials also encourage them. Foreign investment. Two factories are built, if you need, you can find me, I know where to hire some more diligent workers."

"It’s time to trouble Zou’s guide.” Zhong Lei said.

Zou Wei smiled and shook his head: "No trouble, my father said that there is an old saying in Huaxia: relying on friends outside. There is an acquaintance who can save a lot of things."

......

Angola country.

On the sea, not far from the coast, there are five people sitting in a luxurious villa.

Sitting in the first seat, is a middle-aged man, looks like 50 or 60 years old, with white hair and beard, dark brown skin, wearing a black long trench coat, brown-black eyes seem to have the power to penetrate the hearts, temperament mixed with long-term The majesty of the superiors is only a ****, but also gives a sense of wisdom.

Majesty and wisdom coexist.

The embarrassing wolf king, the crazy ambitious, desperate, this is the impression of the people who know him.

Leading the Dollyze kidnapping case, making the world's fearful VFV bio-terrorist Liric, at this time quietly sitting in the right hand of the middle-aged man, cleverly like a docile kitten, afraid to talk.

On the left hand side of the middle-aged man, is a blonde-white woman with a black rose on her left face and a cold eyes. She is the other deputy of the first man, code-named poison rose, the specific name, even Lirik is not clear, only know that this woman can not be tempted.

Opposite the first man, two black men in camouflage uniforms, generals. The general on the left had a bullet on the face of the old scar, which looked awkward; the general on the right, with the scum of the scum, was very well recognized.

If the Angolans see the two, they must know each other.

Angora's most elite two army generals, Makani and Mbo, are in charge of nearly one-third of Angola's strength.

In this way, the two men and one army, in front of the first man, still feel uneasy. They understand the character of this man, and accidentally do something wrong, even if they now have real power, they have no life.

They are the core personnel of the organization. They are very clear about the VFV bioterrorism that shocked the world. Only Lirik has arranged it. The man in front of him is just an order, and the process is not involved.

Only this will leave an indelible memory of terror in the world.

If this man is truly involved, the consequences will be even more horrible, and the life will be completely servant.

"Mr. Riederman, what do we do next?" Macani, with a bullet wound on his left face, asked carefully, and Mbo on the right looked at him too, and did not dare to relax.

"Capture the power." The first man spoke, his voice full of anger, with unquestionable majesty.

For him, capturing power seems to be a trivial matter. However, his words made Marconi and Mbo feel a big shock. They know that there will be such a day, when they really come, they are still embarrassed.

This thing is not working well, and their lives will be lost.

"What should we do?" Mbo pressed his nervousness and asked.

"Diogo will die. He is the rival of Vasorlen. At that time, there will be evidence of Vassaron's black hand exposure, overthrowing Vasorion and supporting the inside picture." Poison Rose took a photo from his pocket. To the eyes of two people: "When are you going to act, there are plans, someone will contact you."

"As long as the plan is completed, you are above the 10,000 people, control a country, what do you want?" Ridman took a sip of the cup at hand and said the voice indifferently.

"Good." Macani and Mbo nodded in a hurry, and I was expecting something.

When the two left, Ridman took off his glasses, and his eyes were so majestic that Lirik’s mind was nervous.

"How is that thing developed? Is it successful?"

"Dolitz and those researchers are studying, some progress, but when is it still not easy to say. Do you want to go down and see?"

Lerike honestly said the situation and did not dare to hide anything.

"No, I will notify me when that thing is finished," Ridman said.

"Okay." Liric nodded.

"Work hard, our goal is to build a strong country without having to let Westerners control exploitation."

"Understand." Li Rui focused on the head.

Going to the top of the villa and watching Reedman’s helicopter leave, Liric was completely relieved.

By the man, the pressure is not that big. But thinking of the next plan to start, Liric also looked forward to some more frightened.

"Sir, that thing, can Lirik be finished on time?" asked the poison rose on the plane.

"I don't know, scientific research may be successful tomorrow, maybe it will not progress in ten years." Ridman turned to look at the villa that was far away, and closed his eyes: "The next plan, clean and neat."

"Understand." The poison rose nodded.

chapters.title: Chapter 478: : Thank You For Your Present
chapters.body:
Chapter 478: : Thank You For Your Present

"At 5:46 pm local time, Angora politician Diordin was killed in a car accident two kilometers away from home. The vehicle was found five kilometers away from the crime scene. The murderer did not know where to go. The local police had issued a wanted order.

Diordin was born as a civilian and has recently been conducting election campaigns. He is optimistic about one of the most powerful candidates for Angola's next election. Some commentators believe that this is a planned murder. If this case is not handled properly, it may cause Angora to turmoil..."

It is murder! !

Chen Mo is eating breakfast, the morning news on the TV screen, calculating the time, things should happen in the early hours of the morning.

When this happens, I don't have to think about it. It is a planned premeditator. After a little attention, Chen Mo continues to concentrate on enjoying his breakfast. By his side, he is giving a small fish to the little unparalleled breastfeeding.

Ink quietly sat next to the small fisherman, looking at the unparalleled look at the unparalleled, seemingly curious.

"Ink girl, do you want to hug?" Seeing the little unparalleled, Xiaoyu sorted out the clothes and looked at the ink girl, asked.

"Yes." The ink girl nodded and immediately set the standard posture for holding the baby.

Xiao Yu smiled slightly, carefully placed the unparalleled in the arms of the ink girl, holding his hands, for fear that it would fall.

At this time, the little unparalleled, glaring at the exquisite eyes, not afraid of life, watching the ink girl laugh, very cute. The ink girl curiously looked at the little unparalleled in her arms and laughed.

"Ink girl, how are you feeling?" Xiao Yu asked curiously.

“Feeling?” The ink girl seems to be thinking and saying: “The unparalleled is very cute, it’s amazing.”

Seeing the warm scene, Chen Mo will smile, Xiao Yu really regards the ink girl as a member of the family and looks good.

"Well, let Wang Hao look, you should have breakfast."

Wang Hao is a nanny who has been invited from Xiao Yu's home. She knows the roots and has a good family background, so she can rest assured that she can look after her children occasionally.

When she heard Chen Mo’s call to her, Wang Hao hurried over and sat next to the ink girl, staring at the unparalleled look and looking at the ink girl. She couldn't see that the ink girl was a robot. She was very impressed with Chen Mo, and the two women got along so well.

"Husband, the day after tomorrow I went to a charity event to donate some poor families and out-of-school children who are seriously ill, just in Binhai." Xiaoyu looked forward to Chen Mo.

"Well, I want to go." Chen Mo nodded and promised, not forgetting: "But the safety is the most important. There are just a few robots to complete. I will bring one back tonight, and you will bring them around and call them pearls."

"Good." Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo promised her, nodded happily.

Since the Xinxin incident, he has paid special attention to the safety of his family. Now that the war robots are coming out, at least the safety of the family is a guarantee.

After breakfast, Chen Mo and the ink girl left the villa, Black Hawk and others have already waited outside.

Wang Hai and Zhong Lei decided to go to Tanzanyi. Zhu He was in charge of the domestic arsenal. The Black Hawk became the bodyguard around Chen Mo. Luo Yu was arranged next to Zhao Min, the security department of Anan Management Company, led by Baizhu and Taishan. The team is responsible for protecting the small fishermen and the unparalleled, Wu Qiang and others, responsible for the safety of his family.

“Hai Ge returned to the information that he had already arrived in Tanzania and was preparing for the factory. He planned to recruit a group of security personnel and train them into armed security,” said the Black Hawk.

"Well, let him do it according to his own ideas, lack of money and the president said." Chen Mo nodded.

Now that the construction of the domestic arsenal is on the right track, Tanzanyi will also start, but the environment is relatively less stable, training a group of armed security, completely for the construction of the factory, and can get on the right track as soon as possible.

......

At the entrance of the No. 1 building, Zhao Min got off the bus and looked around. He followed Chen Mo’s car and greeted him. Still a good professional attire, white and beautiful, but also outstanding ability, true white rich beauty, Zhao Min at this time looks good.

"Look for me?" asked Zhao Min.

Just on the way to the company, Chen Mo directly asked her to come to the No. 1 building. Without asking, she came over.

"Give you a gift." Chen Mo led Zhao Min into the first building.

"The robot that was said last time?"

"Ok."

Chen Mo nodded slightly and entered the robot laboratory all the way.

In the experimental room, the seven robots stood quietly in a row, three men and four women, with their eyes closed. The male robot is relatively tall, one meter eighty-five, and the female robot is only one meter seven.

This is the first batch of war robots produced. The exterior is covered with artificial skin. If you don't take close attention, it is difficult to recognize that this is a robot. This is convenient for hiding people's eyes and ears. After all, with a robot out, it will be very noticeable wherever you go.

"Choose one." Chen Mo said.

"This one."

Zhao Min pointed to the robot on the far side.

The female robot looks handsome, no ink girl, but it is beautiful. On her arm, a small blue flower with a thumb size, like a tattoo, is a characteristic mark on her body.

Several other robots have the same shape, but each has its own unique characteristics, which are well recognized.

"The long press here starts, long press the shutdown." Chen Mo pointed to the switch of the female robot.

Zhao Min reached out and touched the button slightly in the ditch, and looked at Chen Mo: "You have a lot of bad taste, is the switch button set here?"

"I have to think about practicality. It's too obvious. If you are turned off by others, you don't have to play." Chen Mo said.

Ten seconds later, the female robot opened her eyes and looked at Chen Mo.

"Mr." The female robot opened to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo nodded slightly and turned on the identity information entry function of the robot.

"All robots activate, I will default to the highest privilege owner. You can now enter the identity information, after entering the information, you can direct her, without my information modification, she can not be taken away by others. But her Smart, not as strong as the ink girl, after all, the ink girl is a bit special."

"Her eyes are the camera? Will you use this robot to peek at me to change clothes or take a shower?" Zhao Min asked as he entered the information.

Chen Mo is a ghost and looks at Zhao Min. This girl dares to say anything.

"I don't want to peek at it."

"I want to be beautiful, I want to take it back to me? I didn't say I mind."

Chen Mo instantly retreated, ignoring Zhao Min’s ridiculous smile: “Hurry up, this robot can have hundreds of millions of dollars. One part inside is more expensive than a car. Her laser is at the navel, and there are weapons, missiles and The bomb is not available for the time being."

After entering the information, Zhao Mincai laughed: "She is called Xiaoqi in the future."

"Give her two sets of clothes." Chen Mo pointed to the set of clothes in the glass cabinet next to it, which was specially designed for robots.

"I took the small seven back to deal with the work, and something called me." Zhao Min saw Xiaoqi wearing clothes, and he smiled at Chen Mo, and said hard to say: "Thank you for your gift, I like it very much."

After that, with Xiaoqi, he did not return to the robot lab.

"Ink girl, put out the design of the 3D printer."

Chen Mo put on the experimental robes, put on goggles, and began research on nano-scale 3D printers.

chapters.title: Chapter 479: : Chaos
chapters.body:
Chapter 479: : Chaos

At present, the mainstream 3D printing technology, the technical bottleneck is relatively slow operation speed and poor resolution.

When a higher level of solution is required, 3D printing technology creates structures layer by layer, and when the structure is created, insufficient resolution is the main cause of inefficiency.

The nanoscale 3D printing technology obtained by the Science and Technology Library is cured by ultra-short ultraviolet light to form a nano-scale product.

However, after studying so many things, laser is one of Chen Mo's best techniques. The laser research of holographic technology has made him have long been immersed in laser technology, and there are many accumulated technologies.

Nano-scale 3D printing technology, for Chen Mo's technical reserves, is mainly the resolution problem, as well as the problems of new materials, as well as UV light ink (uV ink) and curing degree.

Among the techniques obtained, there is a new formulation of uV ink called electron based ink. Under the bombardment of high-energy electron beams, the double bonds of the monomer or polymer material are unwound, free radicals are generated and then polymerized, and the principle is similar to that of the eB ink.

The two recipes are different and the effects are different. According to the data obtained by Chen Mo, the degree of curing of the electronic-based ink is close to 100%, which is higher than that of the eB ink. Moreover, the suitable binder for electronic-based inks is not limited to acrylic resins and reactive monomers, but much wider than eB inks, and is suitable for most materials.

The design conditions of the 3D printer itself are also different. These ultra-precision equipments are very demanding on the environment. Determine the technical direction of 3D printers, Chen Mo began to design, I hope to develop this nano 3D printer as soon as possible.

This is one of the key technologies for industrial upgrading. With this ultra-precise printer, Chen Mo will completely break free of restrictions. Most of the research will speed up.

Chen Mo entered the state of research and completely forgot about the outside world.

The outside world is not calm, especially in the corner of Africa. Angora Diodin died and the news caused a violent shock inside Angola.

In just one day, there were different voices in the local news of Angola, and some Diordin supporters have begun to organize a parade.

More and more people believe that this is a murder.

There seems to be a pair of invisible hands, letting public opinion and investigations go in the direction of people's guesses. On the third day of Diordin’s death, the murderer was caught and was an agent of the Angolan authorities.

As soon as the news came out, the whole Angola trembled up and down, and things suddenly became global news. Many Western media began to criticize the Angolan authorities and eliminate dissidents.

This is a premeditated murder.

Among the civilians, those who opposed the Angolan authorities began to organize large-scale demonstrations and demanded that Vassoron step down.

It was only a long time before the parade. Vasoran gave a live televised speech to the people of Angola for about 40 minutes. He denied participating in the incident and called on all parties to calm down and wait for the investigation to be clear.

Diordin’s party has publicly stated that he does not accept Vassoron’s remarks and demands that he immediately step down. The hands of the control provoked public anger and caused riots in Angola. Then the parade became a violent protest.

The escalating protests made Vasulun have to send police to disperse the protesters, and things are moving out of control.

When the situation was almost out of control, the news came out that the murder of Diordin’s agents confessed and provided a recording, which was the recording that Vassoron asked him to assassinate Diordin.

This news became the last straw to crush the camel.

Under the control of the black hand, the public anger was boiling, and a large-scale campaign broke out in Angola, demanding that Vassoron step down, protest and riots, and the whole Angola began to stir up.

Vasorlen also publicly delivered a live speech again, bluntly saying that this was a frame of refusal to participate in Diordin’s murder, refused to step down, and ordered the army to disperse the protesters.

Violence caused five deaths and 12 injuries, making things even more out of control. Almost at the same time, countries issued travel warnings against Angola and began to evacuate the expatriates.

Various protests and riots lasted for more than a month.

When Vasorron couldn't bear to endure, when the arresters began to arrest, Diordin's party led 30,000 troops to flee and publicly recruited people who fought against Vasorran. For a time, there were countless callers, and Angola was almost in civil war. edge. And this fierce protest is still going on.

This turmoil has already attracted the attention of the international community.

......

Witt saw the camp in front of him smile and walked over.

"stop."

Not yet at the door, Witt chilled his head, and several guns were stuck on his head, dare to move, and he was desperate.

"What are you doing?" asked the armed men in front of the gun.

"I came to your leader to talk about the transaction, it is very important." Wit raised his hands, dare not act rashly, these people are not killed, he messed up, the consequences are to become a sieve.

The headed armed men looked at each other and made a look and began to search. From top to bottom, every part of the body touched it twice, and it was determined that there was no problem. One line of people pressed Witt and went to the camp.

Liric was sitting in the camp, in front of him, who had just escaped from Vasorlen, and the leader of Diordin’s faction, Murmi, had been arrested for most of his other leaders.

While Lirik was preparing to tell them to form an armed rebellion, a soldier hurried in and said a few words at Murmi.

"Someone came over and wanted to trade with us," Murmi said.

"You talk to him and ask him what he wants to do?" Liric thought about it and then stood in Murmi, like a security guard. Seeing people coming in, he also calmed down and looked at Witt carefully.

“What trade do you want to do?” Murmi calmly asked.

"We can provide you with a lot of weapons and equipment assistance to overthrow Vasorion." Wit was only allowed to open when the armed men left.

Murmi's eyes smashed into a slit, and the emotions did not show up.

"Your conditions?"

"Not much, after you come to power, listen to our words, then we need some mining rights in oil fields and minerals, as a return to provide weapons and equipment." Witt said.

"What can you offer?" Murmi did not agree.

"American equipment and international pressure, if necessary, can help you." Witt said without hesitation. When the words are here, Murmi knows who is behind him as long as he is not a fool.

Murmi took a look at Liric without leaving a trace. He didn't see him nod, and he couldn't agree: "We need to consider it."

"Well, you only have two days to call me on this call." The result was expected by Wit, handing out a phone number to Murmi, leaving the camp under the **** of armed men.

"Westerners." After Witt left, Liric laughed.

The narrow road of the family is described as good now. If you let them know that the people who make bioterrorism are the people they want to help, the expressions of those people will be wonderful.

"Mr. Lirik, can't you promise them?" Murmi asked.

"I will give you the answer this evening. Without my reply, don't promise, first recruit people, there are still many arrangements behind." Lirik thought about it. Now the plan is just the beginning. They need a completely unpretentious Vasorran, and then pull it down, in order to be justified.

"Okay." Murmi nodded quickly.

"Do they want to provide you with weapons and support?"

On a small island off the coast of Angola, Ridman looked at the news of various protests on television, his eyes smashed into a line, and people could not see the anger. Liric came to contact, and some American agents wanted to provide them with equipment and then become their embarrassment.

This is interesting.

Ridman smiled lightly and quickly recovered. His fingers hit the arm of the sofa, and he seemed to be thinking about something: "Promise them, support as much as possible."

chapters.title: Chapter 480: : The First Shot
chapters.body:
Chapter 480: : The First Shot

"This is the first piece of equipment you want."

Witt walked out of the car and waved his fingers, letting the two armed men carry down several boxes and open them.

I saw the M16, lying quietly in the box, emitting a dark light.

Several other boxes were opened, both portable air defense missiles and anti-tank missiles, and two boxes were brand new AKs and grenades. The equipment here is enough to equip a company.

"There are all the cars in the back." Witt pointed to the vehicle and said.

The armed leader around Murmi stepped forward and grabbed a gun and tried it. Confirmed that no problem, Murmi handed the signed document to Witt.

"This is your money and agreement."

He didn't understand why the above was subject to Western conditions. Although it was relatively cheap to buy these equipment, those agreements were troublesome. Once they succeed, they will lose a lot of resources.

However, it is certainly reasonable for the organization to do so, so he can only agree to the conditions of Westerners in accordance with the meaning of Liric.

"The cooperation is enjoyable, and there will be continuous assistance from the back. I believe that you will succeed. Vasorran has lost the hearts of the people. I hope that you can overthrow him as soon as possible."

Wit took the file and smiled.

These people have promised their conditions, which are expected. For such a long time, he can naturally grasp the hearts of these people.

Once these people failed, they dumped their weapons and there was no loss. In the event of success, they will be able to make a fortune in war, and there is an obedient regime that can be exploited. So they are not happy with doing this kind of thing, especially after several military giants are secretly supporting.

Murmi took a deep look at Witt and waved his hand to let the soldiers behind him start unloading.

"The equipment behind will be sent quickly. The conditions you promised will be realized soon. We will act soon. If you don't give some action, I will doubt your sincerity."

"Do not worry, your success is good for all of us. If you need air support, you can talk about it, but you need to add some new conditions, it is a bit expensive, and wait for your good news."

Wit swayed the documents in his hands and sat on the side of the off-road vehicle, going far in the roar of the engine.

"Let the brothers adapt to the new equipment and wait for the order." Murmi looked at Witt and went to the armed leader next to him.

Liric was sitting in the camp and drinking quietly. It didn't seem to worry about the situation they faced. When Murmi came in, he put the glass in his hand.

"How's it going?"

"They sent some of the equipment, it's not bad, what do we do next?" Murmi sat down at the table and asked.

"Don't worry, our purpose is to overthrow Vasorlen. It has only just begun. Let Vasorlen completely lose the hearts of the people. We can be justified by the hands. If the Westerners are pressured, they may not be able to overthrow him."

The time is not yet ripe, waiting for Westerners to send more equipment. If the two sides fight, we can not fear them. Lirik said with a sneer, not too slow to say.

......

In Angola, protests and riots are still expanding, and even if the parties appeal, there are still no signs of stopping.

In some media reports in Angola, coupled with reports from Western media, Vasorran’s murder of Diordin has spread more and more.

Diordin was born into a civilian, has a close to the image of the people, is one of the most powerful candidates for the next president, and is now murdered, leading to more and more civilian indignation.

Joining the armed opposition and increasing the number of people against Vasorlen.

Not long after, Vasorlen let the military occupy TV stations and broadcasts, and announced the takeover of television stations to control public opinion.

Vasorun’s position was tough and he did not prepare to step down. He declared that it was a framed and called on all parties to calm down and negotiate. The opposition parties publicly smashed the Vasorran dictatorship and demanded that Vassoron immediately release the arrested party members and resign.

The two sides have a single word to keep the atmosphere of confrontation warming up.

The voice of Angola’s opposition to Vassoron has continued to expand, and the slogans of the parties have continued to make Angola’s territory extremely tense, almost on the verge of armed confrontation.

This confrontational situation has already alarmed the United Nations.

Not long after, the opposition armed forces released news and promised the mediation of the United Nations to negotiate peacefully, but the conditions for the negotiations were that Vassoron had to resign and step down and re-elect new candidates.

The Vasorlen side once again stressed that this was a conspiracy to release the arrested party members, but refused to oppose the conditions for the armed forces to resign.

The two sides did not give each other and the negotiations broke down.

“Is the time ripe?”

Si Ge looked at Murmi and waited for his answer. He was the general of the army who had escaped with Murmi and others. Loyal to the party where Murmi is.

During this time, the team he led has been expanding, twice the size, and has received a large number of Westerners' equipment. Now the guns are changed, giving him unprecedented confidence.

They have been waiting for Murmi's offensive command, but Murmi's reply to him has been waiting. Now that the negotiations between the two sides have broken down, and Vasorran has lost the hearts of the people, it is obviously the best time.

"You can attack, but it's best to let them start the first shot," Murmi said. Everything seems to be going according to the above plan, let him calm down a lot.

"Okay." With Murmi's instructions, Serge grinned and revealed his white teeth.

......

"You said, can this chaos be solved peacefully?"

Arthur took the gun and looked at the opposite situation. Opposite is the opposition of the party, the two sides have been confrontation here.

Both sides have maintained the last restraint and do not want war, but the atmosphere has become more and more tense, and no one knows when the battle will start.

If armed confrontation begins, it means death and chaos, which is what they do not want.

"It's hard to say, we also hope to resolve it peacefully. The opposite should be like this. It's all people in their own country." The soldier next to Arthur shook his head: "But Vassoron is not willing to step down, and the opposite will never give up."

"I heard that Vasorun stepped down and was willing to resolve it peacefully."

"This condition was rejected by Vassoron. Some people think that Vassoron's greed and regard his own interests are more important than this country. Yesterday there was a brother who was completely armed and defected to the opposite side." The soldier whispered.

"I feel that Vasorion is not like a greedy person." Arthur said: "After he took office, he did better than the previous ones."

"But it is not! But no one can guarantee that Vassoron will not really be greedy for that position. After all, power will make people lost. Is it a conspiracy, only the parties know the answer. We are not aware of the situation, only the situation. I can listen to the command here, what order, what order we will execute." The soldier said with some regrets.

"Oh..." Arthur sighed and continued to focus on the opposite side.

Suddenly, a broken wind came, and before I could react, Arthur only felt that the brothers around him were stiff and fell to the ground. The comrade-in-arms who were still talking to him just now have a thumb-sized blood hole in the eyebrows and become a corpse with eyes still squatting.

There are snipers on the opposite side.

Unprecedented fear shrouded him, and even the hot sun, he could not feel a trace of temperature.

Snapped! ! Another shot fell on the masonry beside him, the sand that provoked hit him in his face, the burning pain, almost a little bit, he could take his life directly.

"Damn bastard." The fear of death, coupled with the wrath of the lost brother, made Arthur lose his mind, hiding in the corner and pulling the trigger opposite.

The gunshots broke the oppression of both sides.

chapters.title: Chapter 481: : Dilemma
chapters.body:
Chapter 481: : Dilemma

Angola opposed the armed exchange with the armed forces controlled by Vassoron and opposed the death of five armed men. Seven people were killed and 11 were injured in the Vasorran army. The bombs fell into civilian areas, killing 9 civilians and 31 people. Injured.

The fighting between the two sides has started, leaving international public opinion in vain.

Another country is caught in a civil war.

The first exchange of fire, until the end of the sunset, both sides publicly accused the other party to fire.

Not long after, the opposition armed forces released a video to the public. The gunshots came first from the military controlled by Vassoron. The news caused unprecedented anger in Angola’s domestic and international public opinion, and also satisfies the hypocritical label of Vassoron. .

An famous reporter from Angola publicly criticized the Vasorlen dictatorship on Twitter. The next day, the reporter’s body was found at home and had been assassinated and cruel.

Various news were exposed, and the public grievances were completely boiling. Some people have begun to attack the isolation fences under the military, which has triggered new contradictions, and international public opinion has also been driven.

The United Nations called on both sides to calm down, stop the exchange of fire and return to the negotiating table to solve the problem.

The country headed by the US began to pressure the Angolan authorities at international conferences, demanding that Vassoron respect the wishes of the people, resign and step down, accept investigations, and publicly sanction the high-level Angola headed by Vasorion.

With the support of all parties, the opposition armed forces joined the two major towns and began to approach the capital. They only opposed the armed forces and did not have air power and armored weapons. After winning two important towns, the two sides’ war situation once again fell into confrontation.

......

The presidential palace of the capital of Angola, a middle-aged man in a gray suit and gold-rimmed glasses sits in the first seat of the office. He is the president of Angola, Vassoron, with brown-black skin and short, flat hair, with a little whiteness and a lingering exhaustion in his face.

Looking at the news reports in the West, he was angry at an unprecedented time.

Those media portrayed him as a cruel dictator.

From the time Diondin was killed, he felt that he was led by his nose, and the public opinion was also guided. All kinds of dirty water poured over and let him talk.

Ordinary people preconceived the news. From the very beginning, he thought that he was a black hand of murder. Now even if he clarifies many times in domestic radio and television broadcasts, he believes that he is not half.

This is a deliberate conspiracy, as if there are a few black hands behind it, no matter how he does it, the final result will be distorted, especially international public opinion, which gives him a sense of powerlessness.

Angry people, soldiers who are constantly defecting, the boiling of international public opinion, the pressure from the United Nations, and the sanctions of Westerners have made his pressure unprecedented.

He has lost most of his people's hearts, but he relies on the support of his army. This situation does not know how long it can last.

The **** Westerner is already supporting the opposition to deal with him.

From the information from the front, we can know that the anti-armed forces have acquired a large amount of weapons and equipment in a short period of time, which is better than their army.

That is a Western weapon, and he has to doubt that behind all this is the support of Westerners.

The purpose of the other party is very clear. If he wants to step down, then the so-called election can be manipulated.

He wants to quit and step down, but he doesn't dare.

When he stepped down, he could never cleanse his charges. He would only be judged as a wicked person, and his country would fall into the hands of those with ulterior motives. By then, he would become a sinner.

It is already a dilemma. His president, certainly can't do it. It will only be worse if he drags on. There is only another way to solve this crisis. Seemingly determined, Vasorlen sighed and raised his head and spoke to the secretary next to him.

"Amu Da, informed Minister Ansky that they are coming back, there are important things to discuss."

......

Anski wants to go back to the capital.

On an island in Angola, Ridman received the news and his face was a little smiley.

From the death of Diordin, the chaos was following his plan. The only accident was that the Westerners contacted Murmi to give them aid and equipment.

With this kind of benefit, he naturally will not refuse.

Now, under their guidance, Vasoran has lost the support of the people and international public opinion. He has no choice but to be a good man. He thought that Vasorion would voluntarily resign and step down. Then he could arrange the name to be on the stage and control Ango. Pull.

Vasorun did not step down, but he was surprised, but it was also expected.

The only difficulty that made him feel was Anski. Anski is a loyal figure of the Vasorun faction, and his position is firm. Once he has not solved Anschi, he will take Vasoran. Anski will definitely send troops. When Angola will fall into a long-term civil war and chaos.

This is not the result he wants, so he has been waiting for an opportunity.

It seems that now, the opportunity is coming.

"Let Mbo prepare, according to the original plan, Vazorron and Anski will be in the nest." Ridman opened his mouth.

"Ok."

Standing next to Ridman's poison rose nodded, took out an encrypted phone and dialed a number.

......

Mbo sat in the camp and looked at the news from all parties. His face was calm.

Starting with Diordin’s death, he knew that the organization’s plan was already underway. But the organization never contacted him, and all this is explained, the time is not yet.

Once the time comes, the above will definitely give him orders. Because he understands the character of Mr. Riederman, he must achieve his goal when he starts.

Now within the army, there have been some voices against Vassoron. After all, public opinion is not on Vasorran. His refusal to step down has already caused the country to fall into chaos.

Now Vasorlen’s impression of outsiders is: dictatorship, greed.

There have been some soldiers who could not resist the temptation to defect to Murmi, but the larger defection was stopped by him. He believes that as long as there is a tie, there will be many soldiers against Vasorran.

He did not do this. From beginning to end, he and Makani did not say a word, and the arrangements for Vassoron and Anski were heard.

This performance allowed him to quickly gain the trust of Ansky.

As one of the most elite teams, Mbo’s mission is to guard the security of the capital and guard the safety of Vasorran.

It can be said that the presidential palace is now under his control, but the organization has not allowed him to act, so he has not shown it, quietly doing his own thing.

He has already got the news, Anski was called back from the front by Vasorran, and he had a hunch that he was an opportunity.

When Mbo knocked on the table and thought, a leader came in.

Seeing the people who came in, Mbo’s spirit shocked and immediately straightened his waist. This is the leader of the organization to enter the team, but also his assistant. As a general, he has a lot of eyes to look at. It is inconvenient to do a lot of things. In some cases, he needs to contact the organization through his assistants.

At this time, my face came seriously, and there must be something big.

"General, Mr. came to the news, waited for Ansky to come back and act according to the plan, and the net was exhausted." The armed leader said softly at Mbo.

Upon hearing this order, Mbo’s eyes lit up and nodded slightly.

chapters.title: Chapter 482: : This Is Interesting!
chapters.body:
Chapter 482: : This Is Interesting!

Anski sat in an armed buggy and passed the road security checkpoint and headed for the presidential palace. Even if they and the anti-armed forces have begun to fight, but in his face, only see a face of indifference, with a decisive temperament in his eyes.

When Diordin died, he felt a conspiracy.

With the performance of Vasole in the past few years, re-election is almost a matter of ironclad. He does not believe that Vassoron will be greedy for power, use his means to clear his opponent, and he is still such an obvious opponent.

And he is a Vasoran faction, both of whom are friends, and understand each other's personality, so at the beginning, he firmly stood on the side of Vasorun.

But there are still some people who stand against it.

After a series of things, the situation became confusing, and when the American equipment appeared in the armed forces, things were already obvious, and some people were stalking.

But he can't help it.

The people are preoccupied, Diordin has a lot of prestige among the people, and there are a lot of supporters, there must be an account.

And the people need to explain that Vasorun stepped down.

Once Vasorun stepped down, the situation completely fell into the control of the black hand. He and Vasorran’s end are nothing to say, and their country may fall into the hands of the embarrassment, which is even more troublesome.

It is a pity that the public will not consider these things. They only know the anger that expresses anger and vents their dissatisfaction. Excessive venting, under the guidance of the black hand behind the scenes, makes things more and more complicated, so that it becomes a state of avalanche.

There are indications that the black hand behind is a veteran, and from the beginning, all this is planned.

After so many things, there must be someone to explain, I am afraid that this time Vassoron called him back, just want to discuss this issue.

Get off, Anski was surrounded by several soldiers and entered the presidential palace.

Followed by several high-level generals around him, as well as the core staff of the Vasorran faction, also followed Anski and entered the presidential palace.

In the office of the president, Vasullen and Ansky sit opposite each other, and the atmosphere is a bit depressed.

This situation in Angola is now terrible.

Westerners have pressured them to impose sanctions, and with the pressure of the United Nations, their small country simply cannot compete. And from the public opinion, they are still on the downside.

"Calling you back, I want to discuss something with you."

The exhausted voice of Vassoron broke the repressed atmosphere of the office, and Ansky nodded slightly, waiting for Vasorlen's following.

"The situation is very bad now. I am determined to let me down, otherwise I will not be able to calm down the people. Even if I have not done anything, it is not important."

Vasoran’s voice was helpless, and the people were used. He could only sigh.

"I am down to the fact that I am down, but I can't be led by some people with ulterior motives. So I thought about a way that doesn't work."

There is a way?

Ansky was a little surprised. Now it is their dilemma. There is a way to break the game. Maybe there is hope to resolve this dispute.

"any solution?"

"Government... change." Vasullen said two words with his teeth.

Ansky's face changed slightly: "What do you mean?"

Speaking of these two words, Vassoron seems to be a lot easier, sigh and say the idea.

"My current prestige is doomed to be president. They want me to step down, but I can't follow their plans. I have to control myself. This is the best way I can think of.

You mobilize politics... change, grab me, drive me down, then you take over the jurisdiction temporarily, lead the formation of temporary management and opposition to armed negotiations, and peacefully resolve their rebellion. Then you dominate the election and confirm that the people choose a person fairly to lead Angora. ”

Ansky quieted down and looked at Vasoran. He also knew that the old friend had made up his mind to make a decision.

"If they don't talk?"

"Then they will lose the support of public opinion. You can publicize the public on the radio and television and push them to the opposite side. Now our dilemma is mainly because the other party has completely discredited me and the public's anger is on me. You are detaining me and chasing me down, indicating that you and I have different positions.

The people will support you, and our own people will support you, and they will satisfy my demands for me to step down. At least it can be settled quickly, otherwise we will become the next battlefield here. ”

"Are you determined?"

"Yes……"

boom! !

At the time of the two discussions, the office door suddenly opened.

Vasoran’s secretary rushed in, screaming and crying, his lips groaning: “Total... President, Mbo has sent troops to encircle the entire house, pay the guard’s gun, and come over here.”

"What?" Ansky, who has remained calm, has changed dramatically.

His voice just fell, a group of heavily armed soldiers have arrived at the door of the presidential office.

"Ansky, is this your command?" Vassoron held last hope.

"No." Seeing this scene, Anski's face was pale, the capital was Mbo responsible for the guards, and the soldiers here were his people.

What are the consequences?

With a negative answer, Vasoran sat in a chair, watching the soldiers swarming in, and Mbo coming out of the soldiers.

"Sorry, both." Mbo sneered coldly.

......

Angola’s army, which guards the capital, has been demolished, and a large number of high-ranking servants, such as Vasualen and accomplices, have announced that they will temporarily take over jurisdiction.

The news came out, Angola trembled up and down, even international public opinion, the news of this sudden spread was caught off guard. The change in things is completely beyond the expectations of everyone.

Not long after, several senior generals of Angola unified their opinions, supported the change of Mbo, and elected the interim management. Subsequently, Mbo appeased the protesters on the television broadcast and called for the opposition to return to the negotiating table to resolve the incident peacefully.

......

"Mr. Lirik, Mbolai video call, I hope the two sides will negotiate." Murmi received the news and looked at Lirik next to him.

"Talk to them, our purpose has been reached." Lirik's mouth showed a smile and stood up: "I am going with you."

Although Murmi is an organization, there are very few people who know the specific plans in the organization. Murmi does not know the identity of Mbo, and this reaction is normal.

"What conditions should we mention?"

When the two went to the camp communication site, Murmi asked and he wanted to end the dispute. Because their purpose has been reached, they have already gained great benefits, and the organization should reward him.

"Public execution of Vasorion, or other conditions, what conditions to ask, not too much." Lirik laughed. Mbo is also their own person. Now the two sides are negotiating, they are all led by the organization, and they are just doing it.

The two entered the communication center and everyone looked at Murmi and Liric. They knew that Leroy was the one who controlled the whole situation behind the scenes, so he looked at Liric and looked with respect.

"Click on the video." Murmi spoke.

When I got the order, the technician in charge of the communication opened the communication video, and it was Mbo’s appearance of keeping the scum, wearing military uniform, very majestic.

Lirik and Mbo are smiling across the screen, just have a camera, and outsiders don’t know what they are.

Their plans are nearing success, and as long as the pretend negotiations are completed, they will be able to dominate the entire Angola, and God will not know it.

"Wasollen has been controlled by us. The struggle is no longer necessary. Can we talk back to the negotiating table?" Mbo spoke to Murmi.

......

Marching ant headquarters, building one.

Chen Mo is optimizing the design of the 3D printer, Angola's dispute, he only took a look at the news during this time, feeling that another country is in chaos.

Those things have nothing to do with him, so he did not pay too much attention to the research and design of 3D printers.

With the help of the ink girl, and the technical foundation developed in the early stage, plus the complete technical information of the 3D printer, the research is going very smoothly.

When he personally confirms the final details, he can start making 3D printers.

The ink girl stood quietly, watching Chen Mo concentrate on research, very quiet. Suddenly, the ink girl slammed her head and interrupted Chen Mo’s research.

"Mergo."

"Well? What?" Chen Mo stopped and asked.

"I found the whereabouts of the person who kidnapped Dorivitz," said the ink girl.

"Well?" Chen Mo was suspicious and said: "Where is he?"

He was concerned about the kidnapping of Dollywitz because he was there. And it was later confirmed that Dorivitz was kidnapped by ‘RS’ and studied the special effects of the VFV virus. The VFV bioterrorism and Zhao Min were infected with the virus and almost went wrong.

All along, he asked the ink girl to pay attention to the whereabouts of the person, but the other party did not seem to appear in front of the networked camera, it should be hiding somewhere, did not come out, so the ink woman did not find each other.

But found it today.

"Here, he appeared in Angola’s video against the armed and military negotiations." The ink girl transferred the video of the negotiations between the two sides.

This is interesting!

Chen Mo looked at the video calls of both parties and was slightly surprised.

People all over the world understand in their hearts that Angola is opposed to armed weapons and ammunition assistance from Westerners and has an interest exchange with Western countries. As a result, the opposition to armed forces is related to the RS organization, and it may also be the power of RS organization control.

At the beginning, the RS organization used the VFV virus to cause serious social panic in Western countries.

What is the relationship between the two parties now?

reconciled?

Impossible, causing such a large-scale terrorist death, far-reaching, and significant losses, even in the North American and European countries, even if it is a fool, it is impossible to let go of the RS organization.

The only explanation is that Western countries do not know that opposition to armed forces is related to the RS organization, so they are assisted.

If the Western countries know that the people they help are trying to kill their enemies, what expression will those people be? Chen Mo thought of the expression of those people who vomited blood and madness, with a smile on their faces.

"Closely monitor all of them, have important news, and explain to me at any time." Chen Mo thought about it and continued: "Show me the information of this person and the information of relatives and friends who contacted him."

The unrest in Angola is a conspiracy, which can be seen by people with a clear eye. If it is not done well, it is planned by RS. Behind this person, there must be a higher host in the planning, he is just an executor.

Although this person has lived in Africa for a long time without a networked camera, unable to monitor the people he has recently contacted, but does not rule out the traces of his friends and relatives around him, no one can do the perfection without any traces, especially in this information explosion. era.

The RS organization has no direct hatred with him, but the last time the VFV virus has spread to Zhao Min, it is already enemies, and no one can guarantee that there will be no next time.

This anti-human organization is always a scourge.

This kind of organization, exposing one person, not catching the people behind, will definitely make a comeback. Therefore, Chen Mo still decided to take a look at it, find out the host behind it.

chapters.title: Chapter 483: : What Is The Character?
chapters.body:
Chapter 483: : What Is The Character?

Angora.

After the call was over, Murmi looked at Liric and asked: "When this peace talk, who do we push to management?"

"Inner picture." Lerike said about their default candidates.

"Do you want to keep armed?"

"Retaining the armed forces should not be possible." Lirik shook his head: "There is no need to keep, our purpose has been reached, and the next person who comes up must be ours."

"In case this is a conspiracy, Mbo repents?"

"No, we still have a backhand, they don't dare to repent," Lirik said. He did not say that Mbo is their own person, and staying armed is the same.

"Then I am going to prepare for negotiations now."

With the guarantee of Liric, Murmi is relieved.

With Mbo’s custody of Vasorran and Anski, the people of Angola, under the propaganda of the media and TV broadcasts, finally gave up the protests and the people began to calm down. The situation in Angola is getting better. Installed.

Not long after, the people who opposed the armed forces and the military reported that the two sides had ceased fire and conducted peace talks.

When the news came out, the United Nations expressed its strong welcome and answered the fastest application speed. It dispatched a mediation team to Angola to help lead the peace negotiations between the two sides.

The United States and Europe and other countries subsequently issued comments, hoping that peace talks can be carried out in the interests of respecting Angola’s domestic interests, with opposition to armed forces and the formation of interim management to ensure that Angola will not harm Angola before the election of new leaders. The human rights of the people of Gora.

When the news came out, international public opinion was in vain.

At this time, it is unreasonable to release such public support for opposing the armed forces.

When the two sides confronted each other, the United States and Europe and other countries privately sold weapons to oppose the armed forces, which is already very shameful.

Due to the international public opinion against Vassoron, there is also a party that seems to be a 'justice' against the armed forces. Many countries only talk orally, and there is no fierce remarks. Everyone understands.

Now that the United States and Europe have made such a request and openly support the opposition to the armed forces, is it necessary to break the negotiations? Some journalists and commentators have to analyze their relevant remarks with ulterior motives.

However, the outside world is accustomed to these behaviors. Apart from the ridicule of news commentators and the public on the Internet, others have not said much. They just hope that Angola’s negotiations will proceed smoothly and avoid another war.

Soon, the negotiations between the two sides began smoothly.

Under the witness of the United Nations mediation team, the two sides announced the success of the negotiations after the 'fierce' negotiations.

Opposing the armed forces to the military's request, disbanding the armed forces, but to lead the formation of the interim management, requesting the pardon of all crimes of the armed forces, and releasing all the faction members arrested by Vassoron to try Vassoron.

The military promised to oppose the armed conditions, not to pursue all the crimes of the defected soldiers, the soldiers can return to the original team or choose to retire, giving the opposition's interim management the dominance until the new president is elected.

The faction of Vasorran is the largest faction in Angola. In this struggle, Mbo changed his section and detained all the core personnel of the faction. The loss was heavy. Now there is not even one that has a countertop.

In this struggle, the opposition has achieved a lot of prestige in the peaceful settlement of disputes. This means that in the next election, there will be no party at all, and they will be able to compete with them. The next president, 90% will fall on them.

The two sides seem to be negotiating. Only a few people know that this negotiation is just a way of doing it. It is actually talking to itself.

Both sides got the answers they wanted, the negotiations were successful, and the peaceful settlement of disputes cheered Angola.

Their country is already on the verge of war, and the two sides are calm and free from the scourge of war. This result has won the favor and support of all the people. In particular, the opposition is willing to give up the armed decision and let all the media in Angola praise it for the country. The reputation of the opposition also reached a climax and became the new largest faction in Angola.

International countries also welcomed this result.

Not long after, the opposition announced that it would replace the internal position of the interim president and lead the establishment of the Angolan interim government department.
