After the internal chart was put on the stage, the first thing was to go to the only area where the battle was victimized, to compensate and condolence the civilians in the war, and then to compensate the soldiers in the battle, to appease the people and promise to increase employment income.

A series of actions, under the hype of Angora media, the goodwill of the inside picture in the hearts of ordinary people has risen rapidly. The elections in Angola did not begin, and the map has become the most popular candidate.

Everything seems to have settled down, and Angola is slowly calming down, preparing for an early election.

Presidential Palace of Angola.

A man in a suit and a suit sits in the office of the president, and he is very angry. He is the new interim presidential map. At this time, the inside picture, the bright smile of the face lingering, as if younger.

This is the highest power position of Angola, and it was once the place he dreamed of, and now he is the master here. Thinking of the person who made him sit in this position, the inside picture was awe and admired, and there was some fear.

When the picture inside was happy, the office door opened and Liric walked in.

"coming."

The inside picture has a smile on his face, as if he has seen friends for many years.

“How does this position feel? Uncomfortable?” Liric sat down inside the picture and did not regard it as the president’s office.

"Not bad, it's all your credit." The smile on the inside of the picture is always gone.

"You called me over, what's the matter?"

Lerike entered the topic.

"I want to see you with my husband. Can you contact my husband once?" The inside figure smashed his hand, with hope in his eyes.

He is one of the people who know the inside story, and the person who controls it is the gentleman behind him.

As long as Ridman has a word in this position, he will be replaced immediately, so he still needs to see Mr. to be loyal. However, Mr.’s whereabouts have always been mysterious, and there are not many people who can contact him. All he knows is Liric.

"I asked." Lerick nodded, taking out an encrypted satellite phone from his pocket and dialing a number: "Sir, I am Liric."

"Well, say." There was a thick voice coming from the phone.

"The inside picture says I want to see you."

The two did not know that their conversation was being monitored.

At the headquarters of the army ants, Chen Mo is in the laboratory, listening to the dialogue between the two sides quietly. In the simultaneous translation of the ink girl, the two people will talk and listen to each other.

The map of the ink girl shows that the addresses of the two calls are in Angola. One is at the presidential palace, the voice of Liric, and the other on a private island by the sea in Angola.

Satellite images show that there is a luxury villa on the island.

The gentleman behind the scenes should be inside.

Mr. Lirik said that listening to the tone of respect should be the behind-the-scenes planner of Angola’s turmoil. The new interim president of Angola wants to see this mysterious gentleman. It seems that the water inside is particularly deep. This person is indeed very good.

"Ink girl, save their call recordings, Liric entered and exited the surveillance video of the presidential palace, and saved it, and asked me to investigate the owner of the island and the villa." Chen Mo looked at the holographic projection island floating in front of him.

This call seemed to make him find the behind-the-scenes black hand to control it. He wants to see what a crazy person is, who is planning a VFV bioterror and manipulating a country.

chapters.title: Chapter 484: : Killing People With A Knife
chapters.body:
Chapter 484: : Killing People With A Knife

"All the information was found." After the ink girl finished, on the transparent LCD screen in front of Chen Mo, the information he needed appeared.

Seeing the information, Chen Mo's eyelids jumped.

Psychologists, entrepreneurs, veterans, businessmen, lawyers, five different identities, four different names, passports and identities in four different countries. The hairstyle of each photo is different. If it is not the image recognition of the ink woman's face, Chen Mo can't recognize it at first sight. These four people are the same person.

Chen Mo roughly browsed through four materials, with complete identity information and social information. The four materials have one thing in common. They are lonely and have lost their loved ones, only friends.

Chen Mo saw one of the materials.

Wade Hector, born in Africa, his father took him to the United States, was sent to the Middle East, participated in the Gulf War, got US citizenship, retired from business, is now a businessman, and engaged in international trade.

There are three other identities, all of which have a complete experience. The archives from small to large are complete, and the information of relatives and friends is complete, even in the archives of the US service period.

Even Chen Mo is not sure which one is his true identity.

Now a long list of names in Angola, called Ridman Carl Cobos... The information shows that Angola is an entrepreneur and the island is a private island bought from the official.

"How do you find four identities?" Chen Mo asked.

“Inkwoman checked the identity of the owner of the island, found the facial information of his photo, and found the information through the image recognition of the facial information.” said the ink girl.

Chen Mo nodded slightly.

Basically, this person is the person behind the scenes.

I don't know how long this plot has been laid out. In such a short time, Angora will be secretly controlled. This person is also a powerful person.

This person is too cautious and is still behind the scenes. If it is not the discovery of the ink girl, I am afraid it is really difficult to find this character.

I am afraid that even Redman did not expect that someone could easily monitor their encrypted satellite phone and quickly find his hidden identity.

The only thing that the ink girl did not find now is the news about Dorivitz.

This is the RS organization, privately developing biological weapons, there must be a biological research institute. He let the ink girl monitor for so long, and did not find the location of the institute.

The other party does not use smart devices, and is not exposed to the camera. The ink girl can't see the specific situation.

"Continue to monitor them, have news to contact me." Chen Mo after reading the information, 叮嘱 ink female.

In the next two days, the ink girl did not monitor too much movement, and Liric was in contact with some members, and Mr. Riederman summoned the news of all of them.

However, Chen Mo’s gains are not small.

This time it was not just to see the inside picture, but Ridmann decided to see the core figures involved in the plan. With the exposure of individual personnel, the core members of this mysterious organization also appeared in the hands of Chen Mo.

There may be some hidden members, but that is not what Chen Mo cares about.

According to the information he has obtained, members of this organization have already taken control of the Angolan military. Mubo, a member of the coup, is one of them, and Makani.

Chen Mo also finally knows the reason for the smooth negotiation between the two sides, and it is entirely his own people to negotiate with their own people.

On the third day, members of these organizations finally got a move.

In the presidential palace of Angola, a commercial vehicle entered the gate through security inspection, and four people were inside the car.

Headed by Murmi, Lirik followed behind him, and on the right side of Murmi, was a woman with a black rose on her face. Under the cover of her hair, the outsiders could not see it. On his left is a middle-aged man with glasses and a briefcase. Outsiders seem to be the assistant of Murmi.

Only they know that this is the big man behind the scenes, Mr. Ridman.

In the conference hall of the prefecture, nearly ten people including the inner map were gathered. This is where they meet. At this point everyone is waiting quietly, ready to have champagne, and look like they are ready to celebrate the success of their plan.

The people on the field talked from time to time to celebrate the success of their plans.

When everyone was happy, the door of the hall opened, led by Riederman, Lirik and the poison rose on both sides, and Murmi followed behind.

Everyone in the hall looked serious and looked at Ridman's eyes with a strong awe. It is this man who allows them to have the status of one person today, above 10,000 people, and to control a country.

"Mr." Takes the picture inside, and everyone bowed to Ridman.

"Ok."

Ridman glanced around and nodded slightly, stepping to the top position.

"Unfortunately, it's a pity." In the laboratory, Chen Mo, through the monitoring equipment outside the Angolan presidential palace, which he passed back from the ink girl, can see everyone who entered the presidential palace.

Today, the members of this organization have gathered together and seem to be celebrating the success of the plan.

Unfortunately, after entering the presidential palace, he could not know what was going on inside, because there were no connected cameras and recording equipment in the hall where those people were located.

"Ink girl, organize all the information about this organization, show me." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, okay."

The ink girl nodded slightly, and a packet appeared on the transparent LCD screen around Chen Mo.

Inside is Chen Mo's time, let the ink girl monitor the collected information about the RS organization, which contains information on the core members of the organization, including the personnel in the presidential palace in Angola, as well as video and recording of the call.

According to Chen Mo, this organization is not called death organization. The organization of death is just a fictional organization in VFV bioterrorism.

The conspirators of Ridman, in order to get the funds for the activities, are really omnipotent. Such people are very dangerous and terrifying.

Chen Mo started to organize these packages a little.

He removed some of the data he could monitor the communications network and the video network, leaving only information that would prove that Ridman and Lirik were members of the RS organization. Otherwise, the transmission of such information will definitely expose the fact that he can monitor the global communication network.

The madness of Riederman and others is too horrible. This dangerous organization must not be kept, even if he is not a savior. At this time, it is still necessary to do something.

But the premise is that he can't expose this thing to him, otherwise he will bring him big trouble.

After sorting out the information, Chen Mocai said: "Ink girl, you send this part of the information to MI6, as well as the US Intelligence Agency, the French Intelligence Agency."

Although it is very uncomfortable for Western countries, they seem to be the best choice to get rid of this organization.

With the knife killing, this scene must be very happy, Chen Mo thought badly.

The VFV virus broke out in those countries, and the two sides are equally bloody. With such information, those countries will definitely kill these people by any means. Since the information has already been exposed, under the absolute strength, it will be conspiring again.

"Also, this information is also sent to the domestic intelligence department and the Russian security bureau, do not leave any traces." Chen Mozheng seriously. After all, it is a dangerous person. If you have such information, there will be at least some precautions.

The more countries know this information, at least know what is going on inside.

"It has been sent successfully, leaving no traces." said the ink girl.

"That's right, now is the time to work, you continue to optimize some of the design details of the 3D printer, I should go home, and continue to study tomorrow." Chen Mo looked at the time, took the ink girl to leave the laboratory, the information was sent out, Next, he made a melon to eat and waited for a good show.

chapters.title: Chapter 485: : That Group Of Idiots
chapters.body:
Chapter 485: : That Group Of Idiots

"Come back." Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo and Mo Nuo go home, holding a small unparalleled welcoming, his face full of smiles, obviously in a good mood.

"Is there any happy event?"

Chen Mo saw Xiao Yu’s smile, his mood relaxed, and the tiredness of a tired day dissipated a lot.

"This." Xiao Yu holding a small unparalleled look to Chen Mo.

I saw the small unparalleled open hands, the appearance of Chen Mo hugged.

"Hey, hey."

The little unparalleled called two, very clear.

The small voice made Chen Mo froze, and his face instantly burst into a pleasant smile. Xiao Wusou is already full of ages, is learning to walk, is also in the stage of learning the language. The previous voice was not so clear, a bit fuzzy, I didn’t expect it to be so clear today.

Chen Mo took the small unparalleled in the small fisherman's hand, the feeling of exhaustion disappeared instantly, and gently kissed her cute little face. Seems to be itched, Chen Mohuai's little unparalleled smile is more joyful.

And next to the ink girl, I saw the smile of the family, and then laughed and reached out and teased the little unparalleled.

"Thank you."

Chen Mo also kissed the head of the small fishing forehead. He is usually in the company. The time at home is only at night and in the morning. The little unparalleled is a small fisherman. He is not so clear, but he will call his father first.

Feeling the feeling of Chen Mo's joy, Xiao Yu's face floated with a sweet smile. It seems that this kiss is the best reward for her: "If you want to thank me, send me a bunch of flowers tomorrow."

"Nothing." Chen Mozhen's head, Xiaoyue, smiled.

"No interest, no interest, eat first."

Xiao Yu led Chen Mo and Mo Nu, and walked back to the dining room.

......

Linna walked into the CIA headquarters in a hurry, and her face was not very good.

It is still early in the morning, it is rare to sleep once and feel safe, and the assistant calls, wakes her up from her dreams and says she receives a very important piece of information. With a sly sleepy eye, she immediately rushed over.

Now that my heart is full of energy, if it is not important information, she will definitely let the **** go to sweep all the toilets of the CIA.

Entering the intelligence office, her assistant greeted her and led her to a computer. Only a few members on duty, seeing Lina come over, consciously let a road open.

"This is an anonymous person sent to us." The technician who stood in front of the computer said: "The other party has hidden the address and can't find any information. The information inside is about the members of the RS organization."

When I heard the members of the RS organization, Linna’s getting up and anger disappeared, and her brain was sober.

"Open it and show it to me."

According to Linna, the technician opened the data package. The data package has been unpacked and no virus has been found.

Seeing the information inside, Linna's face was black as never before, and the body was constantly shaking. Anger, annoyance, gnashing teeth, all kinds of emotions.

In this document, several people are very clear.

Angola was pushed to the interim presidential map, military personnel Mbo, Macani, and their recently contacted armed leader Murmi.

These people are members of the RS organization?

When they overthrew Vasorran, they also gave the other party a lot of weapons support, or they were dominated by the CIA. This means that they give their arms to their enemies at the price of cabbage and help them control Angora.

If this information is true, they will make a big international joke, be laughed at by countless peers, and it will be an indelible shame in the history of their intelligence.

However, the information is very clear, with the clue of the kidnapping of Lirik of Dorivitz. And Dorivitz has been confirmed, is the RS organization kidnapping, to do research related to VFV virus.

This Liric was a member of the RS organization. The video showed that it was in Sweden at the time. If it was not marked, they did not pay attention to this detail. Later, and Murmi appeared in the video negotiated with Mbo.

There is absolutely no such coincidence.

There is also a recording of their calls, as well as Mr. Riederman behind him, the planner behind all the moves, the top leader of the RS organization.

Based on his experience in intelligence, this information is very complete and it is almost certain that the information is true.

The overthrow of Vasorlen’s incident is a conspiracy that can be seen by the discerning eye, and the people of Angola can be fooled, but it is impossible for them to be high-level.

The only thing she didn't expect was that it was the action that the RS organization was doing behind the scenes. They indirectly helped the enemy.

The uncomfortable feeling made her anger in her heart and almost fainted.

"Set the data to the highest secret." Linna said with a black face.

She seems to hear the unscrupulous ridicule of all the world's peers echoing in her ears, thinking about the consequences of the exposure, so that she is angry.

Linna did not guess wrong. In the Russian Security Service, it was indeed a joy.

"Ha ha ha ... that group of idiots, who helped and have their own vengeance, took control of Angola. This is definitely the most ridiculous thing in the history of intelligence. That group of idiots, nailed to the column of shame, is not enough. Hahahaha..."

"I can imagine that this information is exposed, the ridicule from the whole world, and the appearance of the idiots hysterically vomiting blood, must be more refreshing than the foaming of the teeth, hahahaha..."

They all know in the intelligence community that countries such as the United States and Europe have greatly supported the opposition during the chaotic period in Angola, and have also created public opinion, pressure and sanctions on the Vasorran authorities internationally.

It turned out that people who oppose the armed forces, as well as those who are in the military, have members of the RS organization. They are enemies who want to eat meat and drink blood.

What the United States and Europe help, is to let their country lose countless organizations.

Being played with a group, he is still stupid to help the enemy control Angola. The most shameful and most humiliating thing in the history of intelligence is about to be updated.

"Well, this information is set to be top secret."

There was a schadenfreude on Lev's face. He laughed so much because he was the director, and he wanted to maintain his image, but he was not happy. Based on their experience, it is almost certain that this information is true.

"What do we do?" asked the deputy next to Leouf.

"You are responsible for this, send people to stare at these people, don't scream at the snakes, don't do anything to them, the idiots will start," Leofu said.

"Do the idiots know this information?"

"VFV virus incident, we are only being hit. We have little relationship with us. We all receive the information. The mysterious person who sent the information will definitely send them information. If you are worried that they have not received it, you can find a way to send it. They let their dog bite the dog, haha..."

Leofu smiled very refreshedly, and laughter took gloating.

The hardest hit areas of the VFV virus are not here, but in North America and Western Europe. Now that we know this information, countries such as North America and Western Europe will definitely find ways to kill the RS organization. Anyway, they must have a good show.

They can't get through with the US and Europe. If there is something else and this information, they don't mind creating trouble for the US and Europe.

But in the case of the RS organization, the positions of all countries are the same. The bioterrorism caused by the VFV virus has touched the bottom line of all countries, leaving a shadow to the world. This kind of anti-human organization is not worth doing, and it will be very troublesome to get involved.

Chen Mo’s information was sent out, and some people were happy that some people were angry. In countries such as the United States and Europe, those who learned the information were almost angry with their hair. The unrelated country, on the other side, succumbed to the fun of eating melons.

But everyone chose tacit understanding and did not disclose it.

This information allows them to react quickly and look at Ridman.

Behind this man, it is easy to manipulate all these events, and it is very skillful to use all kinds of conspiracy methods, knowing how to use the human heart and using external forces. If this is a person, it is definitely a talent, but this crazy character is a ambitious person. This is definitely the most dangerous person to date.

The parties that have received the information have not guessed who the person who sent them the information.

The only person who is likely to get such detailed information is the core staff within the RS organization. The members of the RS organization, apart from the people on the data, did not know that there were others.

On the day of receiving the information, the leaders of the United States, Britain, France and other countries immediately called. On the same day, several national leaders reached a consensus, and a survey and hunting operation against Ridman was quietly prepared.

chapters.title: Chapter 486: : Angel'S Sword Action
chapters.body:
Chapter 486: : Angel'S Sword Action

One month, everything was calm, Angola domestic, on the inside chart, after serving as interim president, the localities gradually stabilized and restored their original lives. In addition to changing to a temporary president, there seems to be no change in other things in life, just preparing for the upcoming election.

The outside world did not start to pay attention to Angola, but it was only superficial. The information sent by Chen Mo, the world's top secret agents, has quietly entered Angola, and his eyes gathered on Riederman and other members.

Angola, on the yacht not far from the island.

Ridman sat on the deck with a fishing rod and thought in the eyes.

Now that the internal map is on the stage, Angola has begun to stabilize. Everything is going according to his plan, and Angora has fallen into his control. It’s hard to complete a big event for a while, so I picked it up today and let it go.

"Sir, when will our next goal begin?" The poison rose came out of the cabin and stood next to Ridman, his face still indifferent.

"Wait for another two months, that thing hasn't finished yet." Reedman said faintly, without any urgency, the palm of his hand was quietly holding the rod.

"What should I do if I have not succeeded after two months?"

Like Riederman said to her last time, studying this thing, maybe tomorrow, maybe maybe ten years of progress, they can't wait forever.

"If you don't succeed, then consider the next plan. If the study is completed, the next plan can do more with less." Ridman said, continue to focus on the boom in his hand.

The two did not know that in the fishing boats not far from them, some people were watching them with a telescope.

Evan looked at Ridmann on the deck of the yacht with a pleasant smile on his face.

It’s been a month since I came here, but he didn’t dare to go to the island. He could only use the cover of a yacht or a fishing boat to observe it at a certain time every day, or to detect the island villas through spy satellites.

From the information, the other party is a cautious old fox, buying an island at sea, outsiders can not easily detect his whereabouts, nor close to monitoring.

There are no high-rise buildings around the island, and it is easy to expose the target near the monitoring, and it is impossible to see the situation on the island.

This is a private territory and I don't know if the island is equipped with monitoring. However, with the personality of the other side, the island must have a variety of surveillance cameras. If you rush to the island, if you are stunned by the other side, all your efforts will be in vain, and you want to find each other again, and you don’t know when.

Various restrictions have caused great trouble for them to collect intelligence.

They tried every means to confirm whether Ridman lived on the island, but they could not be determined 100%. I didn't expect to see the other side going out to rest and fishing today.

This is definitely a big gain.

Make sure the other person lives on the island and implement their killing plan. I didn't even think about it. Evan took a few photos and saw the information sent back.

......

CIA headquarters.

Cooper took a piece of information and photos and walked quickly toward the director's office.

He is one of the senior intelligence analysts of the CIA. From the information of the mysterious person, the bureau asked him to be responsible for the intelligence analysis of the RS organization. During this time, they spared no effort in searching for information about Riederman and RS, and conducted a comprehensive analysis of intelligence to determine the authenticity of the information.

The final conclusion is that the information is true, Riederman is the master behind the RS organization, and the information sent by the mysterious person has a direct or indirect relationship with Riederman.

The information was confirmed, and all of them were brought to heart. All intelligence activities were carefully guarded so as not to be noticed and let the other party run away.

They have determined that the luxury villa on the island is Ridman.

For a month, they used various methods to confirm whether Riederman lived in this villa.

But from the intelligence they got, the other party only had a probability of about 70% and lived on the island. Because they simply can't control each other's whereabouts, they don't really see the faces of people who live in them.

That person is more cautious than they think. No one can be sure whether he lives in it or not.

Originally, they were not completely sure. They were also prepared to venture into the island to hunt. I did not expect that today it is good news.

Knocking on the door of the director's office, Cooper handed the photos and information in his hand to Linna: "The Secretary, 'Mr. 100%' sent back important information and photographed Ridman fishing near the island."

When I saw the photo, Linna Huo stood up and finally smiled on her frowning face.

After confirming that Murmi and others were members of the RS organization, the president took her to a **** head and ordered her to immediately collect the most complete information in order to hunt Riedmann and not allow any mistakes.

For the past month, all her work has been focused on investigating the RS organization. The news I got was that I was not sure that the other person lived on the island.

Originally, the president thought about it, that is, he couldn’t really be sure, and he had to take a risk. I didn’t expect to confirm the news now. Ridman lived on the island, and their actions could be without any scruples.

"Are you confirmed?"

"Confirmed, it is Ridman."

Lena grabbed the materials and photos, and her face was a hard smile: "Good job, send the information to Washington."

......

Binhai City, it is already 10 o'clock in the evening.

Xiao Yu took a small unparalleled sleep, Chen Mo did not use the habit of sleeping so early, at this time in the study, studying the data of 3D printer.

The design of the 3D printer has been completed and is being manufactured. With the previously accumulated manufacturing base, in addition to some specific parts, the production of parts for other printers is not much of a problem.

But before the 3D printer is used successfully, he can't relax.

As long as the 3D printer is successfully manufactured, only the medical field is left, and the authority for the next stage is close.

"Mergo, the CIA took photos of Riedeman's fishing and confirmed that he lived on the island. Just Washington has issued an order to prepare for the 'Angel's Sword Action' to hunt 'Death' Reidman." Accompanied by Chen Mo The ink girl sitting suddenly opened her mouth.

"Well? Finally there is a movement." Chen Mosi was interrupted, somewhat surprised.

He has sent information about Ridman to those countries, and it has been a month. He knows that all countries have sent agents to Angola, but they have been investigating and confirming that they have not done so.

Knowing the existence of the dangerous character of Ridman, and having a **** revenge with them, there is no doubt that those countries will unscrupulously kill Ridmann.

So Chen Mo has been waiting to watch the show. Now, this wonderful drama is about to be staged.

Now, Ridman doesn't know that he has been targeted, and there aren't too many accidents. Under those people's unscrupulous calculations, Riederman is unlikely to escape.

"Is it time to determine the action?" Chen Mo asked.

"At 8:30 tomorrow morning, Angola time is 1:30 in the morning, and at 7:30 pm on the 19th, Washington time."

chapters.title: Chapter 487: : Hunting Begins
chapters.body:
Chapter 487: : Hunting Begins

Early the next morning, Chen Mo got up early, washed and had breakfast.

Today, there is a good show. The United States dispatched a commando team to hunt Riederman. He waited for more than a month in this scene and finally waited today.

"Are you so eager?" Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo with some surprise.

In her understanding, Chen Mo has always been calm and calm, not an acute person, and today is somewhat different from usual.

"It's a bit of a thing, I need to go early, I will come back to accompany you and my unparalleled in the evening." Chen Mo said.

"Good." Xiao Yu did not ask much, slightly helped Chen Mo to sort out the clothes and watched him and the ink girl leave.

Arrived at the company's No. 1 building, only 8:20, has not officially started, Chen Mo found a seat to sit, waiting for the opening of the show.

"They set off."

The ink girl projected the live broadcast of the picture onto the screen in front of Chen Mo.

This is a live video of the camera on the head of the American commando team. Through the live broadcast signal, it is transmitted back to Washington and the CIA. Chen Mo is also fortunate to share this first perspective.

But now the commando is still on the plane, seeing the black lacquered picture, there is not much light.

The good show has not really started.

Chen Mo has already done well in his seat. If there is watermelon at the moment, it is a typical appearance of eating melons. If you let outsiders see the appearance of Chen Mo, he must not want to kill him.

Like Chen Mo, watching the live broadcast, there are a lot of high-level people in the United States.

At this time, the special atmosphere of the White House is surrounded by the public. In addition to Trump, there are vice presidents, secretary of state, defense chief, general staff, naval officer, presidential security adviser, director of the White House office, chief anti-terrorist commander, national intelligence director, etc., including the commander-in-chief of the commander of video transmission. A dozen people in the room, it seems a bit crowded.

They all got relevant information about Ridman.

It was learned that Riederman was the leader of the RS organization, and all the secret departments actively cooperated and prepared for this action through a series of documents and agreements.

At this time, in the special room, there was no such a relaxed mood as Chen Mo. Everyone was concentrating on the screen and his face was dignified. Everyone is anxiously waiting, but the plane has not yet arrived, and the action has not yet begun.

“How long does it take to reach the destination?” Trump crossed the fingers and placed them between the legs.

"It takes about forty minutes."

The intelligence officer answered his question. Afterwards, the special room was once again quiet, and everyone looked at the documents on the table from time to time. This matter is related to their facial problems, and now they are more or less worried about the problem of action.

The same picture also appeared in the CIA headquarters command center.

Linna stared at the live picture, and under the calm appearance, the palms were unconsciously tied together.

This is her shameful action. If the commando team can't kill the other party, then she will leave a shame that she can't get rid of it, and the consequence is that she has to roll down from this position.

Aid to the RS organization, if this matter is exposed, they will become the world's laughing stock.

If the operation is successful, their aid actions can also be known as the name: investigation, lead the snake out of the hole. And this plan may also be written into textbooks. But if they fail, they will be nailed to the shame column for future generations to laugh at.

The CIA has withstood the crisis of the last clown organization leaking the list of secret agents. It just came out of the shadows. If this problem occurs again, the blow to the CIA morale is also ruined. She cannot afford such costs and consequences.

So she can only pray in her heart, the commando team can succeed this time, and then they can also get rid of other members of the RS organization.

Live on the plane of the plane.

Grant half squinted, sitting quietly, no one talking on the plane, most of the players were already asleep.

All of them have experienced the rain of bullets. Every member of the team has a strong heart. At this time, they can still fall asleep.

The headset stays silent, Grant knows, and then the final battle.

For today's action, their team has been practicing for nearly a month.

The target information they have seen many times, the planner behind VFV bioterrorism, the planner behind the chaos of Angola. These two items are enough to illustrate the horror and threat of the target.

To ensure that nothing was lost, they sent four Black Hawk helicopter gunships and four team members came over.

The two groups of players are responsible for supporting the team to prevent the other party from escaping from the sea. The two teams are responsible for landing the island and launching the action. The team where Grant is located is the team that hunts the target.

The plan was to drop off, as the airborne squad appeared, and the other party was caught off guard.

The target is on an isolated island. Unless the other side has a submarine, it is difficult to fly the wings. It is almost certainly the best in the middle. But what they need is zero casualties to complete the task.

"Flying over the border."

"One minute to prepare."

The sound from the earphones awakened the quiet cabin, and the cabin that was originally silent was beginning to appear. Everyone is checking their equipment and rope problems.

Grant placed the fast-falling device and confirmed that the rope and the downhill were tightly connected and the thimble was snapped into place. When the crew just opened the cabin door, everyone felt a breeze blowing.

Grant grabbed the rope and managed to pry the body out of the hatch to see what was going on outside. The sea was shrouded in the night, only the wind, no other movements, no lights.

Looking out into the distance, the outline of an island appears in front of Grant. Under the night, there is no light, and the island is like a behemoth crouching on the sea.

This time should be the most dead time to sleep.

"See the island," Grant said.

Slowly approaching the island, Grant began to prepare, and once he reached his destination, he would have to drop. The sniper next to the front door of his front is already ready to cover the scene.

All the players in the cabin recovered to a quiet state and began to wait for the plane to reach the scheduled location to hover and drop.

As the plane approached slowly, the air seemed to be tense.

Far away thousands of miles away, the White House special service room, the people on the field looked at the live broadcast of the pictures, hands clasped unconsciously. They have determined that the target island is close at hand.

Time flies one second and one second, the atmosphere is tense and exploding, everyone's breathing is holding, and the atmosphere does not dare to breathe. The only two female executives on the field, whose heartbeats are in the eyes of the blind, have been licking their mouths, for fear that they will make any sound.

On the other side of the plane, all the players' headsets remained silent, and the surroundings were quiet and terrible. Only the low propeller sound of the plane echoed in the night sky.

Even the night is full of murder.

Soon, the plane entered the island, and Grant's body once again explored the cabin, overlooking the ground, waiting for the pilot to arrive at the scheduled location, he would not hesitate to drop.

I have seen the outline of the villa.

Upon arriving at the villa, the helicopter pilot hovered directly: "Arrival location."

"action."

Determine the arrival position, Grant has long waited for a long time to give orders, jump out of the hatch, and quickly fall toward the courtyard of the villa.

chapters.title: Chapter 488: : Death Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 488: : Death Plan

Tumen is on duty in the villa, patiently watching the movement around him. With him, I want a buddy. One night, ten members watched the night and split into two teams. The three are in the surveillance room, the others are outside, and there are three hunting dogs.

"Grandma's, I feel that I owe millions of mosquitoes tonight, and I have to bite me." A member of the team couldn't help but complain, and slaps from time to time to drive away the mosquitoes.

"Thank you for a long time, it will be more than three hours, and we can rest well. This night shift is really difficult."

After a while, the headset sent a voice of lack of spirit: "You are quite spirited, I lost sleep last night, watched the night today, and now I feel that I have lost half life."

???? "This weather, mosquitoes are more. Hey, it is terrible."

???? "Follow Mr., this bitterness should be no problem?" The door opened, and a cigarette was ignited, and the gods were handed over to the players next to them.

???? "Mr. is really strong, can follow the gentleman, is my greatest honor." The headset sent a voice of worship.

At this time, in the early hours of the morning, the players were more or less exhausted. The sky is covered with clouds and the stars and the moon are not seen. There is no light, the only thing that can barely see clearly is the outline of the big tree outside the villa.

After a simple chat, the headset is quiet again. Now is the time when the human body needs the rest most. Their mental consumption is very serious and people are exhausted.

Suddenly, the low voice came.

"What voice? Have you heard any sounds?" Tumen's hand with a cigarette froze and his brow wrinkled.

"I also heard it, it feels like the wind, it’s..."

"Is it still? Are you stupid by mosquitoes?" a member of the surveillance room laughed.

"There is a strange voice, the monitoring room to see if there is any situation?"

“No.” The monitoring room team sent a definite answer.

The sound of the cockroach is getting bigger and bigger, as if it came from the top of the head. Tumen looked up and saw the helicopter that had hovered overhead. His face changed dramatically.

???? "Not good, enemy!"

The voice did not fall, a bullet struck, passing through the heart of Tumen. At the moment he fell to the ground, he saw a black shadow falling off the helicopter.

Invisible Black Hawk! SEALs!

The heart flashed through the last thought, and Tumen felt that consciousness was in the dark.

Da da da! ! As the door fell, the gunshots pierced the night, spewing fire tongues, and the hounds of the hounds. Not long after, everything became quiet, leaving only the bodies in the pool of blood, as well as the bullets that were not cold.

"Screening! Cover!"

Grant directed the team, occupying all the dangerous positions and quickly approaching the villa door.

The light of the entire villa lights up and everything around it becomes clearly visible.

boom! Da da da!

The explosion of the grenade and the sound of the guns were connected.

Ridmann was awakened by the alarm on the bedside, and was shocked and angry. This alarm only sounded when a major threat came. Someone sneaked, someone actually sneaked! What makes him angry is that someone dares to attack!

Hey! When he just woke up, the door opened and the poison rose opened the door and ran in with a gun.

Ridman subconsciously smashed his pupil and saw that it was a poisonous rose. He put down his gun: "What happened?"

"The seal commando's people, the invisible black eagle came over." The voice of the poison rose with a hint of panic.

"what?"

Lidman, who has always been calm, has a somewhat unsteady voice, and his heart is sinking.

It’s over.

He did not think that the SEALs came to attack him. He had hatred with the United States, but it was a fictitious organization that was revenged by the RS controlled by Lerich. It did not exist.

According to theory, they did not reveal their identity. Unless there were traitors in the ranks, even if there were traitors, they could not know about RS. Liric could not betray him.

He never thought that the one who exposed his identity was Chen Mo, who had never seen him before.

boom! !

The explosion of the door awakened the two.

"What do you do now?" The poison rose asked coldly: "Do you want to escape?"

"Can't escape."

Surprised, Ridman quickly calmed down and shook his head slightly.

The SEALs used the invisible Black Hawk to make a surprise attack. Once only one person had this treatment, he was the second one. This is already a certain killing.

Only knowing that the RS organization is related to him will there be such a battle, and the Americans cannot let him go.

If it is an ordinary enemy, you may be able to escape by boat. It is impossible now. You can go out by boat and die faster. Maybe the whole villa has been surrounded, they have no chance to escape.

The other party’s action indicates that it has been thoroughly mastered here.

He felt that he was not exposed, and he still had no preparations for this kind of raid as usual. Caled Ridman, his eyes were extremely dangerous, his face flashed a hint of gloom and madness, mixed with ruthless indifference.

Drops...

In another villa in the island, Lirik was awakened by the alarm, saw the source of the alarm, his face changed, his sleepiness disappeared, he hurriedly jumped out of bed, and took a brick from the drawer in the bed. Satellite phone.

At this time, the phone is flashing a red alarm.

It is not a last resort, and Mr. will not contact him by this phone. There was an accident over the sir, and Lirik’s heart sank.

Almost without hesitation, Liric was connected to the phone. Just turned on, there was a voice of gloom and demise. That was the voice of the gentleman.

"Starting the Death Plan."

The order from the satellite phone made Lirik’s body stiff and his pupils contracted. Just wanted to respond, but there was a blind voice.

On the first floor of the marching ant company, Chen Mo’s brow was screwed into a ball, and a heart sank.

Originally thought that the other party is asking for help, he also wants to see where to contact, maybe there are important clues. As a result, it was not a distress signal that was heard from Redman. When he heard Ridmann's instructions, he immediately let the ink girl cut off their satellite signals, but it was too late, and the order was sent out and was received.

Soon, in front of him, the ink girl has released the image of the satellite where the signal is received, or an island. The local area is at night, and it is not really true. It should be the island where the biological research institute he has been looking for.

Suddenly he had a bad premonition. Maybe the ‘Death Plan’ was related to the biological research institute. No one can guarantee that the ‘Death Plan’ in Riedeman’s mouth is the second bioterrorism plan.

In his knowledge of Riederman, the other party is a crazy and unscrupulous person, who will not care about life, it is a hazy madman.

And Chen Mo also confirmed that the signal was received, as well as the CIA.

Linna's face was a bit bad. They received a satellite signal in the villa. They thought it was the other party's distress signal. They could track the specific location of the signal and then smashed the organization.

I didn't expect that the signal would suddenly break when it was just turned on for ten seconds.

They can only see the approximate range of the signal and cannot lock the specific location. I am afraid that at the other end of this signal, there is another big secret, which may be related to the biological virus research they have been looking for.

"Immediately let people check the specific location of that signal."

chapters.title: Chapter 489: : Not As Dead As Decent
chapters.body:
Chapter 489: : Not As Dead As Decent

In the villa, after the explosion and the gunshots, the surrounding area became dead. There were only six bodies in the lobby on the first floor, and the blood was spilled on the ground. It has not dried up.

Several commandos confirmed that the enemy in the hall was annihilated, quickly entered the villa, looking for a dangerous position to cover, clean and neat, without a trace of hesitation. Everyone mentioned the spirit of twelve points. If there is any movement, they will not hesitate to hunt.

There are no lines in the movie that do not kill, and everyone keeps quiet and the atmosphere is terrible. The thick smoke and **** smell in the air is like a murderous agglomeration.

Grant is concentrating on the environment in front of him. There are many armed men here, and all of them are trained. Fortunately, I chose a surprise attack. If it is a storm, it is not so easy to come in.

"The fourth floor is safe."

Suddenly there was a voice coming from the headset. It was the second team, coming down from the rooftop and forming a battle for the attack.

“A group cleaned the basement and prepared to go upstairs.”

Confirming that all the enemies on the first floor were wiped out, Grant issued an order to walk toward the second floor stairs. Suddenly, when I heard the noise coming from the stairs, Grant's pupils shrank and saw the people who ran out, and did not hesitate to pull the trigger.

boom……

The loud noise is like a thunder, which shatters all the windows in the hall on the first floor of the villa. The commandos in the villa are hit by the shock wave, like the autumn wind sweeping the leaves, and the people turn over and sigh, accompanied by a few sighs and mourning.

"There is a bomb vest."

Grant got up from the ground, spit a **** spit, and groaned his chest.

He was a little lucky. The shrapnel was on the bulletproof vest. A member of the team next to him was injured by a stray bullet. At this time, he had fallen to the ground and rolled over.

When I heard the bomb vest, all the players fell down with a heart.

The haze of the enemy is beyond their imagination. This kind of life-changing way is doomed to the action of the night, and it is impossible to end without peace.

Booming...

Two more violent explosions were uploaded from the building. Now the enemy is completely crazy, and their target characters are more sinister and sinister than they think.

If they are not careful, they will go to see God.

"Send the wounded and cover me up." Grant tightened his gun in the face, facing the enemy who was desperate, and even his veteran, he was a little nervous.

The second floor of the villa.

Ridman sat on the sofa, looking at the corridor in front, calm, and did not have the slightest tension before death. Standing next to him was a poisonous rose, or a black tights, and his expression was as cold as ever.

The order has been sent, but the signal is cut off. Ridman is not sure if Liric has received his order. He can't do anything now, and it is useless to consider it.

The guns in the villa gradually became sparse, and the screams and explosions stopped. Restoring the silence of silence, leaving the smoke and blood of the mess, and the bodies of the seven.

"Tiya, are you afraid?" Riederman asked.

"I'm not afraid, I am the husband who came back from the heap of the dead. The fate is the gentleman." The poisonous rose said coldly, and the cold-eyed gaze finally showed a hint of emotion. It seemed to recall the scene that followed Ridman from the smoke. .

"Oh." Ridman smiled softly and his eyes fell on the corridor again: "I am also a victim of war. If there is a choice, no one wants to go on this road of no return."

The poisonous rose is silent, standing quietly.

Without the fear before death, both of them knew that they were facing the most elite special forces in the world, surrounded by unprepared, and only two in the end, live or die.

Time passed by, and it was completely quiet as the man standing in the corridor fell in a pool of blood. The two saw that a group of well-equipped commandos had entered the hall.

Seeing that there were no weapons in their hands, the commandos did not shoot.

The live video camera on the top of the team, passing the scenes seen back to Washington and the CIA, Chen Mo also saw this for the first time.

When he saw the commando coming in, Riederman laughed.

Since it is impossible to escape, it is better to die decently.

"No one can judge me, no one can kill me." Ridman laughed with a free and easy, and finally the madness, press the button in his hand.

"Back."

The newcomers who came in, saw Ridman’s crazy smile, a sense of danger came, no time to shoot, and quickly jumped back. The rear members did not dare to have any hesitation and quickly pushed them into the shelter of the corridor.

boom! !

The explosion shook the night sky and echoed in the sea breeze until it disappeared into the night.

The whole world is quiet.

After a long time, the dust mixed with the smell of smoke spread out, and the covert of the bunker came out, but when I saw the situation in the hall, I couldn't help but breathe.

At this time, it was a mess, the furniture was all scattered, the air was full of **** smell and smoke smell. In the position of the hall, the wall was pitted, and some flesh and blood fragments were stuck on it, which was extremely terrifying.

In the special room of Washington, I saw a live broadcast of the scene, and everyone raised it. Not long after, the camera shakes and sees the situation in the villa again. Some people with poor reception ability, licking their mouths, almost spit them out.

The CIA, Linna saw the scene inside the villa, secretly relieved. At least Ridman has died and this action is a victory.

"The target confirms death and searches for other rooms."

Grant glanced at the scene of the lap and began commanding the team members to collect computer hard drives, as well as file information and other required intelligence information.

The mission is completed, no one is pleased, because of the mission and the wounded.

No one died and six people were injured.

From the beginning of the action to the end, less than half an hour, the action of the Angel Sword also came to an end.

Marching Ant Company, Building One.

Chen Mo also saw the pictures returned in real time. Ridman committed suicide and the hunting operation came to an end. But he was not happy because of the last order of Riederman.

Death plan.

He doesn't know what the death plan is. What kind of revenge is the opponent's backhand?

"Ink girls, pay close attention to their movements, have any reports, report to me. Also, there are new infectious diseases in the world, immediately notify me." Chen Mozhen said. Intuition tells him that there is definitely something big to brew, maybe it is a more terrible plan than VFV bioterrorism.

"Good." The ink girl responded.

The island where the Institute of Biology is located.

Liric took the satellite phone in his hand and his eyes were unsettled.

This communication channel, unless it is a matter of urgency, will not start. Start now, just said that the start of the death plan, the signal disappears.

He was unable to contact him and he is now hesitating.

The plan of death is no small matter.

It has reached the point of extermination of humanity, and no one will have to give up this order.

I am afraid that Mr. has already had an accident.

Liric quickly calmed down, his eyes glaring and decisive. If Mr. has an accident, then he is crazy, and he will be stinking for a long time.

Determined, Liric left the room.

Institute of Underground Biology.

At this time, at night, all the researchers were resting. In the laboratory, only the disinfected ultraviolet light was shining, and in the transparent laboratory, the experimental body had gone mad, and the atmosphere seemed to be a bit gloomy.

Lirik took a dozen players and appeared in the institute.

Everyone has a big box in his hand, the atmosphere is strong, and everyone’s face is cold.

"Ready."

Liric moved his fingers and signaled the team to start the action. He himself walked over to a safe.

After inputting the password, face recognition, palmprint recognition and other multiple verifications, a strain of the strain of the arm of the arm appears in the safe. The reagent has a blood red color, like the color of the eyes of death.

Putting the reagents into the safe, Lerike looked back at the lab and turned away.

After fifteen minutes.

Outside the villa, more than a dozen members of the team gathered at the gate of the villa, and the boxes on their hands had disappeared. At various locations in the Institute of Biology, explosives and incendiary bombs have been filled.

"Let's go." Lirik took the box and walked over to the yacht not far away, pressing the remote control in his hand.

Rumble...

The deafening explosion came from the research institute below the villa, and they could clearly feel the earthquake at the foot. Then, smoke was transmitted from the institute.

Dolly Weitz looked at the fire outside the door, and the cries of the researchers’ fears, the relief of his face, and his eyes closed.

The underground research institute, all the researchers, survived with the explosion and the fire.

chapters.title: Chapter 490: : Chen Mo'S 叮嘱
chapters.body:
Chapter 490: : Chen Mo'S 叮嘱

"Don't run around the world in the last month or two."

"why?"

Zhao Min is processing the file and receives a video call from Chen Mo. She was a little surprised to see Chen's default appearance. In her impression, Chen Mo never slammed her so seriously.

"These things, you know too much is not good. Take a good rest for a while, don't run around."

"I can't even know why." Zhao Min asked curiously.

"You will know soon, don't run around."

"Well, anyway, the boss keeps me from working, and there is no reason to disobey."

Zhao Min promised to come down and couldn't figure out why Chen Mo was so serious about her, and didn't think about it anymore. Anyway, that guy wouldn't harm her.

"I cancel the itinerary for the next few weeks, just have time to find a small fishing street, you remember to accompany us."

"Good." Chen Mo promised to go shopping with the two, comparable to running a marathon. What is even worse is to take a bunch of things and use him as a coolie.

The plan of death is something he is worried about. Intuition tells him that there must be dangerous biological weapons in the hands of the RS organization, because Lirik, the right hand of Riedeman, has no news until now.

He is also not sure whether the plan has begun. For the United States and Europe and other countries, Ridman would let Zhao Min run around the world again. When he was beaten, he regretted it.

He is not sure if he can find special effects drugs before the accident, so he must be embarrassed in advance.

Hanging up the phone, Chen Mo went to the materials laboratory and began to deploy electronic based inks. The ink-controlled robot is preparing the parts of the printer. The ink is one of the core materials of 3D printing. The information of the technology library has ink formula, so it is not difficult to prepare.

When you finish the printer early, you can quickly get the subject of the medical field and complete the task of the [Technology Apprentice] stage.

......

The US official announced that the SEALs successfully hunted the leader of the RS organization, Ridman.

The news triggered a global sensation.

After the VFV bioterrorism, countless people have a natural fear of the RS organization. But until now, no one knows any member of the RS organization.

Now the US official suddenly came out to hunt the leader of the RS organization. And the name and photo of the leader of the RS organization was first exposed, called Ridman.

This is another milestone in the history of human anti-terrorism. Countless people are jubilant.

The CIA and SEALs have also been praised by countless media.

After the news broke out, more people were wondering. Ridman was hiding in Angola. That country had just experienced a turbulent incident and had to be delusional.

Not long after the news came out, another news came out.

An general of the Angora military was demolished, and Vasorran and Anski were robbed by the apostate soldiers. Immediately after the interim president’s internal map disappeared, several generals of the military’s high-level generals also fled and disappeared. Angora’s heart Hey.

The news pushed the heat of things to another climax. For a time, all kinds of conspiracy conjectures about Angola’s turmoil were on the line.

In the collective coverage of various media, even more exciting news came out.

Vasoran appeared and announced inside information. The turbulent incident in Angola was a conspiracy planned by Riederman. Diordin was killed by Ridman and the villain was controlled by Riederman. During the civil strife in Angola, the Western countries had aided the rebels and put pressure on Angola, which was actually assisting the RS organization.

The news is like an atomic bomb, bombing the global news media.

During the civil strife in Angola, Western countries aided against armed forces. This is something that everyone understands. Now the opposition is controlled by the people of the RS organization, and the RS organization is the black hand of VFV bioterrorism.

It is almost equivalent to Western countries helping RS organizations to control Angola.

It is undoubtedly the most humiliating thing to help your enemies complete conspiracy plans and take over the power of a country. When the news came out, the media’s compliment to the CIA became a consistent ridicule, and there were countless people’s jealousy.

Immediately afterwards, the US official clarified that some agents provided ‘limited’ assistance to the reactionary armed forces in order to break into the reactionary armed forces and investigate the news of the leader of the RS organization, Deerman and members.

In order to prove innocence, the US official once again announced a list of RS members, including Mbo, Macani, and Murmi, who have already fled, and also Renike, all members of the RS organization, and issued the list of people. Global wanted order.

In less than half a day after the wanted order was issued, the US official announced that it had already seized Mbo, Murmi and Makani from the wanted list.

The news reversed, making the media and the people look awkward.

Not long after the US official clarified it, on the Internet, a person who claimed to be ‘a little sense of justice’ sent out an intelligence material and sent it to the news media mailboxes of various countries. It is Chen Mo's intelligence materials for various countries about Redman.

At the same time, the materials were also distributed, and the information was collected by an internal member of the RS. Because they did not want terrorist organizations to control a country, they only transmitted members' information to intelligence organizations around the world. The intelligence was not obtained by the CIA. Hunting Ridman is just a shame for Western countries to cover up their own aid to the enemy.

The news reversed again. One day was a reversal, and the speed was fast, which made people stunned.

But there is no doubt that one thing is certain. The CIA did not know in advance that the villains were RS organizations and provided assistance to them. Later, they knew that they had quickly hunted the heads of the RS organization for whitewashing.

The US official was beaten, all kinds of ridicules and snoring, and appeared on various news platforms.

As the country of Angola, the exposed list and intelligence materials caused anger among the people. I did not expect that all of them were used by the RS organization and were used as the pieces to overthrow Vasoran. After Mbomakani was arrested by the CIA, the Angora military launched a most rigorous investigation to remove the poison.

Angora is in chaos.

Two days later, Vasoran appeared, and the senior members of the Angora military collectively agreed to the return of Vassoron. Ansky once again took control of the team, and the chaotic situation in Angola was alleviated.

With the support of the military, Vasorron also began a large-scale cleansing operation in the territory. Anyone who has a little connection with Mbo and others has become the focus of the investigation.

Outside the quarrel, the CIA side, according to the approximate range of the Riedeman signal that night, and the island's smoke, quickly determined the location of the signal.

It was discovered that the Institute of Biological Research was located on the island, but the institute had already become a ruin. All the things were burned in the explosions and incendiary bombs, and no useful information could be found. The bones of Dorivitz were also found in the ruins of the fire, and they were confirmed by the NDA.

Because of the death of Riederman, the world has triggered a huge storm.

Somewhere in Africa, Lirik sat in front of an old TV set and stared at the news screen, which was about the Ridman news report.

Seeing the news that Riederman had died, Liric’s eyes were full of hatred and indifference, then turned into sorrow and ruthlessness, grabbed the safe at hand, and got up and left.

In Egypt, a black man looks at the airport he is looking at, takes a chopstick-sized syringe from his pocket and inserts it into his vein.

Inside the syringe, the blood-red liquid, as his finger presses, blends into his blood. Losing the syringe, the man seemed to be okay, carrying luggage to the airport, like the pace of death.

An hour later, the plane whistled and rushed out of the sky.

In a hidden corner of the Mediterranean, a black-collar man took out a syringe with a red liquid and inserted it into his arm. He pressed the liquid into his body and his expression was indifferent. There seemed to be no pain.

Then if there is nothing to go to the ship, pay the money, board the ship, and follow the ship to the other side.

A similar situation occurs in various places.

With airplanes, ships, trains, cars flowing, these people's footsteps lead to the world. A huge event is also brewing. Later generations called this event a 'sickle of death', meaning 'death' to reap the life of the world.

chapters.title: Chapter 491: : Do You Want To Hang Me Like This?
chapters.body:
Chapter 491: : Do You Want To Hang Me Like This?

In the underground parking lot of the Binhai Shopping Art Center, Black Hawk and others came down from the car and paid attention to the surrounding situation. Chen Mo came down from the car in a casual suit, and it looks like a young artist. Xiao Yu and Zhao Min followed closely. Xiao Wushuang was escorted from Xiao Yu’s arms and played happily. The ink girl also appeared next to Chen Mo.

This weekend, Zhao Min about to fish out to go shopping, after the birth of a small unparalleled, Xiao Yu rarely brought a small unparalleled, it is difficult to come to breathe. The 3D printer has been designed and is being assembled. The remaining things, Chen Mo's intervention is also not very useful, so there is no rejection, and a few people will come out.

After the people were together, Black Hawk and others led the way ahead, and Chen Mo also took several people out of the parking lot.

Next to the shopping center is the Marina Square. At this time, the renovation of the holographic city project can be seen everywhere. The fishing tower is also being built in the coastal area.

Only one day, the holographic city is completed, and it will attract global attention.

With the official planning of the holographic city project, Marina Square attracts the entry of the world's most exclusive luxury brands. Now that the renovation of the holographic city project has not been completed, it has gathered the most complete high-end luxury goods in the world.

From the elevator, Zhao Min put the little unparalleled in Chen Mohuai, and walked side by side with Xiao Yu, and walked toward the clothing store. The 3-5th floor is a high-end luxury area, and there are fewer people who go shopping, so their group of people has not attracted attention.

Yang Xueli and Wang Xiaoke are at the counter, looking bored at the door and chatting occasionally.

Inside the store, there is a holographic projector that projects the latest clothing posters from their company. All luxury brands that have settled in the shopping art center use almost holographic projection.

Because the theme of Marina Square is the holographic city, this project is completed, and the entire maritime square is a holographic world. Holographic projectors are standard on their stores here.

Their storefront is an international high-end brand, so it is destined to have only a glimpse of the consumer group, but there are ten customers in a month, and the commission is enough for her double salary.

While they were in a daze, they saw a few people entering the store and rushed to meet them.

"welcome."

Just looking at the face of the coming person, the two men hold on.

One of them knows that Zhao Min, president of the marching ant group, is one of the most influential business leaders in China, and the most well-known female entrepreneur among Chinese entrepreneurs. It can be said that it is a woman's idol, a man's overbearing female president.

This kind of character is actually encountered by them today, no wonder there are several bodyguards to follow. The two looked at the handsome bodyguard who was tall and straight behind.

When the two people paid attention to Zhao Min, Chen Mo was holding a small unparalleled and followed.

Seeing Chen Mo, the two eyes flashed incredible.

I didn't expect Chen Mo to come over, but also bring a child? The one next to Zhao Min is Chen Mo’s wife, He Xiaoyu, and countless women envy the woman? Chen Mo already has children, but the media has never been exposed. There is also a super-mysterious woman who is exposed by Chen Mo.

The two felt that their heads were not enough.

"Welcome." Yang Xueli reacted and moved to Wang Xiaoke next to him, politely said.

"Yeah." Chen Mo also smiled politely.

“Ms. Zhao, Ms. He, and this lady, our store recently got a batch of the latest models, do you want to try?” The two hurried to Xiaoying Zhao Min, as well as the ink girl.

"I don't need it." The ink girl shook her head.

"Do we pick a few pieces for the ink girl?" said Xiao Yu and Zhao Min.

"Okay." Zhao Min nodded.

The ink woman has a weapon system. Usually, she wears special clothes. Now the two men want to buy ordinary clothes for the ink women. Chen Mo is also speechless. The two people who looked at the bad taste could only agree to let the ink girl follow them to the fitting room.

Not long after, the ink girl wore a long skirt.

Seeing the ink girl in a long skirt, a few women on the field showed envy. The proportion of the golden ratio is bumpy and the skin is white and long, and with a perfect face, it is almost beautiful.

"This lady is very suitable for this set, very beautiful." Yang Xueli sincerely admired. Former guests, came out, even if it is not very good-looking, sometimes to cater to the guests, but also to say good-looking, but this is true.

This perfect figure of the ink girl is more than the Miss World.

"Yes, change this one." Xiao Yu said with the clothes in his hand.

She also a little envious of the body of the ink girl, but the ink girl is a robot, this figure is made, and the human body can not be customized like the ink girl.

Seeing Chen Mo nod, the ink girl followed Xiao Yu into the fitting room.

I changed a few sets in a row, and each set out had different temperament. Even Chen Mo thought, whether to make two sets of special ordinary clothes for the ink girl, at least usually pleasing to the eye.

However, this idea was quickly cancelled, and the cumbersome foreign objects were not good things for the current ink girl. Now the ink girl has no emotions, and these things are optional.

"Which ink girl likes?"

Xiao Yu took out the clothes that the ink girl had tried.

For Mohyun, this is a multiple-choice question, but there is no emotion that you like or dislike.

"This set." The ink girl pointed to one of them.

“Why did you choose this one?” Xiao Yu asked curiously.

"When wearing this set, Mercury's eyes stayed on the ink girl for the longest time, it should be sexy." The ink girl answered truthfully.

Lying in the trough! !

Lying in the trough! ! Do you want to hang me like this?

Isn't it just to see beautiful women and appreciate more? Feeling the eyes of Xiao Yu and Zhao Min, Chen Mo almost squirted out of the old blood, and was pitted again. It is necessary to talk to the ink girl in the next day.

"Well, these two sets are wrapped up." Xiao Yu saw the appearance of Chen Mo, but just grinned and handed the clothes to the clerk, a set of her, a set of ink women.

"There is this set."

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min jointly selected three sets, Chen Mo can only pay for the money, leaving the clothing store under the eyes of two shop assistants.

"What is the relationship between them? The woman is so beautiful, why is Chen Mo's wife not jealous?" Wang Xiaoke asked several people's backs.

"I don't know." Yang Xueli stayed staring at a few people leaving, finally thinking of something, patted her thigh: "Oh!! I forgot to find Chen Mo to take a photo, or you can show off in a circle of friends."

"...Yes." Wang Xiaoke also suddenly realized.

Going out again, I discovered that the pedestrian has gone far.

"Why do you think of buying clothes for the ink girl?" Chen Mo holding a small unparalleled, surprised to see Xiao Yu and Zhao Min.

"Ink ladies come and go are two sets of tights, even if the outside ink woman is responsible for your safety, this is a simple shape, but also change the shape at home? Not to be aesthetic fatigue. Although the ink girl is a smart machine But it is very clever, everything will be, to teach more like ordinary people, maybe like a movie, she can have human emotions someday." Xiao Yu took the small unparalleled from Chen Mohuai and said.

"Ok."

Although Chen Mo wants to let the ink girl think of ordinary people, she has never thought about this problem.

But relying on this, the ink girl wants to learn the human emotions, it is just a representation, just like seeing you laugh, she will also smile. The current ink girl has not evolved to have human emotions and emotions.

After a few people finished shopping, they went to other places to play it again. They were some high-end venues with few people flowing, and no one bothered.

After two days of relaxation, Chen Mo continued to put his mind back on the research progress of the 3D printer.

However, before this, Chen Mo asked the ink woman to give some countries a warning as an insider. The RS organization has a retaliation plan, which may be being implemented and prepared for them. As for those who believe it or not, it is not Chen Mo’s concern.

The death of the leader of the RS organization was soaring. Zhao Min also understood the intention of Chen Mo to let her not go abroad. She was afraid that there would be another RS revenge plan from abroad. Zhao Min also canceled all the trips abroad in the next month.

After the ‘informed person’ broke the news, the US official lost his face and was whispering with reporters, insisting that the main intelligence was their income. With the help of the military, Angola also cleared the remaining poison left by Mbo and Makani.

In the past month, members who have contact with Mbo and others have been caught, and the ‘RS’ organization is dead. While the news about the RS organization was slowly being diluted, nothing seemed to happen, and the RS organization did not make any comments.

Everything was very calm, nothing happened, as if the calm on the eve of the storm, Chen Mo was even more uneasy about this calm. At this time, a video of the leader of an RS organization, Ridman, appeared on the Internet.

chapters.title: Chapter 492: : No One Is Innocent
chapters.body:
Chapter 492: : No One Is Innocent

Stanley was drinking coffee in the office and browsing the latest news from Twitter.

Suddenly, I saw a video and the mouse in my hand was frozen. A video about the leader of RS organization Ridman? This is the hottest person in recent times, the leader of VFV bioterrorism.

He and his family, once a patient of the VFV virus, although later cured by special effects, some scars have not completely faded, there is still a psychological shadow on VFV, and there is a big shadow on the RS organization.

When Lidman was announced to be killed, he was happy for a few days, and he was very concerned about the news of the RS organization. Under hesitation, Stanley still opened the video.

What appeared in the video was Ridman himself, and Stanley saw his photos in the news and could recognize them at a glance.

"My real name is Ridman Carl Cobos Elips Tolix Alexi. When you saw this video, I was already dead.

I am an orphan of war. The war took the lives of my loved ones. I became an orphan. I was adopted by a family whose war lost her son, and I survived. I hate war, it took my childhood and took away my loved ones.

The war did not happen in your land. You don't know the fear of waiting for death every day. It is a kind of confusion that doesn't know where tomorrow is. I have witnessed the occurrence of war and witnessed the end of the war. I saw the prosperous land turned into ruins, and I saw that the creatures turned into charcoal.

Only when faced with the threat of death will people realize the value of peace, so I will volunteer to be the spokesperson of death and bring the fear of death to you. You only face the fear of death in your life, and the people under the rubble are experiencing this fear every day.

I am indeed a devil, an ugly devil, but unscrupulously provokes the war, and the people who support the war are more ugly than I am. Those people, dressed in ethical cloaks, spoke of the grandiose reasons that they did not believe, and with their powerful weapons, they slaughtered and destroyed other countries without any scruples.

Maybe you think that those who are killed by my virus are innocent. But in the land that you can't see, in the fear of bombing the smoke and the ruins, there are more innocent people there, thousands of times more than you see. But no matter who you are or they, no one is innocent.

I am very selfish, and everything I do is just for revenge, and I will give you back one thousandth of the people you gave to the ruins. This video was released, indicating that the Death Plan has begun. I hope your Lord can bless you. ”

The video frame freezes, and finally Riederman's face with a sneer seems to be a mockery of the person in front of the screen.

This strange smile made Stanley's heart panic, the shaking hand knocked over the coffee, and I didn't know it. Now he is in doubt.

What is the Death Plan? Is it a virus horror?

Last time he and his family, under the VFV virus, passed away with death. The feeling of waiting for death in the isolation room is absolutely uncomfortable. It can be said that it is the most desperate moment in his life.

Once, I don’t want to experience it for the second time.

Almost without hesitation, Stanley called to inform the family to go to places where there were few people to avoid.

Stanley is just one of the many innocent people in the panic. This scene happened in every corner of the disaster-stricken area of the VFV virus.

Ridman's video appeared on major media platforms, including Twitter, iNS, Facebook and more. Because the video has the label of Reedman, the leader of the Death Scythe, this is the most widely circulated character recently. Just after coming out, the traffic volume of the clicks has risen rapidly.

People from all walks of life are watching this video. After watching the video, everyone is silent and wants to take refuge in order to avoid being affected by this disaster.

As the video spread, panic spread.

Not long after, the major online platforms deleted related videos. But it is too late, many people see the video, the news has spread.

Revenge from that madman, it makes people think when they think about it. No one knows what this is facing, but one thing is certain, the revenge of the RS organization is definitely more crazy than the last VFV bioterrorism.

Some people who have experienced the horror of VFV bio-virus have begun to pack their bags and go to their remote homes, hoping to escape this possible disaster.

Binhai City, the study of the incense burner beach villa.

It was already late at night, after watching the video of Riederman, Chen Mo’s brow was twisted into a ball. Originally, he had fallen asleep, but when the video appeared on the Internet platform, the ink girl woke him up.

As he fears, the Death Plan has already begun, and perhaps he is already preparing for it. This time, I am afraid it will be more serious than the last time. He didn't know what the biological virus in the other hand was, but the intuition told him that it was dangerous.

Back to the room, Xiaoyu has woke up and is worried about watching him. After all, Chen Mo rarely has an emergency and is awakened by the ink girl late at night.

"You will return home with you for a while and accompany your parents."

"What happened?" asked Xiao Yu. This is the first time Chen Mo has been so serious about her, and she is worried.

"Just a RS organization posted a video on the Western network, they have a death plan, it should be a more serious bio-terror. Not sure if the other party is targeting us, but be prepared to avoid being attacked. You After going back, try not to get in touch with outsiders. Hey, too, try to go to places where there are too many people."

Homes with few outsiders are the best places to escape the massive plague. This kind of thing can't be lucky, just in case, Chen Mo can only be so embarrassed.

"What about you?"

"I participated in the last incident, and I was destined to leave this time." Chen Mo said.

"Then you have to be careful."

"Yes, you can rest assured." Chen Mo whispered softly.
