When Xiao Yu fell asleep, Chen Mo also lay down and entered the Science and Technology Library.

[Technology Apprentice] The medical technology at the stage is temporarily unavailable. The information on the universal vaccine and the super vaccine can only be seen and cannot be moved. But he can prepare some knowledge and technology reserves during the probationary period to prevent problems, and perhaps to stop the disaster through research.

The video of Riederman on the Internet has caused a lot of panic. In addition to the ordinary citizens, the CDCs of various countries will issue early warnings and do a good job in virus prevention.

In the city where the VFV virus was the hardest hit, the isolation area was cleared at the first time, ready to isolate infected patients.

Almost all hospitals are waiting, even if there are people with suspected cases of infection, they will be observed in isolation.

After WHO once again condemned the RS organization, it also issued an early warning of infectious diseases.

The similar bio-shield schemes of all countries have been launched again, convening the best experts in the country, and preparing for the development of vaccines and special effects drugs.

Just a video is enough to panic around the world. Everyone has a shadow on VFV bioterrorism, and now there is no shadow. No one wants to experience the horror again.

chapters.title: Chapter 493: : Is Death Already Here?
chapters.body:
Chapter 493: : Is Death Already Here?

Ottawa.

Li Yan is drinking, and beside him, he is his relatives and friends. Everyone occasionally gathers and exchanges with each other, at least friendship is not strange.

At this time, everyone has already been drinking, and suddenly, Li Yan feels hot, very uncomfortable, and has the urge to lose his temper. Then, the head began to faint, and everything around it seemed to be getting slower.

And the friends around me who are laughing and joking, are slowly becoming distorted before his eyes.

Am I drunk? Li Yan shook his head and tried to make himself awake. He just felt that his heart was inexplicably irritated and his body was hot and uncomfortable.

When looking at the friends around again, Li Yan was scared to fall off the table. On the table, in front of a few friends, all kinds of knives were placed, bloody, and the smiles of several friends became distorted.

"Old Li is drunk, hahahaha..."

Seeing the appearance of falling, several people pointed at him and laughed.

"Old Li did not drink much, we respected Lao Li." A friend next to Li Yan picked up the glass and walked toward him.

"Don't come near me, don't come over."

Li Yan watched the friend walk over with a cup full of blood, full of fear, constantly retreating, and finally retreat to the corner, and there is no way to retreat.

Looking up again, I found that several friends had surrounded him and prepared to arrest him.

"Don't come over, don't kill me."

Li Yan grabbed the chair at hand and smashed it toward several people. At the time, the boxes were in a mess, mixed with screams and broken sounds.

......

An apartment in Los Angeles.

This weekend, Aisha is sitting in the sofa of the apartment and watching the movie.

The video of the Ridman terrorist threat has spread, and the CDC and WHO have issued warnings about infectious diseases. Whenever it is not necessary, she minimizes social activities with the outside world.

Because there may be an unknown infectious disease, it is lurking, and having more contact with people is more likely to be infected. Moreover, in this era, through the mobile phone, everything that is needed can be done, and social reduction is normal.

Hey! !

While Aisha was watching the movie, the door to the room suddenly opened and a man came out from the inside.

"David, do you want to go out and eat?"

Aisha did not lift her head. She also knew that his boyfriend had come out.

Only what she said did not get a response. Strangely, Aisha’s gaze left the phone screen. Just looking up, she saw the last scene of this life.

Hey! !

Aisha felt a terrible pain and looked at the gun in her boyfriend in an incredible way. Looking at my boyfriend's face, there is only a pair of crazy and fearful eyes, which makes her puzzled and puzzled.

She can't figure out why this man who loves her deeply will be like this to her.

The man, who had already pushed the door away from the apartment, passed the gunshots from the outside until her consciousness was completely in the darkness, and she could not understand why the man did this.

......

Marseille, France.

Nino is lying in bed playing with a mobile phone, focusing on news about the RS organization.

Recently, the death plan announced by Riederman has made countless people fear, and now it is full of people's hearts. He also realized a little cash, after all, their country was also one of the targets of the RS organization attack.

So during this time, it is still less likely to go out, maybe not so dangerous.

In the shooting incident in Los Angeles, a man was shot and killed, causing 2 deaths and 7 injuries. He has been killed by the police.

Seeing this news, Nino subconsciously refreshed to see if there is any news about infectious diseases.

what! !

As he watched the news, there was a scream next door and a broken glass.

"Don't come near me, ghost."

When Nino just opened the window, he saw a woman running out of the house with messy hair, fearful face, and jumping from the upstairs in desperation.

After a muffled sound, the world is quiet

......

The Ottawa man suddenly became mad. When he saw someone, he was beaten, causing 1 death and 5 injuries. He is now under police control.

A man in Los Angeles attacked the crowd with a gun, causing 2 deaths and 7 injuries.

A woman from Marseille jumped upstairs and fell to death. Before she died, the woman saw her husband and shouted.

When the London man shouted to work, he suddenly threw papers and shouted ‘I’m rich! ‘Excitedly fell from the 18th floor and died.

A suspect in New York crashed into the crowd. At present, the police have already controlled the suspect. The suspect is suspected of schizophrenia. When he was arrested, his mood was abnormal.

A campus shooting incident occurred at Harvard University.

According to statistics, there have been many violent incidents in Portugal in one day. The suspects have symptoms of mental abnormality, suspected of hallucinations, and many violent incidents caused 7 deaths and 17 injuries.

According to radio news, there were many violent incidents in the United Kingdom in three days, resulting in 11 deaths and 37 injuries. There was no connection between the police investigation and the suspects had symptoms of mental disorders.

According to Bloomberg, 12 shootings and violent incidents occurred in the United States within four days, resulting in 29 deaths and 85 injuries.

The killings in Germany have caused many casualties.

There have been many cases of wounding in the Netherlands and the suspects have all been controlled.

In Europe...

North America...

A variety of news, which came out from all over the world, were all violent crimes, all sorts of suicides, or inexplicable madness.

It seems that this situation suddenly bursts out, and the news has triggered a global shock.

With so many violent incidents happening at the same time, there is absolutely something strange about it. More and more people are paying attention to these violent incidents, and no one can guarantee that this will be related to the RS organization's death plan.

......

Paris, Institute of Microbiology.

Bien took the test results in his hand, and madly rushed out of the lab. His face was full of fear and panic. He seemed to know what a terrible truth.

"It's him, it's him." Bien ran and shouted, his voice trembled.

All the medical staff in the laboratory looked at Bien and looked confused. What is the arrival, let this senior medical doctor appear this kind of gaffe.

"The reason was found, and the reason was found." Bien stood still, the fear remained on his face, and his body was shaken and uncontrollable.

“What is the reason?” asked a curious medical researcher.

"There are violent incidents around the world, and the causes of all kinds of strange mental patients." Bien’s voice is shaking: "The reason has been found. In the blood of the suspects, a new type of virus was discovered. This may be A virus that causes them to have problems with their spirits."

When Bien said this news, he tried everyone to breathe in the air and was shocked.

"Dr. Bien, are you not mistaken?" asked a more senior researcher.

"Absolutely correct. I have analyzed the blood of the five suspects, and there are such viruses in the body. And they all have the illusion of schizophrenia. It is no coincidence that it is no coincidence." Bien tried to make the field People believe his words: "This is the plan of death, the death plan of the RS organization, yes, definitely!"

Upon hearing the plan of death, all the doctors on the field were stiff, their pupils were shrinking, their faces were shocking, and there was fear.

Death has come?

chapters.title: Chapter 494: : Ridman Virus
chapters.body:
Chapter 494: : Ridman Virus

“French radio and television news, the CDC issued a warning about infectious diseases. Recently, many violent incidents and strange incidents in China have been related to RS’s ‘Death Plan’, confirming that the party involved in the incident was infected with an unknown virus.”

"Global News, the World Health Organization announced a level 6 infectious disease warning, the WHO said that there have been many cases of violent wounding in the world recently, the main outbreaks are concentrated in NATO countries and North America. The parties infected with unknown virus, RS disease The seizures are used in the cerebral cortex, causing the infected person to have hallucinations and violent tendencies, similar to patients with schizophrenia. Unknown viruses are highly infectious and can be transmitted through body fluids such as blood, saliva, sweat, etc., and can also be transmitted by mosquitoes."

After the WHO announced the warning of infectious diseases, it issued a travel warning.

To identify violent incidents as unknown viruses for RS organizations, CDCs in countries around the world quickly issued the most advanced infectious disease warnings.

Countries have also announced that domestic airports will close flights to Europe, and customs officers will carry out unprecedented strict inspections of freighters imported into Europe. With the VFV virus's anti-attack experience, various measures were quickly implemented in the first place.

Global panic spread as a result of identifying violent incidents as a result of viruses infected with RS-infected organizations.

In one week, 41 cities in 13 countries around the world, more than 70 cases of violent wounding, 187 deaths, 551 injured, more than 6,237 isolated.

On the 10th day, the WHO announced that the newly discovered virus became the Riederman virus, and the leader of the RS organization, Reidman, became the most evil synonym. The virus was also called the death virus.

About 15 days after the outbreak of the virus, the number of deaths caused by outbreaks in the world has exceeded 879, with 3,893 injured and more than 40,000.

The spread of violent incidents is spreading wildly and confirmed cases of infection, with more than 19 countries and 85 cities.

It’s just a 15-day serious hazard that has made people shudder.

Once the news was announced, it immediately attracted a large panic in the world. Almost everyone is hoarding food and preparing for long-term outings.

In the following period, WHO and countries did not choose to publish the number of deaths and the number of patients. The release of such data may lead to global control out of control and devastating panic.

The virus is highly contagious, and the patient does not have a sense of self-determination, adding more trouble to the control of the epidemic.

When someone is sick, the attack may cause infection to others, and ordinary people simply do not dare to approach him to avoid being infected. Once the onset of the disease, especially in the streets of downtown, surrounded by crazy people running away, no one can subdue patients with emotional instability and madness.

Some people even tried to escape at home, and there was a mad family chasing behind them.

The only way to subdue a patient is to inject a sedative, allowing the segregator to fix the patient to the quarantine. However, medical personnel and facilities are limited. The arrest of patients must be carried out with the help of the police, and the treatment in various cities is also growing.

More and more patients are around, causing countless people to panic. Many people have witnessed the onset of illness and the work of their loved ones. No one can guarantee that the next one will appear next to them.

“Why is this happening again?”

“Why is the victim every time us?”

"Those capitalists can go to island vacations, yacht vacations, and even enjoy in the villa courtyard, not to be exposed to the outside world, to avoid bioterrorism. We are just ordinary people who work to make money, why are the victims of each incident all of us? innocent people?"

"No one is innocent!"

"Who can save my mom and dad?"

"Which wars provoked by the capitalists who sell arms, the wars provoked by politicians with ulterior motives, why should we retaliate against us?"

"..."

There is a runaway grief and unwilling remarks on the Internet, and public opinion is almost out of control. Ridman said very well that he is retaliating against countries that like to control wars, and war is the origin of some military wages and joint politicians.

These two types of people have become the main targets of public opinion venting anger.

The panic is also spreading.

Many family and friends have become sick people. They have also become people who have been ordered to observe and observe at home. They live in fear every day.

As the first illness broke out, more and more violent incidents occurred in every corner of the world.

Almost every day, there are people in the country who have died of violent incidents or have illusory suicides. And the number is growing wildly.

Long-term incubation period and cross-infection, the range of virus infection has spread to a wide range, but some people are still in the incubation period, and there is no manifestation of the disease, but there is no large-scale detection reagent, and it is impossible to detect the virus in a simple way. Existence, it brings great inconvenience to control the control of the epidemic.

Some of the injured people who were attacked by the first patients gradually found out that the German virus was infected, and the number of deaths and injuries caused by infections and violence was constantly refreshed every day.

The medical power of various countries has been stretched, and the military’s anti-chemical forces are also involved. Even if the countries around the world are prepared for the virus outbreak, it still has little effect.

With the experience of VFV virus prevention, companies in high-incidence areas, the school has issued notices of suspension and suspension of work, and some large-scale organization activities, once again forced to suspend cancellation. The affected countries have also issued suspension notices and started disinfection work.

San Francisco Medical Center.

Black is wearing protective clothing and is patrolling the corridor of the ward.

Through the small glass window on the door, one patient can be seen, the patient is fixed on the bed, the fixed rope is not enough, and some patients have been fixed with ordinary rope. Every patient who has strength is constantly struggling, and even screams of fear, like a mentally ill person who is crazy.

This scene is chilling.

Black is also very scared. Working in such a place, he is much more likely to be infected with the virus than others.

Without distraction for too long, Black put his mind back on the patrol.

Suddenly, Black stopped his footsteps. Through the window at the door, he could see the patient on the hospital bed, his eyes turned white, his body was not twitching and shaking, and the blood of his mouth was suddenly coming out of the nose of the sick. terror.

Ten seconds later, the patient was already stuck in the bed, the chest was no longer undulating, and apparently no breathing.

Black reacted, his eyes panicked, his legs ran back, and he ran and shouted: "Doctor, doctor, patient in the isolation room No. 35 is abnormal..."

......

Hughes Medical Institute.

Judson asked the assistant to send the report to every researcher on the field. Everyone's face is extremely dignified and the atmosphere is suppressed to the extreme.

They still don't know anything about this virus. They haven't analyzed it yet. What kind of virus is there?

"This is a preliminary report. According to observations, the incubation period of the virus is very long, generally more than 20 days. The virus is highly contagious, and in addition to the patient's body fluids, mammals and mosquitoes can become carriers of transmission.

When the infected body is onset, the virus acts on the cerebral cortex, causing the patient to have hallucinations. Each person's hallucinations are different, and each animal's hallucinations are different. Commonality is abnormal body metabolism, emotional instability, and violent tendencies.

During the onset, the patient's strength and speed, as well as other indexes, are elevated, and the physical quality is much higher than that of ordinary people, comparable to those who have been trained for a long time. About 15 days after the onset, the patient will have visceral hemorrhage, alveolar rupture, and finally vomiting blood, and the blood also contains a large number of Ridman virus. ”

Judson’s voice is heavy.

This is almost the most horrible virus he has ever seen, no one.

From illness to death, they only have half a month of treatment, and now there is no treatment at all. They can only watch the patient die in madness and be helpless.

The medical staff of the entire institute were silent and heavy.

This time, from the signs of the Ridman virus outbreak, it is much more terrible than the VFV virus. Until now, they have not found any reagents that can detect the virus, let alone special effects and vaccines. If this continues, the death toll will exceed their imagination.

chapters.title: Chapter 495: : Improved Hx3 Pharmacy
chapters.body:
Chapter 495: : Improved Hx3 Pharmacy

The first batch of infected patients died, with no exceptions, with a mortality rate of 100%, which is a desperate mortality rate.

Once infected, there is no treatment within 15 days of the disease, which means death.

This result, in the shadow of all medical workers, the fear of death at any time, so that the frontline of the medical staff is filled with an invisible pressure.

The lack of specific drugs and vaccines against the Ridman virus has prevented patients from being treated and can only die in madness. As time goes on, the number of deaths will increase.

Soon, the hard-hit areas in Europe have sent out help to WHO, medical supplies are not enough, and medical staff are insufficient.

In some countries, coercive measures are taken to forcibly isolate all quarantine areas, and only allow them to be refused.

The small countries in the hardest hit areas even concentrated the patients in the isolation zone and the military's anti-chemical forces to isolate the centralized isolation zone.

The medical facilities and medical staff are seriously inadequate, and it is no longer able to take care of the patient's condition. Now the number of patients has more than 30,000, and the number of isolation is more than 700,000.

Letting the disease spread out will go in the direction of losing control, and it will be a disaster for all mankind.

The outbreak of the disease every day shows that there is no cure, and it continues to spread. Once it reaches a completely out of control situation, this bioterror will reproduce the tragic black death of Europe in the Middle Ages.

Some medical staff who have been accidentally infected with the virus are unwilling to commit suicide and various news, so that the world is shrouded in the dark clouds of terror.

Capital Tangshan Hospital.

Through the floor-to-ceiling windows of the isolation room, people from the medical teams such as Chen Mo and Wu Bing were wearing protective clothing and observing the inside of the isolation room.

In the isolation room, a medical staff wearing protective clothing is preparing to inject the drug into the patient. A blue medicine with no label.

The pharmacy is Chen Mo's HX3 improved by acquiring the medical technology of the Science and Technology Library.

As a team during the VFV virus, there have been achievements. At the beginning of the Ridman virus outbreak, they were once again organized to look for specific drugs for the Ridman virus.

Chen Mo was also contacted without any accident, joined the medical team to tackle the special effects and treatment programs.

Seeing the information of the Ridman virus, Chen Mo only felt the horror of it. Even Starfish No. 3, which can reduce the activity of the virus, has no effect, and the special drug of VFV virus has no effect.

Every day, Chen Mo looks for special effects medicines in the science and technology library. He hopes to find the special medicine of the Ridman virus quickly. Unfortunately, there are too many books about drugs, and he is not familiar with them. The Ridman virus is also a new type of virus. Determining which drug is effective against the virus can only be lost.

In the end, only some special effects drugs can be used to improve the HX3 to reduce the activity of the virus. Under the guidance of Chen Mo, their team, for a month to tackle the problem, only a little bit today.

Experiments in monkeys have been successful, and improved HX3 has successfully reduced the activity of the Ridman virus and put the virus into a temporary dormant period.

It is now a human clinical trial.

After the medical staff injected the medicine, everyone began to wait.

No one talks, every minute, it seems as long as an hour.

As time went by, ten minutes later, the patient who was fixed on the bed, the degree of mad struggle slowly slowed down.

Seeing this scene, the person outside the room, his face floated a touch of joy. The instrument is stable, indicating that the patient's body function is stable. After the injection of the drug, the patient does not have a strange reaction, which is a good sign.

“Feeling that we are going to succeed.” A medical team's expert spoke, even if wearing a mask, the joy in the voice can be clearly felt.

"In theory, there should be no big problem," another researcher said.

"Look at the situation again. If the patient is completely cured, he can't conclude." Wu Bing said. She said so, she already agreed with the two.

Because of Chen Mo, the man, like a fan, always creates miracles, giving people a kind of inexplicable confidence.

"The problem should be small." Chen Mo also said. When he had just finished speaking, the patient in the hospital bed had slowed down and his eyes recovered. It was the eyes of normal people.

Zhou Chengming looked at the white ceiling, and the smell of thick disinfectant water penetrated into the tip of his nose, so that his spirit was slowly concentrated.

He felt that he had a dream. A murderer took a **** kitchen knife out of the kitchen to kill him. Then he fought hard, wounded the murderer and ran out, and then the murderer's associates injected the drug.

where are you now?

Zhou Chengming turned around and saw the strange environment around him. A variety of medical instruments, as well as two fully armed medical personnel. This scene made Zhou Chengming feel a panic. Just wanted to sit up, but found that the body was fixed in the hospital bed, can not move.

Is the dream true? The murderer kidnapped the organ and experimented?

Thinking of this, Zhou Chengming almost cried out without fear: "Who are you? Why are you arresting me?"

"I am a doctor." Hearing Zhou Chengming's speech, the medical staff who injected the drug was happy, and asked: "You are infected with the virus, causing hallucinations. How are you feeling now?"

"You are a doctor?" Zhou Cheng obviously did not believe, the voice with panic and anger: "You are a doctor, why should you tie me like this?"

"You have an infectious disease, here is the isolation room. The murderer you see is the illusion caused by your virus affecting the cerebral cortex." The medical staff did not worry, explained. This is a good sign that the patient can communicate normally, indicating that the condition has been temporarily controlled.

“Really?” Zhou Chengming suddenly panicked and heard 80% of the medical staff. Because he lost consciousness, there was news of infectious diseases during that time.

"Really, the virus in your body is temporarily controlled and further treatment is needed." The medical staff said: "In order to prevent you from getting sick again, you must fix it on the hospital bed. I need to take a blood test for you now."

"Doctor, can I still heal?" Zhou Chengming looked at the medical staff with enthusiasm.

"This is developing special medicines, you can do it with confidence." The medical staff comforted once and took blood to Zhou Chengming. Now Zhou Chengming is an infected person, and all his actions must be careful.

The virus in the patient has entered a dormant period, and the patient temporarily recovers his mind.

Successful! ! !

With this conclusion, the entire medical team cheered and several of the most front-line doctors burst into tears. In the past month, they have not seen hope, only in the face of the horror of the virus, and now finally see a glimmer of light.

"Chen Chen, thank you." Wu Bing took the lead to stop the joy and said to Chen Mo.

"Thank me for doing it?" Chen Mo asked strangely.

"If you don't have it, this pharmacy can't be studied." Wu Bing said. The direction and theory of the improvement of the drug are all proposed by Chen Mo. If it is not Chen Mo, it is impossible to find the agent that suppresses the activity of the Ridman virus.

"Thank you." Shi Hongtu also thanked Chen Mo.

"Thank you." After the joy, the people in the medical team thanked Chen Mo.

"The results are everyone's. With everyone's help, research will be so fast. Now it's just the activity of the suppressed virus, let the virus temporarily enter the dormant period, this time will not be too long, theoretically about half a month, the second time The effect will be worse, the third time will be worse, and the condition will be extended by up to one month. Now it is only the beginning, you should find the special medicine or vaccine as soon as possible, or you will die more people."

Chen Mo’s solemn gratitude to the people was somewhat helpless, but he was not happy because the disaster could only be the beginning.

The special effects and vaccines did not come out, and the disaster will not end so easily.

......

"CDC News: led by Chen Mo, Wu Bing, Shi Hongtu, etc., the medical expert group successfully developed drugs that can reduce the activity of the Ridman virus."

According to the news from Huaxia CDC, on the same day, Haixing Company, which owns the HX3 formula patent, announced that it has signed agreements with 20 pharmaceutical companies around the world. The modified HX3 formulation is temporarily licensed to major pharmaceutical production plants around the world, and it is hoped that the improved HX3 agent will be mass-produced at the fastest rate.

The two news immediately caused a sensation.

No drugs have been found for the Ridman virus, and nothing like the VFV virus. When the condition was almost out of control, Huaxia’s medical team once again reported good news.

The families of countless human patients may have been infected, and the isolated people are sobbing.

In this tragic moment, any good news is a life-saving straw for many people. Now there is a big news that is not too big, enough for many people to see the dawn.

"Thank you Chen Mo, thank you Huaxia Medical Experts Group, thank you Haixing Company, thank you to the world's frontline anti-Rideman virus medical staff."

"Thank you Chen Mo, thank you Huaxia Medical Team."

"Thank you, thank you, thank you to the medical team, thank you to all the medical staff around the world. I hope the disaster will pass early."

"Thank you, thank you, thank you to all the medical staff. I hope this disaster will end soon."

"..."

The news attracted all parties to praise.

Among the many icy deaths and various data, the improved HX3 agent appeared, like a fire in the ice and snow, let countless patients' families, as well as isolation personnel, feel the warmth.

Chen Mo, who played an important role in the VFV biological crisis, once again stood up and took the lead in finding drugs that are effective against the Ridman virus.

The emergence of the improved HX3 agent has brought Chen Mo's personal reputation to the highest point.

However, the viral crisis did not end with the emergence of a modified HX3 agent. The improved HX3 agent only allowed the virus to go to sleep and could not eradicate the Ridman virus. Once unable to suppress, the patient's final result is still dead.

The cloud of death from bioterrorism still hangs in everyone’s heart.

chapters.title: Chapter 496: : Customized Vaccine System
chapters.body:
Chapter 496: : Customized Vaccine System

On the way back to the dormitory, Wu Bing had a snack and was still thinking about the research.

The emergence of a modified HX3 agent caused a brief relief in the number of deaths caused by the Riederman virus.

But she knows that she can only fight for a maximum of one month. After a month has passed, special drugs and vaccines have not appeared, which means that there will be continuous deaths, which researchers are worried about.

She knows that the success of the improved HX3 agent is already very fast. If it is not Chen Mo, give them the correct research direction, and there are some theoretical data suggestions, and then give them a team for several months, they may not be successful.

"I don't know when the special drug of the Riedeman virus will succeed." Wu Bing sighed.

"I don't want to come back, think about it, I should have a clue soon."

Chen Mo shook his head. If the virus is not horrible, it will definitely not become the backhand plan for Reidman to retaliate against the West. Like that kind of swearing, revenge is certainly not too simple.

"Hope." Wu Bing laughed. Now there is Chen Mo, maybe this miraculous man can create a miracle.

"Mergo, come back."

"Hello Miss Wu Bing."

The two had just arrived at the door of the dormitory, and the ink girl had opened the door. When they saw the two, they said hello, no difference to ordinary people.

This is a dormitory in the Capital Separation District. Researchers such as Chen Mo and Wu Bing are arranged in the same building to facilitate management. Chen Mo and Wu Bing belong to the expert group, and the dormitory allocated by the two is also on the same floor, just in the opposite door. So every day, Wu Bing can see the ink girl.

This beauty is a woman who makes women jealous.

"Hello, Miss Ms." Seeing the ink girl at the door, Wu Bing responded politely and threw a meaningful look to Chen Mo: "You should rest early and see you tomorrow."

Other researchers, I can't wait for the people around me to be far from this place. Chen Mo is the only researcher who brought people, or a super beauty.

When Chen Mo came with the ink woman on the first day, many researchers were very surprised. They looked at the eyes of both of them.

The two still live together at this time. Although the dormitory also has two rooms, Chen Mo also said that the ink girl is his assistant, but no one will believe it. This time they live together, lonely and widowed, Lang Cai female appearance, there is no special relationship, the ghost does not believe.

"see you tomorrow."

For Wu Bing's meaningful eyes, Chen Mo has long been used to it.

Others can't see that the ink girl is a robot. He is a little happy. After all, the ink girl is his masterpiece. The reaction of others has just proved that his masterpiece is very successful.

He doesn't have to explain to others that the ink girl is a robot, which is incredible.

"Mergo, 3D printer assembly was successful." Chen Mogang entered the dormitory, the ink girl opened.

"Successful?"

Upon hearing this news, Chen Mo’s spirit was shocked.

"Yes, this is the nano bronze statue printed by the printer when the machine is tested."

The ink girl handed the mobile phone to Chen Mo. The above is a picture taken by a microscope. A statue of Chen Mo, who is smaller than the hair, is clearly visible in shape and has a smile on his face.

"It finally succeeded."

Chen Mo has a sense of ease, indicating that he has succeeded, and he has a sigh of relief, and his feeling of exhaustion has disappeared a lot.

The research phase of the printer was completed, the parts began to be assembled and assembled, and he no longer needed to intervene before he joined the medical team. After a month, the assembly was finally successful.

"Continue to assemble more printers, which will be used later." Chen Mo said.

The completion of the nano-scale 3D printer means that his next R&D production is no longer limited by ultra-precision parts. The speed at which he produces a variety of robots and machinery will be greatly accelerated.

But now is not a happy time, now the most important thing is to end the virus crisis.

The success of the nano-scale 3D printer project, he can start the task of the medical field. The medical field is the area he is most in need at present.

[Technology Apprentice] The medical technology at the stage has many universal special effects drugs and super vaccines, which can completely end the virus crisis.

He took the lead in developing a drug that prolonged the onset of the Ridman virus. He wanted to delay the time and wait for the success of the 3D printer. He got the medical field to complete the problem, and all the crises would be solved.

After a quick shower, Chen Mo lay back on the bed and entered the technology library.

In the science and technology library, the tall bookshelves are still as quiet as ever, with infinite mystery, which can cause strong curiosity.

After a little emotion, Chen Mo walked quickly to the center of the library.

Eight books in eight directions, the light column in seven directions has long been dim, and only the light column in the biomedical direction is still lit, with a book suspended in the middle.

Completing the subject of this book means that he can open all the biomedical technologies in the [Technology Apprentice] stage, which means that he can open the [Technology Apprentice] stage, all fields, all kinds of technical books, that is inexhaustible. Beyond the technology of the current era.

And the [Science Apprentice] stage is completely over, he can get the next permission of the technology library.

Countless incredible technology is waving to him.

Walking to the light column in the field of biomedicine, Chen Mo took a deep breath and tried to calm his heart.

Universal virus special medicine! ! Super vaccine! ! RNA virus vaccine! Any kind of thing can do. Reaching out to the book, Chen Mo is meditation in his heart.

I didn’t think about a certain technology to be oriented before, but I studied what I had before.

But now, the Ridman virus is raging. If the book can get the pharmaceutical technology or formula such as the virus special effect drug, he can directly solve the crisis, without waiting for the completion of this topic, open the apprenticeship of science and technology, and then select the virus. The technology of special medicines is shortened in time and can save many lives.

At the moment when the palm touched the book, the message of the book rushed into his brain. The tingling from the cerebral cortex, as well as the nerve tingling, and the chest tightness in the chest, made Chen Mo feel that the whole person is not good.

Every time this feeling is uncomfortable, but fortunately, biomedical technology is much less than other technologies, except for the initial nerve tingling and chest tightness, and no other more intense discomfort.

It seems that his wish has been answered by the Science and Technology Library. This book is really a book related to vaccines, and it is similar to the universal vaccine.

"Customized Vaccine System", the field: medicine, genetic engineering; permission level: technology apprentice; product introduction: using the same basic gene components as the backbone or main framework of the vaccine, using this framework as a vaccine system platform to adjust the gene sequence Insert the gene sequences of different viruses to form immunity against different viruses.

It’s raining in time.

Soothing, Chen Mo reveals a hint of surprise.

With this technology, it means he can customize the vaccine for any virus at will, which is exactly what he wants at the moment. Completely from the discomfort, Chen Mo began to digest the "customized vaccine system" information.

chapters.title: Chapter 497: :Not Optimistic
chapters.body:
Chapter 497: :Not Optimistic

“Do you want to research custom vaccine technology?”

In the conference room of the institute, Chen Mo’s words gave Shi Hongtu and other expert members a surprised look. Only Wu Bing is relatively calm. When she knew Chen Mo’s thoughts on the road, it was also unbelievable.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

Last night, the technical data of the "customized vaccine system" was carefully digested, and the mind had already had a general idea.

"Customized vaccine technology, many medical scientists are studying, but no one can guarantee when it will succeed. We don't have much time to study this technology now," Shi Hongtu said.

Including Wu Bing, other expert groups agree with Shi Hongtu.

The concept of customized vaccine technology has already been proposed, and some research progress has been made. However, in the medical field, the custom vaccine is still in the stage of crossing the river by feeling the stones. It is a bit inappropriate to use this kind of emergency virus incident.

Their current time is only one month, and the efficacy of the modified HX3 agent can probably delay the epidemic for one month. A month later, the first batch of people who used modified HX3 agents lost their potency and a steady stream of deaths occurred.

"This is my sure, the most confident direction of success." Chen Mo said.

The expression on the field was weird, and Shi Hongtu’s eyelids jumped. Customized vaccine technology can be said to be one of the most difficult topics in all current special effects research. Now is Chen Mo's most confident direction? I have to say that Chen Mo’s idea is a bit different.

"We don't have much time," said a panelist.

"What is the time? How can you determine which study is the shortest? Do you want to study the specific drug within a month? Are you still unclear about this kind of thing? Maybe a group will announce a special drug tomorrow, maybe The extinction of all human beings cannot be found."

Chen Mo’s problem made the people on the field quiet and a little embarrassed. They want to treat patients quickly, but they ignore the fact that they are studying.

They all know that if they study this kind of thing, maybe it will succeed suddenly tomorrow. Maybe they will not succeed if they enter the coffin. It depends mainly on whether the researchers can find the node of the technological breakthrough.

I can't find the key, how much time I have to be stunned, find it, and the road ahead is smooth.

"Customized vaccine technology is not mature, and the speed of research and development may be slower than other drugs." A hair-white expert said: "Not as good as Chen, you continue to study HX3, improved HX3 agent, has successfully suppressed the Ridman virus, and then do Improvement does not necessarily eliminate the virus."

This made other medical experts nod.

The improved HX3 agent has achieved good results, at least for the Ridman virus, which is a certain direction.

"HX3 is only a protease inhibitor. Its effect is limited to inhibiting the replication of viral proteins, allowing the virus to enter a dormant phase. It cannot inactivate the virus itself, otherwise its function is not to reduce the activity of the virus. If it can really remove the virus, When I started the direction of improvement, it was not inhibiting its metabolism," Chen said.

HX3 is the material he developed for Haixing Company. All the functions and effects, he knows clearly, how to change it, its role is to reduce the activity of the virus, the essence can not be changed.

“But custom vaccine technology, this technology is full of too much uncertainty.”

"The research direction of the Ridman virus specific drug, you have a certain, which direction is correct?" Chen Mo asked.

All the researchers on the field had a stagnation and could not answer.

“Do you really decide to research a customized vaccine?” Shi Hongtu asked.

He is the leader of the medical team. The main task is to find a special drug that can target the Ridman virus as soon as possible. Although he does not agree with Chen Mo's research on customized vaccines, he can't influence Chen Mo's thoughts.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

The scene once again fell silent, and insisted on Chen Mo, they did not have a good way.

"I will talk about my thoughts."

Wu Bing opened and everyone on the field looked at her. As one of the youngest researchers in the medical team, Wu Bing's ability is not lower than others, so the speech is still very weighty.

"Yuan Academician is an independent group to study the custom vaccine technology, others have studied the reverse enzyme inhibitors, so divided into two groups, go hand in hand, at least in the choice of one more possibility, so as not to have a dead end."

Shi Hongtu sighed and looked at Chen Mo’s posture. It is impossible to give up the research direction of customized antibodies. They said that no more is useful. Chen Mo has the right to freely choose to study in any direction, without restriction. This is what Chen Mo said when he joined the group.

Now Chen Mo just informs them, not to consult them.

"Since Academician Chen insisted, according to Academician Wu, the team led by Academician Chen studied custom vaccine technology, and others studied reversal of enzyme inhibitors according to the original research plan."

Shi Hongtu finally made a conclusion.

“Who would like to join the academician Chen team to study custom vaccine technology together?”

Many experts on the field did not open their mouths. Customized vaccines were studied in peacetime. If they came out, this is an inter-generational vaccine technology. But now, during the virus outbreak, this is not a good choice.

"As always, I and my team joined the team of Academician Chen to conduct research." Wu Bing said.

In this case, Chen Mo did not have an accident. In his expectation, he only nodded slightly to Wu Bing.

"Well, today's meeting is over. Everyone continues to carry out research. Any progress is immediately reported to the discussion. The situation outside the epidemic is not optimistic."

The last sentence of Shi Hongtu made the atmosphere heavy.

......

In a small office of the Institute, six researchers sat quietly.

The six officers are members of the Wu Bing team, four men and two women, all look young, age 30, and are the lowest average team in the medical team. They are some outstanding students of the medical school of the Academy of Sciences, or members of the medical research project team, and the minimum degree is a medical doctor.

At this time, Chen Mo and Wu Bing were also in the laboratory, and Chen Mo had some documents in his hands.

"Now I will assign you the task of each other. Our group's topic is custom vaccine technology. This topic is a bit difficult. If you want to speed up the research and development, you will cooperate with me to conduct research."

Chen Mo opened his mouth and several people got up. Although Chen Mo is not a medical graduate, from the beginning of the VFV virus to the success of the improved HX3 agent, he has proved his strength in pharmaceutical research, enough to be the mentor of any one of them.

"You are divided into two groups in three or three. The first group is together with the academician Wu, who is responsible for isolating the protective antigen gene of the virus and determining the gene sequence. The second group is working with me to build a system platform for customized vaccines. This is your subject information. ”

Chen Mo handed the information in his hand to a few people.

“This is an epoch-making technology that has been successful. It will have a revolutionary effect on the medical field. It can be used by medical scientists to quickly produce infectious disease vaccines for certain diseases, even mixed vaccines carrying multiple antigens.”

Six people were in awe, and their hearts were hot.

The country is not the hardest hit, and it is relatively calm. But the international medical community is not calm. Almost all famous immunologists have been called up to set up a special research group.

The improved HX3 drug is not cured.

The patient's condition is special, like severe schizophrenia, and it is contagious. Countries in the hardest hit areas are under unprecedented pressure.

Medical facilities and epidemic prevention supplies have been rushed across the board.

Protective clothing, masks, and gloves are all used for disinfection and reuse. The chances of getting some medical personnel infected are on the rise. In some of the most serious countries, because of the extreme lack of medical facilities, patients have been uniformly held in a separate area, controlled by the military anti-chemical forces.

Now using HX3 Pharmacy, the patient is awake and management is relatively simple. But a month later, the backlog of patients was not cured, the pharmacy failed, the medical facilities were insufficient, and when the patients lost their minds again, no one knew what the consequences would be.

As time goes by, the medical community has not heard good news about breakthroughs in specific drugs. Fighting at the forefront of medical care, the mind began to cast a shadow. Because the first patients with modified HX3 agents are about to face the consequences of drug failure.

chapters.title: Chapter 498: :Disaster
chapters.body:
Chapter 498: :Disaster

Lin Sai sat on the hospital bed and glanced out the window and closed the newspaper in his hand.

His illness and medication were restored, and one hand was fixed in the hospital bed. In order to prevent his onset, the hospital did not let them free.

The bed not far from him was the patient who was sent in shortly after he was sent to the isolation room. Also infected with the Ridman virus, using a modified HX3 agent to restore consciousness.

This is the hardest-hit area in Belgium. There are two patients in an isolation room. Because there are too many patients, the isolation area here is already overcrowded. I am afraid that this situation will continue for a long time without special medicine.

"When do you say that special effects can come out?" Lindsay said, his voice was not tired, and he was somewhat uneasy. This kind of dead day, no one is uncomfortable.

"I don't know." The patient across from Lindsay shook his head and fell into a mental state. His name is Maud. He once introduced himself to Lindsay. The two of them are also friends. In this closed isolation room, chatting when they are bored, they are already familiar with each other.

"I don't know how long this medicine can last." Lindsay said.

"Oh, it is estimated to be faster, I feel a little bit wrong now." Maud smiled, did not speak.

Lindsay returned to God, his pupils shrank, and when he looked at Maud, the other party was constantly shaking his head, as if he wanted to get rid of the things in his head.

"Go away, walk away!!"

"Ghost, ghost, don't come over."

"Go to hell."

Suddenly when Maud saw Lindsay, his face was already frightened. He kept pulling his hands tied to his bed and retracting his body to the corner of the hospital bed. The other hand kept swaying and seemed to see Its horrible things.

Seeing this scene, Lindsay’s pupils shrank and his heart floated with fear.

This is the state after the onset, completely free of self-awareness, like a mentally ill. I am afraid that when I am sick, it is not much better than this.

A desperate mood came to my heart and made him completely confused.

......

"The injection was successful, let go of him."

In the Los Angeles quarantine, Tivin unplugged the patient's syringe and quickly retreated to the bed a meter away, watching the patient struggling in bed.

Five minutes later, the patient on the hospital bed did not stop, still looking at him with crazy eyes, as if to see the enemy.

This scene, let the next medical staff lift a heart.

"Doctor Twen, how are the patients still not good?"

"HX3 medicine has failed." Tivin's voice is extremely heavy, and the haze of his heart is thicker.

"What do we do then?" The voice of the medical staff was a little panic.

"Do this way, don't let him go." Twen said: "Other isolation rooms should pay attention to it. Once the medicine is invalid, notify me immediately."

"Good." The medical staff hurriedly promised.

Leaving the isolation room, Tivin felt heavy and he was a little panicked, but he must be forced to calm down.

The HX3 agent has failed.

The worst situation arises.

Once the drug fails to the patient, it means that the first users will become unconscious again, and it will be a disaster for the whole world.

And this disaster has arrived.

......

East China Sea, Tokyo, New York, Ottawa, Paris, London, Berlin, Amsterdam...

A similar thing is happening in every corner of the globe.

The improved HX3 agent failed in the first batch of patients, and more and more patients, the body's virus was awakened, and the disease relapsed. In just one day, the number of deaths due to recurrence in the world reached 227.

The news has brought the world into an unprecedented panic.

Many infected people saw patients with relapsed illnesses, their mentality has collapsed, despair, crying for doctors to treat, but the response was just a regretful sigh.

Death, despair, fear, this is the theme of the quarantine, all kinds of negative emotions, as if the hands of death are in their hearts, they can take their lives at any time.

The first batch of pharmacy failed, and the delay of one month has passed. However, the medical teams around the world still have no good news of drug breakthroughs, which has caused many front-line medical personnel to collapse.

......

"The dean, more and more patients are out of control, the isolation room and the bed are not enough, and the medical staff is not enough. Masks, protective clothing, gloves, syringes, sedatives, ambulances, etc. are not enough. The urgently needed medical equipment is already in short supply. We need a lot of medical supplies support. Is there any new news on it now?"

Roche looked at the middle-aged and old man with glasses in front of him. He is the dean of the Victoria Hospital, Matt. Seeing Matt didn't talk, Roche was anxious and continued to ask.

"HX3 can only last for one month. Is there any new drug on the side of the institute?"

"No." Matt shook his head and shook his head: "There is no such thing in the world. According to the news of the WHO, countries around the world have tried more than 4,290 drugs, all of which are ineffective against the virus. This virus is terrible."

"What should I do now? The hospital can't accommodate so many patients. There is a steady stream of diagnoses. This way, once it exceeds the critical point, it will be completely finished. The entire hospital's medical staff will be in a viral environment, the probability of infection. Rise. If the medical staff is infected, this vicious circle will open and the entire hospital will become a dead building."

Roche’s voice was anxious.

Since the outbreak of the virus, many medical personnel have died of illness, which has already put a lot of psychological pressure on the frontline medical staff. If there are other problems, I am afraid that the virus will really get out of control.

The air is dead, except for Roche and Matt, others are heavy.

After a long time, Matt quickly opened his mouth.

"Let's ask the CDC to establish a centralized quarantine area. This is convenient for management. The staff is not too distracted. There is no effect on the single isolation of patients before there is no specific medicine. It only increases the manpower and workload."

Other doctors nodded in agreement.

As one of the hardest hit areas in the UK, the number of patients in the whole country has exceeded 5,000. It does not include the number of people who have died and the number of people violently killed. The number of people isolated is more than 150,000. This is only the number in the UK, and other hardest hit areas. Some are even more horrible.

The number of confirmed cases and deaths is rising every day, which is already a very dangerous number.

If the isolation point is out of control, it is really a catastrophe. It is more convenient to centralize all patients. There is currently no specific treatment for treatment, even if it is isolated alone, it will not be of much use. In special circumstances, we have not considered any other problems, otherwise the epidemic will be out of control and will be even more horrible.

The UK CDC has announced the establishment of three centrally isolated areas to centrally isolate all diagnosed patients.

The news shakes the medical community.

The epidemic has reached the point where it is getting out of control. If this continues, no one can guarantee that this disaster will bring about a terrible ending.

Soon after the establishment of a centralized segregation area in the United Kingdom, the hardest hit areas in other European and American regions have also announced the establishment of centralized segregation points in the severely affected areas, sending all confirmed patients to the segregated areas, and centralized isolation and management by the military anti-chemical units.

At this time, the number of confirmed cases worldwide has reached 70,000, and the number of deaths is refreshing every day. There are more than 2 million people in the world. Every time a patient is found, everyone who comes into contact with him will be isolated.

Under the various strict restrictions, the momentum of the madness of the Riederman virus began to ease, but the number of deaths has also increased. In the centralized quarantine area, people die, despair, and collapse every day. Some patients who are still awake, some choose to commit suicide and die with dignity.

The news of one after another makes everyone feel heavy. If there is no special medicine, it means that all infected people will die. It will be a disastrous number.

chapters.title: Chapter 499: : The Dawn Of Victory
chapters.body:
Chapter 499: : The Dawn Of Victory

Hughes Medical Institute.

Headed by world-famous immunologists such as Qiu Xiang and Ju De Sen, everyone is waiting for the use of the isolation room.

Now that the Ridman virus epidemic is serious and special, the WHO and the National Centers for Disease Control have issued a notice that the medical team working on the Ridman special medicine can consult the families of the conscious patients and directly adopt the patients who have lost their minds. Non-toxic and slightly toxic drugs tested.

This notice is very important, eliminating the need to test new drugs on animals, which can greatly shorten the drug development cycle.

Now all their medicines are carried out directly by patients who have lost their minds. No treatment, definitely death, let them use new drugs, and there is a chance to heal.

This is the 32nd attempt, all members are praying, hoping to pass. They were divided into eight groups and conducted drug discovery studies in nine different directions. Until now, there has not been much progress.

The Ridman virus is too overbearing.

During the onset of the disease, in addition to the mental hallucinations of the patient, the other functions of the body are all much stronger than the healthy people. After half a month, the patient will have internal bleeding and eventually die.

In addition to the improved HX3 agent, no other method has been found.

The improved HX3 agents continue to be in the direction of further research, and they are doing it. After one month, they can no longer suppress the virus.

After seeing the doctor in the isolation room inject new drugs into the patient, all the researchers' hearts were raised. Ten minutes later, I saw patients who were still struggling with horror in the isolation room, and all the people showed disappointment.

"It has failed again."

Another failure, so that all medical scientists are in a bad mood. A few old medical scientists, their eyes have become red, and in the face of such disasters, they feel their powerlessness.

"According to WHO's incomplete statistics, the number of direct and indirect deaths caused by the 'death virus' has exceeded 50,000, and the number of infected and confirmed cases has exceeded 90,000. The number of global segregation is close to 2.5 million. In the next month, if There is no specific drug, and the death toll is expected to exceed 100,000. This is the largest man-made biological disaster in human history."

"Los Angeles reported that yesterday, a medical staff in Los Angeles accidentally infected the 'death virus' while handling the body. Because of the pressure, he committed suicide by jumping off the building in the isolation area."

"Reuters news, France concentrated in the quarantine area, a patient broke free of the ropes, killed a medical staff to escape the isolation room, and released 60 people infected with the virus, causing quarantine in the quarantine, trying to escape the quarantine.

The riots killed three health care workers, seven medical staff and one anti-chemical soldier infected with the death virus, and nine infected people died. The French military anti-chemical force has arrested all patients and no infected people have fled the isolation zone. ”

In the past two months, the news from the hardest hit areas of the world has put the heart of the international community on a big scale. When going out to do any activities, we must be cautious. I am afraid that I will be infected with the 'death virus'. The global economic loss is immeasurable. .

Capital Tangshan Hospital.

Chen Mo and Wu Bing, as well as a group of members wearing protective clothing, are walking quickly to the isolation room in the test area.

The expression on each person's face is different, or anxious, or looking forward to it. Only Chen Mo and Wu Bing's expressions are relatively calm. They were conducting research and were informed that their patients who received the test vaccine had an abnormal reaction today.

With the support of Chen Mo's complete technical materials, and the help of the team members, the development of the vaccine is developing in the direction that Chen Mo envisions, and the precision is very fast.

A group of Wu Bing successfully found the protective antigen gene of the virus. Chen Mo led the team members and found suitable mRNA as a vaccine system platform.

The drug has been tested several times and failed. The vaccine system platform has been re-improved several times. This is the eighth trial of their customized vaccine.

It is good to have a reaction.

At this time, the most terrible thing is that the drug did not respond.

So after receiving the news, everyone gave up the research in their hands and rushed to the test area.

"pain."

"it hurts."

"Doctor, I am so hurt, so uncomfortable."

When Chen Mo and Wu Bing entered the isolation room, they heard the painful voice of the patient. The sound is not big, but for two people, it is like a scorpio.

When the Ridman virus is sick, the patient is like a madman, and there is no such clear sound at all.

This shows that their vaccine has begun to play a role.

"Sir, where are you uncomfortable?" Wu Bing leaned down and asked.

"The body is sore and the brain hurts." The patient seemed to hear Wu Bing's problem and began to answer, like a dream, but with a cry in his voice, apparently suffering tremendous pain.

This answer made all the members ecstatic.

There is an answer that the patient's consciousness has already been awake, and the vaccine that may be injected has worked.

Wu Bing asked a few questions, but in addition to the pain, other questions did not have an accurate answer, like a drunkard who was half-awake.

"A full body check, you give him a blood test."

Chen Mo signaled the team members who came over and began to take blood tests on patients on a fixed bed. The other two members untied the patient's sick suit, and the bruising of the skin immediately caught everyone's attention.

This bruising is spread throughout the skin of the body.

This is not a symptom of the Ridman virus. They have been dealing with the virus for a few months. This is certain.

"It's like allergies, it's like poisoning," Wu Bing said.

Chen Mo nodded and agreed with Wu Bing: "Is the patient not using other drugs in addition to the syringe vaccine?"

"No, the glucose injected by the patient, I have strictly checked. There are no other medical personnel who have contacted the patient." The team responsible for the guard must shake his head.

"It may be related to the vaccine. We will first test the blood of the patient." Wu Bing said.

Twenty minutes later, Chen Mo and Wu Bing came out of the isolation room without finding out the results. The two just came out, and Shi Hongtu and others who were isolated from the outdoors could not wait to be surrounded.

They heard that Chen Mo’s patient had an abnormal reaction and immediately put down his research. Only Chen Mo and Wu Bing were in the isolation room. They didn't go in and waited outside.

"How? Your research has progressed?"

Shi Hongtu and several other immunologists look forward to the goggles.

The group where Chen Mo and Wu Bing are located, because of the research on customized vaccines, he has little hope of pinning. But a few times down, the speed of this group is beyond his imagination.

Now the patient has already responded, and other groups, after injecting new drugs, either sink to the sea or the patients die directly, and progress is not great, so they also hope that Chen Mo can make a miracle.

"The vaccine was injected three days ago. Looking at the situation, it should have played a role. The patient is no longer gibberish as before." Wu Bing said.

As soon as this was said, several immunologists such as Shi Hongtu were ecstatic.

The patient's mental state has improved, indicating that the research has progressed. This is definitely the message they most want to hear now.

"But the patient's body is abnormal, not sure of allergies or poisoning, you need to see the blood test results." Wu Bing added.

"Okay, okay, we wait for the blood test results." Shi Hongtu said with some surprises.

Chen Mo and Wu Bing replied to Shi Hongtu and several people also entered the laboratory.

The group leaders of several other groups learned that Chen Mo’s group had made progress and had no research thoughts. He came over to accompany several people to wait. The waiting time is always very long, more than two hours, so that several people have felt it for several months.

When a few people were about to sit still, Wu Bing and Chen Mocai came out of the lab.

Shi Hongtu made two steps in three steps and immediately went up.

"The result is out?"

"You think about it." Wu Bing looked at Chen Mo, the voice could not hear the joys and sorrows.

"In the patient's blood, viral antibodies are detected. These antibodies have an effect on the virus and can remove the virus."

Chen Mo’s words, like the Tianyin fairy song, made everyone on the field ecstatic. Shi Hongtu is even more excited, the wrinkles of the old face are shaking, almost did not cry out.

"But the vaccine did not succeed."

This sentence, let everyone's happy color disappear, have looked at Chen Mo, waiting for his explanation.

"We detected two toxic proteins in the patient's blood. It should be a potential toxic protein gene in the mRNA of the vaccine platform system. If this problem is not solved, the toxic protein accumulates in the patient until a certain concentration, and the patient dies. ”

"Then next?" Shi Hongtu asked.

"Next, we need to find these two virulence protein genes in the vaccine system platform mRNA, and find ways to replace these two toxic protein genes, to eliminate the toxicity of the vaccine, the vaccine can be considered successful."

"Well, I will apply to the above immediately. I will call a few genetic engineering experts to help you find the toxic protein gene." Shi Hongtu did not hesitate to speak, and the voice was extremely exciting.

As long as they find these two toxic proteins and successfully eliminate the toxicity of the vaccine, they will probably end the global terror that threatens the world.

They have seen the dawn of victory.

chapters.title: Chapter 500: :Convene
chapters.body:
Chapter 500: :Convene

In the Capital Biogene Research Institute, Wang Yiyi, in his own experimental office, looked at the news about the Ridman virus and expressed his thoughts from time to time.

This human disaster has been maintained for several months, and the hardest hit areas have become so unimaginable.

Unfortunately, his research is to establish and optimize gene editing techniques in hematopoietic stem cells and T cells, to study the characteristics of related gene editing techniques, and to improve the efficiency and specificity of genes, mainly in the field of genetic diseases.

This time, the Ridman virus belongs to virology, which is not so serious in China. They do not need to participate in proximity.

The virus has caused panic in the international community, but he can do nothing.

After reading the news, Wang Yiyi put down the newspaper and sighed. Worried that other things are useless, it is the topic to do your own research.

Hey! !

Wang Yiyi was just preparing to start researching his own subject. An old man with glasses knocked on the door and walked quickly to him to see what was urgent.

"Director Liu, is there something urgent?"

"Dr. Wang, the dean came to inform that there was a breakthrough in the Deerman virus vaccine in Tangshan. Now it is carrying out urgent technical research and now needs experts in genomics."

Upon hearing this notice, Wang Haoyi stood up: "I am."

Waiting for Director Liu to speak again, Wang Yiyi has begun to pack up and prepare to leave the office.

......

East China Sea Life Science Research Institute.

Yang Yunjia quickly entered the lab, in the lab, with members of their team, as well as students and assistants.

Their team, the key research and development programs are precision medical research projects, epigenomics detection technology and clinical applications, as well as new techniques for RNA methylation epigenetic transcriptomics sequencing, both of which he conducted research.

The hot Redman virus outside is an immunology, but he is not an expert in immunology and virology, so he was not summoned by the medical team, and he continued to conduct research on the research side of the institute.

But today, the capital has come to inform that there is progress in the Reedman virus vaccine over the Tangshan Mountains, and experts from genomics experts are needed to participate in emergency technical research.

"Mr. Yang, what happened?" Standing in the lab, other members and students looked at him, and a student asked.

"The capital needs genetic editing and genomics to carry out emergency technical research, Yu Jun, Mi Shuangli, both of you and me."

“Mr. Yang, is it convenient to say what technology?” asked the female researcher named Mi Shuangli.

"The capital of Tangshan Hospital, analyze the genes of the Ridman virus vaccine."

"it is good."

The two focused on the head and did not hesitate to agree.

The CDC issued a notice of convening. The experts who are conducting genomics and bioinformatics research projects in various parts of the country received the news and did not hesitate to go to the capital Tangshan Hospital to carry out the project.

In just one day, nearly 20 genomics experts and researchers have arrived in Tangshan.

The staff of the CDC and the Ministry of Health are aware of the importance of the project, coordinate in the middle, quickly mobilize experimental equipment and materials, and prepare experimental conditions for researchers.

Tangshan Institute.

Chen Mo and Wu Bing, as well as team members, entered the conference room.

Several group members were surprised when they saw a room full of people. Some of them have been recognized, including the medical team's existing experts in genetic immunology, there are a total of thirty-three on the field, almost including the top experts in the field of genomics experts, including their former mentor.

It can be said that the most talkative people in domestic genomics are in this conference room.

They are looking at everyone, and the experts below are looking at them. Seeing the leadership of Chen Mo and Wu Bing, as well as the team behind the young, many people could not help but marvel.

It is this young team that has made great achievements in two bio-terrorisms, and this time it has made breakthrough progress when they are not optimistic. Seeing the group members, there are their own students, some academicians smiled with satisfaction, at least their students have a good time, they are also very proud.

However, with the lead Chen Mobi, it seems that genius has become dull, everyone's eyes quickly fell on Chen Mo.

In the past, I only heard the name, I didn’t see anyone, and I finally saw it today.

Chen Mo is also an expert and researcher on the field.

Their group can also find toxic proteins themselves, but in order to speed up, more people, obviously faster. The CDC and the Ministry of Health coordinated centrally, and the two hospitals supported it. It was unexpected to find so many researchers.

All the information was distributed, and Chen Mocai went to the podium of the conference room and went directly to the theme.

"This morning, we conducted another blood test on the patient. In your hand, there is an examination result. The patient has recovered the initial consciousness, and the antibody concentration in the body has increased compared with two days ago, and the number of viruses is decreasing. In theory, in about five days, the patient will develop resistance to the Ridman virus."

After Chen Mo opened, everyone listened carefully to Chen Mo’s explanation. Many people on the field were enough to be teachers of Chen Mo’s teacher, but Chen Mo’s level of performance was enough to be their teacher. The Ridman virus vaccine was a breakthrough under the auspices of his hands. No one dared to despise Chen Mo’s age.

When the vaccine was effective, many people were still a little happy, but just after some surprises, Chen Mo was interrupted.

"But we detected two venom proteins in the patient's body. These two toxic proteins also increased as the concentration of the antibody increased. Just two hours ago, the patient died in pain, less than five days later. He was not killed by the Riederman virus, but the poisonous protein in his body caused him to die.

We initially determined that this toxic protein is caused by the potential toxic protein gene in the mRNA of the vaccine platform system. So next, the task of all of you is to find the two virulence protein genes in the vaccine. We will find ways to knock out these two genes and eliminate the toxicity of the vaccine. ”

"Chen Chen, there are no two drugs that degrade the drug to achieve the purpose of treatment."

Hearing the following question, Chen Mo nodded and replied: "We have thought about this method. The medical team is looking for drugs that degrade the protein, but it has not been found yet, and it is not a cure."

"Academician Chen, a sample of toxic protein?" Yang Yunjia, sitting in the first row, asked questions.

"Yes, we have some samples in the patient's blood, but not many. After the project starts, samples of toxic proteins will be distributed to the laboratories. Next I will explain the related properties of the toxic protein and mRNA. Related information. If you have any questions, you can interrupt me during the period, or ask the academician Wu, we will try our best to answer your questions if the conditions permit."

After the explanation, Chen Mo began to talk about some of the characteristics of toxic proteins, as well as information related to mRNA, so that they can start research.

chapters.title: Chapter 501: : Waste Is Shameful
chapters.body:
Chapter 501: : Waste Is Shameful

In addition to Chen Mowu's original team, more than 30 experts in genomics and bioinformatics were divided into two groups, each of which was responsible for the detection of a protein.

After the division of labor is completed, the expert group begins to discuss their methods of completing the project and prepare experimental theory. Everyone wants to find out the two toxic protein genes in the shortest possible time.

The researchers all know that Chen Mo is looking for them to come over, just to speed up the research. It will save a lot of people's lives in a few days.

Chen Mo and Wu Bing came out of the institute, it was already 8 o'clock in the evening, and the two also rushed back to the dormitory.

"You said that this expert group study, how long can it be completed?"

"It should not take too long to find the gene sequence. It is not a problem. It mainly requires multiple tests. With so many experts participating, the time can be shortened a lot."

Chen Mo said this because the DNA detection technology is very mature. Finding the genetic sequence and structure of a protein is not difficult. It can be said that in the study of genomics, this is the basic skill.

"I hope so. If this vaccine research is successful, you are a hero, Chen Ying." Wu Bing joked.

"Heroes are wool, I don't want to be a hero, I am a businessman, I want to make money. Customized vaccines, vaccine technology revolution, a bunch of Jinshan is in front of me, and now there are dozens of experts to help me accelerate the technological breakthrough. , almost quite free labor."

Looking at Chen Moile up, Wu Bing is a bit speechless.

"With so many experts and academicians as free laborers, I am afraid that under the circumstance, there are only such bold businessmen. If they know, it is estimated that you will be arrested and displayed on the streets."

Chen Mo spread his hands and said helplessness: "I just want more experts in genomics. I have called more than 30 people. I don't have to spend money and waste shame."

He and Shi Hongtu said that several genetic engineering experts were needed to help. As a result, Shi Hongtu was afraid of lack of manpower. The report was said to be a technical breakthrough. As a result, more than 30 top genetic researchers were found, which greatly exceeded his expectations.

Since it is here, Chen Mo will naturally not let this good opportunity let the researchers study it for free.

"Next, we have to prepare the genetic modification experiment of the vaccine. We need to find a few teachers who study the regulation of gene expression, and the time for the transformation will be much shorter."

"Yang Yunjia academician is an expert in this field. He is presiding over an expression regulation project. He can, as well as Academician Wang Qi, Academician Gao Fu..." Wu Bing said the names of several relevant academicians.

"Yeah." Chen Mo wrote down several names.

“Would you like to eat together?” After talking about the topic of work, Wu Bing talked about the topic and turned back to life.

"No, the ink girl cooked the rice and waited for me in the dormitory." Chen Mo said.

When it comes to the ink girl, Wu Bing's eyes become strange.

"Why are you looking at me like this?"

"I have always had a question to ask you, the ink woman came here with you, still live together, does your wife know?" Wu Bing looked at Chen Mo curiously and wanted to see what reaction he was.

"What do you want to express?" Chen Moyi's brain is black.

"Does your wife have no objection?"

Chen Mo can't smile, there is no way to explain this, and there is no need to explain it. He can only shrug his shoulders: "No, she still cares about how the Mexican woman takes care of me. What should I pay attention to. It makes me feel like I can't take care of myself."

"Well, your wife is very big." Wu Bing said with a deep smile: "Ink is not a pretty girl. Looking at the pearl of a wealthy family, how do you turn to be an assistant?"

"Charisma."

"..." Wu Bing turned a blank eye.

In the next few days, the team of experts entered an emergency research state. Everyone is nervous and hopes to complete their research projects as soon as possible.

More than 30 top genomics and bioinformatics experts focus on a topic here, and the capital medical community has become more busy than ever.

The Capital Biogene Research Institute has also been used as one of the research institutes for this research. The experimental materials needed will be quickly put in place under the coordination of the CDC. All channels are dedicated to providing the most research. Quick assistance.

Race against time.

As Chen Mo expected, it didn't take long for the good news to come out of the lab.

Seeing the results of the report, not only Yang Yunjia, but also the other group members have a happy face.

Their group is responsible for the topic of T3 protein, T3 protein, which is one of the two toxic proteins Chen Mo said. Two days ago, the gene sequence of the T1 protein was found by members of the T1 group.

These two days, they are thinking about the genes of the T3 protein all the time, and finally finished it today.

Finding gene sequences is not difficult for them, but it is related to the Ridman virus vaccine, which can save thousands of lives. Their sense of accomplishment is very great.

"The location of the gene sequence of the T3 protein was found, and the academician Chen was informed, and the task of our group was also untrusted."

"Thank you, everyone has worked hard."

With the experimental data, Chen Mo was thanked by the researchers on the field.

The genetic sequence of the two proteins is found, and the next thing becomes much simpler. However, in order to be faster, Chen Mo also needs to pull a few people to participate in the research.

Now the group is an expert in genomics. There are several academicians who study the regulation of gene expression. It is hard to collect so many experts and scholars here, and do not make the best use of it. He feels sorry for himself.

In order to save time and complete the vaccine faster, yes, that's it.
