Chen Mo tried to finish, only to speak.

"Teacher, next, we want to limit the expression of these two protein genes on the vaccine system platform. Because the experiment has multiple directions and needs some people, I am afraid you still need help."

"When we come here, we are helping, Academician Chen, what is needed for us, even if it is proposed." Yang Yunjia stood up.

"Because there are many ways to limit gene expression, gene amplification, deletion, methylation modification, gene manipulation, etc. These methods are all possible, but we do not know the impact of these two genes on the vaccine system platform, so prepare Try these methods all over again.

We also modified the vaccine platform and experimented with all methods to determine which one works. Can save a lot of time, try one by one, I am afraid it will take a long time. Our team can only conduct experiments in one direction in a short time, so we need experts in gene expression regulation to conduct experiments in the other directions. ”

"I count one," said Yang Yunjia.

"I count one."

"I am coming to join in the fun!!"

Wu Bing said that several experts in the study of gene expression regulation have stood up. In the end, Chen Mo identified several of the most prestigious academicians as the leaders of the group and presided over research in other directions.

After the task was dispatched, Chen Mocai said to Shi Hongtu: "The stone leader, you can send patients infected with the virus to the hospital to facilitate the vaccine test."

"Good." Shi Hongtu immediately agreed.

The mortality rate of infected virus is 100%, sent to treatment, there is still a chance to live, no family members, will refuse treatment.

Arranged properly, the six groups of members, under the guidance of Chen Mo, began to modify the vaccine.

chapters.title: Chapter 502: : No. 2 Vaccine Succeeded (Second More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 502: : No. 2 Vaccine Succeeded (Second More)

Evan looked at the man who was being held by two agents, and pulled off the man's thick mask, and the half-squinting eyes pulled out a little bit of cold.

During this time, the case of the German Reedman virus has been increasing. Every time a person with a case infection is found, it will be quickly isolated and sent to the isolation area to cut off the source of infection.

But after each isolation, new cases will appear, and there is no correlation between the cases.

So they judged that there are definitely people from the RS organization who are in the territory of the country and are putting the virus around. The CIA uses almost all domestic eyeliners to investigate suspicious people.

After more than two months of investigation, I finally locked my eyes on the man in front of me.

Liric, the other is Lidman's capable cadre, the core figure of Angola's turmoil, the executor of this ‘Death Plan’, RS is still alive, the most central person,

I didn't expect the other party to hide, but dared to enter their country for so long, they only discovered it until now.

"Does the antidote to the virus?" Evan punched Lirik's stomach and said coldly.

Liric looked at Evan with a sneer and laughed, his voice sharp and strange, and it made people shudder: "I am honored to tell you that there is no antidote, hehehe..."

"There is no antidote?" Evan twitched and looked gloomy. He grabbed Lirik's collar: "I don't want to say it, we have a way to let you speak."

"Death plan, I have never thought of detoxifying you from the beginning. The gentleman is just to let you feel the fear of death." Lirik sneered coldly: "Let me open my mouth without antidote, let alone, you can't do anything." Let the dead open."

"What do you mean?"

"Oh, I understand."

Evan was shocked and just wanted to start, Lirik's face floated with pain, and black blood overflowed from the corner of his mouth.

"Damn, the **** raised by the bitch." Seeing that Liric fell to the ground, Evan roared out and slammed his body against Leric's body. After calming down, Evan dialed the phone.

"Lerick is dead!"

When she got up in the morning, Chen Mo heard the news that the ink girl told him, but there were some accidents. No Ridman was so vigorous, but he also committed suicide. The kind of death is not enough, there is not much emotion. After breakfast, Chen Mo left the dormitory.

"Academician Chen, these patients are infected with the virus for more than a month. The modified HX3 agent has been ineffective for them, and after a maximum of one week or so, they will die."

Mi Fu introduced Chen Mo and Wu Bing to patients in the isolation room.

A total of 15 patients, at the door of the isolation room, have personal identification information of the patient and the time of diagnosis of the virus.

Through the window of the isolation room, we can see that the patient is tremble and struggle, and some of them are gibberish and have lost their original consciousness.

These patients are emergency patients sent from all over the country. In order to test their vaccines, these people have at least a chance to be saved.

"Agreeing to sign a voluntary treatment agreement?" Wu Bing asked.

"All signed, their family has agreed to let us treat them with new treatment options." Mi Fu nodded.

"That's good." Chen Mo nodded: "Start to plant vaccines for them."

The medical staff at the back received Chen Mo’s instructions and entered the isolation room to inject the vaccine from the research team.

These vaccines are all improved vaccines.

Because the influence of the two-stage protein gene on the vaccine system platform is unknown, Chen Mo asked the expert group to make the two-stage protein genes unable to express through different methods such as methylation modification, gene antisense technology, gene manipulation, amplification and rejection. This achieves the effect of removing toxic proteins on patients.

15 patients, 5 vaccines treated differently, and their vaccine research was officially successful as long as one vaccine was successful.

After the first phase of the vaccination was completed, Chen Mo saw his body and found no abnormalities before leaving the quarantine.

The next step is to wait for the vaccine to work in the patient's body. This process takes at least three days to make a significant difference.

Lin Junjun felt that he had made a long dream.

In the dream, she saw that the water from the faucet in the house was full of blood. Her family, all of them became strange aliens, eating carrion.

Seeing that scene, she was frightened and ran away wildly. Then she felt herself caught by a group of aliens, grabbed it back into the spaceship, and slammed her with a red liquid, as if to catch her for an experiment.

Then she struggled to escape and was full of fear.

Not long ago, there were aliens who injected liquid into her, and she didn't know what it was. I don't know how long it took, her head began to faint, her consciousness gradually blurred, and she fell into the darkness.

Opening his eyes and seeing a group of people wearing protective clothes surrounding her, Lin Junjun was shocked and just wanted to escape, only to find that he was fixed in the hospital bed, unable to break free and scream out in fear.

"Ah... don't come over, get out."

"Let me go."

"I beg you to let me go."

"..."

Several people around the hospital face each other, and some look at Lin Junjun indefinitely, among them Chen Mo.

The first phase of vaccination has been four days. After the second phase of vaccination yesterday, Lin Junjun had quietly slept last night, but his life characteristics were normal and he seemed to fall asleep. The same symptoms were observed in two other patients with the same vaccine.

Blood tests were taken this morning. They found antibodies to the Ridman virus in the blood of Lin Junjun, and the concentration was sufficient to form a resistance to the Ridman virus, and the virus in Lin Junjun was almost eliminated.

This discovery surprised them, which has already shown that the vaccine has taken effect.

However, Lin Junjun has not woken up, they are not sure whether it is another side effect caused by the vaccine.

As a result, Lin Junjun woke up and saw that they were screaming when they were wearing protective clothing. They were similar to the time of the disease, and they were not sure whether Lin Junjun was good or not.

"Miss Lin Junjun, Miss Lin Junjun." Chen Mo tried to shouted twice.

Hearing Chen Mo’s name, Lin Junjun was awake, and his screaming voice was weak. He was determined to look at Chen Mo, but he was still a little scared.

"What are you doing? Don't take me as an experimental product. I am not healthy. I can't have a healthy baby. You let me go... Mom!"

"..."

The doctors on the side of the bed were a little speechless. It looked like normal and not normal. What is the situation?

"We are doctors, not arresting you as an experimental product." Chen Mo said.

"Doctor?" Lin Junjun screamed twice and calmed down a lot. Then he looked at the people around the bed, unlike the aliens in his dreams, like the people wearing anti-chemical suits in the movies.

"Are you really a doctor?" Lin Junjun asked.

Finally, there is a normal problem, this sentence, let everyone on the field surprise.

"This is the isolation room of the capital Tangshan Hospital. We are all your doctors. What you have seen before are hallucinations. We are treating you." Chen Mo said.

"Treatment? What disease did I get?" Lin Junjun was a little panicked.

"Infected with the Ridman virus."

Ridman virus? This sentence is like a big clock echoing in Lin Junjun's mind, and the previous memories are flooding.

Before she saw the aliens, the news of the Germanman virus had spread. She also knew that people infected with the Ridman virus would go mad and die, and did not expect the tragedy to fall on themselves.

"Doctor, can you save me? Help me, I don't want to die, my mother..." Lin Junjun cried, with panic in his voice.

"Don't cry, we are treating, you wake up, indicating that the treatment is effective."

Chen Mo’s voice, let Lin Junjun stop crying, staring at him, tears hanging in the eyelashes, pitiful: "What should I do next?"

"We need to see if there are side effects of new drugs on your body and do a whole body check."

"Is you giving me a whole body test? I haven't even talked about love."

"puff……"

"Ha ha ha ha ha..."

In the isolation room, several people laughed together.

Lin Junjun’s consciousness was restored, indicating that the vaccine was working. They were very excited in their hearts. As a result, the girl made a speech to Chen Molai and laughed at them all. During the Ridman virus, the accumulated repressive mood was vented at this time.

"Give it to you, Academician Chen." Wu Bing patted Chen Mo's shoulder and joked.

"Give it to you." Shi Hongtu and Mi Fu, both patted Chen Mo's shoulders, smiled and left the isolation room, leaving a female nurse in the isolation room.

"I am not professional, hey, Dr. Mi, Academician Wu, Shi Changchang..."

"You are not professional, we should go home to farm." Mi Fu said, close the door of the isolation room.

The air in the isolation room suddenly became quiet, and Chen Mo and Lin Junjun on the hospital bed face each other. Chen Mo can see this brainless girl, her pale face floating red.

Back to the institute, Shi Hongtu and others began to wait, waiting for them, and a group of researchers. About an hour, the staff of the institute felt like it was a year, and the heart was very anxious.

This is the most promising success for them. If this is successful, they will end the bio-terror that makes the world fear.

Seeing Chen Mo came in with the report, everyone stood up and looked at him with gaze, and the field was silent.

Chen Mo glanced around in a circle before opening.

"The patient has recovered his mind, the body is not allergic and poisoning symptoms. In the blood test, some metabolic indicators are abnormal, caused by long-term disease, hormones and metabolic disorders. The concentration of antibodies is enough to form resistance to the Ridman virus, no The performance of side effects was found and the No. 2 vaccine was successful."

chapters.title: Chapter 503: : The Conference Hosting The Hope
chapters.body:
Chapter 503: : The Conference Hosting The Hope

"Sunrise wakes up in the morning, the earth shines reborn, let the sound of the wind blow out, and it becomes the music of life..."

People’s newspaper, Fernan sat on his desk, sipping coffee and browsing the news.

Now online, there are news about how many deaths caused by the death virus, which medical staff committed suicide, and how many infection cases were found today.

The whole world is filled with the atmosphere of panic. I know that there is no other news except Chen Mo’s improved HX3. Some people who have confirmed the disease have chosen to commit suicide.

The phone ringing surprised Fernan and picked up the phone: "Editor."

"Fernan, there is big news, the medical team has a big news announced that it may be that the special medicine of the Riedeman virus has progressed and it will pass immediately."

Just heard the notice from the phone, Fernan froze, smiled unscrupulously, his hand trembled, the hot coffee sprinkled between his legs, and the office suddenly screamed.

Li Tiejun hung up the phone and immediately jumped up from the office chair. He quickly packed up the notebook on the desk and loaded the backpack and ran out of the office.

"Aan, bring the equipment to go with me, have big news, big news, hurry up, it’s too late."

The person who was called was too late to think about it. He looked at his camera and ran out behind Li Tiejun. Until the two disappeared outside the company's door, the people in the office still looked at each other and looked awkward.

"Jerry, hurry up."

Aisha held the phone in her hand in the car, urging the assistant to hurry and making a call. They are reporters of the New York Times in China. During this time, the United States was the news of the spread of the Riederman virus. She was very worried and thankful.

Worried about the American family, I am glad that I am not at home. Otherwise, as a frontline reporter, her infection probability is very high, because she has to travel around and contact various news.

There is a panic about the death virus in the world, and there is no good news. The result was just received a notice, Huaxia's medical team announced good news, let her rush to the scene.

"Mr. Hudson, Huaxia Medical Group has announced that it may be a huge piece of good news. Do you want to broadcast live?"

"Huaxia Medical Team? Well, I will arrange live broadcast."

Now in their country, there is a lot of pessimistic news everywhere, they need a good news to inspire people. She has a hunch that it is sure that there will be a huge breakthrough in the drugs researched by the medical team, and such a grand press conference will be held.

This is to give the world confidence in fighting bioterrorism.

Carl took a camera and rushed to the press conference at the International Convention Center. He is also a reporter in China. He was notified today that the Huaxia Medical Group held a press conference and announced major news.

He didn't want to run around with the equipment.

In the VFV bioterrorism, the medical team found key drugs. During the death virus, the HX3 agent was also improved. The two virus crises were too prominent. The press conference is now a breakthrough in drug research.

Global bioterrorism has caused massive panic, too much pessimistic news. If there is an exciting news, it is definitely a pot of water in the desert.

Angel wears a mask and carries a backpack. After security check, she rushes toward the venue.

Beside her, there are also some reporters who have stepped up and everyone wants to arrive at the press conference.

They are all news and experienced. In the previous drug breakthroughs, Huaxia Medical Group did not hold such a grand conference. This time, the reporters from various countries in China were notified. The meaning is obvious. I want to let this conference show the world.

This kind of global pessimistic panic, if it is news about the breakthrough of special effects, is definitely the best news.

Just dare to enter the venue, Angel's face is bitter, the best position of the venue, has been occupied by other reporters, and the venue, the crowd is swaying, I do not know that it is a concert of a superstar.

......

“The medical team held a press conference and there was a major announcement that it might be a significant advancement in the specific drug of the Death Virus.”

Sun Yanyu is brushing his mobile phone on the office chair. When he sees this news, he instantly stops and quickly opens.

"Hey, Zhengming, Xiaohua, the medical team held a press conference, it seems that the Ridman virus made a breakthrough."

“Really?” The two people around him immediately came around, and other colleagues saw the two around, and they were curious to see the past and soon understood what was going on.

“I have a live broadcast of the medical team here.”

When the words came out, everyone surrounded them and watched the live broadcast screen waiting.

"Hello everyone, I am now at the Capital International Conference Center, behind me, at the scene of the press conference. An hour ago, the medical team issued a notice, held a press conference, and announced a major incident. According to speculation, it may be medical The team made a major breakthrough in the drug against the Ridman virus..."

"Children fuck, child fucking. You see, my son is saved, my son is saved." Yang Qingguo pointed at the TV screen, the red eyes left tears, the voice was a little trembling.

They are concerned about the latest news of the Ridman virus every day, because the son is not at risk of being infected with the virus. During this time, my wife washed his face with tears every day, and he felt listless.

Hearing the voice of Yang Qingguo, the wife next to him raised his head and his eyes recovered. His tears did not consciously stay, and he kept his eyes open.

In the Huaxia East China Sea isolation area, Yang Yang was lying on the hospital bed and looked at the TV news on the wall in a listless manner.

He was infected with the virus, injected HX3 agent, and now recovers his mind. It is known from newspaper news that if there is no specific medicine, after the HX3 medicine fails, he will die in madness.

But so far, no drugs have been found to cure, and now there is only despair.

"The following news is broadcasted. The medical team held a press conference and said that there was a major news announcement. The outside world speculated that the suspected Reedman virus drug has made breakthrough progress. Below we will connect the reporters at the conference..."

Seeing the news, Yang Yang's eyes returned to life, laughing with impunity and shed tears.

Schools, companies, homes, buses, roadsides, and large screens on various squares are all broadcasting live news. The press conference has not yet begun, and everyone is looking forward to it.

In the past few months, they have paniced in countless times, fearing that they will be infected with the virus one day and die in madness. That fear is a mental torture.

Today, this upcoming conference will bring hope to them.

"Relay, immediately broadcast, contact the boss, let all TV channels broadcast." Hudson saw the live broadcast from the China Capital International Conference Center, the surprise almost cried.

The United States is the most severely affected area, with the largest number of dead people, and a constant stream of new infections. Various news have put public opinion on the verge of collapse.

If you are not worried about a large number of people gathering demonstrations, it may cause virus infection, and now they will definitely become a pot of porridge.

Waiting for the wind and other rain, they expect good news to come out every day, but hope again and again, become desperate, and finally this good news is waiting today.

new work time.

Nissen walked aimlessly in the square. It was already at night, and the surrounding area was empty. Apart from the neon lights, only a few people walking in the crowd were not as lively as they used to be.

After the outbreak of the Riedeman virus, New York is the hardest hit area. Many people will choose to watch TV, play computers and play mobile phones at home to avoid infection with the Germanman virus.

His father and sister, when they went out, infected the virus and are now still in the hospital.

Looking up at the big screen of the Times Square sign, Nissen’s nose was sour. He paid attention to the news every day, but did not give him hope, but desperate times. Just want to leave, I saw a change on the big screen.

“Huaxia Medical Group held a grand press conference and it was suspected that there was a major breakthrough in the special drug of Ridman virus.”

The sudden appearance of the report made Nissen stay in the mud and turned to ecstasy.

Not only Nissen, on Times Square, I saw people on the big screen, all looking up, standing in the same place, many people have been crying in place, weeping.

Paris is concentrated in the quarantine area, which is already a military quarantine area.

Frank saw the news, and the tough guy in the military uniform also shed tears.

He is the person in charge of the quarantine area. He looks at the people who are dying in desperation every day in the quarantine area. He can't sleep for dozens of nights. His mind is the desperate look of those patients.

All the pressure on his shoulders can only be hard in front of outsiders, when no one can cry. He has prayed for countless times that the disaster can go earlier, and it seems that today, only a glimmer of hope is seen.

"Look for a projector and project the news screen." After calm, Frank gave instructions.

The soldier who got the order immediately rolled out and let people find the projector.

Lutheran stood at the window and looked at the world outside, his eyes dim. She had just got sick and did not take long to inject HX3 and stay awake.

There are still ten days of efficacy, and she will be sick again, when she will die in madness.

Now she is free, and the people in the same isolation room as her are free, and they are not fixed. Because they are crazy, they are not an illusion of aggression.

When they are close to their illness, they will be imprisoned.

And her patient in an isolation room, both hiding in the corner and crying, with despair in her voice. Two days ago, a patient could not stand the pressure of despair, committed suicide before their eyes, and gave them a lot of blows.

I can't see hope here, only despair.

Suddenly, on the open space outside the window, several soldiers opened the white curtain. Soon, a huge projection appeared on the curtain: "Huaxia Medical Group held a press conference, and it was suspected that there was a major breakthrough in the 'death virus' special medicine..."

Seeing the news on the curtain, and the sound of the sound, Lutheran’s desperate eyes had a faint focus and a fascinating look.

In the ward window of the quarantine, as the sound of the sound spreads, more and more people appear in the iron fence-like window, staring at the news on the curtain.

No cheers, no ecstasy, no screams, no crying, no death, no voice, no fear of missing a word, everyone has unlimited hope.

Los Angeles, New York, Vancouver, London, Paris, Berlin, all centralized quarantine, all news screens, are the same place, the conference of the China Capital International Conference Center.

chapters.title: Chapter 504: : Success!
chapters.body:
Chapter 504: : Success!

Capital International Conference Center, backstage of the press conference.

Together with Chen Mo, there are Shi Hongtu, Wu Bing, members of their group, as well as Yang Yunjia, Wang Qi, Wang Yiyi, Gao Fu, four academicians and experts who presided over vaccine reform, and members of the medical team, Mi Fu, etc. Several medical staff working in the field, a total of 20 representatives.

The press conference was held by the Ministry of Health, as well as two hospitals, and the CDC hoped that they would open it.

The world is now filled with a panic atmosphere, and an official good news is needed to restore hope to those who are isolated. It also improves the reputation of China in the face of the global people and improves the international image of China.

Under the coordination of all parties, Chen Mo was the main representative and the conference was held.

"The stone leader, Academician Chen, the reporters have come together, and the press conference has to begin." A staff member of the conference came to Shi Hongtu and Chen Mo.

"Let's go, Academician Chen, the position of the leader, it's none of you." Shi Hongtu smiled.

"it is good."

Chen Mo was also unpretentious. Under the guidance of the staff, he walked over to the conference. Shi Hongtu followed, Wu Bing also went up, and everyone else followed the original arrangement and kept up.

At the press conference, after the host announced the start, the slightly crowded venue was silent, and everyone’s eyes were on the side door of the stage, waiting for important people to appear.

Seeing that Chen Mo took the lead, the venue was instantly occupied by countless applause and shutter sounds. The flash is contiguous and illuminates the stage of the conference. The photographer behind the live broadcast, the camera closely follows the team members who played.

Under the stage, I saw Chen Mo and others on stage, and I knew that hope had already arrived. Some people have begun to whisper, and the rest of the reporters tried to control their emotions and waited for Chen Mo to announce good news.

Internet users in front of the computer screen of the Internet cafe, the company's front computer staff, mobile phone screen passers-by, home TV, all the audience are pressing their excitement, looking forward to seeing the medical team coming out.

Everything is silent.

All those who know the death virus, all the people who saw the live news, with hopes, stared at the medical team members on the screen.

Chen Mo stood in the middle of the conference stage and became the focus of the audience.

A confident figure is spread throughout the world through live footage. The hopes of the whole world are gathered in this figure. A confident man at this moment can always create miracles again and again.

Flower City, a luxury villa.

Xiao Yu was sitting on the sofa with his little unparalleled, and Chen’s father and mother were sitting next to each other. In front of them, there is a huge LCD screen that is playing live news.

Chen Mo is on the screen, standing in the middle of the stage.

"Ma Ma, is awkward." Small unparalleled stick out his little finger, pointing at the LCD screen, pure eyes are a little happy to look at Chen Mo in the picture, the sound of milk is more clear than before.

"Well, it’s Dad, Dad is super powerful, and soon I will come back to find my mother and my unparalleled." Xiao Yu caressed the unparalleled head, proud smile lingering, watching the figure on the LCD screen, with thick Missing.

The marching ant headquarters, at this time all the computer screens of the headquarters, holographic projections, are playing this live broadcast screen, all the employees stopped their work, and looked at the figure on the screen with gaze.

This confident figure is the highest belief in their company.

As employees of the marching ant company, everyone is very excited and very proud.

"It finally succeeded."

In the office, Zhao Min leisurely sipped coffee and saw Chen Mo standing in the middle of the stage. The depression of the past was swept away, and the corner of his mouth showed a slight smile. He stood on the stage and it proved successful.

This man, no matter where he is, is eye-catching.

That kind of confident temperament is fascinating, and you will indulge yourself if you are not careful. Only he can stand on this stage with confidence to meet the eyes of the world.

Sun Yanyu clenched his fists, and the colleague behind her had already been huddled in front of two computers, and even the company’s CEO was crowded into the crowd. No one spoke, staring at the shadow of Chen Mo's figure on the screen, and even breathing as much as possible.

They are waiting for an answer, the good news they dream of.

Yang Qingguo sat on the sofa with his wife's shoulders and his eyes were red. The two men's hands were already tightly held, for fear of the next news, not the news they wanted. Staring at the live news of the TV screen with hope, I couldn't dare to make a sound.

On the streets of Times Square, Nissen had put his hands together on his chest and stared at Chen Mo on the big screen. He was praying and praying that the news that Chen Mo announced next was the news he had been waiting for. Joy and fear occupy his body, trembling uncontrollably, letting tears flow down and his mouth slamming.

In the Paris quarantine area, Lucerne stood in front of the window, looking through the steel fence and staring at the curtain on the outside. The figure above, with the hope of their birth. Behind her, other infected people have gathered, several heads fill the small windows, with hope in the eyes.

In the isolation room next door, everyone huddled together and held their eyes to the curtain. There is no sound in the entire quarantine area, for fear of a glimmer of sound that will destroy the news that keeps them alive.

The same scene, a similar gaze, joined together.

Up to the high officials and nobles, down to the civilians, everyone is quiet, waiting for Chen Mo to speak.

In the eyes of everyone's expectations, all members of the medical team were seated. When Chen Mo picked up the microphone, everyone's heart was lifted up and concentrated.

In full expectation, Chen Mo spoke.

"Thank you all, I am only on behalf of the medical team, I will announce a message to you. The world's first case of cure for the Riddyman virus infection, which appeared this morning, has confirmed recovery and has resistance to the Ridman virus. The group has succeeded in the Ridman virus vaccine project!"

In just a few words, it seems like unlimited hope, through the live screen, spread all over the world.

After a brief silence, the thunderous applause and cheers broke out in the Capital International Convention Center. Several journalists with loved ones and friends infected with the virus were applauding in madness and wept.

"Success, Yeyeyeye..."

The headquarters of the marching ant company has already erupted like an unprecedented cheer, and laughed wildly. In the past few months, it has been suppressed by the bioterrorism crisis and vented unscrupulously.

And the people who ended it all were their bosses, proud of their emotions, they are proud of their company and proud of their boss.

"The virus vaccine project has been successful. My wife, my son has been saved, and my son has been saved."

In the last sentence, the words are like Tianzhu, poked into the heart, Yang Qingguo holding his wife, crying and laughing, as if to hear the good news of Tianda. In the past dozens of days and nights, they are worried about their son's illness every day and can't sleep. At this moment, all negative emotions are released.

"Dad, sister, saved, hahahaha...hey..." Nissen laughed loudly, smiled and screamed and cried on the floor.

In the past twenty days, all the pressures and worries have accumulated in his mind. Asleep is a scene in which my father and my sister are sick and dead. The feeling of powerlessness that looks at my loved ones, the desperation that can only wait for the death of a loved one, is venting at this moment.

The people on the side of the road did not laugh at his grievances, leaving behind the applause of clear encouragement and cheers.

"Successful, really successful... hahahahaha..."

"Success, live, live, I am alive, I can live hahaha..."

In the concentrated quarantine area of Paris, the translation from the sound made Lutheran, who had suppressed the mood, madly cheered, laughed, laughed in tears, and suppressed resentment during this time.

No human body will have their desperate death, they have to commit suicide several times and die decently. The crying and pleading of the family allowed them to retain the last bit of courage to live.

They ushered in real hope, isolation room, several patients have been crying into a ball.

Roche stood in the lobby of the quarantine and looked up at the screen above the hall. Countless times to walk in the forefront of disease resistance, he knows how much pressure the doctors on the front line are.

Fear, panic, he even saw the doctor who accidentally infected the virus and jumped off the roof of the isolation area. In the face of patients, they have more than enough energy and can only watch the patient die in madness again and again.

In the past few months, he has been insomnia for dozens of times, awakened in a nightmare, and in the morning he has to pretend to comfort the patient without any problems and find a cure.

At this moment, the tight strings of my heart were loose, and Roche could no longer hold back. Countless bitterness rushed to my heart and slammed directly on the ground, crying like a wounded child.

Other medical staff also cried into a group, releasing the negative emotions such as fear, despair and accumulation during this time.

At the press conference, Chen Mo stood on the stage and applauded, scanning the reporters who were full of tears and excitement. This is an exciting moment and the main reason for this conference.

The Ridman virus caused a huge social panic, and it has already cast a shadow on countless people and squeezed too many negative emotions. The world needs good news to dispel the dark clouds of bioterrorism, and to let the world's infected people see the hope of living.

Chen Mo can clearly feel the emotional catharsis from all parties, and the repressed emotion accumulated in a few months has already opened a mouth.

After a long time, Chen Mocai opened.

"History will remember this day, we have defeated the **** of death."

chapters.title: Chapter 505: : Next Permission
chapters.body:
Chapter 505: : Next Permission

Chen Mo led the medical team to successfully develop the death virus vaccine.

The news was broadcast live on various news platforms, like a tsunami, sweeping the globe. The countries in the hardest hit areas have sent congratulatory messages, and also sent senior officials to coordinate, hoping to get the vaccine early to treat the patients.

Chen Mo defeated the **** of death.

This topic has become the world's craziest topic, creating an unprecedented record.

In the past few months, they have imagined how many times this bioterrorism ended, maybe suddenly there will be drugs to cure tomorrow, or humans will suffer heavy casualties in this bioterrorism.

Now all horror is over.

After the press conference, Haixing Company announced the start of emergency mass production vaccine. The first batch of vaccines will be urgently deployed to WHO according to needs, and the rest will be sent to the hardest hit areas on a pro rata basis for emergency relief. The vaccines produced afterwards will also be sent to the hardest hit areas around the world.

The dead atmosphere was swept away, and the hand of death in the hearts of the people disappeared. The air was not so depressed. The mood of all people became hearty after catharsis.

Some of the quarantine areas were cancelled, the students returned to the classroom, the company continued to operate, and the streets were swept away, and the popularity gradually recovered.

According to WHO statistics, as Chen Mo announced the success of the Ridman virus vaccine, the number of direct deaths caused by the Riederman virus exceeded 200,000, the number of indirect deaths was more than 30,000, and the number of injuries was 50,000.

The World Trade Organization also gave statistics that this bioterrorism disaster caused about 0.5% of global economic losses.

This is a biological disaster that has been the biggest loss in man-made terrorist attacks in history. The Ridman virus was included in the ban on research by the United Nations.

early morning.

Chen Mo opened his eyes.

The little unparalleled next to him, crawling on him, the chubby little face still with a lovely smile, his mouth kept shouting, and the ink girl looked at the bed to prevent her from falling off the boat. .

This scene makes Chen Mo's heart warm.

In the months of the capital, he faced a variety of patients in madness every day, or cells, viruses, and even gene fragments that were invisible to the naked eye. I have seen many people die from death, and the warmth of this kind of home makes him cherish more and more.

Lying in bed, let the little unparalleled play around him, quietly enjoying this quiet.

The door opened, and the neatly dressed fish came in. I saw the father and daughter playing in bed, and whispered softly: "It is time to get up and eat."

Seeing the shallow smile of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo did not consciously smile, and the unparalleled bed on the bed was handed to Xiao Yu and got up from the bed.

On the dining table, Chen ate the breakfast by default. The unparalleled was weaned, and Xiaoyu was feeding her porridge.

The news released the news of the virus. Shortly after the announcement of the virus's success, Chen Mo went back to his hometown, accompanied his parents for a while, and brought the small fishing and unparalleled to the coastal city to restore the past.

Now that the vaccine has been in use for a few days, the first batch of users have begun to heal and are discharged. The news that patients have recovered is spreading, and the cloud that pervades everyone's heart is slowly dissipating with these good news.

The breakfast ended in a warm atmosphere, bid farewell to the small fishing, Chen Mo took the ink girl to the company.

Customized vaccine system platform, Chen Mo has handed over the information and related technology to the Institute of Microbiology of Jianghe Pharmaceutical, and introduced other vaccines. Jianghe Pharmaceutical and Haixing Company are responsible for it. He does not have to worry about those.

After leaving for a few months, because of the research on the virus vaccine, after the completion of the nano-scale 3D laser printer, he only saw it in the photos, and did not see the real thing.

"came back."

Zhao Min smiles, as always, he is not so easy to see Zhao Min's smile.

"How is the company?"

"What about the old-fashioned way?"

The company has carried out many projects at the same time, including controlled nuclear fusion power stations, holographic city projects, ant parks, holographic theater renovations, and the construction of arsenals, all of which are large projects.

In addition, there are relatively small projects such as artificial intelligence +, automatic driving. At the same time, with so many big projects, if the overall planning is not good and the organization has problems, I am afraid it will be a big problem.

In order to ensure that these projects are no problem, Zhao Min did not spend much on this, although she said it was easy, but not as simple as I thought.

"Take me in, what technology is it for me?" Zhao Min asked Chen Mo to enter the No. 1 building, curiously asked.

Not long after, the two arrived at an empty laboratory.

Fifteen machines that have not been seen are displayed in the laboratory, each with a freezer size. Only Chen Mo knows that this instrument consists of more than 15,000 parts. This is the printer that Chen Mo automatically produced during the research of the vaccine.

In addition to the original printer parts, the ultra-precision parts that were needed later were all automatically printed by 3D printers, and the production speed was much faster than before.

"What instrument is this?"

“An instrument that allows the industry to upgrade, nanoscale 3D laser printers.”

Chen Mo touched the machine, and he was the first to touch the complete nano-scale 3D printer.

“Using extreme ultraviolet curing, the new electron-based ink catalyzes free radicals and is suitable for most materials. The scanning range is as small as 100 nanometers. These are the ink ladies who built it during my time in the capital.”

"It's really abnormal." Zhao Min is commonplace, still can't help but marvel.

With a minimum accuracy of 100 nanometers, it can create 3D printers with most materials. This level of technology is completely ahead of the outside world.

From ambient temperature superconducting materials to holographic technology, controlled nuclear fusion technology, as well as custom vaccine technology, war robots, each technology is a technology that leads the era.

Except this metamorphosis, no one is so scary.

"You make people prepare a few more constant temperature rooms. Later, there will be printers. You will move some printers to help produce ultra-precision parts. This is a sophisticated gadget, but it is also as expensive as a lithography machine. Some materials are built. The change in temperature causes the material to expand and contract, so it is best used in a constant temperature room."

"Good." Zhao Min nodded.

Whether it's a holographic phone, a seismograph, or a robot, ultra-precision parts have always been a bottleneck limiting their production. If these nano-scale 3D printers mean that their machines, the output will be greatly released, the industrial production of marching ants is completely It can be fully automatic and rises directly to another step.

Zhao Min left the building No. 1, and Chen Mo also returned to his laboratory.

The customized vaccine system platform was successful, and the eight technologies in the [Science Apprentice] stage were all completed. Chen Mo could obtain the authority of the next stage of the Science and Technology Library.

During this time, Chen Mo did not rush into the technology library.

He did not know what the next authority of the Science and Technology Library was. He studied the vaccine every day and was exhausted. He needed to adjust his spirit to the best condition and then greet the next phase of authority.

It is time now.

Lying down on the bed in the lounge, Chen Mo closed his eyes and entered the technology library.

chapters.title: Chapter 506: :Technology Administrator·Silver
chapters.body:
Chapter 506: :Technology Administrator·Silver

The gate of the science and technology library, this 100-meter-high gate, still carries mysterious patterns, words and symbols, and carries behind countless civilized technologies, huge secrets, which makes people curious.

Standing in front of the gate, looking up for a while, Chen Mocai stretched out and pushed open the door. After the light, it is still as quiet as ever, and lonely for years.

In the center of the library, as Chen Mo stepped in, the light column in the biomedical field was dim, indicating that the technology in all directions was completed.

In the next step, Chen Mo does not know how to do it. The light beams in the eight directions are once again bursting with color, and they are like the corresponding mysterious summons. Focus on the size of the football-sized crystal above the center of the technology library, the light is dazzling, let the whole space It is several times brighter.

Chen Mo looked directly at the light, a white, can only wait quietly.

About five minutes, the color light slowly converges, and the crystal of the central football in the ceiling seems to contain infinite ability. The silver light flows like a glowing silver ball, slowly descending from the air to Chen Mo, with infinite mystery.

"Finally finished."

An old sigh appeared, and the voice was mixed with joy. The light converges, and a body emerges in front of Chen Mo, with a smile of sympathy, it is the long-lost Shu Lao.

"Shu Lao." Chen Moqian slavishly salute, it is this old man who changed his destiny.

“Yes, yes, a lot of growth.”

Mr. Shu Lao looked at Chen Mo, satisfied with the nod. Today, Chen Mo is no longer a young man who gave him a name when he came in a few years ago. He is restrained, confident and calm, and there is a trace of the majesty of the superior. Big.

“In just a few years, you have completed those techniques, indicating that you have not slacked off because of your money honor status. Very good.”

"I don't dare to slack off." Chen Mo said.

"Well, the eight technologies are completed, and the following is the next permission." Shu Lao looked at Chen Mo’s silver ball with restrained crystals.

"The next step is to give you a reward for passing the test, once [brain evolution], a little uncomfortable, you can bear it."

Shu Lao reached out and a little firefly-like silver light gathered on his fingers. When the silver light converges, it points to Chen Mo’s eyebrows.

For a moment, Chen Mo felt a whirlwind. The pain in the brain made his face pale and white. It felt like someone shredded every cell in his brain and then patched together and combined.

He would rather faint himself, but he always stays awake, and suffers from this pain, feeling that the strings of his head will be broken.

It didn't take long for the pain to fade like a tide. Chen Mozhen was on the ground and gasped. The floor of the technology library he could see was an abnormal rotation. I don't know how long it took, the tingling sensation disappeared completely, and Chen Mo was relieved.

Looking at the world again, it seems to have changed a look, there is a feeling of sublimation.

"This is an evolution of your brain domain, so you can take over the technology library."

When Shu Lao saw that Chen Mo was getting better, he slowly opened his mouth and waited for what Chen Mo said. He told him.

"The brain of the intelligent creature is the most amazing thing produced after the birth of the universe. It is magical than the existence of stellar celestial bodies. Humans think that human use of the brain is already 100%, because every cell is working. If so defined, it is indeed 100%, using the airstrip to ride a bicycle, it can be considered 100% utilization.

Earth's human civilization is too low-level, the brain is like an airstrip. You humans think now, like a bicycle. You use your brain, but you can't play the real powerful function of the brain for the time being.

Only when human civilization continues to advance, human beings continue to evolve, and the brain evolves, and the speed of your thinking will accelerate with the development of civilization. Do you know the wisdom of life, how fast is thinking about the fastest speed? ”

"Speed of light?" Chen Mo asked.

"Well, in this universe, it is indeed the speed of light. Once your human thinking speed reaches the speed of light, it is basically the controller of this universe. But your current human ability is not good, it is weak like a reptile."

Chen Mo did not describe the anger because of Shu Lao. In the tens of billions of light years of space, human beings are smaller than reptiles.

"This universe is very big, human civilization still has a long way to go. You are about to take over the technology library, so you must carry out [brain evolution], the brain evolves to the next stage, bicycles become motorcycles, your thinking speed, It will be much faster than the humans now."

"Seeing people's movements has also slowed down." Chen Mo looked at Shu Lao.

"Because your brain's thinking is faster, the ability to process information and the ability to feed back information is faster, so you will feel slow, you need to adapt." Shu Lao said.

Chen silently, nodded gently, and then curiously asked: "What is the next authority? Administrator?"

"[Technical Administrator, Silver]." Shu Lao did not conceal, directly replied: "Technology apprentices complete the technology, indicating that you pass the test and are qualified to be the administrator of the technology library."

"Technology administrator, silver? This silver suffix is the administrator's level authority?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes, it is the color of this technology ball."

Shu Lao pointed to Chen Mo’s chest, the silver-introverted technology ball, which seems to be full of infinite secrets.

"Getting the right means that you are officially the administrator of the technology library, but some technologies are still not open to you. This is the inheritance, the foundation is very important, you can't walk, it is impossible for you to go out and run, otherwise it will Killed by hunters, this is the experience of ancestors.

In the future, you will complete the Silver Phase project, which will open the next permission to unlock the higher level of technical authority of the Technology Library. The highest authority, that is, the suffix is removed, you become a real technology administrator, completely control the science and technology library, to achieve the highest level of science and theology that I said to you at the beginning.

Starting with the administrator, every time you open a session, the tech library will perform a brain evolution on your brain. This is mandatory, in order to adapt you to the new phase of technology. The brain of intelligent life is the most magical product of the universe and the greatest secret of the universe.

Let the ordinary people take over the science and technology library, and give the original person a supercomputer. It is impossible to undertake its mission. [Evolution of the brain domain] is the scientific and technological achievement accumulated by countless civilizations, and it is also necessary for taking over the science and technology library. You stand in countless On the shoulders of civilization, carrying the mission of countless giants, I hope that you can go further and surpass the predecessors at the height of the shoulders of giants. ”

Shu Lao’s palm is placed on Chen Mo’s shoulder, with a serious tone and a bit of a long heart, as if it were a kind of entrustment.

"Understand." Chen Mo nodded, feeling the palm of his hand, and he was as heavy as a thousand.

"Understand it, a little pressure, it will not slack off. This technology ball is the backbone of the technology library, witnessing all the history of the technology library. Put your hand into the technology ball and formally become a technology administrator."

Shu Lao pointed to the introverted technology ball in front of Chen Mo, indicating that he began to accept the inheritance.

"I am an administrator, what about you?"

"I? My mission is to find the administrator of the next technology library. After you pass the test, my mission is completed and the library is officially handed over to you." Shu Lao smiled easily.

"Then you...?"

"This is a kind of inheritance." Shu old interrupted Chen Mo.

"understood."

Chen Mo nodded, understood the meaning of Shu Lao, the inheritance appeared, meaning that the new one, he will replace Shu Lao, in charge of the science and technology library, that is, the waves after the waves of the Yangtze River, although a little lost, but can only accept.

Taking a deep breath, Chen Mocai reached out and slowly held up the technical ball in front.

chapters.title: Chapter 507: : The Universe Is Different From The Weak
chapters.body:
Chapter 507: : The Universe Is Different From The Weak

When Chen Mo’s palm touched the technology ball, the technology ball was sucked on his palm.

Silver light ran down his palms and turned into his blood vessels, veins, like blood, flowing through the body. The palms, shoulders, chests, heart spread, circulation of limbs, and finally into the head, face along the neck.

At this time, Chen Mo, the blood seems to be silver, with an infinite silver mesh body, the naked eye can see the silver light flowing.

When the silver light penetrated into the brain, Chen Mo felt that the brain had a feeling of joy that broke through the shell.

If you can see Chen Mo’s brain, you will be amazed. At the moment when silver light is not in the brain, the whole brain becomes bright silver. In every brain cell, the light flows, beautiful and mysterious. It seems to contain the oldest secrets and is fascinating.

Without the pain of the evolution of the brain domain, Chen Mo felt that the physical state was unprecedented, and every cell was cheering and seemed to sink into it.

Consciousness falls into the dark.

In the darkness, Chen Mo seems to see a strange singularity in the void, suspended in it, unlike a certain substance, more like a singular energy, a foreign chaos.

boom! !

In an instant, the singularity blasted, and the infinite brilliance shot out, piercing the endless chaos, and slamming into the infinite space to expand and spread.

The entire space is filled with dozens of trillions of open particles, as if for a few seconds, as if hundreds of millions of years, the temperature of the particles is reduced, and the material particles suspended in the virtual space begin to converge to form a nebula, the dark age of the universe.

Chen Mo saw that from a nucleus, composed of atoms, forming matter, planets, galaxies, everything in his eyes narrowed rapidly. The first stars formed, the internal nuclear fusion began, succeeded in endless time, decayed and blew.

I don't know how long it took, in a distant galaxy, atoms began to combine and evolve. The first cell appears and then splits into two, four...

Multi-cell life emerges, and the explosion of species is constantly evolving, adapting, and evolving in nature.

Chen Mo is like an outsider, watching the planet and birds and beasts, naturally choosing and eliminating, and then the wisdom of life appears, Ru Mao drinking, fighting, evolution, and development.

At a glance, the main trajectory of the civilized process emerged in the eyes of Chen Mo.

Until the emergence of this planetary civilization, the most intelligent creature on a planet, through the war, conquered the planet, and concentrated all the scientific and technological knowledge books of all the planets into one house, and the knowledge was concentrated in the house.

The house of intelligent biology is called the science and technology library.

boom! !

At the moment when the science and technology library appeared, the picture in Chen Mo’s mind swiftly slid again. He saw that the house had undergone tremendous changes and was preserved as a relic of civilization after repeated wars and civilizations.

The form of the 'house' is also changing.

With the advent of technological civilization, the house became a smart storage device, still focusing on the scientific knowledge of the planet civilization, still called the Science and Technology Library. I don't know how many years have passed, the planet has been destroyed, and the science and technology library has entered the interstellar space with intelligent creatures and is obtained by another kind of intelligent creature.

The destruction of civilizations has been repeated, and I don’t know how many times the most advanced civilizations have been transformed. The shape of the science and technology library is constantly changing, from the beginning of the entity to the final quantum infidelity. Each transformation is focused on the top technology and technology in the technological civilization.

Within the science and technology library, more and more technology is being collected and accumulated.

The demise of every civilization, the science and technology library will become the foundation of the next civilization, and actively seek new intelligent creatures, and the rules of the science and technology library are also gradually improved, seeming to become an endless civilization.

In an unknown disaster, the last frame disappeared and Chen Mo was awake from the darkness. The last scene he saw was a door leading to the unknown door of darkness, and the picture came to an abrupt end.

Digested to see the information, Chen Mocai opened his eyes, the eyes at this time, a little deep mystery, as if hiding the endless secrets.

"See?" asked Shu.

"See it!" Chen Mo nodded. "What is the last door?"

"Some things, you need to explore yourself, I am more profound than I told you. The alternation of countless civilizations has made the current science and technology library, every generation of administrators, is the darling of destiny, inherit it." Shu Lao language center of gravity Said.

"Understand." Chen Mo nodded.

"Well, I understand it, my mission is finished." Shu Lao looked around with some emotion, and his body slowly blurred: "Remember the starry sky above your head, keep curious."

"Yes." Chen Mo promised to come down.

"Don't be bound by rules, the universe has no rules. The so-called rules are created by the strong to limit the weak, and the universe is different."

The universe is different from the weak.

Chen Mo’s mind flashed through the scene seen in the silver technology ball. Looking at the figure that was about to disappear, he bowed deeply: “Thank you teacher.”

Upon hearing Chen Mo’s name, Shu Lao left a comfortable smile, and his figure was completely blurred and disappeared into the library. The Science and Technology Library restored the loneliness and openness as always.

Shu old disappeared, Chen Mo was somewhat lost.

Soon, Chen Mo will get rid of distracting thoughts and resume.

Just now the silver light of the technology ball seems to have penetrated into his body. He began to look at his hands and feet. It seems that there is not much change, but he feels that the spirit is unprecedentedly refreshed, his mind is much more accessible, and there is a sense of sublimation after the evolution of the brain.

His gaze fell on the silver technology ball in front of him, still silver introverted, suspended in the center of the technology library. He has a special kind of sensor that can control the entire library through this technology ball and easily find any technology within his authority.

To be a technology administrator, one advantage is that it is not as restricted as a technology apprentice, and what technology is required to be given by the library. In the apprenticeship of science and technology, that is a test, and you need to specify what he studies. It is now an administrator, as long as he has the ability to study freely and without restrictions.

The only thing that made him embarrassed was that the administrator's permissions were upgraded without any prompts. He didn't know what to do to upgrade the permissions.

Shu Lao said that to complete the project in order to upgrade the authority, the key is to become an administrator, the Science and Technology Library does not have any research topics for him, may need him to explore.

Chen Mo studied the technology ball for a long time, and there was no difference. He turned over the red book on the table, and there was no difference. For a long time, he stopped and it didn't make sense to find it again.

Going back to God, Chen Mo began to focus on the technology that technology administrators can touch.

"Intermediate Human Potential Developmental Pharmacy", "Super Vaccine", "Principles of Cellular Pluripotent Drug Development"

"Sun Tree Gene Map", "Ice Tree Gene Map", "Gene Editing and Artificial Man"

"Quantum Chip Design Theory and Thoughts" "Quantum Computer Design and Manufacturing Principles"

"Ion Engine Design and Manufacturing Principles" "Aircraft Design and Manufacturing Principles" "Controlling Climate Satellite Design and Manufacturing Principles" "Quantum Communication Satellite Design and Manufacturing Principles"

"Robots: The Design and Manufacturing Principles of Executors", "The Principles of Destructive Robot Design and Manufacturing"

"Synthesis Method for Allo-Elements No. 1024", "The Principles of Design and Manufacturing of Small Ion Engines", "The Design and Manufacturing Principle of Space-Based High-Energy Laser Cannons"...

Looking all the way, most of the fields are technologies that cannot be touched by existing technology standards, but there is no supernatural ability development technology that Chen Mo Meng dreams of.

However, the technologies obtained have one thing in common, making Chen Mo very speechless. [Technology Administrator·Silver] The authority of the stage, all design drawings, technical data, are all blocked.

Except for a little like intermediate-potential agents and super-vaccines, these are all ready-made technologies. Others are principles, complete theories, no design drawings, no data, only theory and principles. If you want technology, you must complete your own design and manufacturing.

At the stage of [Technology Apprenticeship], there is still a complete technology, which allows him to copy and rebuild according to the existing technology, learn to design, optimize, and then manufacture. Now all is the theory of principle, the drawings must be designed by themselves, and the data must be collected by themselves.

I thought that it was a golden mountain. In the end, there was only a method of ‘pointing stone into gold.’ This method requires you to understand and learn, and then create Jinshan yourself.

However, Chen Mo is also relieved, this is to teach people to fish.

Seeing the history of the development of the science and technology library, he knows that the purpose of the science and technology library is to let the inheritors learn to create their own on the basis of the existing technology, instead of relying on existing technology and sitting on the mountain.

This is the mission of deliberately cultivating successors, inheriting the science and technology library, and making progress in continuous exploration. It is estimated that this is the reason for [brain evolution]. It is impossible for ordinary people to understand these technologies. It is impossible to spend ten or eight years. The evolution of the brain domain can help the successors to understand these techniques more quickly.

But fortunately, the material formula and basic process equipment needed to complete these technologies are all complete. Otherwise, let him study the synthesis and exploration one by one. I am afraid that no technology can be completed in a few years.

When Chen Mo was thinking about what to study next, his eyes quickly locked in a technology.

chapters.title: Chapter 508: : Fair Price, Virginity
chapters.body:
Chapter 508: : Fair Price, Virginity

"The Skywalker Battle Armor Design Concept and Manufacturing Principles"

Steel armor, the dream of all men.

Chen Mo has a personal name, Huaxia Iron Man, but he does not have steel armor. Even if it is him, Iron Man's armor has been coveted for a long time, but has been limited by the armor's energy and engine technology problems, that dream has not been realized.

[Technology Administrator·Silver] The technology that has opened the privilege has solved these problems. The small plasma engine has the 1024 elemental element as the energy material of the reactor, which provides energy for the armor.

The 1024 allogeneic element is a heterogeneous element artificially modified by indium elements. The energy source continuously releases high-energy beta particles to generate electricity, which is sufficient to provide a power fuel for small plasma engines.

Without much thought, Chen Mo has acquired all the technical theories he wants to study and left the Science and Technology Library.

Looking at the lab now, it’s very strange. The complicated instrument design like robots, as well as some instruments and equipment, make him feel as simple as a bicycle, can quickly understand the various technologies, and even come to mind when designing these robots. , the lines of each part

This should be the result of [brain evolution]. He now has a brain that transcends the limits of human evolution. As a future person, looking back at various inventions of history, he can understand the various technologies involved in it with a glance.

This situation is very wonderful, so Chen Mo can not adapt at once.

"We are starting a new study."

"What is this study?"

"Know the Iron Man? Study the steel armor. I will organize some principles and theories for you, and then design together." Chen Mo said.

"Okay." The ink girl nodded.

Chen Mo began to sort out the theoretical data. His speed of thinking is not as fast as the speed of light, but the speed of thinking of the ink girl is speed of light. Unfortunately, the computer is powerful and cannot be more magical than the human brain. Regarding design, many of them need to be hands-on, and then the ink girl is complemented, tested and optimized according to his design needs, acting as an auxiliary.

It was not long before Chen Mo welcomed a familiar guest.

"Chen Mo, brother, don't come innocent."

Li Chengzhi and Chen Mo shook hands and sat back on the sofa, their eyes constantly looking at Chen Mo.

After this time, he found that Chen Mo had a new change, his eyes seemed to be as deep as a starry sky, and he gave a very sharp self-confidence, a feeling of incomprehension.

If he is a woman, even if he does not know Chen Mo’s current status, he will be attracted by Chen Mo’s temperament.

If Chen Mo knows the thoughts in Li Chengzhi's heart, it must be speechless.

"My brother came over this time, is there something?" Chen Mo asked.

"Have."

Li Chengzhi turned his eyes to the ink girl.

The people around Chen Mo, he knows, is also clear, can say, Chen Mo's distant relatives have many, he knows. But the appearance of the ink girl is very sudden.

He has never seen such a beautiful woman. The most important thing is that the origin is unknown. They investigated the information of the ink girl and even searched through facial information. There is no such face in their database. The management office of the entry and exit did not see the information of the ink girl.

This woman seems to have emerged out of thin air, and is still the closest person to Chen Mo.

After investigating for a few months, I only know that she is called Mo, and the rest of the information is blank. Unless there is a black household out of the original mountain, it is impossible to have no information at all.

After checking for so long, I finally found that Zhao Min had an unidentified personal assistant. I didn't find a trace of information. I was worried that there would be problems inside the marching ant group, so Li Chengzhi had to come and confirm it.

Chen Mo saw Li Chengzhi's gaze and immediately became clear.

An unidentified girl is next to him, close to the person, or the closest person. His identity is special and will definitely be noticed. Not only Li Chengzhi, the outside world has passed on Chen Mo and the ink girl. Many gossip reporters want to know the identity of the ink girl, but unfortunately it is impossible to check.

"I want to know her identity?" Chen Mo looked at the ink girl.

"I really want to know how such a beautiful girl is being turned to the side by you, and the little fish girl is not angry." Li Chengzhi said.

"She is my assistant, called the ink girl, the ink of Mozi."

"Ink girl? Very nice name." Li Chengzhi nodded and looked at the ink girl: "Which rich woman's niece?"

"She is a robot."

robot?

One of Li Cheng’s faces was shocked. He had been secretly observing it, and he could not see the taste of the robot.

If Chen Mo told him that the ink girl was an illegitimate woman of a rich man, she grew up overseas and sneaked back to China, quietly and Chen Mohao, followed him, and then a dog blood plot, Xiao Yu did not mind them, credibility still higher.

Such a beautiful girl is a robot? Li Chengzhi obviously does not believe. The ink girl has no shadow of the robot at all, and even the walking posture is very natural, and there is no sound of the motor.

"It's a robot." Chen Mo spread his hand: "Ink girl, give her a look at the evidence that you are a robot."

"Okay, Merle."

The ink girl nodded. At her waist, a magazine that reloaded the smart bomb opened, revealing the mechanical structure inside.

This time, Li Chengzhi was shocked.

Really a robot! No trace of technology, so that artificial skin perfectly covers all the metal shells, how horrible is Chen Mo's robot technology?

Li Chengzhi turned a few laps around the ink girl, carefully looking at it, the two blue stones between the eyebrows and the navel were a bit special, but still can't see the shadow of the robot. When people see the stone, they must think it is a decoration. Girls, it is not surprising to use these accessories.

Just want to get started with the skin of the ink woman, she was stepped back by the ink girl, avoiding his hand, the movement is very natural, completely different from the average girl, even the appearance of defense is the same.

"What is the function of this robot?" Li Chengzhi was shunned and not embarrassed, but more shocked and curious.

"She is my **** robot, personal bodyguard, personal assistant." The robot will appear sooner or later, Chen Mo has nothing to hide, and there is no need to hide.

"Guards? Bodyguards?" Li Chengzhi's eyes are bright, and he has forgotten that he is coming to confirm the identity of the ink girl: "How strong is her fighting power?"

"What do you mean by her fully armed combat, or is she now fighting?"

“How strong is the whole armed?”

"According to the current combat strength standards of the soldiers, she should be fully armed to deal with one company."

hiss! ! Li Chengzhi was once again shaken by the earthquake, a robot, the top one? How terrible is this robot?

"determine?"

"Of course sure." Chen Mo said.

"Do you have such a robot in the arsenal you built?" Li Chengzhi couldn't wait to ask.

"Of course, but the arsenal has not yet been completed, and it is temporarily impossible to mass produce." Chen Mo smiled.

"How much is this robot price?" Li Chengzhi has confirmed the identity of the ink girl. Now he is very interested in the robot of the ink girl, I believe that it must be very interesting.

"If you say this, this is not for sale, this is not a lot of money, and the manufacturing cost is about 500 million."

Li Chengzhi’s eyes jumped straight.

"This is what I specially designed to be my personal assistant. If I want to buy it, there is another model of military ant defense. It has almost the same function. There is no ink girl."

"How much is that model?"

"The bare-metal machine has a billion, the price is fair, the virginity is not bullying. You are the first big customer, free trial machine, a large number of purchases, 90% discount, pro." Chen Mo laughed.

chapters.title: Chapter 509: : Is It Fat?
chapters.body:
Chapter 509: : Is It Fat?

After sending away Li Chengzhi, Chen Mo took the ink girl back to the lab. When Li Chengzhi sees such an advanced robot as Moo, I am afraid that he will come over again and ask again. After all, such advanced equipment is not tempting.

"Ink girl, how is the arsenal?" Chen Mo asked.

"Tanzani's arsenal will soon be ready for use, domestic, under construction, and the scheduled construction period will be completed in three months." said the ink girl.

The arsenal of Tanzanyi is relatively simpler than that of the domestic one. At present, there is no need to produce large-scale robots or other things. It only needs to be responsible for producing some weapons and ammunition, so it is faster than domestic construction.

"Contact Wang Hai and Zhong Lei." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

The ink girl handed the phone to Chen Mo. It didn't take long for the holographic image of Zhong Lei to pop up.

"boss."

"Wang Hai?"

"Hai Ge trains security personnel in the training ground, need to ask him to come in?" Zhong Lei asked.

"No, what about the arsenal?" Chen Mo asked.

“The construction period is one month faster than expected, the factory floor has been completed, the equipment needed has arrived, and the final cleaning work is now underway. The recruitment and training of employees is also going on at the same time. It will take about ten days for the factory to officially Put into use." Zhong Lei said.

"Yes, Not Bad."

Chen Mo nodded, Wang Hai and Zhong Lei did not have much experience, it should be that Zhao Min found some consultants to help them, the two will get up so quickly.

"There is a need to produce weapons drawings, as well as some technical materials and formulas for explosives. I have sent them to your technical library. You are responsible for producing some of the weapons I have given you. If you want to produce other weapons, you have to find an engineer yourself. The identity information of the company's engineers must be confirmed, and technical confidentiality should be noted."

"Understand." Zhong Lei nodded and promised: "But the engineers are a little difficult to recruit."

"You can make your own decisions, don't delay the production of weapons, how to recruit, you look at it."

"Ok."

Asking about the situation of two people, Chen Mocai hung up the phone and let the ink girl put the weapon technology that needs to be produced into the technical library of the soldier ants.

Tansany, Mult City.

A large factory is located on a flat plain with an area of nearly 1,100 acres. It is surrounded by people and has a wide view. And five kilometers away, it is Mute Port, the traffic is very convenient, here is the location chosen by Zhao Min after evaluation.

Outside the factory's training ground, Wang Hai stood under the scorching sun, next to him, two deputies.

The two are called Yuhe and Gan Yu, who are selected by Wang Hai from the security department of the marching ant group and are willing to come with them to develop. In front of them, there are 107 fully armed security personnel, more than 80% are black, there are several whites, and there are several Asians. Standing in front of the team, the two most prominent blacks, called Ram and Tatu, were retired mercenaries who were recruited by Wang Hai to lead the team.

More than 100 people were security guards who had been trained for several months.

The security environment here is relatively complicated, so Wang Hai is very concerned about security. The first batch of players must be personally selected to be assured. In Tanzania, the most important thing is people, releasing information about recruiting people, plus high wages, many people will come to apply for it, and after the selection, they will leave the 110 people.

Most of them are retired soldiers, not necessarily the best, but they are all obeying orders, and they need the people who obey orders. The production of the arsenal has not yet begun, but he must first ensure the safety of the arsenal.

"This is your uniform." Wang Hai signaled that they would send the uniform next to them: "From today, you are the staff of the soldier ants. You have only one duty, responsible for the safety of the factory, non-factory staff, no permission. , not allowed to enter the factory."

Wang Hai is talking about Portuguese. He has been here for almost a year. He has heard a lot of things and learned some Portuguese language to facilitate communication.

When everyone was wearing the uniform, Zhong Lei also ran over, let Gan Yu and Yu He take charge of those players, Wang Hai and Zhong Lei left the training ground.

"The boss just called, he said that the weapon technology that needs to be produced has been sent to the company's technical library, we can go to extract. Boss, the technology should pay attention to confidentiality, the identity information of the engineer should pay attention to confirm. As for the shortage of engineers, The boss asked us to look at it, not to delay the production of weapons." Zhong Lei said.

"Yeah." Wang Hai nodded.

This has always been their job, Chen Mo is not awkward, they will be very careful about this, after all, technology is the most fundamental thing.

And now the military ants equipment has just started, engineers and research institutes, but also need to rely on dig people, after all, the top military workers have been monopolized by major military companies, they are more, can only recruit from the school, but are willing to come There are not many here, even if they give better treatment.

"What are the best ways for engineers to be scarce?" asked Wang Hai.

Zhong Lei looks thin, but the strength can not be underestimated, even if it is Wang Hai, it may not be able to play. After all, the person who was responsible for the safety of the heads is definitely not a mediocrity. More importantly, Zhong Lei's management ability is not weak. After coming here, the stage is slowly spread out. The brain is very flexible and almost all-round.

So many times, Wang Hai will seek the opinions of Zhong Lei.

"The engineer is really a problem, but the military company can not get up in a single day. Now the company has a group to support it. In a short time, we don't have to worry about technology research and development.

But in the future, it is impossible for the group to help, and the factory definitely needs professional talent development. Tanzanyi belongs to the least developed region, and the company is in its infancy. Going outside to find it, not many people are willing to come, so they can only cultivate themselves, otherwise they will acquire other military companies, but the acquisition of other military companies will have more trouble. ”

"How to cultivate?"

"The official cooperation with Tanzanyi. They are behind the education here. There are almost no heavy industries in the country. There are few industrial talents, but there are certainly many people with talents who are motivated.

Set up a major in their university, facing the whole of Africa, enrolling students who are interested in military work, we are responsible for training, here is their country and land, there must be many people staying, and we help them train talents, the official also Will support.

Excellent talents, we stay in the company to develop into engineers, even if they are not excellent talents, students who have studied relevant technical knowledge stay in the factory, and definitely better than ordinary workers with relatively little professional knowledge.

Establishing a talent training system, although longer, is the best way to acquire talent. After all, we are just getting started, and the conditions here are relatively poor. In developed countries, top military workers are monopolized by top military companies. When conditions permit, we will dig some talent from other companies. ”

"Well, just do what you said, you go to the official coordination with Tanzanyi." Wang Hai said.

Chen Mo gave them enough autonomy, so there are some things that do not require the advice of the group headquarters. They can make their own decisions and then report them to the group. If it feels bad for the group, the headquarters will naturally give them advice.

"What? Is this an intelligent robot?"

Liu Jianjun took a picture of the ink girl and looked shocked.

After many years in the military, he has experienced great winds and waves before he has reached the position of today. There are very few things that can make him so shocked. Today he was really shocked. The woman in this photo is no different from ordinary people, and at most it is only a little more beautiful than other women.

As a result, Li Chengzhi told him that this is a robot.

"I don't believe it, but I saw it with my own eyes." Li Chengzhi was not surprised by Liu Jianjun's shock. He knew that when the ink girl was a robot, he was also shocked.

"This robot can go to the battlefield?" Liu Jianjun asked.
