"I asked, he said that this is his personal bodyguard, fully armed, with the equipment of the current soldiers, this robot can deal with a company."

"Is it really dare to say? He is so rich, bragging does not collect taxes? Really the soldiers are paper?" Liu Jianjun looked unbelievable.

"With my understanding of him, it is estimated that this is still a conservative number." Li Chengzhi smiled, the confidence of that guy, will never be empty.

"Robot technology can't mature to that level? If there is such a mature robot technology, isn't it invincible?" Liu Jianjun still doesn't believe it. At present, the intelligent robots in various countries are just getting started, and Chen Mo's robots are already on the battlefield. ? Even if it is advanced, this possibility is not great.

"That is the marching ant company, the most advanced technology technology company." Li Chengzhi spread his hand: "His name is Chen Mo."

A name is enough to represent a lot of things. This name is synonymous with metamorphosis.

Liu Jianjun hesitated: "You asked him, how much is this robot?"

"Like this girl, he said that it is not for sale, and he is custom-made to follow him." Li Chengzhi said: "But the ants defense company of his group will produce another type of robot, the performance is similar to this robot, bare metal The price is 100 million."

"I rely on, this kid robbery grabbed us here? Feel fat?" Liu Jianjun heard the price, almost screamed.

“You can get a 20% discount on a large purchase.”

"..."

Liu Jianjun and Li Chengzhi smiled at each other. Li Chengzhi was helpless and laughed. Liu Jianjun was laughed at by Chen Mo’s words.

chapters.title: Chapter 510: : Can You Try The Robot?
chapters.body:
Chapter 510: : Can You Try The Robot?

"This is the head of Liu Jianjun. This is Comrade Chen Mo." In a secret military base, Li Chengzhi led Chen Mo and Zhu He to go to Liu Jianjun and introduce them to the two.

Seeing Chen Mozhen, Liu Jianjun was slightly surprised.

He has seen Chen Mo many times in photos and news. Now he sees real people, completely different, and it is almost like two people. Calm and calm, the edge is restrained, the two temperament are perfectly integrated, and there is an indescribable self-confidence, deep in the sky, and people can't see through.

The first time I saw such a good young man, it’s no wonder that Li Chengzhi was lamenting every day that his daughter couldn’t touch this young man.

"It's not as famous as meeting, and I have long been famous, Comrade Chen Mo." Liu Jianjun's generous hand introduced Chen Mo: "These two are technical experts, Tang Hao and Qin Ye."

"Hello, Tang Gong, hello, Qin Gong." Chen Mo smiled and shook hands.

"Liu Shouchang is the head of the assembly department. Tang Gong and Qin Gong are technical experts in the assembly department, responsible for the technical evaluation and procurement of equipment." Li Chengzhi added.

"This is the ink girl?" Liu Jianjun quickly set his sights on the ink girl around Chen Mo.

This is the robot that Li Chengzhi reported. I can't see the robot as a photo. Now I can't see it as a robot. It is obviously an ordinary girl. It is only a pretty girl.

"Yes, Liu, the head of the Liu, my name is the ink girl." The ink girl replied.

"Old Li? You told me that this is a robot? Is this a robot? Does the robot speak for itself?" After hearing the ink girl answering him, Liu Jianjun was slightly surprised and looked at Li Chengzhi with an unbelief.

"It's a robot." Li Chengzhi spread his hand and looked at Chen Mo.

"Ink girl, open the magazine to show them." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Meg." When the ink girl finished, the magazine at the waist opened, and the magazine on the back was opened. The internal mechanical structure was exposed.

"Ink girl, she won't give you a mess, so I brought another one." Chen Mo finished, and the male bodyguard stood behind him. The magazine on his body appeared in front of everyone: "He called 003."

I didn't care if the ink girl was flashing away. Several people's eyes suddenly shifted to the male robot, and the robot turned around and was amazed.

Tang Hao and Qin Ye looked at the robot carefully, and wanted to take the robot apart and see what was inside. After ten minutes, the male robot was seen from top to bottom. The two talents stopped and their faces were amazed.

"Comrade Chen Mo, you introduce the function of this robot." Liu Jianjun was amazed, but not so obvious.

"it is good."

Chen Mo nodded immediately.

"The robot has three modes, the normal mode, the normal mode, the robot is not aggressive, only the self-defense function. Just like you want to touch the ink girl, she judges as a violation, it will avoid.

The second is the guard mode. In the guard mode, the robot will protect the character's safety with the guardian character as the center. The daemon mode has a fighting state. Once you start fighting, you will attack the enemy without lethality and subdue the enemy with the fastest speed. ”

"The last one?" Liu Jianjun asked curiously.

Chen Mo gave the male robot an instruction. At the moment when the weapon system was fully opened, even Liu Jianjun took a breath of air and his eyes bounced. He finally understood why Chen Mo said that this robot can deal with a company, which is simply a killing machine for walking.

"The last mode is the war mode. The war mode kills the enemy for attack purposes. Once the war mode is turned on, it will kill the enemy in the fastest speed and in the best way.

"Do you have such a small missile?" Liu Jianjun asked with doubt.

"This is a model. Our company has not researched missiles, but there is a company that has Tanzanian soldier ants equipment company." Chen Mo said.

Tanzanyi? Soldier ant equipment? Worker ants defense? Hearing the name, Liu Jianjun was amazed and looked at Chen Mo deeply, and did not say much.

"The robot's eye is a sensor that functions like an eagle eye. It can see people from two kilometers away. Hearing here, Li Chengzhi and others finally understood that the two blue stones of the ink forehead and navel were not decorations, but lasers. The technology that Chen Mo has mastered has far surpassed this current technology.

This is definitely a big happy event for them.

"What is the joint power of the robot? Why is there no motor sound when moving?" Tang Yan said. This is a question they have been wondering about.

The current robots, not to mention all, mature robots, can never be separated from the motor, but the motor starts, absolutely can not do the action as smooth and natural.

“The power of the robot is not a motor. It is a new material, an electrostrictive material based on bismuth sulphate, and a relaxed graphene ceramic.”

Tang Hao and Qin Ye have their eyes shining. They are technical workers and naturally see electrostrictive materials. I just didn't expect that the electrostrictive materials in Chen Mo's hands were so advanced. Even if you don't buy a robot, buying these materials is not helpful to them.

"It's energy is 20 pieces of the latest graphene supercapacitor battery in the abdomen, legs and arms. Under normal conditions, it can provide it with a continuous 12-day battery life. In war mode, depending on the number of times the laser is used, Do not turn on the laser, theoretically last at least 4 days."

Chen Mo did not use the normal temperature superconductor in the ordinary version of the war robot. The exposure of the normal temperature superconductor is absolutely more shocking than the war robot itself, and it is tantamount to nuclear fusion technology.

Even so, the technology that robots have is enough to shock.

Tang Hao and Qin Ye have been scared. They are engaged in technology and naturally know how terrible this technology is. From head to toe, any technology goes beyond existing technology.

Graphene supercapacitor batteries, electrostrictive materials, small detection radars, new sensors, small lasers, and new alloys and materials for robotic bodies.

A multitude of technologies are combined to give the two people the urge to cry.

A robot, with so many technologies, as long as they can develop one, they die without regrets, and Chen Mo takes it out like a Chinese cabbage.

I dare to love them for the rest of my life.

Liu Jianjun has been speechless for a long time.

At the beginning, he also believed that the robot was even diamond-studded, and one hundred million was absolutely robbery. But if the technology that Chen Mo said is true, then this machine is worth one hundred yuan, which is simply the price of cabbage.

It is simply a high-tech technical library for walking.

If the technology inside is really as Chen Mo said, their military technology can rise to a higher level. The value of any technology is tens of billions. If Chen Moken sells one of their technologies, he will definitely buy it without hesitation.

Going back to God, Liu Jianjun has become calmer, is it true, and needs to be tested.

“Can you try the robot?”

Seeing that the bricks broke into small pieces and fell, Liu Jianjun smacked and pumped, too abnormal. If it is hit on a person, it will not hurt or be seriously injured.

what? robot?

Moreover, this time, your team members did not bring a rocket launcher."

When I heard Chen Mo’s introduction, Lin Biao’s eyes were horrified.

If it was five minutes ago, Chen Mo said that he must be scornful, and now he believes a bit. In the scene just now, I was shocked to him, and I can’t believe it.

"If it installs a weapon system, those players should not see 003 and will be out. But if you don't install a weapon system, you shouldn't have much problem with the players who don't know the robot. This kind of robot, with the command of the person, the effect is The best. By the intelligence of the robot to act, more or less there will be limitations." Chen Mo explained.

Next to Liu Jianjun and Li Chengzhi are still immersed in the exclamation.

Everyone secretly complained, this time the confrontation, the other side has only one robot, they did not want to carry so many weapons to find sin. They have to consider the weight and mobility of the team. Dealing with a person is not a crime.

“The teams went to the B71 to gather, smashing the grenades, grenades and mines.” In a short minute, Acura quickly responded.
