chapters.title: Chapter 514: :Decisive Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 514: :Decisive Battle

B71, here is an old factory in the exercise site, lonely and uninhabited, the window is broken, there are several old and worn machines, rusty, the corners are covered with traces of dark green moss, surrounded by weeds, in the breeze Shake a little.

For a long time, the jungle rustled, a camouflage suit, the team members wearing camouflage paint drilled out of the jungle, confirmed that there was no danger, said a few words to the headset.

I saw the jungle, quickly drilled nine people into a battle formation, quickly moved toward the factory, and the weight of the backpack did not seem to have any effect on them.

Entering the factory, confirming no one, a small group of people quickly occupied the commanding heights of the vision, others were scattered and hidden, and soon, the factory fell into silence, and it seems that no one has ever appeared.

Fifteen minutes apart, four teams entered the factory from all directions.

Five minutes later, four snipers slammed the sniper rifle and quickly occupied the commanding heights of the abandoned factory in all directions. The other team members quickly reached the open space outside the factory and waited for the arrival of the robot.

In the abandoned factory, Yangge looked at the search with a telescope. In other directions, there were Blue Dragon team captain Lan Chaoyun, Huanglong team captain Huang Jing, Qinglong team captain Mu Qing, and three captains.

"White Dragon, the robot will know that we are here?" Blue Chaoyun took the telescope and his face was serious.

"If it is really high-tech, we should find us. It can be done so quickly to get the red dragon and the purple dragon, so you can't be underestimated." Yangge played a 12-point spirit.

Outside the factory, there was no wind and grass, everyone calmed down and began to wait, and the air was filled with gas.

The command post, the atmosphere is also a bit nervous.

Lin Biao looked calm, but his heart was not calm.

Those are his team members, each with his own ability and ability. He is very clear. He saw the whole process. Unfortunately, at first, I ignored the robot's setting problem and made these players at a disadvantage.

Although Yangko responded quickly, Lin Biao still had no idea about this robot.

He just watched two battles. This robot is very smart. Even if Chen Mo said that he has intelligent limitations, he is also very smart, quick and decisive. The most important thing is that Yangge does not understand the robot. It can only be judged by the words of the Zilong team.

Such a judgment must have a large error.

Getting this kind of robot into the team is a nightmare.

Unlike Lin Biao, Liu Jianjun, Tang Yu and Qin Ye have three faces with unprecedented excitement. Just two battles, the robot has shown terrible strength, and Chen Mo said that there is no weapon system yet. Once equipped with a weapon system, it is definitely more terrible.

The value of the robot is definitely a tactical weapon.

If such a robot, several teams are fully armed and commanded by people, in the jungle war and the flash battle without heavy weapons, it is simply killing the machine.

It’s about to be decisive, and if this battle is won by the robot, it’s wonderful.

"Lao Lin, you said this time, your team won, or is the robot win?" Liu Jianjun asked.

Lin Biao didn't look at Lin Biao. His eyes looked back and forth between the screen on the 003 and the screen in the area where the factory was located: "Crap, of course I press my team members."

"Do you want people to command robots? Now the players of Longya are ready to catch up. If it is a real battlefield, someone should direct the robot to attack." Li Chengzhi said.

"Who is commanding? The people under our command? This is unfair." Lin Biao said.

"No, now is the test equipment, not training, let it test independently, at least know some of its data. Commanded by people, can be carried out later." Liu Jianjun said.

He has determined that this kind of robot must be purchased. He believes that as long as their video materials and evaluation reports come out, it is certainly no problem.

Seeing Liu Jianjun’s opening, Chen Mo did not speak and looked at the screen quietly.

As the robot approached the factory, everyone in the command room was quiet, and everyone looked forward to watching the robot, and how it would behave in the face of this obvious ambush.

Under the gaze of everyone, 003 reached the edge of the jungle and stopped, staring at the abandoned factory.

"How does it stop? Will it be hidden?" Lin Biao was a little surprised to see Chen Mo: "Comrade Chen Mo, will not be your command?"

Li Chengzhi and Liu Jianjun also looked at Chen Mo, just two ‘hunting’. They all saw that when the 003 arrived at the place, they would attack quickly and almost did not hesitate. Now they stopped.

Seeing the eyes of everyone, Chen Mo explained.

"This robot will automatically determine the enemy. When the enemy concentration exceeds 20, it will automatically identify the environment and the enemy's concentration, and take the best strategy to deal with the enemy according to the calculation. Have you seen the two games just now? It starts with a grenade, and when it creates a threat to the enemy, it quickly approaches. As for the hidden observation, it is the basic setting, or is it standing as a target?"

"So smart?" Liu Jianjun and Lin Biao said in unison.

Everyone else on the field was surprised because they didn't expect the robot to be so smart. If the robot is out of control, it is very dangerous. No one can guarantee it. This will not cause a robot crisis.

"But when someone is commanding, it will only strictly enforce the command of the commander." Chen Mo said.

"The robot is moving."

One of Li Cheng’s words put everyone’s eyes back on the screen.

In the abandoned factory, the atmosphere is so terrible that everyone dares to relax. Unknown is terrible. The two teams have put a lot of pressure on them. If a team is destroyed by a robot team, it will be shameful.

Zheng Jianyi was on the roof of the factory. He was an observer, next to him, his old man, sniper Meng Bai. Both of them remained absolutely quiet, staring at the front and not talking.

When the telescope swept across the jungle, Zheng Jian’s pupils shrank and his face changed.

"The target is 11 points, 157 meters... so fast."

Under his gaze, he could see that the robot broke out at a horrible speed and rushed toward the abandoned factory. The speed is far beyond their imagination.

When No. 003 ran out of the jungle, the team members responsible for the north defense in the factory had already discovered No. 003. Seeing the speed of horror 003, everyone was stunned.

Too abnormal, right?

Acura also finally understands why the purple team will make such shocked words before losing the link. More than 150 meters, ran halfway in just a few seconds, which is more visually powerful than seeing the sports car rushing over the throttle. Those who are not prepared are close to each other without responding.

The message he can get from the dialogue with Zilong is that the robots move very fast, but this speed has exceeded their expectations.

Now he only hopes that the large-caliber sniper rifle of the anti-equipment will have an effect on this robot.

"Free shooting." Yangge can't think too much, immediately order.

Hey!

A gunshot came from Zheng Jian.

"Hit it." Meng Bai definitely said. No. 003 is moving at high speed, but he is very confident in his own shots, otherwise he will not be one of the snipers of the Dragon Tooth Commando.

"The hit is still running, this setting is too abnormal? Do not want to win, just say."

Zheng Jian looked incredulously at the robots still running. They were equipped with 12.7 mm bullets and penetrated the 1 cm steel plate.

Everything is between the electric and the Flint. Before the Meng Bai prepares the second shot, the robot is running wildly. When it is close to the factory, the body goes deep and leaps forward.

In the next scene, Zheng Jian and Meng Bai both squinted and their eyes almost fell.

chapters.title: Chapter 515: : Maka
chapters.body:
Chapter 515: : Maka

At the training ground, all the players have returned, and everyone is downcast and their faces are dull.

TooTM is shameful.

A sharp knife team was beaten by a robot, which was the most humiliating thing since they were formed.

The shock that 003 brought to them broke their imagination of robots. The various abilities that are displayed are absolutely comparable to the Terminator in the movie.

Especially in abandoned factories, the performance of Superman 003 has made them unforgettable. Jumping into the factory from the third floor window, breaking all their arrangements, the degree of metamorphosis, so that everyone who saw it was scared.

Looking at the robot now, I don’t dare to have any small look.

Lin Biao looked at the robot standing next to Chen Mo, and moved his mouth, not knowing what to say. Chen Mo was found to be as calm as ever, and everything seemed to be in his expectation.

"Report, Captain, we asked to play again. We didn't expect the robot to have special settings, nor did it understand his settings. It was not completely prepared." A squeaky voice from the team sounded from the members of the Zilong team.

"On the battlefield, the enemy will tell you, do they have special weapons? Will the enemy give you a chance to fully prepare? At the beginning I will tell you that it is a robot, you are ignoring its own setting properties. If I don't say it is a robot You will be even more embarrassed.

You are not completely prepared, is this robot ready? Tell you that the robot's weapon system has not been installed. If you follow the all settings of the robot, you can't see his shadow. All of them are glorious and you are given excuses. ”

Lin Biao yelled.

At first he said that this is a robot, and as a result, these players ignored the settings, which led to such awkwardness.

Chen Mo has already stated that the robot's weapon system is not installed. If the weapon system is set up against the complete weapon system, the average person will not even have the power to fight back.

Sure enough, the current war is a high-tech war.

Although it is very uncomfortable, let these guys have a lesson, at least when they face the enemy in the future, they will focus on the information of the enemy itself, which is better than they think they are already in the sky.

Hearing Lin Biao's swearing, the players on the field no longer speak. This is really not a glorious thing. At first, Lin Biao has already suggested that it is a robot, the real battlefield. You never know that the enemy is a robot, a soldier, or a small person on the road.

Unlike Lin Biao's unhappy, Liu Jianjun was very excited, and he just felt that Chen Mo was a robbery. He is now watching this robot, his eyes are shining, the only feeling is.

Really fragrant.

"Comrade Chen Mo, in addition to robots, the materials of the robot itself are sold separately? Is there a graphene battery?" Liu Jianjun asked. He has been immersed in the assembly department for many years, and he is also a veteran. Naturally, in addition to the robot itself, those materials are definitely super materials.

With these materials, the help for them is absolutely not small.

"Sell, since it was developed, it is to make money." Chen Mo said.

Chen Mo’s purpose is simple, that is, making money. The Group's turnover is very high, and every product is very profitable, giving them a steady stream of cash, but the expenses are not small.

At present, the company is constructing two controlled nuclear fusion power stations at the same time. The cost is not low. The ant park project has the establishment of military ants equipment and worker ants defense. In addition, the company’s expansion and acquisition in the previous period, the consumption is not low, all need white flowers. It is also a project that cannot be returned in a short time.

Although the company's funds can still be turned around, but his laboratory has too much technical accumulation, and it is also released, and it is not too much money to take out and make money. There are too many places to use money in the future.

The technology and materials that can be cracked, he will let Zhao Min apply for a patent. As for the intelligent core of the robot, others can't get the code at all, and he is not worried. Others can imitate war robots.

"What about the weapon system?"

"Weapon systems and equipment, you have to find a soldier ants equipment company to buy." Chen Mo said.

"Do you like this? OK."

Liu Jianjun also knows that domestic private enterprises cannot develop ammunition. This is the rule that Chen Mo will choose to build the soldier ant equipment company in Tanzania, and be responsible for supplementing the ammunition that can not be produced by the production of military ants.

"Can the price of this robot be cheaper?"

Liu Jianjun began to play the small ninety-nine, the robot is good, this price, not including the weapon system, a robot asking for 100 million.

"It's already very cheap, buy a lot, 90% off." Chen Mo is not moved. The whole body of high-tech things, this price, the price of cabbage.

“Can't you be cheaper?”

"No." Chen Mo shook his head.

“How many robots are discounted?” Liu Jianjun also knows that it is impossible to lower prices. The whole body is high-tech. If foreign military enterprises have such advanced robots, let alone one hundred million, five hundred million have to buy a few to study.

"100 starts."

Liu Jianjun’s face was black.

This is really unambiguous, 100 units are 9.8 billion, not including weapons systems. Who knows how much the weapon system costs? What about the maintenance and repair costs in the later period?

As for the appearance of Liu Jianjun, Chen Mo is ignorant.

“If you need to buy materials separately, you can place an order for the worker ants. All the materials on this robot can be sold. As for the price, the worker ants will give you the price, you and Zhu He talk. This robot needs to be tested again later. Contact Zhu He."

The military has strict requirements on quality. Even if his robot has high technology, it definitely needs a second or third test. He can't spend too much time to participate in the test again and again. These matters can be handed over to the ants. .

When things were settled, Chen Mo took the ink girl and the 003 to board the helicopter and left the base.

He can't sell robots, this war robot has surpassed any product on the market.

The war has changed for a long time, and the future will be that high technology will dominate the war.

It is now a time of peace, but it is also a seemingly peaceful one, and it has been undercurrent in private. Especially after the completion of controlled nuclear fusion technology, the global energy form is about to change. In the face of this century of change, those powerful countries are seeking technological leadership, hoping to continue to be strong in the new century.

In the face of great changes, it is impossible to have a smooth road, but that time is not up. Once the time has come, no one can guarantee that the war will come.

Chen Mo left, Liu Jianjun and Li Chengzhi bid farewell to Lin Biao, and then left. On the way, both of them are thinking about the robot. The performance of the robot gave them a deep impression.

"Want to buy a few?" Li Chengzhi asked.

Liu Jianjun looked up and thought about it again.

"This matter must be studied and researched, and purchased according to actual needs. The weapon system must be tested and needs to be contacted with the soldier's ants. As the horror performance Chen Mo said, I am afraid that at least one company must be in the first batch. Just now, you should Understand the value of those robots in mountain jungle and urban street fighting."

Liu Jianjun’s voice was amazed. A robot is a team. It’s terrible to think about it.

"In the past few years, the air force and the navy's equipment have been changing the dumplings. The field army looked at various high-tech appearances, and it was tickle. Now that I know this robot, I am not happy to find the North."

"..."

chapters.title: Chapter 516: : Battle Armor Design
chapters.body:
Chapter 516: : Battle Armor Design

Chen Mo is still very confident about the robot. The technology contained in the robot has surpassed the current technology and is definitely a killer-level equipment.

The war robots were handed over to the ants for defense and military ants, and he also put his mind back into the study of the armor.

In the experimental room, in front of Chen Mo, a holographic projection armor is suspended, and he has been conducting research on the development of the battle armor.

Since the science and technology library blocked all the design drawings and data in the authority, he only gave him the theory and principle, so he could only complete the design by himself.

Now the holographic projection in front of him is the shape design of the armor.

Smooth and soft lines that minimize air resistance and a sense of power. Behind the armor, there are two arm-thickness ions to start the engine, arms and feet, all with small ion engines.

The exquisite instrument of the size of the bowl at the chest is the reaction furnace, which can convert high-energy beta particles into electric energy and provide the ion engine of the armor as a power source.

The fuel of the reaction furnace is the ectopic material No. 108, a ectopic element crystal material modified by high-energy laser pulse of indium element, and an unconventional element capable of releasing high-energy beta particles.

Due to limited space, the armor's circuit is designed inside the components, and the complex normal temperature superconducting circuit, like the human veins, is embedded in the armor components.

The battle armor is painted with black as the main color, mixed with blood red, black and red painting, adding a lot of mysterious colors to the armor.

Every part is carefully designed, the joints are extremely fine, and some places need to be seamlessly joined. There are nano-scale 3D printers. These components are complex and precise, but they can be easily implemented.

"Unfortunately, there is no wind tunnel, and it is impossible to do wind tunnel experiments." Chen Mo appreciates the newly-designed armor design, which is slightly regrettable: "It seems that it is necessary to build a wind tunnel. Otherwise, there will always be insufficient research on other aircraft."

To carry out such high-end research, it is impossible to borrow wind tunnels from the official. Only by computer simulation, the curvature of each line of the armor can be determined to minimize the wind resistance.

Reactors and ion engines are the most difficult technologies for armor. As long as these two technologies are completed, other materials technologies are not too big a problem.

"Ink girl, put all the theoretical formulas of the reactor out."

Chen Mo sat in the chair in the middle of the lab, carefully appreciating the shape of the armor that had just been designed, and the ink girl also walked behind Chen Mo.

The next moment, the shape design of the armor disappeared, and the entire laboratory screen was covered with various complicated formulas, together with holographic projections, and some formulas were projected and suspended in the air.

There are at least a thousand formulas that make people scalp numb. None of the formulas are the same, but many formulas are similar in style between adjacent formulas and seem to have some connection.

Chen Mo raised his eyes, and the definitions behind all the formulas and various algorithms all came to his mind. After the evolution of the brain domain, his understanding ability has become very crazy, and the speed of thinking now has surpassed that of the current people.

A formula, like a spider web, is connected in his mind, and his thoughts are becoming more and more clear. His formulas are flashing in his mind.

The ink girl behind her did not bother, Chen Mo turned and continued to stand behind him, watching him quietly.

An hour later, after the last formula was connected in his mind, Chen Mocai stopped, and his tired head was covered with fine sweat on his forehead.

All the formulas have been sorted out, and the connections and calculations between them are derived in the mind. The brain runs at high speed without interruption, and his consumption is not generally large.

There is a feeling that CPu is running hot for a long time, and his consumption is very large. Wiping off the fine sweat on his forehead, Chen Mocai continued to look up at the formula in the laboratory.

"Ink girl, help me to derive the formula." Chen Mo said.

"Good." The ink girl immediately agreed.

"C1, D3, H2, these three formulas are added and combined, replaced by a new function, first differential, and the formula D5 vector product is substituted into the function..."

These formulas are all formulas of the reaction furnace and belong to the principle of the reaction furnace. The most basic mathematical models must be sorted out before they can be studied.

In the laboratory, Chen Mo and Mo Nu, began joint calculations and derived theoretical formulas for the reactor. On the screen, the mathematical model of various functions is also built by the holographic projection suspended in the air of the laboratory, looking very mysterious.

......

The emergence of war robots, with the report of Liu Jianjun, has attracted the attention of the top.

Seeing the amazing performance of the No. 003 robot, the high-level discussion, let Liu Jianjun quickly contact with the ants defense and military ants equipment company to test the robot's weapon system.

At this time, on a large heavy weapon test site, Zhu He and Zhong Lei were present. They acted as representatives of the workers' ants defense and military ants equipment to carry out relevant weapons tests. And beside them, Li Chengzhi, Liu Jianjun and others.

In front of them are two war robots, and several weapons experts, who are installing ammunition.

Unlike the robots brought by Chen Mo, the artificial skin of these two robots is not attached to the robot body. The whole body is made of metal structure, which is quite a bare metal.

The silver-white metal case, with a special look, has a special texture and is very delicate.

Experts on the field know that this metal is a new material, only the special metal, this beautiful texture will appear. In the joint part, it is the protection of the layered metal sheet. If the protected metal piece is removed, the electrostrictive material of the joint is milky white.

The structure of the magazine is exposed.

The weapon installation is very simple, that is, the loading of ammunition, bullets and bombs, entering a password, and activating the robot's weapon system program.

Zhu He is introducing the specific performance of the robot to Liu Jianjun and Li Chengzhi. At the beginning, Chen Mo was only a rough test and explained the related functions, and did not elaborate.

This work was done by Zhu He.

Chen Mo has opened a channel for them. They also know that Chen Mo’s time will not cost too much to talk about business, so they need them to complete these transactions.

“This instrument is the control terminal. The control terminal can select the mode of the robot or turn off the power of the robot. When the power is turned off by the control terminal, it will have a standby state, which is convenient for the control terminal to pass the signal again to activate the robot. Note that The machine is powered off and the machine cannot be turned on via the console."

Zhu He handed Liu Jianjun with a watch-like instrument.

“In case of signal shielding area?” Liu Jianjun asked.

"In the signal shielding area, there are two states that can be set in advance. One is the free state. In the free state, the instructions made by its kernel intelligence make judgments.

In another state-controlled state, when the signal disappears, it automatically abandons its task and returns to the area where the control signal last appeared. If the console is destroyed and loses command control, within its program, you can set an aggregation point in advance, which will automatically return to the aggregation point. Avoid being in enemy areas and falling into the hands of the enemy.

But the premise of returning to the gathering point is that it has to go back within the scope of its capabilities. If the gathering point is in the sea or water it cannot reach, it will not be able to return, only within its capabilities, from the gathering point. The nearest place is waiting. ”

Zhu He gave a detailed answer to the robot. Before she came, she also did her homework.

"When the war mode, will it accidentally hurt yourself?" Liu Jianjun asked.

"In war mode, it will not actively attack four kinds of people: it will not attack people who have no weapons in their hands. It defines weapons, such as firearms, ammunition, knives and other deadly weapons; it will not actively attack old and young people; it will not actively attack. Be defined as a member of the party; will not attack the enemy who surrendered;

In many cases, it will be accidentally injured. First, when it attacks, oneself suddenly appears in its attack range, and it will be accidentally injured if it is too late to interrupt the attack. Second, members of their own clothing wear enemy costumes and attack them with weapons. It will be countered by enemy attacks. Third, when a large-scale attack occurs, the enemy position has its own members.

Any weapon or equipment may be wiped out, and the head should understand this truth. This is absolutely not true. If it is during the war, let alone robots, even if it is a person, in the above circumstances, it is possible to misjudge and accidentally injure teammates. ”

Liu Jianjun nodded and agreed.

When people are nervous, the possibility of misjudgment may be higher than that of the robot. Sometimes the situation is inevitable, and anyone may be injured.

"If it is judged by its members to attack it?"

"It will make a non-fatal attack, stun or anesthesia to the person who attacks it, and then hand it over to the console to determine what to do next. In the absence of the console, it will grab the person back to the gathering point."

"How do you let it be a friend or an enemy?"

"Clothing, equipment, this is the most basic way of judging. If this method of judgment can not determine the identity of the enemy, it will be regarded as a neutral person, it is judged as a neutral person, there is a weapon in hand, it is best to let go, so as not to cause mistakes Judging that once it attacks it, it will fight back as an enemy."

"Is there any way to make it clear that it is a member of the team when it is not replaced with enemy equipment and clothing?" Liu Jianjun asked.

There are all kinds of possibilities on the battlefield, and he needs to understand all of this.

"Yes, two ways, one is to store your own facial information in its information base in advance, through face recognition, confirmed as a member of the team, he will help. The second is to wear this."

Zhu He took out a wristwatch from the equipped box. The color wristwatch is made of metal and has a minimalist style, which is in line with the aesthetics of the military.

"This wristwatch has only one function. It has a small chip inside. It is detected by the robot after activation and will be regarded as one of its own personnel."

"If this wristwatch is taken by the enemy?"

"What we can do is that after the same wristwatch is activated, it can only be recognized once and the second time is invalid. It recognizes that the activation of the wristwatch itself will send the information back to the terminal, and the wristwatch is invalid.

As for other actions, the control terminal issues an order, and there is no free state of the console command. If the identified person is seriously injured, it will save the person. If you are free to act, it will not attack or be treated unless the identified person calls for help. It will determine that you need treatment and choose to save people. ”

Hearing here, Liu Jianjun was satisfied with the nod.

Obviously at the time of design, Chen Mo has already thought of the various possibilities that appear on the battlefield, try to avoid all kinds of possible occurrences, and the other is how they control the use of the problem.

It is up to them to decide when to use the robot, and at the same time the possibility of various coincidences can be minimized.

"The weapon installation is complete." When Zhu He introduced the weapon to Liu Jianjun and others, several weapons experts also completed the installation of weapons and ammunition.

"Get started." Liu Jianjun looked at Zhong Lei and Zhu He.

chapters.title: Chapter 517: : First Order
chapters.body:
Chapter 517: : First Order

"The power of the robot fist. The weight of the fist is 20 times that of the average person. In the case of power storage, the highest record we can test can reach 1250 kg."

Zhu He opened the test state to the robot and walked to the front of the strength tester. As soon as the words fell, the robot slammed into the strength tester.

Seeing the number of beating above, everyone’s heart sighed.

1230Kg!

This fist, if you lie on the human body, there is no life, it is a metamorphosis, even if Liu Jianjun and Li Chengzhi know the horror of the robot, it still feels terrible.

"On his palm, there is an electric shock attack. The high-voltage generator produces a strong electric shock of more than 40,000 volts, which causes the attacker to generate strong contact inductance, numbness, weakness, instantaneous loss of attack capability, design according to police standards, low current. Low will not cause damage to the attacker.

There is also an anesthetic attack in the palm of your hand. When the palm of the hand grasps the attacker, a three-mm needle is ejected to pierce the attacker's skin and inject a little instant anesthetic to disable the attacker. ”

These two functions, Chen Mo has a brief introduction. They have analyzed the composition of the immediate anesthetic, do have immediate anesthesia, and are harmless to the human body.

The standard of electric shock, they also tested.

"The next step is his hot weapon system." Zhu He let the position open and was taken over by Zhong Lei.

Wang Hai and Zhong Lei were sent to Tanzanyi to control and manage the military ants equipment company, and the ammunition of the weapon system was produced by them.

"Thermal weapon system, including the barrel of two arms, fifty smart bullets, eight smart bombs in the waist magazine, four small smart missiles in the back magazine, and high-energy lasers in the navel.

The intelligent bullet has a bullet with automatic guidance. The warhead is equipped with a miniature ballistic computer and a battery. The warhead is a laser-guided warhead and a movable brake tail.

It can automatically identify the target, track the target, and hit the target 1.5 kilometers away under the laser guidance of the robot. The error is no more than 0.3 meters, and the precision is very high, which can hit the air target. ”

Zhong Lei took out a finger-sized bullet and handed it to Liu Jianjun.

Zhu He pointed to the target that was tied to the air by the drone and gave the robot an attack command. Once finished, the robot raised his hand and fired it. In less than a second, the target appeared red smoke.

Surprised.

Even the top sniper can't do a shot, killing the target flying in the air, basically seeing people, killing. Fifty rounds of bullets are simply war butchers.

"The eight smart bombs are moving smart bombs. They are equipped with sensors. After they are thrown out, they can be rolled to the designated location according to the robot's control, and the robot or the control terminal will detonate.

There is also a small intelligent missile behind it, which is also guided by laser. As long as the robot can see it, it can be hit, to the ground, to the air. The highly concentrated ammunition is enough to blow up the tank's track and shoot down the plane. It has a range of two kilometers. ”

After demonstrating the smart bombs and small smart missiles, the weapons experts on the field could not help but marvel.

so horrible.

All are smart weapons, and it is almost certain that the installation of these smart ammunition is almost rock solid. In addition to high-altitude aircraft and maritime warships, other weapons have a single battle.

The war robot, the name is no more relevant, it is simply born for war.

"Is the bullet used to equip the regular troops?"

"The price of smart bullets is 800, the size of a small intelligent missile is 80,000, and the smart bomb is 4,500."

When he heard Zhong Lei, Liu Jianjun secretly screamed and didn't know what to say. Although this work is exquisite workmanship and powerful, the price is not generally high. The conventional army equipment is simply burning money.

The bullet of the optical robot is about 40,000 yuan, which is still a consumable product. Sure enough, this thing is not something that ordinary people can afford.

But expensive also has its own truth.

Once equipped, this kind of robot is almost invincible on the ground. In the real war, the result won by it will be much higher than his consumption. There is no doubt about the price/performance ratio.

There are also high-energy laser weapons, and Zhong Lei also introduced it again, mainly relying on the gain medium sea bream, so that the laser has such a great power.

As for the micro-detection radars, Chen Mo has already introduced it, and Zhu He re-introduced it again.

After all the performance tests and inspections, Liu Jianjun was excited to wipe the sweat. It has not been so exciting for a long time. If you really equip these war robots, the current war can be almost invincible.

"If the robot orders go down, when can I deliver?" Liu Jianjun asked.

"For the robot platform, if the number of orders is less than 20, after the completion of the production line for the ants defense, one month can be delivered. The appearance of the robot, you can provide 3D face data to customize, or we give The robot customizes facial information."

"Weapons in the weapon system can be made at any time. Looking at the quantity of the order, we can give a clear delivery time."

Both Zhu He and Zhong Lei gave clear answers.

Their arsenal has just started and is expanding. If there is a transaction, it is also a revenue, at least not all of the cash support at headquarters.

"Well, let's talk about the order. We are going to order 10 robots and 300 sets of weapons and ammunition for the first time. How long will it take." Liu Jianjun said.

"Because the arsenal is not finished, the speed will be slower and can be completed in 40 days." Zhu He said.

"300 sets of weapons, you can give it to you in a week." Zhong Lei said.

"Well, how many robots there are, how many can be provided first, and the rest, delivered within the contract period." Liu Jianjun said.

Talk about related matters, as well as some provisions, Zhu He and Zhong Lei were escorted by the team members and left the weapons test base.

"One opening 10 sets, 300 sets of weapons, very refreshing." On the way back, Zhong Lei opened.

"This is only the first batch, used to test the training, wait for the sweetness, and there will be a steady stream of orders. The future war is a high-tech war, which is better than us. The robots, which have high Science and technology can completely dominate the direction of local warfare. Spending this money can improve the combat effectiveness of a grade. It has a tactical level card, which is sure to be refreshing." Zhu He said.

"You have to prepare for the next military exhibition. That is the real beginning. It will be a blockbuster when it comes time."

"It seems that the ambition is not small." Zhu He smiled and said: "How is your development?"

"All goes well, that is, the engineer is missing."

"me too……"

The two people looked at each other and smiled. They all know that this industry is not difficult to mix. If there is no boss to provide technical support behind it, there is no place for the cone.

“The first 10 robots? 300 sets of weapons? A good start.”

Chen Mo was a little surprised to hear the number of orders from Zhu He and Zhong Lei.

According to his expectations, the first batch of orders may be five robots, and then the trial will gradually increase the order. Now the first batch of 10 sets, indicating that the above is willing to pay the blood, after the robot performance is confirmed, the future orders will definitely not be less. .

There is nothing unusual about the war robots that can be sold. The high-tech that it possesses is released. Even if the price is doubled, some people will definitely buy it.

It is hard to beat iron, and technology is the last word.

"Let's continue."

After the surprise, Chen Mo continued to focus on his own research. At this time, the laboratory's mid-air is suspended with various mathematical models.

This is the hundreds of mathematical models derived from the theoretical formula of the reactor. Chen Mo also checked it again and there was no error. These mathematical models represent the meaning of reality, and he is clear.

For more than ten days, he has been turning around these models. He needs to apply the data of these models to the actual situation and design a reaction furnace.

The thoughts during this time have already made him a clue. Now it is in this direction, let the rough model of the reactor slowly form and refine in his mind.

Not long after, Chen Mo seems to find a little feeling, and is determined to stand in place.

At this time, Chen Mo kept thinking about his head and the speed was running at a rapid speed. If it is not the evolution of the brain domain, this speed of thinking can directly let Chen Mo's nervous fatigue faint.

The ink girl next to it saw him and walked gently behind him.

An hour later, Chen Mocai looked up and sat back in the office chair with some exhaustion: "Ink girl, come help me design the reaction furnace."

chapters.title: Chapter 518: : Robot Square?
chapters.body:
Chapter 518: : Robot Square?

“Perfect, it’s a perfect piece of art.”

A certain research institute, Lu Xin surrounded the robot on the test bench, and his eyes were shining, as if enjoying the supreme art, not a robot.

I have never seen such a perfect robot. Compared with this robot, the weapons they designed are just like the smashing piles.

Naturally, perfect, and unrestrained.

The vocabulary he can think of is used on this robot and is completely appropriate. Being able to encounter this perfect robot feels like a gift from heaven.

He has the same expression as him, and several experts in the team.

Everyone is like a work of art, admiring the design of every part of the robot, carefully scrupulously, for fear of breaking.

This is the most perfect work they have seen in their reverse research and development career.

Liu Jianjun did not bother at the side, quietly watching the experts around. He also saw this team for the first time, revealing this expression of admiration and exclamation.

After a long time, many experts appreciate it, Liu Jianjun said: "How?"

Lu Xun’s voice is full of appreciation and amazement, and there is a bit of incomprehensible complexity: “This robot, all over the body is high-tech, has surpassed all the robots in the past, where did it come from? Is foreign technology so horrible? ?"

Liu Jianjun pointed to the sign printed on the top of the robot, the emblem of the marching ant head plus shield: "Not foreign, it is the defense of workers."

"Worker ant defense? Which large military enterprise? We didn't seem to have heard it?" Lu Xin was puzzled and looked at the team members next to him. The people also shook their heads in confusion.

“Working ants defense is a newly established subsidiary of the Army Ant Group, which is responsible for opening up the military industry market.”

Liu Jianjun’s explanation made everyone stunned.

They have heard of the marching ant group, and even studied the enchanting robots of the marching ant group. Many of the technologies involved are unconstrained and let them admire. Unexpectedly, this robot is now an army ant, or a war robot in the military field.

This robot should be designed by Chen Mo to have this ultimate perfect design.

“Can you reverse engineering?” Liu Jianjun asked.

"it should be OK."

Lu Xin nodded, any complicated machine equipment, as long as there is a real thing, there is the possibility of reverse research and development.

"Materials are good, the material formula can be cracked, the marching ant group should apply for patents, and the material technology that cannot be cracked. Chen Mo will definitely be kept secret. We can replace or buy them with other materials. But the most difficult is the robotic smart core. The intelligent core of the robot can't be copied. Without the intelligent core, the robot is faked, and at most there is no soul shell."

"The intelligent core of the marching ant group can not be easily cracked. At present, no team has announced that it has successfully cracked the intelligent core technology of the marching ant group. Their encryption algorithm is intelligent." One expert added.

"Intelligent cores can be developed by themselves, but there is absolutely no intelligent high in the marching ant group." Lu Xin said.

They have all seen test videos and data about robots. It can be said that this robot can be described as metamorphosis.

"What we need is the accumulation of robot design technology, and lay the foundation for designing robots in the future. As for the intelligent core, the ship is naturally straight to the bridge." Liu Jianjun said.

These robots are produced by the Worker Ant Defense Company. The technology is in China and there is no need for imitation. They need to accumulate more robotics, be familiar with robot design, and not be technically out of touch.

Now it's near the water floor. At this time, it doesn't accumulate a bit of technology. With the pace of the army ant group, it can't be said.

"Liu Shouchang, Liu Shouchang, there is an important notice on it." When Liu Jianjun asked several experts, a rushing voice interrupted him.

"it is good."

Liu Jianjun hurriedly followed the comers back to the office, picked up the red phone on the desk, and heard the contents of the notice. Liu Jianjun’s body was shocked, his face was serious, and he nodded.

"The big head said, if you can? Let the war robots appear in this military parade?"

Hearing the news told by Liu Jianjun, Li Chengzhi was very surprised, but when he thought about it, he was relieved. Through the wars of various regions of the world in these years, one big trend can be judged:

The war of the future is a high-tech war.

The performance of war robots is beyond their imagination, which is typical of high technology.

"My order is only a short time. In the past two weeks, there are only four war robots available on the ants defense. How many robots are needed for the military parade?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"As much as possible, it is best to have this number." Liu Jianjun extended a finger and whispered.

"100 units? A small square array, not many and many. Just the robot production factory for worker ants defense is not completely completed, they can guarantee that the quality of this order is a problem."

"According to the current speed of worker ants defense, it is definitely impossible to complete, so I came to you. There are still three months from the military parade. In order to be safe, you go to Chen Mo to ask."

Liu Jianjun spread his hands.

"These times give Chen Mo, he can develop a technology. For him, if you want to ensure the quality to complete these orders, it should be no problem. The efficiency of his marching ant group is terrible and scary. You are specifically contacting him. People, you go the best."

"In case he can't do anything about it?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"The big head said, if you can. The big head must know the production problem of the war robot, and will say the words 'if you can'. The meaning is as much as possible. If not, 20 should be OK. The number of war robots Sooner or later, what you need is the deterrent force of the war robot after exposure. So you will choose the node of the military parade."

Now the ants defense has delivered 4 war robots, and they have done the most comprehensive inspection of war robots. All the performance is the same as that introduced by Chen Mo.

It can be said that with such robots, they can control the direction of the war. Air supremacy is very important and can even influence the direction of war, but the war on the ground is fundamental.

The war robot is undoubtedly the killer on the land. Once exposed, it is enough to form an invisible deterrent to the enemy.

Nowadays, at a critical moment in the rise of China, they need greater deterrence.

After the robot test is completed and all the data are out, the above is already planned, and the order for the war robot is added. The head of the big head can read some information, determine the order of the additional robot, and hope to form a small square in the military parade.

Let the war robots appear on the military parade without showing the performance of the robot. With the sci-fi, high-tech and mystery of the robot itself, it is enough to form psychological pressure on some people.

"I think so too, then I can only be cheeky and go again, my life is running."

"You still laugh at yourself? I don't know how many people are willing to do your hard work. You look at you. After a few years of running, the wind has risen, and in a few years, I have resisted Venus." Liu Jianjun glanced at him with contempt.

Li Cheng laughed and got up and simply packed up.

"I am lucky. If this is done, you remember to ask me to drink."

chapters.title: Chapter 519: : Free Advertising
chapters.body:
Chapter 519: : Free Advertising

"Do you want to add an order? So fast?"

Chen Mo was surprised to see Li Chengzhi. The first order was signed with the worker ants defense. Ten robots did not seem to provide complete, and now the order is added.

"Additional order, Zhu He, don't you talk about it yourself, come over and look for me?"

“The production line construction was not completed and it was impossible to complete the order within their expectations.” Zhu He smiled. She was also very helpless, so she followed Li Chengzhi to report.

"So urgent? So much?"

Chen Mo is very surprised.

According to him, the robot production line can take more than one month at most, and it can be fully put into use. There is no way to complete the order within the expected time. It should be time-critical or large.

"It will be completed in two and a half months." Li Chengzhi said.

"Two and a half months? Military parade?"

Chen Mo instantly thought of the key point. Three months later, it was an important anniversary parade. This time, it is so urgent that it is estimated that the robot will appear in the capital at the ceremony, show it to the whole world, and also give the outside world a deterrent.

After all, it is a robot, something that is not available in the world, mystery, science fiction, and unknown. It is an invisible shock.

“How many are you going to?”

"It is best to have 100 units." Li Chengzhi said.

"A small square, the number is not much, why not a little more? More deterrent and momentum." Chen Mo asked.

"Do you think we don't want to? You have a robot of 100 million, a complete square, 乖乖, 35 billion, not including weapons and ammunition, and post-maintenance. Consider the actual demand, increase the number step by step. What's important is that you can produce so much in two and a half months?" Li Chengzhi asked.

Chen Mo looked at Zhu He: "Zhu He, two and a half months, how many units can you produce on the ant defense?"

“There is still one month, the production line is all completed. In one and a half months, the maximum production capacity is 50.” Zhu He thought about it and gave a rough figure: “The factory has just started, this is the limit number.”

"You can guarantee the quality on the other side, how much can be produced, and the rest can be filled up here." Chen Mo thought and said: "Lie Ge, how about a discussion for you?"

"What is the discussion?"

"100 robots, I can produce them for you."

"That would be great." He answered with a positive answer from Chen Mo, Li Chengzhi was overjoyed.

"But 100 sets, the square array looks like a small family, to a little shock. I produced the extra part of the robot, renting you to form a larger square."

"What are the conditions?"

Li Chengzhi squinted at Chen Mo, did not know this guy, and made up his mind in the head.

"Fifty thousand pieces are rented to you, the military parade is completed, and the robot is still on my way." Chen Mo laughed.

"so good?"

"It's so good, is it?" Chen Mo asked.

Such a good opportunity is simply a free advertisement. The emergence of the robot square appears in front of the world, and it will undoubtedly cause a big sensation. It is almost free to advertise the ants defense, or a national-level advertisement, and there is money to collect. It is not natural to grasp this opportunity.

In one fell swoop, the name of the worker ant defense was played out, and later the production of the export version of the war robot was simply more enjoyable than robbery. This kind of high-tech, even if it is a reduced version, still surpasses the current technology and technology, and there is no buyer.

"I have to report it to my superiors. I can't take the idea of the military parade. Are you sure you are renting us for 50,000?"

"of course."

"That's it, but this time the robot order has a request."

"Well, you said."

"These robots don't use artificial skin to disguise themselves as real people, directly retain the shape of the metal, paint ourselves, the machine bones of the face, without the shape of the skull, change the metal shape of the adult face, you can design a face yourself. The styling, send the image to me."

Li Chengzhi understands the above meaning, the robot disguised as a real person, do not expose it for the time being, maybe at what time, this is an unexpected means of an enemy.

"Change a face mold, this is no problem." Chen Mo immediately agreed. The face does not need to be disguised as a real person, saving the steps of the skin camouflage, can save a lot of time.

"I finally confirmed it, you rented a robot to us, can you rent a few?" Li Chengzhi asked, this is definitely an unexpected gain.

"This is not certain, there should be more than 100 units, depending on the actual situation, the cost of the robot is not low, the material is expensive and expensive. I have spent so much money to help, as for whether or not, I will see you, I Can only help this," Chen Mo said.

The extra robot, he can't use it. Not to mention the robot order in the future, his enchanting robot on the 1st floor should also be replaced.

Estimating the world, he is so extravagant.

Talking about specific matters and requirements, Li Chengzhi left, Zhu He simply reported on the work of worker ants defense, and then left.

"Do you want so much material?"

Zhao Min saw Chen Mo’s list for her and was shocked. The list of ink ladies listed has always been complete, and the average market price of the required materials will be on it.

This long list of prices, the price of more than one billion.

Even if you make a controlled fusion star ring, you don't need so much material.

"You want so much material, what big machine is it to make?" Zhao Min asked curiously.

"The official order of 100 robots, delivery within two and a half months, the ants defense can not be completed, come to me to help." Chen Mo said lightly.

"So I have to worry so many war robots? What's the big deal?" Zhao Min asked.

"What day is it three months later?"

"Oh, military parade."

Zhao Min suddenly realized that only the military parade was needed. The war robots debuted, and when they came to the world, they were shocking and small.

"Is the company's funds enough?" Chen Mo asked.

"Enough, the company has never lacked funds. The vaccine you developed last time earned a handful of bio-terrorism, saved countless people, gained popularity from the whole world, and indirectly benefited the group. The company's full-line product sales rose, and each Patent license fees, etc.

And the renovation of the holographic theater has been completed, and the construction of the first ant park is nearing completion. The progress of various projects is very smooth. When the holographic film is released, the ant park opens, and the funds we throw out will be quickly returned.

The current large-scale swallowing companies are only your swallowing beasts and company R&D departments, as well as controlled fusion projects and expanding military companies. Your own research and development funding, the consumption of the top three big projects. Zhao Min said.

The area of Chen Mo’s No. 1 building is constantly expanding. The company has a lot of money and has entered Chen Mo’s laboratory. His own research and development funds are three times that of the entire group's research and development department, so she occasionally called the No. 1 building as a 'swallowing gold beast', but there is also a saying of 'technical treasures'.

The technology in Building No. 1 has far surpassed the current technical level of human beings, which is the core of the marching ant group.

Therefore, even if the company is most short of money, it will reserve 100 billion in cash as Chen’s personal emergency reserve fund.

"What are you studying now? This time is mysterious? People have not seen it a few times, but found that you have eaten a few bowls." Zhao Min smiled.

Chen Moyi’s brain is black.

During this period of time, he developed the technology of the armor, the brain power consumption was very large, and the large amount of meals was normal. He did not expect to be ridiculed by Zhao Min.

"When you study it, you will know, beyond your imagination." Chen Mo keeps mysterious.

"Every time you exceed my imagination, pay attention to your body, don't get tired." Zhao Min looked at the list in his hand: "These materials, I will give orders to those companies, let them send them in five days, military parade. This kind of thing can be delayed."

chapters.title: Chapter 520: :Carry Out
chapters.body:
Chapter 520: :Carry Out

laboratory.

The holographic projection of an instrument is suspended in front of Chen Mo, the size of the bowl.

The exquisite design, the various components, the perfect texture, the instrument, looks more like a work of art.

This is the theoretical data obtained by Chen Mo. From the thousands of formulas and hundreds of mathematical models, the theoretical data is derived. With the help of the ink girl, the reaction furnace of the armor, one can convert the high-energy beta particles into A reactor for electrical energy.

For more than two months, with the help of the ink girl, Chen Mo has done his best to research and develop every day.

In theory, this reactor can release 3.6 billion joules of energy per second, enough to provide the energy supply needed for the armor. Through computer simulation, the reactor can already work, as long as it is manufactured, the armor's energy core is initially completed.

The Science and Technology Library has blocked the design drawings, technical parameters and various data of all technology products within his silver administrator's authority. Fortunately, the material formula of the technology products is still open. If Chen Mo is to develop those material technologies, it is enough for him to be busy.

The purpose of the existence of the science and technology library is to let Chen Mo, the successor, design his own technology, so that Chen Mo can continue to create and prevent him from eating the mountain and air, and finally cannot inherit the mission of the science and technology library.

The materials are formulated so that synthetic materials can be made as long as they are designed.

"Ink girl, is the material needed for the reaction furnace synthesized?" Chen Mo looked at the ink girl standing next to him.

"It has been synthesized." said the ink girl.

"Then start to print the reactor with the required materials according to the design."

In the past two months or so, every day except his home, he was the laboratory, and now he finally finished the reactor. The power of the armor is completed, and the next most important issue is the ion engine.

"Li Chengzhi is here." The ink woman reminded.

......

Outside the marching ant headquarters, four heavy trucks entered the gate and slowly approached the area where the first building was located. After the security personnel in Building No. 1 confirmed, four heavy trucks were allowed to approach the No. 1 building.

Song Yue came down from the leading car and glanced at the building of the headquarters of the Army Ant Group. There is no direct access to the building, the style of the building is minimal, and the style of the future is pleasing to the eye.

Before he came, he made a simple understanding. Building No. 1 is the core area of the marching ant group. Here is Chen Mo's personal laboratory. The area of Building No. 1 has been expanding with the marching ants, and now it occupies almost one-fifth of the headquarters of the army ants.

It is said that the top level of the marching ant group, without the permission of Chen Mo, could not enter the building of the area. How many black technologies are in Chen Mo’s lab has always been a mystery to the outside world.

"Li, the head of the security, this security is also strict enough, comparable to the secret base."

Song Yue patrolled the surrounding area, half of the robots, and half of the sturdy security guards, security level, not too high. Even the country's top laboratories are just that.

"You don't look at what is inside this building?" Li Chengzhi looked up at the first building: "If Chen Mo is open, two trillion will sell the whole building. I dare say no need to consider it. It will be bought immediately. The technology you have should be enough to accelerate the world's technology for at least thirty years."

"My sly." Song Yue secretly swears, what is the concept of two trillions, but he is very clear: "Li, the leader, have you ever been in? What is inside?"

"Going in and visiting once, the technology inside, I can't understand what to follow, just look at the novelty. But the security status inside is stricter than the outside. The marching ant group has the right to enter inside, and a few palms come over."

When the two chatted, Chen Mo and Mo Nu also came out from the first building and greeted the two.

"Lie Li, very punctual."

"Doing my job, punctuality is the basic requirement. This is Comrade Song Yue." After a simple chill, Li Chengzhi pulled over the introduction of Song Yue.

"Comrade Chen Mo, hello. I am Song Yue, this time I came to accept the order." Song Yue politely shook hands with Chen Mo.

"Hello, ink girl, put the container up."

Just finished, on the open space marked not far away, the ground suddenly opened, and four special containers rose slowly from the ground and stopped when they were completely exposed to the ground.

"Four boxes, a total of 240 robots."

These 240 robots are the production of the robot production workshop in the first building for more than two months. The workshop here is still too small, otherwise it can produce more.

The container opened and saw the uniform robot fixed in the container. Song Yue jumped and jumped. Although I was prepared, I saw 60 robots at once, but it was still a little shocking.

Gray-white metal, **** with a cold texture, just the shape gives people an unknown fear, this is the robot that is about to enter the military parade.

When thinking of nearly two hundred robots appearing at the military parade, Song Yue has a feeling of excitement.

"You spend more than 10 billion to make so many robots. Do you want to use this military parade to make an advertisement?" When Song Yue determined the number of robots, Li Chengzhi went to Chen Mo and asked.

When he just returned, he and Liu Jianjun guessed for a long time. Chen Murdu spent billions of dollars on manufacturing robots and rented them for almost half a month at a free price. Why?

Later, I came to think that Chen Mo might want to use this military parade to let the robot have enough powerful shock to expose it, which caused a sensation. Free national-level advertising, they have no publicity fees, but also to post a few million, Chen Mo's small abacus can be Liu Jianjun at that time.

"Nothing, I am purely a help. The extra robots will come to see the nursing home in the future." Chen Mo denied it. Anyway, it is right to die.

Seeing the appearance of Chen Mo, Li Chengzhi knows that the eighty-nine is not out of ten, just want to use this platform to advertise.

However, he did not care, and he certainly understood that Chen Mo’s intention of free-to-free lending was to open the name of the war robot. Since I agree to rent Chen Mo's robot, I don't care about it.

“This is a rental contract.” Ink handed the documents in hand to Li Chengzhi: “The worker ants provide 40 robots. We have 240 sets here, a total of 280. In addition to your original 100 orders, you rented 180 of us, half a time. In the month, the rent is 9 million."

"This is rent, after tax."

Li Chengzhi signed the name on the contract and handed out a cash check to Chen Mo.

"Exactly, I bought toys for my daughter." Chen Mo took the check unceremoniously.

"Would you like to go to the military parade?"

"Exemption, I am not suitable for going up, but it will attract people's attention. My wife and I will look at it below, and I will take it with my heart." Chen Mo smiled and refused.

"Also." Li Chengzhi did not reluctantly.

For a long time, Song Yue and others counted the four container robots, and confirmed that they were correct, and then loaded the car with the help of the crane, and left the marching ant group under the **** of the military dispatched team.

"Where are we going? Study or go home?"

"A rest for a long time, go to the unparalleled to buy a few toys." Seeing Li Chengzhi's team left, Chen Mo will then leave, and now the reactor is being built, he is not in a hurry to study.

chapters.title: Chapter 521: : Ink Id Card
chapters.body:
Chapter 521: : Ink Id Card

"Dad, what is that?"

"That is a yacht, you can take the unparalleled to the sea to play, and so on, next time, Dad takes the unparalleled to go out to see the sea."

"Dad, that bird fell into the water."

"That is a seagull, a seabird. It is not falling into the water. It is catching fish."

"Is it a mother? I don't like birds."

"The fish is a small fish in the sea, not a mother."

"Mom is not a small fish?"

"...Mom's name is Xiaoyu, but it is not a small fish swimming in the water. In the sea, there are many animals living in it. Fish is a kind. There are big fish, small fish, small shrimp, small turtle, big Crabs and big sharks."

"Mom will swim in the water, in the big pool at home, Dad, you see it, it’s beautiful!"

"..."

Hearing the dialogue between the father and the daughter on the grass, Xiao Yu couldn't help but laugh, but the picture was very harmonious.

Nowadays, the unparalleled growth of the unparalleled, the speech is very clear, is to know the age of the world, is curious about everything, and is much smarter than the children of the same age.

Usually Chen Mo work research, early and late return, only two hours in the evening to accompany the unparalleled, Chen Mo rarely to relax once, can be happy to the small unparalleled, now hanging on Chen Mo, do not let her hug, more words Quite a lot.

"Small fishing, where are the holidays going?" Chen Mo asked.

"This big holiday, people outside the mountains, do not go to play. With the unparalleled return to her grandparents to play, but also go back to see grandparents, the elderly are very miss children." Xiao Yu said.

They all asked their parents to come to settle in Binhai City. Unfortunately, the old people are old, and their ancestors are also in their hometown. People who don’t know here are not used to it. They don’t want to come over. They can only take time to take a look.

"Unparalleled."

When the two chatted, a voice came from behind. When several people turned back, they saw Zhao Min standing there, looking at Chen Mohuai’s little unparalleled smile.

"Min Min." Xiao Wusou saw Zhao Min, immediately broke away from Chen Mo's arms and ran up, and hugged her.

"This is for the unparalleled." Zhao Min handed a lollipop to the unparalleled.

"Thank you Min Min." Xiao Wushuang got a lollipop, and the music broke. He kissed Zhao Min’s face.

"What are you talking about?" Zhao Min walked with the unparalleled.

"Mom and Dad are talking about big holidays, Minhao, what is the big holiday?" asked the incomparable curiosity.

"Holiday is the time when your dad takes your mom and the unparalleled out."

“Do you want to go out and play with Min Mo?”

"Ink girl goes, Min Min can't go, Min Min wants to work." Zhao Min touched the unparalleled little face, and like a little fisherman, the smart and clever scorpion has the shadow of Chen Mo, very cute.

"I still work, have a holiday?" Chen Mo asked.

"It’s just a busy day, I can take a break. But when the holidays are over, I’m busy. The construction of the Ant Paradise is coming to an end. I’m working now, I hope to open the Ant Park before the New Year.

The holographic city project, at the most critical time, and the holographic cinema transformation were also completed, waiting for the first holographic film to be released. Now that I am just busy, it is a holiday, I will not talk to you about work. I am here to see my daughter. ”

Zhao Min sat in the unparalleled, and teased her to play.

"Do you not go out for a holiday? Let's go to the capital with us and see the big military parade. It is rare to receive an invitation." Chen Mo said.

"Go and see your love and love, is it a light bulb? I don't want it."

"You are not the first time."

"You are a bastard."

Zhao Min gave him a look and couldn't wait to kill this guy.

"Don't look at me, the unparalleled is very smart now. If you grow up, you have to go to kindergarten. Have you ever thought about where to go to school?"

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu looked at each other, which is a problem they have been worried about. If you grow up, you will need a little more growth environment for your peers. It will have a good impact on your mind and personality. Going to school is a must.

"I have seen the kindergartens in Binhai City. The children of the aristocratic kindergartens are a bit squeamish, some special bears, and the teacher's reputation is not very good. There are no kindergartens with good environmental facilities at home, and it is inconvenient to go to other cities." Said the fisherman.

"This is a problem. Don't worry, there is still some time. It is a big deal to buy a kindergarten and hire a teacher. Security and education are guaranteed.

The little guy’s father is so powerful, and the current level of knowledge, even the most advanced research institutes, can’t keep up with him. We have the conditions to create a school in the future, and find ways to teach ourselves so that her knowledge level can at least keep up with Dad's footsteps and become a super smart new human. ”

Zhao Min’s proposal made Xiao Yu’s eyes shine.

The current level of knowledge and education will certainly not meet the requirements of Chen Mo, and Chen Mo will not let the unparalleled like other rich children, only satisfied with the current elite education.

......

Capital High Speed Railway Station.

Chen Mo holding the unparalleled from the exit, the ink girl was by his side, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min followed behind the two, talking and laughing.

It has already entered the autumn, the weather in the capital is cold, and the small fisherman wears a beige high-necked thin sweater, black slacks, and a small school bag, which looks simple and refreshing. Zhao Min has a long trench coat, long boots, wearing a mask to avoid being recognized, or a cold goddess temperament. The ink girl also changed her usual tight-fitting blouse, wearing a long-sleeved tight-fitting red T-shirt and a deep blue high-waisted denim.

The unique temperament of the three women became the scenery in the crowd, which attracted a lot of attention and was envious of Chen Mo. Fortunately, Chen Mo wears a mask and glasses, and he is dressed casually. He can't recognize him without careful examination.

Zhao Min’s holiday was a one-on-one. Under the strong invitation of Xiao Yu, he finally decided to come out and take a look.

Out of the high-speed rail station, the special car prepared by the bodyguard has been waiting outside. Under the leadership of the Black Hawk, several people boarded the car and left.

This is the first golden week after the complete elimination of the Riedeman virus. Some people have been afraid to run around for a few months, the virus has been eliminated, and the shadow in the heart has slowly recovered.

The crowds of this holiday came out and there were crowds of people everywhere.

The most important thing is that this time there was an annual military parade. There were a lot of people in the capital. The atmosphere that can be seen on the street was very active and festive. However, there were quite a few police officers in security. It was almost a five-step, one-step, ten-step whistle. The entire capital has been martial law.

chapters.title: Chapter 523: : Willing To Be In The Flower Home
chapters.body:
Chapter 523: : Willing To Be In The Flower Home

At the beginning of the ceremony, everyone's eyes were on the big screen not far away. The picture above is the picture of the square at the moment. As the lens moves, it has already landed at the tower.

It was quiet all around, and the eyes were locked on the screen with expectations.

Welcome to the moment when the song is ringing, the leader headed by the head of the big, all entered, walked to the side of the tower to stop, watching the atmosphere of the square celebration, everyone has a smile like a spring breeze.

As the host of the conference, under the attention of everyone, Cai Qi arranged the dress a little and walked over to the microphone: “The capitals from all walks of life celebrate the 80th anniversary of the establishment of China. Now, start the salute!”

Cai Qi’s thick and solemn voice spread throughout the square, and the conference officially began. The fifty-six salutes were ringing!

Boom! ! !

The sound of the heavy sound shook through the sky and echoed for a long time. On the occasion of the roar of the first salute, the National Flag Guard departed from the Heroes Monument and walked towards the base of the flagpole.

Every step is neat and uniform, solemn and solemn.

In the entire square, except for the heavy salute, only the solemn footsteps of the guards were left, as if every step was on the mind of everyone, and everyone did not consciously look at the monument behind them.

From the monuments cast by the heroes' ancestors to the flesh and blood, to the flagpoles flying on the flag, this road is not long, but it is the vast road that countless ancestors smashed.

The thick and solemn footsteps make the scene and the audience who want to watch the live broadcast in front of the TV, awe.

Today's glory is yesterday's ancestors, with sweat and sweat, every inch of land under the feet, carrying the expectations and aspirations of the ancestors, very thick.

In front of the flagpole base, the guards received the guns and stood upright, neat body, tall and straight, like the backbone of the ancestors and the soul of the soul, shining in the sun.

"All stand up, raise the national flag, play the national anthem!"

At the moment when the national anthem horn sounded, many people felt that their eyes were hot.

The picture of the blood of the ancestors in the war, it seems that on the eve, the horn of the soul of the soul whispers, echoing in the square.

The Monument to Heroes became extremely tall in the horn of the national anthem. It seems that it can be clearly seen. One by one, they stood up in the ruins of the battlefield and sprinted toward the battlefield. After the victory, I looked at the rising sun and tomorrow, as well as the flag that fluttered in the wind and was stained with blood.

All solemn, solemn and thick national anthem, like the unyielding cry of the ancestors, that is the unyielding voice of the entire China.

At the moment when the national anthem stopped, the red flag was already at the top of the flagpole, facing the wind, and mapping in the sun.

In the warm light, everyone seems to be able to hear the figure of the ancestors fighting in the ruins, falling down, standing up again, leaving blood and smoke, and the cheers of the final victory.

It is an unyielding strong song, in exchange for the whole nation today, a kind of faith that stands up, with the hopes and aspirations of the ancestors, rises and rises.

The Great Wall is long and the outside of the Great Wall is home...

Far away songs, piercing time, lingering in the ear for a long time.

The soldiers on the field, seeing the flying red flag, seemed to feel the sense of inheritance from the blood of the ancestors, inexplicably moved, tears in full bloom.

The path that ancestors opened with blood is now guarded by them. The silent faith, like bone blood, invades everyone's heart and flesh, and is passed down from generation to generation.

When I think of the motherland of today, I don’t feel a little proud. She may not be the most perfect, but it is the most worthy of care.

"This life has no regrets into China, and the future is willing to plant flowers."

"Huaxia, stand up."

"Predecessors, this flourishing world, as you wish."

"At this moment, I don't want to cry."

The audience on the scene, as well as the audience in front of the TV computer, have an inexplicable touch, a silent belief, as if everyone is ringing.

After the eight-minute speech, the military parade has begun.

The eyes of countless spectators followed the figure of the red flag car and landed on the people's soldiers on the road. The tall and straight body, the uniform team, the face is stubborn, the discipline is strict, and the sheath is the sword.

The mighty teacher.

Seeing this scene, some viewers did not consciously straighten their waists, and their hearts were serious.

The foreign guests on the field saw this team, their eyes were complicated, and their hearts were sighing.

There is no discipline for that team, better than them. Once fighting, this discipline will become fighting power. It is hard to imagine what would happen if their national army fought such a team.

It is no accident that a team full of faith can have China today. Taking advantage of people's harmony, this is a division of constant victory.

They can even clearly feel the pride and joy of the Chinese people around them.

Some diplomats, through live viewing, or live broadcast, or broadcast to see this scene, are already calculating, and then how to further the relationship with China.

This is a rising power, a wake-up dragon that no one can stop.

"Today, we will witness the new era of China under the monument of immortality, and listen to the Shengshihuazhang of the Chinese children with full of pride.

Today's China, is the victorious ancestors who rushed to call and devote themselves to China's summer; today's China is a step by step, countless people, **** and sweaty China; today's China, is the countless martyrs to go forward, **** battle to fight out of China. ”

On the occasion of the return of the great head to the tower, the voice of the hostess sounded, followed by Zhu Quan’s voice.

"In the past eighty years, the ups and downs, the belief and inheritance of the Chinese military spirit have remained unchanged, and always adhere to the forefront of the motherland. This group of lovely people sheltered us from the wind and rain, and we have thousands of families, laughter and laughter. Behind them is peace, before them is war; they are behind the borders, behind them is the land..."

Behind them is peace, and there is war in front of them; they are the frontiers at the foot and the land behind them. In a word, telling infinite hardships and beliefs.

"They are the frontiers at their feet, and they are the land behind them. This paragraph is a hand, and I said tears today."

"Those lovely people are always so cute."

"Our country may have flaws, but it is the most beautiful. She is slowly getting better, not at a glance."

"..."

Countless netizens saw this scene, and their hearts were mixed. Behind their peace today is those who are obscured, in countless days and nights, in the wind and rain. Even some souls who will never sleep in the earth and never wake up again.

"Separate, start." The ceremony officially began as the host's voice fell.

Leading by three helicopters with red flags, eight helicopters behind them carried colorful smoke and flew over the square, leaving a colorful haze. Then, the 80 characters of 25 helicopters came slowly from afar.

A feast of equipment is about to start. Through the broadcast, the national intelligence officials and diplomats who are watching the live broadcast are all looking at the screen. This is one of the windows for them to understand the strength of China. The relationship is not small, and it is related to their subsequent policies and attitudes towards China.
