"It is impossible to make trouble. I am a capital man. The security level of the scene is simply hell. There will be no big problems at all."

"The big heads are still smiling, obviously not an accident."

“Is there a new tank? The end of the trekking team is just the position of the main battle tank.”

"Damn, CCTV, cut the lens."

In the live broadcast, the sound of the military parade was only the cheers and applause of the audience's crazy spread, and the team's Qibu sound was also covered.

The people who watched the live broadcast did not care about the host's commentary, staring at the picture, hoping to find something that would make the scene shocked through the live footage.

The people who were still obsessed with the masculine brothers of the soldiers and the beautiful long legs of the female soldiers, all returned to God, tickle in their hearts, and they wanted to wear them.

"The war robot is here." Chen Mo was on the scene and saw the war robot entering the review site, his face was dull.

This kind of war robot, which exists in science fiction movies, is now in reality, and it is still a sensation that makes them proud of the military parade.

There is no need to show any strength, let the outside world guess, it is enough to deter. Unknown means danger, and people have instinctive fears about the unknown.

CCTV's guide room.

Cui Zhi's eyes are on the screens on the left. He already knows that there are robots on the military parade, but it is really exciting to see at the ceremony.

This time it is facing the world, the news of their robot team, and what will happen to the world?

I am excited when I think about it.

"Director Cui, do you want to cut the lens in the past?" a technician asked, his voice trembled a little.

When he walked to the tail anyway, he was about to appear in front of the camera, and Cui Zhi gave instructions. The team that let the scene boil, appeared on the big screen with Cui Zhi’s instructions.

The male robot is tall and straight, the female robot is slender and elegant, all the robots are painted in camouflage, even the face is fascinated, the ears are like a small funnel with inverted buckles, and the eyes are red.

The 16*17 robot team, the three robots in front of the team, the footsteps on the ground of the square, the sound of metal and ground collision, like a hammer hit the ground, hundreds of sounds.

Entering the review area, all robot heads turn to the right, no sound, and instantly raise the hand to salute. The same action, almost copied and tidy, each step is not bad, more than two hundred robots.

Countless expectation of netizens, awakened by Zhu Quan's voice, saw the robot's picture slightly stunned, open mouth, excited red tide instantly floated from the neck.

In the CIA, Linna's face was black and the bottom of the pot was already on the verge of eruption.

The picture in front of her is the Chinese military parade-like robot team. The sound of metal colliding with the ground seemed to hit her heart, and the red light in her eyes, with a chill in her face, made her chilly.

“Why? Why didn’t there be any relevant intelligence beforehand?”

Linna finally broke out, trembling, mad, and a little confused.

The war robots appeared on the military parade, indicating that China has been involved in the large-scale equipment stage, and they do not even have any information and filings on this robot. This is the dereliction of intelligence.

what does this mean?

It means that China's top equipment technology development, they know nothing about it?

There is also the word 'war'. That is a war robot, not an intelligent robot. The difference between the two words has a world of difference.

All the agents in the CIA were stunned. The most serious one was the director responsible for China’s equipment intelligence. They looked depressed and frustrated. They saw the director’s fire for the first time.

"I will check it out immediately. No matter what means, at the latest three days, I need the intelligence of this robot, which appears on my desk. Even if it is a flicker, I will check it out."

When everyone left, Linna only drank two glasses of cold water, forcing herself to calm down. She has been working as a special agent for so long, and she rarely has emotional out of control. But when I went to the post, I found her on anything broken. On the other side of the president, I am afraid that she will be difficult to explain and be defamed.

Thinking of this, Linna's face was dark again.

The war robot appeared on the parade of China, and there was no news in advance. This horrible fact shocks the global intelligence community. When I saw the leader of the war robot, I was thinking about it, and how to develop the relationship with China.

As a slogan in the film revolution, as long as the quality of the first holographic film passes, Zhang Fengyun can properly board the throne of the master director. The premiere ceremony was held by Zhang Fengyun's team. Who is it, let Zhang Fengyun leave a large number of guests in the hall that need to be greeted, and come out to meet?

This scene made the reporters who saw the chicken blood, holding the equipment, waiting quietly.

Five minutes later, a white, sci-fi-like sports car with a similar appearance appeared, approaching the red carpet at the entrance of the opera house. This style of sports car has never been seen, and people who are familiar with luxury cars simply cannot recognize what this sports car is.

"What sports car is this?"

“I have never seen a company that has ever released such a sports car?”

“The style is atmospheric, steady, and young, and it’s just a luxury car in a luxury car. It’s like you can’t afford a series of wheels.”

"That is the symbol of the marching ant company."

However, the sharp-eyed reporter quickly saw the logo on the sports car, which is the symbol of the marching ant group. This sign indicates a problem, and people who come are likely to be big men in the marching ant group.

The car stopped and Chen Mo and the ink girl also came down from the car.

"I rely on it, Chen Mo, Chen Molai to participate in the premiere ceremony, hanging up the sky."

"His female companion is so beautiful, which female star is this?"

"I don't know this? This is his beauty assistant. There are not many people who know her real name so far."

Today, the ink lady wore a long skirt dress, which outlines her body, perfect, and the blue sea bream stone in the eyebrows adds a lot of mysterious temperament. The ink girl holds Chen Mo’s arm and has a smile on her face, which is no different from human beings.

"Mr. Chen, I always wanted to go to the door, I was afraid to disturb your time, I am really sorry. This holographic film can appear, Mr. Chen has helped me a lot."

Zhang Fengyun's grand formal dress, full of red light, extremely spirited, looks younger than ever, and sees Chen Mo is full of smiles.

Chen Mo did not support the big, smiled and returned: "Director Zhang is polite, I did not participate in the shooting of holographic movies, all of which is mainly the strength of Director Zhang."

"We don't want to talk about it. You haven't introduced this lady to me yet?" Zhang Fengyun smiled quickly and looked at the ink girl. Look at a few more eyes, my eyes are bright, and I began to think carefully.

"She is called the ink girl." Chen Mo said.

"Miss Ms. Hello," Zhang Fengyun said hello.

"I want the ink girl to film with you?"

"Mr. Chen, this is all you guessed." Zhang Fengyun laughed: "The film I shot, the follow-up few have been missing a role, that is, the deaf female emperor. That kind of temperament that smashes the past and the present, and the world I looked for the entire entertainment circle and didn't find the right person. I finally saw one today."

Zhang Fengyun is sure that the ink girl is the one who has seen him the most amazing. Let her play the role of the female emperor. It is perfect, but unfortunately, I can only think about it. Chen Mo’s assistant will definitely not want to enter the entertainment circle. For her, it is the grade.

"Then you should die, she won't go to film with you."

"I will talk about it, let's go in and talk." Zhang Fengyun guessed the result early, sideways, enthusiasm led Chen Mo and ink girl, entered the opera hall.

The reporter on the red carpet slammed the shutter against a few people. This is the guest who photographed the highest number of cafés today. The arrival of Chen Mo, the grades of the premiere ceremony were pulled up one level.

How many international forums, or conference events, people who want to invite Chen Mo are definitely not in the minority, and Chen Mo’s appearances are few. Unexpectedly, this premiere ceremony, Zhang Fengyun actually invited Chen Mo, this is simply the best publicity for the first holographic film.

Entering the Opera House, the lobby is full of people, in groups of three.

See Zhang Fengyun and Chen Mo, as well as the ink women come in, and instantly become the focus of the field. Someone in the lobby is whispering, Chen Mo is invited to come over? The face of this director is really not small.

However, when everyone saw the ink girl around Chen Mo, there was a sense of sensation.

Chen Mo is too famous to be famous. They know that the coffee is too high to be accessible. The ink girl is beautiful, beautiful to the unreasonable kind.

A deep black evening dress, without too much decoration, the fabric is silky, revealing the perfect figure of the ink girl, as well as the perfect noble, mixed with mysterious face, let some big stars on the field Custom shape.

Sure enough, the woman who can follow Chen Mo is definitely not an ordinary person.

"Mr. Chen, please have a drink at the bar." A familiar voice sounded, and I saw a girl dressed in youthful and beautiful, walked to Chen Mo, looked at him with red wine and smiled.

"You are here too?" Chen Mo could not help but take the red wine.

This scene makes the girl star noisy, why not start first, but was preempted by a female net red. The girl is not a neighbor, it is the sister of Xiao Yu, his little nephew is very handsome.

"I am the boss of the wild fish platform, and I have received the invitation. Isn't it normal for me to come?" Xiaoban smacked the red wine in the hand of Chen Mo.

“Miss He and Mr. Chen know?” Zhang Fengyun was a little surprised and asked with interest.

He has seen Xiao Man, spoiled the holographic game Super League, the net red anchor of the wild fish platform. This time the people of the wild fish platform, also in his invitation, did not expect the anchor of the wild fish platform. What surprised him even more is that he still knows with Chen.

"I am a little bitch." Chen Mo said.

Zhang Fengyun was shocked and instantly realized. The fish platform and the marching ant group cooperated with the investment of the army ant group. I did not expect this relationship. He was also surprised that the wild fish platform sent a net red anchor, but did not expect to be a hidden behind-the-scenes boss.

"I didn't expect it, I didn't expect it, we had a toast." Zhang Fengyun smiled bitterly, picked up the glass and touched it, and sipped it.

The surrounding guests saw this scene and were surprised. Chen Mo asked Zhang Fengyun to spend so much time to say hello. They all understood that they didn't expect to be close to Chen Mo's side of a net red anchor, so Zhang Fengyun was so fast.

After a few seconds on the field, Huo Ran exploded.

The guests confessed to the ear, and the discussion of the whistle made the lobby of the opera house noisy, and the eyes of the surrounding guests were slightly different. This is to catch Chen Mo, let Zhang Fengyun give face like this? Or is there any special background for Xiao Man?

Zhang Fengyun also couldn’t hear what other people were saying. When he looked at the time, he made it difficult: "Mr. Chen, sorry, I need to leave, to arrange the premiere. You chat, what is Mr. Chen’s need, you can let People contact me."

"Good." Chen Mo smiled and nodded.

"Sister, I didn't expect you to come to this ceremony." After Zhang Fengyun left, Xiao Man let go.

"Director Zhang has organized the wedding of my sister and I, and we are the biggest investor in the film. I am also the inventor of the holographic projector. The location is in the opera house. If I don't come, it seems not very polite." Chen Mobian said Going to the corner with a small number of people. Standing in the middle of the lobby, he is the protagonist on the field. This feeling of being looked at is not always good.

"Would you like to be a guest in the holographic super league," said Xiao Man.

"I want to be beautiful, my appearance fee is very expensive, let me go to be a guest of the game, what is it? I have time to see your sister, there is no match, or go home to see my parents." Chen Mo did not agree .

"Just kidding, know your brother-in-law is busy." Xiaoman laughed.

The lobby of the opera house was very lively. The premiere ceremony did not begin. Everyone was whispering and talking about movies or other things. Occasionally, some female stars would look at Chen Mo’s location, just seeing Chen Mozheng and Xiaoman chatting happily. No need to bother.

It didn't take long for the guests to be confirmed, and the staff informed them to let all the guests enter the ceremony at the premiere ceremony in an orderly manner.

chapters.title: Chapter 529: : Holographic Film "Sky"
chapters.body:
Chapter 529: : Holographic Film "Sky"

Marina Opera House.

This is one of the locations for the renovation of the holographic city project in Binhai, and the premiere hall is a converted holographic staircase hall.

The giant staircase hall, the audience seat is surrounded by a large semi-circle, and the audience capacity is much larger than before. In the middle of the big semicircle, it is a large stage that leads to the back of the step room.

There is no lavish decoration in the hall, and the ceiling is empty and unobstructed, and the holographic equipment on the ceiling of the auditorium can be seen at a glance.

The hall of the opera house is today's holographic film screening hall, the largest holographic screening hall in China.

Under the guidance of the staff, many of the stars and big coffees are seated in accordance with their respective positions.

Chen Mo and Mo Nu, as well as Xiao Man, also entered.

Everyone's eyes fell on Chen Mo, as a super big coffee, Chen Mo is undoubtedly the most powerful C position at the premiere ceremony tonight.

"Mr. Chen Mo, can you join us in the photo?"

Xiao Man’s position was adjusted by Zhang Fengyun to Chen Mo’s side. The three men just sat down and sat in the first line of stars behind Chen Mo and immediately came together.

"No problem." Chen Mo smiled and nodded.

Several big stars were full of joy, and immediately borrowed from the stick, stretched the selfie stick to the front of Chen Mo, and the stars around him saw them all together, hoping to squeeze into the lens.

At the time of the stars scrambling to take a group photo, the lights in the auditorium were dark, and the premiere ceremony officially began.

In the midair of the hall, a little snow fell and covered the entire hall.

With the music ringing, the opening dancers appeared on the central stage, the costumes of the ancient style, the blue style of color, and the holographic projection of the fallen snowflakes, like a group of snow fairy dancing in the silver land.

The holographic picture is spread throughout the exhibition hall, and the ubiquitous hologram is seen on the stage by dropping the 'snowflakes', and there is also a kind of beauty that comes with it.

The visual effects and the stage effects are all with mysterious colors, blending with the ancient Chinese beauty, making the audience scream and applause.

The hall of the opera house is not small, but there are many instruments.

Ten large holographic projectors were installed, and there were more than 20 medium-sized holographic projectors, which showed how much attention was paid to the transformation of the opera house.

Such a dense holographic projector, the projected holographic picture, is surely saturated in color and high in realism.

On stage aesthetics, no one in the domestic directors can match Zhang Fengyun.

While everyone was amazed at the masterpiece of Zhang Fengyun, they also lamented the power of the holographic projection of the marching ant group. Only holographic technology can make this kind of picture.

The applause lasted for a long time.

Domestic filmmakers and some media people, for the first time, personally experienced this truly immersive effect, and their hearts were excited.

This is indeed a revolution in the field of film.

With holographic projection, they can make the most of their imagination, which is the time to truly test the director's ability.

"Director Zhang, can you tell me about the journey of creating this holographic film? We are very curious." After the guests were on the scene, the host Wang Han looked at Zhang Fengyun.

"When it comes to this movie, I have to say Mr. Chen Mo."

After Zhang Fengyun just finished, Chen Mo’s picture appeared on the stage screen, and Chen Mo also smiled at the camera.

"After the holographic projector came out, I have been demonstrating the conditions for shooting holographic movies. Holographic movies can make full use of the imagination of the creators, but there is no suitable equipment.

Later, Mr. Chen Mo got married. The wedding sponsor company said that they could not control the scene requested by Mr. Chen Mo and invited me to be the director of the wedding. I saw a large holographic projector in the video of Mr. Chen Mo to the organizer.

At that time, my mood was very shocking and very exciting. I immediately interrupted the film being filmed and came back.

Large holographic projectors I saw the possibility of holographic films and the future of holographic films. So I said to Mr. Chen Mo, I hope that after the wedding, I can rent a large holographic projector and give me a holographic film. He did not hesitate to agree.

Later, the investment team of the Army Ant Group found me saying that I invested in the first holographic film and provided all the help I needed, including technical support and assistance. ”

Zhang Fengyun said with some sighs about the beginning and development of the first holographic film, as well as some difficulties encountered in filming.

"This is a road that is being explored. If there is no technical support from the marching ant group, I am afraid it will not be completed so quickly. I will share these experiences with all filmmakers in the next day. This is an era of change and everyone needs to explore together. ”

The sound fell and the applause thundered.

This is the mind and style of the masters, rather than eating and drinking.

"The director, what do you want to do most after the holographic film is completed?"

"The follow-up shooting plan is definitely there, but I hope to create a Hollywood-like studio in my lifetime and become a holy place in the new era of film.

The words are a bit big, but I think so. In our country, film industrialization has always lagged behind foreign countries. Now it is the era of film revolution, and it is also an opportunity to change lanes and overtake.

On the basis of Hengdian, using holographic equipment and technology to transform it into a holographic studio, providing all platforms and environments for directors to create holographic films, exploring holographic films, which will be a Chinese film development and filmmaker, will be a A qualitative change. ”

Zhang Fengyun truthfully said his ideas.

"Mr. Chen Mo, Director Zhang has this kind of thinking. What do you think? At present, it seems that only you are the most powerful and promising person who can help Zhang to realize his ideas." The host’s words turned and looked down to the stage. Chen Mo.

Seeing everyone's eyes fell on himself, Chen Mo took over the microphone opening handed over by the staff.

"Director Zhang’s idea is very good. I personally support the development of various fields in China, including the film and television field. If Director Zhang can have a complete plan, I believe that the investment team of the Army Ant Group will not let go of this profit. Good opportunity.

The upcoming holographic city project in Binhai is similar to the idea of director Zhang. The two are essentially the same. We can invest in the former and will definitely invest in the latter. ”

"Director Zhang, I can only help you ask this, and then rely on yourself, and remember to ask me to drink." The host Wang Han turned to serious, simple contrast and expression, let the people on the field gently Laughing, the applause thundered.

Access interaction ends in a relaxed atmosphere, but reveals a lot of information.

The emergence of holographic films has been doomed. After the first part, there will be a steady stream of holographic movies.

The entry of the film into the holographic era means that holographic devices are widely available.

All of this has great benefits for the marching ant group, because at present, only the marching ant group has the ability to produce holographic projectors, and the popularity means huge profits.

At the end of the interview, many guest starring came down from the stage and returned to their position.

Tonight is the world premiere of the world's first holographic film, "The Sky", with milestone significance. The directors at home and abroad are very much looking forward to what effect this film will have.

Zhang Fengyun sat next to Chen Mo, with a red face and a very good mood. He is obviously very confident in his work.

"Mr. Chen, guess how many box office tickets will this be?"

"This guess is not good, breaking Avatar's record, it should be no problem." Chen Mo said.

"The magical world of the West, the fantasy world of the East. I am not good at science fiction movies, but there should be no problem in creating a fantasy world of the East. As for science fiction movies, hand it to young people."

During the conversation between the two, all the light in the auditorium was dim, the noisy whispers disappeared, and I looked around with anticipation.

This is the first holographic film, a few stars starring in the word-of-mouth and acting online.

The protagonist is played by the ancient goddess ancient songs; while the action guidance and martial arts guidance, Zhang Fengyun invited the most famous action guide Yuan Youye in the port area; the aesthetic color has Zhang Fengyun personally directed the guidance, and the adaptation is also initiated by the original author.

It can be said that the combination of super iP, powerful actors, holographic movies and other elements is to create a holographic film.

The auditorium is dark and quiet, and many people are nervous. They have great expectations for this movie. I am afraid that the greater the hope, the greater the disappointment.

In the universe where ice and dark coexist.

At the beginning of the movie, in the opera house, an endless starry sky map is projected, expansive, mysterious, nebulous, colorful, suspended in every corner of the opera house.

The exclamation and applause broke out in the movie hall.

The holographic projection of the Milky Way expresses the mystery and vastness of the universe. In front of their heads, there is a star, as if they are in it.

From different angles, there are different visual aesthetics.

When everyone exclaimed, the stars were infinitely magnified, the galaxy nebula, the huge stars flying fast, occupying the entire theater, and after the light, it was still a dark starry sky.

In the depths of the starry sky, there are nine dragon bodies. Each dragon body is hundreds of meters long. It is like a cast iron. The dragon's corner is mixed with purple crystal color. The scales flash in the darkness with a little mysterious absurdity.

"That is?"

In the International Space Station, the pupils of several aerospace elites contracted sharply, and they saw even more shocking pictures.

Nine dragons swiftly crossed the darkness, zoomed in infinitely in the field of vision, and skipped next to the International Space Station.

If the nine dragons fill the entire auditorium. The dragon's abdomen was swept over the auditorium, and even the mysterious lines on the dragon scales were clearly visible.

The tail of the dragon corpse is tied with a black iron rope, and the cold luster makes people feel cold. The iron rope extends to the dark space behind him, as if the bronze shackles of the ancient days are quiet and suspended.

The ancient bronze statues are quaint and unremarkable, and the ancient patterns that remain vague are full of the vicissitudes of the years.

In the auditorium, screams and exclamations came one after another. When the dragon corpse passed, the timid female audience was holding her head and screaming in the chair, fearing that it would be scared by the dragon corpse and the cockroach.

The immersive feeling makes people feel that it is a real dragon corpse, small and huge visual impact, which makes people feel shocked.

The huge dragon horns are like bifurcated ancient trees. The ridiculousness is mixed with purple light. It has both power and mystery. It is like a mountain, just heavy and full of strength, black scales like a blade, cold light.

In a flash, the scene of Mount Taishan is enlarged in the holographic picture. ?

The hustle and bustle, the magnificent scenery, the sang sangyu scenery, is perfectly interpreted in the picture. The visual beauty and the immersive shock made the audience in the auditorium come and go.

In less than a minute, the boundless universe, the dragon corpse of the mountains, the mysterious and simple bronze cymbals, and the sacred mountains of Mount Tai.

The portrayal of several kinds of things, the beauty of different styles, the shock of different styles is perfectly expressed under the holographic projection, and it is very visually shocking. It directly impacts the senses of all the audiences, and the auditorium has already boiled.

On the movie screen, a group of young people are playing in the top of the Mount Tai Jade...

chapters.title: Chapter 530: : Hot
chapters.body:
Chapter 530: : Hot

In the auditorium of the Binhai Opera House, it is almost a place of surprise.

No one thinks that others are arguing with themselves, because that is also the voice of their hearts.

The audience was shocked by the holographic scene in front of them.

I am immersed.

The film was adapted by the original author of the novel to remove some of the complex plots and leave the most essential line.

The most stunning scenes of the sky are perfectly preserved.

The illusory illusion of the Immortal Palace; the quietness of the hundred miles, the ruined land of birds and beasts, the aura of the abyss, the sacred sacred caves of the cranes; the sacred tombs of the sacred sacred mountains; the sacred sacred, the ancient mysterious Mine and so on.

The scene of the protagonist fights, after Yuan Baye personally fencing, the action is wide open, the momentum is vast, beyond imagination, plus special effects blessing, will be the original expression of the ancient and sturdy and proud of the perfect expression.

The first holographic film is two hours and fourty, surpassing the length of the general movie, and has a different visual impact every moment. A variety of different scenes, the artistic beauty of different colors, is amazing and unable to extricate themselves.

High energy throughout.

Every second of holographic movies has a different visual impact, even if it is not a holographic film, it can be on the altar. Nowadays, there are holographic special effects blessings that have become gods.

Whether it is body sense or visual impact, it is unparalleled in previous movies.

In the previous movie, the audience was like an outsider, watching everything happen.

Strong sense of substitution, as well as visual impact, as well as the aesthetic color of the scene, character design, plot, special effects and movements, and even the details of the treatment, each item is close to perfect, impeccable.

Two hours and forty minutes, but the protagonist Ye Fan set foot on the starry sky, the picture disappeared, and the lights in the auditorium lit up.

applause.

Thunderous applause.

Almost everyone is applauding, can not help but sincerely, can not control their excitement.

I saw the holographic movie for the first time.

The holographic special effects show the beauty of the film without any reservations. This is the culmination of a movie.

In the film field of China, this moment has reached its peak.

Even Avatar’s director Cameron is applauding and marveling.

Even if he is known as a master-level director, he does not dare to say that Zhang Fengyun's color application and the shaping of different styles can be surpassed. With the holographic technology, the film is perfect.

The development of holographic films can be seen as unstoppable.

The final subtitles fall, and the end of the egg shows a vast scene of a starry sky. The star map is floating in front of everyone, just like the darkness of the universe, mysterious and deep.

Holographic technology!

These words will become the label for changing the field of film, and it is also a new journey in the field of film.

"Congratulations, Director Zhang." Chen Mo applauded again and again, and Zhang Fengyun said hi.

He has seen the vastness of the universe, and has seen the infinity and depth of the starry sky. In the technology ball of the science and technology library, he has seen too many things, and he can't talk about many things.

But from the perspective of ordinary people, this holographic film is like this, it is almost perfect.

From beginning to end, all kinds of aesthetic scenes are unstoppable and fresh, and it can be said that this is the pinnacle of the film field.

"There is also a lot of credit from Mr. Chen here. I should thank you."

Zhang Fengyun's eyes are red, and in the past two years, he has devoted himself to creating this movie for his whole heart. Now, watching his work is recognized, it is a great sense of accomplishment.

Almost all the friends around have come to congratulate Zhang Fengyun.

On the occasion of everyone’s congratulations, Wang Han, the principal, also spoke.

"I have a proposal. I just walked around and decided that the holographic film has different visual effects in different directions. It is better to let it go again. Let's look at it from another angle. What does Director Zhang think?"

"You want to see it yourself, then pull everyone together and pay for it to the cinema."

When Zhang Fengyun’s words came out, the audience laughed and the applause thundered.

After the premiere ceremony was completed, there were evaluations of various celebrity stars on the Internet, as well as professional film critics and media people.

Everyone uses the same two words to describe the first holographic film.

God made!

The big stars who arrived at the scene occupied more than half of the entertainment industry. Almost all the stars gave the first holographic film a perfect score, and there were excited and unspeakable comments.

Less than twenty minutes.

The first holographic film, in the propaganda of various stars, film critics, and media people, quickly occupied the top position in the hot search.

The star audience at the premiere scene voluntarily punched the first holographic film, plus some self-media followers, no need for the film team to promote, has been a big fire.

"This is the most perfect movie I have ever seen. It is another Madonna in the movie field. Even if there is a comer, I can't surpass it. Out of 10 points, I give 100 points. Holographic film will have a brand new journey in the film field. ”

"The perfect score is very good. I give twelve points, the magic that cannot be surpassed, the holographic technology, so that the film has unlimited possibilities. You go to brush the second time, the third time, the things you see are absolutely different."

"The quaint and mysterious Kowloon Lahu; the majestic Mount Taishan; the imaginary fairy palace; the quiet and silent, the extermination of the worms and extinct; the demon-stricken, sacred tombs of the demon; the mysterious sacred ancient mine.

The masterpiece of Zhang Fengyun's aesthetic art is integrated into the holographic film. All the scenes are perfectly expressed. This is the most outstanding work of the film. The holographic film has a unique advantage. ”

"..."

Holographic movies have not been fired first, and almost all fans hope that the film will be released soon.

Shortly after the premiere ceremony, some domestic cinemas have been unable to withstand the holographic theaters that have already been rebuilt, and they have been screened for "Sky" or a dot.

Almost two minutes after the trial and the release of the film, all the movie tickets were sold out.

In the daytime and prime time movie tickets can not be grabbed, some people buy late night files and early morning files, late night files and early morning files, are also full.

Some people see holographic movies early, even buy tickets in other cities, and then rush to the car.

Cinemas that have been remodeled in holographic cinemas are involved in ‘showing’ and ‘pointing’.

Even some of the cinema's platters have already robbed some of the officially released movies, making the films still showing great pains.

The film was not officially released, and the holographic film had more than 500 million box office revenues, creating a record of terror and shaking the global movie market.

The cat's eye is equally divided by 9.9 points, and the always picky Douban also gives a horror score of 9.8 points, and the foreign rotten tomato recommendation is also as high as 9.8 points.

Globally, the horror boom of holographic movies has been set off.

"The first time I personally felt the charm of holography, I was deeply immersed in it, I was able to grab the ticket, I have to brush it for the second time, the third time."

"I am not afraid to tell you that when Ye Fan is fighting with people, he is standing by my side. It is super cool and almost went on the scene."

"I was scared to cry. . . ."

“Our holographic film hall has been transformed into a staircase of the Colosseum in the center. There is a holographic pool in the center. Each viewer can watch movies in different angles and can see the beauty in different directions. The most funny thing is that I see A buddy, running around in the holographic pool, said that he went up to fight, to catch the saint, and was driven out."

"It’s impossible to pirate the camera with the camera. The camera is just an angle shot, and the holographic movie, the angle and scene that everyone sees are different. I fortunately brushed it four times, except for the same plot, other environmental scenes. The visual colors are completely different, each time is shocking, and new things can be found every time."

Countless praises are overwhelming.

The cinemas that have been transformed into holographic cinemas are smiling.

The cinema without the holographic cinema also quickly contacted the marching ant company, hoping to order holographic equipment, hoping to transform the holographic cinema before the movie was released.

The popularity of holographic cinemas is spreading wildly.

On the day of Christmas release, there is no need to go to work on weekends. Even if it is two or three o'clock in the morning, there are still people staying up late to watch, the venue is full.

Less than a week after the global release, the global box office revenue of all holographic theaters has exceeded 3.5 billion, and the upward trend is unstoppable.

Because of the holographic angle, the visual effects in each direction are different, and the perfect creation of Zhang Fengyun's scenery and color. Looking at the second time of the second time, you can still find many different beauty in the movie.

The directors who are shooting holographic films have used the heat to announce the progress of their holographic films.

This is the most insane holographic feast after Chen Mo’s release of holographic projection technology at the press conference, which means that holographic technology is widely used in ordinary people’s lives.

As the holographic film heats up, the "Hero" holographic super league also comes.

chapters.title: Chapter 531: : Holographic Technology And E-Sports
chapters.body:
Chapter 531: : Holographic Technology And E-Sports

The Binhai Gymnasium is the main building of the Binhai Sports Center. It covers an area of 320,000 square meters and is the main stadium venue, which can accommodate 50,000 spectators.

This is six o'clock in the afternoon.

Because it is outdoor, for better visual and color experience, reduce the interference of daytime sunlight.

The Wild Fish Platform, Penguin Company, and the China E-Sports League, which is preparing for the Super League, choose to play in the evening to night.

This is the first holographic super league, originally intended to be held at the Capital Birds Stadium. The name of the holographic city of Binhai started, and all the organizers chose to hold it at the Binhai Stadium.

At this time, the audience was packed.

The first "Hero" holographic super league was held, and fans from all over the world gathered here to see the holistic super league.

Tickets for the league were released a month earlier and were snapped up. The hype of tickets to the outside world is already twice the original price, and it is still hard to find.

Even if the stadium's capacity doubles, tickets can't be sold.

In order to earn enough money, and to take care of those who can not buy the league finals tickets, but also for the purpose of publicity, the official also invited the world's strongest team on all continents to come to a friendly match.

On the one hand, I also used this huge holographic super league to create an e-sports.

On-site TV broadcast rights, overseas live copyrights and webcast rights, earned a lot of royalties for Penguin, Barbarian and E-sports.

In almost every game, tickets were sold out, and the heat was comparable to the World Cup finals.

The global game media has gathered in the stadium to watch the most peak of the e-sports field. Perhaps this holographic e-sports will change the current e-sports market position of e-sports.

Some fans on the scene have already squadrons holding the plaques of their respective teams, waiting for the start of the game.

Stadium backstage.

Weng Xing was nervously picking up his hand.

He was also the first to host such a grand e-sports league, or the first holographic e-sports league, which is conceivable.

Seeing the scene is almost the same, Weng Xingcai and the next two explanations went to the host. As they played, the screen also appeared on the large LCD screen above the sports center.

"Everyone and friends, welcome to the "Hero" Super League finals. I am the host of the game and explain the Weng Xing, next to our special guest to explain Lin Chao, and Tang Mengxin, who combines wisdom and strength."

Weng Xing’s opening, the audience of the stadium, all looked at the huge LCD screen.

"This final, by the fish platform and the Penguin company. The first large-scale holographic projection technology, the creation of the grand summoner canyon holographic projection. This is the feast of the game, but also a feast of technology.

I believe that many viewers have seen the official promotional videos, and there is not much nonsense. The following is the team that invited us to the finals of this Super League.

The royal team is the top team in the China Division. The Premier League has passed the game and won the Premier League Finals. His opponent is a dynasty team from South Korea. The dynasty has always been a veteran team of South Korean e-sports.

What kind of excitement will the two bring to us tonight? Can the dynasty team defend his old-fashioned dignity? Can the royal team continue his unbeaten record? We will wait and see. ”

When Weng Xing’s words fell, the coaches of the two teams and all the team members wore team uniforms to walk the stadium.

There was a burst of cheers on the field and a variety of sounds for the team.

After the handshake, Weng Xing announced the start of the game.

In the cheers of the fans, the two teams walked back in their respective directions.

The area of the team, designed at the ends of the stadium, according to the size of the screen, is located in the area behind the spring water.

The theme song of the game rang again, and the cheers broke out instantly.

The exciting moment is coming, and there is a crazy refueling sound on the field. The scene is almost the same as the World Cup.

Suddenly, the scene was dimly lit.

The holographic projection equipment above the stadium illuminates, and the huge body of the ancient dragon hovered over the Binhai Stadium, then landed above the stadium, and the faucet screamed downward.

"Wow……"

"My goodness!!"

"Ness..."

"Ness! Nice!"

In an instant, many people were scared, but after the reaction, the stadium boiled.

Such a huge ancient dragon is not added to the post-video, but they can see the actual projection, and the shock can't be added.

Then, the baron, which is hundreds of meters long, came out. The huge body was on the gymnasium, and the huge faucet was facing the ancient dragon.

Ssangyong confronts you.

The buzzing sound shook the entire stadium, and the audience cheered and shouted together, and the scene instantly entered a climax.

The two strongest creatures in the Summoner's Canyon appear and confront each other in the stadium, just like the upcoming battle.

The holographic projections in the stadium are also slowly lighting up.

Centered on the football field, the giant summoner canyon emerges, stretches out, the crystals are restrained, the defensive tower is more than ten meters high, and the highlands, rocks and grasses are very clear, and the lines can be clearly seen.

Summon the Grand Canyon and fill the entire stadium.

The theme music of the game reappears.

"Wow……"

All the praises are the simplest cheers, the applause is thundering, and the cheers are higher than the waves.

Shocked, amazed, excited.

Only these words can describe the mood of game fans at the moment.

They never thought that one day they could see e-sports with such a grand holographic scene, and all of this was done by the marching ant group.

Xiao Man sat on the VIP table and watched the boiling picture of the stadium, showing a smile and applauding.

This effect and picture is the picture she wants to see. As a game enthusiast, the charm of the game is presented to the world. This kind of accomplishment is very good, and it can make money.

This Super League, as well as the friendly match after the finals, is just the ticket money, let them earn tens of millions. Also copyright, live rights, and users of the platform.

In this league down, her wild fish platform will become one of the leading players in the live broadcast industry, with huge profits.

Unfortunately, my brother-in-law is not willing to come to her town, otherwise it will be even better.

I want to think about it. As a game fan, Xiao Man still looks at the game.

All along, the e-sports are limited to small screens, even if the holographic projection of the marching ant group is just a few of the medium-sized holographic projections.

Today's large holographic stadium, the charm of e-sports is fully presented in the world.

"The spell was broken, we lived again!!"

After the first hero chooses, as in the propaganda video, more than 20 meters high, like a god, suspended in the summoner canyon, the entire stadium is blasted.

"I can never refuse the invitation to dance."

Not long after, all ten heroes were selected, and the five-fifth confrontation, the battle between the giants, is like the war of the gods.

The field has already exploded, cheers, exclamations and applause, and a wave is higher than a wave.

Not lost to any sports event.

This scene, the world's live broadcasts, fans who did not arrive at the scene, were shocked by this crazy scene.

"My holographic movie tickets can't be bought, and now the league tickets can't be bought, sad reminders."

"I really want to go to the scene!"

“The great marching ant group makes this possible.”

"God, this is a more exciting battle than the World Cup, holographic competition."

"This is the charm of holographic technology."

"Perfect holographic scene."

"I will pack up my things and go to Huaxia to travel to Binhai."

"Poor our country also prohibits holographic mobile phones from entering the market. Others have even started holographic competition, and **** threatens national security."

"This is the future!"

Through the "Hero" Super League, the peak of holographic technology was pushed to another climax, and the effects of horror burst instantly.

The shock of holographic movies has not yet ended, and now there is another holographic e-sports.

The scene of the holographic game scene, instantly exploding friends circle, become a show of capital.

Never before, let them feel that the future is so close to them.

The game has not yet ended, the International Olympic Committee released news on the official Twitter, is considering e-sports as a formal sports competition, the next Olympic Games can try to join the e-sports project.

When the news came out, it attracted a sensation in the sports world.

Holographic technology has made the e-sports entertainment and playability soar, almost the same as movies, to achieve a revolutionary effect.

The live broadcast of the Super League, once again see the charm of holographic technology around the world.

Holographic technology is the technology that knocks on the door of the future world, and its shock in front of the world has not stopped.

chapters.title: Chapter 532: : Holographic Theme Park
chapters.body:
Chapter 532: : Holographic Theme Park

The "Hero" holographic super league finals ended, and global game fans also felt a visual shock.

The large holographic map of the sports field, the skills and fights in the game, are perfectly presented in reality through holographic technology, and the level of stimulation is no less than any sports event.

That is the e-sports arena that the game fans dream of.

The holographic super league has just ended, and the major game companies quickly contacted the wild fish platform to express their hope of holding a holographic super league. These include the turret and World of Warcraft.

The holographic film was released for a week, and the global box office has exceeded 4.5 billion, and the momentum is unstoppable. Nowadays, the holographic super league has emerged, making holographic technology even more popular.

The holographic technology is hot and extends in various fields.

In just one month, holographic technology has once again entered the eyes of the world, almost sweeping the world with a hot gesture.

The network is all kinds of news of holographic technology application, and the popularity is from the release of holographic movies, one is maintained to the present.

Almost everyone who sees the large holographic scenes created by holographic technology is amazed at this technology.

However, the holographic film heat is just hot, and the craze of holographic e-sports has just emerged. Another holographic project came one after another, quickly occupying the headlines of major news platforms.

The world's first holographic-themed tourist resort: Ant Paradise, opened on New Year's Day.

The news of the opening of the ant park has already been announced.

For the sake of facilities and personnel safety management, today, only 38,000 tickets were sold, and tickets were 3.8 fold. They were sold out just after booking. Tickets can also be given when booking a resort or apartment for more than two days.

Some people have reacted, it is too late.

Resorts and apartments in Ant Park have already been booked and you can't buy tickets.

In order to avoid causing too many people to flow and affect the experience of the scene, the number of votes released by Ant Park has an upper limit. Tickets for one week after the opening of the park were all booked.

......

Corandi walked down the Sightseeing Car in Ant Paradise and looked around.

He is a foreign tourist.

In order to take care of the needs of international tourists and avoid white running, Ant Paradise has a total of 1,000 tickets for international visitors in 38,000 tickets.

He was a little lucky, he grabbed a ticket when he released the ticket at Ant Park.

This time I came to Binhai City to watch the holographic e-sports finals. I didn't expect to grab the opening tickets for Ant Park, so I came over and took a look.

The world's first holographic theme park.

In today's hot holographic technology, the holographic park opened, which has been identified as the highest-end amusement park.

The scene is full of e-sports, and now you can see the holographic park opening, and you can boast for a while.

The ant park theme island, facing the Seaside Opera House and the Marina Central Plaza, faces the sea and has a unique location and natural environment.

The coast closest to the island was also bought by Ant Paradise as a land for ant parks, hotels, clubs, dining areas, as well as water parks, roller coasters and ferris wheels.

The island serves as a venue for holographic theme parks, as well as a specialty snack street and dining area.

In the theme park, in addition to some theme buildings, there is a pillar standing up to more than 30 meters.

The pillars are camouflaged, like a tree trunk, and there are many holographic devices on the top. It is a paradise-themed holographic projection device.

Everything is brand new and the scenery is good.

After understanding the environment, the Corrandi went to the opening ceremony.

The opening ceremony was held on the island. I heard that Chen Mo and other big coffees would come to the opening ceremony, so he came to the theme island to see the opening ceremony.

Just arrived at the scene, Krandi saw the scene dense, thousands of spectators, have been waiting here.

It is now 5:30 pm, half an hour from the opening ceremony.

The ant park has a holographic theme. The first day of the park is selected at dusk at 6 pm, and the effect is relatively good.

Many of them are waiting for long guns and short guns.

They all hope to release the first-hand news on the spot.

Recently, the enthusiasm of holographic technology has swept the world. This holographic amusement park opened, they all want to see how it will be a shocking scene.

In the waiting of everyone, Li Ruoxuan was on the stage.

Today, Li Ruoxuan, who is full of self-confidence, is not the youngest student on campus.

After entering the marching ant for so long, under the company's training, she is now the senior director of Ant Paradise and one of the staff who assisted Li Danni. Today she is the host of the opening ceremony.

"There are guests invited to attend today."

Li Ruoxi’s words just fell, and the reporters all appeared under the reporter’s short guns and short guns.

Chen Mo leads, surrounded by Yao Yi of the coastal head and Xiaoma Ge of the Penguin Group, Alexander of the Roche family, and Su Zhigang, chairman of the Changlong Group.

Followed by five people, is the vice president of the marching ant group, the head of the ant park company Li Danni, the company CEO of the ant park cooperation, and the main actors of the "Sky" movie including Zhang Fengyun.

When the applause fell on the court, Li Ruoxuan spoke again.

"The following is the Vice President of the Army Ant Group, Ms. Li Danni, the head of Ant Paradise, to give a keynote speech today."

Li Danni smiled and stood up, looking at the grand scene in front of her eyes, and her heart was proud.

When the marching ant was just starting, she was recruited by Zhao Min and became one of the members of the company team. At that time, Zhao Min invited more than a dozen members, some of whom did not come.

She and Li Lingfeng, Zhu Li, Lao Luo, Zhang Yi and others, all hold the trust of Zhao Min, give up the position of the high-paying supervisor or manager, and come to help participate in the formation of the marching ant company.

That was a decision to change their destiny.

The companies they formed are now at the top of the world's technology.

And her former elite director is now a big man in charge of the world-class large-scale tourist resort of Ant Park.

“Thank you all, today I can take the time to participate in the opening ceremony.”

Li Danni smiled and spoke.

“The Ant Paradise is jointly invested by the Army Ant Group, Penguin Group, Changlong Group and Roche, and is an extension of the four cultural tourism sectors.”

Li Danni’s voice is confident.

When Zhao Min announced that she became the team leader of the Ant Paradise project, she worked hard over the past few years to complete the ant park.

For more than two years, the marching ant group has invested a lot of money and resources to lay out holographic technology. Now it is the result of planting the crops, and it is time to harvest the fruits.

“The ant park has a fixed park theme and a non-fixed park theme.

Fixed park theme, with some fixed theme buildings and specific infrastructure, as well as a holographic park corresponding to the theme. Fixed park themes include: Jurassic Dinosaur Park, Fairytale Castle, Adventure World, Underwater World and Ice Kingdom.

Non-fixed park theme, no fixed content, no fixed infrastructure, we will create new themes from time to time for visitors.

Including but not limited to: Ghost Blowing Tomb Series theme, Dream World theme, Star World theme, Animal World theme, Anime cartoon theme, Game competition theme, etc. ”

Li Ruojun briefly introduces the theme of Ant Paradise.

This is the advantage of holographic paradise, they can create different iP through holographic scenes, so that visitors can come and play many times without losing freshness.

"Our goal is to make Ant Paradise a holographic world where everyone can experience the beauty of technology and fantasy."

Li Danni’s speech was not long, it was sloppy, and when the sound fell, the applause was remembered on the field.

The applause fell, and Li Ruoxuan spoke again.

"Next, please have Mr. Chen Mo, Mr. Yao, Mr. Ma, Mr. Alexander and Mr. Su come up, and together with Ms. Li Danni, open the holographic button of Ant Paradise."

Chen Moo left the seat and boarded the big button on the stage.

Just press this button, the holographic equipment of the entire holographic park will light up, and the true face of the holographic paradise will appear in front of the world.

"let's start."

Chen Mo put the palm of his hand on the button, and the other people also put the palm of his hand on it and pressed it gently.

Hey! !

After a clear sound, the entire theme island, all holographic projectors lit up to form a complete holographic world.

A little bit of snowy 'snowflakes' fell, laying the ground, the next moment, everyone's eyes, all turned into a silver package. The moments of the scene change, making people feel like being in the snow and ice kingdom.

This feeling of passing through in an instant makes many people marvel at it.

The children who came with the parents saw the magical scene and were already cheering.

Slowly, the white ice and snow disappeared, and the color turned into a dreamy dark blue. A colorful fish appeared in the air, as if swimming in the sky.

This is followed by squad of fish, turtles, dolphins, sharks, around the crowd, heads upstream, and giant blue whales and squid through, hovering in the air, like the bottom of the water.

The dreamy and fascinating underwater world is presented under holography.

"Wow……"

The audience was cheering and applauding. All the people present were amazed by the magical sights in front of them, and they took out their mobile phones and took pictures of the magical scene.

At a time when everyone is still unfinished, the underwater world disappears. On the ground, towering trees rise up and form a huge virgin forest.

The loud noise is far and near.

A huge dinosaur appeared on the scene, followed by countless dinosaurs.

"Dinosaurs are dinosaurs."

"God, I feel like I am crossing the Jurassic world."

"Unbelievable, this is the creativity of holographic technology, a magical world."

When I saw huge dinosaurs, some people began to panic, then calmed down and began to take photos. They have been to many playgrounds, but this magical phenomenon is that no playground can be seen.

The dinosaurs passed through and the scene changed again...

chapters.title: Chapter 533: : Antitrust Investigation
chapters.body:
Chapter 533: : Antitrust Investigation

"How can it be so beautiful? I want to go to China!"

"Poor our country, still guarding the glory of the old times, refused to let the marching ants group enter the market, an aging eagle, refused to admit that he is old."

"Holographic technology, that is the future, Chen Mo will bring the future world into China."

"I am sure that the people of China live in the 23rd century, we are the human beings of the 21st century. Holographic mobile phones, holographic movies, holographic e-sports, holographic paradise, what is next?"

"Chen Mo is definitely a bloodline of South Korea. He is a descendant of our country!"

"We want to tell Chinese people to monopolize holographic technology, and we should share holographic technology to the whole world."

"..."

The holographic park opened, and various holographic videos appeared, causing the global netizens to vibrate.

The holographic playground can create a paradise for any scene, all of which is realized by the ant park.

Holographic films are still on the air, holographic e-sports are also in the air, and now there is a holographic paradise. The holographic technology of the marching ant group has always been high fever, attracting envy of countless countries.

Whoever controls the holographic technology, whoever has the ticket to enter the future world, is now realized in China.

Binhai also enters the field of global tourists.

With the world's first holographic paradise, Binhai has a unique label.

Here is the door to the future world.

After the opening of the holographic park, the Global Tourism Group Company sent travel experience experts to the coastal city to develop corresponding travel routes.

Coastal city government.

Yao Yi saw the latest tourist data, and the smile almost reached the ear.

After the holographic movie premiere, holographic e-sports, there is now an ant park, and now Binhai has become an internationally renowned city.

It is foreseeable that in the future, the service industry in Binhai will usher in a golden period of development.

In the holographic e-sports competition, the number of tourists in Binhai City has increased significantly, and now there is another holographic paradise.

The development of the service industry and the increase in international popularity will definitely drive the development of the entire coastal city.

In Binhai City, there is a marching ant group. With the advantage of Dawan District, it is also an open city. Nowadays, the landmark business card is about to be completed, and it is just around the corner to become an international metropolis.

For more than a year, he will be promoted.

With the development of the coastal city during this time, and his achievements, it is appropriate to enter the province. The road in front of him is a bright light, and he is excited when he thinks about it.

"People prepare a full launch ceremony for the holographic city." Yao Yi said.

The holographic city project has come to an end. He hopes to start the holographic city project before the Spring Festival, and completely win the name of the holographic city of Binhai.

"Okay." The secretary nodded and promised to leave Yao Yi's office.

After the office was quiet, Yao Yi took out the map and carefully looked at the planning map of the holographic city of Binhai. The holographic city project is a landmark project of Binhai City. As long as the project is smoothly opened, the image of the international metropolis is completely completed. .

At that time, the logo of Binhai 'fishing woman holding pearls' will become the most perfect city image in Binhai.

Marching Ant Group.

In the president's office, Zhao Min is looking at the report last year.

After the holographic technology was hot, especially after the holographic film was released, people from major theaters rushed to order holographic projectors, ready to renovate the theater.

Sales of medium-sized holographic projectors skyrocketed, but there were no significant changes in the report. You must wait for the January report to come out, or the first quarter report to see the obvious changes.

In the past three years, the marching ant group has invested in the holographic field, and then it is time to return quickly.

However, due to the influence of holographic e-sports, there are also holographic movies, and the sales of holographic mobile phones have skyrocketed again.

Due to hardware limitations, holographic mobile phones have been in short supply.

After the nano-scale 3D printer came out, the output of the holographic mobile phone increased and barely could be supplied.

The holographic technology has blossomed in an all-round way, and the sales of holographic mobile phones have risen again, and there is a shortage of supply. She expects that this will happen and she is already working hard to build the production line. The production line is not finished yet.

Only holographic movies, this year is the season of flowering results.

"President."

"The president, the overseas branch came to the news."

When Zhao Min looked at the documents, Lanxi knocked on the door and entered the office. The voice was a little anxious.

"what news?"

“The overseas branch said that many countries have launched anti-monopoly investigations on our company.” Lanxi put the document report on Zhao Min’s desk.

It is the report letter sent back from the overseas branch.

“Anti-monopoly investigation?” Zhao Min took over the documents handed down by Lanxi.

"Yes, including the United States, the European Union, the United Kingdom, Japan, Australia and other countries, they found that some of our products are suspected of monopoly, so we launched a survey, we have issued a notice." Lanxi said.

Zhao Min has also looked at the letter of notification.

"Come together? Oh!" Zhao Min did not worry, continued to look at the letter.

All of this is expected.

Now that the holographic technology storm is sweeping, the income of holographic equipment every day is a terrible astronomical number.

The cake is too big and the money is moving.

Holographic technology is currently on a global scale, and only the marching ant group is in control. It is not uncommon for someone to sue them.

"You go out to work."

Zhao Min put down the letter. From the beginning to the end, his expression did not change much. It seems that this is a trivial matter.

"Antitrust investigation?"

In the lab, Chen Mo was surprised at the news that Zhao Min said.

“Is the US also involved? Our products in the US seem to have only medium holographic projectors and seismographs?”

"There are only two kinds. They think that our holographic projectors are suspected of monopolizing, controlling market prices, and obtaining huge profits. Therefore, anti-monopoly investigations are conducted on projectors. In other countries, in addition to holographic projectors, there are holographic mobile phones, intelligent robots, etc. ""

“So many countries are investigating together? It’s obviously premeditated, but it’s time to choose.”

"Now holographic technology is fully blossoming, big cakes have emerged. Our technology monopoly, others can only see can not eat, natural red eyes." Zhao Min said.

Only one holographic film, the marching ant group masters all holographic equipment products, and in the subsequent cinema transformation, it is also their holographic equipment.

The terrorist interests are self-evident.

"It’s a mediocrity not to be blamed. You can handle this matter. The toughness is tough. Now the company has a firm foothold, no shortage of money, no shortage of technology, no fear of anyone's restrictions and sanctions." Chen Mo said.

"With your words, don't bother you."

After that, Zhao Min’s holographic projection disappeared in the laboratory.

"Let's go ahead and prepare for the 37th experiment."

Chen Mo called the ink girl and continued the experiment.

The Laser Pulse Lab is a laboratory that Chen Mo has created for laser experiments.

The laboratory is grounded in the bottom of a newly built floor in the No. 1 area. It is made of reinforced concrete and is also covered with thick carbon steel. It is enough to do some experiments that can't be done in ordinary laboratories.

Three large lasers are set up in three directions in the laboratory.

The gain medium for each laser is the type of meteorite that is mounted on the war robot so that the laser can be maximized.

In the center of the laboratory, a lifting platform and a telescopic mechanical tube on the ceiling and underground can fix things and facilitate experimentation.

At this time, in the lifting platform, a light blue metal crystal is fixed, and the hexagonal honeycomb shape has a thickness of about two centimeters.

He now needs 1024 allogeneic elements, which are modified from indium. The metal crystals in front of them are the isomers of the elemental indium metal that have been modified in the first stage.

The second phase of the transformation has failed 36 times, this is the 37th.

Chen Mo’s instructions fell and the instruments in the lab started.

The first is the particle accelerator in the laboratory, high-energy particles, which begin to bombard the metal indium, and the three lasers illuminate in three directions, bombarding the indium sphere in the center of the laboratory.

In just a moment, the central metal crystals began to light up and became dazzling, like a red iron block. The laser and particle accelerators have not stopped, and the isomer crystallization of indium is being modified in a two-pronged approach.

chapters.title: Chapter 534: : This Is Our Condition
chapters.body:
Chapter 534: : This Is Our Condition

“The Wall Street Journal News: The marching ant group uses market monopoly advantages to control product prices, profiteering, and antitrust investigations.”

“European Economic Daily: The marching ant group is suspected of abusing market dominance, controlling product prices, and conducting antitrust investigations by multinational antitrust agencies!”

"..."

The official has not moved, and public opinion is first.

In just two days, countries have publicly announced the anti-monopoly investigation of the marching ant group, and the Western media has reported on the headlines of almost the front page, and began to create a public opinion field.

The United States, the European Union, Japan, Australia and other countries have conducted anti-monopoly investigations on products such as holographic and intelligent robots. When the news came out, it attracted public opinion.

For the first time in the world, there have been so many countries that have announced antitrust investigations against a company.

Today holographic technology has shown horrible effects in various fields.

Whether it is holographic mobile phones, holographic movies, holographic e-sports, holographic paradise, horror of holographic technology, it is almost a revolutionary product. The marching ant group is relying on technological monopoly and gaining huge benefits.

At the time when holographic technology is about to be fully popularized, several countries have also initiated anti-monopoly investigations on marching ant groups.

Although the marching ant group does have a monopoly, it is no coincidence that many countries have announced anti-monopoly investigations of the marching ant group.

"If there is no conspiracy, the ghosts don't believe it. Even if you want to engage in the marching ant group, don't you need to be so obvious?"

"The monopoly company that brought us into the future world, this monopoly company gave me a dozen."

"The marching ant group does have a monopoly. The holographic mobile phone is more than 30,000. It is simply a luxury. Isn't this a monopoly advantage to get huge profits?"

"Fart! Small holographic projectors can be made without money? Three thousand is too expensive, you can buy ordinary mobile phones. If you master holographic technology abroad, holographic mobile phones can't be bought without 50,000, and there will be a group of hyenas. ”

"It is impossible to want a holographic mobile phone three or four thousand."

"In one sentence, the holographic market cake is too big, the marching ants eat too much, and some people are jealous."

In response to the anti-monopoly investigation conducted by the multinationals of the marching ant group, after the emergence of the network on the Internet, it was hotly debated.

Nowadays, when the holographic technology is hot, almost all the network platforms are occupied by the news of holographic technology.

Even with holographic movies, holographic e-sports, and the enthusiasm of holographic paradise, the marching ant group has been quickly investigated in the headlines of major news platforms.

Washington.

Wilbur looked at the information in his hands, and all the information and evaluation reports submitted by the following departments.

The holographic monopoly of the marching ant group has caused their concern.

The holographic technology is fully rolled out, and the holographic era is coming. No one can stop it. If the marching ant group continues to monopolize holographic technology, it will be very passive in the future.

Therefore, he had to contact several European powers in private, as well as the heads of Japan, Australia and Canada, to discuss privately the issue of monopolizing holographic technology.

Now the whole piece of holographic cake has been swallowed up by the Chinese people, which is the most uncomfortable.

And this cake is unimaginable.

They launched an anti-monopoly investigation and hoped that the marching ant group could spit out something, at least they would not be so passive in the future.

Not long after, a middle-aged man with a suit and eyes wearing the office entered the office. He was Wilbur’s assistant, Mullen:

The marching ant group headquarters responded. ”

"What did you say?" Wilbur immediately put down the documents in his hand and looked up at Mullen.

“The marching ant group responded that they did not monopolize the market and allowed national branches to cooperate with local official investigations.”

"The expected answer."

The reply to the marching ants is not painful, in the expectation of Wilbur, the reply of the classic standard.

"What should I do next?"

"Talk to the general manager of their branch and give them the conditions to be developed." Wilbur said a little, said.

......

London, England.

Liam is also concerned about the information of the marching ant group.

In the past two weeks, the layout of the holographic technology of the marching ant company has been completed, and the holographic technology has blossomed in all fields. The popularity of the holographic technology has made the army ants gain huge profits.

Last week, they received a private invitation from Wilbur to go to the United States for a secret meeting.

The content of the meeting is the monopoly of the marching ant group on holographic technology.

A huge cake has been formed, and the marching ant group has almost swallowed the cake and controlled the entire holographic market.

Next, holographic technology will definitely develop insanely. How much interest is there?

unimaginable.

Therefore, Wilbur hopes that they can coordinate and limit the monopoly of marching ants, and they all agree.

But they are not stupid. Now that China has risen, they will not offend people because Americans go to chaos.

The company announced that it had launched an anti-monopoly investigation, but did not enter the real investigation, and will not impose any punishment for the time being.

At least look at the reaction of the United States, and what is the reaction of the marching ant group, they have to proceed to the next step, so as to avoid being regarded as a sinner.

"Mr. Liam, the marching ant group has responded. They said that there is no monopoly market, and the branches of various countries are actively cooperating with the investigation." An assistant walked in and said.

"What is the reaction in the US?" Liam's eyebrows picked.

This response is normal. In his expectation, he cares about what action the United States will have after the marching ant group responds, and whether it will be true to the marching ant group.

“They found the manager of the marching ant group in the US branch,” the assistant said.

"Then look at the situation first," Liam said.

The heads of anti-monopoly regulators in the European Union, Japan, Australia and Canada, and Liam's reaction were consistent. After receiving the response from the marching ant group, they did not immediately start the next move.

They won't jump out without a situation that is really good for them.

Although the marching ant group monopolizes holographic technology, it does not show a situation of abuse of monopoly status.

It’s not a wise choice to jump out of this section and offend people.

......

In the conference room, Yin Hongye faced the problem of US official personnel and looked calm.

Because Disney adjusted from it, the United States allowed the holographic projector of the marching ant group to enter the market. The headquarters sent him to the United States to form a branch.

During this time, because of the transformation of the holographic theater, they benefit a lot.

After the first holographic film appeared, the major director teams, including Marvel's team, announced the holographic film production.

Orders for holographic projectors are even more crazy.

At this juncture, the US official informed him that he would conduct an anti-monopoly investigation against them, and now he is looking for his culture, and there are traps everywhere in his speech.

no doubt.

I want to start martyrdom.

However, he is not worried. The company sent him here, responsible for the holographic projector business orders, there is no decision-making power, at most it is a spokesperson.

For all kinds of questions, if he can not answer, he will not answer positively. He can simply answer and will never go deep.

On the other side, Mullen frowned.

He asked the other party to investigate and ask questions, that is, to put up a posture for preparing for anti-monopoly investigation, but although the other party answered his question, he did not have any focus at all, and it did not hurt.

It seems that a punch on the cotton, there is a feeling of not making a force, very uncomfortable.

Huaxia people are really embarrassed.

Gradually, Mullen also lost some patience, took out a document and went directly to the subject.

"This is our condition. As long as your company has promised us these conditions and signed the relevant agreement, we can cancel the anti-monopoly investigation against your company."

chapters.title: Chapter 535: : Refusal And Game
chapters.body:
Chapter 535: : Refusal And Game

“Change the company's operating model, the US branch of the Army Ant Group operates independently, forming a new board of directors and company executives, responsible for US market operations.”

"Reducing the price of holographic projectors."

"Do not refuse to authorize holographic-related patented technology to US companies."

"Do not refuse to sell holographic projector-related hardware accessories (including all models of holographic projectors) to US businesses."

“The marching ant group must invest in a holographic projector production plant in the United States.”

"..."

Yang Yang sprinkled a dozen conditions, after reading these, Zhao Min smiled.

It is simply that the marching ant group will send all the holographic technology to the United States, and the idea is perfect.

Americans are not stupid and want to be fools.

Putting forward such conditions, it feels like the marching ants group will leave them and will close down. But for their shameless, Zhao Min has long been used to it, and there is nothing unusual.

"Refused all their conditions." Zhao Min said.

When they released holographic technology, they had applied for international patents for the crackable hardware technology, and there was nothing terrible to go out of the US market.

The US market is also the business of holographic projectors and seismographs.

Seismographs are technologies related to people's livelihood. They certainly can't limit them. They can only use holographic projectors to make a fuss.

Their prices and contracts are within the scope of the rules, and they are not afraid of the other side's problems. In accordance with the judicial process, they are not afraid of anyone.

If it is really moving, it will not leave the US market.

Although the United States is the largest single market in the world, the profit of holographic projectors is only a icing on the cake for the current marching ant group.

Li Lingfeng did not have any accidents.

He is the vice president of the holographic projector business. He heard this news from Yin Hongye and he was also happy with this condition.

He can make a decision and tell Yin Hongye directly and refuse the other party. However, due to procedural issues, I asked Zhao Min's opinion, and the answer is now expected.

"Let the Law Department follow up, if they investigate, let them check, and want to fight the lawsuit." Zhao Min added.

"Good." Li Lingfeng nodded: "If they want to change other conditions?"

"There are no other conditions, and they are clearly told that we have no monopoly market, no control over product prices, no abuse of dominance, and we will not agree to any conditions."

It can be seen from the conditions of the other party that the purpose of the other party is just to capture the holographic related technology.

Applying for a patent requires disclosure of technology and data.

But the most critical micro-laser control system for holographic projection is still in their hands. This technology core can't be cracked. They don't have patents. There is no micro-laser control system. The holographic device is a box without soul.

It is impossible to produce a holographic projector unless they have developed another laser control system and then obtained the authorization of their holographic patent.

......

"They refused?"

Wilbur nodded lightly, and it would be strange if he promised all at once.

"Ask them for unsatisfactory conditions."

“The head of the marching ant group said that they would not accept any unreasonable conditions. If we investigate, they will cooperate, but we will not talk to us about the conditions as a bargaining chip. He said that they have no monopoly market, no abuse of market dominance, and no Manipulating prices and making huge profits."

When he heard Mullen's words, Wilbur frowned.
