Oil and salt do not enter, the other party's attitude of non-cooperation is obviously on the bar.

Obviously don't want them to finger holographic technology.

This is not a good news.

"If you sue them, how big is the odds?" Wilbur asked.

"It is difficult to say that in the conditions of recognition, they do exist in the monopoly of the market. This is undoubted. The key to abuse of the monopoly market position is our evidence and the witness testimony of the company with the Army Ant Group.

The marching ant group used the advantage of monopolizing a large holographic projector to invest in the construction of a holographic paradise and refused to sell it to other companies. There were unfair competition and deliberate suppression of the opponent's suspicion.

As for the manipulation of prices, they investigated their data, and the pricing of holographic equipment is in line with the pricing principle of the marginal revenue curve. However, the criteria for determining the above conditions are not uniform. In particular, it is necessary to debate in court and see the judge's determination. Said Mullen.

"Investigate them, sue them and give them pressure."

The US official formally sued the marching ant group, suspected of monopolizing, abusing the monopoly of the market, and manipulating the price of holographic projectors.

The news appeared, attracting the attention of the economic circle.

In the impression, this is the first lawsuit suspected of monopoly since the establishment of the marching ant group.

The US official began to prosecute the army ant group monopoly. Within a week, the EU, the United Kingdom, Australia and Canada followed closely. After conducting an investigation into the marching ant branch, they successively sued the marching ant group for alleged monopoly and consistent pace.

For a time, people thought that the marching ant group had a feeling of ambush.

"A boss, with a few small followers, to besiege an ant. Hey, interesting."

"The marching ants are rising."

"Look at how the marching ants respond, this time can not be embarrassed, otherwise it will have serious consequences."

"You guess the next step, is it possible to grab the top of the marching ant group and create a threat to the marching ant group?"

"The picture was similar."

......

“The marching ant group monopolizes the holographic market too much, splitting their company into two, like Mobil Oil.”

"The marching ant is Huaxia Company, not our company. Go home and wash and sleep."

"Go to China to sue them for monopoly, let Huaxia officially punish him, and let Huaxia divide them into two."

"The practice of dividing a monopoly company into two is only in the United States, and there is no other country. The monopoly dispute between transnationals, the monopoly of the enterprises of their own country, and the damage to the interests of other countries, will only close one eye, if necessary Will help.

When a certain company formed a monopoly on China in the past, did we punish a certain pass? When Samsung formed a memory and screen monopoly on other companies, did South Korea punish Samsung?

The same reason, let Huaxia punish the marching ants? impossible. Now that the character has been changed, we still have no self-knowledge and think we are the best in the world. ”

"If China also came to a Wassenaar mechanism, we should cry."

"The marching ant group also monopolizes the seismograph technology, and the pricing is super crazy. How can anyone dare to investigate, why no one dares to sue?"

In response to the anti-monopoly investigation of the marching ant group, there was a debate in the global network and economic forum. China's domestic and international public opinion shows two completely different styles of painting.

At a time when holographic technology is hot, the market for holographic technology has taken shape.

In response to the monopoly dispute of holographic technology, with several countries conducting anti-monopoly investigations for marching ant groups, it has instantly become an international focus.

The marching ant group in the Storm Center was also blocked by various reporters.

The lobby of the 7th floor of the marching ant group.

I want to sit in the arranged press seat and wait for the personnel of the marching ant group to come out. There are hundreds of reporters waiting with him, and they are media reporters of the most mainstream media organizations in China and abroad.

This time, the anti-monopoly investigation of the marching ant group, many media want to interview Chen Mo and Zhao Min, but no accident, declined all interviews.

This is the first time that the marching ant group has responded positively to the anti-monopoly investigations in various countries.

Now the outside world is speculating about how the marching ant group will respond.

Not long after, Li Huai came out from the background and took a seat in the attention of many media.

Li Huai, the head of the public relations department of the marching ant group, is no stranger to journalists and a well-known lawyer in the legal profession.

"Thank you for coming over today."

Li Huai went to the small podium and went straight to the topic.

"We have received a lot of interview requests recently, and we are unable to accept interviews one by one. I am here to give you a unified reply for the anti-monopoly investigation of the products of the army ants group in many countries.

First of all, our group does not have a monopoly market, and does not abuse the market position. The prices of all our products are in line with the pricing principle of the marginal revenue curve. There is no profitable price.

All companies that have signed a cooperation agreement with us are legally compliant, there are no mandatory exclusion clauses, and there is no price discrimination. We will not force our partners to accept any illegal conditions.

We do not have unfair competition. Our group encourages competition. Our chairman has publicly said that we are not afraid to compete with any company and will not take any unfair means to suppress our opponents.

Allegations against our group in many countries are not valid. Our group has responded actively and we do not accept any allegations of violations. If we ignore the facts and make unfair penalties for our group, it will hurt our cooperation and the consequences will be very serious..."

Five minutes later, Li Huaicai stopped. The response was quite satisfactory, but it clearly indicated the position of the marching ant group.

"Mr. Li, you just mentioned that if you make an unfair judgment on the marching ant group, the consequences will be very serious. Do you mean that if you are unfairly punished, will the marching ant group fight back?" The reporter stood up and asked.

"Yes." Li Huai replied clearly.

This is what Zhao Min means.

"If there are unfair accusations to make a penalty, what counter-attack measures will you take? Suspension of cooperation with the country's enterprises or other counter-attacks?"

“If we are treated unfairly in the region, we have to consider whether the region can give our company a level playing field. We do not rule out disruption of cooperation with the country’s companies or withdrawal from the country’s market.”

A self-willed approach, a tough response.

When I heard this reply, everyone was secretly screaming.

Li Huai said this in the face of hundreds of reporters, or the official platform of the army ant headquarters, which means that this is the highest level of the marching ant group.

At the highest level of the marching ant group, there are only two people, Chen Mo or Zhao Min.

The two people have decided that it is true.

If other companies threaten to withdraw from the country's market, perhaps others will only sneer, and their competitors will be happy.

But now it is the marching ant group, the world's most advanced technology company, each product is a cross-era technology, holographic technology does not exist competitors.

The withdrawal of the marching ant group means that they can buy holographic products or other products of the marching ant group, and they can only buy them abroad, or the third party can change hands, the cost and price will be higher, and it is inconvenient.

"Mr. Li, at present, your company's holographic projection products and intelligent robots occupy 100% of the market, and there is already a monopoly market. Why does your company deny the monopoly market?" A foreign reporter stood up.

"We belong to normal product management and sales, no monopoly. Holographic projection belongs to display hardware products and projection hardware, in the display field, as well as LCD and oLeD screens. In addition, there are many ordinary optical projectors.

These products can replace holographic projection technology, and our holographic technology is only an advanced optical projection. In the application market of related fields, our holographic products occupy a fraction, why should we monopolize?

As for the monopoly of the intelligent robot market, the current smart robot market is very big. Our company's robots are only advanced, and the share is even less pitiful. If the law believes that advanced technology is a monopoly, then who will dare to innovate in the future? ”

"..."

Some foreign reporters on the field jumped straight, and if the marching ants group used this angle to politely counterattack in the courtroom, it is not necessarily whoever wins.

This is where the marching ant group says that it has no monopoly.

chapters.title: Chapter 536: : No. 1024 Allogeneic Elemental Crystal
chapters.body:
Chapter 536: : No. 1024 Allogeneic Elemental Crystal

The marching ant group denied all allegations and threatened to suspend cooperation and exit the market.

Li Huai’s response at the press conference sparked an uproar.

This is the first time in the world that there have been high-tech companies threatening to counter the market countries.

The marching ant group must bear some losses, but it is so capricious, so tough to face several countries led by the United States and the European Union, and only the marching ants in the world have this kind of emboldened.

Many people secretly heard this news.

There are typical examples of technical incompetence.

Seismographs, which are related to the people's livelihood, do not say that the prelude of the holographic era is pushed forward, and the development of science and technology is inevitable. Whoever rejects the marching ant group, because the marching ant group controls the holographic patents, means that they cannot get started.

All the countries surveyed by the marching ant group did not expect the marching ants to be so tough.

If the investigation continues, the marching ants lose some of the market.

However, relying on the advantages of the Huaxia market, and having many high-tech, even if it withdraws, it has an impact on the marching ant group, but it cannot make the marching ant group embarrassed, especially in today's hot holographic technology.

In the high-energy laser laboratory, Chen Mo glanced at the indium isomer metal crystals in the laboratory. After reading the data of each instrument, it was confirmed that there was no problem before opening.

"Ink girl, ready to start the 44th experiment."

The largest problem in the synthesis of crystalline material No. 1024 is the energy parameter.

The power of the laser is very important. Once it is too high, it will cause the crystal of the isomer metal to be destroyed. If the laser power is small, the critical condition for the formation of 1024 elemental crystals cannot be reached.

High-energy particles must be bombarded within a critical interval to achieve a retrofit effect.

The 43rd experiment was performed and all failed. This is the 44th experiment. Once and for all, calculations and experiments are now getting closer and closer.

"Ready."

Get Chen Mo’s instructions, and the ink girl around me opens.

"Let's get started." Chen Mo turned his eyes to the lab, which is the ready experiment.

As soon as the instructions fell, in the laboratory, three lasers blasted to the middle of the isomers, and the high-energy particles of the high-energy particle accelerator also blasted toward the isomer metal.

The dazzling light does not see the change in the crystals of the isomers.

Chen Mo wears goggles and can still see the crystal in the middle under strong light. I can only see one outline, I can't see much, but the shape has not changed.

The shape does not change is still, once evaporated, the laser power is too high. The evaporating molecules will decay and will emit a large number of high-energy particles with radiation, which is also harmful to the human body.

The laser bombardment was maintained, and with the bombardment of high-energy particles, the laboratory instruments did not stop.

The values of various instruments are changing. Chen Mo looked up and saw the value of the change within the normal range.

"Ink girl, go out and wait." Chen Mo took off his goggles and left the lab.

The experiment is not completed in two or three minutes. Once it starts, it either succeeds or fails. The data in the middle must fail, so Chen Mo is not useful in the lab.

"Do you say that you can succeed?" In the laboratory of No. 1 Building, in front of Chen Mo, is a design drawing of a new robot, while designing and asking.

"According to the current data, it should be successful. The first three times, already on the verge of success." said the ink girl.

"After the success of the armor, I will give you a new energy and body."

Chen Mo nodded and continued to design the body for the ink girl.

Now the ink girl has more than 20 days of battery life, but it is still subject to energy restrictions. With the reactor and the 1024 elemental material, you don't have to worry about energy, whether it's normal or fighting.

Ten minutes, twenty minutes, an hour passed.

The ink girl who was waiting next to her suddenly spoke: "Mergo, the crystallization of element 1024 has been successful."

"Yes, save the design, look at the past."

Chen Mo dropped the design and walked toward the building where the high-energy laser lab was sitting.

In the high-energy laser laboratory, a lavender hexagonal honeycomb crystal is placed quietly on the laboratory bench. This crystal is the same as the data obtained by the Science Library.

Formed by indium metal, the 1024 elemental element crystallizes.

The 1024 elemental element is special because it is different from conventional radioactive elements. The decay rate of ordinary elements is not affected by external factors, and the decay rate of element 1024 is controlled.

“Check if there is no radioactive radiation?” Chen Mo asked.

He needs to confirm it again. After all, the issue of radiation is not a joke.

The 1024 allogeneic element is the same as the ordinary substance without stimulating external conditions.

However, if it is interfered by strong light, it will radiate high-energy beta particles.

There is an imperfect feature, that is, the volume of 1024 element crystals should not be too large, the upper end of the energy is limited, and the volume is too large, otherwise the energy will be unstable.

“The radioactive environment is within the normal acceptance of the human body.”

"Cooled?"

"Cooled." The ink girl nodded.

"Send it to the test." Chen Mo said, looking at the lavender translucent crystal through the glass.

A robot in the laser lab, after opening the high-energy laser lab, took a dark box into the lab, collected the crystals of No. 1024, and went to another lab.

Functional laboratory.

Here is where the power of the reactor is tested.

In the center of the laboratory, there is a bowl-sized instrument, which is the reaction furnace of the armor.

The laboratory is where the armor reactor is tested. The reactor is connected to the lower body and the current and voltage meters are tested together with the superconductor wires.

The robot sends the dark box into the laboratory, grabs it by the robot arm, and puts it into the reactor.

"let's start!"

Through the glass window, Chen Mo can clear the situation in the laboratory and make sure that there is no problem, let the ink girl start.

When the words just fell, in the laboratory, the reaction furnace lit up the purple-red light, and the number of test instruments began to jump and climbed.

Successful.

Chen Moxin felt a little, holding his fist tightly, and his heart screamed.

He can feel that the brain has a sense of excitement, and the technology library has changed, just like the last time he studied the success of the reaction furnace, which shows that the study of element 1024 has been successful.

At the time of Chen Mo’s excitement, the test results have come out.

At a maximum of 3.84 billion joules per second, the energy released by the reactor is higher than the theoretical power originally designed, which is a good result.

“Check if the instrument can run stably and make more crystals of element 1024 as a backup.” Chen Mo finished, sat down in the chair and entered the technology library.

The reception room of the group headquarters.

Zhao Min looked at the Thunder on the field, Yu Chengnan, and the other side of the Opal president Chen Mingyong and Vivo's Fan Wei, the four most competitive domestic manufacturers came together.

“Do you want to buy a micro holographic projector?”

"Yes." The four men looked at each other and nodded together.

In the mall is an opponent, privately there is no big enemy of your death.

Their purpose is clear, that is, they hope that the marching ant group can sell them to the most critical micro-holographic projectors for holographic mobile phones.

As for the price conditions, it is calculated by the marching ant group.

Now that the holographic era is coming, every manufacturer hopes to enter the holographic mobile phone market.

However, the most critical holographic projection technology at present is in the hands of the marching ant group. Only the marching ant group is willing to sell micro-holographic projectors, and they have the hope to enter.

The holographic mobile phone of the marching ant group occupies the top market segment.

If the marching ant group supplies them with micro-holographic projectors, and with their market advantage, squeeze out the high-end market share of Samsung and Apple, then China's mobile phone manufacturers will take the hegemony in the world.

Any one of them alone came to find the army ant group. Maybe Zhao Min would not agree. Four people would come together and hope to be a little bigger.

"To tell the truth, the production line we are building has not been completely completed. The micro-holographic projectors that are now produced are barely satisfying our own use, and I am afraid that they will not be sold for the time being."

When I heard Zhao Min’s answer, the four looked slightly disappointed.

"When can I have it?" Yu Chengnan said.

Although a few people were disappointed, they still had a glimmer of hope. After all, they all bought the miniature holographic projection of the marching ant group, which is a huge market.

"Not sure." Zhao Min shook his head.

She can be the master, Chen Mo will give the company the decision-making power to her, product operation and company management she can be the master, but involving holographic projectors, knowing that Chen Mo is the best.

"This way? If you are sure, you can inform us that we are sincerely cooperating." Thunder laughed.

"no problem."

Zhao Min nodded and promised to send away a few people before he walked back to his office.

"Ink girl, is he busy now?"

chapters.title: Chapter 537: : There Is No War Of Smoke
chapters.body:
Chapter 537: : There Is No War Of Smoke

Inside the science and technology library.

A silver-negative sphere is in the hands of Chen Mo.

After successfully synthesizing the 1024 element, the golden light in the center of the technology ball has become the size of the marble, which looks very obvious.

When the reactor is completed, only the mung bean size.

He now determines that it is necessary to continuously design and develop the technology of the administrator stage, and Jinguang can continue to grow up, so as to reach the conditions for entering the next stage of authority.

It can be ascertained that the science and technology library is cultivating the research and development capabilities of the successor, and may complete the mission behind this legacy when it has the highest authority.

Just not sure how many technologies to develop, in order to make the entire technology ball into gold.

Can you focus on research and development in a certain field like a science apprentice? These are uncertain and require him to explore.

"Mergo, Zhao Min sister just came to contact, I said that you just finished studying, sleeping." Chen Mo woke up, the ink girl opened.

"She has something to say about me?"

"Yu Chengnan, Thunder, Chen Mingyong and Fan Wei came over, I hope we will sell them to the micro-holographic projectors, and produce holographic mobile phones." said the ink girl.

"What about this? Contact her."

Zhao Min is thinking about the pros and cons of selling miniature holographic projections to the four major factories.

If sold, it means that four manufacturers will join the holographic mobile phone market, and take some price advantages for their mobile phones, which will affect their current mobile phone business.

But the sale of micro-holographic projectors, the benefits of this, is far greater than the impact on them.

At present, the holographic mobile phone of the marching ant group has already determined the brand status of the top market, no one can shake, and is not afraid to compete with others.

"Zhao Min sister, the boss came to the video call."

Zhao Min’s intelligent assistant voice interrupted her thinking. Once connected, Chen Mo's holographic projection linked the holographic equipment in the office and appeared in the office.

"Just completed a topic, Xiao Yan will be a while." Chen Mo said: "What is the problem of micro-holographic projection in trouble?"

"Yes, the ink girl told you."

"You don't have to worry about it, you can sell it to them. The holographic era has arrived. We can't squat forever, let go of this market to make it more dynamic. Moreover, holographic technology should be updated for so long," Chen Mo said.

“Do you have a new generation of miniature holographic projections?”

Zhao Min's spirit was shocked.

If there is a new generation of miniature holographic projection, all problems will be solved.

"With nano 3D printers, the design process of holographic laser emitters is not limited, so that the holographic projection screen can be upgraded to the essence." Chen Mo said.

“When can I finish?” Zhao Min hurriedly asked.

"This is not a problem. The ink girl can solve the problem of the laser transmitter. It doesn't take too long, it can be done at any time. It is enough to make a 3D printer, and the output will increase."

Chen Mo paused a little.

“What is the problem with antitrust investigations now?”

"The United States is preparing to go to court, and everyone else is watching the movements of the United States, and there is no rash action." Zhao Min said.

"How to deal with it, don't worry, there are many ways to make money, we don't need to bow our heads to make money."

Chen Mo also knows that now is the holographic technology for several countries. If the marching ants group shows any signs of softness, those people will think that they are bullying and chasing.

At this time, if you do not face it hard, the consequences will be more serious.

End the call and return to silence in the lab.

Chen Mojing sat down and stood up: "Ink, do you optimize the holographic laser transmitter?"

"No problem," said the ink girl.

“Now I’m designing an ion engine and putting all the theoretical formulas for a small ion engine out.”

Chen Mochao physics laboratory in the past, just entered the laboratory, saw the laboratory screen, there are thousands of formulas suspended in the air.

These are the theoretical formulas of the ion engine, which are much better than the formula of the reactor.

The next study is a small ion engine.

The small ion engine is one of the most critical parts of the armor. The reaction furnace and energy material 1024 element crystals have been successful, and the ion engine is successful.

The armor he designed, part of the body is being manufactured, the related materials have been synthesized, and only the plasma engine is designed to make the part that is connected to the ion engine.

......

Wilbur saw the response from the marching ant group and was in a bad mood.

The marching ant group is so tough, preferring to break the arm and withdraw from the market, and has no choice but to compromise. Their emboldened holographic projection technology.

No matter whether you withdraw or withdraw, there is only one company in the world that can produce holographic projections. The market is there, making money in one way, and buyers need to spend more money to buy.

After the emergence of holographic technology, these domestic people have reacted greatly in these years.

Many people complain that they block the market. They want to buy holographic mobile phones, which can only be purchased from the cattle and purchasing hands at a more expensive price. Or spend more money to travel to China, and buy it back.

The blockade against the marching ant group has long been loose.

Unfortunately, they have always wanted the idea that the marching ant group will bring the production chain to the United States.

Now that the holographic market is fully rolled out, they want to give pressure to the marching ants. At least, they hope that the marching ant group can spit out some technologies in exchange for market opening.

As a result, the marching ant group is so tough and dares to confront the major economies of the world.

“Is there any way to pressure the marching ant group?”

Wilbur looked to Mullen next to him.

"The industry of the marching ant group is too large, medicine, electronics, energy, military, film, amusement park, software, materials, seismographs, etc., each field is the most advanced key product.

Over the years, the marching ants have been laid out to form a huge commercial structure. His main market is in China, backed by China, and spread to the international market. It is impossible to suppress it all. There is no market in our country, but also in other countries. ”

Ma said truthfully.

The situation is a bit awkward now.

They think that marching ants face anti-monopoly investigations, at least take a step back and sit down and talk. However, the marching ant group does not talk directly, and confronts the end, only now has the situation.

"It's better to let people try the water and see the attitude of the marching ant group." Mullen said uncertainly.

"Who are you going? They are afraid not to be the first bird."

"The head is awkward."

......

The countries’ anti-monopoly investigations for the marching ant group and the positive response of the marching ant group without any concessions.

The global public opinion field has continued to heat up, and the courage of the marching ant group to resist several major countries is shocking.

If any listed company dares to be so hard, it will definitely cause stocks to plummet. The most advanced core technology within the stable and united company is the largest reliance of the marching ant group.

The marching ant group is full of wings.

Many people lament that if this pressure is passed, no one can shake the status of marching ants.

A message came from Europe when everyone expected how many countries would counter the marching ant group's tough response.

The Polish court made a judgment on the anti-monopoly case of the marching ant group, and found that the marching ant group had abused the market monopoly position, manipulated the price of holographic products and intelligent robots, and seized the fact of profiteering. A fine of 500 million US dollars; ordered the marching ant group to reduce the price of related holographic products and intelligent robots.

Got a move.

As soon as the verdict came out, everyone knew that the bureau for the marching ant group had begun.

This is a war without smoke and no bloodshed. The next step is to wait for the marching ant group to play.

chapters.title: Chapter 538: : $260 Billion In Cash
chapters.body:
Chapter 538: : $260 Billion In Cash

Marching ant headquarters meeting room.

The main high-level ants are here.

When they heard the Polish verdict, they knew that the other party had now tempted. If it is not handled well, there will be more trouble later.

“Ling Feng, Zhang Yi, you will repatriate overseas cash. You will withdraw the managers and technicians in Poland, announce the dissolution of the Polish branch, close the offline store, and dismiss all local Polish employees except the relevant technical staff. ”

After reading the verdict, Zhao Min put the folder on the table and couldn't see the anger.

Really withdraw?

The top of the field was amazed.

"Don't wait for the appeal, the second decision, then make a decision?" Julie asked.

"Useless, this time from prosecution to judgment, the speed is too fast. We have no disadvantages in the court's plea, this situation is obviously someone behind the intervention. That country, doing stupid things is not once or twice." Li Huai said.

He is the head of the Legal Department of the Army Ant Group and is most aware of the process of this trial.

"Now is just the beginning, attitude is more important than others." Zhao Min said.

Now even if the United States or the European Union make a judgment, she is such a decision. Once hesitated, the wolves will think that you are afraid of him and pursue it.

......

The marching ant group expressed its disapproval of the decision of the Polish court and appealed.

The marching ant group believes that the Polish market is unable to provide a level playing field and withdraws technicians in Poland. There are indications that the marching ants are preparing to disband the Polish branch and dismiss all employees of the Polish branch.

The marching ant group remitted overseas cash back to China. According to the tax data, it is expected to flow back to China with cash of up to US$260 billion.

Three news appeared one after another, causing a sudden loss.

Really withdraw.

Marching ants come true.

In particular, the latter two decisions, as the marching ants responded, did not rule out the interruption of cooperation and withdrawal from the market.

This is the attitude of the marching ant group.

The marching ant group began to fight back and was still a pretty response.

Repatriated overseas $260 billion in cash and dissolved the Polish branch.

This is to say that if an unfair judgment is made, the marching ant group will really go.

The European Economic News: The action of marching ants is obviously to use the advantages of their own monopoly to threaten the countries that are investigating him, to create serious consequences, and thus get a judgment against them.

CNN: The marching ant group repatriates most of its overseas cash and disbands the company's actions in countries that threaten to participate in antitrust investigations.

The Times: The marching ant group repatriates all the cash and is prepared to evade the penalty, suggesting to freeze their accounts and wait for the lawsuit to end.

Regarding the move of the marching ant group to repatriate overseas cash and dissolve the Polish branch, it was reported by Western media that it used its own conditions to threaten the judiciary, and all the news was stirred up.

In particular, the marching ant group repatriated overseas $260 billion in cash to China, leaving the economic circle in turmoil.

It is an indisputable fact that the marching ant group is the company with the most cash reserves. It is indeed horrible to see the strength of the marching ant group.

Despite the horrific cash reserves of the army ants, the marching ants repatriate their funds in a legal and reasonable situation, and no one else can stop them.

“Why is the game between the marching ant group and the Americans the first to suffer in Europe?”

"Because there is a stupid."

"It's really stupid. The master hasn't started to call and bite people. It's no wonder that when the war was in the past, people were 'wheeled' several times."

"..."

Someone soon realized the problem, and the two protagonists were safe and sound, and as a result they were the first to suffer with the excitement.

The marching ant group’s counterattacks, several actions in succession, have forced some countries that are conducting antitrust investigations to slow down. They are at most supporting roles. The protagonists are still not busy, and they will only be shot.

Wilbur saw the action of the marching ant group, and the brows were twisted into a ball.

Decisive, without a trace of muddy water.

The action of the marching ant group's decisive decision is beyond his expectation. It is only an action that shows determination.

The Polish market was not treated at all.

Withdrew $260 billion in cash from Europe.

The money is huge enough to make any capital giant jealous and return to the Chinese market. Huge cash, advanced technology, these are the strength of the marching ant group.

"Is there any action in the EU?" Wilbur looked at Mullen next to him.

"No, they can't stop the repatriation of funds from marching ants. Within the EU, there have been differences. The French suggest that the judgment of the European Court must be based on facts and not be influenced by others, otherwise it will lose credibility, the consequences are very Serious," Mullen said.

“Why did the French help the marching ant group?”

"The main foundation of the Roche family is in France. Over the years, the Roche family has re-emerged in cooperation with marching ants, and its influence in the political and economic circles has increased, and Paris is building an ant park," Mullen said.

Not easy to do.

Wilbur was thinking about the countermeasures for the pressure of the marching ant group, and suddenly his eyes lit up and dialed a phone call.

"Do you have cooperation with the marching ant group? Can you temporarily interrupt some of the chip supply of their holographic mobile phones? Give them pressure." The phone is connected, and Wilbur opens.

"Impossible, the chips of the marching ant group are self-sufficient. We only authorize some patent agreements and some baseband chips. We just want to do business quietly, be responsible for our investor shareholders, and will not participate in this drowning.

In the past few years, Microsoft's system market share has fallen sharply, and Apple's mobile phone market share has shrunk, and stocks have plummeted. The chips of the marching ants are not worse than us. If the marching ants are eyeing us, it is not that I give them pressure, they give us pressure, and our company is unlucky. Don't look for me, can't help. ”

There was a slap in the face of the phone, and Wilbur’s face was black. He didn’t expect it to be rejected by Qualcomm’s president.

The terrorist technology of the marching ant group is not restricted by them at all.

"Contact the head of the marching ant US branch and talk to them."

......

Yin Hongye entered the conference room and saw Mullen and Wilbur, and the spirit was shocked. Raised the gas and walked in without expression.

He didn't know, this time Wilbur came over personally, what happened.

Now that their marching ant group has been blocked, it is likely that Wilbur took the lead.

Sitting down in the position, Yin Hongye said nothing, waiting for the other party to speak.

"Your company is a high-tech company. We are very welcome to enter high-tech companies into our market." Wilbur listened and looked at Yin Hongye.

"Well, you continue, Mr. Wilbur." Yin Hongye said calmly.

Welcome high-tech companies to enter the market and continue to suppress restrictions. This sentence is said, the ghosts do not believe, but Yin Hongye did not say anything, listen carefully.

"We welcome high-tech companies, but your company has been suspected of monopoly and unfair competition."

"Mr. Wilber, we have no monopoly market and no unfair competition. All of our business activities are legal and compliant."

Wilbur looked at Yin Hongye and did not put his words in his heart and continued.

"We can give your company greater market freedom, but we hope that your company can apply for patents, disclose technical data, and build corresponding holographic production lines in our country, and we can recognize your corresponding market monopoly. ”

"We don't have a monopoly. If you suspect that we have any non-compliance, we can sue us in court. We will not accept any conditions in private. Where the company builds the factory is based on the company's needs." Yin Hongye said. .

Son of a bitch.

Wilbur was secretly in his heart.

The set of words of these Chinese people is that oil and salt do not enter.

chapters.title: Chapter 539: : Holographic City Launch
chapters.body:
Chapter 539: : Holographic City Launch

"The secretary, the launching ceremony is almost ready."

When I heard the news from the secretary, Yao Yi was overjoyed. The holographic city is just around the corner, which means that the city card of Binhai City is about to be completed. At that time, it is the time when Binhai City is flying.

It’s just that the ant park has been open for half a month, and there are holographic competitions, which have increased the number of visitors to Binhai by more than one million.

If the holographic city is open, the impact can be imagined. This will also be the most important achievement in his resume, and there will be no accidents in the future.

"Is the security situation in place?" Yao Yi was not happy to be dazzled.

"All in place, and also applied for the assistance of the armed police, entered the Binhai Central Square, we adopted the appointment system, there are strict security checks." Secretary said.

"That would help me to contact the marching ant group, invite Chen Mo and Zhao Min to come over and start the holographic city together."

......

first building.

Zhao Min holds a 6.5-inch mobile phone with an oLeD screen on the front and two circular micro-holographic projectors on the back. The speakers like the audio occupy most of the back area.

On the micro-holographic projector, the tiny pores are bright and silvery, and it looks like a silvery hair bundle is arranged in a circle.

It is the latest holographic laser transmitter, printed on a 3D printer with a hole diameter of only 0.5 microns, which can be slightly rotated on a holographic projector.

This mobile phone is the second generation holographic mobile phone.

The holographic laser emitter is improved by state-of-the-art processes, and the pixel points of a single holographic laser projector are greatly increased. The battery uses a graphene supercapacitor battery to make the battery smaller, giving the motherboard more space and thinner thickness than the first generation.

When Zhao Min starts up, he can see that the holographic projection has the logo of the marching ant group. The holographic image quality is much better than before. In the past, the image quality of the two holographic projections could be achieved. Now a mobile phone can.

"How is the anti-monopoly investigation?" Chen Mo asked.

"There has been disagreement within the EU, requiring the judiciary not to be disturbed by external forces. It is proceeding normally. The island countries are afraid that we will recycle the market of seismographs, and the pace is also slow and cautious.

The Americans are so big, that is, we want to compromise, let us use technology to change the market, and now we are rejected. They can't take us, so it is a bit embarrassing, and the normal judicial process is slowly advancing. ”

Zhao Min said the recent incident and Chen Modu.

Holographic technology has become the hottest technology today, and the daily income of the marching ant group is astronomical.

The holographic film was released for one month, and the global box office revenue was 22.3 billion. It successfully surpassed Avatar and topped the global box office.

Because there are no other holographic films released, some cinemas are still extending the release time of the movie, and the theaters in China continue to open the Spring Festival.

The holographic park is full of people every day, the revenue is horrible; the popularity of holographic games naturally promotes the popularity of holographic mobile phones and holographic projectors.

The revenue of each project is comparable to the cornucopia, which is why Americans are jealous. It is very uncomfortable for such a huge and infinite market to be swallowed up by the Chinese.

"There is also a news, the city official to contact, the holographic city started before the Spring Festival. This is the largest single project in our company's holographic project, Yao Shuji invited you to attend the launching ceremony."

The holographic projects of the marching ant group include holographic films, holographic sports and ant parks and holographic cities. The holographic city is a project that helps Binhai City to create the image of an international metropolis and is the single largest project.

"Now the anti-monopoly in foreign countries is full of wind and rain, and it is also the most popular period of holographic technology. The holographic city is the most important project. This time you participated in the launching ceremony.

Let the world look at the charm of the holographic city, and let the Americans see if they ban us, they will derail the world, which is a good opportunity for us to break the containment restrictions. ”

"This is not bad." Chen Mo nodded.

The outside world was raging because the marching ant group disbanded the Polish branch and withdrew huge amounts of money.

However, after the marching ant group repatriated overseas with $277.3 billion in cash, there were differences within the EU regarding the marching ant group, and it was necessary to remove the intervention of the Americans and must conduct a fair investigation.

The most important Americans, too, do not see much movement, like a slap in the air.

The wind wave was a little calm, and the attention of holographic technology reappeared. Among the holographic projects of external concern, there is one of the most significant holographic projects, the holographic city of Binhai.

As the time of the Chinese Spring Festival approached, the news that the holographic city was ready to open was also released. Those who have experienced holographic movies and holographic competition know the charm of holography.

Almost in the coastal city, people began to make real-name appointments. This is a rare feast, much more important than the previous holographic projects.

On the 25th day of the lunar calendar, there are only five days from the Spring Festival.

Today is the day when the holographic city is open. The whole city of Binhai, the news about the holographic city is flying.

In the morning, head to the main road in the central square of the Marina, all martial law, restrict traffic, and the traffic police and auxiliary police everywhere.

The area and roads near the central square of the Marina are surrounded by various fences. The seawall that faces the Opera House and the Opera House are also separated from the pavilion and provide space for visitors to watch.

The holographic city opened at 7:00 in the evening, because there were too many people in the afternoon, and at noon, tourists who had come from afar came into the square and waited early.

There are ten passages into the central square of Binhai, and tourists and personnel are prohibited from entering the center of the square from the non-main entrance.

In order to ensure security, in addition to the special police and civilian police in various places in Binhai City, they also applied for the transfer of 3,000 armed police to assist security. The people in the organization know that the people who enter the Marina Square at the same time will create a horrible record.

The martial law in the Marina Square starts at noon, at 6 pm, in the Marina Square, it is already crowded with people.

The statistics have been more than 200,000 people.

Within ten passages, there are also people coming into the square, the seawall of the river, the open space of the square, the gymnasium, the library, the art center, the Linhai Park, the financial centers and shopping centers on both sides, all of them are people.

This is the most horrific crowd in the center of the marina, and everyone is waiting for the opening of the holographic city.

Feng Liying marveled at the scene in front of him. After three years, the Marina Square has changed its face, which is totally different from the coastal city she knows.

Today's coastal city has a prosperous scene.

At the seafront of Marina Square, an iconic building stands out, most notably, the newly built fishing tower in Binhai.

It looks like a small waist, and the top is a huge ball, like a big pearl in the hands of a fisherwoman.

Along the fisherman’s tower, there is a giant shell opera house on the island.

There is also a glass stage on the water between the fisherman's tower and the opera house. Eight huge columns surround the stage in the center. The glass on the pillar is reflective and blends with the surroundings.

On both sides of the pillow of the Marina Square, at a distance, there is a huge pillar, and in the middle of the square, every other distance, there is also a huge pillar, just like the guard of the square.

On each of the columns, several large holographic projectors are installed and stretched to the beach. Because of the Spring Festival, the surrounding decoration is very festive.

What changes this is the marching ant group.

Looking at the time, Feng Liying sat in the square and looked up, waiting for the holographic city to start.

The people around are sitting down because they know that holographic scenes can be seen this evening, no matter where you look.

Near 7 o'clock, all holographic projectors illuminate.

Between the columns, a giant screen of holographic projections appeared suspended in the air, and Yao Yi and Chen Mo appeared on the screen.

The area where the two are located is a stage near the square, facing the fisherman's tower and facing the central square of the sea.

Looking at the crowds below, Yao Yi is excited. It took nearly three years, and today it is finally the time when the whole center of Binhai is in front of the world.

He can't even wait.

"Dear citizens, friends, today is the big day of Binhai. This beautiful city is like the image of a coastal fisherwoman. It is kind, brave and hardworking. The future of Binhai is full of boundless hope. I know everyone. I can't wait to see the true face of the holographic city, I can't wait to see it, so my keynote speech ends here."

Yao Yi went to the microphone and said it was simple. He smiled and said hello to others.

His words immediately attracted the cheers and applause from the audience.

"Comrade Chen Mo, I am here."

Yao Yi left the small podium and gave Chen Mo a gesture.

“Thank you, I am pleasantly surprised by my technology and technology, which can bring you unlimited laughter and a better life. Today is a brand new chapter in Binhai. I can feel the urgent feelings of everyone, I also Not much to say."

Chen Mo and Yao Yiwei made a few words, so that the cheers below were higher than the waves, and the applause and cheers of more than 200,000 people had already shaken the clouds.

In the cheers and applause, the two walked to the start button of the holographic city, tacitly pressing the huge start button.

chapters.title: Chapter 540: : The Magical Holographic World
chapters.body:
Chapter 540: : The Magical Holographic World

Behind the fishing tower, the holographic projector lights up, as the sleeping beauty wakes up.

This is the landmark building of the coastal city, from the bottom of the tower to the top, more than 350 meters. The next moment, a giant portrait, starting from the bottom of the tower, wrapped the outside of the fishing tower.

All the people who saw this scene in the square, collectively exclaimed and shouted.

In the exclamation, the image of the ‘Beach Fisherman’s figure of more than 300 meters was slowly taking shape.

The neck is wearing pure white beads, the net is fishing nets, the trousers are lightly pulled, the blue silk is flying, the body is graceful, and the hands are dragging the beads at the top of the fisherman's tower, such as the high-rise pearls.

The expression is joyful and shy, pure and generous, showing the world the bright pearls that are supported by the hands. The dagger is slightly lower, and the beauty seems to be overlooking the bustling coastal city.

The image of the more than three hundred and fifty meters tall toad fisherman was formed under the eyes of everyone.

More than 200,000 people looked up and looked incredulously at the holographic statue of up to 350 meters in front of them, and they were shocked by a underground bus.

The statue of Yubai has no color, and it has an infinite beauty. With the melodious music of the ‘Oriental Pearl’, this scene makes the audience at the scene passionately cheer.

Yu Bai excitedly held the mobile phone in his hand and photographed the huge statue in front of him.

In order to get the best position, he waited until the afternoon. Seeing this scene, he knew that one afternoon was not waiting, everything was worth it.

This is the most shocking and beautiful statue he has ever seen.

Like him, the other people I saw were incredible.

Through live media footage, news and circle of friends, this scene spreads all over the world. Holographic movies are amazing, holographic sports is blood, holographic paradise is magical, and now it is a holographic city, it is shocking.

More than three hundred meters of holographic statues are completely displayed in front of the world.

"My God, this is the most beautiful statue in the world."

"This is the image of Binhai. Today, this giant will stand on the top of the world and represent the symbol of the rise of China."

"Only a holographic projection can unleash the creator's imagination and shape such a crazy holographic statue."

“The people in Binhai are living in modern times, and we all live in ancient times.”

"..."

More than three hundred meters of holographic statues, unprecedented, the world's other iconic statues compared with the front of the statue, are small and humble.

Yao Yi excitedly looked at the holly statue of the fisherwoman in front of her eyes.

On the small holographic sand table, he saw the simulated renderings, but the sandbox was too small, and it was only when he saw this scene that he was shocked.

Their position, just in front of the fisherwoman's feet, in front of the giants of more than 300 meters, how small he seems.

This will be the landmark of Binhai City, the image of the international metropolis of Binhai City, starting from this holographic statue.

He has been able to anticipate the sights of tourists from all over the world. At that time, it will greatly promote the growth of the economy and service industry of the marching ant Binhai City, and become an international metropolis just around the corner.

"This is just the beginning."

Chen Mo looked up at the holographic projection statue of the fisherwoman.

His words just fell, and the large holographic projectors at Marina Square began to concentrate on the square.

In the sky, a red dragon circling out, roaring into the sky, a piece of dragon scales, lifelike, let the people under the square open their mouths and look at the scene.

Then the phoenix came out of the fire and rose to the sky.

The humming sound is far and near and audible. I don’t know if the phoenix was born. Phoenix appeared, and Kirin also rose to the sky.

The auspiciousness of the ancient myth is full, close to the Spring Festival, and now the holographic city has just opened, and at this moment a festive atmosphere, a true visual feast.

The scene is jubilant, the audience on the field, can not wait to have several cameras at the same time, many frequent scenes, simply can not shoot.

The theme of the festive scene did not dissipate.

In the glass stage in the middle of the water, holographic fragments of the Eight Immortals crossing the sea are being performed. The fences of the entire seawall are tourists photographed by mobile phones.

The exclamation sounded one after another.

On the Marina Square, the image of various scenes shaped by holography is constantly changing.

The world of flowers, the ice and snow kingdom, the underwater world, the holographically shaped characters, and the animals all appear in the sky through various changing scenes, and even land in the crowd, with the effect of flying outside the sky.

Amy's scene is shocking and complicated.

Shocking is a magical scene that I saw. It is complicated because it is China, not her country.

I have the same feelings as her, and there are other foreign tourists.

Here is China, a once-weak country. In the past few decades, science and technology have grown from scratch. Today, the rise of marching ants, technology has surpassed their country.

Unlike the big scenes that are shocked outside, the underground malls and shopping malls are another magic.

In the shopping mall, holographic advertisements are all on, and endorsement videos of various holographic models and stars can be seen everywhere.

In the street area of the clothing, there is a holographic table, which can be used to enter clothes in various styles in the store. You can try on the clothes through holography, and you can even purchase the reservation directly. At this time, the girl who wants to experience is growing up.

......

"Come on the group, hit them, steal the tower on the road. Steal the tower... Someone is going to catch it... Run."

Xu Gao grabbed the gamepad and watched the huge game map. Around the holographic game map, surrounded by a large audience, watching him play.

Here is the game area of the underground mall, the holographic game area of "Hero" and "King", and the holographic fighting pool of "King of Fighters".

Surrounded by, almost lined up, waiting for a game of game fans. The game of 10 yuan is a little more expensive than the Internet cafe, but the holographic projection here is even more cool. There are still many viewers watching the photos, which is very rewarding.

Next to it is the karaoke room of K song, holographic projection cartoon characters dance.

Throughout the underground shopping streets and shopping malls below the Marina Square, holographic projections can be seen everywhere, through holographic projections installed in the aisles.

If you are lucky, you can also meet a variety of holographic animals and holographic street dance dance performances.

If you pay a dollar, you will have your favorite cool holographic projection pet, accompanying you to go shopping, lead the way. Originally belonging to comics, the characters in the virtual can also appear in reality through holography.

There is a sense of sight that traverses into the world of science fiction.

Hey.

Tilly pressed the phone shutter and took a picture of the scene inside the mall, feeling like never before. She came to experience the ant park to travel, but I did not expect to encounter the good things that the holographic city opened.

Everything here is so magical, full of science fiction, this is not available anywhere else.

“This is the magical holographic world, Huaxia Binhai.”

Tilly sent the picture to her tweet, then squeezed the crowd and slowly moved toward the next place.

At this time, on Twitter, after seeing all kinds of magical holographic scenes in Binhai City, the netizens in the United States have already become a group, and it is about the discussion that should not limit the marching ant group.

“I hope that the marching ant group will enter the hands of our market.”

"We don't allow other products of the marching ant group to enter the market. It's a mistake that can't be wrong. The stupid executives always think they are the first."

"It’s not terrible to be backward. The terrible thing is that you are not willing to accept the backward reality and still lie to yourself."

“What is the significance of the high-level restrictions on the marching ant group? Is the marching ant group afraid of not having a US market? It’s ridiculous! The high-level ‘elite’ is always so arrogant.”

“It is recommended that the market be fully open to the marching ant group, otherwise we will become a backward country.”

Numerous remarks are calling for the opening of the market to the marching ant group. And now it is during the US antitrust investigation of the marching ant group.

Washington.

Wilbur's face is not very good.

Just after breakfast, I saw the live broadcast of the holographic city of Binhai. The shocking scene is even more shocking than the holographic park.

It forms a commercial district and will become one of the most active regions in China's economy.

The leader of this globally shocking event is the marching ant group they want to force and seduce.

The opening of the holographic city, the world's attention, can be sure that holographic technology is now widely available to ordinary people, and it is already unstoppable.

Without the marching ant group entering the market, it may not be long before they become a country that looks more backward. And if the market is opened, it means that he lost the battle and bowed to the marching ant group.

I have to say that he is also feeling the pressure now.

chapters.title: Chapter 541: : Wang Bian
chapters.body:
Chapter 541: : Wang Bian

"Rejecting the marching ant group is right or wrong? 》

A paper tweet is also hot on Twitter.

The opening of the holographic city will completely reveal the charm of holographic technology and cause a global sensation. In response to the deliberate containment of the marching ant groups by the countries, there has been a fierce debate in the international arena.

Everyone was aware that the discussion was put on the table and the quarrel was fierce.

"The fact that the marching ant group is suspected of monopoly is a fact. It is also legitimate to investigate him. What is wrong?"

"The market does not oppose the monopoly of scale. It opposes the abuse of monopoly market power. The marching ant group does not have any signs of abuse of the market and is targeted for no reason. Is this not a mistake?"

“I didn’t see them threatening to withdraw from the European market? Isn’t it using their own strengths to threaten the market?”

"He is a counterattack, what did the stupid thing do, don't you understand? I support the marching ants, and I counterattack like this."

"..."

The glare of the holographic city and the debate on the restrictions on marching ant groups have occupied international social platforms and forums.

In the US market, there has been a call for the release of restrictions on the marching ant group, and this voice has gradually expanded. There are even groups that spontaneously launch petitions against the US official on the Internet.

Zhao Min looked at the relevant news and played the second generation holographic mobile phone in his hand.

After the holographic city opened, all kinds of news were hot.

They immediately halved the pressure of deliberately suppressing restrictions in many countries. They only need to break through the last level of the other party and block the bankruptcy. They will win the game.

The biggest king bomber is the second-generation holographic mobile phone in her hand, and the first generation of miniature holographic projectors for sale.

Released the second generation of holographic mobile phones.

The first generation of miniature holographic projectors is provided to mobile phone manufacturers.

If you don't compromise, you will be eliminated.

Nowadays, mobile phones are a necessity for one person. The most intuitive feeling of ordinary people facing technological advancement is the black technology on mobile phones.

The release of the first generation of miniature holographic projectors, if the restrictions of the marching ant group, means that electronic products will fall behind a generation. Holographic mobile phones are widely used, and if they keep their mobile phones, they will be eliminated.

Eliminating several American mobile phone companies will not hurt.

What Zhao Min is thinking now is how to put pressure on Americans and let Americans be soft. It is victory for them.

“President, Vice President Li Lingfeng came to the news that the production line of the miniature holographic projector has been completed and can be mass-produced in the future.” Lanxi knocked on the door and entered the president's office, and handed the documents to Zhao Min.

"Good news." Zhao Min took the file.

Since the release of holographic phones, production has been tight.

They add mass production again and again, because of the limitations of the process, can not meet the demand. After the nano 3D printer came out, these problems were solved. This time, eight production lines were completed, meaning that they are not subject to production constraints.

"Notice Julie, let her prepare for the second generation of holographic mobile phone conferences after the year." Zhao Min said.

"Good." Lanxi asked.

"And, contact the heads of the four major manufacturers, let them come over to talk about the licensing of micro-holographic projectors. Tell them that they are free for two days, otherwise they will have to wait a year to talk."

Suddenly thought of something, Zhao Min laughed.

“Distribute the news of our sale of miniature holographic projectors.”

......

“The marching ant group announced the sale of miniature holographic projectors?”

At Apple's headquarters, at the board meeting, the directors on the field heard the news and were quiet. The first Cook's tired face, white hair is a lot more than before, frowning.

The rise of Huaxia Company, especially the rise of the marching ant group, brought them the most direct harm.

The emergence of holographic mobile phones quickly robbed the top market, and they became the second line; this is not counting the notebooks, office computers, and termite intelligent computer systems known for safety.

Every electronic product hits their life. Apple's stock price has fallen and fallen, and its market share has been squeezed. It is impossible to make a rebellion.

Now the marching ant group wants to sell micro holographic projectors.

It is hard to imagine that if the mobile phone manufacturers in China get micro-holographic projectors, they will lose even the second-tier market.

The consequences are terrible.

"Now tell me what?" Cook said.

The directors on the field are not in a good mood, and now is Apple's toughest moment. The stock price fell and fell again, almost squatting. Holographic mobile phones are widely used, they have not kept up, and the consequences are eliminated.

“Is there a way to get a contract for a micro-holographic projector?” The chairman of the board is Levinson, the chairman and Ceo of Genentech, the myth of Wall Street, a middle-aged man with glasses.

"I asked the president of Greater China to talk to them. There is no news yet." Cook replied truthfully.

"I don't think the hope is big. The official united the countries to block the army ants. They only need to say that the official refuses their related products to enter our market. There is no way to talk about it. Get rid of us, give the official a warning, what is the ratio? Is this counterattack better?" East Beable partner Susan spoke.

As soon as this was said, everyone’s face changed slightly.

The marching ants fight with the US official and mess up their important business. This is the sharpest counterattack.

If they don't get the micro holographic projectors of the marching ant group, they will face the fate of being completely eliminated. It is really possible that they will not recover.

“Is there any other way?” said another female director, Zhong Binyu.

"So many countries have blocked them and they can't do anything. What can we do?" James, who has been quiet, laughed at himself.

The current marching ant group, and a few years ago, was not an order of magnitude. They used to have no way to march ants, let alone now.

"Maybe you can use Disney's approach."

The old man who had never spoken, opened his eyes and looked deep. He was former Vice President Al Gore.

"To the official lobby, let them cancel the restrictions on the marching ant group. Disney is letting the ants of the marching ant group come in to transform the theater, isn't that using this method?

We use the same method, the influence of everyone here is definitely there, let people lobby for official open restrictions, let marching ants get to the US market, and we have reached a cooperation with them. ”

Everyone shines.

And they are thinking about the same way, and hope to cooperate with the marching ants, as well as Samsung.

The marching ant group announced the sale of miniature holographic projectors, and the news shocked the entire scientific community. Every mobile phone manufacturer quickly dispatched personnel to China, hoping to talk with the marching ant group.

After the opening of the holographic city, people with a little eyesight know that holographic technology is about to be fully popularized, and rejecting holographic projection means falling behind.

......

The first floor laboratory.

Chen Mo did not care about the battle outside. His main mind was still on the study of the battle armor.

At this time, on the holographic test bench, the instrument is slightly larger than the fist, and the middle is a ring that is delicate to the extreme. The silver-gray appearance is very sci-fi, and the edge is connected with the chopstick-sized pipe.

This is a holographic projection image of an ion engine.

Ion engines are not traditional fuels, but instead let the medium be ionized at high temperatures, and electrons run out of atoms or molecules. The electrodes are then accelerated by the cathode, and the atoms or molecules that lose electrons are positively charged, and the escaping electrons are negatively charged to form a plasma.

Then, by accelerating the electric field, the accelerated ions are ejected from the engine, thereby generating a reaction thrust.

"Ink girl, simulation test again." Chen Mo said.

"Do you want full power?"

"Yes."

On the test rig, the projection of various lines appeared, the blue plasma flame appeared, and the holographic display simulation data began to jump with the simulation test.

The longer the blue flame, the faster the data changes.

"This is the limit of theory." said the ink girl.

"I have not met the requirements and continue to improve."

Chen Mo looked at the data and shook his head slightly. Sitting in a chair and looking at the design of the ion engine, the data of the various components of the ion engine is clear in his head, and the improvement method is also flashing rapidly in his mind.

About half an hour, Chen Mocai frowned, the design of the ion engine was adjusted to enlarge.

"Ink girl, how is your new body made?" Chen Moo asked as he improved.

The current body of the ink girl is the design of the war robot, but the apprenticeship technology, the core energy is the graphene supercapacitor battery, the battery life is only 20 days, the war mode is shorter, and the laser weapon can not be supported. Frequent use.

After getting the armor materials and energy reactor, Chen Mo decided to re-create a body for the ink girl.

The new body is to use the reactor as energy, the battery as a backup energy, to remove most of the space occupied by the battery, the new body can apply more and more powerful technology.

"The current progress will take about three days to complete," said the ink girl.

"That's not bad, there will be a new body after the year."

Chen Mo focuses on his own research.

The reaction furnace and energy crystallization have been completed, and the development of the battle armor has reached a critical stage. If the ion engine is completed, the development of the battle armor will come to an end.

chapters.title: Chapter 542: : Qi Renzhi
chapters.body:
Chapter 542: : Qi Renzhi

The small fisherman took a cup of hot water and entered the study.

At this time, the small fish, after the blue silk scattered, revealing a crystal-clear earlobe, wearing a short nightdress, squatting arms, white long legs straight to the roots, white and flawless.

The front of the sling nightdress is slightly lower, there is no trace of defense, and the big white snow can't cover it. Today's small fishing, less the former green scorpion, a lot of special charm.

Seeing that Chen Mo was playing with the design of the strange holographic instrument, the ink girl was by his side, hesitated a little, and went over.

"Little fisher sister." See Xiaoyu come in, ink girl smiled and said hello.

"Yeah." Xiaoyu nodded to the ink girl, walked to Chen Mo's side, with a mischievous smile on his mouth, bent down and placed the water in his hand next to Chen Mo.

"Drink of water."

"Uh??"

Chen Mo dared to turn his head and saw a scene of great visual impact.

Hollow, the sling skirt is not obstructed at all, the peaks are like a gathering, the gully is snowy.

Seeing the smile of the little fish naughty, Chen Mo also smiled helplessly, and the arm took advantage of the opportunity to take a small fisherman into his arms and sit down, and his eyes fell on the design of the ion engine. These two days have been modifying the design, simulation test, and modification, and have been more and more perfect.

"Unparalleled sleep?"

"Sleep." Xiaoyu glanced at the ink girl and found that the ink girl was looking at them curiously. His face was ashamed. Although the ink girl was a robot, she looked like a human being, so she was very uncomfortable when she was looked at.

After a little shyness, Xiao Yu did not care, and looked down on Chen Mo’s research.

"what is this?"

"Small ion engine. Have you seen Iron Man? This is the engine of Iron Man's armor, and there is a final modification." Chen Mo said.

"You are studying the armor?" Xiao Yu's mouth is slightly open, and the beauty is full of surprise.

"Well, it will be a success soon. If you want, you will also be given a set." Chen Mo saw Xiao Yu's astonished appearance, and his mouth smiled slightly.

"This thing is also a decoration for me." Xiao Yu quietly sat in Chen Mohuai, feeling Chen Mu's body changes, his face was somewhat unnatural, and secretly looked at the ink girl: "Would you like me to go back to the room to wait for you?"

"No, it doesn't matter much. You can sit quietly and don't mess around. It doesn't take too long." Chen Mo was left in the arms of Xiao Yu, his fingers constantly moving on the holographic image, modifying the data of some parts.

Xiao Yu took the waist of Chen Mo and did not dare to move, for fear of disturbing him.

The first time I was so close to Chen Mo's work, it was amazing. Mei looked at the small ion engine. Although I couldn't understand it, it still felt very good.

After a while, Xiaoyu turned his attention to Chen Mo's face, focusing on the appearance, so attractive. I can meet this man and save the earth in my life.

Xiao Yu thought badly, sitting quietly in Chen Mohuai.

After fifteen minutes, Chen Mocai stopped.

In front of him is a complete small ion engine.

The modification has been completed.

"Ink girl, simulation test again." Chen Mo twisted his body, gathered a small fish in his arms, looking at the ink girl.

"it is good."

The holographic screen is spread out in front of the table, and the ion engine emits a blue flame. As the data continues to jump, the flame of the fireworks is also elongated.

Xiao Yu looked at this scene, and Mei Hao did not know what to do.

"The theoretical limit data."

For a while, the ink girl opened her mouth. In front of Chen Mo, it was a lot of data. The ordinary people didn’t know what it meant.

"Yes, you are now printing the engine according to this design." Chen Mo checked twice and confirmed that the data met his requirements before he said.

"Okay." The ink girl nodded.

With the design of the ion engine, Chen Mocai put his attention on the human body in his arms.

“Completed?” asked Xiao Yu.

"finished."

Chen Mo nodded, reaching out and groping on her, and took a look at the nightdress. The visually pleasing lace ‘****, the temptation is infinitely magnified.

"So sexy? Want to seduce me?" Chen Mo felt the nose hot.

"Yeah, do you like it?" Xiao Yu smiled.

"I am a woman, I don't accept temptation." Chen Mo's palm is not honest, and he is rubbing on the long legs of the day.

"Ink girl looked at it and went back to the room."

Xiao Yu's face is very unnatural, and he is buried in Chen Mohuai.

"You all know that the ink girl is watching, and wearing such a bold temptation to seduce me? Now I know shy?" Chen Mo said.

The ink girl has been curious to look at the two, with a smile on her lips. For her present, human emotions are temporarily incomprehensible and not shy.

"I went to sleep with Xiaoyu, ink girl, you also go to rest." Chen Mo picked up a small fish.

"Little fisher sister, can I sleep with Mergo?" The ink woman squinted her head and curiously opened her mouth.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu are both stunned and looked at the ink girl in amazement. I did not expect her to ask these words.

Xiao Yu curiously looked at the ink girl, did not jealous, suddenly thought of something, and gently smiled: "When I go back to my mother's home next time, you wear me like this to ask Merle, he did not promise to see him. ”

"Oh, well, thank you Xiao Yujie." The ink girl nodded with a smile.

If you don't know that the ink girl has no emotions, the outsiders really think that this is happy.

Chen Mo is crying and laughing. The little fish in his arms are like curious babies. The ink girl is artificial intelligence. He can help Chen Mo in research, but human emotions are like a blank piece of paper.

For the ink girl, she can't talk about jealousy, and the existence of the ink girl is too special, almost inseparable from Chen Mo, and is the biggest help to Chen Mo.

The ink girl left behind and returned to her room.

At home, she also has her own room. Xiao Yu took the ink girl as a normal person and arranged a room for her. It was as bright and warm as the room of the ordinary girl. The decoration was simple and luxurious, and there was the same scent of perfume as the ink girl.

The difference is that there is no cosmetic dressing bottle, bottle and jar of cosmetics, the bedside of the room, but there is a charging pile similar to the scale.

Sitting back on the bed, the ink girl's eyes fell on the LCD screen on the wall.

The screen lights up, playing a picture of a couple of TV dramas kissing and shy. For her, emotion is an unknown blank, no feeling, the data is temporarily unable to simulate human emotions and emotions.

Chen Mo also knows that the ink girl herself sees the emotional TV drama. She will not be surprised to see it. The ink girl can learn independently.

Chen Mo also encouraged her to watch this emotional TV series.

He has been searching for the way to let the ink female intelligence evolve, but did not find it, so let the ink girl live a life like ordinary humans, hope that these data can help the future intelligent evolution.

The ink girl is now almost the same as the human being. There is no difference except for the true emotional emotions and desires of human beings.

Just like when the body was designed, the ink girl wanted Chen Mo to retain the female sexuality. It was all curious. This curiosity is the ability of the ink girl to learn independently. However, it is impossible to do anything beyond the law without the authorization of Chen Mo.

"Ink is really magical, and I don't know how to have human emotions." Xiao Yu is still in Chen Mohuai, still amazed by the words of the ink lady.

"You are not afraid that she has feelings, and you rob my husband?"

"She listened to me, and she was just like a blank sheet of paper. I don't have to worry about this, and her existence is a bit special. People can't afford vinegar and can't get angry." Xiao Yu didn't care, then it meant a lot. Looking at Chen Mo: "If she really wears me like this to find you, will you be embarrassed~~"

"Maybe more than one machine girlfriend is also good, Qi people's sorrow... painful pain..." Chen Mo said, before he finished, he felt a pain in his waist.

"I still want to be together!" Xiao Yu let go, smiled and said: "But this palace is going to have you a more machine girlfriend... ah... hey!"

Chen Mo threw Xiao Yu to the bed and rushed up.

The next morning, Xiao Yu got up to prepare breakfast, and Chen Mo got up early to get up and exercise. The ink girl appeared on the side of Chen Mo on time, as always, quiet.

Near the Spring Festival, now has a holiday, Chen Mo also wants to bring a small fishing and unparalleled back to his hometown, to accompany his family for the holidays. So I didn't go to the company, and the research on the ion engine came to an end.

“Everything is packed up?” Chen Mo asked after breakfast.

"Packed up, except for some gifts, others don't have to take too much, they have already let the Black Hawks put them in the car." Xiao Yu Bang unparalleled finishing his clothes and checking his own things.

"Go."

chapters.title: Chapter 543: : Zudi
chapters.body:
Chapter 543: : Zudi

Hekou Village, Qinghe Town, a very ordinary small village, is located on a small river flowing into the bay, with smooth traffic. Twenty years ago, after repairing the road, Chen Mo also donated some money to renovate a few years ago.

After so many years of development, the villagers have already had a good day.

Here is the home of Chen Mozu’s family, where the ancestral temple is located. I read elementary school here, and later moved to Huacheng to study because my parents wanted to work.

These years have been the years of Binhai City and Huacheng. This year, in the ancestral home, Chen Mo also came back with a small fishing and unparalleled.

It’s already in the afternoon, it’s not too cold near the big year. Under the sun map, it is a field of gray and green. The buffalo is on the slope. I saw some people pulling the bean sprouts in the field, and some are burning the beans. The cultivation of the next spring, the white smoke of the wilderness. The sky is white and mottled, the blue is clear and translucent, and there is no urban gray-blue stain.

The picture is very harmonious.

This is the first time I saw the field, and I was held by Chen Mo, and I looked around excitedly through the window.

"Hey, is that a cow? It's different from a cow, and there is a calf."

"Yes, it's a buffalo, not the same as a cow. He can help the farmer's uncle."

"Oh, there is a fire."

"That was the uncle who was burning the bean stalks, and waited for spring to plant rice," Chen said.
