"Oh." The little girl seemed to understand and nodded, and pointed to the sky: "What bird is that bird?"

"Swallow, look at the scissors tail of it."

For the unparalleled, all this is novel, and the questions on the road, Chen Mo have answered one by one.

Three cars crossed the field and soon entered the village.

As the Spring Festival approached, the village mouth wrote a couplet that welcomed the home. The small bunting on the top of the road and the plastic lanterns hung, it looked very festive. Occasionally you can see the yellow-red on the red background, the banner that the boss gave the hometown how much money.

Seeing Chen Mo’s passing by, the roadside is fine, and the big aunt who is playing cards and chatting: “Who is this car? It’s so beautiful, it should be expensive.”

"Old Chen's family, the children have developed a university, and have opened a very powerful technology company. Billionaires, who are worth more than 100 million yuan, the primary schools in the village and the middle schools in the town are covered by their family's donations. The cultural scene and temples in the village, as well as the road to renovation, are all new and well-paid for their families.

"Is the old Chen family married?"

"I heard that I got married, and I spent a lot of money in the coastal city."

"Unfortunately, there is only one child in the old Chen family. I remember that when I was in elementary school, my niece was still a classmate with him."

The head of the village is in the gossip, and Chen Mo’s car is also close to home.

A brand new four-storey villa building, a small courtyard, the front is the field, compared with some old small bungalows around, some awkward.

At home, Shao Xuemei is busy in the kitchen, washing vegetables and stewing soup. Chen Shanhe sat in the living room, his face was red and full of faces, all of them were happy.

In order to live in the past, they had to settle in Huacheng for a long time, but here is the root, the ancestral home and the ancestral cemetery are here, and the children have a good time to come back to repair.

"Why haven't you come back yet? Is this child talking about the village?" Chen Shanhe sat in the hall, looking out through the window from time to time.

"In the past two minutes, you have said it ten times." Shao Xuemei, who is busy with dinner, said.

"I don't know if there is no pair of skinny." Chen Shanhe didn't care, drinking tea and waiting.

When the two men chanted, the vehicle had stopped at the door. Chen Mo was holding the unparalleled from the car, and Chen Shanhe had already left the teacup and walked out of the house.

"Grandpa, I am back with my father and mother." The little girl saw Chen Shanhe, and said sweetly.

"Hey, come back, come over, grandpa hugs, see if there is any thinner." Chen Shanhe rushed to meet, from Chen Mo's hand to take the unparalleled, very happy smile, holding the unparalleled to go to the house: "Grandpa to you There is a room, there are a lot of dolls that you like, go and see."

"Thank you Grandpa, this is Minlu's unparalleled lollipop, it's delicious! Give it to Grandpa." The little girl took a lollipop from her pocket and handed it to Chen Shanhe.

"Oh, good." Chen Shanhe smiled more than a month.

"Grandma also has it."

"Oh, well, Grandma likes it very much, and it’s really sensible."

Shao Xuemei took the unparalleled candy and was happy than getting a piece of gold.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu moved a piece of stuff from the car, and the Black Hawk, White Pearl and Ink Girl came to help. The small fish bought a lot of things, and the trunks of the three cars were all stuffed.

"There is no shortage of things at home, how can I buy so much?"

"It's all the clothes that Xiaoyu bought for you, the new year's goods, and the wine for Dad." Chen Mo took the gift box in his hand and lifted it. He usually didn't have time to set up these things.

"Small fish don't have to buy so much next time, there are all at home." Hearing was made by Xiao Yu, Shao Xuemei's face showed a kind smile: "You wait, I am cooking, and soon I will be fine."

"I will help," said Xiao Yu.

"No, it will be good soon. You don't have to bother with one person. The previous ancestors didn't fix it. You haven't come back in the past few years. Now come back for the first time, Shanhe, you accompany Xiaomo and Xiaoyu to the temple." Shao Xuemei Said.

"Yes, let the ancestors meet the daughter-in-law of our family, and my granddaughter." Chen Shanhe holds the unparalleled.

The ancestors were next to the family, and the Chen Shanhe generation passed down alone. He only had Chen Mo’s son. However, the ancestors have been repaired, there are many, and the decoration is also retro style. The cards are old and have new paint.

"Our Chen family was originally prosperous. When the anti-Japanese war, when your grandfather came home, his grandmother had already passed away. The brothers and sisters fled the escape, leaving and disappearing.

Grandparents walked early, and Dad didn’t read much in the past. He didn’t have much skill. Those who went to the west could only support Chen Mo. I have to rely on you in the future. ”

Chen Shanhe ordered a fragrance and handed it to Chen Mo and Xiao Yu. The face was full of emotion.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yuu both took the incense and solemnly inserted the incense burner. Unparalleled, there is also a kind of worship, and the incense is inserted into the incense burner.

"Well, I have worshipped my ancestors and went back to dinner." Chen Shanhe holds the unparalleled, and does not give Chen Mo and Xiao Yu a chance.

It’s already a night after dinner.

Chen Mo changed his casual clothes, and took a small fishing and ink girl out of the house, and there was no match.

Every year during the Spring Festival, behind the temples in the village, there will be a stage to watch the show.

Chen Mo donated money, built a cultural stage here, and there is a square and some sports and fitness facilities. The aunty mother in the village has danced here in the square. The two years of the stage came to perform, and the village committee will organize the performance of the square dance.

Today's villages are not as slumbered as the outside world, and the standard of living is almost the same as that of the average family in the city.

The village's uncles and aunts, and children, don't care much about the news, so I have never seen Chen Mo, the family went out for a walk, and no one bothered. Chen Mo did not want to make a lot of noise, everyone knows, so he let his father refuse the welcoming ceremony in the village.

However, I saw that Xiao Yu and Mo Nu have grown too beautiful and have a good temperament. People on the road always look at them more and ask the people next to them who are the children.

"Hey, what is that? I want it too."

The little unparalleled saw the cotton candy stalls surrounded by children not far away, full of curiosity.

"That is marshmallow, Dad buys you, Xiaoyu, do you want to come one too?" Chen Mo took the unparalleled walk and asked.

"I am so big, I don't want it." Xiao Yu smiled and shook his head.

As soon as the Spring Festival is over, the cultural square in the village is very lively. The stalls sell toys, sell snacks, sell rabbits and turtles, sell snacks and barbecues, set rings, and watch movies.

Many people returning from other places will come out for a walk, and the lively atmosphere is very harmonious.

chapters.title: Chapter 544: : Ion Engine Manufacturing Completed
chapters.body:
Chapter 544: : Ion Engine Manufacturing Completed

Chen Mo came back with a small fishing and unparalleled walk, and Chen Shanhe greeted him. I don't know when I have pulled the fireworks back and spread it out on the open space in front of the yard.

"Unparalleled, where did you go with Mom and Dad?"

"Going to the singer, I saw the little turtle and the bunny, and also ate the marshmallow, which is delicious." The small tongue, the pair of cockroaches, seems to be relishing the taste of cotton candy.

"Yes, come, Grandpa will bring you fireworks, do you want it?" Chen Shanhe whispered.

"Yes, it’s great to have fireworks and fireworks. It’s great."

The little girl is happy to dance.

Seeing the unparalleled so happy, Chen Shanhe also laughed and took the unparalleled little hand, and walked back happily, ignoring Chen Mo and others.

Seeing this scene, Chen Mo smiled. His father didn't dare to waste too much money for half a lifetime, and he never let go of fireworks. As a result, in order to please his granddaughter, he bought a lot this time.

Chen Mo does not object, as long as they are happy, the most important. There is no entertainment in the country, so it is rare for them to have fun.

"The unparalleled is sitting here with my grandmother, can't get close, grandfather goes to the fireworks." Chen Shanhe let Wushuang sit next to Shao Xuemei, he said.

"Grandpa must be careful, Ma Ma said that fireworks are very dangerous." Unparalleled not forgetting to remind.

"Good." Chen Shanhe's concern for the unparalleled is very useful. He took a fragrant fireworks and walked over to the already-built fireworks.

After a while, in the muffled sound, one fireworks rose from the sky and exploded in the air.

As a tube of fireworks is ignited, the fireworks in the air are getting denser. Spraying flowers, rotating, spitting beads, combined fireworks, explosions and dazzling fireworks are connected in the air.

"Great, beautiful."

This is the first time the little girl saw the fireworks at close range and slap her hands on her small neck. She was very excited. Next to Shao Xuemei also worried that the sand of the fireworks fell on the unparalleled body, and blocked her little mouth with her hand, and smiled kindly.

"Grandpa is awesome." Seeing Chen Shanhe point to the fireworks back, Xiao Wushuang hugged him and kissed him in his face.

This made Chen Shanhe laugh out loud and spent a lot of time buying fireworks. He was busy for a while, and this feeling was worth it: "Do you like it?"

"Like, super like." Xiao Wushuang looked up and patted his hand in the arms of Chen Shanhe.

"Unparalleled, grandma's?" Shao Xuemei saw the unparalleled Chen Shanhe, some jealous.

"Grandma also has kisses."

Unparalleled with a small mouth in the past, kissed Shao Xuemei on the face.

Chen Mo looked at him and smiled. In his impression, this is the happiest time for parents to laugh. The small fisherman next to him also leaned on Chen Mo, smiling at this scene.

......

It’s okay...

Just after New Year's Eve, at 12 o'clock in the Spring Festival, firecrackers broke the silence of the village at midnight.

In the first minute of the New Year, the villagers have already rushed to ignite the first sound of the New Year. The sound of the firecrackers in the whole village is connected, and the roar of fireworks is also blasting in the sky.

Even the air is rich in the smell of sulphide, and every household closes the window, fearing that smoke will enter the house.

From the air, you can see all the villages in Qinghe Town, immersed in the roar of firecrackers, and occasionally see the fireworks in the sky explode.

After the head cannon, only the sound of firecrackers in the temple was left. In order to make the first fragrance of the New Year in the temple, some chickens who were ready to worship the gods early, began to worship at 12:1.

The sound of the firecrackers from the beginning of the morning, from the early morning, continued until the morning, there are still firecrackers in the morning, the air is filled with the smell of sulfide.

Early in the morning, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu got up and saw the little girl sitting on the sofa and counting the red envelopes with a smile. That is the red envelope given by grandparents, there are many.

"Hey, happy new year, good health." Xiao Wushuang saw Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, immediately grabbed the red envelope and put it in his pocket. He pressed it with a small hand and looked at Chen Mo.

"Good, good health. Who taught you what?"

Chen Mo almost laughed and took out the prepared red envelope and handed it to the unparalleled.

"Grandpa and my grandmother taught." Musou immediately took the red envelope and hurriedly put it in his pocket. She doesn't care how much money the red envelope has. The number of red envelopes is enough.

"Ma Ma, Happy New Year, good health."

"Healthy." Xiao Yu also handed the prepared red envelope to this little guy.

After breakfast, some of the neighbors around me began to slam. Zheng Wanshan, the village secretary, came over and some of his neighbors who were familiar with his parents also came. The courtyard of Chen Mojia, a large adult and a child full of yards.

Little unparalleled holding a lollipop in the yard, curious about the look of looking around, seeing the neighbors friends come over, say a happy new year, and then wait for the red envelope.

This scene makes the neighboring friends who come over happy.

At the beginning of the new year, each person has more or less one or two red envelopes in his pocket and gave her one.

Xiaoyu is also not idle, and the family's new year's coffee table is taken out to greet the guests. The old man and the child who came over, one person wrapped a big red envelope.

"The old Chen family is a beautiful wife. It is a blessing at first glance."

"The one next to it is particularly beautiful. Who is the old Chen family? Is it a younger sister?"

"I have never heard of the second girl in the old Chen family. When I was a child, there was a little girl who was a small family. It was not so handsome."

"That may be the wife of a daughter-in-law, a beautiful girl who likes to watch."

"The little girl is very smart, if I can have such a granddaughter, then."

Several aunts talked in a small voice in a dialect, and the heart of the gossip was full.

After talking about the ink girl and the small fisherman, I will pay attention to the unparalleled body. Xiao Wushuang knows that red envelopes are very smart, and with exquisite dressing, you can clearly see that it is different from other children.

“Children who grew up in the city are smart.”

“The main thing is education.”

"This little girl is now a little beauty, and she must be grown up."

"What is the name of the little girl?"

A few aunts and aunts chatted and talked, and spoke and talked with no match.

With the Mandarin in his hometown dialect, Xiao Wusou heard it from his grandparents and knew what they meant. Mother also taught her, others asked questions and responded to others.

"My name is Chen Wushuang."

So smart girl!

When I heard Chen Wushuang’s answer, the aunt and aunt on the field were a little surprised and laughed.

"I also know that your family is not lacking. At the beginning of the new year, there are no valuable things in the folks' homes. This is a bit of a sense of the folks."

Zheng Wanshan handed some large and small bags to Chen Mo.

There are peanuts, sweet potatoes, red beans, green beans, small tomatoes, and vegetables that have just been taken from the ground. The dew is not dried. They were all poor households donated by Chen Mojia, and some things harvested from their homes were sent to Zheng Wanshan.

Chen Molai refused, accepted them one by one, and let Xiaoyu bring things back to the house and put them in the house: "Thank you, I am still going to buy some to eat."

"You're welcome, we should thank you. You need to talk to me later, always. When you harvest each year, give you some past." Zheng Wanshan smiled.

The neighbors around the family chatted for a long time before they gradually dispersed.

When the Chen Mo family packed up, they drove to the county seat. There was not much entertainment in the village. It was the uncle who was playing cards and chatting with each other. Sitting at home was also boring.

When the New Year was at home with his family for a few days, the ink girl told Chen Mo a good news.

The ion engine is manufactured.

This news did not make Chen Mo have too many accidents. Before returning to his ancestral home, Chen Mo asked the ink girl to start printing the ion engine, which is now completed, so the final test is worse.

As long as the test is successful, the manufacture of the armor is coming to an end.

chapters.title: Chapter 545: : Ink'S New Body And Space Plane
chapters.body:
Chapter 545: : Ink'S New Body And Space Plane

Stayed in the ancestral home for ten days, until the seventh day of the seventh year, and accompanied Xiaoyu back to her family for three days. Chen Mo let Xiaoyu and Wushuang spend more than a few days with their grandparents, and they took the lead and returned to Binhai.

The No. 1 building area, an open experimental workshop.

On the two devices, two instruments were placed, one slightly larger than the fist, and one that was laid down in equal proportions, almost the size of the duck egg, which was already completed, two small ion engines installed on the palm and the sole of the foot.

Within the experimental workshop, there is also a four-meter-diameter refrigeration wind tunnel equipment. The technology is not difficult, and it is used to manufacture the high-altitude and cold environment that the ion engine may face.

The wind tunnel can provide a wind speed of 120 kilometers per hour, and a temperature of minus 20 degrees Celsius, which basically meets the test needs. This is an experiment to avoid testing in high altitude, low temperature engine failure.

The equipment for placing the ion engine is to test the ion engine thrust.

When Chen Mo entered the experimental workshop, the six robots in the workshop listened and stood quietly.

In addition to the parts of the lower leg and the small arm, the armor has already completed other parts. Only the test data of the plasma engine reaches the standard, and the armor manufacturing enters the final stage.

Everything is ready, Chen Mo enters the experimental control room and presses the start button.

"Start testing."

At this time, the machine started, and Chen Mo saw the blue flame on the ion engine.

On the LCD screen, the data also jumps.

After a long time, the data stabilized.

The thrust is 4,375 kg and the torque is 4,930 Nm...

A series of data reaches the standard value, which is only the data of a single ion engine.

On the armor, there are four similar ion engines and two smaller ion engines in the hand, and the weight of the armor is not large. This value is already terrifying.

"Start the icing test."

After Chen Mo finished, the temperature of the wind tunnel has changed, and the low temperature created by liquid nitrogen and water vapor is enough to maintain the required freezing conditions. The armor needs to fly in the air, and stable operation under extremely cold weather conditions is one of the things that must be tested.

"Swallowing test." Chen Mo continued to let the ink girl test.

Ion engines use ions in the ionized air as plasma. If the saturated air or rainwater enters the ionization chamber during rainy days, the ion engine can still work normally.

Under the pressure of the high-pressure water gun, the ion engine is still running stably without any malfunction.

This makes Chen Mo more confident, followed by the more important impact test.

The impact test is not the engine of the aircraft. After all, the structure of the ion engine is different from that of the aircraft engine, but it is a real impact.

It is to simulate the impact of bullets and bomb explosions on the ion engine.

If someone is hit by an engine or hits an ion engine, it will fail or be broken. The weakness of the armor is too great. The impact test is an important part of the battle armor to maintain a stable battle.

Oh...

Under the lens of the high-speed camera, Chen Mo can see a piece of simulated streamer hitting the ion engine.

The stray bullets and bullets that can kill people on the human body fall on the ion engine and are intact.

The structure of an ion engine is different from that of a conventional engine and is not maintained by a turbofan. Plus the material is special, it can easily resist the turn of the machine without failure.

After testing for more than three hours, Chen Mo felt a sense of excitement in his head. The Science Library acknowledged the small ion engine, which is a symptom of technical completion.

"Completed, not bad." Chen Mo showed a smile: "The next step is to set up the ion engine and install it into the armor components."

"Good." said the ink girl.

“How long does it take?” Chen Mo asked. He also can't wait, the cool sense of steel armor, but the dream of every man.

"One week."

"Ok."

Chen Mo nodded slightly, lying on the chair, closing his eyes and entering the technology library.

The golden light in the technology ball already has the size of the pigeon egg, which is bigger than the last time, but the entire technology ball has become golden, and there is still a long way.

Now that the armor has been basically completed, only the parts are all manufactured, and the test can be modified.

Now is the time to prepare for the next technology.

Chen Mo thought a little about the following and set his sights on a technical department.

"Aircraft Design and Manufacturing Principles"

As Shu Lao said before leaving, the starry sky above his head is the curiosity of human beings. Compared with the universe of tens of billions of light years, human beings are so small that even ants do not count.

The world outside the earth is full of unknowns.

After getting the theory of principle, Chen Mo left the Science and Technology Library. Just woke up, I saw that the ink girl around me was quietly guarding him.

"Mergo, you woke up."

"Well, how is your new body now?"

"It's already done, you need to start it."

"Let's go check it out." Chen Mo left the lab and walked toward the robot lab.

On the experimental bench of the robot laboratory, the new body of the ink girl has been completed.

It is exactly the same as the body of the ink girl, but it has been completely changed. The material is the material used in the armor, and the most sturdy material, the most cushioning material.

The original graphene supercapacitor battery was removed, and the energy was replaced by the 1024 material and energy reactor.

Remove the weight and space of the battery, and the inkmaker's internal design can also use more technology.

The micro radar is manufactured using a nano 3D printer, and the detection range is twice as large. The laser is mounted on the hand and the eyebrow, and the laser of the navel is removed. As the magazine expands, the power of the laser also increases, much stronger than before.

Because of the design of the simulator, the ink girl did not install an ion engine on her body, but chose to design a set of armor for the ink girl to serve as an auxiliary for the ink girl.

After Chen Mo presses the start button, the new body of the ink girl lying on the test bench also stands up. The two beautiful women are exactly the same, 99.99% similar. If the ink girl is put on the clothes, he can't recognize which is the new body. Which is the old body.

"The new body appears, what should the old body plan to do?" Chen Mo thought.

"Does Merle don't like twins?"

"..."

Hearing this sentence, Chen Mo was almost caught by his own saliva, and there were several black lines in his head.

"This is basically one, not twins."

"Ink girls can imitate two kinds of personalities."

Chen Mo can't smile: "Don't, I'm afraid I can't stand it. The old body will be sealed up. As a commemoration, the ink girl is the only one, one will do, or it will be strange."

"it is good."

The old body of the ink girl went to the storage room, and the new body changed clothes and followed Chen Mo.

"Mergo, the armor is about to be completed, what are you going to study next?"

"Aerospace plane, has been running on the ground, but also to fly in the sky. Deep space is full of unknown, at least to prepare for future exploration. Remember the starry sky above the head, keep curious." Chen Mo said with some emotions.

"President, deputy general Julie, the news, the holographic mobile phone conference has been prepared." President's office, Lanxi will report to Zhao Min.

"Well, OK." Zhao Min took the file.

Nowadays, Americans are still holding the hope of putting pressure on them. The second generation of holographic mobile phones and the first generation of miniature holographic projectors are the key to breaking the containment.

Continue to contain, the US mobile phone manufacturers will collectively dive, and will also bear the consequences of falling behind a whole generation. Mobile phones are the most intuitive to feel advanced and backward.

Zhao Min does not believe that in order to contain them, Americans can be desperate.

"Ink girl, does he have time?" Lanxi left, Zhao Min spoke.

“Looking for me?” Chen Mo’s holographic projection appeared in the office: “I just tested the experiment, I haven’t started the next experiment yet, are you looking for me?”

"Is nothing to look for? You have no conscience, come back and don't look for me."

"..."

"What's good for the New Year?"

"still alright."

"Poor me alone."

"..." Chen Mo smiled, but he was helplessly laughing: "You can go back to Yuanxiao together, you can't be looking for me to complain?"

"Second-generation holographic mobile phone conference, do you have time? Go to host the release. After all, the holographic mobile phone is created by you. No one in the company except you is qualified to publish. Then we announced that we officially cooperate with other manufacturers to sell micro The holographic projector gave them the news." Zhao Min returned to the topic.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

chapters.title: Chapter 546: : Phantom
chapters.body:
Chapter 546: : Phantom

"Mr. Cook, I am not willing to sell products to you. I am a businessman. I earn money when I have money. But our output has been limited. We have signed agreements with the four major manufacturers. In a short period of time, there is no excess output. Selling can't sell." Zhao Min said with a phone call.

“How long does it take?”

“This is not the case, our production line is expanding capacity as planned.”

"The price can be talked about well, and other conditions can be discussed."

"It's not a price issue. Now the output can't keep up. If we sign the relevant agreement, the supply is not a breach of contract. Our company has always obeyed the contract. Moreover, our products are considered to threaten the security of your country, in case we sign The treaty, which day is caused by these unstable factors, is not good for anyone."

"If this unstable factor disappears, will our cooperation be smoother, like you and Disney."

"The unstable factors disappear, the cooperation resistance will definitely decrease, no matter what cooperation is the same. Right, I have a meeting, that's it." Zhao Min hung up the phone and turned to look at the scenery outside the company window.

The marching ant refused!

At Apple's headquarters, Cook sat in the office and frowned.

Susan said that the marching ant group did not promise to sell micro-holographic projectors to them. The president of Greater China went to talk and did not succeed. Now he personally called and passed without success.

This is a very bad thing.

The popularity of holographic technology is just around the corner. Just like the opportunity of popularization of smartphones in the past, it is necessary to be eliminated. This is the best example of Sony Nokia’s failure in the smartphone revolution of the year.

It’s hard to get caught in the neck by technology, and it’s very uncomfortable.

If, shortly afterwards, all of China's four major manufacturers get miniature holographic projectors, then they will be unlucky.

......

Wall Street Financial Daily: All US mobile phone manufacturers were excluded from the first supply list of micro-holographic projectors. According to reliable sources, due to the restrictions on the US Army’s related products entering the market, the cooperation between the two parties failed to be negotiated. The umbrella company's share price plummeted.

Technology Circle: According to legend, the marching ant group has signed agreements with the four major manufacturers of Huami Blue Green to provide the first generation of miniature holographic projectors for the four major manufacturers. The marching ant group is still positioning the top mobile phone market, high-end and mid-end. The market will be reserved for other manufacturers...

iT Home: According to reliable sources, the second-generation holographic mobile phone, the miniature holographic projector, has been fully upgraded, using the latest nanotechnology of marching ants, the holographic picture is more clear. There will also be new battery technology and battery life upgrades.

The Spring Announcement of the Marching Ant Group is about to begin, and the warm-up of various news has brought the attention of this conference to a very high level of heat.

The most anticipated of the conference is the second generation of holographic mobile phones.

As early as the Spring Festival, the marching ants released news, and the second generation of holographic mobile phones was released in the future.

The grand launch of the marching ant group is a feast of technology.

The backstage of the Marina Opera House.

Chen Mo is wearing a white T-shirt, casual jeans, and a pair of sunny technical home costumes. Around him, he is a member of the company's consumer business group and planning department.

Everyone has a smile and pride on his face.

Today, the marching ant group is a well-deserved leader in the scientific and technological world. Holographic technology has been popularized since last Christmas. The spring ant group's spring conference began, and the news has shaken the scientific and technological community.

In the past few years, the marching ants have not released new mobile phones. The holographic mobile phones still have no rivals in the top market. The cumulative shipments have reached 100 million units, and each time they are released, they are warned, so that the marching ant group earns a full volume, and now When it comes to updating.

With such a huge spring conference, it is naturally impossible to have only one holographic phone.

In addition to holographic mobile phones, there are also gamepads, holographic eco-applications and other products.

However, those products are not released by Chen Molai, but are the heads of the department responsible for research and design. These are all appetizers.

After the prelude to a series of appetizers, Chen Mo officially stepped onto the stage under the introduction of the host.

Chen Mo’s appearance immediately attracted cheers and crazy flash.

The current Grand Theatre Hall has long been occupied by fans of the media and marching ants. People who come here want to buy second-generation holographic mobile phones on the spot.

For this kind of scene, Chen Mo has long been eccentric, raised his hand and pressed, and the cheers of the venue immediately stopped.

"I am not nonsense, go to the topic. Next is the theme of today's conference, the second generation of holographic mobile phones: illusion ants."

When Chen Mo’s words fell, the holographic projections of four second-generation holographic mobile phones appeared behind him.

Exquisite craft design, soft border lines, slim body, you can't help but like it. This is the optimized design of the second generation of miniature holographic projectors on the first generation of ant holographic mobile phones.

The image of the holographic phone appeared and some people have already discussed it.

Chen Mo did not know the discussion of others.

"Second-generation holographic mobile phone, equipped with the second-generation 24-bit full-color micro-holographic projector, the latest generation of holographic chip red fire ant No. 8, which has dual-screen function, equipped with the seventh-generation marching ant intelligent operating system, new intelligent assistant, There are also holographic video calls, holograms, long battery life, etc."

Chen Mo said that the discussion below has become much smaller.

"The mobile phone is equipped with the seventh-generation marching ant intelligent operating system. It adopts the marching ant intelligent core and can automatically identify malicious virus programs. It is also the only intelligent operating system that has not found bugs, and is the safest protection for mobile phones.

Now is the era when a mobile phone travels all over the world. Mobile phone security is the security of your property and privacy.

In addition, the mobile phone system also features a split screen function, oLeD screen and holographic screen, can work at the same time. Smart Assistant Xiaodie is multilingual and can provide instant translation. Its built-in artificial intelligence + system core can also become the control end of the Internet of Things. ”

Chen Mo began to talk about the features of the second generation of holographic mobile phones.

"Second-generation micro-holographic projector, holographic laser emitter made of nanotechnology, 5 micron diameter, 20% higher image quality of holographic projection, higher realism, 10 inch holographic screen, 15% lower energy consumption The thickness is 1.5 mm thinner than the first generation, and the whole body is 2.3 mm thinner than the first generation.

The mobile phone is equipped with two red fire ants 8 generation holographic smart chips, with holographic image processing function, capable of shooting holographic video, supporting holographic intelligent modeling, image processing speed is 25% higher than the first generation, and energy consumption is reduced by 18%;

The mobile phone adopts our company's latest graphene supercapacitor battery, with a capacity of up to 60,000 mAh and a battery life of 160 hours. Equipped with super fast charging technology, it is currently the strongest mobile phone. Charge 100% in 30 minutes, you no longer have to worry about the phone being out of power..."

Chen Mo's series of introductions, especially the last battery data, made the scene look awkward.

Not to mention other black technologies, the battery of mobile phones has become a counter-attack.

Compared with the first generation of holographic mobile phones, regardless of the process or hardware, almost all upgrades, black technology across the era, concentrated on a mobile phone.

"Are you sure this is a mobile phone? Not a treasure trove of technology?"

"The technology of the marching ant group has never let me down."

"Running ants: rubbish, all rubbish, sorry, I am not targeting you, but everyone here, it is rubbish."

"My wallet can't wait."

"How do I feel that the marching ant group is making mobile phones, purely to bully people? This technology, graphene supercapacitor batteries are coming, how can other people play?"

......

"The Earth people have been unable to stop the marching ant group."

“The people who really admire China, I feel that they live in the 31st century, and I don’t know when we will be listed in France.”

"The Americans said that it is very difficult to get rid of the dog's nephew politicians. There are other places where the first generation of holographic mobile phones can be bought. Soon after, there are second generations. We even buy holographic mobile phones, we must buy them, go abroad to buy them, and get them. The price is 30% more expensive than the official price."

The global audience saw the live broadcast, and the function introduced by Chen Mo was not calm.

With this performance, mobile phones have become a collection of black technologies.

I saw the head of the mobile phone manufacturer who was broadcast live by the marching ant group. I heard Chen Mo’s introduction of such terrible performance, and almost all of them were frightened.

Not to mention other technologies, that is the battery technology of the marching ant group, no one else has to play.

With such horrible battery technology, the marching ant group can easily enter any field of electronics manufacturing, electric vehicles. This is also to make mobile phones and computers, which is too special to bully people.

Not only the giants of mobile phone manufacturers, but even electric car manufacturers are beginning to worry, because the marching ant group has a car business, that horrible battery technology...

"The price of the mobile phone is starting at 29,000 yuan."

When the price of each version appeared on the screen, the people present were commotion.

The price of the first generation of holographic mobile phone ants is 28888. Now the second generation of holographic mobile phones has only risen by more than 100. The black technology has risen a lot. What is the conscience of the industry?

Is this another fight against the monopoly of the marching ant group to control their prices and control prices?

"Which scorpion said that the marching ant group used the monopoly to make huge profits, and Laozi shot him to the wall."

"Industry conscience!"

"Earth people can't stop me from buying one, and selling kidneys."

"..."

Some people on the field have already been excited, and I can't wait to start one at a time. I thought that the price of this mobile phone would be much more expensive. I didn't expect it to remain almost the same.

Those who say that the marching ant group uses the monopoly market to manipulate prices and profiteering is the best face.

chapters.title: Chapter 547: : Not That I Don'T Sell
chapters.body:
Chapter 547: : Not That I Don'T Sell

“Mr. Chen Mo, the micro-holographic projector is the most powerful product of your company and the most unique product. Why choose to open it to other manufacturers?”

In the questioning session, the reporter's question is unceremonious and the question is straightforward.

Everyone turned their eyes to Chen Mo.

And Chen Mo still maintains the appearance of self-confidence, and the eyes of everyone are calm and open.

"The arrival of the holographic era is obvious to everyone. Holographic technology is the golden age of the next development. Only by one of us can not meet the diversified needs of the market. We sell micro-holographic projections to other manufacturers and authorize related patents based on this principle. The market is advancing in the competition, not by our family."

“Why don’t you sell second-generation holographic projectors to them, are you afraid of competition?”

"We are not afraid of competition. If it is really competitive, I am afraid they will be killed. It is not that I am exaggerating. The technology companies that can compete with us now have not."

Chen Mo smiled, with confidence in his voice, and put **** toward the crowd.

“Even if the marching ant group does not develop, we will compete with us for 20 years. We don’t sell second-generation holographic projectors, first because the production line has just been established, and the current output can only be our own. It is expanding, and it is believed that the second generation of miniature holographic projectors will be sold to them soon."

After giving the outside world for another 20 years, it is impossible to compete with marching ants.

Is this the confidence of the marching ant group?

The audience and reporters on the field couldn't help but marvel at Chen Mo's answer.

However, the marching ants do have this confidence.

Today's marching ants, no matter which cutting-edge technology, in addition to Chen Mi this freak, others can not succeed in a short time.

The people on the field did not think that Chen Mo’s words were arrogant, but they did have capital.

"Mr. Chen, I heard that Samsung, Apple and Google have not reached a cooperation agreement with the marching ant group. There are rumors that you are deliberately suppressing them and deliberately knocking them out at this stage of change. Is that true? ”

A Western journalist who stood up asked in a lame Chinese.

“At the beginning, I said, the output is limited. After our current production is provided to the four companies, the remaining output is not much. One plus, there are few charm blues, and there are currently no. Our production line is expanding, the next stage The production line is completed and the problem is solved.

We have always adhered to the principle of cooperation. We did not deliberately suppress which company, but we, and often suffered from unreasonable martyrdom.

Some of our company's products can't appear in the US market now, and everyone knows why. Before the restrictions are resolved, we have no choice but to cooperate. ”

"Mr. Chen, you mean that the US official has not solved the restrictions on the marching ant group. You will not sell micro-holographic projectors to American companies?" The reporter immediately seized the point.

Chen Mo shook his head.

"I don't want to sell, they don't need my products to enter their market."

In the questioning session, more than half of the questions were focused on the issue of the marching ant group being surrounded by countries.

This is the first time that Chen Mo has received media questions after the army ants group was confined. They naturally could not let go of this opportunity.

On the day of the conference, the second-generation holographic mobile phone was powerful to the horror performance, and Chen Mo’s answer was transmitted to the world through mainstream media, media and social platforms.

The price of the second-generation holographic mobile phone appeared, and all the remarks on monopoly for profiteering were all shattered.

Faced with the temptation of super high technology, many people have to pay for their pockets and book a holographic mobile phone.

The current reservation is a real-name reservation, one person can only book one at a time, and the second one can be booked upon arrival. When you book your hand, you can earn at least one or two thousand in the hands of the ox, and there is no loss at all.

In the official malls and flagship stores of the marching ants, the number of bookings for the phantom ants is as high as one million, and it is still increasing.

In one day, only the second-generation holographic mobile phone orders, the marching ant group revenue of more than 30 billion.

This horrible number has envied countless people for hatred.

All measures that limit the marching ant group are in vain in the face of terror numbers. Demand and market are there, no one can limit marching ants.

......

"Mr. Minister, the phone of Mr. Cruz."

Seeing the phone that Mullen handed over, Wilbur's face was black and terrible.

"Mr. Cruz, I am Wilbur."

"I know this thing, but I have to follow the procedure and I can't just revoke it... no one can decide until the court has a judgment."

"We are investigating the issue of restrictions. If not, we will consider it reasonably."

"..."

Wilbur said a lot, hang up the phone, his face is clouded, and it may break out at any time.

Since the launch of the marching ant group, this is already the sixth member’s call. The purpose is the same, ask him about opening up the market restrictions for the marching ants group.

Although there is no explanation between words, the meaning is obvious.

Apple is very anxious now, and Google is also anxious. The absence of a micro-holographic projector means that there is a danger of falling behind in the mobile phone industry.

Moreover, the two office notebooks and electronic products of Microsoft cannot compete with the marching ant group.

They also hope to buy the battery of the marching ant group, otherwise the share of the top office market will be more horrific compression until it disappears, unless they lock the market for a lifetime, and they will also face the risk of falling behind the times.

"Mr. Minister, what do we do now? Do you want to revoke the allegations against marching ants?" Marlene asked carefully.

"Impossible. If we revoke the accusation, it is almost equal to bowing to the marching ants, making a big international joke. As a big country, we are concerned about face problems, it is impossible to bow to China, let alone the other company is a Chinese company."

Wilbur firmly shook his head.

Even if this thing has the meaning of the marching ant group, they can't revoke it at this time, otherwise they will admit defeat to a company and throw people into the world.

"What should I do?" Mullen also knew that Wilbur was in a bad mood and was very careful.

The current situation is obviously unfavorable to them. The idea of pressure on the marching ant group has already declared bankruptcy.

"Now we can only dilute the impact of this incident, and then let the court decide on its own, everything follows the normal procedure. The accusation is successful, we are well-founded, the accusation is unsuccessful, we just lost the lawsuit, not shameful."

"What about restricting the marching ant group? Their technology is already more advanced than us. Limiting them is limiting ourselves."

"Let the Bureau of Investigation conduct a normal investigation and publicize the results. If there is, we have a justifiable reason to sanction them. If not, we can take the opportunity to remove some restrictions." Wilbur said a little.

If they have such advanced technology in their country, regardless of whether there is a ghost in the marching ant group, they will limit the situation and support the development of their own company.

But they don't have such advanced technology. Only marching ants have. If they continue to limit, they will stop their own development.

Today, only big things can be made small.

At least everything is justified, they have a reasonable power to investigate, not to bow to the marching ants, damage face.

"Okay." Mullen nodded and left the office.

Mullen left, and Wilbur's face was darker.

Although there are legitimate reasons to retreat, the game, whether he refused to admit it, has already lost.

Losing the game made him very upset.

Only restrictions, can not suppress the marching ants, even if the face is hysterical, it is impossible to fight the army ants. Today's marching ant group has become a climate.

And behind the marching ants, the Chinese official has not been moving.

If they don't want to face, the Chinese official will definitely not sit back and watch. Huaxia officially shot, they have no chance to target the marching ant group, and today's China, different from the past.

damn it!

Wilbur smashed a table, and the coffee cup jumped and splashed off the table.

chapters.title: Chapter 548: : Battle Armor Released
chapters.body:
Chapter 548: : Battle Armor Released

Robot testing workshop.

In the center of the workshop, stood a battle armor.

The arm and foot components of the ion-powered engine have just been completed, and now the armor has been fully assembled and freshly baked.

Skywalker armor.

The main color of the painting is black, and the red stripes are mixed, which looks very mysterious. The lines of the armor bulged and were polished to the perfect arc, full of power and smooth beauty.

The texture of the metal, the chest slightly bulged, the reaction furnace was blocked, and the internal light could not be seen. All the conductor lines of the armor are made of normal temperature superconducting materials and are highly integrated and printed inside the parts.

Nearly two meters high armor, standing there, giving people an infinitely powerful feeling.

In theory, this set of armor can already be worn, but it is still necessary to go through the final step to test the performance of the armor. Before you really determine the performance of the armor, casual wear testing itself has a lot of uncertainty.

"Ink girl, let's get started."

Chen Mo reached out and touched him on the armor, and took back his palm and walked aside.

I saw a robot with exactly the same shape and Chen Mo coming over and stood at the armor test bench. On the robot, a small sensor is attached.

Before he was sure that the performance of the armor was stable, he couldn't take the risk of experimenting and using robots to test the machine. This is the best thing.

At the beginning of the command, the robotic arm grabs the armor components and wears them on the robot. The physical and powerful metal texture makes people look bloody. After wearing it, at the moment of the mask cover, the narrow eyes of the armor illuminate, the glare is cold and breathtaking.

Chen Mo touched his chin and looked at this scene.

The armor has already started.

“The body is fixed, the pressure is normal, the oxygen supply is normal, and the vision is normal.”

The ink girl put all the data inside the armor in front of Chen Mo, including the pressures on various parts of the robot. Then, the robot wearing the armor began to move.

"The exercise is normal, the lag time is 30 microseconds, and people can't detect it."

boom! !

During the test, the robot wore armor and punched the iron plate on the test. The huge impact sound made Chen Mo’s heart beat slightly.

Look at the iron plate that was hit, it has been recessed, leaving a deep punch.

“The cushioning performance of the material has reached the expected value. Under the boxing weight of 4 tons, the reaction force that the hand can feel is only 1 kilogram, which is not obvious.” said the ink girl.

The most important performance of the armor is cushioning shock absorption.

If there is no strong cushioning, when the ordinary people use the battle armor, the huge reaction force is enough for the driver to be killed in the inside, and it is even more impossible to control the armor to fight.

In order to reduce the cushioning power, the armor's manufacturing materials are the cushioning materials given to him in the Science and Technology Library. Moreover, there is a buffer layer and a buffer damping structure inside the armor.

Under the layer design, the cushioning performance of the armor is maximized.

Even if they suffer a huge and violent impact, the people in the armor will not be injured.

Strength, anti-collision, etc., the basic data of these tests are completed under the witness of Chen Mo. All the ability data has reached the expected expectations and become the strongest existence.

After a series of tests, the final flight test and flight performance test are left.

Flying is the most important thing, and it is also the core content of Skywalker's armor.

"Now start testing flight capabilities." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

After the ink girl finished, the armor in front of the two had already started the ion engine, and the blue fireworks were sprayed from the foot, causing a lot of airflow in the test workshop.

Under strong thrust, the armor is suspended in the midair of the workshop.

The four-ion engine support of the sole and palm allows the armor to be suspended in midair.

"The flight system is normal and the ion engine is working properly." The ink girl said: "Would you like to conduct a high-speed flight test?"

"Wait for the evening."

Chen Mo looked at the time, and now it is daytime. It is not suitable for testing the flight of Skywalker. Otherwise, it will be found to cause huge sensation and unnecessary trouble.

You can only try it in the workshop temporarily, and test it at night when no one can see it at night.

"Let me put it on now," Chen said.

The pieces of the armor are removed from the robot, starting from the foot and continuing to the head. Chen Mo raised his hands and felt the weight of the armor.

Very substantial feeling.

The armor's parts will be wrapped in Chen Mo's body, and one head is on the outside. After the energy is started, the weight of the armor disappears from the body. Chen Mo only felt the tight feeling of being fixed by the armor.

The parts of the helmet wrap the head of Chen Mo and connect the parts of the body.

But at the moment of wearing the mask, Chen Mo only felt the light in front of him. In his eyes, the environment in front of him had obvious data identification.

There is a feeling of infinite strength on the body.

"Come on again, let me know the armor, come two hundred times the power." Chen Mo went to the front of the test iron plate, stretched his foot and bowed his body, clenched his fist and smashed toward the iron plate.

boom! !

The huge crash sound exploded in the workshop and was deafening.

The echo was exhausted, and a hole was broken in Chen Mo’s thick iron plate.

The armor can amplify the power of the user and can be adjusted. Starting from double, the current maximum power of the user is magnified by a thousand times, and the horror can be imagined.

Bounced on the iron plate, the huge reaction force was shock-absorbing and buffered, so that Chen Mo felt like a punch on the sandbag.

"Good feeling."

Chen Mo looked at the iron plate that opened, and every cell in his body was excited.

This is a very strong sense of accomplishment.

"Try to feel the flight." Chen Mo stood up straight, some carefully put his posture: "Ink girl, start the ion engine, come slower, I don't want to fall like a dog like Tony."

"it is good."

The voice of the ink girl came from Chen Mo’s ear.

At the foot of the ion engine started, Chen Mo can feel his body is rising, stiff hands and feet, do not dare to move, so as not to lose balance.

The control of the armor is quite a process of learning the car, and it will take time to become familiar.

Suddenly, Chen Mo’s stiff body tilted slightly, and the balance lost. He was in a hurry and wanted to rebalance.

Hey...hey...

After a burst of noise, Chen Mo was kneeling in the corner of the test room, or fell a dog to eat.

"It's harder than reversing the warehouse."

Chen Mo laughed at himself and climbed up from the ground.

"Come on."

Hey...hey...

After fifteen minutes.

Chen Mo controlled the armor to suspend in the test workshop, even if the hands are closed for the balanced ion engine, the feet can be quietly suspended.

After falling a few times, I finally found the feeling of balance.

"Mergo, Zhao Min sister came over." said the ink girl.

"Let her come in."

Chen Mo did not remove the armor, and now it is hard to study the most cool toys that have been successful.

Not long after, the door of the robot test workshop was opened.

Zhao Min walked in and scanned the circle. When he saw no trace of Chen Mo, he asked the ink girl: "Ink girl, what about him? Isn't it here?"

The ink girl looked at Chen Mo in the armor.

Zhao Min also looked at the past.

"Is this a steel warrior? His new toy?" Zhao Min saw the armor and suddenly became curious and reached out and touched it. Chen Mo also did not move, let Zhao Min 'moving his hands.'

"This guy, like a big kid, likes this kind of cool big toy. This thing is really a man's dream. Willn't it be hidden inside?" Zhao Min couldn't see Chen Mo hidden inside, he said.

"Hey, beautiful." Chen Mo did not hide again, open the mask of the armor.

"Ah..." Zhao Min was shocked by the sudden sound. Seeing Chen Mo in the armor, couldn't help but roll his eyes: "I want to scare me."

"How is this armor?" Chen Moxiao asked.

"Looking very cool." Zhao Min knocked on the chest muscles of the armor: "You still want to be an iron man? Can this armor fly?"

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"Don't make trouble, say good things, why are you looking for me?" Zhao Min thought that Chen Mo was joking, nothing to be done.

"It's true, I can fly." Chen Mo spread his hand and expressed helplessness to Zhao Min's unbelief.

"Then you fly one to show me."

"You stand a little farther." Chen Mo stepped back a few steps, controlling the armor to slowly float from the ground.

"I……"

Zhao Min saw Chen Mo, who was suspended, his mouth wide open and speechless for a long time. In Chen Mo's lab, she has seen all the cool technology, and this time she has refreshed her cognition.

Iron Man's battle suit has been realized by Chen Mo.

"Now believe it." Chen Mo fell and went to Zhao Min.

"Is this new technology that you are playing recently? Is this this?"

Zhao Min stretched his hand on the armor and looked incredulous. She knows that Chen Mo has been drumming something in the mysterious secret of God during this time, saying that she will wait until she is finished.

I did not expect it to be this armor.

"Yes."

"Is it finished?"

After the initial surprise, Zhao Min quickly calmed down, but Chen Mo was not unusual.

"We still need to conduct high-speed flight tests and prepare for evening tests. Now we don't dare to mess around. Otherwise, it will cause big sensation and unnecessary trouble. If nothing unexpected, it should be mature." Chen Mo said.

“What is energy? Do you make controlled nuclear fusion miniaturized?”

"This is not a controlled nuclear fusion."

Chen Mo opened the shield on the chest and exposed the reaction inside.

"You can understand Ironman's Ark reaction furnace, but the energy content is different, it is a special energy substance. It is called 1024 element crystal."

"How come flying?"

"Small ion engine," Chen Mo said.

"It's really abnormal."

Chen Mo: "..."

"You look for me to see you, do you want to publish it?" Zhao Min asked. She just came back from a business trip and came over to the first building. I saw this.

"No, this thing is not announced for the time being, it is the next study." Chen Mo said. When this thing was announced, the impact was too great, and Chen Mo did not dare to mess up, otherwise there would be big trouble.

"What are you going to study next? Are you going to heaven, shoulder to shoulder with the sun?"

"bingo."

"???"

"The next study on aerospace planes, I am looking for you, is to prepare you for a piece of land and related expenses, to do research and build an airport."

"My God, the sky plane."

For the first time, Zhao Min felt that her imagination was scarce.

chapters.title: Chapter 549: :Ink Girl'S Room
chapters.body:
Chapter 549: :Ink Girl'S Room

That night.

It was already 11 o'clock in the evening, Chen Mo was sitting in the study room, on the screen in front of him, it was the picture of the test building of No.1 Building.

Today, the final test of the Battlegear is the high-speed flight test.

Through this test, the armor is truly completed. When I was seen during the day, I am afraid it would cause a big sensation, so Chen Mo chose to test at night.

"Mergo, I am ready," said the ink girl.

"Let's get started."

On the screen, the ceiling of the workshop is slowly separated. The armor was worn on the test robot and everything was ready.

Oh...

The blue fireworks spouted from the bottom and the hands, and the armor flew up into the sky and went straight to the sky.

In the study, everything changes, which is the data transmitted by the armor and the test robot. The height is 4,000 meters and the speed is 500 kilometers per hour. In addition, the airtightness and the temperature inside the armor also appear in the data.

After a long time, Chen Mocai said: "Where is the position?"

"Here."

In front of Chen Mo, a holographic map appeared. The red dot above is the current position of the armor and has entered the international waters.

"Almost, raise the height by 20,000 meters, speed up, 1 Mach." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

boom! !

In the air, the speed broke through 1 Mach, the air exploded, and there was a white mist around the armor. A sound cloud was accompanied by the armor. The roaring sound of the roaring sound, passed down from the sky, if there are people below, you can certainly hear the fierce sound of the roar.

“The oxygen supply is stable, the air pressure in the armor is stable, the temperature is normal, the ion engine is normal, and the data is stable.” said the ink girl.

"Ok."

Chen Mo stared at the data, the picture that came back from the battle armor, and the picture that the robot passed back in the battle armor.

"Improve speed, 2 Mach." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

The ink girl nodded, and the data on the holographic light curtain jumped again as the speed of the armor accelerated.

At sea, the roar of sonic booms has spread throughout the country.

Fortunately, at night, there are fewer fishing boats and freighters in the international waters, and most of them have already rested, so the outside world does not know that a set of armor is carrying a robot and is flying at a speed that exceeds the speed of sound.

"3 Mach." Chen Mo did not stop.

......

"4 Mach."

......

"5 Mach."

......

"6 Mach."

......

"7 Mach."

The speed increased to 7 Mach, Chen Mo stopped, watching the pictures sent back from the battle arm and the pictures returned by the test robot, as well as various data.

“The oxygen supply system is normal, the internal pressure of the battle armor is stable, and the temperature is normal.”

"It seems pretty good." Chen Mo nodded.

It is already scary to reach this speed.

Suddenly, Chen Mo felt the excitement in his mind. He knew that the Science and Technology Library had admitted that his armor was completely successful.

"Ink girl, let the armor come back. Go back to the territory, do not fly with supersonic speed." Chen Mo said.

In theory, there is still a higher speed, but Chen Mo is not to test the highest speed, and there is no need to test the maximum speed. The value of Mach 7 has surpassed all current aircraft, enough to catch up with any flying object that can currently fly in the sky.

"Ok". ”

In the central armor of the sea, the body turned over and quickly turned around and rushed back to Binhai.

From the study back to the room, already twelve o'clock, Chen Mo stretched out and walked into the bathroom. Just now he went in and saw the situation of the Science and Technology Library. Everything is still the same, but the technology ball has changed.

Inside the technology ball, the original golden color of the pigeon egg size, and a big lap, has the size of table tennis.

Although not completely completed, you can see the progress of the experience.

After bathing out of the study room, Chen Mo lay back on the bed and thought about the problem of the aerospace plane.

The aerospace plane is a big guy. It is impossible to imagine outside the world like a warrior, but this question is not the problem he should worry about now.

The question he should think about is the possible impact of the aerospace plane.

However, the last sentence before Shu Lao’s departure is very deep: not to be bound by moral rules, the universe has no moral standards, and there are no rules. The so-called rule is that the strong created by the strong to limit the weak, the universe is different from the weak.

The universe is different from the weak.

In just two sentences, there are many kinds of thoughts.

Oh...

At the time of Chen Mo’s thinking, the room rang at the door.

Who will knock at the door at this time?

Now Xiaoyu and Wushuang are still not returning to my grandparents' house. There is only one nanny in the villa, and there are several bodyguards such as Black Hawk White Pearl.

At this time, they should not bother him.

Did not think too much, Chen Mo sat up from the bed to open the door, just dare to see the situation outside the door, the eyeballs almost did not come out.

The ink woman stood in the night out of the door wearing a nightdress. The spring was venting, and the bottom of the leg was gone. She was looking at Chen Mo with curiosity: "Mergo, can the ink girl sleep with you?"

Hey cough...

Chen Mo was caught by his own saliva, and he did not know how to describe the mood at the moment.

That night, Xiao Yu and Mo Nu said that when she returned to her family, she would like to ask her to ask her, so the ink girl really did.

Chen Mo did not know whether to cry or laugh.

The ink girl's eyes are very pure, without a trace of impurities, because there is no emotional and emotional reasons, and naturally do not know what desire is.

"Go to your room."

Chen Mo smiled and took the ink girl away.

Here is the room for him and Xiao Yu, so that the ink girl came in and he was in bed, not suitable.

"Good." The ink girl quietly walked back to her room with Chen Mo.

Chen Mo’s room, Chen Mo did not enter many times.

Xiaoyu regarded the ink girl as a member of the family and arranged a room for her. The usual ink girl would clean herself, and the domestic servants and house robots would sort out.

The ink girl didn't need him to wake up, so he didn't come in a lot.

The rooms are very neat, simple and luxuriously decorated, with a subtle scent, just like the scent of the ink girl.

There is no cosmetics on the dressing table. There are some jewelry in the jewelry box. It is bought by the fisherman to the ink girl. However, the number of times the ink girl wears is very few. Only when she attends the ceremony, Chen Mo will wear it.

In order to make the atmosphere of the room vivid, Xiaoyu also bought some dolls that the girl hoped to put in the room, and there were quite a lot of clothes in the wardrobe.

The big room, where everything is good, is a little less popular, some deserted, although knowing that the ink girl is a robot, but it is still inexplicable.

Usually, the ink girl lives here. To be precise, the standby mode in which the room enters sleep is quite a kind of standby trimming.

“Is usually in the room, just watch a TV show?”

Chen Mo looked at the youth love TV drama on the screen of the ink girl room. He knew that the ink girl was watching these TV dramas and did not object. This is a kind of deep learning of her machine. Normal human life may be helpful for advanced advanced artificial intelligence.

"Sometimes I will watch, then take a shower and sleep," said the ink girl.

Chen Mo understands that the bathing of the ink girl is to wipe the body with a wet towel. It can also be regarded as a 'machine' maintenance, wiping off the dust of the body, or Chen Mo let her learn to maintain.

"When you have the conditions in the future, give you advanced and advanced intelligence." Chen Mo touched the head of the ink lady and said.

"Good." Ink smiled and nodded.

Chen Mo can see the various expressions imitated by the ink girl, but can not feel the emotion of the ink girl.

In the science and technology library, there are more advanced methods of artificial intelligence evolution, he has seen, but unfortunately the authority is not enough, can not get the relevant technology. More advanced artificial intelligence, including intelligent life, is artificial intelligence that is infinitely close to intelligent life.

But the technology involved is certainly not simple.

"Not too early, sleep." Chen Mo looked in the room and lay down on the bed.

Chen Mo did not think much about other issues and slept with his eyes closed. The ink girl also lay down beside him, looking at him quietly sideways, pure scorpion, without a trace of impurities.

chapters.title: Chapter 550: : Aerospace Corporation
chapters.body:
Chapter 550: : Aerospace Corporation

"What did you do last night? How does it look less spiritual? Xiao Yu is at her mother's house. You won't go out to steal it?" Zhao Min saw that Chen Mo's spirit was not so good, and he laughed.

Chen Mo: "..."

"Ink girl, where did you go to Woer last night?" Seeing Chen Mo did not answer, Zhao Min asked the ink girl next to him. She knows that the ink girl will either not say or not lie.

"Mergo slept with me last night, and Mi Ge couldn't sleep." The ink girl next to her opened.

"..."

"..."

In the experimental room, the scene fell into a short silence.

"Hello, hahaha..." Zhao Min 'brain-filled' the picture, but he couldn’t help but laughed and swayed.

Hearing this ridiculous laughter, Chen Moyi’s brain was black.

Isn't it just sleeping with the ink girl?

Is it so funny?

"No wonder it was made so ‘realistic.” Zhao Min deliberately bite two words, looking at Chen Mo’s eyes, his eyes are extremely weird.

Chen Mo: "..."

"Ink girl, you sleep with your brother, Xiao Yujie know?" Zhao Min smiled and asked the ink girl.

“Little fisher sister told me that when she was not at home, let me ask Mergo.”

"Okay." Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo with a faint look: "Xiaoyu is very tolerant to you, and I found you a machine girlfriend. No wonder you are so petting her, I am so fond of heaven, so a woman who is sensible is me. Also pet."

"..." Chen Mo can't smile: "Don't make trouble, say something right."

"Okay, say good business. The funds you need are already prepared, the land is also found, suitable for the required land, there are five, you look."

Zhao Min gave the information to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo needs to be used to build a space center. The land is sure to be in the sparsely populated area, like the satellite launch center is the best sparsely populated. However, their conditions may not allow them to build a space center in the uninhabited deep mountains.

The strength of the integrated company, as well as other practical considerations, allows people to find five plots of land.

“Which is it?” Chen Mo glanced at the map of the five plots.

"Phoenix Mountain, in the mountainous area outside the suburbs of Binhai City, there is no residential area around, backed by the mountains, the terrain is flat, it is a very good place, it is easy to build roads into it."

"Ink girl, the terrain information is released to see." Chen Mo handed Zhao Min to the u disk to the ink girl next to him.

The terrain around Phoenix Mountain, through holographic projection, appears in front of Chen Mo, and also includes information on the average temperature, precipitation, surrounding population density, traffic conditions and other information.

"Not bad, just here. Ink, hand over the planning and design of the base to Zhao Min." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

I saw the map on the flat ground, and a building that rose from the ground quickly formed an image of the base. The architecture, layout, and structure of the base are clear, and the road leading to the road from the base is already well designed.

"Give it to you." Chen Mo handed the hard drive with the design drawings to Zhao Min.

"I am following you crazy, it is so wonderful." Zhao Min took the hard drive, a faint smile.

The high-tech that Chen Mo brought out has become more and more crazy. Now I don’t know how to describe it. I can only help Chen Mo as much as possible. The earth can no longer accommodate this enchanting.

"I have a question."

"You said," Chen Mo said.

"Have you been to the ink girl last night?" Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo with a weird look.

Being stared curiously by Zhao Min, Chen Mo feels hairy: "Guess yourself."

"Don't say it, I will go back and ask the ink girl."

"..."

Zhao Min gave him a playful smile and turned and left.

"Ink girl, give me a cup of espresso, add a spoonful of sugar, and now design the space plane." Chen Mo said.

......

Yao Yi looked at Zhao Min puzzledly.

Yesterday, Zhao Min made an appointment to see him. Today, Zhao Min made a request.

During the period of the marching ant group, there were a lot of land in the country. Including arsenal, ant park, industrial park of production line, manufacturing plant, etc.

The result is 6,000 acres this time, and it is not ambiguous at all.

Is this going to build another headquarters?

The marching ant already has a headquarters in Binhai City. It has been expanded several times. It is already the largest industrial park in China. It is a high-tech production line. He does not think that the army ants will be building a headquarters or in the mountains.

"What do you want this land to do?"

"We are going to register an aerospace company, which is used as a base."

Zhao Min did not conceal, truthfully told this, there is no need to hide this kind of thing.

"Aerospace company? Or an airline?" Yao Yi almost thought that he had got it wrong, a word difference, the nature is completely different.

"Aerospace companies, exploring outer space." Zhao Min said.

hiss……

Yao Yi was shocked. The marching ant group really wanted to go to heaven.

“Can the company register?” Yao Yi asked.

The space company registered this matter, but he was not able to deal with it, so he was also curious as to whether he could succeed. After all, the field is special, and at home, it is not so easy to pass.

"Registration information has been troubled by Li Chengzhi, it should be no problem." Zhao Min said.

"Yeah." Yao Yi thought about it, and he understood the truth and nodded gently.

If the registration is unsuccessful, they will definitely register overseas. Like the military ants, as long as they are not stupid, they will not let the industrial technology of marching ants leave the country, so the registration success is certain.

"You are a land for high-tech industries. It is not difficult to approve. So, wait for your registration through this. I will give you this land. If you register successfully, we will have no reason for disapproval."

"Okay, then trouble Yao Shuji." Zhao Min said.

"No trouble, if you have any difficulties, let me say, I am also for the development of Binhai. For companies like marching ants, other cities, if you are willing to develop in the past, they can't wait to send a piece of land for you to develop."

Yao Yi spoke freely.

The marching ant group has changed the state of the coastal city over the years.

The holographic city confirms the image of the international metropolis of Binhai City, the ant park and the smart city drive the development of the service industry in Binhai City, and promote the development of the whole industry in Binhai.

These are political achievements for him.

The achievements here in Binhai City have laid a bright road for him to be promoted in the future. Nowadays, the army ants want to achieve even greater achievements, and he naturally cannot stop it.

"Then I will go back first, wait for the approval, I will trouble Yao Shu." Zhao Min said.

"Okay, I will send you."

Yao Yi stood up from the position and accompanied Zhao Min to leave the office.

......

"The trouble **** secretary."

Li Chengzhi took the paper bag from a middle-aged man and thanked him.

"You don't have to be polite, nothing else, I will go back first." The middle-aged man, known as the secretary of Jiang, smiled and turned away.

"Is this what? Let the secretary Jiang send it personally?"

When Li Chengzhi just returned to the office, Liu Jianjun came over and curiously looked at the paper bag in the hands of Li Chengzhi. There was no ‘top secret’ seal, which was not a secret matter.

The identity of Jiang’s secretary, he knew, let the secretary Jiang send it personally. It seems that it is not a confidential document. He is curious about what is in the bag.

“Approval notice.” Li Chengzhi said.

"What approval notice? Let Jiang Secretary personally send it? So important?" Liu Jianjun asked in surprise.

"It's not a secret matter, let me tell you. The registration information of the space company's aerospace company, Jiang Secretary sent it, indicating that the head of the big army has been approved." Li Chengzhi said, shaking the file bag.

"What? Aerospace company?" Liu Jianjun thought he had got it wrong.

"It is the space company."

"Chen Mo is going to heaven?" Liu Jianjun's voice has improved by eight degrees.

"A correct answer is to go to heaven." Li Chengzhi was not surprised.

Chen Mo’s current technology is already terrible. It is not a rare thing to touch various fields and enter the aerospace industry.

I feel that the earth can't hold the enchanting.

"I sent the information to Binhai to Chen Mo, and we will have another drink when we return." Li Chengzhi finished, put the paper bag in his briefcase and left the office.

Registering a space company, the normal approval process, at least a few months or even longer, or impossible to pass. The private rocket company already has it. Chen Mo’s current conditions are not difficult to enter this field.

The controlled fusion technology has been studied for him, and other technologies are naturally possible.

The above approval is too fast to imagine. The information will be handed over for two days, and the approval will be passed. It must be the first head of the speech, otherwise it will not be so fast.

chapters.title: Chapter 551: :Message
chapters.body:
Chapter 551: :Message

"Are you sure the news is accurate?" Linna looked down.

In front of her is a tall, thin, white man with a bi-colored pupil and a scum, named Searle. He is the head of the intelligence team on the marching ant group.

“Accurately, we checked the registration information of marching ants. The information shows that there is an extra space company named ‘Flying Ant Aerospace’ under the group.”

Searle handed the information in his hand to Linna.

“They have already started construction in Phoenix Mountain, this is a satellite map, and there are some construction maps on site.”

Intelligence personnel cannot penetrate into the marching ant group, and the research and development sites and data sites of marching ants are well-established.

They are unable to obtain information from within the marching ant group. Once the employees of the marching ants are rebellious, the agent will disappear and the employee will be dismissed. Over time, they will not dare to play this idea again.

Every time, the people in Binhai City will disappear, making him very uncomfortable. The city of Binhai is now the **** of the agents. It was forced to use more traditional means to collect intelligence.

"Aerospace, hell." Linna looked at the photo, the scalp was numb.

Although the marching ant is just a company, its horror potential is not lost to a country. The advanced technology of the marching ants directly makes Huaxia even more powerful.

Holographic cities, controlled nuclear fusion, military enterprises, etc., every time there is a big move, accompanied by the emergence of high technology, so they have to pay attention.

In particular, after the establishment of military ants equipment and worker ants defense, their investigation of the marching ant group became more intensive.

Nowadays, the news of Binhai City, the marching ant group is building a large space, building a space center with an area of more than 4 million square meters.

I am afraid that this marching ant really wants to get a plane.

This Chen Mo has already gone against the sky.

"Hold them." Linna said: "Send the news to the president and the space agency."

What made her feel very uncomfortable was the ant defense and military ant equipment of the marching ant group. Now there is one more, which is now the flying ant space company.

Chen Mo’s threat to them has grown.

......

Is the marching ant group building a space center?

Upon hearing the news, Jim Briden stayed and frowned.

Regarding the marching ant group, he heard that his ears were smashed, but he had little relationship with him. He is the director of NASA, and the marching ant group has never been exposed to aerospace matters. The matter in this field is not to worry about them.

But now, the CIA has come to the news that the marching ant group is building a space center and preparing to board space.

He has to pay attention.

Over the years, China’s achievements in the space field have grown larger. The 'Linghao’ has been put into use and become the second space station, and the International Space Station has been retired. Chinese people are not allowed to go up. They are facing the dilemma of being unable to go into space. .

Now I am also joining a marching ant group. If they don't shoot again, I am afraid they will be even more backward, and then they will be surpassed by China.
