That is a terrible thing.

After thinking for a long time, Jim still chose to pick up the phone on the table and contact the president's office.

Nowadays, returning to space has become more urgent. Otherwise, China will completely dominate this aspect, and they are really in trouble. Now explore the layout, at least for the future.

It is not a long time for the marching ant group to prepare for the construction of the space center.

Soon, important e-space agencies such as the European Space Agency (EKA) and the Russian Space Agency (RKA) received news of the construction of the space center by the marching ant group.

The development of China's space technology has been very fast, and now it has joined the marching ant group, so that they feel extremely anxious.

But this is also an excuse for using information as a means of obtaining financial support and returning to space.

The news came out soon.

The United States, the European Union, India, the island countries, and the United Kingdom have reported that they will reunite and start the construction of the second international space station project with the United States as the leading factor.

The United States, the European Union and the United Kingdom also announced that they are preparing to jointly return to the moon, plans for humans to land on Mars, and even rumors that the United States is accelerating the speed of the 'Falcon plan', hoping to create mature air and space before the marching ants begin. aircraft.

When the news came out, it drove the wave of news.

In the past, such large projects, countries must be arguing for a period of time, arguing for a period of time, funding for a period of time. Numerous news has been exposed, and more and more people are curious about the reasons for these countries to work together.

"The action is very fast, as if we would grab their money." In the office, Zhao Min saw the news and couldn't help but smile.

Their space center was started, and these countries were the first to announce plans to return to the space moon.

Zhao Min does not think that this is a coincidence. After the construction of their space center, it is no coincidence that so many countries have reached a cooperation within a short period of time.

"Since I know it, at this time, I can't say it without going to the fun."

Binhai City has approved more than 6,000 acres of land use rights. It is a terrible number. As long as someone has the information to check the registration information of the Trade and Industry Bureau, they will find that there is another ‘Flying Ant Aerospace’ company under the Army Ant Group.

Their company's construction of the space center must not be concealed for too long, and it is not very useful.

"Blue Creek, let people release this news." Called Lanxi, Zhao Min directly handed the folder to her.

At noon that day, the marching ant group released a message: The Feiyang Aerospace Center under the Army Ant Group is under construction.

According to the news released by the marching ants, the marching ants instantly became the center of public opinion.

"What kind of plane is Chen Mo going to do this time?"

"Chen Mo is really going to do the plane."

"The bulls, my marching ants."

"I said how those countries have announced their return to space. They were forced by a small ant, hahahaha..."

"I want to know, who will win if the marching ants compete with them?"

Then a number of countries and organizations announced the joint space program at the same time. As a result, a private company entered the market and snatched attention from several countries. It looked a bit funny.

The style of the marching ants is overbearing, the field that has passed, and the gods are easy.

The containment of holographic technology, the strong position of the marching ants, the hard-working and open-mouthed barriers, and the victory of the game with the advantage of technical strength, and now again with several countries in front of hard steel, full of eyeballs.

......

"Ink girl, now a pneumatic analysis." In front of Chen Mo, is a holographic shape of an aerospace plane.

"it is good."

This is the shape of the preliminary design.

There is no wind tunnel for aerodynamic analysis, and ordinary pneumatic analysis takes too long.

Chen Mo had to use a small wind tunnel and then combined with optical test methods to analyze the aerodynamics of the aerospace aircraft, and thus improve the aerodynamic layout of the aerospace aircraft.

The principle is that the refractive index of a beam in a gas varies with the density of the gas stream.

Now using holographic interferometers and holographic technology, holographic technology is Chen Mo's most familiar technology.

Holographic interference and holography can add other substances to the flow field without directly interfering with gas flow. A large amount of space and aerodynamic data can be collected in the shortest time.

Moreover, the pneumatic display can be visually observed, which is suitable for observing unsteady flow and compressible flow.

At the beginning of the aerodynamic analysis, Chen Mo saw different colors around the holographic model, and displayed specific data directly next to it. This is the specific data that is passed back from the model test, and then the data is collected by the computer and simulated.

After the experiment began, Chen Mo had nothing to do, and quietly thought about the design of a large ion engine.

"Mergo, Zhu Helai news." The ink girl next to it suddenly opened.

"Well? What news?"

chapters.title: Chapter 552: : Abu Dhabi International Defense Exhibition
chapters.body:
Chapter 552: : Abu Dhabi International Defense Exhibition

"The boss, the official has allowed our reduced version of the war robot to export." Zhu He's holographic projection appeared in Chen Mo's lab, with a relaxed face on his face.

In order to export the war robot, Chen Mo specially designed a reduced version of the robot model as an export version.

The export version of the robot removes intelligent missiles and high-power lasers, retaining smart bombs and smart bullets. Fighting, material strength and speed are adjusted accordingly, which is weaker than the full version.

For the export version of the war robot, it has been reviewed for several months. It has also been compared with the original version for a long time. After this period of evaluation, it finally allows their war robots to export, which is very rare.

Is it so simple to pass? Chen Mo was a little surprised.

“Is there any special condition?”

“Yes, the official said, customers and orders, they have to be reviewed and screened, and war robots are not allowed to be sold to countries and organizations that fail to pass the review.”

Chen is silent.

Maybe some countries seem to be very good on the surface, but they are not strong in private, and even jump out of the knife. If they don't know the true relationship between the two parties, they will sell war robots to people who should not sell them. It will be very troublesome.

Customers who can pass the official screening, in politics, do not have to worry about them, but they are happy.

"This condition is no problem."

"Also, if one clause is added to the terms of the contract, Party B must not allow third-party personnel to dismantle the robot, and it is not allowed to disclose data about the war robot to third parties. Otherwise, it is a breach of contract, and we need to compensate us for 10 times of liquidated damages." Said.

Third-party personnel are not allowed to contact war robots, and these conditions are expected by Chen Mo.

"anything else?"

"The five core materials and parts of the war robot can not be exported, and the repair work must be sent back to the country for maintenance. The most important thing is that we sell the war robots to the same organization and country, there is a limit on the number of the same organization, the other party retains No more than 50 war robots."

Zhu He said the conditions required by the official.

War robots, as one of the ace of the ace, if it is exported, technical secrecy is very important, so there are many restrictions.

But in order to balance, there must be reservations in quantity. Otherwise, a country, hysterically squatting down tens of billions, and then forming a war robotic corps, then unless the nuclear weapons, the battle on land is basically one-sided.

The world is out of balance, that is a terrible thing.

"All agreed."

Allowing the export to cut down the version of the war robot, indicating that the official has given great convenience, these conditions are not discussed, can not be exported without agreeing. Although it has some impact, it only earns less money.

"Okay." Zhu He's only doubts disappeared.

“How is the company now?” Chen Mo asked.

"So far, the official has ordered a total of 240 high-profile war robots. The output has gone up and the price has been adjusted accordingly. The current price of the robot is 75 million. This pricing is set by the president and the company officially enters the profit stage.

We recruit electronics, mechanical design and programming talents at major universities, develop their robot repair and assembly capabilities, and some weapons design capabilities are on the right track. ”

"What are the plans for the next step?"

"We are ready to participate in the Abu Dhabi International Defence Exhibition to export war robots and other products. The current products include military computers, individual combat electronic devices, communication equipment, military bulletproof vests, intelligent mine-sweeping robots, etc., miniature radar and meteorite lasers. Weapons cannot be exported."

“When is the Defense Exhibition?”

"After half a month."

"That I wish you all the best, get the big order back."

"Thank you boss. If there is nothing, I will not bother." Seeing Chen Mo nod, Zhu He interrupted the holographic communication, Chen Mo's holographic projection, also disappeared in front of her.

The office is quiet, and Zhu He is in a good mood.

Since the last National Day military parade, the robotic array has appeared in the field of vision of the world, and the defense of workers has been officially concerned by all countries. But they have always kept mystery to the outside world, and the outside world knows very little about them.

The Abu Dhabi International Defence Exhibition is the first international military industry exhibition that she has participated in since she managed the ants.

For this exhibition, they have been preparing for a long time, only for the exhibition, in one fell swoop to fight the name of the ants defense, in the field of cutting-edge military industry to fully establish a foothold, there will be no customers.

On the other hand, Chen Mo is preparing to design a large ion engine.

The design of a large ion engine is somewhat different from that of a small ion engine, but the principles of the two are basically the same. With the design experience of small ion engines, the design of large ion engines is not difficult to get started.

The bustling outside world has little to do with Chen Mo.

He is only concerned about the news about the flying ant space center.

Such a large space base will not be able to stand up, sooner or later. It is not a special secret. There is no difference between early and late, so let Zhao Min go.

Those news, for a few days, the heat will slowly disappear.

What he cares about now is when the aerospace plane can be built.

This thing, costing a lot of horror, is still a huge thing, if it is not for the marching ant group, the big business is big, I am afraid he does not dare to chase.

The capital of the United Arab Emirates.

Abu Dhabi, inside a luxurious palace.

Rijeku turned a blind eye to the luxurious decoration around him, stepping up to the innermost luxury door.

Stopped at the door, Rijeku sorted out his clothes and pushed in.

This is a luxurious and ultimate office, resplendent, almost every decorative item, is worth a lot.

On the leather sofa in the office, a middle-aged man, wearing a white Arab gown, black gauze, tall and thin, wearing glasses and a headscarf, between the faces, has the majesty of the superior.

He is the General and Defense Minister of the United Arab Emirates Sheikh Rashid.

“Minister, the list of participating military companies in this exhibition. There are 1247 companies from 56 countries and regions.” Rijeku put a thick stack of documents on the table and stood by.

"Better equipment, and we need it, where?" Rashid nodded gently and flipped the file.

"it's here."

Rijeku let go of the first part of the first document.

"The list of weapons suppliers in some of the top groups in the United States, Russia, and Europe is here."

“What special new weapons have emerged this year?”

"Yes, there are two companies that have just been established. Their products are very special. One is the ants defense of China, and the ants are equipped with Tanzanyi."

Rijeku immediately picked up the third document and opened the last few pages.

"Worker ants defense? Soldier ant equipment? Sounds familiar. Tanzanyi also has military enterprises?"

Rashid immediately came to the interest, the name seems to be acquaintance, but it is a new company, and the names of the two companies seem to be related.

"What is the relationship between the two companies?"

"It is understood that both of them are subsidiaries behind the marching ant group, responsible for the market in the military industry. Tanzanyi's military ants equipment is also controlled by the marching ant group, responsible for the production of weapons that cannot be produced in China. At the time of the military parade, the robotic array was their product."

"what??"

Rashid, who has always been calm, was shocked. It is no wonder that the names of the two families are familiar. I have heard of it.

At the time of the Huaxia military parade, the new stealth strategic bomber and a robotic array swayed the world.

The stealth strategic bomber does not say that there is no accident in the outside world, but the robots in the square have set off waves in the military.

Many countries, including them, want to know the performance of the robot, what is the horrible performance, let Huaxia choose to install the robot. However, the confidentiality of China has always been very good. After that military parade, the robot never appeared in the field of vision.

And those robots, according to intelligence information, are masterpieces of worker ants defense and military ants.

The company of the marching ant group is the background.

Nowadays, the words "the marching ant group" are sufficiently convincing.

Among the products of the Worker Ant Defense Exhibition, there are several robots, one of which is a war robot, similar to the Chinese military parade robot. Lierku turned the information onto the worker ants defense page.

The above is a photo and information of the war robot. Unfortunately, there is no specific data on the data, only a brief introduction.

The war robot seems to be very powerful. Rashid immediately became interested in this war robot: "In this year's exhibition, two of them are arranged to connect two better exhibition locations."

chapters.title: Chapter 553: : Unknown Is Terrible
chapters.body:
Chapter 553: : Unknown Is Terrible

Frankie is carefully looking at the information handed over below.

The information is the information of the companies participating in the Abu Dhabi Defense Exhibition and related product information.

As the defense chief of the Syrian state, Franz has had a headache for many years. The prolonged chaos in the country has made this country riddled with holes, and the countries around it have to come over and bully from time to time.

If it were not for Russian intervention, their country would have been divided and even more chaotic.

Over the years, they have been looking for effective ways to deal with the downfall of the surrounding countries.

But the weapons and equipment are too backward and can only be beaten.

The Abu Dhabi Defence Exhibition is a rare top-level defense exhibition. There will be many new weapons, which is a good opportunity to buy new weapons.

In addition to the terrorists who are on the border, and the occasional unwarranted air strikes by the North using stealth fighters, their air defense systems are as weak as a piece of paper.

Now we need to prepare some equipment for import, hoping to ease the pressure.

The current equipment in their country is mostly Russian weapons and equipment.

However, in some areas, there are still some shortcomings, especially in the anti-stealth early warning radar, which has been scarce.

In the case of anti-stealth radar, Western countries do not expect to sell their products, and they do not dare to use those people's products with confidence.

The only hope is in China.

The information currently placed on his hand is all the enterprises in China who participated in the Abu Dhabi Defense Exhibition.

China's military industry is very mature, and the technology of anti-stealth radar is very advanced. Suddenly, Franco slammed, and the hand flipping the data stopped, looking at the files and pictures in his hand.

"Worker ants defense?"

The name is too familiar, the name he dreams of dreaming.

Huaxia military parade, shaking the world.

At that time, he watched the live broadcast of the Chinese military parade. He dreamed of his own country and could be as strong as Huaxia. He could guarantee the security of the country. However, it was just a thought.

In the Chinese parade, what impressed him the most was the mysterious robot.

The news of those robots, he has been paying attention for a long time, also knows that it is a product of the army ants group, the ants defense.

The outside world is very curious about the function and strength of the robot, but the robot has been full of mysterious colors since its appearance. Unexpectedly, China actually allowed robots to export.

War robot.

Frankie’s hand stopped at one of the pages of the material and his fingers trembled.

......

Washington, Pentagon.

An old man is sitting in danger, dressed in formal attire, wearing a jewel-blue tie, blond-haired blue eyes, and a retro-style male watch on his hand.

This man is the current head of the Pentagon, Parry Shanahan.

At this time, Parry was quietly listening to the explanations of the analysts at the small podium, and around him, he was a senior official of the Pentagon, specializing in equipment procurement.

"According to the information released by the Abu Dhabi exhibition party, there are 10 Huaxia defense companies heading to the Abu Dhabi exhibition, which has more work ants defense than in previous years. Worker ants defense is the enterprise in the military industry of the Army Ant Group.

The published information shows that they participated in the defense exhibition, including products such as individual electronic equipment, military computers, military bulletproof vests, intelligent mine-sweeping robots, and the core product: war robots. ”

When the analyst put the pictures of the war robots on the PPT, the war robots were the war robots they saw on the Chinese parade.

The war robots of the time caused a global sensation, but they did not have any news about the equipment.

"According to our video analysis from the Chinese military parade, the robot is very intelligent. There is no delay in the pace and action. It is much smoother than the enchanting robot of the marching ant group. We analyzed the movement, walking, and pace of the robot. It is exactly the same as those of the soldiers."

“What is the use of this?” asked a senior official.

"Yes, it's very useful. The Terminator knows? This kind of robot, if you take off their glasses and use artificial skin to disguise themselves into real people, it can easily be mixed into soldiers, even ordinary people.

And if its combat power is as terrifying as the Terminator, it is certain that fighting against them is a disaster. We have reason to suspect that there are such artificial robots in China. ”

The analyst’s words caused the commotion of the audience, and some people are already whispering.

“How much do we know about the intelligence of this robot?” Parry asked.

"For the time being, this kind of equipment has been in an unknown state, including us, and we know nothing about it. Apart from the Chinese parade, it is the only place where war robots have appeared.

The Chinese army has already installed robots on a large scale, and the number is unknown, the combat effectiveness is unknown, the weapons used are unknown, and the specific effects are unknown..."

The people on the field were not careful, including Parry.

The most terrible thing about China today is the unknown.

Because China has never fought in foreign countries for decades, they simply do not know the true fighting power of China.

Nowadays, the equipment of the Chinese military has been updated, and the horror is self-evident.

"Talk about it," said Parry.

"Okay, Mr. Minister."

The analyst nodded lightly, took the laser pointer in his hand and clicked, and the picture of the war robot began to switch.

"There is not much to know. The only certainty is that the weapon system is provided by Tanzanyi's soldier ant equipment company. But the specific CMS system, the CIA has no news.

But at the defense exhibition, soldiers and ants will also be present. Their products are smart bombs, smart bullets, and high-precision sniper rifles. We suspect that war robots are likely to be equipped with smart bullets and smart bombs, but only guess. ”

After the basic information is finished, the analyst is also cautious.

"Unknown is terrible, but what is even more terrifying is that this kind of unknown threatens us. As far as we know, after the military parade, many countries have contact with China and have the willingness to buy robots.

Those countries include their Pakistani Railway, Russia, Syria, the Arab Kingdom, Persia and some countries in South America. This defense exhibition is an opportunity.

I believe that the defense of workers and ants is definitely not just to show off the robots in the past exhibitions. The Chinese military has installed robots on a large scale, indicating that the technology is mature.

This version of the war robot can appear in the defense exhibition, it shows a problem, China allows the worker ants to defend this version of the war robot. If these robots with unknown combat power fall into the hands of countries that are not friendly to us, we will be very passive. ”

“What is the way to deal with it?” Parry asked.

"No."

The analyst shrugged and said that he was helpless.

"We don't currently have the ability to make these robots, and we don't even know anything about these robots, unless we can make them or know their weaknesses, obviously we can't."

Parry nodded lightly and frowned.

He is pondering whether he has acquired such a robot or is a channel for acquiring such robot technology.

One of the secret weapons of China.

Everyone wants to know how terrible this kind of robot is. Invisible, the existence of the robot has formed a deterrent to the enemy.

The Abu Dhabi Defence Exhibition is about to come, and the two arsenals under the Army Ant Group have entered the field of vision of many countries.

The list of their defense exhibitions has been on the highest desk of each country.

War robots have become the target of mutual attention.

chapters.title: Chapter 554: : Defense Exhibition Begins
chapters.body:
Chapter 554: : Defense Exhibition Begins

Abu Dhabi International Defense Exhibition.

This is a biennale of weapons and defense, held in Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates.

Since the first Abu Dhabi International Defence Exhibition in 1993, it is held every two years. It is the largest military equipment exhibition in the Middle East and one of the top five defense exhibitions in the world. It is regarded as the most important event in the military manufacturing industry worldwide. .

Most of the world's most sophisticated military equipment is here for the first time.

In addition, it also brings together the world's top defense companies and defense experts, dedicated defense seminars.

This is a five-day "feast" that shows the world's newest and most comprehensive equipment weapons, and invites buyers from the most authoritative and most local tyrants to participate. The popularity is evident.

On the 17th, today is the day when Abu Dhabi’s international defense is unveiled.

Zhong Lei was dressed in formal attire and walked over to the Abu Dhabi National Convention and Exhibition Center. He was behind his assistant and two soldiers.

Wang Hai presided over the company's overall situation in Tanzanyi, business affairs, he should be relatively flexible, so he was responsible for the defense exhibition.

In the early years, they were guarded by the big men of the country. They had seen a lot and learned a lot. None of them, Taishan and Luoyu, are mediocrity.

Now Chen Mo has given them a platform to use the knowledge and experience they have accumulated, and grow very quickly. It will take a long time to become a party.

The assistant next to him is Luo Xin, who is responsible for assisting the exhibition.

Luo Xin is the first person in the company to follow the road to Tanzania to create a situation. The loyalty is enough, it is still a good management and auxiliary talent, so it is reused by Wang Hai and Zhong Lei.

The exhibition has not yet officially opened, but as a member of the exhibitors, they can take the lead in entering the exhibition area.

After checking the work permit and identity, several people successfully entered the National Convention and Exhibition Center.

The hall of the bright hall, the long red carpet, from the front door, extends to the depths of the exhibition hall, and divides the hall into two large areas. On both sides of the red carpet are exhibition areas of some countries, displaying various chariots and weapons.

At present, the equipment of the exhibition is mainly based on American, British, French and Russian equipment. Each country's exhibition area is divided into special sections, surrounded by exhibitors' staff.

When Zhong Lei and Luo Xin passed through the European and American exhibition areas, they could clearly feel the attention of the staff.

"Look at their eyes with their defenses."

Luo Xin looked at the staff of the European and American military industrial enterprises who watched them.

"It doesn't matter if they can't prevent it. We can't get their equipment skills. A group of people who have been persecuted and think about the late stage of cancer."

Zhong Lei smiled and continued to look at the equipment on display.

Helicopter models, fighter models, warship models, submarine models, radars, tanks, various land platforms, drones, anti-tank weapons, various weapons and ammunition, flying in the sky, walking on the ground, swimming in the water, full of dazzling .

It covers all aspects of combat platforms, counter-terrorism, security, investigation, rescue, transportation and infrastructure, covering the most comprehensive range of equipment.

Zhong Lei is sure that this is the day he has seen the most types of weapons and equipment, and is almost a paradise for military fans.

"Zhong Ge, you said how many orders can we win this time?" Luo Xin whispered in the words of Zhong Lei.

"Look at the situation, it should not be less."

Zhong Lei is still watching the equipment on both sides with great interest.

"We have the head office as the back, standing on the shoulders of the giants, and the eyes should not be too low. Our goal is to be a world-class arms supplier, and now is just the beginning.

The company's current equipment, although not large equipment, is the most practical, the name of the marching ant group, can not let others look flat.

Now in the critical period of the company's development, we have to fight for some orders, not all the funds, and the subsidies from the head office, otherwise it would be too shameful. ”

Luo Xin gently nodded and listened carefully to the words of Zhong Lei.

Not long after, several people came to the African exhibition area where the soldier ants were located.

The soldier ant equipment is now represented by Tanzanyi and is the only exhibiting company in Tanzania. Because the soldier ants are registered in Tanzania. Although it is actually controlled by the marching ant group, the soldier ant equipment does not belong to the Chinese delegation.

There are relatively few exhibitors in the African region. The exhibition is divided into a single exhibition area, which has products from participating countries and enterprises.

Zhu He is strolling in the exhibition area of the soldier ants. She has just arrived, and the opening ceremony has not yet begun. She will take a look at the exhibition area of the ants defense. If nothing happens, I will come here to see the soldiers.

After seeing a few people from Zhong Lei, Zhu He smiled and walked over. The two came to a simple hug.

"Ray Ge, I haven't seen you for a long time."

Zhong Lei looked at Zhu He and found that Zhu He’s change was not small. He was too mature and temperament has begun to change.

"How? Are you ready there?"

"Good morning." Zhu He pointed to the exhibition area opposite.

The soldier ants are equipped in the most conspicuous position in the African exhibition area, just on the roadside, next to the Huaxia exhibition area, and the worker ants defense is just adjacent to them.

The two logos are similar in style, with one spear and one shield, and the decoration of the exhibition area is the same.

If they are not separated by the middle, they are almost a company.

Some people know that the two companies are actually one, and the United Arab Emirates knows the situation of the two, deliberately arranging their neighbors to participate.

Standing in the exhibition area of the soldier ants, you can see the most conspicuous and central position on the opposite side, and the awesome war robot.

Two models, one male and one female, painted in camouflage, the eyes are designed to be very sci-fi glasses, replacing the traditional sensor camera, the face and mouth are designed with a mask, only the outline, invisible A mystery of one point.

This is the export version of the war robot.

In order to let the war robots export, Zhu He has spent a lot of effort.

Can not be made into pseudo-real people, a lot of weapons and performance cuts, and finally Chen Mo let the ink woman change several times according to the above requirements, and finally determine the export version of the robot.

“Is the robot here a model or is it true?” Zhong Lei asked.

“This is the model, the real machine is in the debut of the exhibition area.”

The debut of the exhibition area is one of the highlights of the exhibition. The equipment products unveiled in this exhibition area are all first appeared at the Abu Dhabi International Defence Exhibition and will attract a large number of visitors to come and understand.

Soldier ants equipment and worker ants defense are the first to participate in the defense exhibition, all products are new. For the first time, the two companies, in addition to the exhibition area here, also have some products, which were first displayed in the exhibition area.

It is enough to attract more eyeballs and make their war robots a blockbuster.

"Before, I gave me a list and wrote a few countries that can accept orders. It is very interesting." Zhu He’s voice is a little mysterious and his smile is not reduced.

“Can you tell me?” Zhong Lei asked curiously.

"According to the regulations, naturally can't say." Zhu He smiled and shook his head: "When they buy the weapons and ammunition from you, you will know."

"Hang my appetite." Zhong Lei smiled and said: "Look at your mysterious look, guess I can guess two. I don't know how the war robots appear in the real battlefield, I have some expectations."

"Even if it is a reduced version, but the performance is terrible." Zhu He said.

During the discussion between the two, the time slowly passed and the defense exhibition officially began.

chapters.title: Chapter 555: : Brave
chapters.body:
Chapter 555: : Brave

The defense opening curtain, the exhibition center was officially opened.

Already waiting outside the exhibition center, professional visitors from all over the world, journalists and procurement personnel entered the venue, and the unmanned convention center was instantly bustling.

Some procurement teams go straight to the favorite military company to learn about the products they need.

The Huaxia exhibition area also welcomes many tourists and purchasing teams.

Over the years, China’s frenzied development has long been a big country that rivals the United States, and this perception is even stronger.

The sky has invisible fighters, stealth helicopters, stealth bombers, anti-stealth radar on the ground, the most powerful armored tanks, and the sea is a dumpling-like warship, forming a combative aircraft carrier battle group.

The technology of China has already blossomed all the time. It is only these years that the impression of China on the outside world has been stuck in the biased description of the Western media, ignoring her hidden shackles.

Especially after the last military parade, the stealth strategic bomber appeared without warning, shocked the world, and the mysterious robot soldier appeared. It is the only robot soldier in the world.

The outside world only understands that the hidden military strength of China is beyond the imagination of all of them.

It was also after the military parade, and a few countries that had a great jump around Huaxia had a lot of security.

Several countries have secretly listed China as one of the countries that cannot be provoked. Even some countries have begun to contact China, hoping to understand the performance of war robots and prepare to buy them.

An important reason for some professionals to gather in the China Pavilion is to learn about the defense of workers.

The marching ant group is the only company in the world that controls the most comprehensive technology of intelligent robots, and the worker ants defense is an extension of the marching ant group in the military industry.

The emergence of the war robot directly laid the position as the protagonist of the exhibition.

In the exhibition area where the worker ants are in defense, at this time, people are crowded, procurement teams, spectators, and reporters are surrounded by water.

The eyes and the shots of everyone stayed in the middle of the exhibition area.

A male and female two-model war robot.

Victor, one of the senior executives of the Royal Armouries, came to Abu Dhabi to see the development of global equipment technology in addition to their company's exhibitions.

The work ant defense also appeared in the exhibition, and also exhibited war robots, so he came over to see.

Robot technology is a technology that every country dreams of, and the army ant group has a life-like enchanting robot. All countries have privately reversed the robot technology.

However, the body of the enchantress robot is made out, and the most intelligent program cannot be cracked.

Without intelligent programs, living robots are also mentally retarded, not to mention war robots.

At this time, Victor’s eyes were full of embarrassment. I don’t know when it started. China, once ridiculed by them, technology has already surpassed them.

"You robot, can you introduce its specific performance?"

Victor asked the technicians responsible for the defense of the ants, because there is no description of the robot in the exhibition area.

Lin Ziyun glanced at Victor and smiled.

He is a senior technician in the defense of worker ants. He has some understanding about its performance, but according to the company's regulations, he can't disclose it. He can only introduce the introduction.

"Sir, hello, our war robot is called 'Brave.' It is designed for anti-terrorism, war, personal security, and has a very high intelligence. It is the most advanced robot on the market."

"What specific functions does it have? Is it a weapon or ammunition?" Victor continued.

"Sir, I just said that it can participate in anti-terrorist operations, put on the battlefield and provide personal security. This is its function. It can use its own guns and ammunition, and it also carries guns and ammunition."

The specific functional data, he can not be disclosed, can only be perfunctory.

"The combat power of a war robot is quite a well-trained special team."

After Lin Ziyun just finished, the scene was awkward.

Now there is a lot of people here in the exhibition area. More than a dozen media outlets are here. Lin Ziyun’s introduction is naturally a sensation.

A robot is quite a well-trained special team. How high is this combat power? How awful is it if a large number of robots form a team?

"There are such advanced robots? Can you not rule the world in China? A robot is a special team. Don't you think that the cowhide is a little big? Or, the combat power you define is that others are bare-handed, standing still and letting the robot call taxi?"

A reporter on the side of Victor sneered, his voice mixed with ridicule.

“Can you show its actual performance?” Victor asked.

"The actual performance of the robot is inconvenient to announce." Lin Ziyun did not laugh at it.

"You don't show the actual performance of the robot. How do we make it believe that its performance is real?" Victor doesn't believe it, and he is anxious to know its performance.

"Before the purchase, customers can test the machine, but need to sign an agreement, the performance of the robot is inconvenient to disclose to third parties, we do not need you to believe, our customers believe it will do." Lin Ziyun ‘courtesy’ said.

Victor didn't take a sip and his face was black.

Some reporters and spectators around are not very satisfied with Lin Ziyun's answer. After all, some people, the task is responsible for coming to explore the performance of war robots, and now become illusory, making him very uncomfortable.

“How much is the price of this kind of robot?” Some of the purchasing team’s staff asked, and the voice was full of surprise.

The combat power of a robot is quite a well-trained special team. After all, it is too sci-fi, and there is a possibility of exaggeration.

“The current price is 80 million Chinese coins.”

"80 million? A robot is 80 million, worker ants defense want money to be crazy?" Victor gently smiled, tone with sarcasm.

"80 million Chinese coins, diamond-studded?"

"It’s just stealing money."

"A sniper rifle for anti-equipment, 80 million can be solved with one bullet. Is it really a fool for others? There is no price/performance ratio."

When you heard the price, the people on the scene were secretly screaming and talking. 80 million Chinese currency is not a small number, more than 10 million US dollars, if it is destroyed on the battlefield, how much horror will it be?

Lin Ziyun was unmoved by doubts about the onlookers.

"The defense chief has come over."

"The defense chief has come to work for the ant defense."

The crowds that were already lively, suddenly rioted, surrounded by people outside the defense of workers, a group of security personnel, and several reporters appeared around a delegation.

The head of the delegation is the defender of the Syrian state, Franke.

Franger's cheek has a bullet wound, which was left on the battlefield when he was young. He has been running in the war for a long time, his skin is dark, and he wears the military uniform of Syria. It is very discerning.

"I didn't expect the defense chiefs of the Syrian country to appear. Just after attending the opening ceremony, come over?"

"The current domestic situation in Syria is not ideal. This time, the defense of workers should be the name of the marching ant group and come over to purchase equipment."

“Would you like to buy a war robot?”

"That thing is too expensive, expensive, terrible, no price, he should not buy."

Franger in the crowd did not know the opinions of the onlookers, looked at the surrounding environment, and looked forward to it.

This time he came to the Emirate, on the one hand, the visit, and the most important thing is to buy weapons.

Their domestic counter-terrorism situation is grim. The so-called 'international coalition forces' are privately financing certain terrorists and causing too much damage to them.

There are also some large and small armed forces entrenched at the border. The northern countries are also harassing them from time to time. It can be said that they face difficulties and are much more than the outside world.

If there is no support from Russia, and China’s assistance, the current situation in their country cannot be imagined.

This time, I will watch war robots.

This war robot, which is officially installed by Huaxia, has long been one of the most mysterious weapons and is sold outside.

Western countries are reluctant to sell weapons to them, and China and Russia are the best partners.

Franke just entered the ants defense defense zone, and Zhu He also came back under the leadership of the staff.

"Hello, Mr. Franz, I am Zhu He, the general manager of the ants defense, welcome to the exhibition area of the ants defense. Do you need me to introduce you to our company's products?" Zhu He greeted him and smiled.

When he heard the translation, Franco nodded slightly and said: "Okay, madam."

"The products of our exhibition are defined as 'the next battlefield'. We study the trend of these years of war. The number of soldiers is no longer an advantage, sometimes it is cumbersome. The elite soldiers and advanced equipment have become the main battlefields. melody."

Zhu He led the delegation of Franje and the rear, and began to introduce the products of the ants defense.

"Our company is currently launching a number of individual combat electronic devices."

Zhu He pointed to a small headset on the booth.

"It is a bone conduction earphone with very strong noise immunity. After the sound is processed by the intelligent module, it is sent to the soldier's ear. It has built-in intelligent processing technology to recognize different sounds and then process them.

Suppress the sound of explosions, the whistling sound of fighters, roaring sounds, increase other valuable sounds, reduce the damage of noise to soldiers, and prevent other valuable sounds from being covered up. ”

Franco nodded slightly, and Zhu He did not stop.

“This is a smart low-light night vision device that captures the faint light emitted by the scene and is intelligently processed and clearly displayed on the eyepiece or screen to identify objects and distances.

Also, this is a smart sighting system that integrates a camera, inclinometer, laser rangefinder, high-resolution eyepieces and low-resolution electronic displays, laser pointers, infrared sights, and more.

Can intelligently identify the target distance, speed of movement, only need to enter the relevant gun and bullet data, it can calculate the best attack point according to the gun data used, combined with the distance and speed of the target, and the laser aiming double point coincidence aiming, In order to improve the shooting hit rate.

Its operation is very convenient and simple, open the aiming system, select the gun and bullet data that has been entered.

We used the current 15 rifles in the battlefield to test, the hit rate generally increased by more than 18%, especially the mobile target 400 meters away, the hit rate is more obvious. ”

Franger stayed in front of the booth for a while and looked at the sighting system like a sight. Some were interested.

“Does it apply to a variety of rifles? Or is it custom-made for a specific rifle?”

“It uses an adjustable fixed base that can be used as an alternative to the scope of the gun. It can also be mounted on the side of the gun to fit most of the mainstream rifles, including CQ rifles, M14, 95, 97, Aka series, etc.”

Zhu He picked up the gun next to the aiming system and gave Franje a brief introduction to its function.

Franje took the gun and aimed at it. On the three-inch display, the object that he could aim at, and the two points of red and black, the two points coincide, is the best shooting point.

“A very good aiming system, what is the price?”

"80000."

Frankie nodded in a blank expression, but he didn't like it or didn't like it.

“We are currently developing in-depth development of the intelligent aiming system and preparing to develop an automatic firing system. This is our concept equipment, portable automatic firing system.”

Zhu He pointed to the mechanical bracket next to it and continued to introduce it.

“The automatic firing system is installed on the gun, connected to the trigger and aiming system to replace some of the guards, or as a fire point when the combatant is insufficient. It can remotely control the firing, the accuracy will be higher, and the installation can be disassembled at any time. Small size, very convenient to carry."

After introducing the equipment that Fragger was interested in, several people quickly came to the robot, and Franco stopped directly and watched the war robot.

“Can you tell me about its function?”

chapters.title: Chapter 556: : Local Tyrants Are Coming
chapters.body:
Chapter 556: : Local Tyrants Are Coming

“This is a war robot developed by our company: the brave. It is positioned to fight terrorism, armed warfare and personal security.”

Zhu He introduced, but did not say the specific data, because they are all reporters and cameras, before the war robots have no actual combat, the performance data is best not to let the third party know too much.

She can truly feel the urgency of Franje's heart. From entering the exhibition area, he has smashed the number of war robots no less than eight times.

"What special place does it have?"

"The combat power of a robot is better than a well-trained special team." Zhu He said.

This sentence, let Frankie pupils shrink, his face flashed hesitated, apparently some do not believe.

A robot is quite a special team, which is very scary.

Although he is not convinced, Franz is still expecting that if it is true, the domestic armed turmoil crisis and the troubles of terrorists will be solved.

In addition to burning money, there is an important condition for the war, which is a steady stream of soldiers.

The special forces need long-term selection, a lot of training, and not everyone can pass, so the special team has the particularity of his existence.

Time span and labor costs, plus the meat grinder on the battlefield, soldiers are consumables.

If a robot can replace a special squad, and it is mass-produced, there will be a strong ability to 'live' on the battlefield, and the impact can be imagined.

"Are you sure it can be compared to a special squad?" Frankie wondered.

"Of course, our robots are naturally best known."

Before coming, she gave her a list and wrote a country that can sell war robots. Syria is one of them.

Syria is the venue for the current world game. The sale of war robots to Syria is not small. This is why Zhu He saw the list saying that it is interesting.

If the Syrian state gets a war robot, the impact on the situation is self-evident.

When he heard Zhu’s confident answer, Francher nodded slightly: “How much is it?”

"There is currently 80 million Chinese coins."

Hearing this price, Franger's eyes flicked and the flesh of his face shook, and some were embarrassed.

The price far exceeds his psychological price, 80 million Huaxia coins, for them today, it is a huge sum, these can buy a lot of equipment, and if this robot is bought, certainly can not only buy one.

Considering that there are reporters and onlookers around, Franger didn't talk in depth about purchasing, and it's not convenient to talk about it now. After learning about some other products, Franco left the worker ants defense.

"United Arab Emirates Defense Minister Rashid is coming over here."

"Rahid Chieftain is here."

"Franger has just left, and another Rashid, a war robot that defends the ants, has a lot of attention."

Franje’s forefoot just left, and the scene at the rear rioted again. A worker’s defense staff hurried over and whispered in Zhu’s ear.

The crowd was commotion again, separated from the middle.

Rashid appeared in the crowd, and the onlookers did not expect that the first demonstration of worker ants defense attracted the defense of two countries within one day, and Rashid was the highest person in charge of the defense exhibition. .

Rashid is the chief of Dubai and the chief of the United Arab Emirates. This face is not too big.

Zhu He did not dare to neglect and immediately greeted him.

The local tyrant came, and naturally he did not dare to neglect.

"Respected chief, hello, I am Zhu He, the general manager of the ants defense. I will introduce you to our company's products!"

"Okay, Ms. Zhu. I am very interested in your robot. Let me introduce this first." Rashid looked at Zhu He and gently nodded and walked over to the war robot. He carefully looked at it: "It's How strong is the combat power?"

"According to our tests, a robot can compete with a special team that is well trained." Zhu He said.

"How can it be?"

Rashid was surprised to see the translator, wondering if he was wrong with the translation, and asking again, only to make sure that there was no mistake, and his face flashed with shock.

He also saw the big world, the robot can have any special weapons and technology, he does not feel surprised, but Zhu He released a speech, a robot shoulders a special team, he has never seen such a powerful robot.

“You don’t have a test video of the robot here?” Rashid has an unprecedented interest at this time.

"Respected chiefs, in order to keep the robot's performance confidential, the robot's test video is inconvenient to publish, otherwise the robot's information is easy to be understood by others." Zhu He explained.

Rashid immediately became clear, this is special equipment, leaking performance, really bad.

But a robot can match a well-trained special team, and it sounds like a little bragging. Although the marching ant group is technically strong, he still does not believe it.

"What about the special place about it?"

"There are people everywhere, carefully introduced, there are many inconveniences. If you are really interested, you can take time, we can go directly to the weapons test site, you see it with your own eyes, it is more useful than I said a hundred times, certainly not Let you down."

Zhu He immediately seized the opportunity, the local tyrants have come, just let them see the horror of war robots, they do not buy them.

Among the official names, the United Arab Emirates is also one of the sellers. The relationship between the two countries is good. It is rumored that the United Arab Emirates and Syrian relations were moderated, and some of them were officially brokered.

"So? Good."

Rashid immediately agreed, and he really moved.

It is so powerful that Zhu He said that this robot is simply a terrorist weapon that breaks the balance of the world.

“Can you test the robot now?”

"right now?"

Zhu He had some accidents, so he was so eager to test the robots that he couldn’t wait to see Rashid’s heart.

Rashid can't wait to test, Zhu He will not refuse.

She can't wait for Rashid to place an order now.

"Don't you be ready?"

"No." Zhu He smiled and shook his head. When business came to the door, she naturally would not refuse: "We have prepared a robot for testing, that is, we are worried that it will not delay your time. After all, the opening ceremony is just over, you seem to have just come. Did not visit several companies."

"Nothing, it started today. There are still four days. I have seen a lot of equipment. I am very interested in it now." Rashid looked at the war robot.

The exhibition area of 130,000 square meters is not likely to be completed one by one.

Rashid also met the world. There were a lot of weapons and equipment on the show, he had seen it, and the weapons and equipment needed were confirmed.

What needs to be determined now is how the robot is the ants defense technology.

Two hours later, Zhu He and a group of equipment testers, led by Rijeku, took off-road vehicles, took the test war robots, and went to the equipment test site.

Abu Dhabi International Defense Exhibition is one of the five international defense exhibitions. The United Arab Emirates provides equipment testing bases without third-party interference, so that both customers and sellers can understand the actual performance of the equipment.

The equipment test site is on the outskirts of Abu Dhabi. It is a specially developed equipment test site with a variety of weapons testing facilities.

Through identification, Zhu He took the war robot and joined the team members to enter the equipment test site. Zhu He and others just got off the bus, and Rashid’s luxury car and team also followed.

Rashid was amazed to see the war robots around Zhu He.

Just in the exhibition area is the model. Now I see the real war robot, the cold momentum, indeed a lot more than just now.

After carefully observing the robot, Rashid couldn't help but reach out and touched the robot. Although it is a camouflage paint, the texture is still cold metal.

"It's perfect."

“This is the most advanced robot at the moment.” Zhu He said confidently.

"Well, you said that it can compete with a well-trained special team. Let's test it now, let me see its ability." Rashid faintly looked forward to it.

"Rahid Chieftain, first introduces you to its basic functions, it has three modes, one is normal mode, the guard mode and the war mode. In normal mode, it is not aggressive, it will not actively attack, the guard mode In order to guard the target and subdue the enemy, the war mode is to attack the enemy for attack purposes."

Since coming to the equipment test site, Zhu He did not hide again. This may be the first order for her trip to Abu Dhabi. How many orders can I take, look at this test.

"This is its remote console, which can be controlled remotely, except for the autonomous state."

Zhu He took out a wristwatch that was slightly larger than the watch. On the LCD screen, it was the various functions of the robot.

"These are basic performances. It is better than a well-trained special team because of its powerful ability. It is equipped with two small detection radars that can detect high-speed moving bullets within 1000 meters. , calculate their trajectory and quickly avoid it."

"What?" Rashid was scared again.

Avoiding bullets? How powerful is this? Rashid felt that Zhu He was bragging at the moment, but he still had some expectations.

The shock to Rashid, Zhu He was expected.

"Of course, avoiding sniper rifle bullets at a distance of about 400 meters, ordinary rifles and pistols are closer, and shells can be avoided within 70 meters. In addition to powerful detection functions, its smart weapon system is the main means of attack for robots. In it, it can carry 8 smart bombs and 50 smart bullets."

"Is this ammunition too small?" Rashid frowned.

What can 50 rounds of bullets do on the battlefield? Nothing can be done, a shot goes down and it is finished.

"Many, it uses smart bullets. The smart bullets have automatic guidance inside. The warheads are equipped with miniature ballistic computers and batteries. The warheads are laser-guided warheads and movable brake tails.

Shooting a target of 1500 meters away, the error is less than 0.3 meters. Under its guidance, basically a bullet, an enemy, can also hit the air target. ”

Zhu He handed a finger-sized smart bullet to Rashid.

"Smart bullets."

Rashid took the intelligent bullet, thoughtfully. This thing, the United States and the United Kingdom have developed, but did not expect that the marching ant group also has.

"The robotic ammunition of the robot is the company of the soldier ants, and the reason, the chief should know."

Zhu He continued to introduce that since I came here to try the equipment, then the money will have to be won, otherwise I am sorry for such a large local customer.

"The current war, pay attention to elite soldiers, is generally a small-scale battle. In a battle, there are fewer than a thousand armed men in the same area. A battlefield puts 4-5 robots, they are armed in full size, and the effect will be very Amazing, and they can use guns..."

Zhu He told Rashid about the war robot. She only needs to be responsible for the performance, weapon system and positioning of the war robot will understand, how to use it, is the problem of Rashid.

"Rahid Chieftain, some functions of the war robot, I have made it clear, now it is more intuitive to conduct a target experiment."

chapters.title: Chapter 557: : Rich Atmosphere
chapters.body:
Chapter 557: : Rich Atmosphere

The target of the test site is ready, in addition to the other things that are needed for testing, both on the test site.

Zhu He picked up the wristwatch and set the test mode for the robot. Everything is ready, and the war robots, under the watchful eye of Rashid and Zhu He, walked into the test position, facing the target.

This kind of test, Zhu He has done many times, and this is also a good way to go.

"War robots have free and controlled states, free states. They rely on their own intelligent core to make decisions, and the controlled state is controlled by humans."

Zhu He explained, picked up the telescope and looked at the target on the field, and gave orders to the wrist device in his hand.

"500 meters, the first target, shooting."

When her order fell, the war robot did not hesitate to raise his hand. A barrel sticked out from the palm of his hand and fired at the human target 500 meters away.

Hey!

A muffled sound, a bullet flew at a speed that everyone could not see. As the sound fell, the target hit on the shooting target 500 meters away.

Zhu He did not have any accidents against the target that the war robot hit, and everything is taken for granted.

"800 meters moving target, shooting."

In the distance 800 meters away, a moving humanoid appears at a speed of 40 kilometers per hour. Holding a telescope to see the target clearly, let Rashid have some expectations.

boom! !

After another muffled sound, the position of the target is moved, and the signal from the shot is transmitted again.

hiss! Rashid snorted and his eyes bounced. This is a shot that professional snipers feel difficult. In the hands of war robots, it is a shot.

Is this the horror of smart bullets? This kind of weapon is placed on the battlefield, how much horror effect will it produce?

"This is not the real power of smart bullets. Its limit is a mobile target that is 1.5 kilometers away." Zhu He saw Rashid's shock and added it.

"The most powerful thing is that it can shoot enemies hidden behind the bunker. Once it is discovered by it, it is very difficult to escape. Its bullets can turn."

Zhu He let the war robot aim at the target next to the bunker at 400 meters away, and after the target was retracted, she issued an attack command.

The moment the intelligent bullet left the barrel, it quickly turned into a bend in front and flew toward the position behind the bunker.

However, when the target position came to hit the target signal, Rashid was really shocked.

It is only profoundly realized that Zhu He is not worried about the problem of insufficient firepower. One shot and one fight, and the real fight, in the kilometer, as long as it is discovered by the robot, it means death.

The war robot is simply a plug-in on the battlefield.

"The next step is the smart bomb it carries." Zhu He pointed to the abandoned tank, which was used exclusively as a weapon target, and ordered the robot to attack.

I saw the waist position of the war robot, quickly extended a smart bomb, caught by the war robot, and lost to the tank.

"The special feature of this smart bomb is that it does not explode immediately after activation, but it can control the explosion. The smart bomb can be controlled to move to wherever you want it to go and then detonate."

After Zhu Hegang finished, I saw the landing of the smart bomb began to roll up, around the abandoned tank, can reach any position, and the detection data of the smart bomb was transmitted back to Zhu He's wristwatch.

"burst!"

Rumble...

A smart bomb behind the banging tank exploded, and Rashid was scared by the explosion. It was so powerful that it felt like a concentrated TNT. I can't see it, the smart bomb that is similar to the duck egg, so horrible.

"This kind of war robot, if it is hit by bullets, will it be abolished?"

Rashid said his doubts.

If it is in the war, a dozen charges, then the robot is cool, and the function is strong, and it does not help.

"No, its outer casing is our company's latest graphene titanium alloy material. It needs an anti-equipment sniper rifle within 100 meters, and 3 shots will be destroyed at the same place. And 400 meters away, it can detect the enemy's position. In the war mode, the enemy can be cleared immediately. Therefore, the probability of being destroyed by bullets is very small, and the shells can be avoided. Of course, there are too many unexpected situations on the battlefield, depending on the actual situation."

"Can you look at the function of it to avoid bullets? Do not use anti-equipment sniper rifles, use ordinary sniper rifles, 500 meters away." Rashid asked.

"This, yes." Zhu He nodded.

Soon, the tester took a sniper rifle and handed it to Zhu He.

"Rahid Chieftain, this is a new type of sniper rifle made by soldiers and ants, named: Orion, its body is made of nano-technology. In addition to the ordinary sniper eyepieces, there is also a smart aiming system for our ants defense. Do you want to shoot in person?"

Zhu He scrutinized the gun and handed the gun to Rashid.

"The advantage of the intelligent aiming system is that ordinary soldiers can be turned into sharpshooters in their hands. I heard that the chiefs like to play with guns, and the shooting is good, it is even more powerful."

"Ha ha ha ha ..." Zhu He's praise, so that Rashid feels more comfortable, laughed loudly, raised his hand to take over Orion in her hands.

"Targets 1000 meters away, you can try the chieftain." Zhu He picked up the telescope and looked at the shooting range.

“Can 1000 meters be too far?” Rashid hesitated.

Although he likes to listen to good words, he is not a sharpshooter. The goal of 1000 meters is still difficult for him.

“The intelligent aiming system will automatically correct the parameters. It has two aiming points. One is the aiming system to calculate the position of the shot. The other point is the position of the muzzle. The two points are coincident and the hit rate will be greatly improved. ""

Zhu He explained to Rashid the benefits of the intelligent aiming system. She came over to sell the equipment. When testing, using their own equipment, it is definitely good.

According to Zhu He's suggestion, Rashid raised his gun and aimed at the target at the kilometer.

The intelligent aiming system also locks the target according to his aim, and two points appear on the eyepiece very quickly. Rashid looked amazed and turned the muzzle slightly, and saw two points moving.

When the two points coincide, Rashid controls his breathing and pulls the trigger.

Hey! !

After the gun rang, Rashid’s eyes lit up.

He did not expect that the recoil of the gun would be so small, half the gun he had played, and the gun was very comfortable to pick up, so that he liked it instantly.

After a refreshing, Rashid shot at several targets next to him.

Zhu He did not stop, it is rare that Rashid likes it, as long as the local tyrant is happy, the order is not afraid.

After five consecutive shots, Rashid put down the gun and showed a smile.

"How? How many hits?"

"According to the feedback, the five shots in the middle, the chief is really a sharpshooter." Zhu He smiled with a thumbs up.

"Hahahaha... I haven't played a gun for a while, I am rusty. I like this gun and I like this smart sight. It's perfect." Rashid heard the praise, was very happy, and fumbled for the gun in his hand.

"Then we are now testing the war robot to hide bullets?" Zhu He knows that the purpose has been reached and he will return to the topic.

"Good." Rashid nodded.

Under Zhu’s orders, the war robots swept away and quickly smashed out.

The speed is so fast that the equipment testers in the United Arab Emirates are stunned and unbelievable. This speed and explosive power has gone far beyond humans.

The distance of 600 meters took about 35 seconds until the robot was far from standing. The people on the United Arab Emirates were still unbelievable.

"Unbelievable, it is really the Terminator." Rashid returned to God and marveled that Rao had seen the world and was scared by the speed of the war robot.

"The distance is now 602 meters and you can start testing."

Zhu He reminded that Rashid had only returned to God and decided to conceal his own gaffe, and he looked at the war robot. He suddenly believed Zhu’s words, and the war robot seemed to be terrifying.

"Ms. Zhu, I am going to fight, will the robots fight back and give me a smart bullet?" Rashid raised the gun and remembered that the robot had a smart bullet and it was put down.

"No, under the test state, the war robot can't kill, non-command state, and it can't shoot."

"Ok."

After hearing Zhu’s explanation, Rashid lifted the gun again and aimed at the war robot.

Hey!

At the moment when Rashid pulled the trigger, the war robots six hundred meters away moved almost at the same time, and the body stood a little after the turn. If you have a high-speed camera, you can see that the bullet has been wiped by the war robot.

"Hidden." Zhu He reminded.

"incredible."

At this distance, the bullet can be reached in less than a second, but it is escaped by the robot, showing its terrifying performance. Rashid exclaimed that he fired two more shots, all without exception, and was escaped by the robot.

"Emirates, imagine that if we are on the battlefield, we will send dozens of robots, and when the other party is discovered, it will be able to eliminate enemy snipers and have a living force when it is opened at a few kilometers. How terrible is it? Far distances, whether bullets or shells, can't cause damage to the robot.

This is a weapon against terrorism and local warfare. It also has a guardian mode, which is also around, and it can protect the owner. In addition to the ammunition weapon, there is a high-voltage electric shock on it, and its fist weight is as high as one ton. It is ok for a robot to single-handedly pick one hundred people. ”

Zhu He opened up and said the advantages of war robots.

Flexible and intelligent, this is the advantage of war robots, which is almost the most advanced equipment available.

The positioning of war robots is very accurate, that is, 'the control of the ground'. In the war, air supremacy is very important, but in the final analysis, the ground is fundamental.

Unless you destroy the war robot, you want to seize ground control, the cost is not that big. Although this war robot has been cut a lot compared to the original, its function is still terrible.

For Zhu He’s introduction, Rashid’s heart was awkward.

As he has seen, war robots are indeed a weapon to change the balance of war.

"Basically, this war robot is the strategic level equipment on the ground. With war robots, it can be said that no one dares to provoke. Advanced equipment is a shock to any armed forces."

Local tyrants have money.

She now sells equipment and needs the other party's order.

Worker ants defense has been in a state of expenditure, and with the official domestic robot orders, it turned losses into profits.

Now that war robots can export, it is an important opportunity for them to make a profit.

"How much is the price of this robot?" Rashid was stunned at this time, and the products of the marching ant group did not disappoint him.

"The current price is 80 million Chinese coins." Zhu He was overjoyed.

“80 million Huaxia coins?”

Rashid did not have the same, his face was not red, and he did not feel the slightest surprise for this price.

This performance really deserves its price.

Zhu He saw all this in his eyes. Like Franjie heard this price, his eyelids had been jumping, there was a kind of pain and hesitation, and now Rashid didn't even jump on his eyelids.

Rich and rich.

"Then come to 300."

"..."

There are 300 openings, 24 billion.

This is a true local tyrant.

But unfortunately, Zhu He smiled bitterly: "Rahid Chieftain, I am afraid this is not enough."

"What? What? What can't it be?"

"We have restrictions on robot exports. Each customer can only buy up to 50 units. We will sell them in countries with good relations with us. We will not sell them to other countries. Our country and your country are very friendly. You are also one of our few customers."

When Rashid heard Zhu He’s words, he was not angry with restrictions. He was happy. At least they were one of only a few friendly customers in China. Other countries could not buy them.

“Is there any way to increase the number of purchases?”

"This requires your efforts. This robot is special. You also know that the official is listed. It is a strategic level equipment. We have won the export quota. It is not easy to officially allow us to sell more. Otherwise, it is in vain to sign the contract." Zhu He said.

Rashid instantly understood Zhu He’s meaning, and asked them to talk to the Huaxia official. Huaxia’s high-level officials promised that they could buy more robots. It depends on their sincerity and the relationship between the two sides, like the Pakistani Railway, as long as the opening, the number of purchases must be easy to increase.

chapters.title: Chapter 558: : The Intention Behind
chapters.body:
Chapter 558: : The Intention Behind

"You said that the United Arab Emirates has ordered 50 war robots?"

Frank was surprised to see the assistant who came in to report.

Less than half a day after the opening of the defense exhibition, the United Arab Emirates made an order, 80 million Chinese coins, one war robot, 50 shots.

As far as he knows, Rashid went to the back foot after he left the defense of the worker.

It took only a few hours to buy 50 war robots.

Although the United Arab Emirates has money, it is impossible for 4 billion to buy equipment at random. It is certain that the performance of the war robot attracts Rashid, and the United Arab Emirates will choose not to hesitate to place an order.

"They tested the war robots, do they have test data for war robots?" Frank looked at the assistants reporting.

"No, equipment training ground, only the two sides are present, and it is not allowed to take pictures. Only the officials involved in the test know the performance of the war robot. Listening to the news from the United Arab Emirates, the performance of war robots is beyond their imagination. Sid is the test completed and decided to place an order on the spot."

The assistant answered truthfully.

Frank on the side nodded slightly and thought about it.

He also wants to know the performance of war robots, mainly too expensive, 80 million Chinese coins, their current state of the country, every dollar must be spent on the blade, in case the equipment purchased in the battle can not be used, right For them, it is a loss.

"We might as well ask them to try the robot and see the real performance of the robot, and then make the decision to buy, anyway, it costs little." Assistant reminded.

"Well, it works."

Frank nodded.

For the sake of the present, this can only be done. If you see the test and then decide not to buy it, if the performance of the war robot is not as good as his expectations, he can also not buy it, and spend up to some testing costs.

"Now contact the worker ants defense and military ants equipment, test equipment. To that smart bullet, smart bomb, sniper rifle, automatic aiming system."

Nowadays, all kinds of small armed shackles in the Syrian Arab Republic, the era of hot weapons, and the ghosts behind the United States and Europe are very difficult to attack. He can only rely on the equipment bought back and can help stabilize the situation in the country.

"We have received appointments from the delegations of Pakistan, Syria, Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iran, etc. They are also preparing to buy war robots, hoping to test robots." Lin Ziyun spoke, with joy in his face.

Just signed an agreement with the United Arab Emirates to hand-pick orders, so soon there are people coming over to test the equipment.

"Arrange the Pakistani railway and the Syrian test robot." Zhu He said.

The United Arab Emirates chose to announce the deal, which is a good advertisement for them.

China has installed war robots. Now that the United Arab Emirates has just finished testing, it has placed more than 4 billion orders. It is obvious that they are also very optimistic about war robots.

This also led to more curious about this war robot.

But not every country can buy war robots. Among them, there are political considerations above. Zhu He does not understand these. Which countries are allowed to buy, which countries they sell to, according to regulations.

Earn less money and less trouble.

......

“The United Arab Emirates has purchased 50 war robots? Orders for workers’ defense and military ants, up to 4.3 billion Chinese coins.”

Upon hearing this news, US Secretary of Defense Parry Shanahan was very surprised.

The Abu Dhabi Defence Exhibition began less than a day, and the United Arab Emirates made such a big order.

"Yes, Mr. Minister, the news from Abu Dhabi is like this. It is said that Rashid just finished the war robot and placed an order." The assistant reported truthfully.

Huaxia has installed war robots. Many people are curious about the performance of war robots. Now the United Arab Emirates does not hesitate to spend a lot of money to buy war robots, which is even more irritating.

“Is the war robot really so advanced?” Shanahan had to doubt it.

The country that owns the war robot is only China, or it is installed on a large scale. The performance is top secret, and the war robot seems to be a card for China.

The export version of the war robot, the performance will no doubt be weaker than the war robots in China, but the weaker version still allows the United Arab Emirates not to hesitate to pay, so it is sure that there is something attractive.

It is known that war robots will appear at the Abu Dhabi Defense Exhibition, and they are also preparing to reverse the performance of the Chinese domestic version of the robot through the export version of the robot.

“Is there any information about war robot testing?” Shanahan asked, looking up.

"No, the test of war robots is a secret test. The people involved in the test are the military executives of the United Arab Emirates. They are not allowed to leak the contents of the test. They are all confidential. It takes time to know the exact news. The news said that the United Arab Emirates seems to be ready to contact the official Huaxia, probably preparing to import a more advanced version."

The assistant told the news from the front to tell Shanahan with a hint of speculation.

"You can't get any information about the war robot. This is trouble." Shanahan tapped the table and gestured to the assistant to take a cup of coffee.

“Minister, Abu Dhabi’s intelligence personnel have returned news that the marching ants group has reached cooperation with Pakistan and Syria, and both countries have announced the purchase of 50 war robots after the test is over. Currently, Syria is raising funds domestically.”

When Shanahan was preparing to enjoy coffee, an intelligence officer knocked on the door of his office and opened the door.

"what?"

Shanahan thought that he had got it wrong, but when he heard his hand confirm it again, his face suddenly became dark.

It’s okay to sell to the United Arab Emirates. They are not prepared to commit evil. Huaxia sells equipment to Pakistani Railway, and they will not be surprised. But sold to Syria, Syria!

Because they intervened to make the country devastated, the country that hates them, the whole world knows.

I did not expect the worker ants to also sell war robots to Syria.

This is to help the Syrian country, and what are they doing? Shanahan had to doubt the intention behind the Eastern Kingdom.

War robots are not as powerful as they are. If war robots are beyond imagination, they will first become whetstones. This is definitely what they don't want to encounter.

After Shana Han thought about it, it took a while to slow down and drink the coffee in his hand.

"You go to Pakistan and the Emirates and ask them if they can show us the battle and performance of the war robot. By the way, ask Saudi Arabia if they can buy a war robot and show us."

The technology and data of war robots cannot be obtained from China. They can only start from the Emirates and Pakistan. As long as you get the data of war robots, there is a good way to deal with them when they encounter war robots.

After the United Arab Emirates, Syria and Pakistan, they saw the war robot test and did not hesitate to place an order. This incident has attracted the attention of countries around the country.

The mysterious veil of war robots has been preserved since the Chinese parade.

In addition to the surprise of the United States, it is equally horrifying to often harass the Syrian countries and Turkey.

......

The Ministry of National Defense.

In the office of the minister, sitting on an old man wearing a slight blessing, his chin has a white beard and his eyes are sharp. He is the defense chief Lieberman.

Syria has ordered 50 war robots for workers' defense, which is not good news for him.

The Syrian state is currently financially tight, the domestic situation is bad, the funds are not much, and now it costs more than 4 billion yuan to buy 50 war robots and other equipment, which shows that they value the war robots.

If the war robots are powerful, they must be the first to be unlucky, because until now, they have also bombed and attacked Syria from time to time.

The hatred of both sides cannot be solved.

In Lieberman's thoughts, an assistant hurried in and immediately opened his mouth.

“The ants’ defense executives refused to test the war robots for us? I heard that they also rejected all European buyers and Iran, and Russia.”

"Refused." Lieberman's face sank.

Worker ants defense refused to test them for war robots, meaning they refused to sell robots to them.

They have made good contacts with the United States, and the people behind them are also the United States. They have repeatedly refused to sell weapons technology in China, and the workers’ ants refused to test them. It seems to be reasonable.

But the Syrian state has already got the war robot, but they don't know anything about it, so he always feels a stone in his heart.

"Contact the Americans and ask them if they can get the intelligence of the war robot."

chapters.title: Chapter 559: :Very Interesting
chapters.body:
Chapter 559: :Very Interesting
