In the office, Zhao Min and Chen Mo are chatting.

The design of the aerospace plane has been completed, and the design of the large ion engine continues, but not so fast, so Chen Mo took time to rest and rest.

The Abu Dhabi International Defence Exhibition is now in full swing.

However, various news have already been heard, especially the war robots appeared in the defense exhibition, which is even more eye-catching.

"You said how many orders can they get this time?" Chen Mo asked while drinking tea.

"Over 10 billion orders, there should be some."

Zhao Min thought about it and wanted to answer.

The performance of war robots is terrible. As long as you see people, you will definitely not let go of this high technology. The limit is 50. As long as the orders from two countries are close to 10 billion, she is very confident in their products.

"In fact, I just started, it is not to support you into the military industry." Zhao Min said: "The military industry has high requirements for products, low profits, large market restrictions, high sensitivity, and the company's profits in a field are far away. It’s higher than this field, and there are too many ways to make money with our technology. What do you think? Because ink girl?”

"Advanced technology, first of all military, then civilian."

"I know this," said Zhao Min.

Li Chengzhi has obtained technical support from them many times. She has participated in the whole process and understands it naturally. And this is also the trend of world technology development, advanced technology is first of all military, and then civilian.

"Technology is at the point where we are. The military industry is inevitable. I also need a legal channel to produce these robots." Chen Mo said: "The situation in the world is very delicate now."

After the emergence of controlled fusion technology, the world game direction has undergone subtle changes. Energy transformation, although traditional energy has not been eliminated on a large scale, but also in the final crazy stage.

The high-tech competitions in various countries have already begun, but they have been suppressed by the technology of their company and have not been revealed.

The new energy revolution is a trend. The steam era, the oil age, the electrical age, the worldwide energy revolution, especially the stage of faucet transformation, are not excessively peaceful.

It’s not going to the point of the explosion now, it looks like it’s still fine. It is really the point of the contradiction, the war is open, the world is reshuffled, and the next is a new era.

In the beginning of troubled times, their country is unlikely to stay out of the way, and the marching ant group will become the first target. Under the nest, do you have an egg? So I can only help build a strong nest, and also be strong.

"Think so far." Zhao Min said with amazement.

"We have experienced so many espionage incidents, targeted kidnappings, technology theft, commercial espionage, and digging technical talents. There are many people who can make our minds, and there are definitely some in the dark.

The marching ant group is now being remembered by thieves. So many national organizations have hit our minds at the same time. The above is even stronger. There will always be fish that slip through the net. The last two incidents are like this. When the chaos comes, the fish that leaks the net will be more, not prepared in advance, and will be very passive at that time. ”

"Mergo, Zhu He and Zhong Lei are on the phone."

When the two chat, the ink girl standing behind Chen Mo reminded.

"The news is coming." Chen Mo smiled: "Connected."

The holographic projections of Zhong Lei and Zhu He popped up. At this time, the two were full of joy and the mood was very good.

"The boss, the president, the equipment orders are basically determined."

"Talk."

“Working ants defense has a total of 14.3 billion orders, and all three countries have purchased 150 war robots. The other eight countries have purchased other equipment automatic aiming systems, communication equipment, etc.”

“The delegations from seven countries and regions purchased our smart bullets and smart bombs, sniper rifles and other equipment, and the soldier ants equipment received 1.5 billion orders.” Zhong Lei added.

“Which countries have purchased war robots?” Chen Mo asked.

“The United Arab Emirates, Pakistani Railway and Syria, some countries have purchase restrictions, we did not promise them to test. Syria hopes that their orders can be delivered as soon as possible, the deposit has been given, and when they are equipped, they will pay in full.” Zhu He said.

"On my side, the Syrian country also put forward the same request."

"This is your idea."

After Chen Mo learned about some buyers from the two populations, he hangs up the communication.

"This is a bit of a point, selling war robots to Syria," said Zhao Min.

"Really, there is now the main battlefield of the world game, very interesting." Chen Mo nodded.

Pakistan can buy, in the expectation of everyone, but sell war robots to Syria, there is a lot of articles inside.

"What do you want to do?"

"This is a business order for workers to defend against normal business. It has nothing to do with other people, but Syria is a good test ground for our company's war robots. It's good." Chen Mo's hands spread, meaning a deep smile.

"Well, it is true." Zhao Min thought about it and laughed.

......

The marching ant group has entered the military industry and has been receiving much attention.

This is the first time that the worker ants defense and military ant equipment have exhibited at the International Defense Exhibition. I did not expect to have a big order when it first appeared.

In addition to the announcement of the purchase of war robots by the United Arab Emirates, orders from Pakistan and Syria have not been announced, but various gossips have already been released, even if they have not been confirmed by all parties, it has caused an uproar.

Syria is the main battlefield of the current world game, and it is also the main battlefield of the situation in the Middle East. Arms and organizations of all sizes are on the fringe, and neighboring countries are more or less involved.

It is reported that the worker ants defense has sold the most advanced war robots to Syria, and has to attract attention.

Syrian countries have not had enough funds. The rumors have not hesitated to spend billions of Chinese coins, and they have purchased weapons for ants and military ants. This is a optimistic weapon.

Once the new weapon is taken by the Syrian military, it is certain that it will enter the battlefield.

Intelligent bullets, smart bombs, aiming systems, these intelligent weapons, war robots with unknown combat power, this batch of equipment, is an unknown number for all parties involved in the Syrian game.

All parties in the world are madly collecting intelligence about war robots, but there are confidentiality agreements, and third-party countries simply cannot get close to war robots.

The United Arab Emirates, which has decided to buy war robots, is tight-lipped about the performance of war robots.

In the speculation of various news, the Abu Dhabi National Defense Exhibition came to an end.

The defense exhibition, the work ant defense and the soldier ants equipment, received a total of 16 billion equipment orders, the data appeared, so that all parties were shocked.

The two companies participated in the defense exhibition for the first time, and they got the order for the price. In addition to the clear order from the United Arab Emirates, orders from other countries were not known to the outside world. Only some intelligence agencies learned some news.

Syrian Presidential Palace.

In the office, a tall, thin, middle-aged man in a suit and trousers, with a hooked nose and a wide forehead, was tired and serious, but there was a bit of joy at this time. He was the president of Syria, Bashar.

Since he succeeded the Syrian president, he has been working hard for this country and actively asking for help from all parties. As the situation has gradually become clear, the situation in the Syrian country has improved.

But this improvement is relative to the past.

With the harassment of the country, the northern countries (Turkey) are eyeing the country, and the domestic opposition to armed forces, such as the skeleton, has been unable to annihilate with the support of the Western Group, as well as the harassment of Western groups and the threat of terrorists.

This is the status quo.

In these years, Bashar has never had a smile, and today there is finally a hint of joy.

Because Franje brought back the news of the war robots sold by the workers, and the performance of the war robots, Franje also said in detail with him.

"Mr. President, you need to visit. This batch of equipment can greatly improve our domestic situation. If there is no accident, we can even win this war. We need to express our gratitude and sincerity. If possible, fight for more. Multi-robot orders." Frankie said seriously.

"Well, I will arrange this." Bashar nodded: "When is the worker ants defense and soldier ants equipment promised to be delivered?"

"They said that within one month of the war robots, other equipment and ammunition were delivered within one month. They knew that we urgently needed the equipment."

"We should think about how to use this equipment to deal with those people. If the war robots and other equipment are as powerful as you said, this is an opportunity to clean up the domestic armed forces."

Bashar’s face was stunned and he had been wronged for many years. This time he waited for an opportunity to turn over.

"What about the international situation?"

"I will visit two big countries and ask them to help us drag, don't worry, take this opportunity to get rid of those cancers," Bashar said.

"Okay." Franger had a good body and his eyes were resolute.

chapters.title: Chapter 560: : This Question, It Is Time To Ask God
chapters.body:
Chapter 560: : This Question, It Is Time To Ask God

Bashar visits China.

Hearing the news, Lieberman frowned.

Worker ants defense has just sold war robots and various equipment to Syria, and Bashar announced his visit to China.

The purpose of this visit to China is that it is self-evident that it is hoped to gain the support of the great power of the East. If the Syrian state receives their support, I am afraid that the situation will be even more troublesome.

Although China has not participated in the Great War for decades, no one dares to underestimate the Eastern Kingdom. It is the only country that can compete with the United States. Even the United States must take full advantage of it.

Moreover, in recent years, because of the outbreak of various advanced technologies of the marching ant group, the world's leading position has already revealed the signs of change of the owner.

I am afraid that the situation will be more chaotic.

“Is there any intelligence about war robots?” Lieberman looked at the assistant next to him.

"No, Americans have no relevant information. Mossad has not collected it, but knows that there is a message that the ants defense and the relevant countries have signed an agreement that does not allow third-party countries and organizations to contact war robots." Lieberman's assistant is true. Reply.

"Contact the Americans and the British and ask them to continue to support the armed forces of Syria." Lieberman blinked.

Behind the country and the country of Syria, the country behind Russia is Russia, behind them are Western groups.

The two parties have long-term tit-for-tat, and their hatred of Syria and the country has accumulated. If the Syrian country is settled down, I am afraid that the next thing that will be troublesome is them. Therefore, they have been constantly making excuses for the Syrian country. stable.

They can bully the country, but the Syrian state is not so easy to bully.

At present, the conspiracy to support the opposition political regime in Syria has gone bankrupt. Today's Syrian country, because of the war, has been devastated and has become a place for all kinds of armed separation. As long as the Syrian country is not settled, they will not have much trouble.

"Also, collect as much as possible the weapons and equipment that are obtained from the defense of the workers and the equipment of the soldiers and ants, conduct evaluation tests and obtain relevant data," Lieberman added.

"Understand." Lieberman's assistant left the office after his promise.

Bashar’s visit to China, the news, in the world of political and political circles, stirred up no small waves.

The long-term turmoil in the Syrian state, various armed separations, the situation is now slightly better, but still bad, the parties have the meaning of faint.

It is rumored that at the Abu Dhabi Defense Exhibition, the Syrian state has placed billions of weapons orders for the defense of the workers. When visiting China, Bashar’s plan has to be cranky.

However, things are not over.

Shortly after the Syrian state announced its visit to China, the top leaders of the Pakistani Railway, the United Arab Emirates, Russia, and the Arab Kingdom also visited China. They all came here to meet with the highest level of China.

As for the content of the talks, apart from some routine rhetoric, the specific content is not known to the outside world.

This extraordinary visit has to make the outside world think more.

In the suspicion of all parties, two months passed quickly.

"Mr. Franco, this is the last batch of orders, please check it out." Zhu He sent a list to Frankie.

Since they signed the contract, the ants defense began to produce related equipment. The Syrian President Bashar visited China. There are still some gains. The number of war robots can be purchased, and the number of war robots has increased by 50. The Syrian country does not hesitate. An order for 50 workers was added to the defense of the worker.

In order to get the equipment early, they even paid all the money in advance.

This is the last batch of orders, a total of 25 war robots and 10,000 sets of targeting systems. Other orders have been secretly transported into Syria, and the Syrian military is now familiar with those equipment.

In order to calm down the domestic problems, the high-level officials of the Syrian State have made a **** this time.

Franje took the list and gestured to the next hand to check it out. After confirming that there was no problem, his face showed a hint of joy.

During this time, they selected a group of the most loyal soldiers, conducted closed secret training, and familiarized themselves with the defense of the ants and the weapons and equipment of the soldiers.

The long-term training is familiar, as well as the ants defense and the training of the soldiers and ants equipment technicians. They have thoroughly understood the equipment and specially organized the military high-level to formulate tactics for this new equipment.

As long as they wait for the opportunity, the newly formed team of soldiers will be able to rush out of the cage. At that time, it is the time when the world is shocked.

"Thank you, Ms. Zhu He." Frankie smiled and shook hands with Zhu He.

"This is what we should be. Regarding the equipment agreement, Minister Franco should know that if the robot is damaged in the war, you can contact us immediately, we will send personnel to come back to the country for repair," Zhu said.

"Give me a tribute to Mr. Chen Mo, you are our best friend."

"Ok."

After handing over the equipment to Frankie, Zhu He and other staff members, under the **** of Syrian soldiers, left the port. Now that all the orders have been successfully delivered to Syria, nothing happens next to them.

Although it is foreseeable, there will be a global war of attention in the near future.

Chen Mo is very busy.

The design and manufacture of the aerospace aircraft cost Chen Mo all his energy.

In two months, under the blessing of Chen Mo's evolutionary super brain, there is also the artificial intelligence of the ink girl, plus the optimization of the supercomputer day and night, the design of the space plane has been completed.

The Ant Ant Space Center is being built intensively. Under the huge funds, the construction speed is also very fast, and the progress is still smooth. Therefore, the progress of the project has been calculated by the ink girl and the most reasonable arrangement has been made.

At this time, in front of Chen Mo, there was a plane flying in a science fiction.

The fuselage is connected to the wing. The huge fuselage is equipped with four large ion engines. There are two ion engines at the rear. There are also six landing gears and nearly 24 wheels.

This is the work of Chen Mo during this time, the design of the aerospace plane.

In front of Chen Mo is a miniature version of the design, the aircraft's true proportion is larger, according to Chen Mo's design, the height of the space plane is 6.8 meters, the wingspan is 70.3 meters, the length is 34 meters, the estimated empty weight is 74 tons, the maximum takeoff The weight is 235 tons.

This behemoth is not something that ordinary people can afford.

Just the budget manufacturing price, it is 20 billion Huaxia coins, not counting other expenses, it can be seen the horror of this thing.

"Merco, the last batch of weapons for worker ants defense, has been delivered to Syria." Seeing Chen Mo stopped, the ink girl around her opened.

"Ok."

Chen Mo nodded.

For those political and administrative issues, Chen Mo only pays attention occasionally and will not go deep into the research.

"Is the material of the aircraft ready?"

"Ready, the formula you gave is correct, all the materials meet the requirements, some parts have been manufactured as planned. Large parts, the printer needs to be completed." said the ink girl.

The biggest problems with aerospace planes are energy, engines, and materials and manufacturing problems.

The material science and technology library provides, after the success of the 1024 element crystalline material, the energy problem is also solved.

The most important large-scale ion engine, with the experience of designing a miniature ion engine, is not difficult for Chen Mo.

In manufacturing, there are many large parts. Under the accumulation of Chen Mo's early technology, the industrial system of the marching ant group also has large 3D printers, so these are not a problem.

The problems encountered are not big. According to the current progress, the completion is only a matter of time.

"Okay, go home and eat."

Chen Mo asked the ink girl to save the relevant information and take off her goggles to leave.

......

Pentagon.

An equipment analyst handed the report to Parry Shanahan and opened a test video: "This is the result of our test of the ants defense and the equipment of the two companies."

Other senior officials in the conference room also got relevant reports, the scene was quiet, and began to seriously look at the report and test video.

Worker ants defense and military ants are equipped with two conventional weapons sold, which are inevitably outflow due to the large base. These equipments have also become sources of intelligence for collecting data from two countries in other countries.

"We did a detailed test on the acquired smart bullets, smart bombs, aiming systems, etc. The first is the smart bullets. According to our tests, ordinary soldiers use smart bullets, killing one person every 1.42 shots." Equipment Analyst Opening.

"The threat is not big. The sniper averages 1.39 bullets to kill an enemy. The smart bullet is not as good as a sniper." One of the senior officials laughed.

"Mr. Harry, notice that I am talking about ‘ordinary soldiers’.”

The equipment analyst sounded cautiously.

"We tested the ordinary soldiers. They were only familiar with one day. They were trained with guns equipped with soldiers and ants. The intelligent bullets were able to reach the level of excellent snipers. The process took only two days. In the open area, even if you hide in After the bunker, you have to die, and the bullet can turn."

The high official who just had a smile, his face immediately froze.

The sniper's precise and terrifying shooting skills are trained after a long period of time, almost with bullets. It takes time and space to span.

With the use of smart bullets and guns, as long as you understand the use of firearms and bullets, an ordinary gunman can become a battlefield in a short period of two days.

"Especially in the long-range shooting of moving targets outside the kilometer, the hit rate of intelligent bullets broke the record of the top snipers in the army, and the record-breaking is an ordinary soldier."

The expression of the equipment analyst is getting more and more dignified.

"We must be clear that this is a terrible data."

No one can laugh out loud in the conference room. Everyone, including Parry Shanahan, is heavy.

"In addition to smart bullets, the aiming system also greatly increases the hit rate, especially the hit rate of the moving target. Its intelligent calculation can make corresponding calculations according to the speed of the moving target, marking the position of the precise shot, thus improving the hit. rate.

We found a technician with few guns and a gunman with the best shots. The results showed that our technicians, after familiarizing themselves with the aiming system, had a hit rate that did not accidentally exceed the soldiers who had good shooting. ”

The equipment analyst introduced the picture displayed in the video to the people on the field, and it was already silent.

"There is also a smart bomb. We equip the testers to call it an 'angel egg.' On the battlefield, you see it appearing next to you, you have to go see the angel."

The equipment analyst pointed to the smart bomb in the video.

"After it is thrown out, it can intelligently sense the nearest target at the landing, then roll to your **** to explode, or roll to the place you set, it is terrible. You can't hide, if it's kneeling, it will roll to your egg. Near the egg. Seeing that only running hard, it is possible to escape the risk of being blown up. If the bomb appears on the battlefield, it will cause more than five times the threat of a traditional bomb."

"If the three weapons add up and equip an army, what should I do?" Shanahan frowned and asked.

"This question, it is time to ask God."

chapters.title: Chapter 561: : War Open
chapters.body:
Chapter 561: : War Open

Northern Syria, Idlib Province.

Idlib is the provincial capital of the Idlib province in the northern part of the Syrian Arab Republic. It connects the Harab Plain with the Asi River Valley, which is the last occupation of the armed opposition.

In the past few years, because of the containment of Western groups, the Syrian military has not been able to recover Idlib.

Opposition to the armed forces also relied on the ceasefire agreement, hiding here to recharge their batteries (for lingering), and with the support of the Western Group, it has become the main location for various armed forces.

Long-term wars, armed family members, and refugees flooded into the north. Today, the population of Idlib has soared to 2.8 million, and 80,000 people are armed.

Due to concerns about the refugee problem, the Turkish and Russian sides have different opinions on this place. Together with the Western Group, it has become a paradise for various militant activities.

Thinking that it is backed by the border between the Mediterranean and the country, Western groups can easily support weapons and ammunition here.

At this time, in a base of Idlib, there was two people sitting inside a small room, one with black-rimmed glasses, a semi-Mediterranean top, an old man with a gray hair, another blond, a white bear with a hook nose. It seems to be only in his thirties.

The old man is Abdul Hissett, a famous scholar and politician of Syria, and chairman of the Syrian National Committee. After the outbreak of the war, he was one of the leaders who opposed the armed forces.

The white man in his thirties, named Sim, is a ‘military adviser’ sent by the United States.

Hessett looked at Sim, his eyes were also respected, and he did not dare to make it. In name, Sim is his adviser. In fact, he also knows that Sim represents the Western group behind him.

In the past two months, with the various instructions and help of Sim, their opposition has already annexed the two largest armed forces in Idlib, and other small arms are slowly gathering.

The successive victories made Hissett feel stronger than ever, and he also admired him.

Today's Idlib, the armed group led by him is the most powerful. In the past, he opposed the armed dispersal of sand and the situation of dog-toothed teeth began to improve.

They also get a lot of equipment, and maybe they can counterattack the military. As long as they can meet the armed forces in the northeastern part of the Syrian nation and break the isolation situation, their situation will be better in an instant.

"Now there are several armed forces, Idlib, our family is big, and then when we come back, we will give our team a new name." Sim said.

"We fight for freedom, and the ‘wing of freedom’ is the most appropriate.” Hissett laughed.

"Not bad name." Sim chewed the name 'wing of freedom' and nodded lightly.

"Where are we going next?" asked Seaset. He is a scholar, has an understanding of tactics, specializes in Eastern and Western culture, and he naturally learns a lot about historical warfare.

But Sim is sent by the Western group. He must also consult with Sim, in order to give orders.

"Harab." Sim ordered the mark on the map.

The town of Harab.

The turning point of the war in the Syrian state was the Battle of Harab.

This battle allowed the Syrian military to recover Harab and cut off their armed links with the northeastern part of the Syrian state, leaving Idlib in a state of isolation.

Opposing armed sites, because this war was divided and weakened.

In the Battle of Harab, the commanding style of the Syrian military battlefield changed dramatically.

The Syrian military side took the tactics of splitting the encirclement, interspersed with attacks, and circling the three-in-one against the armed occupation zone.

When they reacted, the Syrian army had already controlled Harab.

The tactic of the battle is the typical tactic of a big country in the East.

Afterwards, they realized that the battle was indeed planned by a military adviser sent by a big country to the ‘study’ of the Syrian state. The result was the Harab that was reclaimed by the Syrian army.

The Western group that heard the news was suffocating, but also aware of the terrible tactics of a big country.

Now that I want to make a comeback, Harab is the only way to open the situation.

Only by reuniting with the armed forces in the northeastern part of the Syrian nation can they resently resist the ability of the Syrian military.

Seeing the position that Sim pointed at, Hissett nodded slightly, and that was where he wanted to play.

Harab is a Syrian industrial and economically powerful city. It borders the Mediterranean Sea in the north and borders the soil countries, between them and the northeastern part of Syria. Only by taking it here, they have a chance to confront the Syrian army.

“When do you start acting?” asked Seaset.

"Tonight." Sim squinted.

......

morning.

When Chen Mo opened his eyes, he saw a quiet person lying next to him.

The small fish still did not wake up, the blue silk was pulled on the forehead face, and the skin of the face was red and white.

The small fish in the sleep, not long after opening his eyes, because last night's ridiculous, at this time the small fish face is lazy, after seeing Chen Mo, wrinkled his nose: "Look at what."

"Look at my wife."

Yan Yixiao, a small fishing show, buried his head in his arms and enjoyed the familiar atmosphere quietly.

"Would you like to have a morning exercise?" Chen Mo patted Xiao Yuguang's back.

"Bad egg~~"

On the breakfast table, Chen Mo was drinking porridge, and Xiao Yu was teaching him to eat with his own spoon.

Xiao Yu’s mood seems to be very good, and the corners of his eyebrows are all joy.

The ink girl also sat aside and looked quietly.

"Husband, I want to listen to Zhao Minjie's suggestion, run a kindergarten, give unparalleled school." Xiao Yu opening.

Nowadays, it is almost the age of the kindergarten. The child grows up and needs the companionship of the same age partner. The mind will be sound. There is always no small partner at home, which is definitely not good for growth.

There is no particularly good aristocratic kindergarten in Binhai City. It is not convenient to send it to other places. Therefore, Xiaoyu intends to listen to Zhao Min’s original suggestion and start a family safely.

"We do kindergartens ourselves, recruiting some children to come in and study outside, and recruiting famous teachers to come in, so it is more assured."

"Yes," Chen Mo said.

"Then you agreed?" Xiao Yu asked.

"This is good for the unparalleled, of course, agree, not to mention the kindergarten, you need to give the best education to the unparalleled, no problem in running a university, do you want me to help?"

Chen Mo smashed the unparalleled little head.

"No, it's fine to give it to me at home. If you have any thoughts on unparalleled education, just say it to me." Xiao Yu smiled and shook his head.

"Hey, what is school?" The unparalleled meal was eating, and they were both curious and looked at them.

"Going to school is unparalleled to learn knowledge, there are many small partners who are the same as the unparalleled play with you. After learning to grow up, unparalleled can protect the mother." Chen Mo Chong said.

"After going to school, I can be as smart as my father and my son-in-law," said Xiao Yu.

"Yeah." The little girl nodded seriously and seemed to be awkward about going to school.

A warm everyday.

With the permission of Chen Mo, while Xiao Yu took care of the unparalleled at home, he also began to prepare for the construction of the kindergarten. Chen Mo also went to the company with Mo Mo.

"Merco, the situation in Syria has changed. The armed forces of Syria's Idlib have been helped by the Western Group, and they have assembled two armed forces. They provoked the battle last night, under the cover of the night, against Syria. The national army counterattacked. "When I arrived at the company, the ink girl opened it.

"Where are they going in the offensive direction?"

"Harab."

There are some special events in the work, and Chen Mo will not mention it in front of his family.

Working with the family, the ink girl also knows what events should be said, so it is generally only in the workplace that the ink girl will tell Chen Mo some special things.

This news made Chen Mo slightly a little, and finally relieved.

It is no accident that the opposition armed forces marched toward Harab. Harab is a strategic place, and it has a great relationship. At that time, there was a turning point in the war situation in Syria. Now it is ready to counterattack, and it bears the brunt.

The issue of Syria has been delayed for many years.

In the Syrian countries, the opposition to armed forces is gradually weakening. However, with the support of the Western Group, it has been a deadlock, collectively huddled in Idlib, and because of terrorists, harassment of two countries at the north and the south, the international game The containment has made it impossible for the Syrian military to completely eliminate the opposition.

In the past two months, the Syrian military has spent a lot of money to buy a large amount of weapons and equipment from Russia and the marching ant group. It wants to once and for all, completely settle the domestic situation.

It is naturally impossible for the Western Group to let the Syrian State succeed, and it is also secretly funding the opposition.

In the past two months, Chen Mo knows that there are a lot of Western funding, but there is no nosy, and it is normal to break out of disputes.

Worker ants defense and military ants equipment, the last batch of weapons orders, has been handed over to the Syrian military, and then the batch of weapons officially entered the battlefield.

With a brief look at the relevant information, Chen Mo continues to immerse himself in the study of space planes.

The current situation of aerospace planes is what he should think.

......

The Syrian war has rekindled, the ceasefire agreement between the two sides has failed, and the international situation has been stirred again.

Just the second day after the start of the war, the US aircraft carrier also announced its trip to the Mediterranean Sea in an attempt to deter.

Opposition to the armed forces also released videos to the media. They opposed the tyranny, and the appeal was that Bashar stepped down.

In this way, Western public opinion began to build momentum, accusing Bashar of taking the lead in attacking and provoking the war. He asked Bashar to face up to the situation in the country, resign from the presidency, and re-elect the new president.

The response is naturally impossible.

Bashar also announced on the television media that he was angry at the first fire against the armed forces and vowed to liberate Idlib to eliminate the last cancer of the Syrian nation.

On the second day of the announcement, Bashar announced that the country dispatched fighter planes to bomb harass the Syrian border, use missiles to shoot targets in the Syrian state, and fight against terrorists.

Immediately afterwards, the Turkish countries in the northern part of the Syrian State quietly sent troops into the territory of the Syrian state, stationed Chen Bing, and claimed to fight terror.

Without the official permission of the Syrian state, Chen Bing’s territory was disguised in disguise. In the first instance, the Syrian state official demanded that the Turkish army immediately leave the territory of Syria, otherwise the consequences would be conceited.

The situation in the Syrian country, which has already improved, has deteriorated again because of the participation of all parties.

The world’s eyes once again gathered in the territory of Syria.

"Minister, this is the statistical data on casualties below." The assistant handed the data report to Frankie and stood by.

Franger was in a bad mood. He predicted that the war might come back, but he didn't expect it to be so fast.

Not only that, the public control of public opinion, but also external propaganda is their first move. Although the outside world knows that this is a false statement of Westerners, but looking at those remarks, it is very uncomfortable to take them.

"There are 16 deaths and 19 injuries."

Seeing this casualty number, Franco is even worse.

The other party regarded them as soft persimmons, glaring at the night, breaking the ceasefire agreement and attacking their three strongholds.

It was the front line of the military facing the armed forces. It was later bombarded by Western group aircraft. After a fierce attack, it has now been temporarily withdrawn, waiting for counterattack orders.

"Minister, what do you do now?" the assistant asked carefully.

Since the other side first provokes the war, they don't have to bother to break the deadlock. Now he has any reason to completely annihilate the other side.

Franke’s eyes glanced.

"Requesting Russian air support, counterattack, this time the target is Idlib, unplug the cancer."

chapters.title: Chapter 562: : Tiger Force
chapters.body:
Chapter 562: : Tiger Force

A team is arrogant on the road, and behind the team is the dust that the vehicles are flying over.

The soldiers in the car, one by one wearing a yellow-brown camouflage uniform, carrying a gun with special equipment.

At this time, each soldier has a solemn expression and always pays attention to the movements around him.

In the center of the team, it was a transport truck that was covered by desert camouflage cloth. Between the many armored vehicles and special forces, the car was particularly awkward.

If the outsiders see the team's logo, they will certainly recognize that this team is the elite of the Syrian army: the tiger army, the most brave army of the Syrian military, is called the 'Sword of Bashar'.

In the middle of the car, a man sits quietly in the car, dressed in an armor, with a beard and a beard, and his body is sharp and indifferent, making people dare not look straight.

If you let their enemies see it, you will be scared.

He is the supreme commander of the Tiger Force, the legendary commander of the Syrian Army, Sukh Hassan, and the legendary existence of the Syrian military soldiers.

In order to personally command the Tigers to fight, they refused to upgrade Bashir's Brigadier General.

Leading the Tigers to become the sharpest scalpel in the Battle of Harab, dividing the enemy's position and making a contribution to the recovery of Harab. Later, in the battle to annihilate the militants many times, he set up a heroic battle, and was personally awarded by Bashar, and he was promoted to be a major general.

After disappearing for a while in the battlefield, Hassan once again appeared on the battlefield of Harab.

When he was sent to serve as the chief commander of the Harab battlefield, he had obtained all the information about the current battle.

Three days ago, a group of rebels appeared in the urban area of Harab, which was about 800 people. It may have penetrated into the city of Harab through the Idlib mountain area and is now in the southern part of the city.

On the outskirts of Harab, the rebels raided the Anadans checkpoint, and now the Anadan checkpoint has been controlled by the rebels. The 46th base was attacked, and about 2,000 rebels were besieging the 46 base.

According to the news, Azaz and the town of Casal also suffered from different levels of rebel attacks.

The offensive of the rebels was extremely fierce and almost crazy.

Anadan was attacked and the current team in the Anadina Plains has retreated. The 46th base is a fortress defense, easy to defend and difficult to defend. Now the defense is still very stable. As long as there is no internal traitor betrayal, it can still be held for a while.

In all kinds of situations, Hassan decided to clear the rebels who infiltrated into the city of Harab.

Now that Harab is under the control of their military, the other party infiltrated into the city of Harab, trying to disrupt their deployment from behind.

Clearing the rebels and calming the situation in the city of Harab will be able to let go of the rebel forces.

This time he personally led the team and followed him, in addition to the 200 most loyal guards, and the silver camp under his tiger forces.

During the ceasefire, their tiger troops received a new batch of equipment.

These two months are secretly adapted to the equipment.

The soldiers in the team have already had a very deep understanding of the new equipment and they have completed it. This is the first battle he started to receive new equipment, and he must fight the momentum.

In this battle, they have the confidence to win.

The performance of the war robot horror, he has seen in the new equipment run-in.

The name is true.

Hassan sat in the car and had an expectation of the war robot and the new equipment entering the battlefield.

Half an hour later, the city of Harab was already far away, and it was far from the smoke, and there was a deep explosion. No one knows that the Syrian military is equipped with advanced equipment and is close to the battlefield.

"General, quickly enter the battle zone in the city of Harab." The team entered the city of Harab, and the adjutant next to him reminded him.

The buildings in Harab City, looking at it, did not have a complete, devastated.

The ruins are the homes left to them for more than a decade, and they are broken.

As the team approached, the sound of gunshots and explosions became clearer and the smell of smoke was already heard in the air.

For the elite on the battlefield, this smell has long been taken for granted.

Soon, the team passed through the levels and entered the rear of the battle zone.

"General."

The team had just stopped, and a school officer ran over and took a tribute to Hassan, his eyes revered.

Now Hassan is already one of the legendary generals, the most prestigious person of the Syrian army, and one of the idols of the hundreds of thousands of soldiers in Syria. It is rumored that if Franje retires, Hassan will become the most powerful candidate for the defense position.

“How is the situation?” Hassan, the school official, returned to the ceremony and asked.

Upon hearing this question, the school official's face was not very good, hesitantly said: "The Salahuddin area has fallen, and now it is fighting in the Hajdaria district. Their equipment is very good, there are many top snipers, we The casualties are not small."

"Yeah." Hassan was expressionless and couldn't see the anger: "Take the way ahead and head to Hajdaria."

"Yes."

The school officer quickly boarded the team-led vehicle and headed to Hajdaria.

The five-kilometer raid was not too far away and soon reached the cross-fire block.

"Acta, let the demon squad come down." Hassan spoke at the control end of the right hand side.

Order, the truck blocked by camouflage canvas, the curtain behind it opened, 11 war robots came down from the car, the color of the painting, the lines on the body are soft, it looks mysterious and powerful.

Together, there are 10 soldiers.

This is the composition of the Devil squad, 10 war robots, 10 soldiers, and an extra war robot, which is Hassan's **** robot.

These 10 players are personally selected by Hassan, and they are the most trusted and loyal people.

The above allocation of 11 war robots to the Tigers, assigned by Hassan personally, to assist them in carrying out some dangerous tasks in the front line.

At the time of running in, they fully experienced the horror of war robots.

They have not found any obvious defects, the most suitable is the plain battlefield, followed by the urban street fighting.

In the absence of heavy weapons, war robots are invincible.

This is the first battlefield for war robots to enter the war.

Hassan wants to try, this knife is not sharp at the end.

hiss……

When the robot appeared, the soldiers on the field opened their eyes and suspected that their heads were not enough.

Their country is in war all the year round, communication is blocked, and there is only constant fighting, training and command. Soldiers have relatively little knowledge of the outside world. Many soldiers use old-fashioned weapons.

Now I see the novelty of war robots, and they are curious on their faces.

They even suspected that there were soldiers pretending to be in tights.

"Recover Salahuddin, don't take prisoners."

In the voice of Hassan, with Sen cold, many years of war, he accumulated too much anger, those people, never give any compassion, he is never a teacher of civilization.

The surrounding soldiers heard the murderous voice, even if it was a battlefield, could not help but chill the skin, thanking himself as a soldier under the general.

Give Arcata an order and turn to look at the adjutant around him.

"Let the silver camp replace the soldiers in front."

"Yes, general."

Arcata and the adjutant took a tribute and took the soldiers and the robots together and ran over the fast-moving neighborhood.

There is no hesitation in the middle.

Soldiers who can be selected to enter the Tigers, each of whom is a warrior who has never died in the battlefield, has experienced the experience of blood and war.

Hey... bang! !

The sound of gunshots and explosions, vibrating and screaming, the smell of smoke and blood in the air is somewhat snot, the dark red blood can be seen everywhere, and some have not yet solidified.

Arcata let the demon squad split into two groups, a group of five people and five robots, entering the crossfire area.

At this time, he has full expectations, and if the war robot can play the horror performance under the training mode, everything will be a foregone conclusion.

"Start the war mode." Arcata opened.

This is his first official launch of the war mode.

With the instructions of the Demon Squad, some sci-fi goggles of the 10 war robots turned red. It is like a bloodthirsty color, some terrible. Soldiers around the scene saw war robots and well-equipped tiger troops join the battle, and their faces were ecstatic.

"War robots, 10 units."

Two war correspondents who filmed on the battlefield saw the war robots, their eyes horrified and their bodies chilling.

They are not soldiers who are occluded by news. He is a journalist. It is clear about the news that happened outside the world, especially the equipment. It is rumored that the Syrian state has placed a war robot order from the worker ants defense, but it was not true.

A chill made them react and did not hesitate to pick up the camera and press the shutter.

Arcata entered the battle position, his eyes were hot and his body was shaking, not fear, but the uncontrollable excitement.

"Out of action."

Hey! !

Ten war robots jumped out of the street and turned to look at the battlefield opposite. The muzzle on the hand was turned on, pointing to the opposite block.

Looking at the war robots that jumped more than three meters in the air, all the soldiers were open-mouthed, incredible.

Next, they saw an unforgettable scene since they participated in the battle.

chapters.title: Chapter 563: : Do You Want To Kill Chicken?
chapters.body:
Chapter 563: : Do You Want To Kill Chicken?

The war robot leaping in the air, the barrel of the hand has been extended, aiming at the opposite block.

boom! boom! boom……

The muffled sound came from the arm of the war robot.

The finger-sized child pops up in the air and plucks an invisible trajectory. If you can see it all the way, you can definitely see the slight arc of the bullet.

Ten robots have the same movement and no extra movements.

The machine gunners of the rebels across the bullets flew away, and the air around them seemed to be still.

Garcia is holding a machine gun and is suppressing the fire of the Syrian army.

Suddenly, I saw ten shadows in the opposite side of the street. Garcia’s pupils shrank and didn’t see what it was. I didn’t hesitate to turn the machine gun’s muzzle.

A deadly sense of danger struck, and the feeling of death shrouded Garcia.

It is said that before people die, they can see a special picture. In Garcia's line of sight, everything seems to be a hundred times slower. He can see a bullet coming toward his eyebrows.

puff! ! !

Without any blockage, the bullets did not enter Garcia's eyebrows and penetrated.

He hasn't even had time to scream, and consciousness has fallen into the dark.

Hey! Oh...

A muffled sound, one by one body fell straight to the ground, the eyebrows have added a bullet hole, accurate to terrible.

The ten robots stopped without a shot, and they did not land. The second shot was already shot. When the robot landed, there were more than a dozen bodies that had not cooled in the bunker.

Heavy machine gunners, RBg rocket shooters, discovered snipers, thugs throwing grenade, and rebel forces discovered by war robots with a threat to them, were the first to be cleared.

After one round, the gunshots on the opposite side were already sparse, and the threatening firepower disappeared.

The war robot that just landed did not stop, and the body slammed into the opposite block and began to kill again.

"War robot."

Polit opened his mouth and looked at the war robot incredulously, chilling.

As a rebel commander infiltrating the city of Harab, his identity is also a high-level, naturally listening to the news that the military is fighting for worker ants to buy war robots.

For the performance of war robots, they have always been mysterious. They are against armed forces and they are only bragging.

Nowadays, war robots really appear on the battlefield, and one shot is all their heavy firepower.

It was discovered that the war robot jumped again and the palm of his hand pointed at him. Polit’s body was stiff and just wanted to jump. It was still too slow, the body had lost consciousness, and consciousness was drowned by fear and fell into darkness.

Ten robots, like flexible leopards, crossed the ruined wall and damaged cars, and sprinted and slammed on the battlefield without any stagnation.

The Syrian battlefield was dead, and all the soldiers squinted and opened their mouths, looking incredibly at the back of the ten robots.

Jumping out of the war robot, now, in less than ten seconds, all the firepower of the other outcrop has disappeared. What is this terrible thing?

Some people swallowed hard and swallowed, and several soldiers were already sitting on the ground.

When the crowd reacted, the war robots had collectively reached the opposite front, and the killing had begun.

After 10 minutes, the sound of gunshots, explosions, screams slowly became sparse over time, and the fighting blocks were dead, leaving only the smoke of the war and the thick **** smell in the air.

The battle is over.

Yang Zhen looked at the demon squad and led the robot back. He was cold and his throat moved. He couldn’t help but step back.

This is the fear of the heart, such as death passed by.

Until the Demon squad walked away with the war robot, Yang Zhencai recovered from the shock, raised the camera in his hand, and patted the war robot.

As a war correspondent, he has photographed many wars and has seen various wars. But today, this battle has once again refreshed his perception of the battlefield.

too terrifying.

He only saw today that what is terrible, what is massacre.

The number of rebel forces on the other side was unknown, and in the short ten minutes, all the enemies were killed, and the rebels did not even have the power to fight.

The bullets of the war robots are like long eyes, one shot at a time, and almost every shot hits the rebels.

Yang Zhen saw with his own eyes that a war robot could easily escape the RPg's grenade. At that moment, he thought he was dreaming.

"It's going to change."

Yang Zhen looked at the war robot and the demon squad, muttering his mouth.

"What? Kill 230 soldiers in 10 minutes?"

Sim heard the report, Huo Di stood up from the chair, his eyes were round and more unbelief.

"Do you want to kill chicken?"

"This is the news from the intelligence personnel of Harab. I have not been able to contact Polit. He is dead." Hissett sullenly, his teeth said.

He is not willing to believe this, but the news is back.

"I confirm with the above." Sim squinted and picked up the encrypted satellite phone and dialed a number.

The atmosphere in the Pentagon conference room is depressed.

On the conference room screen, there is a photo of the war robot.

The Syrian warfare intelligence personnel sent back news that the Syrian military tiger forces put 10 war robots into the battlefield, less than 10 minutes, hunted 230 anti-armed soldiers, forcing more than 200 rebels to surrender their weapons and surrender.

The rebels who infiltrated into Harab were all cleared within half a day.

Everyone is not willing to believe this fact.

It is understood that the weapons of the ants and the weapons of the ants are the greatest in this battle.

"The weapons and equipment of the marching ant group have already demonstrated their horror performance and value. The combat power of war robots is the most difficult at present. How do we deal with war robots, and the equipment that the army ants group sells to Syria." "Parry Shanahan, as the US defense chief, is a key problem in front of him."

"Let the team be equipped with anti-equipment sniper rifles and rockets, can you destroy the war robot?" A senior official of the Pentagon opened.

"I don't know, but the news sent back from the Syrian war scene shows that the speed of war robots is very fast, more than twice that of normal people, and the response is very fast. Some intelligence personnel on the battlefield see them avoiding rockets."

The equipment analyst opened the meeting and the meeting room was silent.

What is the horrible performance of escaping rockets?

Until now, they have not had a good intelligence on the specific situation of war robots, and the war robots show the horrible fighting power, which has made them feel dangerous.

"What good way is there now?" Shanahan asked.

"Not found yet."

Shanahan heard the answer and his face was black.

If there is no way to deal with war robots, the Syrian rebels will be settled, and the Syrian military will turn its target to other parties.

If the rebel forces in Syria are settled, their Middle East layout will fail completely.

What's even worse is that China has also installed war robots, and the combat power is definitely stronger than the export version, which means that the Chinese military's combat power is even more terrifying.

"Unless there is a war robot, we have to study and analyze its performance and weaknesses to study targeted weapons."

Nowadays, there are only a few countries that have war robots. They are all countries with very good relations with China. They have no access to war robots, let alone the entities that get war robots.

“Can you find a secret ship in the Arab Kingdom to come and study for us?” asked a senior official.

"They won't," said Shanahan.

After the Arab King’s visit to China, the relationship between the two sides went further and the war robots for the defense of workers were obtained. The Arab kingdom gave China a large number of trade orders and promoted Chinese throughout the country. The cultural exchanges and cooperation between the two sides have been deepened.

They went to the Arab kingdom and were rejected. Like the emirate, they said it was a restriction on the defense of workers and prevented third-party personnel from contacting them.

......

The war robot appeared in the Syrian national battlefield, annihilating 230 rebel forces in 10 minutes, forcing nearly 500 rebels to surrender and calming Harab.

The news came out that in just one day, the world was shocked.

The Syrian military did not have any concealed meaning, acknowledging the fact that war robots killed more than 200 rebels in 10 minutes in front of global journalists.

The intention of the Syrian state is very obvious.

Using this battle, we will shock the organization forces that have joined the Syrian national battlefield, forcing some unsettled armed surrenders in the country and stabilizing the morale of the Syrian soldiers.

Count it in one fell swoop.

"Boss, now representatives from 8 countries contact me to buy war robots."

Chen Mo received a video call from Zhu He.

The news from the Syrian Arab Republic has given the global countries a new understanding of war robots. They think that countries that have made good contacts with China have come over and hope to buy.

"What do you say above?" Chen Mo asked.

"The above hints, refuse." Zhu He said.

The countries that buy war robots are some countries that are inseparable from their gods. They may not be able to refuse face-to-face. They will use excuses to transfer the stalls to the ants for defense, and then let the workers and ants take an excuse to reject them.

This will handle the relationship well.

Zhu He touched these and naturally understood some of the rules.

"Then just find an excuse to refuse." Chen Mo nodded.

As a signboard for the defense of workers, the war robot has now shined on the battlefield, in his expectation.

However, if this kind of high-tech intelligent weapon appears on the world battlefield on a large scale, it will soon break the current global military balance. Once the balance is broken, it will be a big chaos.

Now no one is ready for that step, so the official will choose export control, especially in the hands of the minded person and the white-eyed wolf.

chapters.title: Chapter 564: : Battle Situation
chapters.body:
Chapter 564: : Battle Situation

"What now? Anadan was taken back by the Tigers."

Hissett was anxious like an ant on a hot pot.

At the beginning, their attack on the military was very smooth.

With their well-equipped equipment and unexpected attacks, they successfully won the Anadans checkpoint, occupied the town of Anadan, and also occupied several villages in Azaz and Casal, and smoothly penetrated into Hara. Bu urban area.

The original opening was very good. As long as there was enough time, with the support of the West, they had the opportunity to occupy Harab.

But now, the situation has suddenly turned.

The emergence of war robots has made everything tricky.

The military bought the most powerful war robots in China. Under the advanced and terrible equipment, their soldiers did not have any resistance.

The team that infiltrated into Harab was completely annihilated. Now in the cover of tanks and armored vehicles, the Tigers led the war robots to counterattack the Anadans checkpoint.

Now the team of Anadan also suffered heavy casualties, and the Anadans checkpoint was taken back.

The team that guards the Anadina checkpoint is under the attack of the Tigers’ silver camp, such as the chicken and dog.

The town of Anadan returned to the control of the military, and several villages in Azaz and Casal towns were retaken.

During this period of fighting, more than 500 people were killed, more than 2,000 people were captured, and there were countless losses.

The original advantage has disappeared.

The Tigers are equipped with the weapons and equipment of the Army Ant Group, which are the most advanced equipment.

And there are only 10 war robots. No one can guarantee that there are no more war robots in Bashar.

So far, they don't have the performance data about war robots. Even Americans can't get the performance data of war robots.

Now the Syrian army is advancing to them at a horrible rate. Within their ranks, they have experienced layers of failure and are already heart-wrenching.

If there is no way to stop the tiger forces, once the soldiers’ confidence collapses, their team will really become a sand and can’t be hit.

"What do you say above?" asked Seaset.

"The above is studying the methods of war robots. They hope that we can bring a robot back at all costs," Sim said.

"You are not kidding? The war robot is so easy to be captured by us. Do I need to be anxious here? Who is the robot who dares to approach?"

Not by Hessett is not angry.

War robots appear on the battlefield, no one can get closer.

There is no feeling at all in that thing. All the enemy forces that use weapons are killed by all the hands, and there are special squads of the Tigers, followed by the large forces of the Syrian military.

Under the cover of the Syrian armored forces, the war robots are almost invincible on the battlefield.

Now, Sim said that Americans want a war robot, let them take the body to pile up, can capture the robots and they are not taken away. The tiger army Hassan is not a fool.

War robots are so expensive that they follow the big forces to attack.

Unless there is absolute power to crush the other side, grab the commander of the Tiger Force, otherwise it is unlikely to get a war robot.

"The most troublesome thing is that we don't know anything about war robots. Even the latest information is kept in the official information released by the workers' defense and a little photograph taken by the reporter."

Sim is not in a good mood.

At the beginning, he accepted the mission and came to assist Hisset. He did not put the war robot in his heart.

A robot on the battlefield, even if it is strong, has a limited role.

Now he realizes how wrong the previous ideas were.

Seriously underestimate the strength of war robots.

Nowadays, there is a lot of equipment against the loss of armed forces, and the loss of personnel is huge. The opposition to armed forces is always screwed together by various armed forces, and the cohesiveness is not high.

Because of the loss of several battles in succession, the internal people are not stable, and if they continue this way, they will fall apart inside.

"Can you give pressure to the Syrian nation, let them cease fire, wait for us to find a way to deal with the robot, and then think of the next step." Hesett asked.

"Now that I have been talking to the Russians, the other side has deliberately delayed and has not reached an agreement."

Sim shook his head.

As early as when the war robots were found to be tricky, they thought about using the ceasefire agreement again to delay the time. The previous ceasefire agreement, because of the war between the two sides, has been invalidated.

The new ceasefire agreement, they talked to the Russians, but this time the other party did not seem to have much will, but dragged them.

Nowadays, the town of Anadan has been retaken. If Hassan’s tiger troops enter Idlib with war robots, their troubles will be great.

"Can't you send ground troops to support it? Or send it to deal with the armored vehicles, tanks and planes that stand in the robot." Hesett asked.

"Impossible, we are not good to intervene directly." Sim directly refused.

Although they are involved in aircraft-assisted bombing, they are all in the name of counter-terrorism. Even if they bombed the Syrian army and the civilians, they also attacked the terrorists and the terrorists.

Behind the Syrian state is Russia. They send troops to enter, so Russia will certainly not hesitate to send troops to enter.

The situation is out of control and the consequences are unimaginable.

More likely to trigger a world war.

Both major powers are agent wars, and some balance is maintained. Both parties maintain the final bottom line.

Let’s not say that they are not good at participating, even if they can participate, they will not dare to come in.

Now that the Syrian state has mastered the war robots, they have not found a way to deal with robots. Once they intervene, they are the ones who lose. And if you fall into the mud, it will be more troublesome.

There are no large-scale armored units, relying on simple soldiers, and war robots are to send food.

Hissett licked his hair for a long time without words.

Hey~~

The two fell into a quiet confidant, the door to the room was pushed open, and a head of intelligence was rushing in.

"General Hassett, just returned the news, the military used the war robot to attack the town of Ai Timai and asked us for support." The intelligence leader did not continue to say it, the meaning is self-evident.

"Support? What support? Go to die?" Hissit was very upset.

It is also a war robot.

With the participation of robots, it is almost certain that the town of Aitimai was taken back.

The town of Aitima is a major town in the northeast of Idlib, connecting the borders of the country. It is one of the important channels for their assistance. Now they are retaken by the military and their situation is even more difficult.

In their territory, the only one that connects the borders of the country is the Babu Hawa port.

"Damn war robot, **** worker ant defense."

Hesset couldn't help but export. If it weren't for war robots and worker ants to defend those advanced weapons, they wouldn't have to be so passive and wolvering now.

"General, Bashar published a national broadcast, a televised speech."

When Hissett blackened his face, another man in charge of intelligence rushed in and put the military computer in his hand in front of Hissett.

"The people of the Syrian nation, these years, our country has been ruined by the war. Under the instigation of the Western group, some people have been confused and deceived, which has created the current war. Now, we have seen the end of the war. The dawn of light.

The army of our country has won several consecutive victories in the past few days. But no matter how successful the victory is, war means bloodshed. This is not what I want to see. I believe that it is not what all Syrian people want to see..."

In the TV of Syria, in the broadcast, it is the voice of Bashar.

Sounds and pictures are spread throughout the Syrian state through broadcast signals.

In this fragile international, television and radio have become luxury, but people who watched TV and heard the radio gathered together and listened to Bashar’s speech.

Too many people are seriously eager.

The desire for a peaceful and peaceful life.

"Our next goal is to liberate Idlib. Many of the armed men in Idlib are our compatriots. Here, I want to tell them that the liberation of Idlib is unstoppable, and you choose to surrender. Put down the weapons in your hands, I can forgive you or reduce your crimes.

If you choose to continue to resist, our army will not be merciless. You used to be our compatriots, family, I don't want you to bleed on the battlefield for the benefit of the West. Think about your family, friends, I believe, on the battlefield, you will make the right choice.

......

Finally, I am here to warn that all the troops, soldiers and armed men who are stationed in the Syrian territory without authorization will immediately leave our national territory. Otherwise, we will regard it as an intrusion and bear the consequences. ”

Looking at Bashar's televised speech, Hissett was black as the bottom of the pot, shivering and mad.

"General, the news ahead, the government army is heading towards Babhawar."

A leader rushed in. Hearing here, Hesset seemed to lose the last glimmer of strength, sitting on the chair and straightening his eyes.

It’s over.

chapters.title: Chapter 565: : The Hand Of Washington
chapters.body:
Chapter 565: : The Hand Of Washington

Babu Hawa was recovered by the Syrian government, and the last border port of Idlib province against the armed control was cut off.

This battle became the last straw that was crushed against the armed forces.

The besieged opposition armed forces were in a state of total collapse, and there was almost no fighting. They abandoned the important towns such as Mhamdan and the Alameslin, and looked at the winds. Internal defections abound.

The land where the Syrian army has passed will win without fighting.

Even if the Western Group made an excuse to send a plane to bomb a few times, it still could not stop the pace of the big forces.

The wing of freedom opposes the armed high-level, and there have been serious differences. The main battle and the two sides began to quarrel and change their minds.

Not long after, there was a guilt inside the wing of freedom, and the leader of the peace-seeking leader was led by the late night, trying to control the leader, Hissett, and finally planned to fail, and the two sides exchanged fire.

The wing of freedom is completely divided into divisions.

The two factions guilty, Hassan received the name of the referrals, taking the opportunity to lead the Tigers, attacking the city of Idlib.

The wing of freedom is disintegrated inside, and the tiger forces of Hassan are headed by war robots, clearing against the armed forces, and the large forces are steadily pushing forward.

The battle of Idlib city lasted for one day.

The leader of the Wings of Liberty, Hitsett, was killed by war robots in the battle, and the armed forces lost the last heart and many people surrendered.

In the end, the Syrian government army led by Hassan completely controlled the city of Idlib and captured 4,000 militants. The rest of the team was disbanded and laid down to escape.

The group of 50 military advisers sent by the Western Group to oppose the armed forces were all captured. Under international pressure, the Syrian state finally released the 50 military advisers.

Since then, the Syrian civil war has ended in a government victory.

The outside world was unpredictable for the sudden change of the Syrian state. With the advantage of war robots, in less than a month, the Syrian nation settled for more than a decade of civil war.

War robots have almost become synonymous with the most horrible battlefield.

The manufacturers of war robots, the ants defense and the soldiers who provide weapons for the robots, are equipped with two companies. They also stand firm in the ranks of the world's top arms manufacturers because of the victory of the Syrian government.

However, the war did not end.

Before the recovery of Idlib, Bashar had publicly issued warnings to the troops who had not allowed to enter the territory of Syria through television broadcasts. However, half a month later, the troops entering the territory of Syrian Arab countries still did their own way and did not leave the territory of Syria. the meaning of.

In the end, the Syrian nation couldn't bear it. Let the Hasan Tigers who had just settled on Idlib attack the north and directly drive the army of the country in the Syrian territory.

Hasan’s tiger troops, while approaching the country’s garrison, let the air force carry six warm-pressure bombs, invest in the country’s territory in the Syrian state, and then take the lead in the demon squad equipped with intelligent robots and the well-equipped silver camp. , traversed.

In just one day, the troops stationed in the territory of the Syrian State, 1,300 soldiers died, and the tanks and armored vehicles lost 82 tanks and armored vehicles. The cost was heavy and they fled and returned to the border of the country.

Then Hassan led the silver camp and the war robot squad, airborne in the southwestern part of the Syrian Arab Republic, with the intention of regaining the Golan Heights.

The news spread that the country immediately stopped bombing and harassing the Syrian state and entered a comprehensive state of readiness, such as the enemy.

The news of the change of the Syrian war situation has spread, making the world shocked.

Nowadays, there are war robots and intelligent equipment in the Syrian state as the cards. Although the air power is lacking, the combat effectiveness of the ground forces has reached a stage of terror.

The repatriation of the country has no way to sue the United Nations and ask the United Nations to discuss the resolution and impose sanctions on the Syrian state.

The stage of the game of the world's great powers has also shifted from the Syrian national battlefield to the stage of the UN General Assembly.

In addition to the assistance of the United Nations to the United Nations, the request for sanctions against the Syrian nation, and the Western group headed by the United States, plus the countries of the country, the country, the island country and South Korea, drafting an agreement prohibiting the entry of war robots into the battlefield, also submitted to the Security Council. Beautiful name: In order to avoid human beings suffering from the crisis of intelligent robots, destroy humanity.

In the end, neither agreement was passed.

The sanctions imposed by the Turkish countries have been rejected by the United Nations without any mercy.

Because the Syrian state has publicly warned of the illegal entry into the territory of the Syrian state, it is only the soil country that has not been taken care of. It is an indisputable fact that the Turkish countries invaded the territory of Syria, and the Syrian state has the right to self-defense.

As a result of this resolution, the Tuguo country swallowed a dumb loss, and it was only guilty to the Syrian state.

The Western Group’s agreement to ban war robots from entering the battlefield was directly rejected by the Eastern Powers of the Security Council.

......

CIA headquarters.

Linna is in a secret meeting.

The changes in the Syrian battlefield, the emergence of war robots, helping the Syrian army to win wars and stabilizing the domestic situation in Syria have threatened their global strategy.

As for the war robots and the Syrian army, they don’t have to worry about it. The Pentagon will be responsible for it, and she won’t know.

The purpose of the CIA meeting was to identify plans to deal with Chen Mo and the marching ant group.

The victory of the Syrian civil war, to a large extent, is the victory of the marching ant group technology, intelligent weapons and war robots, which won the greatest contribution to the victory of the civil war.

The current marching ant group, with its terrible technology, has already made Huaxia's cutting-edge technology field a leader, and war robots are a good example.

Some media and comments in the world have begun to recognize China's leading position.

They are now a downhill empire, dilapidated buildings and systems that can collapse at any time.

Get Chen Mo, get the cutting-edge technology of the marching ant group, and they have the opportunity to return to the world's leading position in science and technology.

But it is currently impossible to steal the technology of the marching ant group.

In recent years, the CIA has dispatched more than 40 top secret agents to Binhai. However, all of them have not returned together, and there is no news. Some agents have just stepped onto the land of China and lost contact.

The penetration of the marching ant group has never stopped. It has been successful through the internal staff of the anti-force ants group. However, those who have been rebelled will not be dismissed for a long time, and all their efforts are in vain.

The marching ant group is the most difficult bone they have encountered in their work.

"Now the marching ant group is an unprecedented business empire, its influence is intertwined, leading the development of China's cutting-edge technology, it can no longer threaten its status by external forces. Want to disintegrate this business empire, only from the inside, like the Soviet Union same."

It’s Mellon, an old man of nearly 60 years old, who is not outstanding, ordinary, but he has a special position in the CIA and is the team leader of the 'Hands of Washington’.

The hand of Washington began in the Cold War and was established to disintegrate the Soviet Union.

When he first entered the CIA, Milon entered the hands of Washington to participate in the plan to disintegrate the Soviet Union. He also participated in guiding public opinion many times, causing some countries to fall into chaos and civil war in order to achieve their goals.

To achieve this goal by this means is the most convenient and cheapest.

He is now the head of the 'Hands of Washington'.

This time his plan is not a country but a high-tech company.

In his resume, it was the first time to break a company, but he was very interested in it. If the marching ant group is pulled out alone, it will definitely be comparable to many countries.

"How to do it?"

“We will first talk about the advantages of the marching ant group. If we want to completely disintegrate an organization, we must start with their most powerful aspects.”

Mellon is not in a hurry to slow down the PPT in the computer.

"The biggest advantage of the marching ant group is Chen Mo, and the purpose of our plan is to destroy Chen Mo or let Chen Mo rebel out of China for our use.

Then came the second advantage of the marching ant group, a stable and united management. This management team manages all the things in the size of the marching ant group. It is this united management team that allows Chen Moyan to follow the law and prepare the materials and affairs he wants to study at the fastest speed. The efficiency of the workforce horror is due to the leadership of this management team.

These are the two most powerful advantages of the marching ant group. They are also the strong cornerstone of the marching ant group, disintegrating one of them. The business empire of the marching ant group will enter a recession and even fall apart. ”

Mellon’s words made the people on the field nod.

"Based on this direction, we have formulated two plans. The first one, using the domestic 'spray' in China. Stinking Chen Mo's reputation, he hated the status quo of his country's environment, and even left China and immigrated to other countries."

"What is the spray? Our spy?"

"No, no, it is a group of interesting people, all over the world, but China has a large population, so China is especially rich."

"Interesting person?"

"Yes, it is a group of people who have a lot of trouble. This kind of person likes to vent their hatred and dissatisfaction with reality on the Internet, and is easily controlled by emotions, so it is easy to be used."

Milon smiled and said.

"As for another plan, it is to dismantle the management of the marching ant group, and the most direct approach is to start with Zhao Min, who is the core of the marching ant management."

Mellon tapped the picture and basic information of Zhao Min displayed on the PPT.

"She is single, is the plan to blow her up?"

A CIA executive saw the information, laughed and laughed, and others laughed.

"Your thoughts are good. She is now the richest woman in the world and one of the top ten most influential women in the world. Her decision-making is the decision of the marching ant group.

You can soak in her, and you can take a private jet to Dubai to eat golden ice cream tomorrow, and you can sit on a gold toilet every day. Of course, it is also possible that Chen Mo will catch you and feed you into the sea. ”

Milon also smiled and said seriously.

"Chen Mo is surrounded by three women. These three women help Chen Mo the most and manage his three most important places. His wife He Xiaoyu is responsible for the family and his life; Zhao Min manages the size of the entire marching ant group. Affairs; as for the mysterious assistant ink girl around Chen Mo, rumors are responsible for the brain of the marching ant group: area 1."

From the foreign speech and lace news of the employees of the marching ant group, they can get a lot of information.

The words of the ink girl represent Chen Mo's words. It is rumored that the ink woman has the highest authority of the marching ant group, and can transfer any level of technical information of the marching ant group, which is even the authority that Zhao Min does not have.

"Why don't we start with this ink girl?" asked a senior executive.

"Because she is the shadow of Chen Mo."

They checked all the information about Chen Mo and all that they could find, and they got detailed information after all.

"The data shows that since this woman suddenly appeared in Chen Mo's side, she has not left Chen Mo half-step, and she does not leave. Chen Mo went out on the occasion, she has her figure, even living with Chen Mo, and we have no background about her. information."

"So beautiful, still living together, Chen Mo's wife does not object?"

"No objection, rumors that the relationship between the two is still very good, affectionate sisters."

"It's good to have money."

A senior executive showed a ‘I understand’ expression.

"I think so too."

Mellon also smiled.

They have investigated, all the information about the family of the ink girl, the identity background, etc., a blank, can not find any traces, only one name, does not rule out that Huaxia official sent to Chen Mo, all did not choose ink women.

"We know that Zhao Min and Chen Mo are intimate and one of Chen Mo's most trusted people. I don't know what the relationship between the two is. But I know that women like jealousy. This is the weakness of every woman, especially for The person you like.
