We can create an anecdote about Zhao Min and Chen Mo, and let Xiao Yu doubt their relationship, leaving Zhao Min and He Xiaoyu. Chen Mo’s backyard caught fire and the family and the company had problems at both ends.

Once Zhao Min is forced to leave, the management of the marching ant group will be inconsistent. The feelings of Chen Mo and He Xiaoyu will also be cracked. We have a lot of room for operation, thus disintegrating the ranks of the marching ant group and letting them split the marching ants. group.

If Chen Mo and He Xiaoyu are divorced, He Xiaoyu will be able to separate Chen Mo's wealth and the shareholding of the marching ant group, and the shareholding of the marching ant group will also be under control. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 566: :Malone'S Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 566: :Malone'S Plan

Syria has the deterrent of war robots, and countries are quiet because they are afraid of losses.

National military companies, through the wars in Syria, also realized the terrible war robots, and began to develop weapons that can target war robots.

The war in Syria has come to an end, and the struggles between the parties have changed from the beginning of the hot war to the international war of words.

The country is strictly guarded against the Golan Heights.

During the years of war in the Syrian Arab Republic, the economy was bad, the people were not living, and the domestic cities were devastated.

In view of this situation, the Syrian state did not start with the country, but began to sweep away the scattered armed forces in the country and prepare for reconstruction.

The already faltering Syrian country finally got a chance to breathe.

"The leader, already done."

Venter handed the photo in hand and a hard drive to Mellon.

Above the photo, a man and a woman holding hands, wearing a mask and snuggling. From body shape, hair style to eyes, to dressing style, they are similar to Zhao Min and Chen Mo.

Mellon looked through a few times. The next few pictures of the two were on the bed. The side faces were almost exactly the same. Even people who knew them would think it was true.

“Photos and negatives are real, not afraid of identification,” Venter said.

They spent a lot of work on this set of photos.

I found a person who was similar in shape to Chen Mo and Zhao Min. The face was micro-finished, with makeup and easy-to-wear technology, special shooting angles, and finally photo processing technology. Now it seems that the photos are completely Chen Mo and Zhao. Min two people.

The photo is taken in real time, there is no trace of synthesis at all, and it can be completely fake.

This is the first step in their departure from He Xiaoyu and Zhao Min. As long as things are big, there is a crack in the relationship between He Xiaoyu and Zhao Min, and their first step plan is successful.

Chen Mo is also under pressure and is more likely to be defeated.

Once Chen Mo loses his prestige inside the marching ants, he can shake the foundation of the marching ant group and force the marching ant group to split. The next operability will be much higher than the current state of the iron plate.

Strong enemies, external pressure may make them stronger, so they choose to disintegrate from the outside of the enemy, in order to completely destroy the enemy.

"Not bad." Mellon flipped through it and gave a thumbs up.

The development of the marching ant group has helped Huaxia accelerate its rise, allowing the marching ants and Chen Mo to continue to develop, and the world will be left behind by them.

A divided marching ant group, they also have the opportunity to finger dye.

The building of the marching ant collapsed, no matter how bad, Huaxia officially eats meat, they drink some soup, and it is still possible to get some skills and talents.

If they can force Chen to leave China, then their chances are even greater.

The value of Chen Mo is definitely greater than that of the marching ant group.

"In the hard disk, in addition to the film, there are a few pieces of audio, we are based on the sound lines of Chen Mo and Zhao Min." Wente said.

"Slow down, the rest of the movie will do." Mellon handed the photo and hard drive in his hand to the assistant next to him: "Next, follow the plan."

"Ok."

The assistant took the photo and the hard drive and left the office.

......

Binhai City, Phoenix Mountain.

The construction of the Flying Ant Space Center is very fast.

Because the design of the Feifang Aerospace Center is detailed, the construction plan is also calculated by the ink girl through a rigorous calculation, and has a complete construction plan, so the construction speed is very fast.

It can be quickly constructed, mainly because of the flying ant space center, and there are not too tall buildings. The main body of the space center is just a ten-storey building.

The largest building is the hangar of the space center.

The hangar is a single-layer steel structure. The steel is a special high-strength steel with a yield strength of 600 MPa. The entire hangar is supported on 14 pillars. The roof can withstand the weight of 1000 tons of equipment in addition to the general load-bearing capacity. It is 450 × 150 meters, divided into two spans.

This hangar was built to assemble and repair space planes.

In addition to the hangar, the main facilities are the airport and runway of the aerospace plane, as well as some large warehouses and space center research institutes.

Chen Mo did not do research on the rocket, so he did not build a rocket launch tower. The rest of the facilities are the dormitory and entertainment facilities of the staff of the Space Center.

He plans to use robots and intelligent management for the entire flying ant space. Only a small number of labors, as auxiliary personnel, settled in the Fei Ant Space Center.

Technicians must rely on intelligent robots to lead the training, as a talent reserve for the marching ant group.

In addition, there are also a group of security personnel who are artificial, and most of them are secured by robots.

For the convenience of transportation, the space center leads to the direction of the marching ant group headquarters, and also specially digs up three mountains to open up a road wide enough.

Chen Mo is not bad money, paid double the salary, directly let the winning bidder of China Construction Company hire two people to dump, and build the Fei Ant Space Center with the fastest speed.

Money can make a ghost push.

A few months of construction, the 6,000-acre space center is now nearing its end, leaving only some greening and finishing work.

Chen Mo stood on the airport open space in front of the hangar. The top of the head was blue sky and white clouds. The front hangar was full of busy people.

Automated handling model robots in area 1, large automatic 3D printing equipment, CNC precision machine tools, intelligent lifting robots, and various odd-shaped intelligent machine spiders, measuring robots, welding robots, working robots transformed from war robots... ...

These machines and equipment are all machines in the area No. 1, which is the first time exposed to outsiders.

Even the workers who assisted in the handling of these robots felt extremely magical, just like coming to a world of robots.

Ink women use robots to convey various instructions, and the layout of the hangar is carried out in an orderly manner, and the efficiency is much higher than that of ordinary workers.

In addition, there are various kinds of sealed special containers. As for what equipment is installed inside, no one knows. There is also a large aircraft casing wrapped in sealed canvas.

During this period of excitement, Chen Mo's aerospace design has been completed, including large ion engines, and some parts have been manufactured.

Now that the space center is built, it is time to build a space plane.

"If these robots are put into production plants, I am afraid that countless workers will be unemployed." Zhao Min looked at the scene with amazement.

Chen Mo’s horrific research and manufacturing efficiency are related to these robots.

Usually half a month's workload, in front of these robots, can only be completed in a day or two.

This efficiency is not comparable to ordinary labor.

"These devices will not appear in the ordinary factory for the time being," Chen said.

The technology of machine replacement workers has matured. Most of the work, especially the repetitive work, only requires one procedure, and Chen Mo will not put these machines into social production for the time being.

The replacement of labor by a machine is a process that cannot be done overnight.

If there are a large number of unemployed people in the society, it is easy to cause social problems, and the official will not agree.

"These devices will be slowly opened to our company's factories. After adaptation, they will be promoted to ordinary enterprise factories, and the social production efficiency will be greatly improved." Chen Mo said.

"Ion engine propelled aerospace aircraft, you should know, what does the technology contained in this space plane mean?" Zhao Min asked.

Every technology of Chen Mo is far beyond the times.

Especially like this aerospace plane, the technology it contains may not be able to be studied even if it is given to the present people for a hundred years.

This technology exposure will definitely trigger a tsunami in the technology circle.

The spacecraft of the ion engine, at least in the exploration of the solar system, will mature rapidly. After laying the foundation, it will meet the Star Age.

"Some technologies can't be hidden forever. There is always a day of exposure. Now it is gradually exposed. There will be more in the future, and it will be better."

The development of science and technology, the more you reach the back, the less you can hide. Unless he does nothing, there will be a day of exposure.

The layout of the marching ant has been rolled out, the foundation of the company has been consolidated, and the influence of various fields has taken shape. Therefore, Chen Mo began to try to let go of his hands and feet, and development did not have to be too scrupulous as before.

"The researchers and scientists of this era are indeed pitiful. I am afraid that I will live in your shadow for a lifetime." Zhao Min looked up at the busy machines in the hangar.

"I am more fortunate." Chen Mo said.

chapters.title: Chapter 567: :Smear
chapters.body:
Chapter 567: :Smear

"What are you going to study next?"

Zhao Min asked from the car leaving the Feixiang Space Center.

The construction of the Ants Space Center is coming to an end. The parts and materials and equipment of the space plane have been transported to the hangar of the Space Center. It will take some time to assemble the space plane.

With Chen Mo’s uninterrupted personality, when he is free, he will definitely conduct research on other projects.

In addition to the company's business arrangements, Zhao Min's more work is to provide some necessary assistance in the process of Chen Mo's research, such as setting up departments, recruiting those technicians, ordering materials, etc.

Chen Mo's research is too fast, she wants to not drag Chen Mo's hind legs, sometimes it is necessary to prepare in advance.

"The big direction is to land on the moon, build a lunar base, and explore Mars." Chen Mo said.

Now that the technology is slowly maturing, it is certain to explore the universe in the future. It is impossible to shrink to the earth forever. For the universe, the earth is too small.

"If the space plane is built successfully, it will start the moon landing plan. If you want to make money, you can think about the profitable projects of the space plane, and then prepare steel and other materials."

When he heard the money, Zhao Min’s eyes lit up.

"As you can say, you can do too much business."

Space tourism, launching satellites, space station transportation, manned moon landing, etc., Zhao Min can think of projects, can make a lot of money.

Although the marching ants have more money, it is better to let the project have income than to always let it lose money.

So far, the investment in the flying ant space program has reached more than 70 billion, which is something more terrifying than burning money.

"Mergo, there are photos on the Internet that are suspected of you and Zhao Min."

When the two chatted, they were interrupted by the ink girl.

Chen Mo and Zhao Min looked at each other and saw doubts from each other's eyes.

"What photo?"

"This one."

The ink girl took Chen Mo’s mobile phone and opened it. In the light curtain of the holographic projection, there were photos of suspected two people.

After seeing the photo, Chen Mo’s face immediately darkened.

Suspected photos of him and Zhao Min shopping, as well as ‘bed. Photo’.

He and Zhao Min are shopping. Most of the time, he accompanied Xiao Yu and Zhao Min to go out as wallets and coolies.

In the impression, he went out alone with Zhao Min, did not wear this kind of clothes, and did not wear this mask, Zhao Min is the same. Also, he has not touched Zhao Min, and now he and Zhao Min’s ‘bed.

Seeing the slightly larger scale of the 'bed. Zhao', Zhao Min's face immediately turned into an apple, shy and angry, and shivered.

The woman in the photo looks similar to her. The man and Chen Mo are also very similar to the twins. In the case of insufficient light, even those who know them will think that they are.

Completely reached the point of realism.

"Wang Ba Gu, which **** made, Lao Niang killed him?" Zhao Min turned black.

"The famous paparazzi of the entertainment circle, Yan Wei."

Ink girl will release the original microblog, except for the picture, the text is: Who are these two?

Also Aite has some well-known entertainment news media and self-media people.

Just less than 20 seconds after the release, there have been more than a dozen comments on Weibo, and it has been forwarded hundreds.

"Is it my eyes? Is this Chen Mo derailed Zhao Min?"

"A year of big melon, I have saved screenshots and waited to watch the show."

"@行军蚁科技"

"Don't be messed up, don't you die?"

"The beautiful female assistant who rumors Chen lived with him. Now there is another Zhao. The rich people are really good."

"If you are tired, you will get a divorce and change one. Are rich people not playing like this?"

"The derailed scum male is disgusting, knowing that others have a family, and that the younger one is more disgusting."

"..."

Seeing photos and comments, Zhao Min was so angry.

Even if she is strong, she also has emotions. It is impossible to be arrogant and not angry.

"Notify Li Huai, let him take charge of this matter, call public relations, delete these photos. Collect evidence, prepare to sue those rumors. Also, give me the behind-the-scenes personnel to find this."

Chen Mo took the cell phone in the hands of the ink woman and turned it off.

He is in a very bad mood now and has never been as angry as he is today.

In the past, those people attacked him. He could ignore it. Now attack his family. If he ignores it, the outside world really thinks that he is a good gentleman.

Although only half a minute, but the pictures have been circulated, there will certainly be rumors, if you do not find the main person behind, it is definitely endless.

Behind this incident, it is certainly not that simple.

As long as people with a little brain know, sending these photos, for example, to bear his anger, the consequences can be imagined.

With his current influence, he does not believe that a paparazzi in the entertainment circle dares to release these innuendo fake photos and speeches without any confirmation.

There are many possible conjectures in Chen Mo’s mind, and it will be clear when the principals come to the surface.

"Are you OK?"

Chen Mo reached out and shot Zhao Min, and asked comfortably.

"Nothing."

Zhao Min slowed down and took a deep breath. At this moment, his heart was extremely unhappy and he was ignited. For the first time, he was discredited by this despicable means.

“Do you want to take a break?”

"No, if this matter can affect me, then the president of my marching ant does not have to do it." Zhao Min refused Chen Mo's suggestion, although angry, but not yet able to affect her.

As the president of a big company, she has experienced too much pressure. Now, this kind of thing is just anger against the mean means of the other party.

Now is not the time to hide.

Not long after, Wei Wei posted an apology video on Weibo, claiming that she was sleeping, Weibo was stolen, and she was completely unaware of the photos and content. She also showed screenshots of her Weibo’s unusually different landings.

“It’s good to have money, and the speed of whitewashing is faster than others.”

“Who can tell me what happened? I feel like I missed a big melon.”

"Dog tail, I despise you, actually bowed to the capital, hacking this routine, now the ghost does not believe."

"I feel that the dog's tail is not lying. I will release this kind of photo, whether it is true or not, I will definitely be blocked by the entertainment circle. He will not be so stupid. As a rational melon, the content of the previous one, although it is preserved, it is inconvenient to disclose it. Being used by people."

"A person who derails the president of his company, if there is no divorce, I will believe in love."

- "The rumor is that He and Zhao are still girlfriends. Is this being robbed of a man by a girlfriend?"

"I don't know what happened and come here to gather."

Yan Wei posted an apology video that made many people inexplicable.

The last Weibo was only deleted by the ink girl in less than half a minute. There were only a few people who saw the content, and many people did not know what happened. But after the apology video came out, the comments below, some people are just taking a screenshot of the sun.

In the end, Wei Wei’s Weibo had to close the comment to avoid the spread of things.

Things didn't provoke too much turmoil, but things didn't end.

Soon, the WeChat group, the circle of friends, the penguin group, etc. in all walks of life appeared in the photos just now, one pass ten, ten pass hundred, in a short time, the photos have spread in madness.

It is related to Chen Mo and Zhao Min, and the two helmsmen of the highest power of the marching ant group have also increased their attention.

With the increase of the number of speakers, under the deliberate guidance of some people, it is not a surprise to be on the hot search, becoming a hot topic. Even if Chen Mo wants to let the ink girl control the spread, she has to give up in the face of this crazy spread.

The public relations team of the marching ant group did not dare to let the major platforms withdraw their search. Now things are going to spread, and there must be someone deliberately making things big.

When they let people withdraw their heat, they will be attacked by the people behind them to become guilty conscience. Once they are demolished, they will be arguing.

In the first time, the public relations team of the marching ant group issued an announcement on the official Weibo and official website.

The suspected photos circulating on the Internet are not Chen Mo and Zhao Min. They have already reported to the police to warn the media and individuals not to make a fuss. The team of lawyers of the marching ant group is following up. If the rumors are found, they will directly inform the police. The consequence is the face of detention and prosecution compensation.

chapters.title: Chapter 568: : Add A Fire
chapters.body:
Chapter 568: : Add A Fire

at night.

Chen Mo sat on the sofa, and Xiao Yu leaned in his arms, watching the movie quietly.

The ink girl also changed her pajamas and sat on the sofa. The little unparalleled between Chen Mo and the ink girl, she was concentrating on the building blocks with the ink girl, and the small robot toy that Chen Mo specially made for the little girl.

"Do you have a heart? Is it because of the Internet?" asked Xiao Yu.

"Well, I am thinking about how to explain to you?" Chen Mo gently stroked her little belly.

Xiao Yu took his hand on Chen Mo's hand and shook his head.

"No, those photos are fake at first glance. Your body I look at every day and I can recognize them at a glance. You don't look strong, but take off your clothes and the muscle lines are perfect. The photos of the men, although the light is dim, but I can see that the body is too weak. Wearing clothes may be more like you, but **** reveals the stuff. My husband, I can still recognize it.

Zhao Minjie has a nail-sized red calf birthmark here, and the photo of the woman does not. In the eyes of outsiders, it is both of you, but I can recognize it at a glance, it is not you, nor Zhao Min sister. ”

The small fishing point points to the position of his left chest to the day.

"How do you know that Zhao Min has a red birthmark?"

"Is it strange? I have seen it with Zhao Minjie when I tried clothes, hot springs, and swimming. Have you seen it before?" Xiao Yu looked up and smiled at Chen Mo.

"..."

Chen Mo touched his nose. The last time Zhao Min was infected with the virus, he saw it when Zhao Min checked his body, and Zhao Min sometimes came to the villa and Xiao Yu to swim. He also saw him wearing a swimsuit.

"I read the comments below the news and found that many comments are provoking my relationship with Zhao Minjie. I feel that someone is deliberately guiding." Xiaoyu did not choose to stay on the topic just now, faintly said.

"It's very smart, not stupid." Chen Mo licked Xiao Xiaoyu's little belly.

"I am not stupid, just marry you, compared with outsiders, it seems that I am stupid."

Xiao Yu enjoys Chen Mo’s caress.

"I feel that this is for you, or for the company. I am with Zhao Min, who is very important to you, a family care company, a management company. If I and Zhao Minjie are in a stalemate, you will be on fire in the backyard.

I got into trouble, and Zhao Min sister tore her face and forced her to leave the company. The company was heart-wrenching. Or we are divorced, this home is gone. Either way, the most painful thing is you. ”

Chen Mo’s heart is warm.

When this happens, as long as Xiao Yu is a little suspicious, he will be very embarrassed now.

Xiao Yu’s unconditional trust in him will be so calm.

He knows that the woman lying in his arms, Lanxin enamel, many things are clearer than anyone else, but this silly woman is very sensible, which is why he has always been so fond of her.

The outsiders thought that the small fisherman was a vase, and only Chen Mo knew that she had to bear a lot of silence.

With her at home, he was able to rest assured that he was fully committed to his work.

Gently gathered the little fish's hair, Chen Mo kissed her lips.

"Unparalleled look." Xiao Yu hurriedly pushed Chen Mo, sweet and shy, and felt Chen Mo's favor, very happy.

"Oh my mother, I have to kiss."

Xiao Wushuang glared at the exquisite eyes, the spoiled voice, and both of them laughed.

"Well, let the ink girl give you kiss, then Mom and Dad give you kiss." Xiao Yu touched the unparalleled head and smiled.

The little girl kissed each other and then happily played with the toys in her hand.

"This matter, you can rest assured to deal with it, don't worry about what I will do, don't worry about the family. I will explain to them at home elders. You don't have to deliberately avoid being alienated from Zhao Min, or someone planning this. I have to get what I want," said Xiao Yu.

"Oh, I see."

Chen Mo’s hand holding Xiao Yu’s hand tightened tightly. The two men looked at each other and smiled. They had a tacit understanding of each other. They did not pay attention to each other and kissed him on Xiaoyu’s face.

With these words of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo also lost those messy troubles, hugged Xiaoyu, and stopped the little unparalleled playing with toys: "Unparalleled, my mother and I play tickling games, do you want to play?"

"Yes, yeah." The little unparalleled immediately threw away the toy in his hand and rushed over to the little fisherman.

"Ink girl is also coming."

"Unparalleled, don't touch there, hahaha... husband hahaha... forgiveness..."

The hall was raging, the laughter continued, and the night outside was getting deeper.

The ‘**’ incident about Chen Mo and Zhao Min has become more and more troublesome on the Internet. It is related to the two most legendary figures in China. This topic is born with its own attributes that attract attention.

In just a few days, all kinds of Chuanqi emerged endlessly.

Yan Wei is threatened with death!

Yan Wei was blocked by the entertainment circle and various platforms.

Then, there was news that Zhao Min and Xiao Yu were not in harmony.

Then came the news of Chen Mo’s divorce.

"I heard that Chen Mo is going to divorce, and the marching ant group is now in a mess."

“My friend who works in the army ant group said that their boss and boss wife are arguing about the property division of the divorce agreement. I heard that they are married without a pre-marital property agreement. This divorce, He Xiaoyu can be assigned to the marching ant group 25%. The shares and more than 200 billion in cash, this will be the most expensive divorce case in history."

"This is the advantage of marrying into the giants. No wonder so many women want to marry into the giants every day. Once divorced, they can get the wealth that others can't get for ten lifetimes."

"The version I heard was that He Xiaoyu forced Zhao Min to leave the marching ant group. Now the insiders of the marching ant group are scattered, and He Xiaoyu is preparing to enter the army marching ant group to take over the position of Zhao Min."

"..."

From the media, some entertainment platforms, media companies have come to the heat in order to earn eyeballs and traffic, all kinds of rumors have a clear eye, the marching ant group is uncharacteristic, there is no voice, and even rumors are not.

The silent attitude of the marching ant group also allowed some network water forces to start attacking the marching ant group as a guilty conscience.

The CIA headquarters, the meeting room of the Washington Hand Group.

Headed by Mellon, other team members are sitting in it.

In the conference room, you can't bring a mobile phone or a network. There is only one computer and projector that is disconnected from the network.

They are doing top secret work, and some things are safer and more secure in a traditional way than the current emerging methods.

Regarding Chen Mo's news trend, they are guiding, and the Internet is the easiest place to move. Even if Chinese people find clues, it is difficult to catch people, and there is no evidence to expose them.

In the heart of the Huaxia network spray, they only need to be responsible for guiding and exposing some things. Other things, the network sprayer will help them to make big troubles, even without them.

"Would you like to add another fire?" A detective spoke.

"I think it's okay to add a fire to a company. It's a little straighter. The Chinese sprays are so good to use, give them a match, they can burn a forest." The detective next to him smiled.

It is their favorite thing to control people's minds on the Internet. When they see the netizens, the media platform follows their rhythm, and they are very fulfilled.

Other agents also nodded.

Now they are dealing with a company, not a national organization, and do not need complicated procedures.

"Now is Chen Mo's wife and him bothering? Or is Zhao Min leaving the company? What is the core effect of our plan?"

Other agents have a glimpse of each other.

Since the rumors, Chen Mo and Zhao Min have not made public appearances yet, but the public relations department of the marching ant group issued some innocuous statements.

The media rumors that Chen Mo divorced, it is only a rumor.

Up to now, their CIA people have no news about Chen Mo. Chen Mo, He Xiaoyu, and Zhao Min have not made public appearances. They even have no basis for judgment.

Most of the agents who entered the coastal city were missing, and their intelligence personnel in Binhai City were few and far between.

Moreover, the internal ranks of the marching ant group do not have their intelligence personnel.

The hand of Washington can smash the giants of the Soviet Union, mainly because the spies can reach the core of the Soviet Union and use their internal contradictions and dilemmas to disintegrate the Soviet Union and fall apart.

Planning the split of other countries uses the same means.

Now facing the marching ant group, this is a company, the top is a piece of iron, and there is no big contradiction and dilemma.

Their spy crew bought a person inside the army ant, and that person would be fired soon after. And the agents who entered the coastal city will always be inexplicably missing.

So now in the marching ant group, they have no eyeliner.

It is even more impossible to monitor the upper floors of marching ants by telephone.

The safety factor of the marching ant group network is the highest in the world. If they are given a few years, they may not be able to crack. Even if they are enemies, they have to admit it.

Through means, they hope to create internal contradictions in the marching ant group.

Now their plans are implemented, but they have encountered difficulties.

I thought that Chen Mo or Zhao Min, or He Xiaoyu, came out to blame, based on their state, expression, psychology, behavior can analyze their effects.

As a result, the three people at the core of the plan collectively disappeared into the public eye.

The rumors outside were all over the sky, and there was no clarification.

Now they plan what effect they will take, and they don’t know it for the time being. So their current plans seem to be very successful, but they are not clear about the specific effects.

"That's a little more strength." Seeing everyone didn't speak, McLean finalized.

Hit the iron and heat.

Three days later, a message came out. Because of the pressure of the exposure, the Yu Wei, who was traveling in Thailand, drowned while swimming in the sea.

chapters.title: Chapter 569: : Mutual Damage
chapters.body:
Chapter 569: : Mutual Damage

The death of Wei Wei has aroused an uproar in the world.

Whether it is domestic or foreign, almost all media consistently point the finger at Chen Mo, a marching ant group.

Five days later, with the attention of the global media, the police announced the results of the investigation: preliminary investigation, Huaxia citizen Yu Wei died in accidental drowning, and temporarily did not find any related to homicide.

At this time, Wei Wei’s abnormal death is undoubtedly a great imagination for conspiracy theorists. Things are definitely not as simple as outsiders think.

"I was just threatened by death, now I am completely dead, I am dying unexpectedly? Who believes? It is ok to make a movie. Now in this society, it is too simple for a professional killer to kill a person without leaving traces."

"If this thing has nothing to do with the marching ants, I don't believe in killing me. If I have money, I can really do whatever I want, even the police can't investigate."

"A person's scandal has been smashed, and the image of the perfect avatar collapses. It instantly becomes a scum male, a cloaked beast, and now Wei Wei is being retaliated. Isn't it normal?"

"Chen Mo should be arrested for investigation."

"The law is to protect the rich, wake up, comrades."

"This world is very dangerous."

"I feel that things are not that simple, the second melon is very sweet. This story tells us that the words really can't be said."

All kinds of conspiracy theories are flying all over the world. Even if the marching ants group rumors, they still encounter the overwhelming shackles from all over the world, especially in China.

However, the marching ant group is uncharacteristic and does not have too strong public relations.

Under the influence of some hateful psychology, speech from all angles is almost handy.

In addition to ridicule on the Internet, some people even ridicule in reality.

Employees who work in the marching ant company are ridiculed in their circle of friends during this time, or are ridiculed by either explicit or implicit.

Coupled with the reporter's containment interview, the employees of the marching ant group were pressured.

A few employees, even unable to stand this environment, resigned and left.

"President, do you really need a public relations statement? If you go on like this, I am afraid that people outside will push things to us." Li Huai was worried.

Yan Wei died, they have the biggest suspicion.

But things are too simple, and Wei Wei is dead, and there is no benefit to them at all.

Some people with a logical mind will think that this is a conspiracy.

But netizens, many of these creatures don't have to think about their brains, follow the trend, and add some unsatisfied hatred of life, they naturally become targets of catharsis.

In today's situation, many spearheads point to them. The Internet is completely discrediting their remarks. If they continue, their corporate image will be destroyed.

"No, now I will clarify and say that everything is wrong. Even if it is good, some people will think wrong. Many people have already become the first priority, and they are not awake. You can contact a lawyer and prepare to go to court." Zhao Min said. .

No one can cure those who are on the Internet. They don't mind using this opportunity to let them know what life is.

"Is it really necessary to sue those people?" Li Huai said.

"I always have to be responsible for my own mouth, and let them become unscrupulous again and again. Many people have had a mouthful of addiction on the Internet, and they have forgotten afterwards, thinking that the Internet is a place of extra-legal, we help them well. Memories," said Zhao Min.

"There are nearly a thousand people, distributed throughout the country. The cost of asking a lawyer is quite a lot, and it is very troublesome."

"At any cost, you can afford to pay more legal fees. If you don't do anything because of trouble, they will only be more mad, this time and forever."

Zhao Min’s voice is cold.

Not long after the establishment of the marching ant company, cyber violence continued until now.

They always look at the indifferent mentality. As long as the company has technology, it doesn't matter how the outsiders are black.

So they are tolerant again and again.

But she was angry this time.

The photo has been suffocating, and now the network water army has come to challenge her patience, and now the fermentation has touched their bottom line.

In order to prepare for the prosecution, Zhao Min asked the ink girl to collect the information of the rumors through the network and hand it over to the legal team.

At the same time, in the police filing, but also for the major online platforms, the media platform has the personal identity information of the water army who have made rumors, rumors, and personal attacks.

Those who participated in the rumors and rumors, the sly people, the serious nearly a thousand people, and the countless rubbing of the edges, are shocking.

It is necessary to kill these chickens and let the monkeys see the end of the mouth.

When the storm is over, they will settle accounts after the fall.

Phoenix Mountain, the Fei Ant Space Center, Chen Mo is here to pay attention to the manufacturing progress of the space plane.

During this period of time, the overwhelming news outside, the rumors of the sky, Chen Mo did not show up, has been in the research institute of the space center that has just been fully put into use.

The headquarters of the company was blocked by various reporters, and he was not convenient.

From the exposure of the ** incident, to various rumors, to the death of today's Yan Wei, he has remained silent, does not mean that he did nothing.

If it wasn't for the small fisherman who could distinguish the true and false of those photos, it would really make the people behind the plan achieve their goals. Now he must have a lot of troubles.

After the photo appeared, he asked the ink maid to use cyberspace, the global communication system, to monitor people who might be involved in the incident, especially those who were hostile to him.

Living in this era, unless it is primitive, will involve more or less communication and networking.

Close observation of these days, the ink girl still found some clues.

"Mergo, it has been confirmed, it is done by the CIA."

"It’s the same group of people, the ghost is not scattered."

Chen Momei's heart is screwed together, although the clues in hand are grasped, and those things are not sufficient as evidence.

However, knowing who is behind the scenes is enough.

Since the rise of self-propelled ants, the CIA has been playing his ideas, but he is not good at blatantly removing the other side, only passive again and again, see the move.

The last time he broke the CIA, the other party did not know what he was doing. Now he has slowed down and came to him for trouble.

"Do you know who is responsible for the high-level plan for me?" Chen Mo asked.

"This is called Mellon. From this time, the ink girl found that some network agents are suggesting to guide public opinion. Combine their communication information, electronic device information.

Before the death of Wei Wei and after death, the CIA agents in Thailand contacted the CIA headquarters through the secret channel of satellite communications. It is determined by the CIA. Finally, combined with the analysis of the information he has, he is most likely to be the person responsible for the plan. ”

The ink girl projected the information of Mellon onto the screen, which is some basic information, home address, age birthday, spouse children and the like. The subsequent information is all kinds of forged identity information.

As a senior agent, it has been normal to use some fake identities. Others have no special things and do not know what secret events the other party is involved in.

The last time I pretended to be a clown organization to steal some spy materials, all the secret information of the other party is now stored in a separate server. The ordinary office computer has limited useful information.

"Where is he now?"

"At Langley." The ink girl immediately released the satellite map.

"Always stare at him."

Chen Mo thought about it and it didn't feel enough.

"Since they don't want me to be better, I will give them a big gift and hurt each other."

chapters.title: Chapter 570: : Is This The First Time?
chapters.body:
Chapter 570: : Is This The First Time?

The CIA Cyber Security Office, wearing a navy blue shirt and Dennis, who has some scum, sits in the office.

Since the last two clown organizations invaded the CIA, they realized that cyber security is more serious.

Smart firewalls are imperative.

After getting the source code of the clown virus from the island country, the national cyber security department organized a training camp to draw the elites of the national cyber security department, artificial intelligence researchers, and enter the inside to develop smart firewalls.

A few years of school, there are no small achievements, at least now the CIA's fire circle, is already a smart firewall, and the security is greatly improved.

After drinking a cup of coffee, Dennis sat in the position and checked the CIA network from time to time.

Suddenly, the computer's screen began to jump.

"Alert, the server was compromised."

The alarm sound of the intelligent system of the firewall makes some idle things in the office, and the agents who are snoring are instantly awake and have no sleep.

"Damn, why is this?"

Dennis saw the alarm being hacked and his face was dull.

Invading their servers requires a multi-layered firewall. As soon as they are attacked, an alarm will sound, but now the other party has intruded and an alarm occurs.

He has to suspect that the attackers may use system vulnerabilities to get through their smart firewall systems.

The next second, when the computer screen was blacked out, Dennis opened his mouth and was thundered.

......

“What reaction did the marching ant group respond to?” After listening to the report of his detectives, McLean began to think.

Holm, who is in charge of intelligence, is also in a good mood.

"We asked reporters to pay attention to the reaction of the marching ant group in Binhai, but the marching ant group did not react much to the present, but the public relations department rumored that nothing was said, and the top officials did not show up.

Our intelligence personnel learned that their legal department is contacting lawyers in various cities in China and employing more than 80 law firms. The recruitment of lawyers on such a large scale is intended to prosecute those netizens who are rumored to be rumored. ”

"You can't find the Lord, you can only take those small shrimps to open the knife, and the marching ant group seems to be so good." Another agent smiled.

Speaking of this, all the agents in the conference room had a little more smile on their faces.

They control the direction of the whole thing. Now the reputation of the marching ant group is damaged, the outside is subject to cyber violence, and the insiders are worried.

The core of the marching ant group is now the last straw.

Once Chen Mo, Zhao Min and He Xiaoyu have differences, the marching ant group will face the danger of division.

Chen Mo and He Xiaoyu are divorced, and part of the equity of the marching ant group may fall by; or Zhao Min leaves the company, and the high-level people are not satisfied, they are also available.

As long as you want to buy a high-level army ant group, or control Chen Mo, the technology of the marching ant group may fall into their pockets. Even if it is not much, you can get a part of it.

The existence of the marching ant group is always a threat to their country.

"The marching ant group must split, or Chen Mo left China." Mai Long flashed a firm look: "This is very important for our country. The marching ant group leads the entire Chinese technology to take off, the threat is too great, no matter what method They have to split, or those technologies are in our hands."

Everyone breathes and waits for the following.

"We can't determine the status of Chen Mo, Zhao Min and He Xiaoyu now, but there is another way to force Chen to leave China. Chen Mo is the true foundation of the marching ant group."

"Is there any way to let the Huaxia official and the marching ant group fall out? As long as the two sides fall out, Chen Mo is struggling in China, he has to leave."

"I am afraid it is very difficult. According to the news we have learned, Huaxia officially maintains the marching ant group."

"That makes people look for opportunities to hand over that recording to the official Chinese."

Mellon sneered.

Hey! ! !

When Mr. McLean finished speaking, there was a rapid knock on the door outside the meeting room.

A female detective walked into the conference room quickly, and her face was not very good-looking: "The computers in the conference room are not connected to the Internet. The computers at the entire headquarters have all been destroyed by hackers?"

hiss……

Agents in the entire conference room looked awkward.

"This is the first few times? Is this the first time? Is this the first time? You said." Linna looked black like a pot that had not been washed for decades, almost oozing ink, every word It’s coming out.

“Is the network at our headquarters managed by you into a hotel? Anyone else will come in and out?”

The server is hacked and hacked.

This time it was not stealing information, but the computers connected to the entire headquarters building, all burned down.

This is the third time she has been hacked since she took office.

"What use is it for you? Are you not a top player? Isn't it a top cyber security officer? Your top is being stepped on your face again and again? Our faces are almost destroyed by you, you want me. How? What? How about it? After two days, it’s better to be hacked again? Let’s make it a hacker’s playground or a **** list?”

Linna pulled the mouse out of her hand and squatted on the floor.

If she does not vent, she will be mad to the brain.

In the cyber security office, everyone buried their heads in their chests, and they were ashamed and shy.

"Secretary." Linna's assistant came over and carefully opened her mouth.

"What?? Said." Linna's anger has not dissipated, and the people on the field are all shaking with fear.

"The Washington personnel came to the news that the Pentagon was also attacked, and their networked computers were also ruined by viruses." The assistant swallowed a swallow.

The detectives on the field were cold and sweaty.

Oh...

When the air is quiet, all the lights in the building will be extinguished, and the backup power will be automatically activated before the power is restored.

"What is going on here?" Linna's voice was weak, and since she sat in this position, she was not doing anything. At this time, there was already a feeling of powerlessness.

It was not long before a staff member heard the news.

Langley's power supply system was hacked.

Linna’s eyes were black and she took a deep breath and almost passed out: “Give me, at any cost, find out the **** murderer. I have to peel off his skin and smoke his ribs.”

Linna is like a tigress who wants to eat.

The CIA and the Pentagon, the two most powerful institutions in their country, have all suffered from computers. The newly developed smart firewall, in front of the mysterious hacker, is as fragile as paper.

This kind of hacking technology can completely disturb the order of a country and make people shudder.

After the last clown event, all their secret information, no matter what level, was saved to a separate server. This time the computer was destroyed. Although there is no important information, all the common file data is lost, which is enough for them to spend. A lot of energy to rearrange.

This kind of invasion is to hit their faces, and they are hitting them.

There used to be clues about clowns, and there wasn’t even a useful clue.

"All the members sealed the confidentiality. This incident was declared to be caused by a machine failure. The computer was worn out. It was necessary to update and replace it with a new computer."

"Secretary, there is a phone call in Washington."

The assistant ran over to let Lina look even worse.

"Let me find it now."

When I got back to the office and saw the phone on the desk, I took a deep breath and picked it up. Just now she was jealous of others, and now she is ready to be shackled.

"Mr President."

"Waste, the whole CIA is so useless? Have you ever done a satisfactory thing since you took the position? You are not enough to lose your face? This is the first time? How many times? Yourself? Say. If you are incompetent, just tell me, don't keep nails on the shame column. No matter what method you use, find the hacker."

Damn it.

Linna dared not to speak, and her face immediately became dark, but these words can only be swallowed in the belly.

If she resigns now, she really becomes the most shameful director of the CIA. She is proud of her, and this is absolutely not allowed. After a while, the term of office will end, and the presidential election will be held. The old and the new will alternate. After this period of time, you can be decent.

It’s just that they don’t know that the current action is just a bit of interest from Chen Mo, and the revenge from Chen Mo is not over yet.

chapters.title: Chapter 571: : The Opportunity Is Coming
chapters.body:
Chapter 571: : The Opportunity Is Coming

The two departments of the CIA headquarters in Langley and the Pentagon were attacked. Despite the password, the news leaked out.

Fortunately, because of the actions of the marching ant group, attracting most of the attention, coupled with their desalination, caused little public opinion.

Meeting room of the CIA.

In order to find clues to this hacking attack, members of the CIA (Network Intelligence Center) and Cog (Computer Network Action Group), as well as members of the Cyber Security Office, are all concentrated in the conference room.

“I didn’t find any useful clues, the other’s means were very high, as if they were ghosts.”

Dennis’s confidence felt like an unprecedented blow.

He has also been involved in a series of network denial of service attacks, shutting down thousands of Internet sites, and even planning unauthorized access to the US Air Force and US Army computer systems.

He was caught by the CIA and he chose to join the CIA.

He thinks he is a computer expert at the **** level, but in front of this mysterious hacker, he feels like a baby.

Their computer firewall monitoring has no effect.

The other party is more like a downsizing against them.

"We haven't found it here either." Morrison was somewhat reluctant to say: "The world's top hackers, we can investigate all the investigations. Even invited a few white-headed hackers to help, still did not find."

This feeling, like his first tracking of the clown organization, feels very weak.

The world's top hacker gods, including the rising stars that emerged after the rise of smart viruses in recent years, they all know, even in their CIA information, they have their complete information.

But in their impression, no one's strength makes him feel powerless.

The conference room was quiet.

"Is it possible that some of the network company's team is doing it? Or is it the enemy's hacker army?"

All the senior officials of the CIA are in the conference room, and Milon is also present.

It's about their faces. If they don't find the hacker, they can be attacked for the third time, for the seventh time, even the eleventh. Endless, when they all have no face to see people.

As a senior agent, perhaps he does not understand the technology of network security, but more or less can provide some analysis and suggestions for solving crimes.

"The other party doesn't have to be a hacker. Think about it. In addition to hackers, what other top teams and national hackers in the world can bypass the monitoring of our smart firewall?"

"Russia and China." Morrison blurted out.

The eyes of the people brightened and the focus gathered on him.

"I can think of these two countries. Russia does not need to say, everyone knows. Huaxia has been the world's leading programming technology since Chen Mo's Chinese programming language has rewritten some basic rules of programming. China's hackers are our only ones. A group of people who don’t understand. The Red Army Corps of China and the China Alliance are all possible."

"I don't think it's the Red Army Legion. After the Clown Virus, the Smart Virus has become an important research object of the network security team in various countries. On the Internet, the silent network war has been going on, and the strength of both sides has the bottom.

Their smart viruses may be able to invade the average company, but they can't bypass the intelligent firewall monitoring at our headquarters and invade our network like a ghost. ”

"Who is that? Russian?"

“If there is a possibility of invading us like a ghost, there should be a top team.”

Dennis suddenly spoke and everyone immediately looked at him.

“The fire ant laboratory of the marching ant group.”

Fire Ant Lab?

The name surprised the people on the field and they were very strange to the name.

“The fire ant laboratory is the intelligent network security laboratory under the artificial intelligence laboratory of the marching ant group. This laboratory is called the fire ant laboratory by the hacker circle. The goal of their laboratory is to attack the marching ant group at any cost. Intelligent network shield and firewall.

In the hacker circle, if they find a loophole in the company's intelligent network shield and firewall, a security hole, reward the team 10 million, find 10 loopholes, reward 100 million, no limit.

The Fire Ants Laboratory was used as a sharpening stone for the Shields and Firewalls of the Army Ant Company. They have been very low-key and the team members have not participated in the Global Hacker Technology Competition, but no one dares to underestimate their strength. ”

Some things Dennis will hear about.

The technical team of the marching ant group research institute is the top of the world, but it has been overshadowed by Chen Moqiang's reputation. Other teams are mediocre under the light of Chen Mo.

If you can bypass the monitoring of their smart firewalls like ghosts, what he can think of is the marching ant group that leads the world.

"But they seem to have no reason to attack us, so it doesn't do anything good for them," Dennis added.

The meeting room was completely quiet.

Linna didn't talk from beginning to end. After listening to Dennis's guess, she was thinking.

reason?

If the marching ant group knows that the troubles are now guided by them, there are 10,000 reasons to attack them.

"Dennis, Morrison, you write a report and hand it over, claiming that it is a Chinese hacker." Linna made a final conclusion.

Now all the remarks are speculations. They can't find people, and there is no evidence, but it doesn't matter. Give them an account outside.

"The meeting, Mai Long, come to my office." Linna took the lead to leave.

There is no clue, and it is also awkward to go on.

Just entering the office, Linna took a sip of water on the table, put the documents in order, and turned and sat down.

"The day after tomorrow, you and I will go to Washington to take your plan to deal with the marching ant group, and then, together with the report of the Cyber Security Office, give the president a look."

"acquired?"

"has a problem?"

"Tuesday is my wife's birthday, can't be postponed?"

"No, you still talk to your wife. This is more important. Come back to romance. In any case, the marching ant group is a threat. Since there is a basis for inference, is it not an army ant group? Is there any evidence? It doesn't matter. Anyway, there is no one to replace the ghost. We have to deal with him. We will push this incident to them and we can get more support."

They did not know that this time they were prepared to blame, they were the Lord, and Chen Mo, the Lord, was also watching them.

"Mergo, Mellon is going to Washington the day after tomorrow."

"Well?" Chen Mo in the study, scornfully, looked up at the ink girl: "Is the message accurate?"

"He and his wife had a phone call and said that they would go to Washington for a business trip. They couldn't go back to spend her birthday and come back to her."

"Who is going with him?"

"The entourage is unknown, he did not say."

“How far is it from Washington to Langley? How long does it take?”

When Chen Mo’s words fell, a map of holographic projections appeared.

“Richmond to Dulles, the direct flight is about 55 minutes, the light aircraft takes 48 minutes, if it is a transfer, it takes at least three and a half hours. It takes about three hours to drive. According to their habit of traveling, the probability of choosing the direct plane is the highest. ""

"One hour, enough."

An hour is enough for him to do a lot of things, Chen Mo is only thinking a little.

"Determine their route, if it is an airplane, tell me."

These days, he has been let the ink girl monitor the situation of Mellon, including his loved ones, friends, the purpose is to determine his status.

A group of thieves who have been thinking about him, how can he feel at ease?

Regarding his various smearing remarks, if he does not know the truth, I am afraid that people will be angry. If you want to completely end this farce, you must eradicate it from the source, otherwise it will continue to endlessly.

Mellon is one of the sources.

Now the opportunity is coming.

chapters.title: Chapter 572: :Set Off
chapters.body:
Chapter 572: :Set Off

No one knows, a storm is brewing.

The rumors about Chen Mo and Zhao Min are getting more and more fierce. On the Internet, there are successive recordings of Chen Moe’s murder and murder, and soon after, Chen Mo’s privately sold advanced technology to foreign recordings, followed by similar remarks. spread.

Murdering Wei Wei.

Selling country.

Two huge hats were tied together on Chen Mo’s head, igniting the climax of public opinion.

"There is no such evidence, the police did not dare to catch, huh, oh, it is good to have money!"

"He is now preparing for immigration. Maybe he has already taken the passport of a certain country privately. Rich people like to run out. Whoever calls foreign air is sweet."

"Oh, the law really is to protect the rich."

"The state supports him to run such a large company, and then immigration, transfer of property, this white-eyed wolf, it is recommended to confiscate all his property and technology."

"Selling the country, murder, such people are not arrested and jailed. Can rich people live above the law?"

"..."

The sound of cymbals on the Internet is even more crazy.

Numerous people are clamoring to catch Chen Mo. However, the police just don’t rush to reply to a case that is under investigation. There is no such thing as it seems. The official is not anxious.

This reaction by the police has made countless netizens even more angry.

It can only anger the darkness of the world on the Internet.

The marching ant group is just a simple rumor statement of the public relations department. Others still have nothing to say, and they are silently silent.

The official media also kept silent and did not comment.

Chen Mo, still in the laboratory of the Space Center, is concerned about the manufacturing progress of the space plane.

“What is the paradox now?”

Chen Mo put down the gadget in his hand and looked at Zhao Min’s holographic projection.

"It’s not high, it’s a new remark, and it’s a provocative statement. It’s an argument that you don’t give the company’s shares to the following technicians and executives. The company is yours. It’s trying to provoke the high-level interior. Balance, reduce their enthusiasm." Zhao Min said.

The rumors outside are overwhelming, and the internals of the marching ants are also out of the public because of the public relations department.

“What reaction does the company employee have?”

"Response? There are a few employees and middle management who tried to provoke this topic. I have let them go, no exception. The big waves, this incident, is another dishwashing. I am not loyal to the company, I don't believe the company. The employees who stayed and did not cultivate the value."

Zhao Min’s answer was straightforward.

“I sent an internal letter, the company’s senior management and technical team. Although there are no nominal shares, at the end of each year, they will give corresponding dividends and bonuses according to their level. The technical team’s research technology has a breakthrough and there will be additional The bonuses that should be given to them, one point will not be less.

Our company is the world's best welfare technology company, hire them to give them such good benefits, work, not let them tell me the conditions. The company's most advanced technology, all from your lab, no one but you are eligible to talk about equity. ”

"You have to work hard for two days. This storm, when it is almost at the end, there will be a good show tonight." Chen Mo said.

"What a good show? Do you know that behind the scenes?"

"You will know the news tomorrow."

"I still sell off with me?" Zhao Min was not happy, but did not ask.

Chen Mo did not stop on the topic of behind-the-scenes black hands. Some things, it is not good to say it, and it will be fine if you finish it.

"There is time to see the unparalleled, you have not passed this time, and the girl often reads Min Min and does not come to see her."

"That little girl is talking about the candy I gave her."

Zhao Min heard the unparalleled chanting of her, and said so in her mouth, she was very happy.

"What are you studying now?"

"Make a few satellites."

Chen Mo pointed to the satellite projection design on the holographic table.

The manufacture of the aerospace plane is completed soon. After the success, it is sure to go to heaven. At that time, several satellites belonging to the marching ant group will be put on the scene.

The future development is definitely an endless universe. Jumping out of the earth is just the beginning.

"The space plane is about to be completed. When the flight is successfully tested, the satellite will be put into orbit and ready to explore space in the future."

"The man's dream is the sea of stars, right." Zhao Min smiled.

In the institute, Zhao Min’s holographic figure disappeared and he returned to silence. Only the ink girl was around, and there were various intelligent robots in the institute.

At nine o'clock that night.

In the villa, Chen Mo is ready to go, and walks with the library of the ink girl in the villa. Xiao Yu also inks the woman to watch TV and follow Chen Mo.

In these two days, Chen Mo has been paying attention to the actions of Mellon.

Myron’s flight to Washington is taking off at 12:10 local time today. It is expected to arrive at 13:08. The whole journey is 58 minutes. The time for Huaxia is 0:10 tomorrow.

Entering the library, a bookcase on the wall opens automatically, revealing a bright passage.

Soon, the three went to the underground lab of the villa.

The style of the lab is completely different from that of a library that is separated by a wall.

The decoration of the library is a touch of humanity in the retro, and the style of this laboratory is a minimalist future technology.

No extra decoration, machines, intelligence, machine test benches, holographic test benches, small superconducting supercomputers, all kinds of advanced technical equipment and machinery are the most noble decoration of this laboratory.

The machine test bench is facing a lot of parts, some messy, other places are very clean and well organized.

In the window of the laboratory wall, quietly stood a row of armor.

Under the light, the metal armor shines on the armor.

Four sets of armor, Chen Mo two sets, one of which is used as a spare, all black is the main tone, mixed with dark red, looks very mysterious.

The ink armor of the ink girl is dominated by dark purple, and the dark space is black for the secondary paint. The highlights are like stars, which look tall, noble and mysterious.

In addition to the armor of the two, there is also a small fishing armor.

With milky white as the main tone, it is mixed with pale gold paint, and Chen Mo's armor is white, black, painted, style and texture. It is completely a couple.

A small fishing set, just ready to use from time to time, in addition to just playing familiar with the armor, usually rarely caught in small fishing.

At this time, Xiao Yu did not have the heart to appreciate the armor, and there was a lingering worry in the eyebrows.

Xiao Yu knows that Chen Mo is going out to do something tonight. He intuitively told her that this incident may be dangerous, but Chen Mo did not tell her that she was not smart enough to ask.

"You have to be careful."

"Yes, you can rest assured." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yan some cold hands.

"Can you come back tonight? I will wait for you to come back."

"It will take about 4 o'clock in the morning to get back. You can go to bed early and get up tomorrow morning. You can see me." Chen Mo could feel the worry of Xiao Yu and gently hugged her.

"Good." Feeling Chen Mo's body temperature, Xiao Yu's peace of mind.

"Ink girl stays with you at home, don't worry, it's not a big deal." Chen Mofu stroked Xiao Yu's back and smiled: "Tomorrow morning, I want to eat fish, you have to prepare for tonight."

"Bad bad."

Chen Mo was teased, Xiao Yu was ashamed and annoyed, and his heart's worries disappeared.

"Get back early, think about it all according to you."

"Really, how can I do it? That Qiren... oh... it hurts, I am wrong, I am wrong." Chen Mo’s painful grin, waiting for Xiao Yu to let go, only to lick the soft meat of the waist Hey: "I found that you are a crab, the skills in the sky, so painful."

"I am not allowed to enter the room in the early hours of the morning."

Xiao Yu glanced at him angrily and screamed.

Seeing Xiaoyu’s fears disappeared, Chen Mo smiled and walked toward the lifting platform.

In the window, Chen Mo's armor moved out, with the help of the robot, quickly untied, one by one covered Chen Mo, until the last head is also covered under the armor.

"Get to bed early, I will be back soon."

As the lift rises and the ceiling opens, the armor of Chen Mo and the ink girl has started, slowly rising, and finally rushing up.

"Ink girl, what did the husband do this time?" Until the armor of Chen Mo and the ink girl disappeared into the sky, the ceiling closed, and the small fisherman regained his gaze. The fear of disappearing again reappeared.

"Merco is not allowed to tell you." The ink girl shook her head.

"Go out to play with the unparalleled." Xiao Yu did not ask more, holding the ink girl's hand to leave the library's underground laboratory.

The armor of Chen Mo and the ink girl is already at an altitude of several kilometers or more.

Under the cover of the night, the blue plasma of the two sets of armored ion engines, like the starlight in the night, plus the lights of the city at night, the people below can't see what it is.

"Ink girl, turn on stealth mode."

Chen Mo overlooked the villa below and flew towards the sea.

Quietly leaving China's airspace, Chen Mo has been flying above the 40,000 meters, starting the supersonic flight, heading for the Pacific Ocean.

"accelerate."

"Accelerating, 1.5 Mach... 2 Mach... 3 Mach..."

The speed is getting faster, the air is blown up, and a white mist is attached to the armor. It accelerates to Mach 5, and the speed is stable. It goes in the direction of Washington.

chapters.title: Chapter 573: : Ufo
chapters.body:
Chapter 573: : Ufo

"Is the plan and report ready?"

Linna sat in the car to the airport, next to Mellon.

After the self-propelled army ants have grown up, various departments in their country have plans to deal with the marching ant group. The CIA does not need to mention the Ministry of Commerce and the Ministry of Justice. The strategy of the Syrian state is defeated, and the Ministry of National Defense also joins them.

But the various departments did not work together, and all the marching ant groups could escape every time.

This trip to Washington, in addition to submitting reports, also discussed the layout of some long-term plans, including the infiltration of the marching ant group.

"All are ready." McLone patted the briefcase on the clap.

“How about the plan to deal with marching ants?”

"Not sure." Mellon sighed and shook his head, because from the beginning to the present, the marching ant group did not pick up the move, and what he saw was something that was not painful.

In the case of marching ants, public opinion only allows some of the products that do not purchase the marching ant group, and the marching ants have losses, but they have not hurt the roots.

The purpose of their plans is still uncertain.

"Chen Mo and Zhao Min have not made public appearances. I feel that they will have the coup to deal with them. Now although they have caused a public opinion offensive, the losses are certainly not small. In theory, they will certainly come forward to blame, but Chen Mo and Zhao Min have not moved. I can't guess their thoughts."

"Maybe you are too hasty, let them feel wrong." Linna said.

"Don't feel, they are the parties, the photos are fake, they know it is wrong at the beginning, and they know that someone is dealing with them. Knowing that someone is spreading rumors to deal with them, in theory, it should be timely to clarify, or publicly appear, clarify the rumors. And they didn't do anything."

Mellon couldn't figure it out. He thought that it would be much easier to deal with a company than to deal with a small country, but it is not as smooth as it was imagined.

"If the marching ant group is so easy to deal with, they are already finished, and it is not possible for you to take the shot."

Linna has no surprises about the progress of the Mellon plan.

The CIA dealt with Chen Mo, not once or twice. They sent agents and spies to Binhai City many times. However, apart from hearing Chen Mo’s accident and his sister being kidnapped once, there was no news.

All the spy personnel and agents, all of them evaporated, and even the figures were not seen.

Whether it is the means of restriction on the bright side or the means of not seeing the light in the dark, it does not work. Instead, the influence of the marching ant group is growing.

"When I went to Washington this time, when I made a report, I would like to enlarge the threat of the marching ant group as much as possible. It doesn't matter if it is exaggerated. With the support of the White House, your work will get twice the result with half the effort."

Linna looked up at the airport in front of her eyes.

They didn't know that there was a man who was crossing the ocean to 'visit' them.

But the news of Linna’s peers has already been known by Chen Mo.

"Exactly, one net is exhausted."

When Linna and others boarded the plane, Chen Mo had already leapt into the Pacific Ocean and was about to enter the US territorial waters.

"Mergo, is about to enter the US airspace, but also supersonic flight? If you continue to fly at supersonic speed, the sound of the sound explosion will make us discover." said the ink girl.

Stealth mode can only prevent air defense radar exposure, but if the supersonic flight, the current flight altitude, the resulting sound explosion, can make a city hear.

"It's time, if it's a subsonic flight, our current position, it will take another five hours to get to Washington. If they don't arrive, they have reached their destination. This action doesn't make sense. Keeping Mach 5 speeds, they fly. I found that I can't catch up with us. Let this be an unsolved mystery." Chen Mo said.

Mach's hypersonic speed can break through the air defense systems of all countries in the world. At present, there is almost no solution, even in the United States, which has the strongest air defense system.

Even if it is discovered, the other party can't intercept it, let alone catch up.

Over the Pacific Ocean, the sound of screaming whizzed past, and some of the ships on the sea could hear the sound of blasting, and the eardrums vibrate.

Just after hearing the sound, I looked up at the sky and could not see the shadow of the high-altitude armor 30,000 meters away.

The size of the armor is too small, and at a high altitude of 20,000 meters away, it is a supersonic flight. Even if the person below is holding a telescope, it cannot be found.

"I am about to enter the US airspace." The voice of the ink girl reminded.

Hum... oh...

Oniha just put down the cup in his hand, and suddenly a loud noise made his eyelids jump.

Oh...

The humming sound followed, causing the glass of the window to vibrate slightly.

earthquake? explosion?

In this scene, O'Neill's pupils shrank and left the house, looking up at the surroundings and the sky, without any abnormalities, but the humming sound continued.

Not just O'Neill heard.

A loud bang exploded in Los Angeles, covering the whole of Los Angeles. The humming sound caused the glass of the window to vibrate. Many people felt that their periosteum was shaking.

Unusual conditions awakened throughout Los Angeles.

Edwards Air Force Base.

The base is located in California, about 150 kilometers from Los Angeles. It was one of the training centers of the US Air Force in the Second World War.

Now it is an important training and flight test base for the US Air Force, including the newly developed "X" series of aircraft in the United States, and the NASA's Dryden Flight Research Center is also here.

In addition to the Air Force Flight Test Center, it is also stationed in the US Air Combat Command, the 2nd Division of the Air Force's 9th Reconnaissance Wing, responsible for the Blackbird Reconnaissance Aircraft (SR-71) combat detachment.

The only two blackbird reconnaissance aircraft in the world are in the Dryden Flight Research Center.

"Sir, a strange roar in the city of Los Angeles and the surrounding cities, suspected of a sonic boom, the governor came to call us and asked if it was testing the supersonic cruise of the plane." A commander hurried into the office of the headquarters and hurriedly asked. Road.

"Test flight? We don't have a flight test."

John Yang Huo stood up and was amazed in his look.

All base test flights, he will know that other base aircraft come here to test, will also report, he can not know.

“I will send people to the direction of the sonic boom and ask the air defense department if the radar has detected the invading aircraft.”

The strange sound explosion appeared, which made Edwards Air Force Base busy.

Not long after, an officer came in again.

"General, the air defense department said that no unidentified flying objects were found. The pilot did not catch up. I heard the explosion in Los Angeles. It was a sonic boom, but no one saw any UFOs and planes."

The officer’s expression was extremely serious.

He used to be a pilot and he worked with the plane every day. The sound of the sound explosion could not be mistaken.

The base is the Air Force Equipment Command, which is a first-level command. In addition to various aircraft, it also deploys the latest large-scale national air defense radar (HDR).

However, these air defense radars did not detect any abnormal flying objects.

Invading their airspace may also be stealth supersonic aircraft.

"Contact the Pentagon right away... No, I personally contact." John was anxious and grabbed an emergency call from his desk.

What is it that enters their airspace? And so unscrupulous.

From the west to the east, across the entire US territory, Chen Mo spent less than half an hour and gave almost no response time.

Los Angeles traveled to Washington, and the city along the way heard the sound explosion. When the Pentagon urgently dispatched a fighter jet along the base to take off, looking for suspicious flying objects, Chen Mo had already arrived at his destination, in the air south of Washington.

"Ink girls, look at their current position."

On the high altitude of Chen Mo Wanmi, overlooking the strange land below, the speed has been reduced to subsonic speed, so there is no movement around.

"it is good."

In the armor, Chen Mo’s eyeballs showed a virtual map that clearly saw the airplane signs on the map, showing them and the location of the target aircraft, and they were approaching quickly.

chapters.title: Chapter 574: : The Death Of Linna
chapters.body:
Chapter 574: : The Death Of Linna

"what……"

Mai Long woke up from his dream, suddenly a physical shock, and shocked the assistant next to him.

It was a dream, and Milon only smiled and secretly wiped the cold sweat.

Looking up, I saw everyone on the plane staring at him. He only got on the plane for less than fifteen minutes. He just had a nightmare when he blinked.

"These days, because of Chen Mo’s business, I didn’t rest well, I had a nightmare, and I dreamed that Chen Mo would send someone to kill me.”

Mellon’s half-smiling voice made the people on the plane laugh.

"Dream is the opposite. Maybe this trip to Washington can make your plan a success after you come back." Linna, who is not far away, smiled.

"I think your words are more reliable than my dreams." Mellon shrugged, not arguing, turning his head to look out the window of the plane.

"The outside world alleges that Chen Mo is the iron man of China. On the status of wealth and technology, it really has a little meaning." Linna said: "It is a pity that this kind of person cannot be used for us."

"So it is either used for us or destroyed." Mellon followed her words.

Mellon doesn't know that his nightmare is about to become real.

It’s just that Chen Mo sent someone to kill him, but came in person.

"Ink girl, are they blocking their communication signals?" The special plane of Linna and others has already appeared in Chen Mo's field of vision, and the two sides are approaching quickly.

"Shielded."

"Start working."

"Mergo, why not just destroy the plane directly?"

"It's easy to kill people. I want to see if they have what I want in my hands."

Chen Mo accelerated, approaching the plane and arriving at the plane, only to control the armor and the aircraft at the same speed, relatively static.

"Oh my God,"

McLaren looked at the armor that appeared outside the window, and the whole person was stupid.

At this moment, he had to suspect that he was dreaming.

"Don't I wake up?" McLone patted his face and looked again. The two armor were still at the window.

"The leader, is there any problem?" The assistant next to him felt that Milon was not right.

"iron Man."

The eyes of Myron were incredible, and the voice was still trembling.

The assistant saw the window along the eyes of Mellon. The whole person was like a thunder, and his mouth could swallow a goose egg.

Chen Mo naturally saw Milon, and did not pay attention to it. He reached the window and reached out. At the arm of the armor, a laser was reflected on the glass of the window and cut along the edge.

Oh...oh...

The window glass of the aircraft was opened, the air pressure was unbalanced, and the things inside were instantly sucked out and flew out toward the broken window.

The seat next to the window, a CIA officer who was snoring, was sucked on the window without any precaution, and screamed again and again. The oxygen cover above the seat, all popped down.

Sudden changes have caused everyone in the plane to change their face.

"What happened?" Linna's voice changed, and she hurriedly put on an oxygen mask.

The imbalance in the air pressure in the aircraft made her feel terrible.

"iron Man."

Mellon’s body is shaking and his lips are groaning. I don’t know if it’s because of fear, my eyes are staring out the window, and even the assistant next to him, the body does not tremble.

"This story tells us to remember to take a seat belt when flying."

Chen Mo raised his hand and banged on the man who was stuck in the airplane window.

Snapped! !

The sound of broken bones, accompanied by screams and impacts, the man hit the other side of the aircraft fuselage, covered in blood, and more air intake.

The window opens again and a huge wind is coming out of the cabin.

"Go open the aircraft door."

Chen Mochao lost two fist-sized machine **** inside the plane.

At the moment of falling to the ground, the two machine **** opened and turned into two strange robots like eight-claw spiders, which quickly climbed to the cabin door.

boom! !

Not long after, the aircraft door was opened by two small machines.

Because of the gas loss, the aircraft also became unstable and somewhat swayed.

"Ink girl, go to control the plane and turn to the direction of the Atlantic."

Chen Mo and Mo Nuo entered the aircraft cabin, closed the hatch, and Chen Mo went straight in the cabin. And the ink armor of the ink girl goes to the cab of the nose.
