Chen Mo’s action did not drag the mud and water. From the time of breaking the window to entering the cabin, it was only half a minute. The people inside did not dare to untie the seat belt easily because of the pressure change. Some people even did not react to what happened.

Seeing Chen Mo wearing a battle armor appeared in the cabin, Mellon's body shook even more, and his eyes were full of fear.

He just saw the whole process.

"What kind of ghost thing?" The two security guards saw Chen Mo wearing a battle armor, screaming and grabbing a pistol and shooting at Chen Mo.

The bullet hit the armor and did not leave any traces.

"If I were you, sit down, or die a little faster."

Chen Mo raised his hand and killed several accompanying security personnel. He warned once with some less familiar English. His eyes fell on Lina and Mellon and walked toward the two.

"Who are you?" Lina quickly calmed down.

She is also a man who has experienced great winds and is more resilient than others and recovers faster.

This is only her life.

In this case, she only saw it in the movie. Now in reality, the shock to her is inexplicable.

"Give me your briefcase." Chen Mo did not answer Linna's question. His eyes fell on Mellon's briefcase and he hooked his finger.

"Who are you? What do you want to do?"

Seeing the other side did not pay attention to her, Linna's heart was a bit uncomfortable, but did not dare to move.

Two machine spiders, with sharp spikes on top of their chairs, moved a little, and the brain was going through holes.

The other party destroys the plane and hijacks the plane. You don't have to know that the one is not good. At this point, Linna’s brain is flying and thinking about the way to deal with this robot.

However, when all the methods emerged, she was vetoed.

The other party easily entered the plane, and the bullets were hit on it. There was no trace of it. This horrible armor was not able to deal with ordinary weapons in their hands.

Unless the other person shows his face, there may be a chance.

"If you don't give it, I will take it myself."

Chen Mo did not pay attention to Linna, went to McLean, punched his stomach and took the briefcase from the assistant.

Myron’s assistant has been scared and afraid to have any resistance.

"Friends, we don't seem to offend you. If you are an alien visitor and want the intelligence of the earth, we can help you and cooperate." Myron felt that the ribs had broken, and suffered from severe pain and weakness.

In front of this mysterious person, they are as weak as a baby, and he can think of the identity of the other person, that is, an alien.

This kind of technology is impossible on earth.

"I want it, I have found it."

Chen Mo pulled out the file of the Mellon briefcase and shook the folder about his plan.

At this moment, Mellon’s face was pale and bloodless.

The painful expression turned into panic.

Chen Mo.

Hearing this sentence, he suddenly understood that this person was related to Chen Mo and came for Chen Mo’s plan.

Chen Mo already has such a terrible technology, and knows everything they do behind the scenes.

Mellon was physically fearful and trembling uncontrollably.

Even if he performed the most horrible task that year, and he was on the verge of death several times, he was not so scared.

"You seem to guess who I am." Chen Mo saw the appearance of Mellon and knew what the other party had guessed, but he didn't care: "If you know it, you should be able to die."

After that, Chen Mo grabbed Mellon’s neck and did not give him a chance to resist.

Until the death, Mellon was still not reconciled.

He did not expect that because of this task, the other party used this horrible technology to deal with him, and was killed without any resistance.

"Next to you." Chen Mo looked at Lina next to him.

"You are Chen Mo's person. You should know how much sin is killing me."

Linna saw that the other side took away the plan to deal with Chen Mo to kill Mellon, and also guessed some clues.

"Don't you sin without killing you?"

"He has dealt with Chen Mo's plan. I only know it today, and I didn't participate. Let me go, I promise that I won't move Chen Mo in the future. Today's business is not mentioned."

"Innocent." Chen Mo faintly shook his head.

At this time, the official sitting next to Linna, her forehead braved the cold sweat, did not dare to move, did not dare to talk, fearing that the next one is him, because next to the corridor, Milon looked at him with his eyes open, not blind.

"Let me let go, what conditions do you want?"

Linna forced herself to calm down, her eyes kept turning, and she twisted her watch without leaving any traces.

"Don't be clever." Chen Mo leaned down and grabbed the watch in Linna's hand, grabbed it in his hand, and pulled down Lina's clothes button, crushing it in his hand: "What electronic devices and recording devices are on you?" I know."

Linna’s face finally appeared a little calm.

"You counted me three times and four times. Have you ever thought about it today?" Chen Mo calmly said.

At this moment, Linna's face is whiter and she listens to the tone. It is not Chen Mo's person, but Chen Mo himself, who came in person.

"When you come here, you will definitely be detected. The news of the plane being robbed will also be spread out. You know, if you are detected, your family and your wife will never have a day. Let me go, we will not Calculate you."

"I don't like being threatened, the CIA person, I am not the first to kill. Let go of you, never have a day." Chen Mo reached out and hugged Linna, could not allow her to resist, grabbed her neck.

Just listening to the bang, the plane fell into silence, only the wind breaking the window.

chapters.title: Chapter 575: : Let You Lick The Keyboard
chapters.body:
Chapter 575: : Let You Lick The Keyboard

Richmond Tower.

At this time, the command center of the ground tower was full of people, all of them were nervous, and their fears were written on their faces.

A man in a blue shirt with a slightly higher hairline came over and everyone was surrounded.

The man who came in was United’s president, Osque Munoz.

"President, flight A4864 lost contact." The tower controller responsible for the ground information saw that Osker came in and was a little excited.

Oske looks bad, he just came over after receiving this news.

"How long?"

"fifteen minutes."

Fifteen minutes ago, their towers also talked to the captain. The height and position of the screen display on the tower command center were all normal, but all of a sudden, all of this information disappeared from the screen.

They tried to contact the plane many times, but they couldn't get in touch, no matter how they called, they didn't respond.

The plane that took off less than half an hour lost contact.

"Is the alarm?" Osk asked.

"After the plane lost contact, we tried to contact them several times. If there was no contact, we would call the police." The tower controller was a little worried.

"You continue to try to contact."

Oske can't do anything, and now he can only listen to his fate and can't do anything.

The loss of a small passenger plane attracted the nervousness of everyone in the ground command center and was in a bad mood.

"Merco, the plane was found missing, the tower has been alarmed, and the radar of the Andrews Air Force Base found that the aircraft had dispatched a fighter jet to take off."

The US Air Force received news of the loss of the aircraft. After the radar detected the abnormal aircraft, it was coming over here.

When the US Air Force took off, the ink girl told Chen Mo the first time.

"The reaction rate is very fast."

Chen Mo was a little surprised. It was only twenty minutes, and the other party came to them, much faster than expected.

"It seems to change the strategy."

Chen Mo glanced at a dead cabin. He wanted to fly the plane to the middle of the Atlantic Ocean, let the plane sink to the bottom of the sea, all the bodies disappeared, and then create some suspicious clues to guide the Americans.

It now appears that it is unlikely that the aircraft will be completely disappeared.

"Ink girl, the two black boxes at the end of the nose are destroyed?"

"Destroyed."

"You let the plane hit the mountain."

Chen Mo grabbed the body of Linna Assistant and the aircraft captain.

The ink girl put away the small robot and jumped out of the plane with Chen Mo: "Mergo, what are you doing with two bodies?"

"In this case, the Americans have investigated and must know the embarrassment. They are looking for two missing persons to confuse their investigation direction."

In the aircraft, in addition to the crew, there are eight CIA staff members, including senior officials such as Linna and Mellon. Although Chen Mo is not worried that the Americans will find him, it is better to make this matter more confusing than the other.

"Which direction we are going now."

"In the direction of the Atlantic, detour to Central America, go home." Chen Mo smashed one hand, turned on the stealth mode, and directly rose to the height of 30,000 meters.

When I came, it was a bit big. When I went back at this time, no one could say what would happen on the road. Bypassing Central America, it was only half an hour for him.

Bang...

Not far below Chen Mo, the plane has crashed into the mountains and turned into a ball of fire.

"Go."

Chen Mo overlooks the plane burning like a black smoke, and does not fly back in the direction of the Atlantic.

His purpose has been reached, and what he wants is also obtained. This scene is similar.

However, this air crash was left to future generations to investigate, and how to check it, but also found that he should be on the other side of the globe.

......

In the early hours of the capital, at 4:50.

The coastal city, which has become an international city, is bright and the night market is on the way. The morning market is already preparing. You sing me to debut, so that this bustling city has no rest.

And away from the midnight field and the road, this time is the time when people sleep the most.

The city is quiet and lively, I don’t know, the two figures are approaching.

After entering the coastal city of Chen Mo, he entered the area of Binhai City, lowered the height, and flew back to the villa near the sea, landing from the top of the villa's library.

call! !

Coming out of the armor, Chen Mo breathed a sigh of relief.

From the city of Binhai, it took another three hours to reach the other side of the ocean in North America. It took another four hours to travel from the Atlantic to Central America and spent four hours returning here.

Flying at super high speed for a few hours, most people can't afford it.

Fortunately, Chen Mo's body has been developed, although it is a little tired, and it has not reached the point where it can't be eaten.

"Mergo."

Chen Mogang walked back to the bedroom door, and the ink girl opened the door from the inside.

The person who saw the opening was a cotton girl wearing a nightdress and slippers, so that Chen Mo was stunned: "Small fish?"

"Little fisher sister insomnia last night, she said that she could not sleep, let me sleep with her, Xiao Yujie fell asleep at two in the morning. Xiao Yujie said, you have so many things glaring at her, waiting to wake up to see you in the morning, Let you lick the keyboard." The ink girl explained.

"..."

Chen Mo smiled and did not take the words of the ink girl seriously.

Enter the bedroom and see the small fish that slept soundly. Try to walk lightly to the bathroom, simply take a shower and change your pajamas.

Just going to bed, Xiao Yu drilled a drill to Chen Mo, it seems to be a familiar temperature, the brow furrow in the dream, only to relax, sleep well.

"You go with the unparalleled." Chen Mo whispered to the ink girl.

"Little fisher sister let me sleep with her."

"With me, you go to look after the match."

"it is good."

For the ink girl, Chen Mo's words are the highest priority, only the ink girl nodded and turned away from the bedroom.

Until the ink girl left the bedroom, Chen Ou did not feel what she missed.

Chen Mo sleeps here and becomes quiet, but the United States is not quiet.

"What? The plane crashed into the mountains?" Oske heard the news and his brain exploded.

The most terrible result is still coming.

At this time, his mind is flying, thinking about how to deal with this matter in order to make their company suffer the least.

"This is not the worst." Assistant Eliya interrupted Oske's thoughts and her voice trembled.

"What is the worst?"

"Just got the news, the CIA intervened in the investigation."

"A plane crash has something to do with the CIA? Is it because of fear? The terrorists? Is this a conspiracy?", Oske seems to have seized the straw.

"Not a terrorist, but a plane that crashed was a special plane of the CIA. The people above were all CIA officials and senior officials." Eliya was a little nervous.

Snapped! !

Oske is sitting in the office chair.

Don't think about it.

Soon, the CIA will come to check him and their company.

He knew that no matter what he had been investigated, his work was gone.

After a small passenger plane lost contact, it hit the mountain. On the plane, including the crew, 23 people were killed and 2 people were missing. This news has attracted global attention.

Just a small passenger plane crashing into the mountains may not affect that much.

The key is the people on the plane.

Some reporters soon found out that the crashed plane was a special plane of the CIA officials, including the director of the CIA, Linna, and a number of CIA executives, all of whom died in the accident.

The news was exposed on the Internet, setting off a huge wave of media and intelligence.

The director of the world's largest intelligence agency was killed in an airplane accident, and several important officials and accompanying personnel all died.

The news was exposed, the US official remained silent, and there was no rumor, and the CIA official did not stand up and blame, which had to be reminiscent.

Inside, people who smell a little smell smell unusual.

chapters.title: Chapter 576: : You Know Too Many Secrets.
chapters.body:
Chapter 576: : You Know Too Many Secrets.

early morning.

Xiao Yu woke up and opened his eyes to see the familiar face.

The fears accumulated last night have vanished.

Suddenly think of something, looked at the room, did not see the figure of the ink girl, only gently vomited, pinched Chen Mo's ear, ‘swearing’ looks like a whisper, some naughty, eyes are very gentle and petting.

She only fell asleep in the early hours of the morning. At that time, Chen Mo had not returned yet, and it must be coming back later.

For fear of awakening Chen Mo, who is still asleep, Xiao Yu's hands squatted out of bed, looked at the time, and after a simple wash, he hurriedly left the room.

"Little fisher sister, unparalleled that I want to drink milk, I will cook for her."

Ink in the kitchen, see the small fish out, smile shouted, and put the hot milk out of the microwave.

"Well, when is my husband coming back?"

"Merco came home at 4:50 in the morning."

"I will do breakfast, you will go with the unparalleled play." Xiao Yu took over the kitchen.

The breakfast and dinner at home are usually made by small fishermen and occasionally uncomfortable. The ink girl will make some simple meals, so that there is a kind of home.

After an hour and a half, a hearty breakfast is ready.

A few different mornings than usual.

The little unparalleled has been sitting at the dinner table, holding a spoon, and eating under the care of the ink girl, the little mouth is a bit bulging, and can't stop.

Get ready for breakfast, and the little fisher will let you turn on the TV news.

Chen Mo has the habit of reading news every day in order to know the current events in the world. Over time, Xiao Yu will follow.

"Welcome to the Phoenix Morning News. At 12:46 on the 17th, Washington time, a small passenger plane from Richmond to Washington lost nearly half an hour and crashed into the mountain. So far, it has been confirmed, including the crew. A total of 23 people were killed and 2 were missing. The identity of the deceased and the identity of the missing person were not announced.

It is reported that the aircraft is a special plane of the CIA, the passengers are senior officials and staff of the CIA, and the CIA director is likely to be on the plane. Up to now, Washington has not yet given a reply. The CIA officials also refused to be interviewed by reporters. The cause of the plane crash is currently under investigation. ”

"The following message is broadcast. At 0:46 am today, the plane crashed from Richmond to Washington. The black box has been found. It is understood that the black box is seriously damaged. The investigators are trying to repair it. Can you get the plane before the crash? The data is temporarily unknown."

"..."

Overwhelming news.

Xiaoyu looked a little dazed, and the relaxed smile also converges and becomes absent-minded. It seems to be thinking about something and becoming very worried.

"what's wrong?"

Chen Mo came out of the room and saw the small fisherman who was in a daze. He asked.

Xiao Yu’s desire to stop, and finally shook his head, looked at the news, did not ask: "Nothing, eat breakfast."

Chen Mo glanced at the contents of the news and immediately became clear.

With Xiao Yu’s understanding of him, perhaps he has already guessed something. Although I didn't ask, but the two lived together for so long, the other party's snacks and ideas have a tacit understanding.

This matter, if Xiao Yu does not know anything, he will not say, now Xiao Yu found some clues, he will not hide.

“Do you want to know what I did last night?”

Xiao Yu shook his head: "I don't want to know, don't tell me which woman to sneak into, don't tell me last night, you said that you are not allowed to enter the room, you are still cheeky and come in, and drive the ink girl away."

"As you think of you, I did it." Chen Mo gently slammed Xiao Yu, naturally knowing that she was deliberately shifting the topic.

This sentence made Xiao Yu’s body tremble, biting his lip and trying to control himself, but he could not control it. She felt right last night, Chen Mo is going out to do dangerous things.

Now that something is happening, think about it and fear it. If there is a case, the house will be destroyed.

Chen Mo can clearly feel that she is shaking all over her body, her hands and feet are cold.

After a long time, Xiao Yu’s trembling body was soothing, and it was directly in his arms. Like a sticky kitten, he was very attached to Chen Mo’s embrace.

"I am a little scared. What happened recently, is it related to them?"

Since you can guess a clue, Xiao Yu naturally can think of some information.

"Not only this time, but also you are shot, and we are all attacked. They have no ability. They can only retaliate against cyber attacks, but now they are coming again. If I do nothing, the days will be settled in the future. No, I have no choice but to make a decision. Does it feel that I am terrible and killed so many people?" Chen Mo said.

"It’s not terrible. I won’t say this kind of disappointment in the future.” Xiao Yu is somewhat unhappy: "You are my man, no matter what you do, I support you unconditionally, believe in you."

Xiao Yu is somewhat sad, and some people who are worried about holding her. There is a feeling of wanting to cry. She knows that this man is suffering from many unknown pressures, but she can't help anything.

If you are a small fisherman, let Chen Mo’s heart warm.

"Mother and Dad, have a meal, be cold." Xiao Wushuang broke the atmosphere of the two, holding a small spoon, and shouted innocently, interrupting the two.

"Okay, have breakfast."

Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu gently and took her to sit down at the dinner table.

“Is the breakfast made by my mother good?”

"It's delicious, Dad also eats." Xiao Wushuang reached out and grabbed a pastry and fed it to Chen Mo: "There is also milk that the ink is brewing for me."

At the dinner table, the two did not mention the topic. Chen Mo and Wusou were talking to the father and the daughter. That was the best to eat early, and Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo on the side, with a soft light and a satisfied smile in his eyes.

This man has always been her world center.

......

"Is the American thing, is it related to you?"

When Chen Mogang came to the company, he was picked up by Zhao Min. His look was a bit heavy, and even the voice of his voice could be lowered.

Yesterday, she chatted with Chen Mo about the recent smearing, and asked Chen Mo to be behind the scenes. Chen Mo explained that the day knows the answer.

The result is to get up this morning, a big international news.

The plane crashed and the senior CIA officer died.

The news scared her all the time, rushed to the company, and found Chen Mo to ask.

"I did it." Chen Mo did not deny.

"You really dare to admit it." Zhao Min took a breath and sighed in his heart: "Our things, behind the scenes are they?"

Chen Mo nodded: "There is still an unexpected harvest this time. I got them to deal with my plan. The above methods, details, including photos, are all complete."

Chen Mo let the ink girl open the document, which is a complete plan.

"These bastards."

Seeing her and Mr. Chen’s ‘bed photos’, Zhao Min’s gas did not hit one.

After calming down, Zhao Min continued to say: "You have done this, no one else knows?"

"I went out last night and came back in the early morning. Xiaoyu looked at the news and guessed something. I told her, no one else knows, I am not stupid. This kind of thing is not to show off."

"Know it." Knowing that the black hand was killed behind the scenes, Zhao Min's mood was inexplicable and refreshing, and his face was smiling: "You tell me even this secret, in case one day, I leave the company, you will Will not kill me?"

"You know too many secrets, not bad."

"My life is tied to your hands, and you can't escape." Zhao Min sighed and said.

"Don't make trouble, say something right. Their plan information, I will find a way to expose, when the outside world knows the truth of the matter."

"Really exposed, Americans won't doubt you?"

"I am separated from this thing by half of the earth. They can't think of me. Besides, I deliberately got two missing people. They only suspected the missing person. I suspect that there are traitors inside. I have to clarify, still you An innocent."

The information he got was not only his plan, but also other plans. Deliberately creating signs of defection is to let the Americans investigate the two missing persons, and they can't doubt him.

In the perception of outsiders, no one can leap into the Pacific Ocean in just one night.

"I am determined to be a young man. It doesn't matter if you can't clear it. In fact, I hope that those photos are true, but they are all rumors." Zhao Min's tone is a pity.

Chen Mo: "..."

"You are careful about this matter. I will not say it to Xiaoyu. You should stop talking to anyone else, including your loved ones. Let us find us on our heads and we will all finish."

Zhao Min turned to be serious.

"It's really fast to change your face." Chen Mo has a new understanding of Zhao Min's face-changing speed.

When he heard Chen Mo’s embarrassment, Zhao Min gave him a look.

"My sister has recently been caught up in the garbage of the Internet, I am going to prepare, and I will settle accounts after the fall."

chapters.title: Chapter 577: : This Group Of Chickens Is Fat Enough
chapters.body:
Chapter 577: : This Group Of Chickens Is Fat Enough

"Editor, we received an anonymous email with a file."

Assistant Angela entered the office and handed over a document to a middle-aged man who was reading the newspaper.

He is the current editor of the wiki website, Christine Herafansson.

After the wiki's founder and editor-in-chief Ascension was quarantined, he was also restricted from accessing the Internet. Herafansson was also selected as the new editor of the wiki, taking over the decryption work of the wiki.

The work of their website is to help the insiders, let the organization, enterprises, and government operate in the sun, and is a borderless, non-profit connected media.

Because their work and the contents of the declassified documents involve too many shady and secrets that are not known to the United States, they are now the nails of the Americans and the thorns in the flesh.

After taking over the documents in Angela's hands, Herafansson took a serious look and was instantly attracted by the documents.

Doing their work, not afraid of big things, is afraid that things are not big.

The content inside this document is a big news.

I read the contents of the file from beginning to end, and Herafansson confirmed that this is a real document.

In this work, he has contacted a lot of confidential documents, file formats, logos, numbers, covers, etc. about the CIA, all the same, can not be fake.

"Let others prepare and expose this document." Herafansson immediately made a decision.

Choosing to be the editor of the wiki website, he is not afraid of big things, just wants to live a great life, for the freedom of the press.

Herafansson has not thought about who sent him the mail. To do their work, it is the most normal thing to receive anonymous mail. Many people are afraid of trouble and will not disclose any information about themselves. More useless.

But this is definitely very interesting.

At noon that day, the secret file was posted to the wiki.

"The Hand of Washington" is planning the scandal of the marching ant group! 》

In addition to the contents of the secret documents, the article also notes the origin of the 'Hands of Washington', belonging to the CIA, once used spies to plan the secret group of the Soviet Union.

The declassified documents also include how ‘Washington’s Hand’ uses cyberspace to create rumors that attack Chen Mo and Zhao Min, how to plan the contradiction between Zhao Min and Chen Mo’s wife He Xiaoyu, and provoke the contradiction of the marching ant group.

In addition, it also includes the disintegration of the marching ant group. After the equity is dispersed, how to control the marching ant group and obtain the plan of the marching ant group technology.

The article and the decryption file were immediately reproduced by the world's major media, causing an uproar.

The marching ant group began with the ‘** incident’ of Zhao Min and Chen Mo, and until now, including divorce, immigration, selling technology, selling the country and other remarks, paving the entire cyberspace of China.

Even foreign countries are reports of various media.

Now comes a big reversal.

After the American suspected CIA executives crashed, another big incident was revealed.

Various reports in the world are overwhelming.

The CIA secret group that once planned the disintegration of the Soviet Union to deal with a group company, the extent to which the United States is jealous of this company can be imagined.

After the news was exposed, the heat soared at a frenzied rate, and it had completely overshadowed the crash.

Public opinion has become uncontrolled.

Numerous ridicules and rumors of US official remarks appeared on the Internet.

In the afternoon, the US official spokesperson asked the wiki site to immediately remove the relevant secret documents and immediately hand over the information about the documents, otherwise it would arrest and prosecute Herafansson.

At the same time, the CIA also announced that it would send a team of people to prepare for the investigation.

The speech of the US official spokesperson has never been more intense.

Only those who know the insider know why their speech is so intense.

That document, on the plane of the crash, Milon was ready to hand over the confidential documents of the White House, the plane crashed, they thought that all kinds of confidential documents were also burned in the crash, but now appear on the wiki website.

They have to believe that the party who broke the secret document is likely to be associated with the crash.

Ordinary people do not know the inside story, but the official US speech confirms the authenticity of the document from the side.

In China, during the scandal of the marching ant group, the media that has remained silent, seems to receive any instructions, and has been eager to comment on the report from various angles.

The official mainstream media voiced, after the rhythm, from the media and other collective follow-up, has long been an unprecedented traffic concern.

“A typical case where no brain blacks are used.”

"The people who don't know the truth, shivering in the corner, the world is terrible, but I haven't used it."

"Those who used to be black marching ant groups came out to see who was a traitor, who sold the country? They must pretend that nothing happened, no one can cure them."

“The hand of Washington’s hand is not the same as the general ants’ group.”

"If Chen Mozhen is sprayed out of the country by a jet, then there is a look. The official does not manage the network agents and sprays, and sooner or later."

"I eat melon version 3.0, I guess there is a version 4.0 super can eat."

On the Internet, there is no need for the marching ant group to issue a statement, and the voice of Chen Chenmo disappeared in just one day.

Some people who have been smashed have deleted their own words and pretend that nothing has happened.

But really nothing happened?

Zhao Min also saw the news.

I have to say that it is very witty to send Chen Mo to send the file to the Wiki Confidential. Using the characteristics of this website to publicize the facts, Americans do not doubt what they think.

This move is better than any public relations.

Now the facts are announced, the atmosphere of the company's ups and downs has been swept away, and there are scenes in which everyone cheers.

Since this time, their company has been so attacked and under such pressure. The company forums are full of anger and unwilling remarks because they have not been able to punish those who follow them.

"Everything is ready, you can file a lawsuit at any time." Li Huai said in Zhao Min's office.

From the beginning of the fermentation, they are just a simple public relations, with the help of the ink girl, collecting evidence, waiting for today, to give some people a profound lesson.

"Well, Lanxi, how is the press conference ready?" Zhao Min looked at Lanxi.

“All the invitations have been issued, the venue is ready, and you can start at any time,” Lanxi said.

Since the launch of the company, the company's door was surrounded by a group of reporters, received numerous invitations to interview, want to hold a press conference, those reporters will not want to fly immediately.

"Documents to me." Zhao Min took the documents in Li Huai's hands.

"President, are you attending in person?"

"Otherwise? The boss is busy with research, these things are not glorious things, otherwise I would like the boss to attend in person. This tone has been stunned for so long, always spit it out."

Zhao Min is very upset.

Because of this incident, Chen Mo is across the ocean, feeling the other end of the earth and personally working on it.

There is a slight problem in any link in the middle, and no one is allowed to be in danger.

It makes people angry when they think about it.

“How many people are there here?”

"757 netizens and water army, 83 self-media people, 9 media companies, 4 water army companies, 3 platforms." Li Huai said: "These are the most serious part, and the most sure to win the lawsuit. part."

This number is still a part, and there is more from the evidence and information they collect.

Really shocking.

Li Huai also knows that this time Zhao Min is angry and is really going to do things.

"This group of chickens is fat enough." Zhao Min flipped through the list of documents.

Chapter 578: : Killing Chicken And Monkey

On the scene of the press conference of the marching ant group, many journalists were screaming, and many of them were faces of foreign journalists.

Previously, it was just a few clarifications that did not hurt. Even when the rumors were the most insane, the executives of the marching ant group did not respond to the outside.

Now that the Wikipedia website has been decrypted, the marching ant group has finally stood up.

Many outsiders want to know the attitude of the executives of the marching ants group on this matter.

In the expectation of everyone, Zhao Min and Li Huai and others entered the reception.

The scene was immediately commotion.

Many reporters know that the marching ant group may have a high-level out, but it is also the person in charge of the public relations department or the legal department. I did not expect Zhao Min to appear in person.

I saw Zhao Min's face calmly set to the middle of the stage to sit down.

Li Huai, who appeared with Zhao Min, unbuttoned the suit, sat down next to Zhao Min, pushed the glasses, and looked at the ancient well without waves.

"To find everyone today, it is mainly for two things."

Zhao Min opened, and the scene of the commotion immediately calmed down.

"The first one was some time ago. Some rumors, jealousy and smearing about me appeared on the Internet. We have not responded because I always believe that the Qing people are self-cleaning and do not need to respond. Now the truth is clear, everyone knows how It doesn't require me to make any clarifications."

Zhao Min’s words are not urgent or slow.

"The second thing is also about the rumors of the Internet. From the beginning of the establishment of the marching ant group, to the small scale nowadays, our company relies on technology to spell out the blood. But there are always some kinds of about our company on the network. Smudge and swear words.

These remarks are not limited to companies, but also include personal attacks on us, our bosses and their families, rumors, rumors and malicious acts. We are not as good as one thing, and we have previously prosecuted some people who have been smeared, and finally chose to reconcile.

But some people, taking our goodwill as a weakness can be bullied. The last event was fermented. In addition to the one-handed planning of the people behind the scenes, there were also some people who were willing to help others. They were arrogant, embarrassing and personal attacks on the Internet.

All kinds of remarks have seriously damaged the reputation of our company, the reputation of our boss and his family, and my own reputation, which has also had a great impact on our lives. ”

The scene was extremely quiet, and Zhao Min’s words made the reporters at the scene clear.

Even some viewers before the live broadcast heard it very clearly.

Everyone has an idea in mind that the marching ant group seems a bit angry this time.

"Today's truth is clear, and those speeches are rumors and smears. Everyone knows very well. During this period, our legal department has collected information about the personal attacks on our hackers and rumors, and relevant evidence.

This reception is to explain to everyone that we are prepared to prosecute those who are unreasonable, embarrassing and personally attacking us. And rumored remarks, we will also call the police. ”

Most of the audience before the live broadcast is refreshing.

The cyber violence of some time ago was the most horrible thing they have seen in these years.

If you put it on anyone, you have to bear tremendous mental stress. If your heart is not strong enough, you may have to mentally collapse or go to a psychiatrist.

"This story tells us that for a while, I have been seeing the court."

"Good job, let those sunspots pay for spiritual damages, reputation damages, and let them lose their pants."

"..."

With Zhao Min said to sue those network sunspots, the barrage before the live broadcast cheered and celebrated.

Some people have already panicked.

Some people are not sure whether they are within the scope of the marching ant group's lawsuits, but think of so many people on the Internet, they are lucky.

"Now in my hands, there is a document about our rights protection."

Zhao Min knocked on the file in his hand.

"In this lawsuit, the defendants had a total of 857 netizens who posted swear words on various platforms, 83 media people, 9 media companies, 4 water companies, and 3 platforms."

Zhao Min let people put a simple data on the screen, but there is no specific platform name for the accused.

When this data came out, the scene was surging.

Thoroughly shocked everyone on the field.

With such a huge number of one-time lawsuits, the marching ants are really moving this time.

Absolutely making global news, it may speed up the domestic network governance regulations.

Some people are unlucky.

"My God, marching ants this is serious."

"666..."

"Slow, people who see their mouths are about to be punished, and I can't help but feel excited."

"This story tells us that if you eat melon in the future, don't bite."

"I think of those scenes where the sunspots beg for mercy. They will definitely say: I have no ability to compensate. I am only impulsive. I know it is wrong. I apologize."

Some people have already gloated.

Zhao Min did not finish.

The scene was very quiet, and many reporters wanted to know that Zhao Min had any horrible material that they wanted to know.

"Many people think that there are a lot of people here, but they are only a part. The real data is shocking and much more than this number, so we will choose rights protection.

We have invited 52 law firms across the country and 156 lawyers to help us defend our rights. The lawyers hired by our company will file a lawsuit in the local court where the defendant is located this afternoon. This time, we do not accept any situation of reconciliation, and the court and the law to return us with justice. ”

hiss……

The reporters on the field were all shocked.

They can hear that this marching ant group is really angry, and those who participate in the cyber violence against the marching ant group may be bleeding.

From the line of Zhao Min's words, you can feel the anger of the marching ant group, at all costs, and let those people get retribution.

This will be the largest network rights event in history, which may speed up the introduction of network laws and regulations, and may provide many typical cases.

"The CIA has framed you. I don't see you going to retaliate against the CIA. I only dare to be a good friend in the country and retaliate against innocent netizens."

"It is estimated that the upstairs is about to go to court. I have been here to addiction."

“Will the marching ant group do this too much?”

"Excessive? You told me too much? ‘**Events’, all kinds of follow-ups, traitors, personal attacks, oh, when this series of things happened, did the sunspots think too much?”

"If it is not the confidential information published by the wiki website, now the marching ants group, Chen Mo and Zhao Min are still suffering from various cyber violence and incomprehensibility. How could it not be too much to say too much before?"

"Killing chickens and monkeys, some people want to play."

There are still some cynicism on the live bomb.

Soon, these sounds were drowned.

Countless people are appreciative of the marching ant group.

A good network, there is always a mouse out of disgusting people, let them receive lessons, and later want to talk, and also through the brain.

After the press conference was over, the news came out and immediately explodes the circle of friends.

On the second day of the fermentation, the Supreme Law and the Supreme Court heard the sound, and paid close attention to the rights of the marching ant group. In China, the news of the marching ant group is calculated, as well as the news of the marching ant group's rights protection, the heat is far from other news.

A company that sued thousands of people at the same time was unprecedented.

The marching ant group completely wants to take this group of chickens to kill the monkeys. In the future, whoever dares to attack the marching ant group must carefully consider the consequences.

Today, he came to the phone and said that he received a court summons and marched the ant company. I made this comment, he was crying on the phone and admit his mistake. Poor and hateful."

“My friend went to work at the Water Army Company. He told me that at the beginning of the incident, some people had a very high price to discredit the marching ants. Their boss’s stock was lost. They took orders madly in the previous period. This time they were sue by the marching ants, claiming 2000. Wan, the boss ran away in the night."

"..."

Various comments reveal the various aspects of life.

A month passed quickly.
