The CIA’s investigation of confidential documents and investigations of crashes have been ongoing, but the direction of the investigation is the two missing persons on the plane, as well as the wiki’s news.

The whisperer on the wiki website is Chen Mo, and it is impossible for the outside world to find any traces.

The two missing persons, already in the belly of the fish in the Atlantic, could not find the bones, and others were even less likely to find them.

The planning of the army ant scandal was robbed of the heat by the marching ants, and with the US government deliberately guiding, the degree of attention gradually subsided and the impact existed, but it was still limited.

The US official did not dare to announce that the head of the Washington Hand, who planned the scandal, died in the crash, otherwise there would be more horrible conspiracy.

Although the influence in the hearts of ordinary people has subsided, in some countries and big enterprises, the prestige of Americans has once again been hit hard and questioned by the whole world.

The storm has weakened, and Chen Mo, one of the heroes of this storm, is now in the hangar of the Fei Ant Space Center.

On the lifting platform, Chen Mo looked down and displayed a huge behemoth below.

After such a long period of hard work, the space plane was finally completed.

chapters.title: Chapter 580: : Goddess
chapters.body:
Chapter 580: : Goddess

The space plane, which is displayed in the hangar of the Flying Ants Space Center, has a net height of 6.8 meters, plus landing gear and wheels. It is nearly 10 meters high, with a wingspan of 70.3 meters, a length of 34 meters, and an empty weight of 75 tons. The takeoff weight is more than 230 tons.

The fuselage and the wing are integrated. If you look at the bottom, you can see the huge bottom of the fuselage. There are 4 large ion engines, and there are two ion engines, 6 landing gears and 24 wheels at the tail.

The design of the aircraft is very sci-fi elements, the painting is dark gray, with a metallic texture, like the wing of the wing.

The painting on the wing, in addition to the flag of China, and the logo of the marching ant group, is extremely conspicuous.

This aircraft, just manufacturing, costs nearly 20 billion Chinese coins. This swallowing beast is not a general horror.

Some of the facilitators in the hangar were more excited than ever.

Such a huge aircraft, even if they have seen it many times, but this time is completed, they still can not help but excited.

"finished?"

Zhao Min rushed to the hangar of the Space Center and saw some new giants in front of him. Some of them lamented.

This is almost the world's most industrial work, completed by their company. This means that their company already has the world's top industrial systems, far beyond this era.

"Complete, you contact the official city of Binhai City, ready to fly, and the military side, I will contact Li Chengzhi." Chen Mo said.

This behemoth test flight, not like the armor, and this is the space center, the flight test must be complete, and also to the official registration. This is a test flight, not a joke.

"On the operation of the aerospace plane, I asked the team to make a preliminary plan."

Zhao Min handed the information to Chen Mo.

"Aerospace center's profit model, including space tourism, manned space flight, satellite launch, space transportation, space exploration, etc. If it is finalized, I will now recruit globally responsible trainers for space passengers. The space plane is mature and acceptable. Global registration for space travel."

The aerospace project has invested hundreds of billions. It must not be sustained by the marching ant group and is maintained in a state of loss.

As a company, making money is the purpose.

So when Chen Mo asked her to think about the profit model of the aerospace plane last time, she let the company's planning team begin to plan the profit model of the space plane.

"pretty good."

Chen Mo scanned the planned documents and also learned the approximate steps.

Realizing the technology, Zhao Min is the best, which is why Chen Mo assured the company to her.

"We must also be prepared in advance to deal with the impact of the aircraft's exposure. If the development of the earth is normal, and now the development speed of the earth, for another hundred years, it may not be able to manufacture this aircraft."

Chen Mo is too aware of the technology contained in it, leading the current era of technology.

The aircraft contains the technology, materials and manufacturing processes that will allow the current industrial system to advance for fifty years.

"What is the name of this plane? Peng Peng? Phoenix? Shenlong?" Zhao Min said.

"There are not only beasts but also gods that fly. It is called the goddess."

"It's nice."

Zhao Min heard the name and nodded with satisfaction.

"Would you like to see inside the plane?"

"I can't ask for it." Zhao Min said with interest.

The two had just arrived under the aerospace plane. In the abdomen of the plane, a cabin door slowly landed and was laid on the ground.

Just entering, the entrance is a cabin about three meters high and four meters wide. The design is the same as the manned cabin of the space station. It is round and has flat sides on both sides. There are various handles on the cabin arm.

Next to the cabin, there are doors to other cabins.

“Not the same as I imagined?”

"It really is."

Zhao Min thinks of a spaceship in which people can walk freely in the sci-fi film, but the front and the imagination are not small.

"There is no artificial gravity for the time being. It is impossible to think of the same in the movie. After the artificial gravity, the spacecraft can be like the movie. In space, there is no up and down, and there is no southeast or northwest, so the cabin can only be designed this way.

The aircraft has six main cabins, one cab, one central control hall, as well as an experimental cabin, a carrier cabin, a rest cabin and a living and entertainment cabin. In addition to the six main cabins, there is an emergency escape cabin and a material reserve tank. ”

Chen Mo began to introduce Zhao Min to the layout of the goddess.

The space inside the plane is much larger than imagined.

“Now it’s just the first generation of aircraft models, and the conditions will be more perfect in the future, and larger models will be made.”

"How much can I carry if I use this aircraft to carry passengers?"

"A day trip to space, about a hundred people is no problem."

......

"You want to test the plane?"

Li Chengzhi received a phone call from Chen Mo, and his face was scared.

How long has Chen Mo’s space center been established? So far, the launch base and the airport were built, and the design and manufacture of the aircraft was completed. This terrible ‘banknote capability’ is only one company in the world, and only Chen Mo has such a crazy investment.

"Are you not building a space center? How do you get a plane?"

When I heard the word airplane, Chen Mo’s mouth was pumped.

"Aerospace, it is normal to engage in aircraft. Also, I am engaged in space planes, air and space dual-use aircraft, not launch vehicles. Now the aircraft is ready to fly, it needs the approval of the military and air traffic control departments, what is the procedure? I can submit my application as soon as possible."

Sky plane?

Li Chengzhi was frightened, and the marching ant group was not flying, but it was the best.

"The procedure, I will help you deal with it, know that you like to work efficiently, I can come faster." Li Chengzhi said. He also wants to see what the aircraft Chen Mo came out of.

"Chen Mo's old boy is looking for you again?" Liu Jianjun saw Li Chengzhi coming back and asked curiously.

"There is something, big things." Li Chengzhi said with helplessness.

"tell me the story."

"His space plane is finished, ready to fly, I have to go to Binhai."

"What plane?" Liu Jianjun wondered if he had got it wrong.

"You didn't get it wrong. He said that it is an aerospace plane. It is both air and space. With our definition, it should be regarded as the sixth generation fighter."

"Hey..."

Liu Jianjun almost stunned his chin.

......

"You want to test the air plane?" Yao Yi was almost caught by his own saliva, a little incredible to look at Zhao Min.

It was not long before the Ants Space Center was built, so the aircraft was built so quickly.

The aerospace plane is not a self-timer drone that ordinary people play.

What is the horrible construction speed?

But thinking of the marching ant group, Yao Yi has become a matter of course.

“What do I need to help?” Yao Yi said.

In Binhai City, he tried his best to give the army ants group the greatest help. After all, Binhai City, under the influence of the marching ant group, became the international metropolis.

In the past, the status of Binhai City was the only second-tier city in the open city. Now the gDP of Binhai City is already at the forefront of the country, and it is comparable to most international metropolises.

Not to mention the standard of living.

Unmanned public transport, intelligent transportation, urban brains and holographic cities are in use, and the standard of living is no longer the same.

"Our boss did not say, should not help. Just talk to the secretary, in case the test flight will bring unnecessary influence or rumors, you can know the situation in time." Zhao Min shook his head.

"Well, when I fly, I will tell you, if it is convenient, I want to watch it."

Yao Yi is very interested.

After living for most of his life, he has been in close contact with the space shuttle. This is an opportunity to learn about the latest developments of the marching ant group.

"If it goes well, it won't take long. If the air traffic controller approves it, we can start the test flight." Zhao Min said.

chapters.title: Chapter 581: : Shocked Expert Group
chapters.body:
Chapter 581: : Shocked Expert Group

“Here is the Flying Ant Space Center? Very good.”

"I didn't expect that in our country, it would be incredible to have such a space center or a private enterprise."

"Just built."

“How come there is no launch tower?”

"He didn't develop rockets and jumped directly to make space shuttles."

"But this space center is too close to Binhai City. If there is a problem, the impact will be great."

"We don't dare to make a space shuttle at present. The maintenance cost is too high. Is this Chen Mo, not a general bold, not afraid of being dragged? This is a swallowing beast."

“The revenue of the marching ant group in one quarter is astronomical. Our funds are limited and cannot be used indiscriminately. They are successful in research and development, and there should be commercial profitable projects. He is a businessman, and making money is a must.”

In the bus near the Feifang Space Center, a group of people looked out into the space center outside the window, and they were amazed in the look. You began to talk about it.

When the vehicle arrived at the aerospace center, Li Chengzhi took the lead and got off the bus.

With the researchers behind him, I still don't forget to look around and be familiar with the environment.

All the experts who came from the various research institutes and sent them were sent.

I heard that Chen Mo has successfully developed a space plane. After the official consultation with Chen Mo, he sent personnel to watch the space plane. The real purpose is to come here to see the space center and the space plane, hoping to learn some useful techniques for them.

So there is the arrival of this expert group.

The top engineers of Cheng Fei and Shen Fei, the chief designer of aerospace engineering, the chief engineer of the moon landing project, the top technicians of the rocket design team, and the engineers of the civil aircraft design team.

Everyone is a big man. Although they are strangers to their names and appearances, they are the mainstay of national space aviation.

Even Li Chengzhi must treat them with politeness.

"Every engineer, please come with me." A staff member came with a robot and saw many experts and engineers, who did not know what to call, and directly called the engineer.

For their researchers, the title of engineer will not be excluded.

“This is a robot.” Several engineers who rarely touched the intelligent robot were interested in watching the robots around the staff.

They all know that the robot technology of the marching ant group is unique. Now, I see that it is well-deserved.

“We have robots involved in the project. Now in the Linglong Space Station, there is an intelligent robot. They can replace astronauts and do a lot of dangerous work, which is very easy to use,” said the aerospace project engineer.

During the talk, the group had boarded the autonomous car in the space center and arrived at the door of the hangar.

"long time no see."

Li Chengzhi saw Chen Mo and simply shook hands.

"I am going to introduce you to the Huaxing academician, the chief engineer of the Lingxiao project. This is the chief architect of the engineering project, Zhang Jianfeng, the academician of the Feifei Group, and the aircraft designer Yang Lan."

Li Chengzhi introduced, Chen Mo said hello one by one.

They are all big gods.

It seems that the average age is about 40 years old. In the research team, this age is the peak.

Chen Mo naturally knows the purpose of their coming here.

In the past when domestic technology was underdeveloped, the country's industrial system relied on the development of a small village and a little bit of accumulation before it reached the point of today and became the most complete country in the global industrial system.

Many foreign technologies have not dared to look at Chinese researchers until now. Because some technologies are being looked at, they are really pregnant. Maybe when, those technologies will have a ‘son’ in China.

However, Chen Mo did not care about this.

"The hangar is good."

At the door of the hangar, Yang Lan has been observing the situation inside the hangar, and vaguely sees all kinds of mechanical equipment, which seems to be good.

"Just built, I feel a little small, but also ready to expand." Chen Mo said.

Upon hearing this, the expert academicians on the field rolled their eyes.

Not to mention Yang Wei.

He has seen all the domestic aircraft production lines.

This hangar, even if placed in their official research base, is not small. I am afraid that only the production line of the bombing 20 and civilian passenger aircraft can match this hangar.

Also preparing to expand, how big is this to build?

"Please come with me, please."

Chen Mo made a gesture of asking, and took the lead in entering the hangar.

hiss……

Looking at the environment inside the hangar, the sound of air-conditioning in the expert team is faintly audible.

It seems that in addition to the big points, the other ones don’t show up in the mountains. When they come in, they know that there is no hole in the sky.

advanced.

This is their first impression of the workshop.

Too much more advanced than they think.

Fully automated production lines, ubiquitous robots, working in an orderly manner, feel like entering the robot kingdom. There are human technicians next to them, but at best, they are just assistants, more like learning technology, helping robots do some of the necessary work.

It is no wonder that the production and R&D speed of the marching ant group is so horrible. The efficiency of these robots is several times or even ten times faster than the manual, and it is not normal to be unhappy.

Every expert sees this intelligent hangar, which is squinting, incredible, and project hatred.

The only corner of the ice that is revealed is far beyond the top production levels in the country.

If they can, they can't wait to move all the equipment here back to their research base.

Li Chengzhi was also shocked.

He knew Chen Mo for so long, and the first floor of the marching ant headquarters went in and visited once, but he saw few things and didn't understand the concept of technology.

This is the first time he saw Chen Mo's production technology.

Fully intelligent and fully mechanized.

Chen Mo has applied smart technology and robots to the extreme.

Experts and academicians within the team, they have seen the big world, but entered the production hangar of Chen Mo, I feel that Liu Yu entered the Grand View Garden.

The advanced technology in their minds is not worth mentioning in front of these technologies.

"Chen Chen, can I see this?"

An expert stopped and looked at the parts of the robot being assembled next to him, and his eyes were a little hot.

He is the designer of precision machinery, and the purpose of this trip is to look at the production machinery of the marching ant group, hoping to learn some techniques.

"can."

With the permission of Chen Mo, the robot handed a part to the forest.

“What's the matter?” asked an expert next to him.

"This is an ultra-precision machining technique." Lin carefully took the parts of the ellipsoid and cried, almost excited to cry.

I saw that he gently stroked the sleek ball into the mirror, and then gently touched it, the ellipsoid, which looks like a whole, is divided into three parts of different shapes.

Ultra-precision machining technology is the most dazzling and core technology in the industrial system.

This technology is suitable for processing nuclear fusion mirrors, tactical missiles and manned spacecraft parts in cutting-edge technologies such as nuclear power, large scale integrated circuits, lasers and aerospace.

The precision of ultra-precision machining technology is up to 10 nanometers, indicating a roughness of up to 1 nanometer.

The national research institute, which spent countless efforts and resources, barely mastered the technology, but it was technically difficult and costly. Every part produced was very expensive, and almost a part was quite a BMW.

These parts are mainly used for military, aerospace and nuclear energy, and the general field is not daring to use.

This is the basic technology necessary for cutting-edge technology.

Now they see this part in one of the most common robots in the hangar.

“Is there a machine tool here? Can you take me to see it?” Lin Xi looked at Chen Mo with some hope.

"There is a constant temperature room in the ground. Wait a minute to let the robot take you there," Chen said.

All the basic technologies are the technologies that he has developed from the technology library. The accumulation and development of these years, the current marching ant group has the most sophisticated and complete basic technology.

"This part is for you, when it is a memorial." Chen Mo said.

In the eyes of ordinary people, this is a more technical part, but for avid engineers, this part is the highest level of art.

"Thank you." Lin was unceremoniously taking the parts and carefully taking them.

Along the way, several engineers have discovered the cutting-edge technology products in their field, and they are always ecstatic.

In the end, the team of experts slowly calmed down, the heart was not good, there were too many cutting-edge technologies, they were already numb, they became accustomed to it, and they saw incredible things, and they did not start to lose their minds.

"This is an aerospace plane under construction."

Soon, the group entered the workshop being assembled.

The workshop is large, but the huge hollow plane skeleton in the center attracts everyone's attention.

"Unbelievable."

Someone at the scene, including Li Chengzhi who was forced from the beginning, widened his eyes and looked at the skeleton of the aircraft being assembled in front of him. The eyeballs almost fell.

I can't imagine the sight I saw.

chapters.title: Chapter 582: : Subversion Of Cognition
chapters.body:
Chapter 582: : Subversion Of Cognition

"God, what is this engine?"

"What material is that?"

“How was that part made? The current lathe is not perfect for processing such complex hollow parts.”

"Looks like a bomber."

All the experts on the field are crazy, looking for technology in their respective fields. If it is not enough restraint, I am afraid that it has already passed.

In front of this behemoth, which is being produced, it combines the best technology here, and it is the most advanced art.

A lot of things are beyond their existing knowledge.

The people present were the top experts in their respective fields. For the first time, they had the feeling that they would hate less when they used them. Many technologies, even they themselves did not know how to use their own knowledge to answer. .

One of Li Cheng’s faces stood violently, completely a layman.

He can only watch the excitement while watching the doorway.

The experts on the field were so excited that they were blushing and thick neck. After a while, they realized that they were out of order and slowly quieted down. They looked at Chen Mo and hoped to get an answer from Chen Mokou.

"This is the aerospace plane I designed." Chen Mo faintly said: "It's the engine, the ion engine."

Chen Mo language is not surprisingly endless.

"what?"

On the court, everyone exclaimed, and the blinds were torn.

The team of experts is completely out of order, and no matter how much the image is, they are all blushing and thick.

"Impossible, impossible, the world's top ion thruster, the maximum thrust is not a cow, it is impossible to have such a large thrust ion thruster, can promote a tens of tons of aircraft."

An engine expert shook his head desperately, feeling a little excited and couldn't believe what he had heard.

He felt that the knowledge system he had learned was completely collapsed.

Everything in front of him, subverting his cognition, forced him to accept another new system of knowledge.

Chen Mo laughed and said nothing. At this time, he explained that it was useless. Only he accepted it, he could truly agree.

When the aerospace plane comes out, the technology such as the ion engine can't hold back. The outside world must have an acceptance process, and more and more technologies will be announced later.

“Is there any experimental data and videos?” An engine design engineer looked at Chen Mo with some eagerness: “Can you give me a copy?”

Although he does not believe Chen Mo said, even if the thrust of this ion engine is only enough for dozens of cattle, it will be an inter-generational technology that can accelerate the pace of human interstellar exploration.

"Go back to you." Chen Mohao said.

Experimental test data and video, he has, without the technical foundation of the ion engine related accumulation, anyone who gets the data, will be like a freehand Han, met a golden mountain in the desert, can only look at the drooling.

Even if they are given technical research to them, there is no decade, and it is impossible to digest relevant knowledge and develop mature ion engine technology.

"The next step is to take a look at the planes that will be flying."

Chen Mo led the crowd and left the workshop. Many experts reluctantly looked at everything here, hated not much to understand, and finally could only follow.

Not long after, everyone stopped outside a huge warehouse.

I saw the door of the Treasury rise slowly, and the huge figure of the goddess slowly appeared in their field of vision.

hiss……

All the members of the aircraft design team on the field, Qi Qi poured the breath, and was shocked again.

The skeleton I just saw is just a prototype. Now they see the complete plane, just in front of them.

The perfect design, soft and smooth body lines, like a magical artwork. This is the beautiful plane they have seen, even if some of them have designed the bomb 20, they feel far less than this plane.

At this point they all have an urge to cry.

Exciting.

"Can you let us go in and see the plane?" Yang Lan's voice was a little trembling, and there was some urgency.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

This promise, the entire team of experts, would like to see children who like toys, ran to the ground, the speed is comparable to a hundred meters race, faster than rabbits.

Chen Mo later saw this scene, and his mouth was straight.

This is completely without the appearance of a researcher, more like an athlete.

Chen Mo is afraid that this group of people will fall, and if something falls, it is a loss.

Li Chengzhi, who has no sense of existence throughout the whole process, is also squinting and unbelievable.

Among the researchers he knows, each of them is usually a gentle, wise and intelligent intellectual, and there is no such image at all. Many academicians, experts, and images built in his heart collapsed at this moment.

The first time I saw them there was such a side, subverting imagination.

"Let's go."

Chen Mo smiled and called Li Chengzhi to go.

He can understand the mood of these experts.

These researchers, each of whom is a research madman, have a place in today.

At this time, they saw these top-notch technologies, just like the women who saw the most gorgeous jewels, and it was taken for granted that they showed unimaginative fanaticism.

The cabin was not opened, and a lot of researchers were unable to enter the plane. They could only observe the body around the plane.

Several experts gathered around and looked at the large ion engine on the belly of the plane in an attempt to find clues about the engine technology.

While looking at it, I use the knowledge they have learned to prove whether this ion engine is as powerful as Chen Mo said.

A bunch of formulas, a group of people still messed up in their minds.

Li Chengzhi heard the contents of their argument and turned his eyes directly.

He speaks Chinese, he knows every word, but one word is connected, and no one can understand it.

There are also several materials experts who are studying the materials of the aircraft.

From the wheels of the aircraft, to the outer casing, to the painting of the outer casing, etc., I wish to bring the above various materials back to my own research institute, but unfortunately can not move, can only see.

Every researcher has an excited flush on his face.

Such close-knit technology has benefited so closely.

Even if they can't get the technology they need directly, they have a direction. After a period of research, I believe that in their lifetime, they can raise their field to a new level.

"This side."

Chen Mo walked under a hatch on the belly of the plane.

I saw the door of the abdomen slowly descending, and the cabin inside the plane appeared in front of everyone.

The layout of the interior of the aircraft is clear at a glance.

Sorting out the excitement, many experts are very urgent, but still enter the cabin in an orderly manner, the action is a little careful, for fear of encountering the surrounding arrangement.

"This aircraft can be converted into a sixth-generation strategic bomber." Yang Lan was so excited that his voice was shaking.

Strategic bombers are one of the country's highest strategic deterrents.

When the military parade appeared, the stealth strategic bomber appeared, and it shocked the world. Although it was attracted by the rare equipment of war robots, strategic bombers are the most terrifying strategic weapon for the national government.

The air-to-one strategic bomber is the main carrier of the next generation of nuclear deterrent, and is the next major task of the bomber design team.

The plane in front of us meets all the conditions of their needs.

“Is this aircraft capable of carrying multiple things?” Huaxing, the chief engineer of the Lingxiao project, was excited.

"The maximum takeoff weight is expected to be around 230 tons." Chen Mo said.

"Can it go to the moon?"

Zhang Jianfeng, the chief designer of the next project, also spoke, looking at Chen Mo with a burning look.

"After the test flight is successful, I will prepare for the moon landing. Technically, it is possible to go to the moon." Chen Mo said.

"Ha ha ha..."

Zhang Jianfeng, who is not confused, is as happy as a big child and laughs wildly.

He saw the hope of their successful landing on the moon.

"Academician Chen, what is the energy of the aircraft? How can you not see the fuel tank of the aircraft?" The voice of a space engine expert doubts, let everyone stunned, and looked at Chen Mo.

"follow me."

Chen Mo is not surprised by this issue. With the ink girl, she walked over to the central control cabin.

A team of experts hurried to open a path, followed by him in an orderly manner.

chapters.title: Chapter 583: : This Question Is Super-Oriented
chapters.body:
Chapter 583: : This Question Is Super-Oriented

The central control cabin, which is not too big, accommodates nearly 20 people and is slightly crowded. Even so, everyone still doesn't feel small here.

As a spacecraft, there is only one of the six main cabins, which is already very large.

The control cabin is a platform at the entrance.

The platform has an obvious mechanical structure, it seems that there is something hidden inside, and there are various kinds of indicator lights, about one meter five in diameter, up to the waist, embedded in the ground. Next to it is a console that can be judged from the button's partition and text mark, which is the button that controls which compartment.

Everyone else found a relatively convenient location, curiously watching Chen Mo go.

"This is the energy of the aircraft."

Chen Moo presses a button to enter fingerprint and password information.

For a moment, the bright silver metal cover at the top of the platform spreads like a turbofan, and a transparent glass cylinder with a small leg is slowly raised.

The ends of the glass column are fixed by complex mechanical structures, like the two poles of the battery, filled with transparent sapphire blue liquid, and in the middle of the liquid, everyone can see a goose egg-sized lavender polyhedral crystal, the crystal is thickened by the thumb The catheter is fixed, along with the ends, and looks like a battery.

And this 'battery' has a total of eight, arranged in a circle in the platform.

"This is the energy battery." Chen Mo said.

There is no need to conceal, some things, when the space plane and the ion engine appear, it is time to announce.

When the space plane was developed, he thought that these technologies would be presented to others.

"impossible."

Several experts almost lost their voices at the same time.

So many egg-sized crystals can power this huge aircraft?

impossible.

The existence of such things is beyond the scope of their current knowledge.

If Chen Mo said that small nuclear fusion reactors provide energy, their response may not be that big. Because Chen Mo has studied successful controlled nuclear fusion and made the controlled nuclear fusion reactor miniaturized, it is technically feasible.

Now Chen Mo told them that this crystal with a large fist is an energy source for ion engines.

It sounds too exaggerated and incredible.

"Chen Chen, isn't this a joke?" Yang Lan obviously did not believe.

It’s not that he suspects Chen Mo, but it’s too unbelievable to completely subvert their perception.

This kind of thing is currently only in the film, not even theory.

“It’s really amazing.” Chen Mo’s eyes on the people’s doubts don’t care: “But it’s true that these 'batteries’ are the energy of the aircraft.”

"Insane crazy."

When I heard Chen Mo's words, several experts could not accept it.

Here today, they refreshed the world view. Whether it's an ion engine or any other technology, it's something that shouldn't be happening now.

He is skeptical, Chen Mo is crazy, or he is dreaming.

If there is such an energy source, what will the world look like? Human development will accelerate for decades.

"This is a new element of elemental crystals that has been modified by high energy. It has specificity. Under the irradiation of strong light, it can radiate high-energy beta particles. The particles of radiation increase with the increase of light intensity, so it can be used for controlled Power generation."

new element?

With this explanation, everyone on the field is silent.

The new element means that the current knowledge is an unknown blank.

No one thinks that their current periodic table contains all the elements of the universe. The universe is so big, there are too many unknown substances. They don't even know one percent of them. There is a special element, which is not unusual.

The people on the field are all scientific researchers, and the acceptance of new things is very fast. Chen Mo’s explanation makes everyone’s excitement slow, but it is still full of doubts and unbelievable.

“Can this substance replace controlled fusion as an energy source?”

"No."

Chen Mo shook his head.

"As far as the current laws of physical cognition are concerned, energy is conserved. This crystallization is modified, and the internal atoms are in the critical state of excitation. The high-energy particles can be radiated under strong light stimulation because it absorbs a lot of energy in the transformation. Strong light is only used as a catalyst.

We can imagine this new element as an energy storage material, which only releases the absorbed energy. When the energy is released, it loses its function and becomes a waste battery.

There is also a limitation. The elemental crystals of this element are not too large in volume, and the energy they can absorb is also limited. Once the energy is overloaded, it is discarded. ”

Chen Mo simply introduced the characteristics of this new element to everyone. In order to study these elements, the company's electricity bill was hundreds of millions of dollars per month, but Zhao Min saw the data and saw that he said he was abnormal.

These few crystals, or he went to Science Island, using the controlled nuclear fusion star to generate electricity, the cost is not so terrible.

The experts on the field face each other, including the materials experts. Material experts have been exposed to a lot of magical materials, but this element is superb in his cognitive knowledge.

Although everyone has doubts, they still suspect that Chen Mo has a fake, but because of Chen Mo’s authority, they can only temporarily put doubts in their hearts. Because Chen Mo’s research technology has too many things super-level, they don’t understand, and it doesn’t mean that Chen Mo doesn’t understand.

The new elements are unknown to any of them.

Seeing everyone silent, Chen Mo turned his head and closed the platform of the energy battery to restore the appearance at the beginning.

Without his password and instructions, no one can get the battery unless the plane is removed.

“How do you use beta particles to convert electricity into electricity?”

“This reactor has a thermoelectric conversion system made of a new material that absorbs the beta particles and heat and converts it into electricity.”

Chen Mo patted the control platform.

"In theory, it can absorb all the high-energy electrons radiated by radioactive elements. But the radiation of radioactive elements is uncontrollable and fixed. The difference is that the high-energy electrons of this new element of elemental crystal radiation can be controlled by laser catalysis. ”

hiss……

It is also something that is not in their knowledge reserves.

This question is superb.

Especially the material experts, watching Chen Mo at this time is more eager than watching Miss World champion. If he can, he doesn't mind talking to Chen Mo, and students can do it.

After visiting the air plane, a group of people came out from the inside and was still in a state of paralysis. The shock has not faded.

Chen Mo knew all about them. After a lap, they accepted too many new information and new technologies, and they were all new knowledge points.

The value of this aircraft is not to mention, the new element of the battery is already invaluable. There are also reactors that use high-energy electrons to generate electricity, ion engines, and many other unknown technologies and materials.

Experts on the field have the feeling of living a lifetime for a lifetime.

A random technique is something that they can't imagine for a lifetime.

This is not an airplane, it is a technical treasure house.

The value of all the technologies they studied was less than the value of a technology that was included in the aircraft.

There is only one last question left.

Can this plane fly?

If you can fly, it proves that all the techniques Chen Mo said are true and feasible.

The random release of a technology inside can cause a 10-magnitude earthquake in the technology circle. If all the technology of the aircraft is exposed, isn’t Mars hitting the Earth?

After all the members left the space plane, they looked at Chen Mo.

They are eager to watch the plane test flight, but they are the team that was sent to observe. It is a guest. What to do next is what Chen Mo said, not what they want to see.

"Next, prepare to test flight." Chen Mo said to the ink girl around.

Today's mission, originally a test flight, this expert team, just came to visit, now the weather outside is good, is a good time to test flight.

chapters.title: Chapter 584: : Flight Test
chapters.body:
Chapter 584: : Flight Test

The door of the hangar slowly rises, and the gantry gates of the hundred meters wide are all revealed. Chen Mo and others are outside the door, and they can see the true meaning of the ‘Goddess’ in the hangar.

The gate opens and several robots line up into the cabin.

Chen Mo does not need a test pilot to fly, choose to use the robot.

This aircraft, unlike a conventional aircraft, does not have to be very skilled to fly, but must be very familiar with the aircraft.

The robot stores all the instructions for use of the aircraft. If there are any problems, they can be discovered and manipulated at the first time.

"Fortunately, catch up."

When the plane was out of the warehouse, Zhao Min just came over.

At this important moment, how could she be less than the president of her marching ant group.

Come with her, and Yao Yi. Yao Yi and Li Chengzhi sneered a few words, simply greeted the expert team on the field, did not continue to talk, but looked at the hangar.

Because everyone's attention is in the hangar.

A behemoth.

When I saw the true face of the plane, Yao Yi jumped and jumped.

I don't know if it was the bomber of the country.

Chen Mo's handwriting is not that big.

"Go to the command center."

After the plane left the hangar, Chen Mo led several people to the command center of the space center.

......

"oH, God, what is this ghost thing?" The Pentagon, Jerry Stern looked at the picture from the satellite, couldn't help but exclaim, it was night, and only a little sleepiness vanished.

The screams alarmed the other personnel in the spy satellite control room, and the people who did not have emergency work in their hands were all surrounded.

In the screen, it is the airport of the Ant Ant Space Center, and the plane that just came out of the warehouse.

“How big is it?”

Wayne is a senior official in the spy satellite control room. He couldn't help but see the plane.

"It’s bigger than B2." A technician next to him said, "There is no information about this aircraft in our current intelligence database."

"It's not like there is no technical information about the marching ant group," Wayne said with a black face.

This is the marching ant group is a space center. Since the construction of this space center, they have been monitored by spy satellites, hoping to collect some useful information.

The space center is in the hands of the infrastructure madman, building speed, a day.

I didn't expect that it was not long before the plane came out.

They don't have any information about this aircraft.

"Is it another stealth bomber in China?" Jerryston guessed.

In the last Chinese National Day military parade, the three equipments were the most eye-catching, anti-stealth radar, war robots and stealth bombers.

It didn't take long before this time, and there was another huge thing.

From the satellite imagery, the plane is not small, and looking at the design, it is special.

"That is the space center of the marching ant group. It should be the aircraft made by Chen Mo. It is still unknown whether the bomber made for the Chinese military." Wayne is also somewhat uncertain.

That perverted company, controlled nuclear fusion can be developed, and smart robots, like toys, don't make people feel strange.

"To sort out this information, we need to report it to the staff and the White House."

Wayne is not in a good mood.

Huaxia is their biggest opponent. It has become more and more powerful. It is not a good thing for them to have such a horrible plane.

It is not only the people of the US Department of Defense who saw this plane.

Some countries that are concerned about the marching ant group have also received news.

The Island Defense Ministry, the intelligence room personnel responsible for manipulating the spy satellites, also saw the giants on the flying ant space airport through satellite images.

The marching ant group is the Chinese enterprise that they are most concerned about, especially after the war robots come out.

After the space center came out, they all collected intelligence through satellites. I did not expect that such a huge thing suddenly appeared today.

"Analysis is out, the wingspan is about 75 meters, the length is about 35 meters, and the height is unknown. This is an image of the aircraft simulated by three-dimensional composition based on satellite imagery. The design of the abdomen is unknown and is probably simulated."

The technicians quickly simulated the image of the aircraft through a computer, only the approximate appearance, the details are not clear.

But the abdomen of the airplane they simulated was too different from the original one, and even the model was not.

“Will it be a new strategic bomber developed by the marching ant group to help the Chinese military?” a thin and weak official guessed.

"No one can be sure, let's notice it." The leading official said with a black face.

It is not uncommon for the workers in the marching ant group to defend their ants, to sell war robots to the Chinese military, and to sell other equipment.

But there is no exact news, they are just guessing.

At the same time, Russian intelligence agencies also received intelligence and quickly seized spy satellites passing over China, targeting the airport of the Fei Ant Space Center.

The world's top intelligence agency, the military, is concerned about the mysterious aircraft at the space center airport.

No one thinks this is a joke because it is the space center of the marching ant group.

"let's start."

In the command center, Chen Mo screen, clearly see the plane at the airport.

"Try to take off vertically."

With the instructions of Chen Mo, the engine of the aircraft has started.

Under the plane, there has been a huge wind that has spread across the square.

"The propulsion system has started."

There is no problem with the various data displayed on the console of the command center.

As the power continues to increase, everyone in the command center can clearly see through the glass windows that the aircraft has left the ground three meters, suspended in it, and is still rising slowly.

"Really."

Several engine experts squinted and couldn't believe what was happening in front of them.

They were amazed at Chen Mo's ion engine, but they didn't believe it could drive dozens of tons of aircraft.

But the truth is in front of you.

The technology that Chen Mo said is all true.

The tens of tons of aircraft took off vertically, and this scene was seen in the sound years, which made the experts on the field excited.

“The propulsion system is normal,” said the ink girl.

"Try to land vertically."

Chen Mo looked at the data on the computer screen, as well as the scene of the aircraft, and issued several instructions.

With several attempts, it is not a big problem to determine the vertical takeoff and landing.

"lifting height, 100 meters."

Chen Mo continued to test the aircraft according to his ideas.

The plane, which was still suspended at about 5 meters, climbed steadily and, in less than 20 seconds, has been lifted to a position of 100 meters, like a squid suspended in the air.

"Vertical takeoff and landing, this is vertical takeoff and landing."

In the intelligence room of the Pentagon’s spy satellite, the lights were bright and a group of people had become a mess.

China's ability to make such a large aircraft in the past, they are not accidental, but vertical take-off and landing, dozens of tons of aircraft are vertically taking off and landing under their satellite surveillance.

What a terrible technique is it that allows such a large aircraft to take off and land vertically?

A group of defense intelligence personnel was scared.

"What the hell, what monsters did the marching ant group develop?"

"Damn marching ants."

Wayne saw that the behemoth was able to rise vertically and was scared.

This is very important information. China has mastered a terrible engine technology, allowing dozens of tons of aircraft to take off and land vertically.

Intelligence agencies in other countries, through the spy satellites, saw the plane take off and land vertically, and they all stunned a underground bus.

Dozens of tons of aircraft can take off and land vertically, and what is the terrible level of the technology of the marching ant group?

When everyone was shocked, Chen Mo also issued new instructions to the plane.

"Now lift the navigation test."

Air hovering and take-off and landing are all right, followed by high-altitude navigation and space testing.

As Chen Mo's instructions went on, the engine at the rear of the aircraft also increased its power and accelerated to the sky until it became a small black spot in the eyes of everyone.

"Height 5 km."

"The propulsion system is normal."

"The power system is normal."

"..."

There was no problem during the take-off phase, and the experts on the field were secretly relieved, but they were still worried.

The plane is equipped with countless high-tech technologies that transcend the times. If the plane falls, how big is the loss? And they also feel the high tech on the plane.

Unconsciously, they took this test flight as an experiment in which they participated.

“The height is 13 kilometers, the external temperature is minus 61 degrees Celsius, and the data is normal.”

In the command center, the prompts of various artificial intelligences are echoing, and many experts are watching the computer screen, and the atmosphere does not breathe.

Chen Mo is standing on the sidelines, and if he looks thoughtfully at the screen in front of him, he is not in a hurry.

“The height is 16 kilometers, the external temperature is minus 73 degrees Celsius, and it is about to enter the stratosphere. The data is normal.”

Enter the stratosphere and let the experts on the field show a smile.

Yang Hao’s tightly clenched hand was loose.

Between the top of the troposphere and the stratosphere, it is the most suitable height for aircraft flight. It has a clear sky and high visibility. The clouds are below, and the weather has little effect on this height.

"Height 20 kilometers."

"Height 30 km..."

"..."

Everyone expects that the feedback data has broken through the troposphere and entered the stratosphere. The people who were already stunned again began to get nervous.

This is the first test, it is so high, and the altitude is still rising. Is this trying to challenge space?

Time passes by, the height is constantly refreshing, there is no data anomaly, and for the people on the field, there is no prompt exception, which is the best news.

As the aircraft returned the data, the altitude has not stopped rising.

The space expert Huaxing could not sit still.

"Academician Chen, this height has reached the top of the stratosphere, and they are entering the middle layer. The first test, with this result, is already perfect. Waiting for the next preparation, and then breaking through to a higher area?"

"No." Chen Mo shook his head: "This is an aerospace plane, this height is the test."

His armor can fly to the stratosphere, the goddess challenges this height, there is no technical problem, there is no problem.

This is an aerospace plane, this height is just beginning.

“The height is 55 kilometers, it has entered the middle layer, the external temperature is minus 83 degrees Celsius, the propulsion system is normal, and the air pressure in the cabin is normal.”

This time everyone is not calm.

The first test flight, into the middle layer, continue, to the top of the middle layer, then the goddess belongs to the spacecraft category.

Spacecraft category.

It means that the goddess is a real space plane, a spacecraft that can enter space.

“The height is 65 kilometers, the external temperature is minus 86 degrees Celsius, and the data is normal.”

At this point, the position shows that the goddess has reached the Pacific Ocean.

At this time, the experts on the field were numb.

When the plane first flew, it dared to go to the middle layer of 60 kilometers. Chen Mo’s courage was not that big.

Several experts stopped talking and finally gave up dissuasion.

This is the aircraft of the marching ant group. In theory, they have nothing to do with them. They are only guests, they come to visit, and it is not good to disturb the work of the developers.

Chen Mo’s understanding of the aircraft is definitely more comprehensive than them.

"The height of 80 kilometers has reached the top of the middle layer, the external temperature is minus 90 degrees Celsius, the cabin temperature is 25 degrees Celsius, the temperature control system is normal; the air pressure is 101.3KPa, the air pressure is normal, and the environmental control and life support system are normal;

The power supply and distribution system are normal; the measurement and control and communication system are normal; the propulsion system is normal; the mechanical arm system is normal; the occupant system is normal; the instrument and lighting system are normal; and the data management is normal. ”

As the aircraft entered the top of the middle layer, experts on the field were shocked.

At an altitude of 80 kilometers, it means that the goddess is already a spacecraft that does not rely on the atmosphere. Chen Mo said that this is an aerospace plane, and the first test flight was successfully implemented.

"Okay, this test flight is here, returning." Chen Mo directly gave an order.
