chapters.title: Chapter 585: : 24 Billion (Free
chapters.body:
Chapter 585: : 24 Billion (Free

(PS: Yesterday, the computer card was clicked. The update did not show that the release was successful. I refreshed the page and re-published it. After two minutes, I found the duplicate chapter. The updated chapter could not be deleted. Sorry, so I compensate you for the two chapters free chapter. I have a debt, I dare not come out to see the book friends (捂脸). I am sorry.)

call……

Chen Mo gave instructions to return to the air. The people on the field gave a breath and spit it out all at once. For a time, the voice in the command post was particularly obvious.

Several experts smiled together.

This test flight is a matter of Chen Mo and the marching ant group. How are they now more nervous than Chen Mo?

The shock and surprise brought by today is more than half a lifetime.

"How is the situation now?" Zhao Min went to Chen Mo to ask.

"Not successful, 80 kilometers is the beginning, entering the hot layer and the escape layer, it is considered a success, it is an aerospace plane, the field is in space." Chen Mo said.

"When is the next flight test?"

"Come back to check the plane, no problem, it will take another two days to start the next test." Chen Mo took a look at the data on the computer.

This time is also conservative.

After all, he was the first test flight, and space was a strange field for him.

This time, it is a footstep. The next time you have prepared enough, you will be able to enter the space field. This is the field that human beings dream of.

The plane returned to the hangar, and a group of experts, could not wait to enter the warehouse, see the goddess is intact, excited.

Especially the engineers of the aircraft design team almost didn't want to take the plane home.

The aerospace plane, this aircraft, can be used in place of spacecraft and launch vehicles, and its value can be imagined.

The maintenance cost of the space shuttle is too high and there are many accidents. Therefore, when the aerospace development started in China, there was no research and development of the space shuttle, but a rocket with better cost performance.

Once NASA had a space shuttle, because of the cost of maintenance and the number of accidents in the space shuttle, in 11 years, Atlantis announced its retirement after the last flight, and the two remaining space shuttles also withdrew from the historical stage. Instead of continuing to develop the space shuttle, NASA chose a more cost-effective launch vehicle instead.

The country is preparing to develop the sixth-generation space plane for military strategic use and aerospace use, but it is still in the stage of drawing demonstration.

Ion engines, new element energy batteries, maintenance costs will be greatly reduced, and ion engines can sail in space, which is almost the perfect aerospace aircraft incarnation.

In this space plane, several core technologies are leading the world's technology for hundreds of years.

So many expert academicians are thicker and less eager to ask Chen Mo about technical theory.

"This is the flight data."

A robot plane came down and handed a slap-up hard drive to Chen Mo.

Inside is the data for this test flight.

After receiving the hard drive, Chen Mo handed it to the ink girl.

"Comrade Chen Mo." When many experts circled around the plane, Li Chengzhi came over and smiled into a chrysanthemum on his face.

Even Chen Mo saw this appearance and couldn't help but smile.

"Let's talk, I took Yao Shuji to visit." Zhao Min saw Li Chengzhi's appearance, and also knew his next words, she was not convenient to listen to, and she walked away from Chen Mo and left the space for two people.

"What is it? Brother."

"Can you tell me, how long does the energy battery of this aircraft support the aircraft?" Li Chengzhi's hand, a sly and polite smile.

"One month." Chen Mo said a rough figure.

"Is it possible to talk about the crystallization of the battery, what kind of material is used for transformation." Li Chengzhi whispered and looked forward.

"What are you asking?"

"Strategic materials, knowing what materials they use to transform, we can now collect resources, not be known by other countries, and when the substance is discovered by others, resources are in our hands."

Chen Mo’s mouth twitched, and he did not expect Li Chengzhi to ask this. This guy looks like three big five, and his heart is quite thin.

Knowing that the materials for the manufacture of element 1024 can be used to collect a large amount of relevant resources on a global scale, and later, when the substance is discovered by other countries, they will take the lead.

"In fact, the academician told me to let me ask." Li Chengzhi pointed to the material experts in the team.

Chen is silent.

The experts on the field naturally know the value of these technologies and tell Li Chengzhi that there is no accident.

"No. 49 element, indium." Chen Mo did not hide.

This kind of thing that makes the country earn the first opportunity sounds very reliable. It is better than being discovered later and then being taken over by other countries.

He has already acquired enough indium, and there is no shortage in a short time. Even if the above hoarding, let its price rise, he does not have to worry.

“Thank you.” Li Chengzhi solemnly thanked him and said: “There is one last question.”

"Well, talk about it." Chen Mo is not anxious.

Li Chengzhi's problems are not many, it is strange, this guy is very smart.

"It's a business thing, can't this kind of aircraft sell?" Li Chengzhi pointed his finger at the **** girl next to him.

"You want to buy this plane? Can you be the master?" Chen Mo asked.

The price of this plane, without the highest level of people, it is impossible to finalize the order, Chen Mo does not believe that Li Chengzhi got the above consent so quickly.

"No, just ask you first, go back and report. If I wait for the order, I will move, I will not go to today's position. I am sure, as long as you are willing to sell, we must buy, it is better to ask now. Ask your price." Li Chengzhi said.

This is what the Academician Yang Lan asked him to ask. He only said that the technical content is more than 100 years old than the existing technology. It is invaluable. No matter how much money, you have to buy one or buy related technology.

Li Chengzhi naturally understands the weight of Yang Lan’s words. As long as the experts on the field jointly propose, they will definitely buy it.

"Sell, definitely sell, the products produced by the company are used to make money. If you don't sell, you still have to catch the flies." Chen Mo did not even think about it and promised: "But the price..."

"Price, you said, anyway, I just want to know an answer first. It is not a negotiator for the time being. If we are not satisfied with the price, we will definitely talk later."

Hearing Chen Mo said, Li Chengzhi laughed into a sunflower.

This matter is fixed, maybe two years later, he can pick up Venus on his shoulder.

"24 billion one."

"..."

Li Chengzhi’s smile froze, and his face slammed a few times, for a long time without words.

24 billion.

This price, said that there is no fluctuation, I do not know that it is said to be 240.

If you don't know Chen Mo, he must have thought that this is a big profiteer. It is not so expensive to build pure gold.

"Well, I will go back and report, the other is not what I can decide. If there is a reply, I will come to you." Li Chengzhi took a long time and finally took a word.

"Wait for your good news." Chen Mo smiled.

The above will definitely buy, the value of any technology inside is incalculable.

Moreover, the cost of this aircraft is not low.

The official buy back, used to imitate the accumulation of related technologies, research and development, its value is more than 24 billion, the above is absolutely powerful.

"At this point in time, it’s almost time to eat." Chen Mo glanced at the team of experts who were still groping on the plane, indicating that Li Chengzhi had called them in the past.

A group of people around the plane, like reluctant to leave around the world, if you don't call them, you won't want to leave until tomorrow.

chapters.title: Chapter 586: : Intentional Disclosure (Free
chapters.body:
Chapter 586: : Intentional Disclosure (Free

The news of the mysterious aircraft test flight at the Ant Ant Space Center was exposed.

The next day, in the report of foreign media, the news about the mysterious plane appeared in the Feixiang Space Center.

On the domestic network, photos and videos of some mysterious planes were also taken, which were taken by tourists and ordinary people in Binhai City while playing in the suburbs near the space center.

The unique body, the sci-fi shape, let the goddess fire on the network.

"There was a rumor that Chen Mo was rumored some time ago, but Chen Mo is developing this kind of country. It is ironic. Who has the news of the rumors and the smugglers who have been accused in court? It makes me cool."

"What is the name of this aircraft? According to the name of the marching ant group, it should be called a flying ant or a ant."

"Chen Mo has looked up at the starry sky."

"I hope that the marching ant group is getting stronger and stronger, and the motherland is getting better and better."

People who are concerned about the news know that the marching ant group has developed the aircraft, but the news about the aircraft is limited to a few pictures and outside guesses. No one knows the true performance of the aircraft.

"The action is quite fast." Chen Mo also saw reports about the mysterious plane.

“It feels like someone is using journalists and news attention to set our response in order to get useful information and intelligence,” said Zhao Min.

The news began to be exposed from foreign media, which attracted a big sensation in the international arena, and nowadays domestic attention, a bunch of reporters came to the door. If they respond to this question, they will more or less disclose information about the aircraft.

"I think so too." Chen Mo agreed.

The ink girl told him last night that they were flying. Seen by spy satellites in many countries.

Although he did not intend to conceal the outside world, the speed was a bit too fast, and it was too late for the other party to know about the aircraft.

"What are you going to do now?"

"Publishing out, anyway, it is not a project that can't be seen, it scares them, and let the media help us publicize. Are your business plans ready?" Chen Mo said.

"You can announce it at any time," said Zhao Min.

"That line, you let the robot send the file to me."

Chen Mo closed the holographic video call with Zhao Min and turned to look at the ink girl.

"Ink girl, what newspaper reporters want to interview me?"

"Yes, there are a few appointments for a long time."

Feng Qingrui and two assistants looked up at the headquarters of the army ants, and they were filled with emotion and excitement.

She did not expect that Chen Mo actually promised her interview, just like the pie in the sky, she still has some unreal feelings.

It is understood that Chen Mo has not received many interviews. Only the World Wide Web and CCTV have had an exclusive interview with Chen Mo. Even the world's most famous Times Weekly has not received an exclusive interview with Chen Mo.

Unexpectedly, this appointment interview, Chen Mo actually agreed.

Today's marching ant group is intertwined and has a solid foundation, surpassing any company in history. Even if it has been targeted by the United States many times, it is still as stable as Mount Tai, showing that the strength is strong and how terrible it is.

The marching ants can be supported today by the man.

"You come with me, Merle is inside."

Upon reaching the top floor, the ink girl greeted Feng Qingrui and others at the elevator.

On the way, Feng Qingrui strangely peeked at the ink girl. This woman is very beautiful. No matter her figure or appearance, she is impeccable, and her name for Chen Mo is Meng Ge, not the boss.

Perhaps the relationship between the two is special, but this is not what she should care about.

Putting aside the thoughts, Feng Qingrui followed the ink girl into Chen Mo’s office.

The office is a bit big, the decoration is minimal, there is no antique painting like other big cymbals, but there are many high-tech things. The ornaments on the desk and coffee table are also small robots and some strange permanent toys with unique style. .

Seeing Chen Mo sitting in the office, Feng Qingrui showed a polite smile.

"Hello, Mr. Chen, I am Feng Qingrui."

"Hello, Miss Feng." Chen Mo and Feng Qingrui shook hands and shook hands with her two assistants: "Sit here."

A wall next to the office opens, a study is exposed, and Chen Mo's decorative style is different. There is a huge starry sky watercolor painting on the wall, and strange sketches of the plane. The decorations are still various robots and mechanical machinery. Decoration.

Arranged one by one, so that the green core is a bit secretly surprised.

The bookshelf is full of science and engineering books or science books, in addition to it, it is a biography of various physical world gods. These books are for her to see, it is estimated that one can not understand.

"Time is limited, let's get started."

"Okay, Mr. Chen."

Feng Qingrui hurriedly sat down, and the photographer who came with her quickly and skillfully put the camera rack well.

They all know that Chen Mo’s time is precious, and the time for interviewing them is only fifteen minutes.

"Mr. Chen, just some time ago, some documents were exposed on the wiki website. On the Internet, you and President Zhao, as well as the network rumors for the marching ant group, were planned by the intelligence department of a certain country. How did you look at it?"

Feng Qingrui straight into the theme.

Some time ago, the turmoil about the marching ant group was very loud. At that time, Chen Mo disappeared and there was no exposure at all.

Therefore, the outside world has always been very curious about Chen Mo’s thinking about this party.

"I also saw relevant news. The benevolent sees the wise and sees the wisdom, we have a clear conscience, and there are more rumors outside. It is also a loss. President Zhao and I said this, this is also a test paper for our company. Obviously, this Zhang exam paper, we get a good score."

“It was during that time that we were able to see a lot of cyber violence against your personal, family and company on the Internet. What were you doing at the time? Why didn’t you clarify at that time? How did you see the problem of cyber violence now?”

"Network violence has always existed, starting from our company, until now. When those things are big, I am still developing technology in the laboratory. For some cyber violence, I am not awake to sleep.

However, the current network environment is indeed much more complicated than before, and the cost of rumors is too low. This has led some people to use the virtual space of the Internet as an unscrupulous place to vent their dissatisfaction. ”

"That incident, that is, the fake photos that were exposed, did you bring any pressure and trouble?"

"No, those fake photos, I don't have to talk to Zhao Min, I know it at a glance. My wife recognized it at a glance, and there is no problem at all. My work is a bit busy and I have no time to bother."

"That is this morning, foreign media and netizens have exposed the news of the mysterious plane appearing in the Feifang Space Center. When those rumors occurred, you are in the research institute, are you studying about the plane? Can you tell me about it? A little bit of information and progress on the plane?"

Feng Qingrui is looking forward to it.

This is a big news, willing to disclose it, but also to see Chen Mo.

"You are right. During that time, I was studying the plane. At that time, it was the finishing stage. So you just asked me if I was troubled by those things. I said that there was no time to bother, because I was busy with the plane. Finish the work.

Regarding the progress of the aircraft, some netizens also took videos and photos, and the aircraft has entered the flight test stage. If there is no technical problem, it will be successful soon. ”

Chen Mo is not concealed and has no need to hide it.

Feng Qingrui did not expect Chen Mo to be so refreshed, answering her questions.

I thought this question, Chen Mo will take the past, did not expect Chen Mo to answer so seriously.

“Many netizens guessed based on photos and videos exposed on the Internet. It is not an airplane for civil aviation. What is the purpose of designing the aircraft? Is it not convenient to disclose some?”

Feng Qingrui is somewhat hesitant about this issue, for fear of asking any secret information.

If there is a problem, when you broadcast it, you can get rid of this problem.

"Nothing is inconvenient. This problem will be announced after the plane is successful. Since you asked, I also disclosed some information in advance here.

That plane was researched for my research. There is a space center, the target is space, and in the future it will be a tool I use for space exploration. The plane is positioned as an aerospace plane. ”

"hiss……"

Feng Qingrui was shocked. He did not expect this question and asked for a big news.

Or is Chen Mo deliberately revealing this news to her? This is not a question she is thinking about. Anyway, whether it is deliberate or not, this is a big news.

Before she continued to ask, Chen Mo went on.

"Of course, such a large space center, my research is also a moment, the rest of the time can not be empty. We are the company, maintaining such a space center, the need for huge financial support, the marching ant group is big, and it is impossible to raise a Light eat, big guy who doesn't work.

In fact, the construction of the space center began, and we have corresponding plans for the base. This aircraft was developed and is also within our planning. It is an aerospace plane that was developed successfully and it can enter space.

In the future, the Flying Ant Center will launch space tourism projects for ordinary people. In addition, we will accept the mission of commercial satellite launches, as well as space exploration, space experiments and so on. ”

It is another fierce.

Feng Qingrui feels that today's harvest is extremely rich.

This one message is released, and each one is sensational.

Sky plane!

Space travel!

It’s all big news.

In fifteen minutes, the time was a bit short, but the big news continued, making the whole process of Feng Qingrui shocked.

In the middle of the way, she also asked Chen Mo, there is no confidential information to be smashed, Chen Mo said no, she was only a little relieved, otherwise the video of the interview was released, it is a big thing.

Until leaving the headquarters of the marching ant group, Feng Qingrui became aware of the situation and withdrew from the shocking state.

"This big harvest," said the photographer next to him.

"Really, it is a bumper harvest." Feng Qingrui nodded in agreement: "Hurry and go back to the video of the interview."

On the other hand, Chen Mo also told the ink girl to inform another media, ready to accept the next interview.

PS: Again for the previous repeating chapter, I am sorry to everyone.

chapters.title: Chapter 587: : Has Entered The Outer Atmosphere
chapters.body:
Chapter 587: : Has Entered The Outer Atmosphere

The mysterious plane of the marching ant group is an aerospace plane.

The Future Marching Ant Group will launch space exploration and space tourism projects.

Chen Mo, who rarely received an exclusive interview with reporters, this time interviewed several reporters from world-renowned media, and the news that has been exposed has attracted countless attention.

The paradox of the craze was once again taken over by the marching ant group, and Chen Mo appeared personally, bringing public opinion to the highest point. At the beginning of the network, the impact of the ‘** incident’, this moment disappeared.

"Now, I have no culture, and I am going to walk in the world."

"This kind of courage is definitely not something that ordinary people can have. Chen Mo brings the world into the holographic era. Then, if he can bring the world into the interstellar era, he will see him."

"This plane is so handsome, I am willing to give Chen Mo a small three."

"Uncle after 90 sent a congratulatory message."

"The old aunt after 00 sent a congratulatory message."

"??"

The voice of the marching ant group on the Internet has become a one-sided cheer and appreciation.

The streets and alleys are all about the marching ant air planes, but everyone who sees them will have a sense of pride in their hearts.

NASA.

Jim's face was neat, and he looked at the screen in front of him. On the screen, it was their president, a standard blond hair, and a ruddy old man.

Chen Mo announced the news of the space plane, they have all received.

At present, the strength of China is already very scary. In space, the only space station currently known as the "Linghao" is Huaxia.

After the retiring of the International Space Station, Russia chose to join the China Lingang project. They and the EU, island countries, South Korea and other countries have been discussing the cooperation of the new space station.

The long-term wrangling and funds have made the space station unable to launch, and let Huaxia recover a lot. If the space ants of the marching ant group succeed, then it may be beyond their previous footsteps.

If China is surpassing them in space, the balance of the world game will be completely tilted toward China.

Obviously, the faction where the president is located is a little anxious.

Since taking office, they have suffered too many accidents in China, the clown virus has been raging, the strategy of the Syrian state has failed, the CIA and the Ministry of National Defense have been attacked by unknown hackers, the CIA’s top officials have crashed, and confidential information has been leaked.

These times were attacked by opposition parties.

The next election is coming, they must make better results in the only time, and the election will have more benefits for their party. Otherwise, they may lose in the general election and lose their dominance.

“The project of the space station, how is it now?”

"Mr. President, almost ready, and two weeks, we can launch the experimental cabin of the space station," Jim said.

When the marching ant group had just built a space center, they expected that the marching ant group might have to enter space, and did not expect this day to come so fast.

"We must launch successfully, let the world see, we are still the first." The President of the United States was somewhat satisfied with this reply.

Flying Ant Center.

The situation of the goddess has been checked, there is no technical problem, the various systems are working normally, and the flight data is simulated by the computer many times, no problem.

Based on the analysis of data and technology, Chen Mo also decided to start the second test flight.

This time the test flight, the goal is space.

Determining that the aircraft can withstand the test of space, the aerospace project also means a smooth completion.

In the command center, there are still many experts and academician teams. After the last test flight, they are very much looking forward to this test flight. Once the goddess has successfully entered space, this is another milestone in space exploration.

Even the little fish that came out very rarely appeared here. She took the unparalleled look at the plane.

At this time, there is no double in the arms of Zhao Min, eating a lollipop, quietly looking at the big plane outside the window, with a little eyes with excitement and curiosity. If it wasn’t for her mother to let her not bother her father, she would have been chasing Chen Mo’s long question at this time.

"Min, Mom said, the plane was made by Dad."

"Yes, it was made by your father. Your father is very powerful." Zhao Min touched the little girl's face and smiled and said: "When you grow up, it is as powerful as your father."

"Well, I grew up and made big planes to play." The little girl nodded seriously with a small face.

"Mergo, I am ready." The ink girl reported to Chen Mo.

it has started.

With the order of Chen Mo to take off, the goddess on the airport of the Space Center slowly suspended, and soon after, it rose to the sky 100 meters high.

"We have now entered the coastal city. On your left, it is the Fei Ant Space Center on the two-day news. The air plane that Chen Mo said is flying here."

Wan Ziqi stood on a tourist bus and pointed to the base of the flying ant space center in the distance.

The space center is not open to the public and tourists cannot enter, so their tourist route does not include the Fei Ant Space Center, but it is not far away.

On the road in the coastal suburbs, I can look at the space center. The news of the two days is full of news about the sky plane of the Feixiang Space Center. She will introduce it casually.

"Oh? What is that?"

"That is the plane, the air plane that Chen Mo said?"

"Airplane, take a quick photo."

The tourists screamed, and the tourists on the other side of the tour bus immediately gathered toward the window and looked at the window and looked out the window.

Wan Ziqi subconsciously looked through the window.

Above the aerospace center, a huge plane slowly rose, and soon it reached a height of 100 meters.

She didn't even think of it, just introduced it with her mouth and saw such a big plane.

The entire tourist bus was in a mess. For the sake of safety, Wan Ziqi rushed to let the driver park on the side of the road.

When the vehicle was just stopped, the tourists rushed out of the car and looked at the distant behemoth on the side of the road. A mobile phone was used to shoot videos and photos.

This is definitely the surprise of this trip.

Last time, some netizens exposed the video of the flight test on the Internet. I didn't expect them to meet it today.

The passing vehicles stopped and quickly picked up the mobile phone and filmed on the roadside.

When everyone was holding a mobile phone, the engine of the aerospace aircraft began to accelerate, accompanied by the excitement of the suburbs, plunging toward the sky, suspended to accelerate, in one go.

“The propulsion system is normal and the power and distribution systems are normal.”

The data of the aircraft was quickly returned, and the ink girl also began to report the relevant data to Chen Mo.

This flight test is crucial.

As the goddess took off, the atmosphere of the command center began to be inexplicably dignified, and the team of experts, the eyes are on the screen data.

In addition to the voice of the reporters in the audience, the voice of Xiao Wushuang and Zhao Min chat, and only the small unparalleled can not understand the tension.

With the attention of everyone, the height of the aircraft is rising rapidly.

10 kilometers.

15 kilometers into the stratosphere.

......

55 kilometers, into the middle layer.

80 km, entering the top of the middle layer, the external temperature is minus 90 degrees Celsius.

Time passed by, the voice in the command center, in addition to all kinds of data feedback, is the voice of the unparalleled milk voice asked Zhao Min.

The voice of a little girl is here, and the command center is not so boring. Soon, the plane has reached the top level of the middle layer of the last test, and then up, is the place for this challenge.

The aerospace experts on the field secretly clenched their fists and squeezed a sweat.

A spacecraft must undergo extreme environmental conditions such as ultra-low temperature and ultra-high temperature. The next step is the beginning of the test.

The height is 110 kilometers, entering the thermal layer, the data is normal.

height……

The height is 400 kilometers, the external temperature is 1092 degrees Celsius, the cabin temperature is 25 degrees Celsius, the air pressure is 101.3KPa, and the data is normal.

......

"Mr. Chen, our space station of Lingxiao is only this height, 400 kilometers high, enough for it to carry out the main tasks of human space exploration." Huaxing could not help but speak.

He is really nervous.

Breaking through 400 kilometers is already very remarkable. Going up again, the environmental conditions are very demanding. If there is a problem with the aircraft, it will not be worth the loss.

"It's okay, at least for now, it needs to have the ability to explore the moon and must enter the outer atmosphere."

Chen Mo shook his head and was unmoved.

The outer atmosphere is the escape layer, also called the dissipation layer. The high-speed movement of atmospheric molecules and atoms breaks away from the gravitational pull of the earth and enters the space of space. The atmosphere here is extremely thin, and the atmospheric molecules and atoms are like a grain micro-missile, and the kinetic energy is particularly high.

Seeing Chen Mo’s insistence, Huaxing did not say much, and looked back at the data sent back.

"The height is 450 kilometers, and it will enter the outer atmosphere. The external temperature is 1660 degrees Celsius, the cabin temperature is 25 degrees Celsius, the air pressure is 101.3KPa, and the data is normal."

As the plane approached the outer atmosphere, everyone became more and more nervous. The scene was once dead. Even the unparalleled feeling of the atmosphere was very weird and did not dare to speak again.

"The height of 500 kilometers has entered the outer atmosphere. The external temperature is 2530 degrees Celsius, the cabin temperature is 25 degrees Celsius, the temperature control system is normal; the air pressure is 101.3KPa, the air pressure is normal, and the environmental control and life support system are normal;

The power supply and distribution system are normal; the measurement and control and communication system are normal; the propulsion system is normal; the mechanical arm system is normal; the occupant system is normal; the instrument and lighting system are normal; and the data management is normal. ”

The next moment, within the screen of the command center, the picture inside the air space cabin is returned.

This scene, let the people in the command center, clenched their fists, a look of excited joy, applause thunder.

Successful, beyond imagination.

chapters.title: Chapter 588: :Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 588: :Cooperation

The test of the aerospace plane was successful, and the breath in the heart was relaxed, and it felt very easy.

Seeing Xiao Yu and Zhao Min coming over, Chen Mo also smiled, in Zhao Min’s arms, and the sticky little girl.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu are sometimes speechless. This little girl, seeing Zhao Min, is better than anyone who sees him. He doesn't know if he bought the lollipop that Zhao Min sent.

"Dad, I want to take the big plane you made." Xiao Musou saw Chen Mo, his eyes bent into crescents.

"The big plane can't sit now. It's in space. Dad looks back and makes a small plane for you to play." Chen Mo touched the unparalleled head and took her from Zhao Min's arms.

"Thank you, Dad, but where is space?"

"Space is the sky, the very high sky."

"Is there a **** fairy in space?"

"There is no **** fairy in space, but when I grow up, I fly to the sky, and the unparalleled is the little fairy."

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min saw the dialogue between the father and the daughter and could not help but smile.

"Well, no match, next time I look at the big plane, my father has to work." Xiao Yu looked at the expert academician who wanted to gather around, indicating that Chen Mo would put the little unparalleled down.

She also knows that it is not the time to talk about family.

"Well, Dad goes home early. My mother and I are waiting for you at home. Min Min remembers coming back to Dad with me tonight, and Ms. Nuo is also close to her." The little girl was very sensible, and each of them kissed me and cleverly followed Xiaoyu. .

Seeing the back of the little unparalleled jump, Chen Mo showed a soft smile.

"My daughter doesn't know anything?"

"That is my daughter."

Chen Mo was laughed at by Zhao Min. Under the broad daylight, he wanted to rob his daughter in front of his father.

"It's all the same." Zhao Min smiled slightly and looked at the expert academician who came over: "The next words, I may not be suitable for listening. I will go to my daughter to play first. If there is anything, please inform me directly."

After that, Zhao Min turned and quickly caught up with the small fishing and the unparalleled.

"congratulations."

"Congratulations, Academician Chen."

"..."

The experts present came to congratulate, and their faces were full of joy.

The goddess has withstood the test of the harsh conditions of space and has successfully reached the atmosphere.

This means that the aerospace technology has matured, and the speed at which China explores space in China will be at the forefront of all mankind in the future.

"Chen Chen, congratulations on your successful flight test, whether you are interested in cooperation." After the completion of Dahe, Zhang Jianfeng opened his mouth and looked forward with a look.

"Going to the moon?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes." Zhang Jianfeng nodded: "Do you want to try? We have data resources that can be shared with you."

“Including the lunar orbit data and the data on the back of the moon, as well as the orbital data of the Lagrange L2 point?” Chen Mo asked.

Lagrange points are five special solutions to the three-body problem in celestial mechanics. An object, under the gravitational force of two large objects, remains substantially stationary relative to two large objects at a certain point in space.

In the system of two celestial bodies, according to the inference, there are five Langeland points, but only two points are stable.

The mathematician Euler calculated the first three special solutions. Later, the French mathematician Lagrange deduced the two special solutions.

The Lagrange L2 point is located on the line of the Earth and the day, allowing the satellite to stay for a long time and consuming very little fuel. It is a hot spot for international deep space exploration. The L2 point is also among the five points, the only one located on the back of the moon at the Langeland point.

Before the 4th landing on the back of the moon, the project team placed the bridge relay satellite on the track of Lagrange L2, so that the nickname on the back of the moon smoothly communicated with the Earth.

People only see the 嫦娥 landing on the back of the moon, but in the moon back detection, the L2 point bridge relay satellite is the real protagonist in that performance.

In deep space exploration, the back of the moon always faces the earth, where the original environment remains, there is no infection of the Earth's electromagnetic waves, and the value of exploration is much larger than the front of the moon.

Therefore, if Chen Moru is on the moon, he will definitely choose the back.

"Yes, these data are fine." Zhang Jianfeng readily agreed.

Data is always data, Chen Mo has technology, it is not difficult to get data, it is only a matter of time, and Chen Mo's technology is more important. Under the premise of cooperation, data sharing is a normal category.

"In the future, I have a plan to land on the moon, and we can cooperate at that time." Chen Mo laughed.

With their data, he still has a lot of work left. Although these things can be obtained by time, but what he lacks most now is time, which can speed up. He certainly will not refuse.

"I hope that the cooperation will be pleasant at the time."

Zhang Jianfeng smiled and opened his eyes. When Huaxing came over, he smiled and gave the position to Huaxing.

The aerospace plane succeeded, and now Chen Mo is a toon, especially for their space explorers.

"Academician Chen, in the future, we have the opportunity to cooperate on space exploration projects?" Huaxing said.

As an engineer of the Ling Xiao, he knows the meaning of the space plane. If the technology is stable, it means that human beings can freely enter space and the cost is greatly reduced.

The air plane that Chen Mo now has will be the most critical tool.

"There is a chance." Chen Mo said.

"Exactly we have a batch of experimental equipment, need to be transported to the space station, is there any interest in the use of your aircraft to test the knife?" Huaxing thought about it.

"When?"

"A week later," Huaxing said.

Chen Mo was a little surprised.

This has just been successful, Huaxing said the issue of cooperation.

He thought that the official would wait for his project to completely confirm the safety and feasibility, and then come to him to cooperate. I did not expect it to be successful, and I mentioned it. Obviously this time it is well prepared.

"So fast?"

"Unhappy, you have succeeded, we have proposed cooperation, it has been slow. If you feel that time is not enough, you can postpone it for a while." Huaxing said.

"No, I just want to send a few satellites." Chen Mo said.

After the flight test was successful, he will prepare for the space project and the moon landing project. Both the company's research needs and future space exploration will require satellites.

Now Huaxing said that the two sides cooperate, which means that in the future, he will get the official help in the space project. Of course, this kind of help is two-way.

The satellite has already been developed, and with his efficiency, one week is enough to prepare.

"I look forward to our cooperation and enjoyment. I will inform you when possible, maybe your plane, but you may need your plane to load equipment at the South China Sea Space Center in the past. If you are sure that there is no problem, we will announce our cooperation."

"No problem," Chen Mo said.

......

In the afternoon, netizens once again exposed the video of the flight test of the Flying Ant Space Center.

As soon as the news came out, another climax was set off.

Then, the ant group announced a news on the official website: the Fei Ant Space Center, the second test flight of the ‘Goddess’ space plane successfully entered the 500-kilometer high outer atmosphere and returned to the ground intact. The space project of the Flying Ant Aerospace Company will enter the stage of commercial application.

Shortly after the official announcement of the marching ant group, Fei Ant Aerospace also issued an announcement.

The Shennong space plane successfully flew and launched the first space travel registration. The first batch of space tourists was 10 people. They accepted the global space travel registration and accepted the global commercial satellite launch mission.

Both announcements are accompanied by a space video taken by the ‘Goddess’.

A stone stirs up a thousand waves.

This is the first exposure of the space plane's name. The space plane successfully returned from space. This news is like a tornado that swept the world's space exploration circle.

Things didn't stop there. In the prime time of the evening news, CCTV also broadcast a news video.

The video is a ceremony for Huaxing and Chen Mo to sign a cooperation agreement. The ceremony is very simple, but it means that the official official announcement that Huaxia Aerospace Group and Feixiang Aerospace Co., Ltd. will cooperate and will use the space shuttle of Feixiang Aerospace Company to transport after one week. The first batch of experimental equipment entered the 'Linghao' space station.

chapters.title: Chapter 589: :Looking At The Stars
chapters.body:
Chapter 589: :Looking At The Stars

"Huaxia is looking at the stars. What do you think our council is doing? It is still arguing over the Galileo project that decided to cooperate decades ago. Who should pay more money? It is still hesitant to give money to the space exploration project. It is not very funny. Is there any news to say good technology research and development? In the end, which system will enable us to carry out activities efficiently?

I feel that the present time is like the beginning of the Great Navigation Age from the end of the 15th century to the beginning of the 16th century. Only this time the protagonist has changed. The protagonist of this era is Huaxia. They are doing everything they can to the stars and the sea, and our country is still worried about the investment in space exploration. The value is not worth it.

The universe contains countless wealth and secrets. Just think of the New World of that year. If Huaxia gets those wealth, who can't guarantee that they will become the next ‘dayless empire’? ”

"If you don't act again, it's really late. Because the politics of the two parties are intriguing, it is ridiculous to argue that it should not be allocated to scientific research projects. It is ridiculous to say that good research and development has not progressed much and continues to fight. Waiting for our children and grandchildren to spit in front of the grave and lick our waste."

"Obviously, in this competition, China has already come to the fore and began to take advantage."

"This may be really the beginning of a sea of exploration, like the great maritime era of the year. If Chen Mo becomes the 'Magellan' and 'Columbus' of China, we will lose the best opportunity. We should not be full of the front of the sea. Uncertainty, and hesitancy."

"Half a century ago, we were half a century ahead of China. After half a century, China led us for half a century. Who can tell me why?"

"..."

The marching ant group teamed up with Huaxia Aerospace Group and is about to enter space.

This news caused the foreign media to blow up the pot, the news, the comments of experts, the arguments and unwillingness of foreign netizens, one after another, unprecedented fierce.

Some researchers have publicly supported the official support for scientific research innovation, resulting in some of the top research talents to go to China.

Incense burner beach villa.

When the outside world was too loud, Chen Mo looked at the barbecue leisurely on the beach next to the villa.

The white smoke of the charcoal fire, the chicken wings are covered with golden yellow grease, the fragrance is overflowing, so that the small unparalleled slobber next to it looks at it.

This time Zhao Min came over, Xiao Man also just came over, little unparalleled, free to do nothing, it is rare to have a barbecue.

The ink girl is also there, the oven is small, a few people around, it is still warm.

"Sister, I want to do a live broadcast, can I?" Xiao Man took over the chicken wings that Chen Mo handed over, regardless of the image, and said while eating.

"Live me barbecue?"

Chen Mo put the other two chicken wings on the sauce and handed it to Xiao Yu and Zhao Min, then joked.

"If I broadcast your barbecue, my sister will kill me." Xiaoman laughed.

"What do you want to broadcast live?"

Chen Mo took over the raw chicken wings that Zhao Min handed over and continued to 'should the kitchen' and he also ate it.

"Does the ant aerospace space not have a space tourism project? I want to go live in space to do a live broadcast." Xiao Man looked forward to Chen Mo.

"You really dare to think." Chen Mo surprised and laughed.

The character of Xiao Man is completely different from that of Xiao Yu. The spirit of adventure is not small, and he is very lively. He dares to do anything.

Since the last holographic hero super league with Penguin, the wild fish platform shines. Later, he collaborated with the world's top game companies such as Ubisoft, Netease, Blizzard and Nintendo to launch various holographic game competitions.

Nowadays, the world's holographic game competitions are all looking for the resources of the ants group.

Recently, the Olympic Committee is in contact with the Man Fish Platform to prepare for the holographic e-sports project of the Olympic Games. The arrangement of the holographic venue invites the help of the wild fish platform.

Today's wild fish platform has become a worldwide live broadcast platform.

A live broadcast platform was made by Xiao Man, and she herself became a well-known game anchor, which was related to her personality.

"Can you? Brother!"

"It’s very hard to train in space, and it’s dangerous in space, not afraid?”

"Not afraid, this is a rare opportunity. I believe that my brother-in-law's technology is definitely very good and safe." Xiaoman patted his chest and said confidently.

"When the space tourism training begins, you can find Zhao Min." Chen Mo also knows that Xiao Man is determined.

"Thank you brother-in-law." Xiao Man seems to be winning.

"Well, don't talk about work, eat barbecue." Xiaoyu ended their topic, she was very helpless to Xiaoman, this sister, she can't control, she did not want to do things she wanted to do.

Early the next morning, Chen Mo went to the space center to prepare for the space plane's access to the ‘凌霄.

This time, not only the transportation of experimental equipment and materials entered the ‘Linghao’ laboratory, but Chen Mo himself also had the task of satellite orbit.

In the Institute of the Flying Ants Space Center, there are nine satellites, which are the satellites that Chen Mo is preparing to send to space.

Three communications satellites, two navigation satellites, two surveillance satellites, one climate satellite, and one resource exploration satellite. One of the communication satellites is ready to be sent to the synchronous orbit.

The satellite is not big, it is not too small. The square box of about one meter and five, the antenna through the mechanical structure, the four rounded 'ears' are wrapped around the four sides, there is no expansion, and there is a memory metal structure.

When expanded, it is larger.

These satellites are used by Chen Mo for their own use or for the company. It is only the beginning, and there will be more in the future.

For him now, the technical content of the satellite is not high enough to be manufactured at any time.

This time, more than the satellites of most small countries.

A boat nine stars.

Chen Mo did not choose to use 1024 elemental crystals as an energy source, but instead used solar panels and graphene supercapacitor batteries as energy sources. The low-profile version of the micro-ion engine is mounted as a satellite power, so that there is no need to worry about fuel problems, so that the satellite can be operated in orbit for a long time, and the flight orbit can be corrected at any time.

"Mergo, Huaxing came to the video call."

Chen Mo put down the work at hand and looked at the screen, which is Huaxing with a smile on his face.

"Academician Chen, how are you prepared there?"

"I have no problem here. The goddess has been checked and can be started within the scheduled time." Chen Mo said.

"This time I contact you, there is still one thing. This mission, there will be a live broadcast live, CCTV over there, ask your opinion." Huaxing said.

"No problem," Chen Mo said.

The news they announced attracted global attention.

In particular, space planes, space tourism projects and commercial satellite launches are hot topics.

People around the world have called for space travel and satellite launches, but no cooperation has been proposed.

The marching ant group has just entered the aerospace field and is a newcomer to the new hands. The outside world does not understand their technology and has concerns about safety. Therefore, the ‘Linghao’ transportation task, which was co-operated with the Aerospace Group, is an opportunity to show strength.

The live broadcast just coincided with Chen Mo’s intentions.

The time for launching the mission is during the day, and the goddess can clearly appear in front of the global people through live broadcasts. As long as this beautifully completed mission, they will be a blockbuster in the aerospace field.

Time passed quickly in the quarrel of the outside world, and the date of the first space cooperation between the space group and the marching ant group also came.

chapters.title: Chapter 590: : Live
chapters.body:
Chapter 590: : Live

Through the security check, Chunan and the photographer entered the gate of the Fei Ant Space Center.

The cooperation between Huaxia Aerospace Group and the marching ant group allowed the aircraft and airborne equipment of the Shennong Space Center of the Feiyang Space Center to enter the space station, which attracted much attention from the outside world.

This is also a major space mission, so it is open to the outside world and is broadcast live before the launch.

He is the reporter responsible for the live broadcast.

The mission of this live broadcast began with the Fei Ant Space Center.

The Goddess space plane will depart from the Fei Ant Space Center and go to the South China Sea launch site to load equipment and supplies, then take off from the South China Sea launch site and head to the space station.

He needs to board the goddess, starting from the Fei Ant Space Center and broadcasting live until the South China Sea launch site.

Some nervous and some expectation.

The news of the Goddess Skyscraper has recently been overwhelming. The outside world has painted the goddess as legendary, but can only look at the blurred photos taken by passers-by. This is the first time to get close to the goddess and still broadcast live on it.

Diane also admire the official enthusiasm, and actually let the aircraft that has just successfully tested the flight to perform this space mission.

Perhaps it is the trust of the marching ant group.

He can only explain this.

The self-driving car brought Diane to the hangar, and soon he saw the legendary genius Chen Mo of the marching ant group.

"Hello there."

"Hello, Mr. Chen Mo."

Diane smiled and said hello.

"Wait a live broadcast, I want to ask, what are the things that need attention? For example, where you need to keep confidential, where can't you shoot?"

The next step is live broadcast. The live video will be broadcasted by the global media. He has to know some questions in advance.

This advanced technology of aerospace planes will definitely involve some secret technology. In case their lenses are leaked, it is to help the enemy collect intelligence.

"You can shoot, there are no taboos, but on the plane, the buttons inside, don't move." Chen Mo said.

Even if people are seen in the layout of the goddess, it is impossible for outsiders to copy. And if you want to go through a video screen and want to reverse research on his technology, it is even less likely.

After listening to some of the questions that Chen Mo said to be concerned, Diane was in mind, and then the two live photographers around him began to prepare. Soon, the live broadcast will begin.

......

"Chang Meng, how can you read the news?"

Lin Bo often stayed in front of the screen of the computer, and the CCTV news screen was played on it.

In his impression, on weekends, he often played games in the dormitory or went out to work part-time. He had never seen him watch the news in the dormitory. Today is a bit unusual.

"Don't you pay attention to the news? The goddess of the marching ant group performed the space mission for the first time today, and the goddess flies, it is rare to see." The name is called Changmeng male head and does not say back.

"What? Is the goddess flying today?"

The two roommates who were playing mobile games on the bed immediately jumped out of bed and ran to Changmeng to sit down and look excited.

"Isn't it just starting at 10 o'clock in the evening?" Lin Bo asked.

"morning."

Often referred to the news screen, I saw that the screen has jumped to the live room, the huge title behind the live broadcast room, is the goddess to the Linglong space station.

"The trough, almost missed." Lin Bo also moved to the stool, sitting next to Chang Meng.

"You are not going out to date your girlfriend?"

"Let's go after reading."

The goddess lifted off, this is a news that is highly anticipated.

The news of the domestic live broadcast announced the launch time early, coincided with the weekend, and it was the daytime, attracting the attention of countless netizens. School dorms, Internet cafes, home TV sets, live mobile phones, and people are paying attention to the news of the goddess flying.

In the various news, the goddess is portrayed as mysterious and advanced, and now it is the moment of close encounter with the goddess.

Even some foreign platforms are preparing to broadcast.

Like an alien-like company, the most advanced and mysterious space plane studied, the first close exposure, the opportunity is rare.

Time passed by in a minute, and waiting for everyone, the live broadcast officially began.

At the moment when the host of the live news room handed the screen to the scene, the screen of the Diane in the space center jumped out on the screen.

Behind him is a huge hangar.

"Hello everyone, I am now bringing live broadcasts to the Flying Ant Center. Behind me is the hangar of the flying ant space. Mr. Chen Mo has just prepared. The mission is about to begin. We can see now, Goddess The aerospace plane is coming out of the hangar."

When Diane just finished, the photographer turned the lens to the hangar.

Sure enough, the door of the hangar was slowly opened, and the huge goddess, with the help of the trailer, left the hangar steadily.

Wow……

The moment the goddess reveals the truth, the audience in front of the screen, collectively exclaimed.

Some of the videos they saw some time ago were videos taken by netizens. Because they were too far away, the picture was not clear. Now, the complete face of the goddess is finally appearing in front of the screen.

"With the eyes of many years of military enthusiasts, this aircraft can be transformed into a strategic bomber. It is the most terrible to transport bombs into space and bomb the targets without any traces. Any air defense weapons are ineffective."

"The marching ant group is not terrible in general. No wonder the Americans have to deal with him by any means. I will also use whatever means. It is really terrible that such people are enemies."

"This aircraft is definitely several times more expensive than dozens of tons of gold."

"The trough? What is the engine under the plane?"

The people who saw the real face of the plane all boiled up. The shape of the sci-fi, the smooth lines, and the huge body are definitely not made by ordinary companies.

The goddess has been stopped at the airport of the Space Center and is ready.

A few minutes after the plane took off, Chen Mo and Mo Nu also appeared on the scene.

The first phase of live broadcast of Diane, with a photographer, quickly followed, leaving a photographer to wait for the live plane to take off.

Next, the goddess will depart from here, fly to the South China Sea launch site to load supplies, and then begin its first space mission.

He will take the goddess with Chen Mo and go to the South China Sea launch site together. The second phase of the live broadcast requires a live flight in the cabin after the flight is stable.

"Mom, it’s Dad and Moto, they are flying, I want to sit."

Unparalleled sitting on the sofa watching the big plane in the screen, seeing Chen Mo and the ink girl enter the plane under the lens, the little face is very excited.

"When you grow up, let Dad take you to sit." Xiao Yu smiled.

"Mom, why are you not sensitive?"

“Min Minh is busy at work.”

"Min Min also said that she would only come once in a few days. Why didn't Min Min live with us? I can see her every day, and play with me like Moto." Muscle asked innocently. .

"You want to eat a lollipop that you are sensitive to." Xiao Yu scraped a small nose that was unmatched.

“The lollipops that Minh gave are very tasty.” The little girl mentioned the lollipop and didn’t forget to lick her lips: “Mom, you call Dad, let him come home, come back with Min Min Ok?"

"Dad is on a business trip. I may not be able to come back tonight. Wait for my mother to call Min Min. You can call Min Min."

Xiaoyu touched the face of the little guy and looked up to watch the live news.

The live broadcast is still going on.

After Chen Mo and others entered the plane, the live video has been cut to the photographer's lens without boarding. After the ground personnel cleared the field, the aircraft slowly rose in the eyes of countless double screens.

NASA.

Jim was shocked to see the goddess that slowly lifted off the screen. This level of high-tech products, Chen Mo did not scrutiny in front of the global people, is this a confidence in their own technology?

"Go back five seconds, right, five seconds." An engineer next to him suddenly opened.

"What's wrong? What did you find?" Jim hurriedly spoke.

In order to understand the secrets of the marching ant group Goddess, the US Department of Defense and the NASA have each organized expert personnel to understand the goddess as much as possible and find opportunities to imitate them. Therefore, there are many aerospace experts and aircraft designers on the field.

"Stop here and zoom in on the belly of the plane."

The technicians did not dare to neglect and proceed according to the engineer's intention.

The layout of the aircraft's abdomen engine appears on the screen.

"Why is the engine like this?" Jim looked at the outline of the engine on the screen in shock.

He is a space technician, he has seen a space shuttle engine, and he has seen rocket engines and fighter engines. The shapes of various engines are more or less similar, but the engine vents of the goddess are completely different from their traditional engines. Still seeing it for the first time.

"A new type of engine does not rule out new technology." The engineer sighed.

This is an engine that has never been seen before, and it looks different from all the engines they have seen.

"It's a new technology. Is this Chen Mo is an alien?" Jim grimaced.

He had to suspect that Chen Mo is not a human being, and all kinds of new technologies are just like no money.

At the same time, the world's top aircraft manufacturing company, NASA, is paying attention to the live broadcast. At the moment of the aircraft's launch, they noticed the distinctive engine of the aircraft's abdomen.

In order to get information about the Goddess aircraft, countries have invited the top domestic aircraft engineers and rocket engineers to watch the live broadcast, in order to find some clues about the technology of the Goddess aircraft, and carry out research and counterfeiting.

They did not expect that Chen Mo would unscrupulously show the belly of the plane.

After studying for a long time, all the experts have come to the same conclusion. The engine of the goddess is a new technology, but the specific technology can only be known when Chen Mo is announced.

In the shock of countless people, the space plane has risen to a height of 100 meters, slowly accelerating, plunging toward the heights of the South China Sea and disappearing into the sky.

chapters.title: Chapter 591: : Small News
chapters.body:
Chapter 591: : Small News

"On the plane, I had a simple interview with Mr. Chen Mo. In the interview, Mr. Chen Mo also revealed some information. Now we are seeing the carrying cabin. The equipment and materials for this mission will be placed here. The cabin will not be delivered to the space station until it reaches space. We can see that there are some fixed equipment in the cargo compartment."

After the aerospace plane flew smoothly, Chun'an connected the live broadcast room and began to broadcast live in the aircraft cabin.

The mysterious goddess, the internal layout, is also displayed in front of the world under the photographer's lens.

"Mr. Chen Mo revealed that the goddess flying in the sky, in addition to transporting equipment and materials into the ‘凌霄号’ space station, it has another task, which is to put the satellites of the marching ant group into orbit.

The equipment we saw was the satellite of the marching ant group, a total of nine. Two of the communication satellites, two optical remote sensing satellites, three navigation satellites, one resource detection satellite and one meteorological satellite. According to Mr. Chen Mo, these satellites are used by his personal research and corporate service users.

After the goddess begins the mission, it will directly transport equipment and materials to the space station. After the replenishment task is completed, it will leave the space station and go to the track of different heights to send the satellite into the scheduled orbit. The success rate is extremely high. If it is successfully completed, this will be another milestone in the history of China's aerospace. ”

The news revealed by Diane attracted the attention of some countries and organizations that are preparing to launch satellites.

A boat nine stars.

If Chen Mo successfully completes the task, then the commercial satellite launch technology of the marching ant group is relatively safe and reliable.

Diane's experimental cabins were introduced, all of which introduced its basic functions, and did not disclose the contents of the technology.

One by one, the people who watched the live broadcast were so addicted that many viewers felt as close to the space plane for the first time. Chen Mo did not stop the live broadcast of Chun'an, but sent a robot to introduce him to some functions in the cabin.

Now almost the world's live broadcast, the biggest live advertising.

In the future, space planes will conduct commercial projects such as commercial satellite launches, space travel, space transportation and satellite recycling.

This time is an opportunity for the potential consumers of the company to understand more and believe in space planes. For them, there is no small benefit.

"Finally tell everyone a little news, we are now at an altitude of 100,000 meters. Just after entering the sea, the goddess has started supersonic flight. Just now the robot told me that our current speed is about 1.5 Mach, which is 1.5 times the speed of sound. According to our current speed, within half an hour, we will arrive in the South China Sea. This is the first time I have experienced supersonic flight, and it is the first time I fly so high."

This little news of Diane, let the audience watching the live broadcast boil.

"What is the special message?"

"I also want to experience the little news, is there any reason?"

"Small news?? Serious?"

"You said, what is big news, what is big news?"

"..."

In the Chinese carnival, other countries are not happy.

"I ask you to announce our space station plan immediately after they announced their mission. We can't let the Chinese people grab all the limelight. If the world truly recognizes China's strong, our situation will be very troublesome, which involves national interests and safe question.

Remember, it will be a big move, the bigger the better, the world's people's eyes will be attracted to us, let them see, although China is very strong, but we are still the most powerful and greatest country. ”

At the end of the call, the people in the NASA office were in a bad mood, the atmosphere was a little depressed, and Jim’s face was even more ugly.

The White House was still coming to order so late, and it was obvious that there was an emergency.

"Contact the European Space Agency and the Island Aerospace Research and Development Agency."

Now several other people are afraid that they are also very anxious now. The Chinese that have been restricted by them are now impressive. More and more technology is already running ahead of them.

The technology of the marching ant group has already advanced too much. If they even lose their advantage in the space field they are most proud of, they will completely lose their advantage.

Jim’s idea is correct, and now the other two are really in a hurry.

In China, which is bound by their joint efforts, various technologies have already run ahead of them, which is a very big blow for them.

It’s just that Jim didn’t know that the White House was more anxious than he had imagined, not only urging NASA, but the Pentagon also received notice from the White House.

A secret base somewhere in the Rocky Mountains.

A car galloped through the darkness and entered a cave nearly 20 meters high. Then, the gate of the cave slowly closed and restored the appearance of camouflage.

Shanahan came down from the car and looked up to see that all the steel structures above it were almost empty. His face is not good, because he was woken up in the middle of the night, he still has to come here to confirm the situation.

At this time, Shanahan’s face was not very good, because he was preparing to sleep, and he was brought over by a call from the White House. He would come here to take a look and confirm the progress.

He was greeted by a man wearing a tooling, with thick glasses and a scum.

It looks awkward, thin and weak, not outstanding.

Shanahan did not dare to look down on this seemingly thin guy.

This is an avid madman.

Crazy and genius.

The difference between the words, but can find common ground in this guy.

Kane, a versatile technical genius, unfortunately, his character is a bit arrogant, he is radical, he doesn't like to communicate with outsiders, and his appearance and behavior feel like a madman. All kinds of factors are limited, and he is destined to become a decent winner like Chen Mo.

“How is the ‘Falcon Project’ now?” Shanahan said.

"You can fly test soon."

Kane looked up at the huge heavy rocket in front and the huge aircraft next to the 'aircraft'.

These two things are from his hand.

On the screen not far away, the live broadcast of the ‘Goddess’ is being broadcast.

"I need a specific time. The president has already called for a call. So many funds will come out and I will not get it out. The White House is really angry. They are angry and your expenses will be interrupted."

Shanahan also looked up and looked at the rocket, the tone did not seem very good.

"Within a month." Kane did not think about it, and he did not forget to turn his head and look at the goddess of the news.

Shanahan’s face was a little slower.

"Ensuring that the technology is mature, this test flight will hand over a good answer, and there will be more funds in the future. Now is a special period, Huaxia new technology continues to flow, the White House hopes to maintain our advantage in space, at least support a section. time."

Shanahan also knows that Huaxia has the perversion of Chen Mo. They can't support it for too long. They can only survive this period of time. After the election, they wait for the opportunity of world change.

"This is the most powerful rocket. With it, returning to the moon and landing on Mars, it's fine." Kane looked up and stared at the work in front of him, his voice full of confidence and a touch of fanaticism.

"I hope you succeed." Shanahan sighed, this guy is crazy, but the technology is still there.

"What kind of war robot do I want?" Kane’s lips every day, with a longing in her look.

"The country that can't get it for the time being, the country that gets the robot, is very valued to them, never let outsiders get close. This is not anxious, is thinking of ways." Shanahan said.

The news of the goddess is still on the air. In order not to be dominated by China, all parties are looking for ways to attract their attention. This is a technical competition, regardless of intentional or unintentional participation.

South China Sea launch site.

At this time in the South China Sea launch site, the staff are looking forward to seeing, Huaxing is in the list.

In the live broadcast of the news, Chen Mo’s space plane has taken off, and their preparations have been completed. Only when the space plane arrives, they can immediately put materials and equipment into the plane and take off directly.

This is a world-famous task. As long as it is successfully completed, it is an exciting milestone for their Chinese aerospace project. Although the protagonist is a marching ant group, the Huaxia Aerospace Group can still have many benefits.

In anticipation, the task of replenishing the space station this time is one month later. Because Huaxing saw the powerful functions of the space ants of the marching ant group, Huaxing will advance the mission to test the cooperation between the two sides.

Using the newly developed space plane of the marching ant group to carry out the task, the theoretical risk is not small, because the marching ant group has not carried out related tasks, they are not sure whether the marching ant group can be successfully completed.

But even if they use their launch vehicles to perform their tasks, there is a certain risk.

With the idea of trying it out, Huaxing handed over the proposal to the above. Unexpectedly, the above agreed with him. Therefore, after Chen Mo agreed, the cooperation between the two parties was also natural.

Huaxing also knows that the official must know some advanced technology of the space plane, so it will increase cooperation with the marching ant group.

This kind of cooperation is not harmful to both parties.

"The plane is coming."

The shouting made the people subconsciously look up at the sky, and they saw a black spot, which was approaching the launch site.

Then, the roaring sound appeared, and the black spots slowly enlarged in the eyes of everyone. Under the attention of many eyes, the goddess hovered over the open space of the launch site and landed at a predetermined location below.

chapters.title: Chapter 592: : The Universe Is So Big, I Want To See It.
chapters.body:

Remember the starry sky above your head and stay curious.

hiss……

The universe is so big, I want to see it?

Chen Mo is going to space?

When Chen Mo said this news, the people watching the live broadcast were envious of death, full of sour taste. Today's live broadcast of high-energy, bursting out too much exciting news, let the audience directly enjoy.

Zhao Min, who is far away from the headquarters of the marching ant, is also watching the live broadcast. Hearing Chen Mo’s words, he couldn’t help but squint and laugh.

......

"Yes, it’s Dad."

Xiaoyu touched the unparalleled little face and looked at Chen Mo in the news. His eyes were a little worried, and he turned to look gentle and smiled helplessly.

Marrying this man, the only thing she can do is to support him in every decision and help him take care of the family.

But it is enough.

"Unparalleled, wait a while, you have to go to kindergarten, go to study and study, and then be as smart as Dad, Dad will be very happy." Xiao Yu said.

"Good." Hearing that Dad would be happy, the little girl nodded without hesitation.

"True."

Xiao Yu smiled and picked up some formal documents next to him.

The above is exactly what she did during this time, took the time to do it and bought a kindergarten.

In order to enable the unparalleled education and safe and healthy environment, she chose Zhao Minjie's suggestion to set up a kindergarten in Binhai.

Now that the newly purchased kindergarten has been refurbished and the procedures have been completed, it will take a while to enroll students.

On the other side, the short interview has been completed.

The news that Chen Mo broke the news caused a big topic on the Internet.

The hero Chen Mo, after the logistics personnel had all the materials and equipment to be replenished into the carrying cabin, went with Huaxing to the command center of the launch site.

The command center of the South China Sea launch site, hundreds of computers are neatly arranged, in front of the computer, are the engineers of the launch team.

In the past, rockets were launched, but this time it was different. The space planes of the marching ant group took off, and all the engineers looked more or less with expectations.

Seeing the two coming in, everyone's eyes were transferred to Chen Mo.

This man, who is almost younger than all of them, is the most intelligent person in the world. The first time he saw it at a close distance, he didn't feel much special, and he didn't have three heads and six arms.

Chen Mo noticed the attention of everyone and made a greeting to the nearest few people.

Look around the environment of the command center.

In front of the hall is a 20-square-meter color screen, next to the display panel is about 18 meters long, 6 meters wide display screen, in addition, there is a total podium and a variety of recording instruments and displays.

Through the huge screen, you can clearly see the lonely goddess in the airport, and the computer in the command center has been connected to the signal of the aircraft, and the display has the data of the goddess.

Just wait for an instruction to take off.

"Ready to start, come on." Huaxing pointed to the general command post in front.

"Or you come." Chen Mo shook his head slightly.

This mission, although the goddess is the protagonist, but in strict terms, he is the auxiliary staff after all, the aerospace engineering personnel, is the real task personnel.

"Now is not a rocket launch, there are not so many programs and passwords. That aircraft is not controlled by our ignition system, it is your aircraft. What systems need to be coordinated and commanded, you know best, so don't delay. It is rare to be a general commander, experience Experience."

Huaxing smiled and pushed Chen Mo.

"Mergo, I am ready, I can take off at any time."

"Well, I am coming." Chen Mo did not postpone it. He sorted out the clothes a little and took the ink girl to the position of the main podium to sit down and confirm that the microphone was ok, and then opened.

"Everyone, I am Chen Mo, who was taken over by the ducks. Now I am the general commander of this flying mission. Please note that 10 minutes is ready..."

Chen Mo saw the sentence, and there was no serious official tone. The engineers in front of each instrument were all spirited to confirm whether the data they were responsible for was normal.

The hall became quiet and everyone's attention was on their own instruments.

The time displayed on the screen also passed in one minute and one second.

"One minute to prepare..."

This password made the atmosphere more dignified, and everyone's eyes began to shift to the big screen aircraft.

"A ten-second countdown is ready."

When I heard the countdown of ten seconds, the people on the field began to tighten up, and they concentrated on their instruments, and did not dare to neglect.

"10...9...3...2...1, take off."

As the countdown ended, I saw the goddess on the base airport. The ion engine of the abdomen sprayed a faint blue light, slowly floating, and rushing toward the distant horizon.

The first space mission of the Goddess was officially opened with global attention.

"Get off, take off."

"That is the goddess."

"so cool."

"..."

In the space city not far from the base, as the countdown ended, the aircraft was launched and the crowds cheered. The mobile phone in everyone’s hands is facing the goddess that rises in the sky.

In the video, watching and watching live, there are two different perceptions.

In the center of the command center, the big screen in the middle is the picture returned by the goddess.

There is some quiet around, and occasionally I can hear the ticking of the mouse. Everyone is quietly watching the data they are responsible for, and always pay attention to which data will be abnormal, so as to remind them in time.

The rest of the voice, the artificial intelligence carried on the goddess, came back to report the sound of the data.

Waiting, then there is a waiting process that is not too long.

chapters.title: Chapter 593: : Successful Docking And The Second Phase Of The International Space Cooperation Proje
chapters.body:
Chapter 593: : Successful Docking And The Second Phase Of The International Space Cooperation Proje

Linglong Space Station.

This is the first space station in China to permanently enter space. The first core cabin of the Linghao is launched in 20 years. After the 22-year international space station is retired, the Lingxiao has been formed and become the only in-orbit space station. It is the power of China. carry out.

The core box of the Russian Peace is also selected to access the Lingxiao after the International Space Station has been retired and disbanded.

The Lingxiao is independently manufactured by Huaxia, and its volume and space are smaller than the International Space Station. For the time being, only three astronauts can be accommodated for experimental research.

After three periods, the three astronauts will be replaced and returned to the ground, allowing new astronauts to enter the study.

Among the astronauts stationed in the space station, there are two Chinese astronauts, one is a Russian astronaut, and a special intelligent robot is still in place.

In the core cabin of the Lingxiao, 16 cubic meters of space, not small, accommodates three astronauts, and the space is large enough.

At this time, the three people are paying attention to the news from the ground.

The goddess is about to send supplies and some experimental materials.

As a customer of the 'received express delivery', they received a message a week ago when the Academy Space Research Institute and the Army Ant Group reached a cooperation.

Today is the day when the goddess is launched, and three astronauts are watching the live broadcast.

Fei Jun stood in front of the screen and held a grip in his hand.

In space, exercise is very necessary to prevent muscle degeneration and shrinking. When he usually takes time out, he will practice.

He is the first astronaut in the space station and one of the many outstanding astronauts in space. He is currently the highest commander at the space station.

At this time, Fei Jun is also a little nervous, and some expectations.

The goddess is not an aerospace group aircraft, but the aircraft of the Huaxia enterprise, for him, this is also a strong performance of China.

"The goddess is expected to arrive in 20 minutes, we have to prepare for the courier." Fei Jun looked at the data and time passed, said.

"This plane looks so cool." Rovsky said in a Chinese with some accents.

Rovsky is a Russian astronaut who has been stationed in the station and has been stationed at the now retired International Space Station. He is an old astronaut with the most extensive experience in space activities among the three of them.

Because the Lingxiao is the space station of China, all the button signs of the space station are Chinese.

In order to better communicate the experiment, mastering Chinese is one of the most basic conditions for entering the Lingxiao. The daily communication here is all in Chinese.

"It's really cool. After docking, we can go in and see. On the ground, the plane is full of intelligent robot drivers."

Liu Yanyun also has some expectations.

She is the only female astronaut among the three astronauts.

Although women are always in space, sometimes it is inconvenient, but she still persists, showing the resilience, not lost to two male astronauts.

"I can't wait to wait, Xiao Yan is not that powerful," Rovsky said.

Xiaoyan is a robot that has settled in space.
