It uses the intelligent robots of the marching ant group to transform and write the intelligent core of Xia Wei, which has been successfully researched by the Academy of Sciences. It has settled in the space station and sometimes replaces astronauts to complete some dangerous outbound missions.

"Beginning to prepare."

Fei Jun put the grip in his hand and used his arm to borrow a little and flew toward the door of the core cabin.

20 minutes, very soon.

When the goddess is close to the space station, the speed has been adjusted to be almost the same as that of the space station, and the interface in front of the abdomen is also exposed, and is approaching the interface of the space station, slowly approaching.

"Prepare to dock...300 cm...ready to dock...280 cm..." The artificial intelligence carried by the goddess repeats the current state over and over again.

The identification of the interface has appeared on the screen and is constantly being adjusted according to slight deviations.

In the command center, everyone is inexplicably nervous, and their hands are not consciously clenched.

This is the most critical step.

As long as the docking is successful, this replenishment mission is a perfect success.

"I'm docking...100 cm...I'm docking...50 cm..."

As the data returned is getting closer and closer, the hall is getting quieter and quieter, and the atmosphere doesn't dare to breathe, for fear of bluffing the benchmark in the screen.

Even Chen Mo, who has always been calm, feels the tension in the air and stares at the screen.

Huaxing’s palm is sweating. If this kind of thing is bad, you must prepare a heart-saving pill. If the failure causes huge losses, the consequences will be very scary.

"I am docking... 30 cm... Docking... 10 cm..."

On the screen, at the moment when the two interfaces were closed, everyone's heart twitched, and the breath was stagnation, and the whole person raised it.

"The docking was successful."

Four words, if you are awkward.

Let the tense atmosphere burst open instantly, the first applause sounded, and in the entire hall, the applause thundered, cheers and laughter filled every corner.

Chen Mo also secretly gave a sigh of relief, relieved.

If there is a problem with failure, his responsibility will be great, but it will be completed smoothly.

In the space station, Fei Jun heard the successful docking of the intelligent system report, let him put a hanging heart down, revealing a relaxed smile.

"Successful."

"I can't wait."

Roffsky screamed excitedly, waiting to open in the docking cabin hatch, Yang Yanyun stood behind Rovsky, quietly waiting, from her eyes, can see very much expectation.

“The air pressure in the docking cabin is back to normal and can be opened.”

When prompted, the Feijun opened the door to the docking bay, and the hatch of the docking cabin of the space plane also opened instantly.

"You used to, I first contacted the ground." Fei Jun finished, drifting back to the core cabin. Although he also wants to go in and see the situation of the goddess, but as the leader here, his work can not fall.

"Hello, I am the Goddess No. 1 driving robot 'rat', welcome to enter the goddess, astronauts, astronauts."

"Hello, I am the goddess No. 2 driving robot ‘牛’ and welcome you soon.”

Just entering the space plane, in the space plane, two intelligent robots ‘stand on the deck of the goddess, from their point of view, just like the robot is hanging upside down.

"My God, so beautiful, this robot can stand, there should be an electromagnet under the feet, wait for me to turn over, Mr. Rat."

Looking at the situation in the spaceship of the goddess, Rovsky was exclaimed in disbelief.

"Hello, Mr. Robot Mouse, Mr. Niu." Liu Yanyun also turned over and greeted the two robots.

The goddess and the Linghao were successfully docked.

This news, spread around the world by CCTV, the circle of space research seems to have a major earthquake, a shock.

The whole of China was caught in jubilation.

All employees of the marching ant group are also happy, and the goddess completes the task perfectly. Next, they will create unlimited possibilities.

The reports of various media have raised the heat of the news to the peak.

The most powerful group company finally reached out to the space with a poisonous hand, and the imagination of the future is infinite.

Not long after, the official website of the marching ant group and the official website of the flying ant space company once again announced a message that after the goddess completed the replenishment mission, the satellite was put into orbit and carried nine satellites, all of which successfully entered the scheduled orbit.

The news pushed the heat of the marching ant group Goddess to the climax.

In the midst of the limelight, a news announcement was made to attract global attention.

NASA publicly announced the formation of a new international space joint research institute in conjunction with the European Space Agency, the Island Space Research and Development Agency, the Canadian Space Agency, the Indian Space Agency and the Brazilian Space Agency.

The second phase of the space station cooperative research project was launched, and a total of 18 countries participated in the project.

The second phase of the International Space Station's core cabin, the Zeus, will enter the space with the returnable heavy-duty launch vehicle 'Falcon No. 10' ten days later. The other experimental cabins will also be launched into the space docking within one month. Form a new space station.

However, the news released by NASA is only the beginning.

The space agency has just drawn a wave, and another heavy news has been sent from the Pentagon, triggering a bigger tsunami.

chapters.title: Chapter 594: : Falcon Project
chapters.body:
Chapter 594: : Falcon Project

The Pentagon announced that one month later, the pilot launch of the Falcon Project was launched, and the newly developed super-heavy launch vehicle ‘Hercules 1’ was used to send the Falcon’s core carrier, the Falcon, into space.

The news once again triggered a major global earthquake.

It is rumored that the CIA has a falcon plan, which is designed to secretly remove, kidnap and recruit the top scientists, soldiers and security personnel in their country.

The Pentagon also has the ‘Falcon Plan’, which aims to create a space warship with the ‘Falcon’ code, and if necessary, launch an attack on any target in the world and in space within two hours.

The Pentagon’s Falcon Plan is part of the deployment of a space-based weapons program.

The Space Falcon program involves four core projects: the Universal Space Vehicle (CAV), the Extended Range Universal Space Vehicle (e-CAV), the Hypersonic Cruise Vehicle (HCV), and the Small Launch Vehicle (SLV).

Various news reports revealed that the first phase of the Falcons mission has been completed, the small launch vehicle is mature, and the hypersonic weapon system is slowly maturing, that is, the weapon system is mature, and now launches the 'Falcon', the plan is opened. In the second phase, you can confirm the fact that the Pentagon is going to build space-based weapons.

The impact of this news is undoubtedly a tsunami, so that global security is still under the guns of the United States.

Even if public opinion in the international community opposes space weapons, it can only be verbally stated that no one can stop them from implementing the plan.

Those countries that are hostile to the United States have a shadow cast on their hearts.

"Two falcons are taking off at the same time. I am afraid that this common prey is a marching ant group or a certain eastern country."

"I seem to see the space race during the Cold War."

"This is a part of the Star Wars plan."

"Huaxia’s achievements in space have made Washington unable to sit still. Perhaps this is just the beginning."

"No matter whether you admit it or not, the strength of Americans is still very strong."

“I feel that a new era of competition is coming.”

The two news explosions in the United States made the marching ant group Goddess successfully docked with the space station and eclipsed the news that nine satellites were put into orbit.

SpaceX (American Space Exploration Technology Corporation) ‘Falcon 10’ heavy-duty launch vehicle will transport the core space of the second International Space Station, the Zeus, into space;

The Pentagon will send space-based armed spacecraft, codenamed 'Falcon,' into space.

The two Falcons have made the world silent, the media and public opinion are all on the news published in the United States. Other news can only be reduced to the two falcons.

The heat of the message has been going on.

Ten days after NASA announced the space station plan, SpaceX's heavy-duty launch vehicle ‘Falcon 10’ carries the core compartment of the zeus space station and is launched at the Kennedy Space Center, pointing to the sky.

The next day, NASA and SpaceX announced that the space station's core cabin, the Zeus, had successfully entered the orbit. The Falcons 10 rocket successfully returned for a second launch.

The news pushed the hot waves to a new height, but did not stop there.

After the United States announced the successful launch of the core cabin 'Zeus', the island space development agency also released news that it will use the H2X new launch vehicle to send the experimental cabin 'Hope 2' responsible for space microgravity research into space, with the core cabin Zeus No. Docking.

Immediately thereafter, the European Space Agency also announced that it will soon send a new space capsule 'Magellan' space experimental cabin into space, docking with the 'Zeus' core cabin, and the "Magellan" experimental cabin will take over the first phase. The mission of the space station 'Columbus' experimental cabin continues to be responsible for research in space medicine, biotechnology, new materials and basic physics.

A piece of news, a wave is higher than a wave, people are overwhelmed.

The news has not stopped. The second-generation space station composed of the West has been released one after another. It has not been able to join the cooperative countries and has not been idle.

Not long after, the space project led by China was released, and it is planned to unite the Pakistani Railway, some of the former Soviet Union countries, and several friendly countries in the Arab region, to join the new space experimental cabin, and expand the scale of the 'Linghaohao' space station. The project is proceeding as scheduled.

The news came out, once again triggering the tsunami in the space research circle.

"Insane crazy, all crazy, space exploration competition has just begun, has entered the climax stage, horrible."

"Competition is the acceleration engine for the development of human civilization."

“A new era of space exploration is coming?”

"I have a bad premonition. The world pattern is in the preparation stage before the reshuffle. The 16th century maritime era brought disaster and chaos to Africa and the Americas. The sailing stage of this starry sea is for us. ,Is a blessing or a curse?"

Experts and netizens, after the craze of various news announcements, madly debated on the Internet and on the news platform. It seems that one thing has triggered the string of competition in the world pattern, and it is out of control.

......

Binhai City, not far from Binhai Park, is a kindergarten combining light and simple style with children's fun style. The name of the kindergarten is not outstanding, it is called the seaside kindergarten.

Here is the kindergarten that Xiaoyu bought. After rebuilding, I bought two plots of land next to it, which was used to build the kindergarten's teaching venue. Now I can't see the previous kindergarten.

7000 square meters, for kindergartens, it is not small.

The teaching building is made of solid wood. The combination of childlike style and lightness is the design of the floor-to-ceiling windows. The light is very abundant. Besides the innocence, you can see more clean and simple.

The venues in the teaching building are designed in two different styles, with a retro style and a futuristic technology.

Multi-purpose halls, library rooms, art rooms, music rooms, dance studios, game rooms, canteens, etc., are scattered in different places in the park. Children need to go out to get to the next place. In addition, there are small holographic projections. Fairy space.

On the campus, small farms, small gardens, grasslands for outdoor activities, small playgrounds, and places where children can play hide and seek, close to life and full of fun, can fully let children feel the natural elements.

There is no industrial area around, and there is a park next to it, the location is impeccable.

This kindergarten is not inferior to the environment of the world's top kindergartens. It can be seen that Xiaoyu attaches great importance to the unparalleled education environment.

"Dad, my mother said, after I go to school, I will be as good as my father." Unparalleled holding Chen Mo's fingers, walking toward the kindergarten gate, looking up at the small eyes of the head.

"Yes, unparalleled study, it must be very powerful." Chen Mo smiled.

"Then I am very embarrassed, will my father go home early tonight?"

"Well, Dad will go home early tonight, give a new toy to Musou, and take you out to play."

"Looking hooks."

After getting off the bus, Chen Mo will be sent to the kindergarten door before he stops.

"Dad kiss, wood, mother also kiss."

The little girl kissed both faces, only to reveal a happy smile, and to the teacher who walked to the door.

This is her first time leaving Mom and Dad.

"Mr. Chen, madam, rest assured, I will take care of her."

The unparalleled class teacher is a young female teacher named Song Wei, who is about 28 years old. She has a good face and a gentle sunshine. It looks very kind.

In fact, in the kindergarten, whether it is a teacher or other people, after careful examination and long-term observation, carefully selected, each has many years of early childhood teaching experience, and the personality is the best.

The security of the kindergarten was also selected from the security department of the marching ant group.

Because the kindergarten is prepared for the unparalleled early childhood education, it will also be the best kindergarten in Binhai. The students enrolled in the future will be the children of the rich, so the teacher hardware cannot be too bad.

"Then trouble the teacher." Chen Mo said.

"No trouble." Song Xiao smiled and squatted around the unparalleled, gently said: "Unparalleled, say goodbye to Mom and Dad."

"Mom and Dad see you again, Dad remembers to pull the hook, but also bring a sensitive back, but also a lollipop."

"Well, the unparalleled is here to be awkward, listen to the teacher's words." Xiao Yuchao screamed and pulled Zhang Chen's hand, indicating that he should leave.

"Mom and Dad are not there, remember to play with children, can't cry, and become a big cat."

"I will be jealous."

The little girl saw the two leave, and the tears came out suddenly, but still stood still in the same place, pulling the teacher's hand, causing distress.

Even Chen Mo, looking at the eyes of the unparalleled face with tears, is still somewhat distressing, but as the child grows up, there must be a growth environment suitable for her. It is impossible to be with them at all times.

Until Chen Mo and Xiao Yu got on the bus, the little girl cried out, and even the little fish on the car had some rosy eyes.

"Children grow up, always have a lair, can't always grow in the greenhouse." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu's shoulder.

In fact, it has been two or three days since the start of school. In order to have no conflicts with the unparalleled emotions, Xiaoyu did not send unparalleled on the first day, otherwise it would be called a large horror film scene.

"Well, I still have some concerns."

"Kindergarten is yours, you can always know her situation, there is nothing to worry about, always give her a space for independent growth."

Chen Mo thought for a moment.

"Looking back, I will sort out some knowledge that is suitable for early childhood education and enlightenment. You can let the teacher teach them. You can't accept the current formal elite education like ordinary children. It is estimated that you will get a university and me. Find ways to teach. The unparalleled educational progress cannot be carried out according to the present."

"When you grow up, you will hate you." Xiao Yu laughed.

Zhao Minjie said that the unparalleled is really not able to accept the current elite education like the rich children of the present. For Chen Mo, even the most advanced scientific knowledge education is no different from ordinary education.

There is a horrible dad who has to accept non-human education since childhood, and Xiao Yu is both distressed and funny.

Chen Mo also smiled and shook his head.

"The unparalleled and home affairs are handed over to me. You can concentrate on doing your business," said Xiao Yu.

"Well, you have worked hard."

During this time, all kinds of news revealed by various countries in the world because of space exploration are very lively.

The atmosphere of the whole world is undergoing subtle changes, and the forms of confrontation, competition and cooperation are basically formed. Each group has already seen a small group.

Now is just the beginning, and no one can say that there will be more changes in the future.

Artificial intelligence technology, nuclear fusion technology, holographic technology, and ion engine technology have enabled these technologies to accelerate the pace of technological change in the world.

It is now on the eve of the world technological revolution.

Historical experience shows that there will be some signs and subtle balances on the eve of any era of change.

No one can say when the technical revolution really comes, maybe tomorrow, maybe longer, maybe a sudden dispute, an unexpected event touches this delicate balance, causing chain fission,

Balance breaks, the wheel of technological change starts, and the world will surely reshuffle.

Shuffling means war and confrontation.

Whether human beings are willing or not, the general cycle of history will not change.

What Chen Mo is doing now is to survive in the troubled world that may come when the era of comprehensive technological change is coming.

chapters.title: Chapter 595: : Buying 30,000 Mu Of Land
chapters.body:
Chapter 595: : Buying 30,000 Mu Of Land

Vandenberg Air Force Base, located in the southern coast of California, is just north of Aguero, with an area of about 280 square kilometers and a coastline of nearly 51.5 kilometers.

In the United States, the same name as Vandenberg Air Force Base is the famous Cape Canaveral launch site.

The Cape Canaveral launch site is located at Cape Canaveral, Florida on the east coast of the United States. Vandenberg Air Force Base is located on the west coast of California. The former is the US Air Force's East Range and the famous Kennedy Space Center, and Vandenberg. It is the western target of the US Air Force and the second largest space launch center in the United States.

The location here is special, and it can launch high-inclination orbit and polar-orbiting satellites to the west. In 1972, it was selected as the space shuttle launching base on the west coast of the United States.

Unlike the Kennedy Launch Center, Vandenberg Air Force Base does not support civilian launches and is part of the Air Force experimental launch site.

At this time, the Vantaa Air Force Base has just been newly built on the 11th space launching console, and is erecting this behemoth - the latest super heavy-duty launch vehicle 'Hercules 1'.

The Vandenberg base has launched the American historical flag Raytheon medium-range ballistic missile, and has also launched a number of Hercules launch rockets, witnessing the most brilliant moment in the United States.

Today, the Hercules series rockets return to the global perspective, highlighting the ambition of the United States.

Shanahan looked up at the giant carrier rocket in front of him, with satisfaction in his eyes.

Over the years, the Pentagon’s investment has not been in vain. Now that the global space exploration boom is heating up, it is very necessary for them to show their strength globally.

The Hercules No. 1 is a two-stage rocket with a total length of 60 meters and a diameter of 7.6 meters. The rocket engine has a thrust of 1,330 tons and the rocket has a take-off weight of 1,170 tons.

This is just a two-stage rocket that achieves this horrific take-off weight.

But this is not the full power of the new Hercules launch vehicle.

Kane designed the Hercules 2, which is the most powerful, three-stage launch vehicle, with a total length of 130 meters. The first stage rocket has a diameter of 15 meters, which is more than the Saturn 5 that sent the astronauts to the moon. The number is bigger, and the rockets at all levels can be recycled and reused. That is the most powerful capability of the new Hercules rocket.

For today's mission, the Hercules 2 launch vehicle is not needed for the time being.

On the Hercules 1 rocket, the target of this shipment was also fixed: the Falcon space-based spacecraft.

The diameter of the spacecraft is about 4 meters, similar to the shape of the aircraft. It also carries powerful space-based laser weapons that can attack satellites in space. In addition, it also carries warheads and weapon systems with hypersonic weapons. Command platform.

If necessary, they can use small launch vehicles to send nuclear warheads and tungsten rods into the Falcon, and deterrence is self-evident.

This is the most important part of the Pentagon Falcons program and the key to the second phase of the Falcons.

Huaxia’s achievements in space exploration, as well as the marching ant group’s space plane successfully docked to the Linglong space station, made them anxious.

So speed up the Falcons plan and release them in front of the global vision in advance to show off the muscles. The plan is crazy, but in order to maintain the advantage, you have to take risks.

"finished."

Kane came to Shanahan and his face was indifferent. It seemed that his work was about to be amazing all over the world, and he wouldn't care too much.

As for the failure of the rocket launch, he never thought about it. He has a lot of confidence in his hard work for so many years.

"Are you ready to launch?" Shanahan asked.

"Yes." Kane nodded coldly.

Shanahan’s indifference to Kane’s appearance has long been accustomed to, and without his urging, the group went to the launch control center.

Some of the people who fired control centers were transferred from the Kennedy launch center, and some were experts in military missile launches. In order to maximize the success rate of the launch, they made the most adequate preparations.

At this time, the atmosphere in the launch center was a little nervous.

Even if they are experienced, they can't be calm, because they know the significance of this launch. If the Hercules No. 1 goes smoothly, their country will gain global deterrence. If it fails, the consequences will be disastrous.

Because of the fear of failure, the launch did not dare to let the media broadcast live.

Now that they are ready, through the large screen of the control center, they can clearly see the Hercules No. 1 standing alone on the launch tower.

The time was waiting for a second and a second, and it was soon at the time of the launch.

Shanahan sat quietly in the position, quietly watching the commander announce that he was ready to launch, and as the countdown began, his palms clenched unconsciously.

At this moment, he was also a little nervous, his eyes staring at the big screen.

"...3...2...1..."

"ignition!!"

When he heard the final ignition of the commander, Shanahan lifted his heart and the other people showed a nervous look. Only Kane sat in the position, holding the coffee expressionlessly, and the eyes looked at the big waves without any fluctuations. screen.

Oh...

As the rocket fired successfully, the cooling water below evaporated instantly, and the water vapor formed a huge cloud covering the entire tower. I saw the Hercules No. 1 carrying the 'Falcon', rising slowly on the cloud-filled tower. .

Everyone's gaze rises with the rise of Hercules No. 1, and the atmosphere does not dare to breathe.

The tens of seconds after the start of ignition is the most important. Many rocket accidents occur at this stage.

Hercules No. 1, in the eyes of everyone, is constantly rising to the sky.

Until the ground lens could not see the shadow of Hercules No. 1, the heart of Shanahan’s hung was slightly relaxed, showing a smile, at least no problem during the take-off phase, safety passed the first dangerous period, then the time to wait for the result .

The next day, the Pentagon announced that the Hercules No. 1 successfully sent the ‘Falcon’ into the Earth orbit scheduled for space.

The news once again alarmed the world.

"The Falcon space-based weapon platform has successfully entered the scheduled track! 》

"The superpower is always a superpower! 》

The United States launched the Falcons program

......

Countless media reports in the West, almost all describe the strength of the United States, it seems to be blowing.

Following the announcement by NASA of the successful launch of the space station's core cabin, the Zeus, it is now the United States. This time it is sending a more horrific and larger falcon's space armed warship into space.

If the space station is to use space space peacefully, then the Falcon will take off and be a sword of Damocles hanging over the world.

A mobile weapon platform is on the head, no one can sleep well.

Countries that are not in the right position with the United States collectively oppose the United States launching space-based weapons into space, and even report to the United Nations that it requires peaceful use of space space. However, there is no use for it.

The global atmosphere has become more subtle as the American Falcons have successfully entered the orbit.

The balance of the original balance seems to have tilted a little toward the United States, but it is not enough to make the balance completely out of balance.

"This time, I came to talk about the order." Li Chengzhi sat in Chen Mo's office, his voice was as low as possible, and he was somewhat cautious. He seemed to be afraid that someone next to him could hear it.

"Well? Did you give you instructions above?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes, the order is down." Li Chengzhi did not deny.

"Say, how many?"

The order they are talking about now is the order of the space plane.

At the last test flight, Li Chengzhi asked Chen Mo's space plane to sell and not sell. Chen Mo gave him a price to report back. Now, Li Chengzhi brought Chen Mo again with the above instructions. Obviously there is a result.

"4."

"Oh... really?"

Chen Mo couldn't help but be a little surprised.

The price he gave was 24 billion, with four purchases at once and nearly 100 billion orders.

"Really." Li Chengzhi affirmed.

"It’s a local tyrant." Chen Mo slammed.

What Chen Mo thinks is that this order is related to the successful launch of the falcon in the United States.

When Americans begin to develop space-based weapons, they must have counter-measures in order to have the means and strength to counterattack when they are attacked.

Air and space weapons, the best platform now, is the aerospace plane, and the fastest means of checks and balances.

Although there are anti-satellite weapons and missiles, it is definitely a good thing to have more checks and balances and cards.

The problem that can be solved with money is not a problem.

However, there are a lot of four, and that is the swallowing beast. The money for supporting four air planes can be quite a lot. According to common sense, the number of 2-3 racks is the best, one out of the task, one spare, if you are afraid of failure, you can have one more.

When I think about it, what Chen Mo can think of is to use one to do research and the other to perform aerospace engineering tasks.

"How? Can't pick up this order?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"Accept, why don't you have money to earn?" Chen Mo did not hesitate to agree.

There is an urgent need for an air plane to enrich the national defense force. He has no reason not to agree.

“How long can you get it out?”

"4, the fastest is about half a year." Chen Mo said.

Although he is now an automated manufacturer, that thing is so complicated that it is a limit every month, but in order to ensure quality and safety, it must be slowed down by two months.

"Don't you have another one in manufacturing?" Li Chengzhi said.

"The idea of playing the plane so quickly." Chen Mo smiled reluctantly: "How much you can't wait."

"No way." Li Chengzhi's stall smiled.

"That is my space center for spare. If you want the one, you can't give it to you, but I have a sigh of relief." Chen Mo said.

"What is your love?"

"Sell me the aerospace center to the seaside forest. I simply looked at it, about 30,000 mu."

"..."

"Don't look at me like this, I used to expand the space center, and now it feels a bit small."

"..."

"I don't have long flowers on my face. I want to develop a bigger spaceship for future preparation."

"..."

Li Chengzhi can't smile, the terrible guy, even the land is so domineering. I bought 30,000 mu at a time, and I really dare to speak. However, the research and development land of top technology is very cheap, and the country also has many preferential policies. Chen Mo, this guy, can really afford it.

"I will go back and ask."

After sending away Li Chengzhi, Chen Mo also went to the Institute of Building No. 1.

The aerospace plane is completed, he is going to prepare for his next stage goal: boarding the space and boarding the moon.

Now is just the beginning. The universe has endless secrets and resources. This step must go out and prepare for the future.

chapters.title: Chapter 596: :Metamorphosis
chapters.body:
Chapter 596: :Metamorphosis

In the science and technology library, Chen Mo holds the golden light and restrained technology ball in his hands, staring at it.

He wants to look inside and see if there are any special places.

After the completion of the space plane, the golden light inside the technology ball has skyrocketed. Now there is already a goose egg size, but the technology ball that is the size of the football is filled up, and there is still a great distance.

The condition for the next permission to open is that the technology ball is completely discolored.

This means that if he wants to gain greater authority and deeper secrets from the technology library, he must constantly develop various technologies.

Mysterious mystery is always very curious.

And there is also a mission of supreme, but now, he does not even know what the mission is.

From the highest authority to access the technology library, Chen Mo does not know when to open.

This is a process that cannot be rushed.

Out of the technology library, Chen Mo sat on the bed for a while before standing up and leaving the room.

For two months, for researchers and international events, this is not a long time span.

During this period, the European Space Agency and the island space space development agency successively launched the experimental cabin of the space station in accordance with the scheduled date, successfully docked with the Zeus core cabin, and the United States also launched two other two test sites, forming the first The prototype of the second phase of the International Space Station.

In a short period of time, the formation of the second phase of the International Space Station also gave the United States a huge international reputation.

You sing, I will debut.

The world has set off a wave of space exploration, and seems to be reluctant to be in space. Women are behind people.

Soon after, the Pakistani Railway, the Arab countries and China's good countries, also reached a cooperation, announced the addition of Ling Xiaohao's space exploration project.

Soon after the two sides reached a cooperation, the Linglong project team announced that the Long March 10 rocket was launched in the return capsule, successfully sent an Arab astronaut into space, replaced the Liuyan cloud in space and returned to the ground, and announced that it was preparing to launch a new aircraft. The experimental cabin expands the size of the Lingxiao.

In addition to the space station's news, there are other popular news.

Some official media published articles and videos, concealing that the Army Ant Group has sold space planes to the military for use as a new generation of strategic equipment to increase the space deterrence of national defense.

When the news came out, many people immediately thought of the American falcon.

After the launch of the ‘Falcon’ spacecraft, the world is shrouded in the shadow of this space-based weapon. Nowadays, the news of China’s suggestion of an aerospace plane is undoubtedly a counterbalance to the ‘Falcon’.

Competition and cooperation, confrontation and balance.

As always, fighting and not breaking, the world is full of infinite vitality.

......

Flying Ant Center.

Ou Cheng looked at Chen Mo’s test results and his eyes revealed his admiration.

He is a retired astronaut training expert. He just retired. Li Chengzhi introduced him to the marching ant group. He is now an astronaut training technical consultant at the Feiyang Space Center.

Originally he only served as a consultant and then trained new people, but two months ago, Chen Mo came to the training center to prepare for astronaut training.

Hearing Chen Molai’s astronaut training, the entire training team of the Space Center was shocked. A legendary figure with countless wealth, but did not expect to venture into space.

However, what shocked them even more was that Chen Mo chose a package for professional astronaut training.

This choice made the entire training team startled.

Astronaut training has been very hard, professional astronaut training, the intensity has multiplied.

Because of his special status, in strict sense, he is now half his boss. In order to avoid mistakes, Ou Cheng and several other consultants, as well as senior astronauts trained in the recruitment, decided to train Chen Mo together.

However, their shock also began with the training of Chen Mo, until now, has been practicing a numb heart, and then unbelievable things appear on Chen Mo, they can accept.

Professional astronauts must first master the basic theoretical knowledge, such as astronomy, geography, meteorology, geology, flight mechanics, atmospheric physics, computer, radio navigation, spacecraft related knowledge, but also the necessary medical knowledge and rescue technology .

Basic theoretical knowledge, they thought it was very simple for Chen Mo at the beginning. After all, Chen Mo, a enchanting person, theoretically, is definitely not bad.

But Chen Mo's demon is beyond imagination.

All basic theoretical knowledge, other astronauts must repeat the review in a few months, in order to master, Chen Mo in the three days, all mastered, but still the kind of backward.

For the first time, the entire team realized the horror of Chen Mo, and realized that the legend of Chen Mo is terrible.

I thought that Chen Mo's learning ability is very good, and there will be no good results in terms of physical fitness.

After all, physical fitness is a big hurdle for researchers, but what shocks them is that Chen Mo’s performance in physical training is far beyond the imagination of all of them, and it is as terrible as his ability to learn.

There are many projects for their physical exercise.

Training endurance for long-distance running, swimming, climbing; training weight, sit-ups, pull-ups; testing flexibility gymnastics, spiral ladders, trampolines, swings, swivel chairs; as well as running a cardio, running bikes, bicycles, etc. There are surfing, skiing, etc.

All physical training, after a period of familiarity with Chen Mo, showed strong adaptability.

This is only two months of training, physical performance, has been a professional astronaut.

For the extra-heavy endurance training, Chen Mo received the acceleration of 7g when he first entered the centrifuge. After a period of adaptation, he successfully broke the acceleration of 10g, and his mind was still very clear, and his hearing vision was normal.

Hypobaric hypoxia endurance, weightlessness, vestibular function, noise and vibration environment training, psychological quality training.

After all the training, Chen Mo showed a strong learning ability after a period of adaptation, which made the team shock again and again.

In two months, the skills and skills mastered by the astronauts are basically mastered, and the speed can be described by terror.

Except for metamorphosis, they can't think of other adjectives.

So now that I saw Chen Mo’s test results, the team’s people were already numb, but they were not surprised, but only left awe.

"what's the result?"

Zhao Min saw that the expressions of the faces of the people were not very rich, and could not help but ask.

Chen Mo wants to enter space. Rationally, she does not want to see it, because once a problem arises, the consequences are unimaginable. But what this man wants to do, she can't stop it, she can only support it.

Two months ago, Chen Mo was trained by a professional astronaut, and she was shocked.

Later, I thought about it. After the development of potential, Chen Mo is much better than ordinary people. These training problems should be small, so I can rest assured.

"The theoretical knowledge and physique, all test scores are A grade, this is the person I have seen the most abnormal for so long, both mental and physical, very terrible."

Ou Cheng sincerely lamented that this will be the only one in his life, to see such a terrible person.

"The boss now has the qualities of a professional astronaut."

Two months, mastering the skills that other astronauts could master in a few years, Zhao Min couldn't help but say a pervert in his heart when he heard these words.

"It seems that the hard work of these two months has not been in vain."

Chen Mo was stunned at the side of his head. He had just come down from the swivel chair of the vestibular function training. Some of them were dizzy, but the problem was not big.

Space is still a strange field for him. The conditions are extremely harsh and the danger is self-evident. In order to board the space, he must be prepared.

Although space planes have equipment such as escape cabins, the necessary skills are still mastered through professional training.

Now that training is almost over, he can then consider entering space.

“When is it into space?” Zhao Min asked when he left the training center.

It has been determined that Chen Mo’s determination to enter space is unstoppable. Otherwise, he will not eat such a big bite. He will come here for two months of training. Now that the training is completed, he can guess that Chen Mo’s next step is to go to space.

"About ten days or so, by the way, send a few satellites."

"What satellite is this time?"

"Lunar orbit satellite." Chen Mo drank: "But before that, I need to ask the team of the project, the data on the back of the moon and the orbit data of the Lagrange L2 point."

chapters.title: Chapter 597: : Chen Mo'S Ambition
chapters.body:
Chapter 597: : Chen Mo'S Ambition

Flying Ant Center.

Zhang Jianfeng came down from the car, next to Li Chengzhi to accompany him. This is his third time to come to the Ant Ant Space Center. Every time he comes here, he feels a lot.

The first two times were to see the goddess test flight, but this time it was not empty-handed.

In his hands, there is a safe.

Inside the box is the data obtained by the project team's satellite on the moon, including the temperature, environment, topography and other detailed data on the back of the moon, as well as the data of the Lagrange point where the bridge relay star is located.

It can be said that the data obtained by the engineering project for decades has been in it.

The cooperation between the Linghao project and the marching ant group has achieved great success, adding too much convenience to the Linghao project, allowing Huaxia to celebrate the country and let Huaxia establish its position as a top powerhouse in space exploration projects.

This time, Chen Mo contacted him and said that he needed to use the data of the lunar exploration project, hoping to cooperate and share the data of the moon.

Upon receiving this news, Zhang Jianfeng immediately notified the experts of the entire project team. After a simple meeting of the experts of the project team, they unanimously passed and decided to share the data to Chen Mo.

Of course, it is not a free one, it is a cooperative investment.

Space exploration and the moon are Chen Mo's next target. The flying ant space company with aerospace technology will have unlimited space for cooperation in the future.

Moreover, Chen Mo’s data obtained during the lunar exploration will also have one of them.

No matter how they count, they are not losing.

Seeing Chen Mo, Zhang Jianfeng smiled and greeted the past, and solemnly handed the box in his hand to Chen Mo.

"Account Chen, this is the moon data you want."

"Thank you, I didn't expect Zhang Academician to personally send it." After Chen Modao thanked, Zheng took the box.

The data in this box, from scratch, condensed the efforts of the engineering project team for decades, for them, is very precious data.

"I heard that you accepted the astronaut training, is ready to enter space?" Zhang Jianfeng asked.

"Yes, I am going to enter space for a lap next week and launch a few moon satellites by the way."

After Chen Mo gave the box to the ink girl, he led Zhang Jianfeng to the workshop where the satellite was placed. Through the transparent window, you can see that in the clean room, a few moon orbiting satellites are already ready and quietly placed inside.

“Is there a plan to land on the moon?” Zhang Jianfeng asked the satellite inside.

"What do you mean by myself?"

"Yes."

"Yes, but to be prepared, I need to look at the conditions on the moon first, and then decide whether I want to go to the moon in person." Chen Mo said.

Landing on the moon is inevitable.

The 氦-3 on the moon is a perfect nuclear fusion material. Now the nuclear fusion technology is mature, but the nuclear fusion 氘-氚 fuel also needs artificial synthesis, the cost is too high, and the amount of synthesis is limited.

The two nuclear fusion power plants under construction by Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group have come to an end and will be officially put into use soon. The beginning of the human energy revolution may begin.

If you take advantage of this opportunity to find out the situation of the moon and build a lunar base or outpost there, he will master nuclear fusion technology and fuel resources in the future.

Jumping out of the circle of the earth, there is an infinite universe outside.

But outside the earth, most of them are unknown, and the unknown means uncontrollable danger. Before he can confirm the situation, he can't rush.

"When can we cooperate in this area?" Zhang Jianfeng asked.

The marching ant group also proved the strength of the Goddess aerospace plane. In the future space exploration, they have unlimited possibilities, and cooperation has great benefits for them.

"Don't you have been working together?" Chen Mo looked at the box in the hands of the ink woman.

"Yes." Zhang Jianfeng laughed and was happy: "I look forward to your good news. If you need to use the bridge relay star, we can also provide convenience."

Some international space exploration agencies, including NASA, borrow bridge bridge relay stars, and they will not refuse.

Because of the use of the bridge relay star, they must pass their consent, and then use their data channel for data transmission, others borrow, they can also get a piece of data, and make a profit.

"It may need to be used, but for the convenience of future detection, I will also launch a relay satellite this time."

Chen Mo pointed to one of the satellites in the workshop.

"It's called ‘Jianmu No.1'.

His space exploration research will often use data. He can't always use the satellite to find the official satellite. It is more convenient to use his own satellite.

"Looking forward to your good news."

Zhang Jianfeng took a deep look at Chen Mo. From Chen Mo's various actions and plans, his ambitions for space are not small.

According to the United Nations Treaty on Outer Space, the moon is like the international waters of the Earth. It is not subject to the jurisdiction of any country, nor is it the territory of any country. Any private company can explore and explore on the moon, just like capturing on the high seas. Fish, whoever gets it first belongs to who.

There is endless wealth and resources, just the fuel 氦-3 needed for nuclear fusion. In the shallow shallow surface soil, the reserves are as high as one million tons, enough for people on the earth to use for tens of thousands of years.

Other countries and international space organizations are trying to land on the moon, hoping to seize the opportunity, but there is no flying chess that can freely enter and exit the moon.

If Chen Mo's space plane enters the moon and has the ability to exploit lunar resources and get the best opportunity, then he will be a real rich enemy.

Chen Mo has those resources and is good for them.

Because Chen Mo is a Chinese, he has the ability to exploit those resources, and it is quite a Chinese resource that has the resources and technology. The benefits are self-evident.

......

“Is it a little risky?” asked Zhao Min.

Chen Mo is now getting the data of the moon, and the time to prepare to enter space is getting closer.

This will be a very important decision.

If Chen Mo successfully enters space tourism, the benefits of Feixiang Aerospace's space tourism project are very great, but once it fails, the consequences are unimaginable.

In principle, Zhao Min is against Chen Mo’s entry into space.

However, her objection can only be a suggestion for Chen Mo. He does not listen to it, but also depends on Chen Mo. It may be that Xiaoyu is opposed, he will listen, but Xiaoyu has always supported him unconditionally. He has not heard that Xiaoyu has objected to any decision made by Chen Mo.

“Without a little adventurous spirit, how do you enter the stars and sea?” Chen Mo nodded: “I will take you to play next time.”

Zhao Min turned his eyes directly.

This guy also wants to take her to play with the excitement.

"If it's a date, I might consider it, space dating is also very romantic, unique, isn't it?"

"amount?"

Chen Mo smiled and smiled while shaking his head. He did not know how to answer Zhao Min’s words.

Space dating, she still wants to lose.

"Exactly."

"Then I expect you to take me up, don't swear." Zhao Min showed a smile, not waiting for Chen Mo to answer, directly turn off the holographic communication video.

Chen Mo: "..."

The next day, the marching ant group officially announced that on the 23rd of this month, Chen Mo, the founder of the marching ant group, will take the Shennong space plane into space and start a space journey. This will be the first manned space flight of the Goddess space plane.

The announcement of the marching ant group has become a hot topic of public concern.

At the last live broadcast, Chen Mo revealed his thoughts on space. It was not long before he realized his rhetoric.

Nowadays, during the boom of international space exploration, as the news is released, more and more people are paying attention to Chen Mo’s space journey.

Since the exposure of the space plane, the exploration ability of the marching ant group in the space field has leapt to the forefront of the world. If the Chen Mo space journey returns safely, the advertising effect will be enough to allow the Sky Travel project of the Fei Ant Space Center to be fully rolled out.

chapters.title: Chapter 598: : Waiting For You To Triumph
chapters.body:
Chapter 598: : Waiting For You To Triumph

"Aerospace aircraft first manned space flight? Chen Mo is experimenting with his own life" - Washington Daily

"Meeting the astronauts who lost their lives in space" - The New York Times

In the history of human space and blood, will there be another name? 》——The Times.

The world is paying attention to Chen Mo’s space.

The army has not moved, and public opinion is first.

In the case of Chen Mo’s space, the attitudes of the Western media and the Chinese media are polarized.

The Western media collectively sang the decline, and the reports given all carried a pessimistic remark. If Chen Mo is involved in space, the loss to China will be immeasurable.

The Chinese domestic media all hope that Chen Mo can succeed, although Chen Mo’s decision to play in person is not very wise.

As the 23rd is getting closer, the eyes of the outside world are beginning to pay attention to Chen Mo’s space.

"You said, will Chen Mo succeed in entering space this time?"

"I see no problem. It is not a strange thing to enter space now. Chen Mo's technological strength is no problem in entering space."

"He is a bit reckless. He dared to play on his own for the first time. He has confidence in his skills, but he doesn't have to take his own life to take risks."

“If you are not adventurous, how can you explore the universe?”

The goddess has not yet taken off, and various forums and debates have appeared on various forum platforms.

A man with countless wealth and fame, dare to take such risks and become the first astronaut of the space plane.

Chen Mo, a world-class celebrity, is an eye-catching news of any public event. This is a hot topic.

......

"Wait for your triumph."

Xiao Yu gently hugged Chen Mo, everything is in the air.

This is the first manned spaceship of the goddess. Although she does not want Chen Mo to personally take risks in space, since it is Chen Mo’s decision, she can only support it.

"Yes." Chen Mo kissed Xiao Yu's forehead: "In space, I will video with you again, and I will have a chance to take you to play later."

"Ok."

"Remember what you said last time, the universe is so big, I want to see it too." Zhao Min and Chen Mo gently hugged and said with a smile.

Chen Mo remembered Zhao Min’s last words, but he still smiled helplessly. After bidding farewell, Chen Mo waved to other people and turned to the sky plane.

"Why don't you care about him, let him take such an adventure." Zhao Min stood by Xiao Yu.

"I can't manage it."

Xiao Yu smiled and shook his head and looked at Chen Mo's back until Chen Mo disappeared behind the cabin door.

The little thing at home is what she said. Occasionally, in some small matters that are not important, she will manage Chen Mo, but she will never oppose Chen Mo’s decision before the big decision and the important decision.

She didn't want to help Chen Mo herself, but also brought trouble and embarrassment to him.

"When he comes back, let him lick the keyboard."

"Let him sleep on the floor."

Chen Mo entered the space plane, the airport of the Space Center began to clear the scene, all the staff began to withdraw, and quickly walked toward the command center, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min also followed.

Yao Yi is also in the crowd watching the ceremony, some sly: "This guy, this time is indeed a little risky."

Next to Li Chengzhi agreed to nod.

"No way, who can manage him? His wife may be able to manage, but she will not oppose Chen Mo's decision."

Li Chengzhi looked at the small fishing around Zhao Min.

This is one of the few people who can persuade Chen Mo, but she has never seen her because of anything, and Chen Mo is a big noisy woman. A very sensible woman is also the reason why Chen Mo is petting her.

"Why do you want to go up in person, or the first manned flight."

"Perhaps his vision is not limited to the three-point land of the earth." Li Chengzhi said.

This is the only answer he can think of.

Chen Mo's powerful, beyond imagination, no one can say, Chen Mo really can jump out of the earth space, after all, what horrible technology has.

Nuclear fusion technology is also mature, and as long as the conditions are sufficient, the era of interstellar colonization can be opened.

Inside the goddess.

Chen Mo entered the escape cabin of the space plane and fastened the seat belt.

On the issue of life safety, he will not come.

Space is full of unknown dangers, and it is still the first time that Goddess carries manned space, so Chen Mo has double insurance.

Originally in the space plane, you don't have to wear spacesuits or enter the safety cabin. You should sit in the cabin like a normal airplane, or Chen Mo himself sitting in the cab.

However, in order to insure, Chen Mo chose to wear a space suit and chose to take off in a safe cabin.

For the first time in space, he did not have any experience, and he did not know whether the above environment could be adapted. This is also just in case.

All the preparations have been completed, Chen Mocai took a deep breath, put on the hood of the spacesuit, and opened the oxygen supply.

"Ink girl, ready, ready to take off."

"Get off after 10 minutes, get ready." The ink girl sat in the cockpit of the plane, as the driver, this aerospace, she accompanied Chen Mo to heaven.

After 10 minutes, under the lens of the global live broadcast, the goddess slowly floated, rushing toward the distant horizon, straight into the sky, disappearing under the lens of all media.

In the cabin, Chen Mo can clearly see the various data displayed on the screen, and the height is constantly rising.

This is an aerospace plane, and there is no huge acceleration of the rocket taking off, but Chen Mo still can clearly feel the thrust of the acceleration.

The data on the screen is also constantly changing.

Not long after, it has reached an altitude of 50,000 meters.

70 kilometers...

90 kilometers...

110 kilometers...

As time went by, Chen Mo also watched the changes in the data on the screen. When he was bored, he also talked to the ink girl.

As the height increased, Chen Mo began to feel some discomfort, but these discomforts were within the limits of Chen Mo. After more than two months of training, all this is ready.

......

"Chen Mo is vacant."

Far from the other end of the Pacific Ocean, Jim saw the goddess flying through the live video and opened his mouth.

The space center and space research institutes around the world are paying attention to Chen Mo’s space flight.

The second execution of the space mission of the Goddess Confucius aircraft is manned space flight.

The mystery of the plane was not revealed by the exposure of the news, but the mystery of the heart was growing.

In addition to the videos and pictures captured by the media, the Flying Ant Center has never announced any performance or other parameters of the aircraft. So far, they know nothing about the operation of the Goddess aerospace engine and the fuel, and they use nothing beyond the times, and they know nothing about it.

Even the latest ‘Hercules’ rockets, they can’t guarantee that black technology can surpass the goddess.

"If this time Chen Mo succeeds, it is basically certain that this type of aircraft poses a huge threat to the security of our country," said the assistant next to Jim.

"Security threats are not within the scope of our work, it is the work of the Pentagon."

Jim said.

"Our work is to explore this piece in space and maintain the world's leading position. Although this **** position will soon be caught up by China, but at least not now, this is the order above."

"What do you do now?" asked the assistant.

"What should I do now? It is time to go to sleep. Can you still go to the presidential candidate? This day, I am concerned about China, not tired."

Jim looked at the time, it was late at night, tired of the eyebrows, standing up from the position.

"Tomorrow early tomorrow, we announced plans to land on the moon."

chapters.title: Chapter 599: :Space Live
chapters.body:
Chapter 599: :Space Live

In the outer space of 400 kilometers, the speed of the goddess is enough to maintain the surrounding, the ion engine is turned off, and it is flying smoothly.

This height is already quite the height of the space station.

From the beginning, Chen Mo can clearly feel the change of the environment, the body is not affected by gravity, a little uncomfortable, feeling upside down, blood rushing to the head, dizziness.

This feeling is getting stronger and stronger.

In the ground training, there was a handstand training, and also simulated the sense of weightlessness in space in the water and on the plane, but the real come here is completely different from the training.

A dizzy chest tightness of nausea, the chest feels congested, his face is also swollen, feeling the blood constantly rushing to the face, the body does not listen.

"Ink girl, what is the situation now?"

Chen Mo took a deep breath and endured discomfort.

He is a little uncomfortable in the safe cabin and has some expectations for the outside.

“The goddess is stable, with a height of 417 kilometers and a speed of 7.85 kilometers per second. The air pressure in the cabin is normal and the temperature is normal.”

The voice of the ink girl came from the ear.

"This is a photo outside."

The ink girl passed a photo to the screen of the safety cabin.

A photo of a galaxy is much more beautiful than the Milky Way seen on Earth.

"Mergo, do you feel unwell?"

"Fortunately, my face is swollen, my chest is stuffy, I feel discomfort, I can adapt. I want to go out and get ready." Chen Mo said.

"Now the plane has flown smoothly, and Merle can come out at any time."

"it is good."

After confirming that the situation was stable, Chen Mo untied the seat belt that fixed the body, and the movement was a bit difficult.

In the next moment, the body floated uncontrollably, and there was no point in stress. Chen Mo felt the feeling of being around, very insecure, and his hands and feet were awkward and uncoordinated.

Chen Mo can only hold the handle next to keep the body stable.

"Open the door of the safety compartment." Chen Mo tried to keep his breathing comfortable and relieve his discomfort.

Oh...

With a soft bang, the door opens smoothly.

The action was a bit clumsy, and Chen Mo grabbed the handle and did not dare to use too much leverage.

During the training, the expert once told him that when operating in space, the borrowing power should not be too large, otherwise it would be easy to force it too hard.

The body floated out of the safety compartment, and Chen Mo was suspended in the activity cabin. With the help of the robot, he directly took off his spacesuit and put on a tight spacesuit.

"Merco." Ink entered the cabin and helped Chen Mo change clothes together.

There is an electromagnet under the foot of the ink, which can absorb the bulkhead, and she is not affected by gravity. The limbs are very harmonious and more convenient than Chen Mo.

"Let's go, look at the core cabin."

Chen Mozhen's bloated face, holding the ink girl's shoulder, let her take the core cabin past.

Flying Ant Center.

Inside the command center, everyone is waiting.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min are obviously anxious, and their fears on their faces are lingering.

If it is not the instrument display, the flight and operation of the space plane is normal, at this time do not know what it is.

“How is it now to go to school?”

Zhao Min was also anxious to know that Xiao Yu was worried than anyone else, and could not help but divert her attention.

"She is very awkward, and now she has adapted to the kindergarten environment. Chen Mo has compiled some enlightenment knowledge for the kindergarten's expert teachers, let the teacher teach the children, the effect is very good. Musou took a little red flower a while ago, gave her father Show off, every day, chanting Min Min, I want to show you."

"Then I will pass tonight."

Zhao Min heard that she had missed her, showing a smile of joy.

"His enlightenment knowledge is estimated to be specially prepared for the unparalleled, but the children who enter the kindergarten can be blessed, and maybe there will be several prodigies in the future."

"Fortunately, I just started to try his education on enlightenment. Some parents still have a lot of opinions, but I heard that it was her husband who sorted it out and there was no opinion.

There are a lot of rich families now, knowing that the kindergarten is dedicated to the unparalleled, and wants to send the children in. The number of places for admission is tense. Some time ago, the Education Bureau also sent people to come over and asked for an enlightenment knowledge compiled by Chen Mo. I heard that research can be promoted nationwide. ”

Xiao Yu did not consciously show a proud smile. When it came to Chen Mo’s excellence, it seemed that other troubles were forgotten.

"I don't know how he is doing now, it really doesn't make people worry."

"According to time, you should contact quickly." Zhao Min looked at the time.

"When he comes back, he really wants him to sleep on the floor."

"I guess you can't bear it." Zhao Min joked.

Now on the space plane, there is no connection to the ground, so the atmosphere in the command center is somewhat cautious, and there is a trace of tension. After all, this time, Chen Mo is a very important person. If there is a case, things will be very serious.

Li Chengzhi is also anxious. Chen Mo is an extremely rare talent. He has made a great contribution to the country. If there is a problem, it will definitely be a great loss.

But in the face of many experts, as well as the robots responsible for the work, he did not know who to ask, can only wait anxiously.

connection succeeded!

In the command post, when the atmosphere was tense, the voice of the ink girl suddenly sounded.

This voice, let the silent command post, instantly live, everyone's eyes, do not consciously look to the big screen in front.

On the big screen, Chen Mo’s face with a smile, the angle is like a self-portrait, and it looks good.

This scene almost made Xiao Yu cry out.

Worried for a few hours, seeing Chen Mo safe and sound, a raised heart can finally fall.

"Successful, let everyone wait."

As soon as this was said, the command center was full of joy.

“How do you feel? Is the physical discomfort not too serious?” Ou Cheng asked.

"Yes, the physical response is a little bit heavier than the training. After the adaptation, there is not much problem now. On the contrary, the novelty is very strange." Chen Mo said.

"That's good."

Chen Mo is fine, it is a good news for everyone.

"Small fish?"

"I am here." Xiao Yu hurried forward, looking at the big screen, his eyes soft.

"Don't worry, the problem here is not big, I will go back soon, I guess you are thinking about it, go back and let me sleep on the floor." Chen Mo said.

"You guessed it," said Xiao Yu.

"..."

When Xiaoyu said this, the air was quiet, and then, in the command post, everyone laughed. Everyone knows that it is a joke, a joke, and pushes the atmosphere of joy to a high point.

Chen Mo also smiled.

"Remember to prepare for what I like to eat, to celebrate, the outer sky is beautiful, the earth is very beautiful, take you to see it next time."

"it is good."

Small fishing heavy focus.

"Zhao Min."

"Yeah." Zhao Min walked to the camera: "I finally thought of me."

“What do I need to do?” Chen Mo said.

With his understanding of Zhao Min, business ideas never fall. What's more, when he successfully entered space, Zhao Min will certainly not let such a good publicity opportunity.

"I know mys."

Zhao Min smiled.

"Since you mentioned it, then I will talk about it. If you are ignorant of watching the scenery in space, you will have a live broadcast of space. Give the company's staff a live speech in space."

The boss of a company is doing live broadcasts on the plane, which is self-confidence. It can make the company employees increase their pride and cohesiveness, and also increase Chen Mo’s leadership and personal charm.

In addition, this is also a disguised commercial propaganda.

Chen Mo does live in space, the coffee table and attraction are enough, and the media will promote it spontaneously.

This kind of propaganda can increase the confidence of the outside world in the marching ant group space tourism project, satellite launch project and other space exploration projects. In any case, Chen Mo successfully entered space and the propaganda must not be less.

"Also, give the Marina Kindergarten a live broadcast of space, let the unparalleled and those children look at the magic of space." Next to the small fishing opening.

In this kind of scene, I can see Dad’s daddy. From a young age, she has a heart that worships Dad, and she is very dependent on Chen Mo, and can make the little girl happy.

"Well, you have arranged, I will stay in space for a few days, and I can broadcast live tomorrow."

chapters.title: Chapter 600: : The Battle Of Space
chapters.body:
Chapter 600: : The Battle Of Space

After hanging up the communication with the ground, Chen Mo borrowed the force to reach the window of the hatch.

Outside is the endless starry sky.

There is almost no air here, and there is no pollution. The Galaxy, which is now seen, is shining brightly.

Only when you look up at the stars, you can clearly feel that human beings are small. In the endless universe, the earth is just a little dusty, unremarkable, but magical.

The outer starry sky is full of infinite mystery and unknown, and now human beings are just just able to get out of the earth.

Sometimes I look at the stars and think deeper, my heart always wraps around a sense of panic.

Because of the endlessness of the outside, we can understand the status of human beings in the universe. Perhaps in the face of advanced alien civilizations, humans are similar to the invisible bacteria.

If one day is discovered by a higher civilization, maybe they will end up doing the same as human ants.

In the vast universe, for the present human beings, alien life is temporarily unknown and dangerous.

After watching the starry sky for a long time, Chen Mocai regained his gaze.

It is not the time of emotion and fantasy.

Be prepared to work, at least one day in the future, when he really discovers alien life, he can have some psychological preparations.

"Ink girl, ready to launch the moon satellite." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, the launch countdown is 10 minutes."

The ink girl began to report time.

The space flight also has the task of launching a moon satellite.

In addition to the rich 氦-3, the moon is also the outpost of the Earth, looking up at the stars, the moon is the first starting point.

This time, a total of 4 satellites and 1 landing machine were launched, including ‘Jianmu 1’ relay star, lunar resource exploration satellite, lunar geological exploration satellite, lunar reconnaissance satellite and one-month back lander.

Unlike satellites that were launched last time, the moon satellites use a fully functional micro-ion engine as a power source, with no accidents, permanent operation, and a return function.

Although the project team of the lunar exploration project shared the moon's data with him, he must also have his own data collection method, which will serve as a source of information for his future exploration of the moon.

“The 'Jianmu 1’ relay star is ready to leave the goddess...”

“‘Jianmu 1’ has been separated from the goddess...”

“The '蟾蜍1' geological exploration satellite is preparing to leave the goddess...”

"..."

“The 'laurel 1’ resource detection satellite is ready to leave the goddess...”

"..."

"The 'Wu Gang 1' reconnaissance satellite is preparing to leave the goddess..."

"..."

"The Moon God 1 lander is ready to leave the goddess..."

"..."

4 stars and 1 device, in just one hour, they gradually separated from the goddess.

Since the use of an ion engine does not take into account the problem of fuel depletion, there is no need to change the orbit, but the direct acceleration, away from the gravity of the earth, flies past the moon.

"How long does it take for the satellite to reach the moon?"

“It is expected that 35 hours into the lunar orbit, the satellite will automatically change its own track according to the calculated data.”

Luna 1 Lander will only choose to land on the moon after the Jianmu No. 1 is in orbit.

After obtaining the lunar orbit data from Zhang Jianfeng, Chen Mo has allowed the ink girl to carry out multiple simulations and accurate calculations. The satellite carries artificial intelligence. Within the range of the lunar gravity, it will determine the situation and control the satellite to change the orbit.

Because the moon transmits data back, the Earth will issue instructions to the satellite, and there will be a delay in time, so that the satellite's artificial intelligence can judge the data, which is the best solution.

ground.

With the approval of Chen Mo, Zhao Min immediately let Lanxi draw up a notice and issue all branches and subsidiaries of the group.

The founder of the group, Chen Mo, successfully entered the space on the Goddess. On the 24th, Huaxia time, all employees of the marching ant group (global), one day off, at 9:30 in the morning, collectively watched Chen Mo, the founder of the marching ant group, in the space broadcast company. Internal speech, the overseas branch adjusted the day's work time on its own, and concentrated on watching the speech.

As soon as the announcement came out, the marching ant group was drawn up and down.

Today, many employees are paying attention to the news that their bosses are going into space. It has now proved that Chen Mo has successfully entered space.

A sense of pride, in the minds of every employee of the marching ant group.

This announcement has stirred up waves.

Chen Mocai has just been launched for a few hours. This announcement appeared. From the side, Chen Mo has safely entered space and has to give a speech in space.

The media’s self-proclaimed publicity soon became known to the world.

The news spread, attracting countless envy and hatred.

This is the strength of the company.

Now, when you say that you are an employee of the marching ant group, you will unconsciously have a sense of pride.

However, the announcement of the marching ant group seems to once again affect global action.

Shortly after the announcement of the marching ant group, the country announced that it will launch the plan to land on the moon again this month.

The dream of a small country, after the country is the third power, the fourth country that launched a spacecraft to the moon, failed once in 19 years, and now plans to open again. This country is small, but its ambition can be seen.

The news announced by the country has just fallen, India is not to be outdone, the Indian Space Research Organization announced that it will launch a spacecraft to land on the moon next month.

The two countries chose to upload news at this point in time, no doubt they have any deep meaning.

The upsurge of space exploration continues.

Wait for the message to cool.

At 9 o'clock that evening, NASA also issued a notice to launch the 'Hercules Plan' to return to the moon. It is ready to use the Hercules 1 to send the astronauts to the moon again, and will build a permanent base on the moon in the future.

The group is arguing for hegemony, and Russia is not willing to show weakness. Shortly after the United States chose to announce its return to the moon, the Russian Space Agency also announced the launch of the Yuri Plan to return to the moon.

Later, the European Space Agency also issued an announcement, and will soon launch a lander to the moon.

In less than half a day, several of the world's strongest groups of countries have announced or hinted at the moon landing plan, causing global shocks.

Following the second phase of the International Space Station project, the Huaxia United States expansion Linglong plan, the American Falcon plan and the marching ant group Goddess launched, the space exploration competition officially entered the second stage.

Space exploration seems to be at this moment, entering the era of competition.

No one is behind.

All countries with foresight know that there is an important resource of 氦-3 on the moon, and China's nuclear fusion technology has matured, nuclear power plants are just around the corner, energy reform is about to open, and now the army ant group has successfully developed the **** girl. The aircraft has the ability to land on the moon.

They must be preparing for the future.

Otherwise, once the quality resources are occupied by China, it will be very passive in the future.

It is too strange for many powerful countries to announce their landing on the moon.

For a time, conspiracy theories, the news of some bloggers' eyes, have already found the wreckage of alien spaceships on the back of the moon. Many countries are competing for the opportunity to acquire the alien technology and alien bodies of the shipwreck.

What caused a series of consequences is naturally because of an announcement by the marching ant group.

As the initiator and protagonist of the event, the internal speech of the marching ant group Chen Mo has also become the focus of global attention.
